HOIST first finetunes a high-level vision-language-action (VLA) policy from virtual-reality (VR) teleoperation demonstrations and executes its commands through a whole-body controller. It then uses VLA rollouts and iterative batched RL to improve placement accuracy and stopping behavior. Experiments in simulation and on a real humanoid show that HOIST improves over imitation-only and additional-demonstration baselines; compared with pure VLA rollouts, HOIST reduces translational placement error by 19.9 cm and raw angular error by 3.56 degrees, demonstrating the potential of humanoids for underactuated material-handling tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HOIST的新方法，通过结合模仿学习和高效强化学习，实现人形机器人对悬挂负载的精准操控，并在仿真和实物实验中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人操作悬挂负载极具挑战性，因其只能通过全身运动和间歇接触间接控制，这导致了运动的欠驱动性和振荡性。传统的模仿学习方法虽然安全但难以优化最终定位，而从零强化学习又样本效率低且不可安全地在实体机器人上直接应用。
AI.method: HOIST方法首先利用虚拟现实遥操作演示，微调高层的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略，再通过全身控制器执行。之后，结合VLA rollout和批次强化学习，进一步提升放置精度和停止行为。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实人形机器人实验中，HOIST方法相较于只模仿学习和添加额外演示的基线方法，都取得了更好效果。与纯VLA方法相比，平移位置误差减少了19.9厘米，角度误差减少了3.56度。
AI.conclusion: HOIST方法验证了通过结合模仿和高效强化学习，人形机器人能够更好地完成复杂的欠驱动物料搬运任务，显示出实际应用潜力。

title: Versatile Framework with Semantic and Structural guidance for Image Reconstruction from Brain Activity
summary: Reconstructing visual stimuli from brain recordings has been a meaningful and challenging task in brain decoding. Especially, the achievement of precise and controllable image reconstruction bears great significance in propelling the progress and utilization of brain-computer interfaces. Recent methods, leveraging advances in the power of text-to-image generation models, have reconstructed images that closely approximate complex natural stimuli in terms of semantics (e.g., concepts and objects). However, they struggle to maintain consistency with the original stimuli in fine-grained structural information (e.g., position, orientation and size), which undermines both the controllability and interpretability of the models. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose a two-stage image reconstruction framework, termed MindDiffuser. In Stage 1, Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) text embeddings decoded from brain responses are input into Stable Diffusion, generating a preliminary image containing semantic information. In Stage 2, we use decoded shallow CLIP visual features as supervisory signals, iteratively refining the feature vectors from Stage 1 via backpropagation to align structural information. We conducted extensive experiments on brain response datasets across three modalities (fMRI, EEG, MEG) elicited by visual stimuli, demonstrating that our framework significantly enhances the performance of previous state-of-the-art models, highlighting the effectiveness and versatility of our approach. Spatial and temporal visualization results further support the neurobiological plausibility of our framework, providing guidance for future neural decoding efforts across different brain signal modalities.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的双阶段脑信号视觉重建方法MindDiffuser，大幅提升了重建图像的结构和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前脑信号重建图像的方法虽然在语义层面表现较好，但在重建细节结构（如位置、方向、大小）上表现不足，影响了结果的可控性和可解释性。
AI.method: MindDiffuser采用两阶段框架：第一阶段将从脑信号解码得到的CLIP文本特征输入Stable Diffusion生成初始语义图像；第二阶段用浅层CLIP视觉特征作为指导，通过反向传播迭代优化使生成图像在结构上与原始刺激对齐。
AI.result: 在三种脑信号模态（fMRI、EEG、MEG）上的实验证明，该方法优于现有最新方法，大幅提升了图像重建质量。空间和时间分析也支持其神经生物学合理性。
AI.conclusion: MindDiffuser能够显著提升脑-视觉解码的图像重建精度和泛化能力，为不同模态的神经解码研究提供了新思路。

title: Per-Group Error, Not Total MSE: Fine-Tuning Vision-Language-Action Models for 11-DoF Mobile Manipulation
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Accepted as poster at ICRA 2026 Workshop "From Data to Decisions: VLA Pipelines for Real Robots". Code: [https://github.com/paumontagut/per-group-mse-vla](https://github.com/paumontagut/per-group-mse-vla)
summary:
Fine-tuning Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for mobile manipulators with heterogeneous joint spaces can produce a counterintuitive result: the checkpoint with the lowest aggregate MSE is not the one that performs best on the real robot. We argue this is a predictable consequence of collapsing heterogeneous joint groups (arm, gripper, head, wheeled base) into a single metric, where easy-to-predict joints can mask joints that still fail.
  We fine-tune SmolVLA (450M, action-expert only) on the 11-DoF Toyota HSR and compare it against $π_{0.5}$ (3.3B), a stronger pretrained baseline. Per-group analysis exposes two patterns: in SmolVLA, the mobile base converges slowest and limits overall performance. In expert-only fine-tuning of $π_{0.5}$ (training only the action head, backbone frozen), total MSE drops below the baseline but arm accuracy degrades. On 60 real-robot trials (20 per model), $π_{0.5}$ 80k (4.0/4) significantly outperforms both fine-tuned variants (expert-only 3k: 3.75/4; HSR-SmolVLA: 3.5/4; Mann-Whitney $p \leq 0.010$), despite expert-only 3k having the lowest total MSE. This separation is most consistent with the offline arm-group error, not total MSE or base-group error. We conclude that per-group error is a more reliable signal than total MSE for checkpoint selection on robots with heterogeneous action spaces. Code: https://github.com/paumontagut/per-group-mse-vla

AI.tldr: 在异构关节空间的移动操作机器人中，仅根据总均方误差（MSE）选择模型检查点，可能无法获得最佳的实际机器人表现。需要按关节组分别评估误差。
AI.motivation: 调整视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型以适应具有多样关节空间的机器人时，常用的总MSE指标可能误导模型选择，因易预测的关节掩盖了难预测关节的不足。论文希望揭示并解决此问题。
AI.method: 将SmolVLA模型在11自由度的Toyota HSR机器人上微调，并与更强的预训练基线$π_{0.5}$比较。分别统计不同关节组（如手臂、底盘）在模型训练和实际机器人实验中的表现，分析各关节组误差与整体任务性能间的关系。
AI.result: 发现SmolVLA模型中，底盘组收敛最慢，成为整体性能瓶颈。单独微调动作头时，总MSE下降但手臂性能反而下降。无论总MSE表现如何，在真实机器人测试中，选取以手臂误差为主的模型获得更好效果。
AI.conclusion: 对于具有异构关节的移动机器人，按组别计算误差比总MSE更能反映模型实际效果，应据此选择最佳模型检查点。

title: CardioLens: Revealing the Clinical Reality Gap of MLLMs via Multi-Sequence Cardiac MRI Evaluations
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance on public medical benchmarks, yet existing evaluations often remain weak proxies for clinical use, relying on isolated inputs and simplified recognition-style tasks. We introduce CardioLens, a leakage-resistant evaluation testbed for multi-sequence Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance (CMR), constructed from private hospital archives through a rigorous report-to-QA construction and verification pipeline. CardioLens contains 473,896 slices and 13,494 verified QA pairs across 4D Cine, LGE, perfusion, and T2-weighted imaging, and evaluates three stages of CMR interpretation: image understanding, report generation, and disease diagnosis. Across 24 state-of-the-art MLLMs, CardioLens reveals a substantial clinical reality gap: models perform poorly overall, with performance degrading along the real CMR workflow. Confusion analysis further shows a category-collapse failure mode, where models default to frequent abnormal categories rather than distinguishing clinically distinct findings. To rule out MLLM-compatible input construction as the primary cause, we compare random, clinically motivated, and data-driven slice selection protocols under different slice budgets; performance changes only marginally, typically by about 1%. Explicit reasoning prompts also fail to rescue performance, often making models more conservative rather than improving visual evidence use. These results show that current MLLMs remain far from reliable CMR interpretation, where clinical decisions require integrating distributed evidence across sequences, views, and temporal phases. CardioLens provides a clinically grounded testbed for developing next-generation MLLMs toward real-world clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CardioLens，一个用于多序列心血管磁共振（CMR）医学影像的大规模、多模态大模型评测平台，揭示了现有多模态大模型（MLLMs）在真实医学场景下的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs虽然在公开医疗基准上表现强劲，但评估往往不切实际，难以反映真实临床需求。当前方法大多依赖单一输入和简化任务，无法检验模型在复杂、多序列医学成像中的表现。研究需要一个真实可靠的测试平台来推动MLLMs的临床应用。
AI.method: 构建了CardioLens评测集，从医院档案大量采集4D Cine、LGE、灌注、T2加权等CMR数据，生成13,494对经验证的问答对。评测分为影像理解、报告生成和疾病诊断三个阶段，用以衡量24种先进MLLMs在真实CMR工作流下的表现，并进行了混淆分析和多种切片选择实验。
AI.result: MLLMs在CardioLens上的总体表现较差，真实CMR流程越深入，模型表现越差。常见失败模式为类别塌陷，不能区分相近但不同的临床异常。不同切片选择方法对结果影响极小，显式推理也未能有效提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLMs离真实CMR影像判读还有较大差距，临床决策需要跨序列、视图及时间整合证据。CardioLens为医学领域下代多模态大模型的发展和部署提供了真实、标准的测试平台。

title: ScaRF-SLAM: Scale-Consistent Reconstruction with Feed-Forward Models and Classical Visual SLAM
summary: Recent works have explored unifying SLAM with geometric foundation models (GFMs). However, directly using GFM predictions for tracking is highly sensitive to model capability and uncertainty, as geometric inaccuracies in the predictions can adversely affect pose estimation. To address this limitation, we present a decoupled framework that integrates classical feature-based SLAM with GFMs, which achieves higher quality and more consistent dense reconstruction. In brief, we use classical visual SLAM for robust low-latency tracking and use GFMs exclusively for mapping. By anchoring mapping to poses produced by the SLAM module and optimizing across depth scales, the proposed design avoids propagating inaccuracies from GFM predictions into pose estimation while imposing geometric constraints on the reconstruction. The system builds submaps from multiple posed keyframes and enforces scale consistency via lightweight frame and submap scale optimization. It also performs projection-based point cloud fusion within each submap, and updates submaps online to reflect trajectory updates from the feature-based SLAM. To evaluate tracking and reconstruction of our method, we introduce a loop-rich, building-scale indoor dataset with accurate sensor trajectories and LiDAR ground-truth. Experiments show that our approach achieves superior trajectory accuracy while improving reconstruction precision by 10%-20% over existing methods, with about 2 cm reconstruction error per 10 m chunk on building-scale dataset. On large-scale outdoor datasets, it attains 10 cm error per 30 m chunk (w.r.t LiDAR ground-truth models).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将传统特征点SLAM与几何基础模型（GFMs）解耦结合的新方法，实现了更高质量、更一致的稠密重建，同时提升了定位与地图构建的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM结合GFMs的方法依赖模型预测，预测不准容易影响位姿估计。因此亟需新范式，既保障定位鲁棒性，又提升地图重建精度。
AI.method: 该方法采用传统视觉SLAM模块进行低延迟鲁棒跟踪，用GFMs专注于场景稠密重建。地图构建绑定于SLAM求出的相机姿态，通过深度尺度优化、子图融合、尺度一致性约束等设计，避免了GFM误差影响位姿估计。系统在线优化子图以反映轨迹变化。
AI.result: 在作者自建的大型室内数据集上，方法实现了优于现有方法的轨迹及重建精度，重建误差约2cm/10m（室内）、10cm/30m（室外），稠密重建精度提升10%-20%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法兼顾了传统SLAM鲁棒跟踪与GFM高精建图优势，提升了大场景下的定位与重建精度，具有推广应用潜力。

title: Positional Encodings Anchor Spatial Structure in Vision Transformers: A Geometric Perspective on Robustness
comment: 16 pages (9 main text, 7 appendix). 5 figures (3 main text, 2 appendix) with 8 graphics total. 5 tables (1 main text, 4 appendix). Submitted to NeurIPS 2026 main conference and the ICML 2026 mechanistic interpretability workshop
summary: Positional embeddings (PEs) in Vision Transformers (ViTs) are known to impact performance and robustness, but their role in shaping internal spatial representations is not well understood. In this work, we study how different forms of PEs influence the representational geometry of ViTs and how these changes relate to robustness under content-disrupting distribution shifts. We introduce a metric, the Spatial Similarity Distance Correlation (SSDC), to quantify spatial structure in token representations. Using this metric, we show that ViTs trained without PEs still develop non-trivial spatial structure, but this structure is driven by visual content and collapses under token permutation. In contrast, we find that all PEs considered (learned absolute, sinusoidal, and rotary) are associated with a consistent shift toward an index-anchored spatial organization. Representations in these models remain stable under perturbations that disrupt content, and exhibit substantially improved robustness to such distributional shifts. We further show that while different PEs produce distinct depth-wise trajectories of spatial structure, their robustness properties are largely similar (with secondary variation across encoding schemes), suggesting that robustness appears to depend on the presence of a stable positional reference frame more than it depends on the specific encoding mechanism. These results offer a geometric account of how positional encodings shape internal representations, with implications for the principled design of future encoding schemes.

AI.tldr: 本论文分析了不同位置编码(PEs)对Vision Transformers (ViTs)内部空间表征几何结构的影响，并提出PEs能够提升模型在内容分布变化时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 虽然位置编码对ViTs性能和鲁棒性有影响，但其如何影响内部空间表征尚不清楚。本文旨在揭示位置编码对表征结构和模型鲁棒性的影响机制。
AI.method: 作者提出了空间相似性距离相关性(SSDC)指标，用于量化ViT中token表征的空间结构。通过实验比较无PE和三种PE（学习型绝对、正弦型和旋转型）的表征变化及其在不同扰动下的表现。
AI.result: 即使没有PE，ViT依然能形成一定的空间结构，但主要由视觉内容驱动，遇到token变换时崩溃。引入PE后，表征出现索引锚定空间布局，对内容扰动具有稳定性，并显著提升了鲁棒性。不同类型的PE纵深结构表现有差异，但鲁棒性提升主要源于稳定的参考框架。
AI.conclusion: PE的主要作用在于提供稳定的空间参考系，而具体编码方式影响不大。本研究为位置编码的设计提供了几何学解释和理论指导。

title: DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset
summary: Multi-party dialogue discourse parsing aims to identify dependency structures and relation types between utterances in conversations. Previous studies are mostly limited to textual modality or two-party dialogue, failing to meet the multimodal and multi-party settings. In this paper, we construct the first publicly available English multimodal dataset DraDDP for multi-party dialogue discourse parsing, based on American TV dramas. DraDDP contains 495 dialogue segments with 6,374 utterances and 9.1 hours of parallel video content, covering rich multi-party interaction scenarios. Moreover, we establish comprehensive benchmarks by evaluating this task on DraDDP and conducting in-depth analysis on the impact of different modalities. Experimental results demonstrate the value of multimodal information in capturing dialogue structures and relation types. We will publicly release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and code to promote future research in multimodal dialogue understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了第一个公开可用的多方、多模态英语对话语篇分析数据集DraDDP，并基于该数据集建立了基准和深入分析。
AI.motivation: 现有对话语篇分析研究受限于文本和双人对话，无法满足多方多模态实际需求。
AI.method: 基于美剧构建包含9.1小时视频和6,374句、多方互动的语料DraDDP；并对多模态影响进行系统分析和基准测试。
AI.result: 实验发现，多模态信息对于捕捉对话结构与关系类型有明显提升作用。
AI.conclusion: 多模态、多方语篇分析数据集和基准推进了该领域研究；数据集、注释规范和代码将开源，促进未来多模态对话理解发展。

title: DRL-Based Pose Control for Double-Ackermann Robots Under Actuation Uncertainties
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, Accepted for Uncertainty in Open-World Robotics an IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA 2026) workshop
summary: Robust deployment of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) policies on real robots remains challenging due to discrepancies between simulation and real-world dynamics. We address this issue in the context of maneuvering with double-Ackermann-steering mobile robots, which introduce additional constraints due to their non-holonomic nature. Building upon the DRL framework ManeuverNet, we extend its objective from position control to full pose control, resulting in a more challenging task. We further investigate the impact of actuation-related uncertainties on policy transfer. The use of simplified actuation models during training of the extended policy can lead to poor generalization, shown by a success rate drop from 100% in PyBullet to 25% in Gazebo under stricter evaluation conditions. To address this limitation, we adopt a sim-to-sim-to-real approach, where actuation effects observed in Gazebo are incorporated into the PyBullet training environment. Using multi-environment DRL with SAC and CrossQ, we learn policies that remain robust despite modeling inaccuracies. This approach can significantly reduce the performance gap across simulators, achieving up to 92% success rate in Gazebo and maintaining 69% under stricter thresholds, with successful transfer to a real robot without additional tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文针对双Ackermann转向移动机器人，提出了一种可鲁棒迁移至真实机器人的深度强化学习（DRL）方法，通过多环境训练显著提升了策略在不同仿真平台以及现实中的表现。
AI.motivation: 真实机器人与仿真环境间的动态差异常常导致强化学习策略迁移失效，特别是对于具有非完整约束的双Ackermann转向移动机器人。这种机器人控制难度更高，而传统训练方法难以保证策略在现实中的稳健性。
AI.method: 在原有ManeuverNet DRL框架基础上，将控制目标从位置拓展到全位姿，并采用sim-to-sim-to-real策略：先在PyBullet训练，再整合Gazebo中的执行器差异进行二次训练，最后迁移到真实机器人。利用SAC和CrossQ算法进行多环境RL训练，以增强对执行器模型不准的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 若只用简化的执行器模型训练，策略迁移表现极差（成功率从100%降至25%）。采纳多环境训练后，Gazebo中的成功率提升到92%，在更高要求下仍有69%；迁移到真实机器人上也无需额外调整。
AI.conclusion: 多环境、包含不同执行模型的训练可以极大提升强化学习策略从仿真到真实的通用性和鲁棒性，尤其适用于复杂移动机器人控制任务。

title: Advances in Neural 3D Mesh Texturing: A Survey
comment: Eurographics STAR (Computer Graphics Forum), 2026. Project Page: https://sairajk.github.io/neural-mesh-texturing/
summary: Texturing 3D meshes plays a vital role in determining the visual realism of digital objects and scenes. Although recent generative 3D approaches based on Neural Radiance Fields and Gaussian Splatting can produce textured assets directly, polygonal meshes remain the core representation across modeling, animation, visual effects, and gaming pipelines. Neural 3D mesh texturing therefore continues to be an essential and active area of research. In this survey, we present a comprehensive review of recent advances in neural 3D mesh texturing, covering methods for texture synthesis, transfer, and completion. We first summarize key foundations in mesh geometry, texture mapping, differentiable rendering, and neural generative models, and then organize the literature into a unified taxonomy spanning early GAN-based methods to modern diffusion-based pipelines. We further analyze common architectures and supervision strategies, review datasets and evaluation protocols, and discuss emerging applications, practical/commercial systems, and open challenges. Together, these insights provide a structured perspective on the current landscape and help guide future developments in learning-based 3D mesh texturing.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了神经网络驱动的三维网格贴图最新进展，并对方法进行系统梳理，总结了基础知识、主流方法、评价方法及未来展望。
AI.motivation: 随着三维数字内容对真实感需求提升，三维网格贴图的高质量合成成为热点。尽管新兴技术如Neural Radiance Fields等可直接生成带纹理资产，但多边形网格依然是业界主流表示，因此针对网格的神经贴图方法是研究和应用关注焦点。
AI.method: 论文回顾了基于GAN到扩散模型的神经3D网格贴图方法，包括纹理合成、迁移和补全；系统梳理了网格几何、纹理映射、可微渲染与生成模型等基础；总结了常见网络架构、监督方法、数据集与评测流程，并对具体应用及商业/实际系统进行了分析。
AI.result: 全面回顾各类主流学习型三维网格贴图方法，对方法特点、适用场景、数据要求与评估标准进行了细致比较，揭示了当前架构共性与发展趋势。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为三维网格神经贴图领域提供了系统梳理与展望，为未来基于学习的方法开发和实际应用落地指明了方向。

title: Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval
summary: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve distributionally similar and informative demonstrations from the available source domain to boost the inference capabilities of LLMs. However, in practical scenarios where the target domain is inaccessible, evaluating the unknown distribution is challenging, which indirectly impacts the quality of the selected demonstrations. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{DOPA}, a demonstration search framework that incorporates an OOD proxy to approximate the inaccessible target domain and guide the retrieval process. Building on proxy-based evaluation, DOPA further introduces a Mahalanobis distance-based global diversity constraint to ensure sufficient diversity among the retrieved demonstrations. Experimental results on multiple LLMs and tasks demonstrate that DOPA effectively enhances robustness in OOD settings\footnote{https://github.com/bort64/ood\_code}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的示范检索框架DOPA，通过引入OOD代理来提升大模型在分布外任务中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型应对分布外任务时能力下降，尤其是在目标领域不可访问时，难以选出高质量、相关性强的示范，影响推理效果。
AI.method: 提出DOPA框架，利用OOD代理近似不可访问的目标分布，引导示范检索过程，并用基于Mahalanobis距离的多样性约束提升示范多样性。
AI.result: 在多项大模型和任务上的实验显示，DOPA能有效提升大模型在复杂OOD场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DOPA为大模型在缺乏目标领域信息的跨分布任务中提供了有效的检索方案，有助于增强其推理表现及鲁棒性。

title: Belief Consistency Between Foundation-Model Evidence and Geometric Perception in Persistent Robotic Maps
summary: Persistent maps used by autonomous robots increasingly fuse a geometric perception stack whose assertions are well-characterized with a foundation-model channel that produces semantic claims without calibrated reliability about the same scene. Contemporary mapping systems integrate the two channels by treating the foundation-model channel as an additional voter into a per-element posterior, uncalibrated for its own per-class reliability and without machinery to flag when the two channels contradict each other at a given moment. We propose an update operator with two cooperating mechanisms: a per-class calibrated commit gate, and a per-event conflict-drop window that refuses to commit foundation-model claims contradicted by the geometric channel at the moment of the claim. We evaluate on KITTI-360 and ScanNet, with an oracle geometric channel (panoptic ground truth) and an off-the-shelf online semantic segmenter (Mask2Former) to demonstrate real-world performance. The operator produces substantially more accurate committed maps (KITTI is car commit precision 99.7% vs. 43.9% for the calibration-only operator; mean per-class IoU 0.522 vs. 0.180), retains more compositional true positives at higher precision than a monolithic compositional VLM prompt. The framework operates at deployment quality across both oracle and off-the-shelf-segmenter geometric channels, and is invariant under foundation-model substitution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的地图融合方法，用于提升自动机器人在几何与基础模型语义通道集成时的地图精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前自动机器人地图多来源于对场景的几何感知与语义基础模型输出的融合，但基础模型输出的置信度未经校准且与几何感知矛盾时缺乏有效处理，导致最终地图的准确性和可靠性受限。作者想解决语义通道不可靠及冲突识别处理不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的更新算子，包含两个协作机制：1）按类别校准的承诺门控，2）按事件的冲突丢弃窗口。当基础模型与几何通道在某个元素上矛盾时，算子拒绝采纳基础模型的结论，从而提升整体准确性。
AI.result: 在KITTI-360和ScanNet数据集上，作者用全知几何通道（真实分割标签）和通用语义分割器Mask2Former进行实测，新方法能显著提升地图的语义精度（如KITTI车辆类别，精度高达99.7%，而基线方法为43.9%；类别均值IoU为0.522，远高于基线的0.180），整体性能优于传统融合或VLM提示方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架提高了地图的承诺精度且对几何通道和基础模型选择具有鲁棒性，具有良好的实际部署价值。

title: Geodesics with Unified Tangent-constrained Priors and Curvature Regularization
summary: Curvature-penalized geodesic models have proven their effectiveness in image segmentation by computing globally optimal curves. Unfortunately, these models remain susceptible to shortcuts when delineating objects with complex shapes and image intensity distributions, as they lack mechanisms to enforce shape-aware tangent constraints. To address this limitation, we propose a unified geodesic framework that integrates tangent-constrained priors with curvature penalization. The key idea is to formulate tangent admissibility directly within the orientation-lifted space, where path tangents are restricted to spatially varying angular sectors derived from intrinsic shape representatives (ISR) such as skeletons or interior landmarks. This formulation gives rise to a family of tangent-constrained Finslerian metrics, extending the classical curvature-penalized geodesic models while enforcing mandatory tangent constraints. The resulting Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) partial differential equations (PDEs) admit efficient numerical solutions via variants of the fast marching method, preserving the single-pass computational complexity. Experiments on synthetic, natural, and medical images demonstrate that the proposed geodesic framework indeed improves robustness against weak boundaries and topological shortcuts, yielding segmentation results with enhanced shape fidelity compared to existing geodesic models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合了切向约束和曲率惩罚的测地分割新模型，通过在高维空间直接对路径切向进行空间可变的角度限制，有效提升了分割时的形状保持能力。实验证明该方法在合成、自然和医学影像中的复杂结构分割表现优于现有模型。
AI.motivation: 传统的曲率惩罚型测地模型虽然能够获得全局最优的图像分割曲线，但在分割形状复杂或边界不清的物体时，容易产生“捷径”（分割路径不遵循真实形状）。这种现象是由于缺乏对边界切向的形状感知约束。
AI.method: 作者在原有的曲率惩罚基础上，引入了基于形状代表（如骨架或内部标志点）推导出的切向约束，实现在orientation-lifted空间中对路径切向进行约束。数学上，通过定义一族具有切向约束的Finsler度量，推广了经典模型。计算方面，利用了Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程并改进了快行法实现高效求解。
AI.result: 该方法经过与多种现有算法（包括合成、真实和医学影像）对比，展现了更强的稳健性，尤其体现在弱边界和防止分割路径走捷径等方面，形状保持性更好，分割结果更贴合真实结构。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的统一测地框架有效克服了传统模型在复杂分割任务中的常见问题，提升了对形状的遵循与分割结果的准确性，为后续高要求的医学与自然图像分析提供了新的工具。

title: AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection
summary: Detecting AI-generated text is becoming increasingly challenging as modern language models approach human-level fluency and can evade detectors that rely on surface statistics or likelihood-based signals. We propose \textsc{AEyeDE}, an attribution-driven approach to human-AI authorship detection that leverages model attention as a discriminative signal. Specifically, we extract attention-based attribution matrices for both human- and AI-generated text using a \emph{proxy} Transformer model with white-box access and train a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network to learn representations from these attribution maps. Across encoder-decoder translation settings, our method consistently outperforms a text-only baseline. In decoder-only settings, it performs strongly in generator-specific detection, remains competitive on standard benchmarks, and shows robustness under cross-dataset transfer and alternative-spelling perturbations. We further show that attention maps exhibit recurring local structures whose relative frequencies differ consistently between human- and AI-generated text across datasets and proxy models. These findings suggest that attention-based attribution maps provide a complementary and interpretable signal for AI-generated text detection. We will make the code publicly available to support future research.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力归因的新方法（AEyeDE），利用Transformer模型的注意力分布特征来识别AI生成文本，相比传统文本特征方法效果更好、抗干扰能力更强。
AI.motivation: 随着现代语言模型趋近人类流畅度，基于表层统计或似然信号的AI文本检测方法越来越容易被规避，亟需寻找新的、更有效的识别信号。
AI.method: 通过对人类和AI生成文本输入带白盒访问的代理型Transformer模型，提取注意力归因矩阵，并用轻量级卷积神经网络（CNN）从这些归因图中学习区分特征。分别在编码-解码、仅解码场景下进行实验，并测试跨数据集和拼写扰动下方法的稳定性。
AI.result: 在编码-解码翻译任务中，方法始终优于仅用文本特征的基线。在仅解码场景下，生成器特定检测能力强，在标准基准测试具竞争力，且具良好跨数据集泛化和抗拼写扰动能力。注意力图谱在不同数据集和模型下表现出人类与AI文本区分性的局部结构频率差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力归因的特征为AI文本检测提供了互补且可解释的新信号，为未来相关研究提供有力工具。源代码将公开。

title: FAIR^2 Drones: An AI-Ready Standard for Cross-Domain Wildlife Drone Datasets
summary: Animal ecology data collection using drones represents a substantial investment of time, expertise, and financial resources. Yet most existing datasets serve only a single research community, limiting interdisciplinary reuse. We propose a unified drone dataset standard, FAIR^2 Drones, that bridges ecology, robotics, and computer vision by building on existing FAIR and AI-ready data frameworks while adding essential platform metadata and annotation specifications. Our standard enables datasets to simultaneously support ecological analysis, robotics algorithm development, and computer vision benchmarking. We provide open-source validation tools, reference implementations, and multimodal extensions linking drone imagery with complementary sensors such as camera traps, GPS, and acoustics. By standardizing metadata across disciplines, this framework maximizes the scientific return on investment for costly field deployments and accelerates cross-domain collaboration in environmental monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的无人机生态数据集标准FAIR^2 Drones，促进生态学、机器人学和计算机视觉领域的数据共享，提升跨学科合作效率。
AI.motivation: 当前无人机采集的动物生态数据由于标准不统一，通常被局限在单一学科内部，难以实现跨学科重用，造成资源和科研投入的浪费。
AI.method: 在现有FAIR和AI-ready数据框架基础上，进一步加入无人机平台元数据与注释规范，制定全面的数据集标准。并提供开源的验证工具、参考实现方案及可与其他传感设备（如摄像头陷阱、GPS、声学）协同的多模态拓展。
AI.result: 形成了一套能同时满足生态分析、机器人算法开发和计算机视觉基准测试需求的数据集标准，并成功实现工具链和跨设备数据集扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该数据框架统一跨学科元数据标准，显著提升无人机生态数据的科学回报率，加速了环境监测领域的多学科合作。

title: StemBind: When MLLMs Get Lost Between Rules and Instances in Abstract Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often know the rule but pick the wrong answer: on abstract visual reasoning (AVR) tasks, a model can describe what it sees and name the underlying pattern, yet still fail to choose the matching candidate. Existing AVR benchmarks cannot detect this because they collapse perception, rule induction, and answer selection into a single right-or-wrong signal. We introduce StemBind, a shared-stem diagnostic benchmark that probes the same visual stem with three aligned questions: Perception (what is in the image), Rule (what pattern governs it), and Full (which option completes it), so a final-answer error can be attributed to a specific sub-step on the same evidence. StemBind contains 2,298 curated knowledge-light stems across nine auditable visual operations, totaling 19,533 P/R/F tasks, with each full item annotated by Sternberg's four reasoning stages (S1 Encode, S2 Infer, S3 Map, S4 Apply). Evaluating 24 frontier MLLM configurations yields four findings. (i) The R-F chasm: rule accuracy exceeds full-item accuracy on 22 of 24 models, so most failures happen after the rule is identified. (ii) A persistent binding gap: even when P and R are both correct on the same stem, models still answer F incorrectly 51.2% of the time. (iii) The bottleneck is S3: process diagnostics and Stage-wise Stimulus Augmentation localize the dominant failure to rule-to-instance mapping. (iv) Scaling and thinking do not help: neither larger models nor explicit thinking mode reliably closes the gap, and thinking even lowers rule and full-item accuracy. StemBind reframes AVR evaluation from final-answer ranking to locating where abstract visual reasoning breaks down, identifying rule-to-instance binding as a concrete next target for vision-grounded reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了StemBind基准，对多模态大模型在抽象视觉推理（AVR）任务中进行细致诊断，揭示了模型在规则识别和最终选择环节的失效点。
AI.motivation: 现有AVR基准将感知、规则归纳和答案选择混为一谈，导致无法定位模型具体失误环节。而多模态大模型明知规则但在实际选择答案时常出错，需要更细粒度的测试方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了StemBind基准，将视觉推理流程细分为感知、规则归纳和最终选择，并通过同一组视觉材料针对这三个步骤独立提问，实现可追溯的诊断；共设计2298组题目，涉及9类视觉操作，并对每题分解为Sternberg的四个推理阶段，综合评测了24种主流MLLM配置。
AI.result: 四大主要发现：（1）大部分模型识别规则后依然答错，对22/24模型规则识别准确率高于最终选择准确率；（2）即使感知和规则都选对，最终答案依然有51.2%出错，存在明显的“绑定缺口”；（3）故障集中在规则到实例绑定（S3阶段）；（4）仅靠模型规模增大或增加思考环节无法有效提升表现，有时反而降低准确率。
AI.conclusion: StemBind将AVR评估由结果排名转向失效点定位，明确了多模态模型在规则实例绑定环节的瓶颈，并为未来视觉推理能力提升指出了新方向。

title: CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards
comment: Accepted to the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026, Main conference)
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) based Chinese Grammatical Error Correction (CGEC) systems face two critical challenges: general-purpose models lack specialized linguistic priors for subtle grammatical distinctions, and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Maximum Likelihood Estimation fails to optimize for precision-focused metrics, leading to systematic over-correction. We propose CSRP, a three-stage framework that progressively builds correction capability through Continual Pre-training (CPT) on 5.9M balanced samples to internalize domain knowledge, Chain-of-Thought SFT with explicit error reasoning for diagnostic transparency, and Group Relative Policy Optimization with a novel Efficiency-Aware Reward that explicitly penalizes unnecessary edits. On the NACGEC benchmark, CSRP achieves state-of-the-art performance with 50.99 $F_{0.5}$ and 57.17 precision, substantially outperforming previous best results while effectively mitigating the over-correction bias inherent in MLE-trained models. Our method also advances CSCD spelling correction to 59.61 F1, surpassing GPT-4 by 5.20 points. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that the RL alignment stage contributes a 8\% relative gain over the SFT baseline, and that this gain is orthogonal to the contribution of large-scale CPT, validating that explicit optimization for edit efficiency is essential for high-quality grammatical error correction. Our code is available at https://github.com/TW-NLP/ChineseErrorCorrector.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种三阶段框架CSRP，显著提升了中文语法纠错任务中的准确率和效率，在多个基准上取得了领先性能，抑制了传统方法中的“过度纠错”问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型应用于中文语法纠错存在两大难点：其一，通用模型缺乏细致语法知识，难以精准识别和修正错误；其二，当前常用的最大似然训练目标不利于优化以精确度为主的评测指标，导致模型倾向于过度修正文本。
AI.method: 提出CSRP三阶段训练框架：第一阶段在大规模均衡语料上持续预训练（CPT）以掌握领域知识；第二阶段结合链式思维的有监督微调，提升误错诊断的透明度；最后引入创新政策优化算法，采用“效率感知奖励”惩罚不必要的编辑，从而通过强化学习实现精细对齐。
AI.result: 在NACGEC基准集上，CSRP获得50.99的F0.5和57.17的精确率，领先现有最佳方法，并有效减少过度纠错；CSCD拼写纠正F1分数提升至59.61，超越GPT-4 5.20分。消融实验显示，强化学习阶段带来8%的相对提升，并与预训练阶段效果正交，证明显式优化编辑效率对纠错质量提升至关重要。
AI.conclusion: CSRP框架通过结合领域持续预训练、思维链微调及效率导向的强化学习，显著提升了中文自动语法纠错的准确性与效率，并为未来相关研究提供了有效范式。

title: Constrained Whole-Body Tracking for Humanoid Robots
summary: Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have demonstrated impressive whole-body agility for humanoid robots, yet ensuring safety and satisfying constraints -- particularly those specified after training -- remains a challenge. Towards this goal, we present ConstrainedMimic, a control framework that leverages whole-body kinematics and dynamics for real-time constraint enforcement within RL tracking policies. By integrating principles from operational space control and control barrier functions (CBFs), we enable the satisfaction of arbitrary runtime constraints on both the kinematic reference motion and the underlying dynamics. In whole-body motion-tracking and teleoperation experiments on a (simulated) Unitree G1 with a learned policy, we demonstrate collision avoidance (both with the robot body and external obstacles), joint limits, and center of mass stability constraints. By remaining consistent with the current contact mode and tracking objectives, we minimally restrict the capabilities of the policy when constraints are active. Our method is fully differentiable, runs on CPU, GPU, and TPU, and can be deployed at up to 300-500 Hz. All software will be freely available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了ConstrainedMimic，一个结合操作空间控制和控制障碍函数的控制框架，实现了强化学习人形机器人在运行时的实时约束满足，包括碰撞避免、关节限制和质心稳定等。实验表明方法高效且对已有策略能力限制最小。
AI.motivation: 尽管强化学习推进了人形机器人整体灵活性，但很难在训练后实现对安全性和额外约束的保证，尤其是需要临时添加时。为解决此问题，研究者希望在不影响控制策略表现的基础上实现实时、多样的约束满足。
AI.method: 提出ConstrainedMimic框架，将操作空间控制原理和控制障碍函数（CBF）结合到强化学习的运动跟踪策略中。该框架可以在运行时对参考运动和动力学施加任意约束，并能适应接触变化，且保持策略能力。
AI.result: 在仿真的人形机器人Unitree G1上完成了全身运动跟踪与遥操作实验。方法成功实现了机器人主体及外部障碍物间的碰撞避免、关节极限保护和质心稳定要求，同时运行速度高达300-500Hz，对现有策略能力影响小。
AI.conclusion: ConstrainedMimic实际证明可在不牺牲系统性能的前提下，为强化学习策略的人形机器人引入灵活的运行时约束，提升了安全性和可靠性。该方法兼容多种硬件环境，后续代码将开放，有利于推广应用。

title: DiffCrossGait: Trajectory-Level Alignment for 2D-3D Cross-Modal Gait Recognition via Latent Diffusion
summary: Cross-modal 2D-3D gait recognition is impeded by inherent domain discrepancies between 2D silhouette and 3D LiDAR range-view representations. While prior methods align only final embeddings, we propose DiffCrossGait, which reformulates cross-modal matching as trajectory-level alignment in an identity-relevant latent diffusion space, rather than assuming full equivalence between 2D and 3D observations. By driving both modalities with shared Gaussian noise within a latent space, we enable continuous alignment throughout the generative evolution. We introduce a Tri-Phase Alignment Strategy that exploits varying noise intensities to enforce identity anchoring, dynamics consistency, and cross-modal structural recoverability, thereby constraining both modalities to share denoising dynamics and bottleneck structure, which promotes modality-invariant gait features. Crucially, our framework decouples generative alignment from the discriminative backbone; the diffusion mechanism serves exclusively as a training objective, ensuring high inference efficiency by eliminating the computational overhead of iterative denoising. Extensive experiments on the SUSTech1K and FreeGait benchmarks demonstrate that DiffCrossGait achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新颖的跨模态2D-3D步态识别方法DiffCrossGait，通过在潜在扩散空间实现轨迹级别的对齐，有效解决了2D轮廓和3D LiDAR数据间的域差异问题，显著提升了识别性能。
AI.motivation: 2D人体轮廓和3D激光点云在步态识别中各有优势，但二者存在显著的模态差异，传统方法仅简单对齐最终特征嵌入，无法充分弥合这种差异。因此，需要一种更精细、动态的跨模态对齐方式，以提升2D-3D步态识别准确率。
AI.method: 提出DiffCrossGait框架，将2D与3D跨模态匹配重构为身份相关的潜在扩散空间中的轨迹级对齐。通过在潜在空间中输入相同的高斯噪声，实现模态间持续对齐。引入三阶段对齐策略，根据噪声强度分别强调身份锚定、动态一致性与结构可恢复性，并解耦扩散生成机制和判别特征提取。
AI.result: 在SUSTech1K与FreeGait两个公开基准上进行大量实验，DiffCrossGait取得了当前最优的步态识别效果，显著超过以往各类方法。
AI.conclusion: DiffCrossGait通过创新的扩散式多阶段对齐方法，有效提升了2D-3D步态跨模态识别的特征一致性与判别能力，为跨模态识别提供了高效、可扩展的新范式。

title: SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding (RSD) is favored for its plug-and-play versatility, its potential is impeded by rigid lexical dependencies, rendering both retrieval and verification brittle to surface-level variations. To address this, we propose SENSE (Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation). By anchoring retrieval on the hidden states of the target model, SENSE establishes robust semantic alignment, which empowers the Soft-gated Evaluation module to validate semantic equivalence rather than surface forms. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we deconstruct existing methods into atomic primitives within a unified framework, facilitating granular, component-level comparison. Extensive experiments across diverse domains demonstrate that SENSE outperforms multiple baselines on the LLaMA and Qwen families, attaining up to 4.09 mean acceptance length and 3.26x speedup, while preserving generation quality. Our code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的推测式解码方法SENSE，基于语义嵌入和软门控评估，提升了LLM推理速度，并保持生成质量。SENSE在不同领域均显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的检索式推测解码方法依赖严格的表层词汇匹配，导致检索与验证过程容易受表面差异影响，降低了鲁棒性和性能。需要一种更鲁棒的推测解码机制。
AI.method: SENSE方法以目标模型的隐藏状态为锚点进行检索，实现稳健的语义对齐；其软门控评估模块判断语义等价性而非表面一致性。同时，作者将主流方法分解为原子组件，构建统一评测框架进行细粒度对比。
AI.result: 在LLaMA和Qwen等主流模型上，SENSE可实现最高4.09的平均接受长度和3.26倍的速度提升，且保持生成质量优于多个现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SENSE方法显著增强了推测解码的鲁棒性和效率，为大模型推理加速提供了更有效的解决方案。代码将在发表后开源。

title: Behavior Cloning of MPC for 3-DOF Robotic Manipulators
comment: Accepted at the IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop on Reinforcement Learning in the Era of Imitation Learning (RL4IL), 6 pages excluding references
summary: While Model Predictive Control (MPC) provides strong stability and robustness, it imposes a significant computational burden on real-time systems. This paper investigates the application of Behavior Cloning to approximate MPC policies for the real-time control of a 3-degree-of-freedom robotic manipulator. We present a baseline controller combining Inverse Kinematics with MPC and evaluate neural network architectures, ranging from classical regression algorithms to deep learning models including Deep MLPs and RNNs, to derive computationally efficient surrogate policies. We analyze generalization capabilities, stability considerations, and the trade-offs inherent in different architectural choices. Our empirical study employs both online and offline evaluations to assess performance regarding accuracy, computational efficiency, and fidelity to the original MPC policy. Our results demonstrate that Behavior Cloning can effectively reduce the computational burden of MPC policies for 3-DOF robotic manipulators, achieving a 3x reduction in inference latency with a 84.98% success rate under relaxed tolerances. Notably, we find that static architectures outperform temporal variants, confirming the sufficiency of instantaneous state observations for this task. However, we observe a precision gap under strict tolerances, which suggest that while Behavior Cloning captures the global optimal trajectory, further research is needed to minimize terminal steady-state error.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用行为克隆（Behavior Cloning, BC）近似MPC控制策略，以降低实时机器人操作中的计算负担，并通过神经网络实现高效代理控制器。
AI.motivation: MPC虽然性能强大、鲁棒性好，但计算量极大，不适合严格实时应用。作者希望利用数据驱动的方法，用更快的神经网络替代MPC，缓解计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 以三自由度机械臂为对象，首先用逆解结合MPC构造基线控制器，然后用不同的神经网络（回归、深度MLP、RNN）进行行为克隆训练。通过线上与离线实验，系统评价不同结构在精度、效率和对MPC忠实性的表现。
AI.result: 行为克隆代理实现了3倍推理延迟降低，在宽松容差下达成了84.98%的成功率。静态结构（如深度MLP）优于时间序列结构（如RNN），因为此任务只需当前状态即可决定控制输出。但在严格容差下精度下降，出现稳态误差。
AI.conclusion: 行为克隆能大幅减少MPC的部署负担，简单的静态网络已足够应对三自由度机械臂的控制问题，适合实时应用。但精度瓶颈和终端稳态误差仍需进一步修正和研究。

title: Digital-to-Physical Transfer of Adversarial Patches for Aerial Vehicle Detection
summary: Deep neural network (DNN)-based object detectors are widely used for analyzing aerial and satellite imagery in applications such as environmental monitoring and urban analytics. Despite their strong performance, these models are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, and physical adversarial attacks using printable patterns pose realistic security threats. In this paper, we evaluate physical adversarial patch attacks against an aerial vehicle detector by bridging digital optimization and real-world deployment. Adversarial patches are optimized in the digital domain using a loss function that minimizes the maximum objectness score while incorporating non-printability score (NPS) and total variation (TV) constraints to ensure both printability and spatial smoothness. The optimized patches are printed and deployed in three configurations: ON, OFF, and OFF-Side. Experiments using a YOLOv3 detector show that while the OFF patch achieves the highest effectiveness in the digital domain (85.51% Average Objectness Reduction Rate (AORR)), the ON patch demonstrates superior robustness in physical environments (0.197-0.343 Objectness Score Ratio (OSR)) due to its consistent visibility. Furthermore, our results indicate that weather-based augmentation does not necessarily improve patch optimization in this domain. These findings provide critical insights into the practical vulnerabilities of aerial object detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对空中目标检测器的物理对抗补丁攻击，评估了这种威胁在数字和现实场景中的有效性，并给出实际应对建议。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于深度神经网络的目标检测在航空和卫星图像领域取得了巨大成功，但它们对对抗攻击，尤其是物理对抗攻击非常脆弱。本研究旨在探索并实证物理对抗补丁对空中检测系统构成的实际安全威胁。
AI.method: 设计并优化了对抗补丁，目标是降低目标检测器的最大物体分数，并加入可打印性(NPS)和空间平滑度(TV)约束，保证补丁可以打印和实际部署。补丁被分别打印并应用于ON、OFF和OFF-Side三种不同配置，使用YOLOv3进行测试，并通过AORR和OSR等指标评估攻击效果。
AI.result: 在数字域中，OFF补丁表现最佳，平均物体分数降低率(AORR)高达85.51%；而在现实物理场景中，由于可见性更强，ON补丁更稳健（OSR为0.197-0.343）。实验还发现基于天气的数据增强不一定提升对抗效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了空中目标检测系统在物理对抗攻击下的重大现实漏洞，并对实际防御给出了重要参考。

title: lmfaoooo at SemEval-2026 Task 1: Humor Is an Audience. Preference Modeling for Constrained Humor Generation
summary:
Humor generation remains difficult not only because producing fluent, novel jokes is hard, but because "funny" is audience-dependent and supervision is noisy -- preferences vary with audience, context, and culture, and annotator agreement is often low. In this paper, we describe our system for the SemEval-2026 Task-1 (MWAHAHA), which focuses on humor generation under explicit constraints. The task evaluates submitted systems via human preference judgments in 1-on-1 arena-style comparisons.
  We adopt a "generate-many -> select-best" strategy. First, we generate a diverse pool of candidates per instance using multi-step prompting, model ensembling, and diversity-oriented decoding. Second, we select outputs using a preference model that approximates a "reader" by learning from human comparisons rather than absolute funniness scores. To support this approach, we release 2.5K human pairwise judgments collected through the Humor Arena prototype. We further propose an interpretable pipeline that converts labeled comparisons into a preference model. Across three preference datasets, our models consistently outperform baselines and show stronger cross-domain transfer. Finally, we apply the learned preference model to rank candidates for the MWAHAHA setting and release intermediate artifacts (candidate pools and rankings) to facilitate follow-up work.
  Our system ranked 1st in the English and Chinese subtasks of MWAHAHA and 2nd in the Spanish subtask.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以人为本的幽默生成系统，并在SemEval-2026 MWAHAHA英中任务中获得第一。方法包括多样化生成及偏好建模，通过人类对比评价优选输出，并公布数据用于后续研究。
AI.motivation: 幽默生成难在于笑点受众不同、监督信号嘈杂，导致人工标注一致性低。作者希望提升幽默生成效果，并使系统能应对受众、情境及文化多样性的挑战。
AI.method: 采用“多生成-优选”策略：第一步通过多步提示、模型集成和多样性解码生成丰富候选；第二步用基于人类偏好对比（而非绝对分数）训练的模型筛选优质输出。此外，提出可解释的偏好建模流程，并公开幽默对比数据集及相关中间产物。
AI.result: 训练得到的偏好模型在三个对比数据集上均优于基线，并展现出更强的跨领域迁移能力。在MWAHAHA任务中，系统英中两项获第一，西班牙语获第二。
AI.conclusion: 本系统有效提升幽默文本生成质量，偏好模型可泛化于不同领域，且公开的配套资源为后续研究奠定基础。

title: SoFiE: Soft Finger Exoskeleton for Intelligent Grasping
summary: Soft wearable robotic systems have emerged as a promising solution for assisting individuals with reduced hand function. This paper presents SoFiE, a modular soft finger exoskeleton designed to assist index-finger flexion during grasping tasks. The proposed system is primarily fabricated using 3D-printed flexible materials, enabling a lightweight, low-profile, and modular design. Actuation is achieved through a tendon-driven mechanism powered by a compact DC motor, while passive extension is provided by a compliant conductive spring. This element, termed StretchSense, also functions as a proprioceptive sensor by exhibiting resistance changes under deformation. Furthermore, a novel tactile sensing approach, MagSense, is introduced, using a magnet and magnetometer pair embedded in a soft fingertip structure to estimate contact force and object compliance. The system is fully untethered and controlled by an embedded microcontroller. In addition, actuator-level sensing through motor encoder feedback enables estimation of the system state, providing a foundation for safe and adaptive control strategies. Experimental validation demonstrates the capability of the system to provide reliable pose estimation, distinguish between materials with different stiffness, and generate distinct sensor signatures across different grasping tasks. This paper details the design, fabrication, and sensing concepts of the proposed exoskeleton as a proof of concept toward modular, soft, and assistive wearable robotics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化软指外骨骼SoFiE，专为辅助手指屈曲和抓取任务设计。系统采用3D打印柔性材料制造，结合腱驱动与新型传感技术，具备轻便、低调、可扩展的特点。实验结果显示该系统具备可靠的姿态估算与力觉感知能力。
AI.motivation: 许多手部功能受损者难以完成日常抓取动作，现有外骨骼普遍体积大或灵活性差，缺乏有效的传感反馈。该研究旨在开发一种轻薄、模组化，并能实现多种感知与友好控制的辅助外骨骼。
AI.method: 系统主体采用3D打印柔性材料制作，采用腱驱动机构由微型直流电机驱动，辅以弹性导电弹簧实现被动伸展和姿态感知。提出MagSense触觉传感方法，通过软指尖嵌入磁体和磁力计来估算接触力和物体顺应性。控制系统采用嵌入式微控制器，结合电机编码器反馈实现状态估算和安全自适应控制。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该系统能有效估算手指姿态，区分不同硬度材料，在多种抓取任务中获得有区别的传感响应，验证了系统传感与控制能力。
AI.conclusion: SoFiE软指外骨骼实现了可靠的抓取辅助和多模态感知，为模组化、柔性、可穿戴辅助机器人系统开发提供了有力的设计验证基础。

title: MyoSem: Aligning Electromyography to Natural-Language Action Semantics for Hand Action Understanding
summary: Electromyography (EMG) directly reflects muscle activation and is a key sensing modality for gesture recognition, prosthetic control, and wearable interaction. Existing EMG methods, however, commonly formulate hand action understanding as classification over fixed labels, making it difficult to support querying, retrieval, and generalization based on action descriptions. We present MyoSem, an EMG--action semantic alignment framework that maps low-level EMG signals into a shared semantic space constructed from multi-view action descriptions. MyoSem combines multi-view action-semantic construction, activation-aware EMG encoding, and semantic query alignment, enabling bidirectional retrieval between EMG signals and text descriptions. We systematically evaluate MyoSem on EMG2Pose and NinaPro-series datasets. Results show that MyoSem performs well on EMG--text bidirectional retrieval, generally outperforms most baselines, and shows favorable generalization to unseen users, held-out action classes, and amputee-user transfer scenarios. Ablations and visualizations further validate the effectiveness of each module. Overall, MyoSem advances EMG-based hand action understanding from fixed-label recognition toward queryable bidirectional semantic retrieval, providing a new modeling paradigm for language-mediated EMG action understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MyoSem框架，实现了肌电（EMG）信号与多视角动作描述之间的语义对齐，使得EMG与文本描述之间可以进行双向检索并提升了泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有EMG方法多为固定标签分类，限制了对动作语义的查询、检索和泛化能力，难以支持更灵活的人机交互和手部动作理解。
AI.method: MyoSem框架包括多视角动作语义构建、具激活感知的EMG编码和语义查询对齐，通过将低层级EMG信号映射到由多种动作描述构成的共享语义空间，实现了EMG与文本描述的双向检索。实验在EMG2Pose与NinaPro系列数据集上进行，包含消融和可视化分析。
AI.result: MyoSem在EMG与文本双向检索任务表现优异，普遍超越了主流基线方法，并对未见过的用户、未见的动作类别以及截肢者迁移场景表现出良好泛化能力。消融与可视化进一步验证了各模块效果。
AI.conclusion: MyoSem推动了EMG手部动作理解从固定标签识别向可查询的双向语义检索转变，为基于语言引导的EMG动作理解提供了新的建模范式。

title: TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models
summary: The rapid development of Language Diffusion Models (LDMs) challenges the dominant position of auto-regressive competitors in language processing. However, their flexible, any-order decoding strategies not only enable fast decoding speed but also potentially bring new trustworthiness challenges. To better understand the risks behind their pipelines, we introduce a comprehensive trustworthiness benchmark tailored to LDMs (TrustLDM), evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness across different LDM architectures with multiple categories of static post contexts. Our empirical results show that although LDMs generally exhibit strong trustworthiness with only the user prompts, their alignment behavior degrades noticeably when the malicious post contexts are attached to the masked responses. We further observe that longer contexts do not necessarily induce stronger effects, and both decoding order and generation length affect the evaluation outcomes. Finally, we propose TrustLDM-Auto, an automatic evaluation framework that leverages LDM decoding flexibility to systematically identify vulnerable configurations, revealing substantial trustworthiness weaknesses across all evaluated models and dimensions. Our work may potentially help the community build more trustworthy LDMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/TrustLDM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TrustLDM基准和自动评估框架，用于系统评估和揭示语言扩散模型（LDMs）在安全性、隐私与公平性方面的信任风险。
AI.motivation: 由于语言扩散模型（LDMs）发展迅速且采用灵活的解码顺序，虽然提升了解码效率，但也带来了新的可信度挑战。研究者希望明确这些新风险的表现及影响。
AI.method: 作者提出了适用于LDMs的信任度评测基准TrustLDM，涵盖安全性、隐私和公平性三大维度，并设计了多种静态上下文类别。通过将恶意后置上下文附加在受掩蔽的响应上，系统评测了不同LDM结构的表现，并引入自动分析工具TrustLDM-Auto，结合LDM的灵活解码，识别易受攻击的配置。
AI.result: 实验发现LDMs在仅有用户prompt时可信度较好，但加上恶意后置上下文会显著降低对齐与可信表现，且上下文长度、解码顺序及生成长度均影响模型的评测结果。TrustLDM-Auto自动捕捉到各模型存在的多维弱点。
AI.conclusion: LDMs存在严重的可信挑战，自动化评估框架有助于系统发现其弱点，促进更可信LDM的开发。

title: Literary Emotions in Motion: A Soft Robotics Installation for Tactile Storytelling
summary: Soft robotics is increasingly explored in artistic contexts, where tactile interaction provides audiences with embodied engagement beyond visual or auditory signals. This work presents an interactive installation that maps semantic emotion analysis of narrative text into variable stiffness of soft pneumatic modules. A natural language model identifies two dominant emotions from a predefined set of six, driving the inflation of seven hexagonally arranged soft actuators. The central actuator represents the primary emotion, while the surrounding ones express the secondary. We develop and mechanically characterize silicone actuators, called soft modules, featuring a thin membrane layer, demonstrating how this morphological control expands the achievable stiffness range while preserving simplicity and low-cost fabrication. A user study with ten participants further evaluates how multisensory coupling of stiffness and LEDs intensity influences emotional perception. The results suggest that stiffness modulation accompanied by color change can support emotionally meaningful and engaging tactile interaction in soft robotic installations.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种将叙事文本的情感分析结果映射为软体机器人结构刚度变化的互动装置。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人近年来常用于艺术领域，通过触觉交互增强观众体验，突破传统视觉或听觉的限制。作者试图探索情感与物理交互（如刚度）之间的关联，从而丰富艺术装置的人机互动方式。
AI.method: 利用自然语言模型对文本进行情感分析，从六种情感中识别出主情感和次情感，分别控制中心和环绕的7个六边形排列软体气动执行器（软体模组）的充气。作者开发并表征了一种带薄膜层的硅胶执行器，以扩展刚度范围并保持结构简单、低成本。
AI.result: 通过机械测试，证明这种薄膜结构可以明显扩展软体模组的刚度调控范围。用户研究（10名参与者）显示，结合LED灯光强度变化的刚度调控，有助于观众形成有意义的情感体验。
AI.conclusion: 情感语义分析驱动的软体机器人体感互动，不仅可实现丰富而低成本的艺术表达，还能够增强观众的情感共鸣和参与度。刚度与色彩的多感官协同是提升装置情感表现力的重要方式。

title: APE: Agentic Prompt Enhancer for Image Generation and Editing
summary: Natural language has become a powerful interface for image generation and editing, yet text-guided visual systems remain highly sensitive to prompt formulation. Semantically similar requests can produce different outputs depending on wording, specificity, and how explicitly visual constraints are stated, motivating prompt enhancement as a trainable component rather than a peripheral user choice. Existing strong enhancers often rely on large, proprietary LLMs such as ChatGPT or Gemini, adding cost, latency, and deployment dependence to the visual generation pipeline. We propose Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE), a lightweight framework that post-trains small language models (SLMs) as prompt-enhancement agents. APE supports both single-agent rewriting and role-specialized multi-agent enhancement. Its single-agent instantiation, SAPE, rewrites the prompt in one pass, while its multi-agent instantiation, MAPE, decomposes enhancement into a router--rewriter--composer process for handling compositional constraints over objects, attributes, spatial relations, and edits. With task-aware rewards and post-training protocols, APE improves visual alignment and prompt following without modifying the downstream visual model. Experiments on challenging image generation and editing benchmarks demonstrate that post-trained small prompt enhancers reliably outperform their base counterparts, narrowing the gap to closed-source prompt enhancers; in addition, MAPE proves particularly strong on complex compositional tasks within these benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE)，一种基于小型语言模型（SLM）的轻量级自动提示增强框架，有效提升文本引导下的图像生成和编辑质量，降低对大型专有LLM的依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前文本引导的图像生成/编辑系统对提示（prompt）表达方式高度敏感，语义相近的请求可能因措辞不同而生成结果差异大，且现有高效的增强方法多依赖成本高、响应慢且受限于闭源LLM系统。亟需一种更经济、高效、通用的解决思路。
AI.method: 提出APE框架，通过后训练方法将小型语言模型（SLM）培养成提示增强agent，包括单agent（SAPE）和多agent（MAPE）两种模式：SAPE一次性重写提示，MAPE则通过路由器-重写者-合成者三步分解复杂提示任务，结合任务奖励机制和后训练流程提升增强效果。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的图像生成与编辑基准测试中，通过后训练的小型提示增强器在视觉一致性和指令遵循方面均明显优于基础模型，并在多项复杂任务上缩小与闭源强化增强方法之间的性能差距。MAPE在处理复杂组合型任务中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: APE不需更改下游视觉模型即可显著提升文本引导视觉任务效果，成本与延迟均大幅低于依赖大型闭源LLM的方法，是一种高效务实的提示增强途径。

title: ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding
summary: Long-context decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is severely constrained by the memory bandwidth required to fetch the extensive Key-Value (KV) cache. Most existing KV management methods rely on key-only pruning before decoding, despite the evidence that attention outputs depend jointly on keys and values, as incorporating values in their methods incurs prohibitive additional overhead. In this paper, we propose Attention Run-time Termination (ART), a lightweight run-time mechanism that tracks accumulated attention outputs during kernel execution and terminates subsequent KV block accesses once further contributions become negligible. This design makes ART orthogonal to existing key-based KV cache management methods, enabling seamless integration with them. Experiments on LongBench benchmarks show that ART achieves 20% higher generation throughput in large batch size than state-of-the-art baseline while maintaining comparable accuracy.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种名为ART（Attention Run-time Termination）的机制，以提升大语言模型在长上下文解码时的效率，并在保持准确率的同时提高生成速度。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在长上下文解码过程中，KV缓存的内存带宽需求极大，影响生成效率。现有方法多只针对key进行裁剪，难以兼顾value信息，因为涉及value会带来高昂开销。作者希望解决这一难题。
AI.method: ART方法在运行时实时跟踪注意力累积输出，并在发现后续KV块贡献变得可忽略时，终止对KV块的访问，从而减少无效计算开销。ART为一种轻量级机制，可与现有key裁剪方法无缝结合。
AI.result: 在LongBench基准测试下，与主流方法相比，ART在大批量生成场景下生成吞吐量提升20%，且准确度基本相当。
AI.conclusion: ART有效提升了长上下文LLM推理的效率，并能与现有KV管理机制兼容，具备良好实用价值。

title: ROG-Grasp: Root-Oriented Geometry for Robotic Grasping and Placement
summary: Orientation-aware manipulation is essential in post-harvest agricultural processing, where produce must be grasped and placed in consistent configurations. This paper presents ROG-Grasp, a geometry-based robotic grasping and placement framework that estimates the produce orientation from root surface geometry using RGB-D perception. A YOLO-based root detector and point cloud plane fitting are used to infer the root normal, enabling stable grasp pose generation and orientation-constrained Cartesian motion planning. Experiments on tomatoes and onions demonstrate high success rates and stable execution time in both isolated and cluttered scenarios. Compared with vision-language-action (VLA) policies, the proposed method achieves more reliable and accurate grasp completion with faster execution. These results highlight the effectiveness of geometry-driven perception for practical orientation-controlled manipulation tasks. A video of our paper is available online https://youtu.be/Ir2UtGODdMo.

AI.tldr: ROG-Grasp框架结合了基于几何的视觉感知和运动规划，实现对果蔬（如番茄和洋葱）朝向的高效识别与把持/放置。实验显示在不同场景下有高成功率和稳定的执行时间，优于现有的视觉-语言-动作策略。
AI.motivation: 在农产品采后处理中，果蔬的定向把持和一致放置对于加工自动化和后续处理非常重要。现有方法在操作稳定性与效率方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出ROG-Grasp框架，利用RGB-D视觉获取作物点云，使用YOLO检测根部并通过点云拟合获取朝向法线。据此生成稳定的把持姿态并执行带朝向约束的路径规划，实现精准操控。
AI.result: 在番茄和洋葱上进行实验，ROG-Grasp在孤立和杂乱场景下都表现出高把持、放置成功率和执行效率，且在可靠性与速度上优于VLA方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何感知的机器人把持与定向操作在农产品处理中表现出高效性和实用性，为后续朝向受控的自动化任务提供了有效方案。

title: LastAct: Trajectory-Guided Latest-Activity Localization for Real-Time Smart-Home Activity Recognition
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) from ambient sensors enables smart-home applications such as health monitoring and assisted living. In realistic deployments, however, sensor events arrive as a continuous stream and activity boundaries are unknown. Sliding-window inference therefore produces many windows that straddle transitions and contain mixed activities, creating boundary contamination that violates the pre-segmented instance assumption used by most benchmarks and models. Moreover, many pipelines under-use spatial context by treating sensor IDs as independent tokens. We present LastAct, a trajectory-centric framework for streaming smart-home HAR that targets the most recent activity under mixed windows while explicitly modeling spatial structure. LastAct projects sensor events onto the home floorplan to form a layout-aligned trajectory image sequence that preserves spatial continuity. A lightweight gate identifies contaminated windows, and a boundary localizer estimates the last transition to enable boundary-guided masking that emphasizes post-boundary evidence and suppresses stale context. For efficiency, we reuse a precomputed layout-aligned template cache to avoid repeated rendering. Empirically, across four public smart-home datasets under near-realistic mixed-activity protocols, LastAct achieves competitive or superior performance on pure windows and yields substantial Macro-F1 gains on cross/mixed windows, demonstrating improved robustness under near-realistic sliding-window regimes.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出LastAct框架，有效识别连续传感器数据流中的人类活动，特别提升了含有活动转变的窗口下的识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现实中的智能家居活动识别（HAR）面临连续传感器流、活动边界未知及窗口混杂问题，且现有方法常忽视空间结构信息，导致识别准确率下降。
AI.method: 提出LastAct框架，将传感器事件投影至住宅平面图，形成空间连续的轨迹图像序列。通过轻量门控机制识别活动混合窗口，边界定位器估算最近活动转变位置，并进行边界引导的掩蔽以增强边界后证据、抑制过时上下文。模板缓存机制减少重复渲染，提高效率。
AI.result: 在四个公共智能家居数据集及近真实混合活动协议下，LastAct在纯窗口下表现与主流方法持平，但在混合/交叉窗口下Macro-F1显著提升，稳健性增加。
AI.conclusion: LastAct框架能更好地处理真实场景中窗口混杂与空间结构建模难题，在活动识别任务中实现更高准确率和稳健性，推进了智能家居应用落地。

title: Cognitive-Linguistic Indicators of Depression in Online Communities: Analysed by DistilBERT and Holographic Reduced Representation
summary: This paper investigates whether combining cognitively grounded linguistic features with transformer-based embeddings improves automated detection of depression in online text. Using Beck's Cognitive Theory of Depression, the study extracts cognitive distortions as measurable features, including first-person pronoun density, absolutist words, and negative emotion in Reddit posts from depression-related and control communities. Using a subset of the Kaggle Reddit Suicide and Depression Detection dataset, two classification pipelines are compared, a TF-IDF embedding with Naive Bayes as a baseline, and a hybrid model that concatenates DistilBERT sentence embeddings with Holographic Reduced Representation (HRR) vectors encoding the cognitive-linguistic features, followed by Logistic Regression. The hybrid DistilBERT HRR model achieves a macro F1 score of 0.94 versus 0.80 for the TD-IDF baseline, with 5-fold cross validation F1 improving from 0.83 to 0.92, and AUC from 0.958 to 0.981.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合认知语言特征与Transformer嵌入的新方法，有效提升了基于在线文本的抑郁检测效果。
AI.motivation: 自动化检测抑郁倾向对心理健康预警具有重要意义，现有方法大多依赖通用语言模型，缺乏对认知心理特征的考虑。作者希望通过引入Beck抑郁认知理论的具体特征提升模型检测精度。
AI.method: 作者以Reddit的相关话题社区帖子为数据，按照Beck抑郁理论提取如第一人称代词密度、极端词、负向情绪等认知失调特征。设计了两种分类管道：一是传统TF-IDF+Naive Bayes，二是DistilBERT句向量与认知特征HRR拼接后用Logistic回归建模。
AI.result: 混合模型（DistilBERT+HRR+Logistic Regression）宏F1得分为0.94，明显高于基线TF-IDF的0.80。5折交叉验证F1由0.83提升到0.92，AUC由0.958增至0.981。
AI.conclusion: 结合认知语言特征与Transformer嵌入能显著提升在线文本抑郁倾向检测的性能，优于传统浅层方法。

title: Adaptive PD Gains for Energy-Conscious Control in Physical Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Compliant force or torque control are approaches often investigated to achieve safe physical human-robot interaction (pHRI). However, these approaches have limitations. Force control requires a robot to be equipped with external force sensors to track the amplitude and direction of applied forces. Torque control requires torque sensing or estimation in each joint. As this is not available on every robot, energy-based approaches offer a promising alternative. Such approaches aim to achieve safe pHRI by limiting the mechanical energy of the robot. Current schemes leveraging an energy-based approach tend to have a complex implementation, and some may require further stability verification. We hence propose an adaptive proportional-derivative (PD) controller that can limit a robot's energy under any given limit to achieve safe pHRI. The proposed controller can limit both the kinetic and potential energy of a robot, and the behaviour of the controller gains can be shaped using various parameters, defining precisely the cutoff limit and sharpness. We construct a stability proof for the controller and define a condition to ensure the controller's stability. The proposed controller's behaviour and compliance are tested on the TALOS robot from PAL Robotics both in simulation and on hardware, verifying the expected compliant and energy-limiting behaviour of the controller.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应PD控制器，用于在实现安全的人机物理交互（pHRI）的同时，对机器人能量进行限制。该控制器在仿真和实际硬件上（TALOS机器人）均验证了其合规性和能量限制效果。
AI.motivation: 现有安全人机物理交互方法多依赖于力或力矩控制，但这两种方法通常需求昂贵或不普适的传感器。能量限制方法虽有前景，却普遍实现复杂或稳定性有待进一步认证。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种改进的自适应比例-微分（PD）控制器，可根据预设阈值限制机器人的动能和势能，并允许灵活调整增益的变化曲线。文中还理论证明了控制器的稳定性并给出了相应判据。
AI.result: 该控制器在PAL Robotics的TALOS机器人（仿真与原型均有测试）上进行了实验，结果显示其能够实现预期的合规性能及能量限制效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应PD控制器无需外部力或力矩传感器，即可实现能量限制下的安全人机物理交互，并具备可证明的稳定性，具有较强的实际应用潜力。

title: The Harsh Truth: Segment-Level Analysis of Harsh Driving Events in Milan Using Large-Scale Telematics, Street Networks, and Google Street View
summary: Police-reported crash statistics remain the standard input for urban road-safety assessment, but their incompleteness and reporting lag limit their usefulness for timely, fine-grained intervention design. Harsh acceleration and braking events are widely used as surrogate safety indicators, but have so far been studied only in comparatively small urban samples. This study analyses harsh events across the urban road network of Milan, combining high-resolution telematics from more than 4.2 million vehicles equipped with On-Board Units, segment-level traffic metrics from TomTom, street-network and infrastructure attributes from OpenStreetMap, and visual streetscape features extracted from Google Street View via semantic segmentation using a OneFormer model. We employ an analytical framework combining non-parametric Mann--Whitney U tests of segment-feature distributions between high- and low-harshness groups with supervised machine-learning regressors. We find that, once exposure is controlled for, wider carriageways, crossings and transit stops, and more open visual fields (higher sky- and road-pixel proportions) are associated with higher harsh-event intensity, while denser built frontage is associated with lower intensity. Finally, the cycling-infrastructure case study identifies a gradient in harsh-event intensity across facility types: markings-only cycle lanes are associated with a 19.5% higher harshness score, and mixed-traffic configurations with an 11.5% higher score, relative to physically separated cycle paths, conditional on the included controls. These results support context-specific rather than uniform urban-safety interventions and illustrate how large-scale telematics combined with open geospatial and visual data can inform Vision Zero decision-making at the metropolitan scale.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用米兰超过420万辆配备车载单元车辆的高分辨率遥测数据，结合道路、街景等多源信息，分析整个城市范围内的剧烈加减速事件，并用机器学习方法识别与安全相关的城市道路特征。
AI.motivation: 传统的交通事故数据具有限时性差、信息不全的问题，难以为及时且精细化的道路安全干预提供支持。剧烈加减速事件被视为替代安全指标，但迄今多局限于小样本分析，本研究希望在大规模城市网下分析其分布和影响因素。
AI.method: 整合4.2万辆车辆遥测数据、TomTom 路段流量指标、OpenStreetMap 路网与基础设施属性、以及通过OneFormer模型在Google街景中语义分割得到的视觉特征。利用非参数检验（Mann-Whitney U检验）与监督机器学习回归器对高、低剧烈事件的路段特征分布进行分析。
AI.result: 控制流量暴露后，宽车道、交叉口、公交站点和视觉开放度高（如更多天空和路面占比的街景）与剧烈事件强度上升相关，建筑密集度高与强度下降相关。自行车基础设施分析发现：仅有标线的自行车道和混合交通道路的剧烈事件强度分别比物理隔离的自行车道高19.5%和11.5%。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，道路安全干预应根据具体路段和环境特征做出差异化设计，而非一刀切。大规模遥测和开放地理视觉数据的结合，可助力于大都市道路安全的精细化决策和Vision Zero目标的实现。

title: A Multi-Domain Red Teaming Framework for Safety, Robustness, and Fairness Evaluation of Medical Large Language Models
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. To be presented at the Text2Story 2026 Workshop (Delft, The Netherlands, 29 March 2026); CEUR Workshop Proceedings (forthcoming). Affiliation: John Snow Labs Inc
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across healthcare, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture model behavior under adversarial or ethically complex conditions common in clinical practice. We developed a multi-domain red teaming framework evaluating eleven contemporary LLMs across 690 clinically grounded scenarios spanning nine domains and over 150 subcategories. Scenarios incorporated adversarial transformations, and responses were assessed using a seven-dimension rubric with LLM-assisted scoring and human-in-the-loop validation. Results revealed substantial performance variance, with mean scores ranging from 0.791 to 0.984. Critically, several high-performing systems produced complete failures in individual safety-critical scenarios, demonstrating that aggregate accuracy masks clinically meaningful risk. The highest-performing systems (X-BAI, GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.1) achieved scores above 0.97 with low variance, while performance varied significantly across domains. Equity-related tasks showed 10-20% error amplification with demographic modifications, and human reviewers identified clinically relevant failures missed by automated evaluation. Our findings demonstrate that performance variance and worst-case failures provide more clinically meaningful reliability indicators than mean accuracy alone, and that hybrid evaluation approaches combining automation with clinician oversight are essential for credible safety assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了多领域红队测试框架，系统评估了11个大型语言模型（LLM）在医疗健康场景中的表现，揭示了平均准确率掩盖了关键安全风险，强调了混合自动和人工评估的必要性。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM评测方法未能体现模型在医疗实际操作中面对对抗性或伦理复杂情境下的行为，亟需更能反映真实医疗场景风险和安全隐患的评测框架。
AI.method: 作者设计了涵盖九大领域、150多个子类别、共690个临床相关情境的红队测试体系，对11个现有LLM进行评测。每种情境包括对抗性变换，评估用七维量表，评分方式结合了自动化与人工验证。
AI.result: 不同模型之间表现差异大，平均分0.791到0.984，高分系统在部分关键场景下仍有全失败现象。表现最佳的X-BAI、GPT-5和Claude Opus 4.1分数高于0.97，方差较小。带有群体变量修改的公平性任务错误放大10-20%。人工评审能发现自动化遗漏的关键临床失误。
AI.conclusion: 单纯均值分数难以衡量医疗LLM可靠性，风险波动和极端失误反更具临床现实意义。自动评分与人类临床专家结合的混合评估体系对于安全合规测试至关重要。

title: A passive universal grasping mechanism based on an everting shell
summary: A passive monolithic compliant grasping mechanism that works based on the eversion of an elastically deformable bistable shell is conceptualized. It comprises grasping arms made of beam segments that work in conjunction with the everting shell. The grasper is capable of picking up a stiff object of any shape up to a maximum size and weight. The bistable shell everts upon contact with the object to enable the grasping arms envelop the object forming an enclosure. The mechanism then stays in that configuration until it is actuated again to turn the shell back to its original configuration and thereby opening the enclosure to release the object. The stiffness of the arms decides the payload of the mechanism. The size of the arms decides the largest object that can be grasped and held. The arms have distributed compliance so that they can conform to the shape of the object without applying undue force on it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弹性双稳态外翻壳的被动整体柔顺抓取机构，能够无损抓取并释放不同形状和一定尺寸范围内的刚性物体。
AI.motivation: 现有刚性或部分柔顺抓取机构复杂且可能对被抓物体施加过大力，易造成损伤。本文旨在设计一种结构简单、对目标适应性强且抓取过程柔和的抓取器。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一种整体被动柔顺抓取机构，采用带有分布式柔顺特性的抓取臂与弹性双稳态壳体结合。当壳体与物体接触时可自动外翻，驱动抓取臂包裹物体并形成封闭抓取，待外力作用后回弹释放物体。
AI.result: 该抓取器能够抓取最大尺寸和重量内、任意形状的刚性物体，实现自适应包裹和无损持取，其抓取能力由臂的刚度和尺寸决定。
AI.conclusion: 该机构结构简单、性能可靠，具有很强的自适应性和保护性，适合对不同形状和尺寸物体的安全抓取，在柔顺抓取领域具有潜在应用价值。

title: StressDream: Steering Video World Models for Robust Policy Evaluation and Improvement
summary: Video world models (WMs) have shown promise for policy evaluation and improvement by imagining realistic future observations conditioned on ego-robot actions. While WMs can model distributions over futures, policy evaluation and improvement typically rely on nominal imaginations, which can miss high-impact outcomes of robot actions unless prohibitively many samples are drawn. To enable robust policy evaluation and improvement over WM imaginations, we propose StressDream, which steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified at inference time by optimizing the initial noise of diffusion-based WMs. However, optimizing high-dimensional noise is challenging: the optimization must reason about nuanced, scene-dependent target events in generated videos while avoiding out-of-distribution (OOD) noise that yields implausible imaginations. We address this with two complementary objectives: a semantic objective with a Vision-Language Model that provides informative gradients by reasoning about the generated video, and a plausibility objective that prevents the optimized noise from drifting OOD. With state-of-the-art video world models for autonomous driving and robotic manipulation, we show that StressDream effectively steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified by text at inference time, such as task failures, enabling robust policy evaluation and improvement by identifying actions whose plausible futures include undesirable outcomes. Video results are available at https://junwon.me/StressDream/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为StressDream的方法，通过优化扩散模型初始噪声，有针对性地生成高影响但可信的机器人未来观察结果，以提升决策评估和优化的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型虽然能模拟未来，但大多只依赖普通想象，难以覆盖高影响、低概率但关键的后果，导致策略评估不够鲁棒。需要方法发现和关注那些高影响、真实可能发生的场景。
AI.method: StressDream在扩散式世界模型中，通过优化初始噪声引导生成过程，使想象内容靠近事先给定（如文本指定）的高影响结果。具体优化由两个目标组成：一是语义目标，利用视觉-语言模型对想象视频内容提供梯度；二是合理性目标，防止噪声偏离分布导致生成结果不现实。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶和机器人操作任务的SOTA视频生成模型中，StressDream能够在推理过程中按照用户文本引导，成功生成高影响且可实现的后果（如失败案例），帮助策略发现潜在的高风险决策。
AI.conclusion: StressDream有效提升了视频世界模型在机器人决策评估中的实用性，实现了对高影响事件的定向探索，为安全与鲁棒性决策提供支持。

title: TCAR-Gen: Temporal Graph Retrieval with Evidence Fusion for Knowledge-Grounded Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation systems struggle with temporal reasoning and evidence fusion when answering complex questions over historical criminal case narratives. Existing approaches either retrieve independently of query semantics or fail to integrate multiple evidence sources coherently. We propose Temporal Context Augmented Retrieval Generation (TCAR-Gen), a framework that combines query-conditioned graph neural networks, temporal evidence fusion, and chain-of-trees reasoning to ground answer generation in retrieved evidence. On the Victorian Crime Diaries benchmark, TCAR-Gen achieves 0.3738 Recall@5, outperforming Vanilla RAG, Temporal RAG, GraphRAG-C, and GraphRAG-T across seven query types including multi-hop reasoning and counterfactual questions. Ablation studies reveal that the context graph, temporal penalty mechanism, and query conditioning are critical components. Cross-model evaluation across five language model (GPT-OSS 20B to TinyLlama 1.1B) demonstrates that TCAR-Gen maintains robust retrieval coverage at smaller model scales, though generation quality degrades substantially with reduced model capacity. Our work shows that explicit temporal modelling and multi-branch evidence fusion are essential for faithful, reasoning-intensive question answering over knowledge-grounded corpora.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TCAR-Gen框架，有效提升了检索增强生成系统在历史刑事案件复杂问答中的时序推理与多证据融合能力，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）系统在处理涉及时序关系和多证据融合的问题时表现有限，难以准确回答复杂的历史案件问题，特别是在需连续推理和反事实问题上表现欠佳。
AI.method: 提出TCAR-Gen框架，结合了基于查询的图神经网络、时序证据融合机制和链式树状推理，大幅提升了答案生成对证据的依赖与推理能力，并在检索阶段引入上下文图与时间惩罚，提高模型对时序信息的感知和多分支证据的综合。
AI.result: 在Victorian Crime Diaries基准数据集上，TCAR-Gen在Recall@5上达到0.3738，全面超越Vanilla RAG、Temporal RAG、GraphRAG-C及GraphRAG-T，对多跳推理、反事实等七类复杂问题均表现优越。消融实验表明上下文图、时间惩罚机制与查询条件是提升性能的关键因素。不同语言模型规模下也能保持良好检索覆盖率，但模型越小生成质量下降较快。
AI.conclusion: 显式的时序建模与多分支证据融合对于基于知识的、需要强推理能力的复杂问答系统至关重要，TCAR-Gen为此类场景提供了有效新范式。

title: PaCo-VLA: Passivity-Shielded Compliance Prior for Contact-Rich Vision-Language-Action Manipulation
comment: Under review, code will be available soon
summary: Contact-rich manipulation demands both high-level semantic reasoning and the safe regulation of high-frequency contact dynamics. While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide unprecedented semantic generalization, their low-rate outputs lack the reliability required for direct plant authority in force-sensitive tasks. To bridge this semantic-to-control gap, we introduce PaCo-VLA, a passivity-shielded compliance prior that recasts the VLA interface. Rather than trusting VLAs with direct motor commands, PaCo-VLA treats network outputs as task-level compliance proposals: semantic bindings, task stages, and admittance schedules. A high-frequency, proposal-independent passivity shield governs these proposals through energy-tank accounting and boundary checks, preventing invalid, stale, or unverified model predictions from bypassing low-level contact physics. This decoupled architecture also enables causal evaluation, isolating semantic contributions from geometric shortcuts. Extensive simulated and real-world connector-insertion experiments demonstrate that PaCo-VLA achieves superior precision over unshielded VLA baselines, sustaining zero passivity violations even under adversarial compliance shifts. This framework establishes a provably sampled-passive runtime contract at the admittance port and provides a runtime interface for deploying foundation models in contact-rich domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为PaCo-VLA的新架构，该结构在融合视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型语义能力的同时，通过被动性保护机制确保了高频接触动态下的安全与精确控制，适用于接触丰富的操作任务。
AI.motivation: VLA模型具备强大的语义泛化能力，但其低频率输出无法胜任需要高频精确控制的力敏感任务。作者希望在不牺牲语义层面泛化能力的前提下，增强在接触操作任务中的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: PaCo-VLA将VLA的输出视为任务级的顺应性建议（如语义绑定、任务阶段、顺应性调度），而不是直接下发马达指令，并用高频率、与具体建议无关的被动性保护（基于能量储备和边界检查）实时审核这些建议，阻止不合理、过时或未经验证的指令影响底层的接触物理。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界的连接器插入力操作实验中，PaCo-VLA相比无保护的VLA模型显示出更高的操作精度，在应对顺应性变化时能始终防止被动性违规，实现了更为安全的控制。
AI.conclusion: PaCo-VLA为在接触丰富任务中部署基础模型建立了一种带有被动性保证的运行时合同，为基础模型的实际应用提供了更安全、通用的接口。

title: Hyperbolic and Evidence-Prioritized Experts for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance on multimodal tasks through scaled architectures and extensive training. Recent studies introduce Mixture of Experts (MoE) into LVLMs for improved computational efficiency. However, existing MoE approaches treat visual and linguistic modalities with symmetric architectures, overlooking the inherent asymmetry in how these two modalities are processed. This asymmetry causes two critical issues. First, text and vision form hierarchical rather than parallel relationships, as text queries typically describe partial aspects of complete visual scenes. Euclidean expert space struggles to encode such containment structures. Second, language experts in deeper layers progressively shift from evidence-based processing to parametric memory dependence, losing grounding in the provided visual and linguistic information. To address these issues, we propose AsyMoE, a novel architecture that explicitly models this asymmetry through three specialized expert groups. Intra-modality experts handle modality-specific processing. Hyperbolic inter-modality experts capture hierarchical cross-modal relationships through negative curvature geometry. Evidence-priority language experts suppress parametric memory activation and maintain contextual grounding throughout network depth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsyMoE achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, with average gains of 1.5\% over MoE variants and up to 3.8\% on hallucination-sensitive tasks. AsyMoE activates 25.45\% fewer parameters compared to dense models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的大规模视觉-语言模型架构AsyMoE，通过针对视觉和语言模态的不对称处理，实现更高效和精确的多模态理解。
AI.motivation: 现有的MoE（专家混合）方法在LVLMs中对视觉和语言采用对称架构，忽略了两者实际上的处理不对称，导致层级关系表达困难及语言专家后期丧失多模态信息基础。
AI.method: 提出AsyMoE架构，用三类专家专门建模多模态不对称性：1）同模态专家处理各自模态的信息，2）超曲面交叉模态专家用负曲率几何表达层级关系，3）优先证据语言专家维持基于输入的上下文，不依赖参数记忆。
AI.result: AsyMoE在多项任务上对比主流MoE模型平均提升1.5%，在对幻觉（hallucination）敏感的任务上最高提升3.8%；相比稠密模型减少了25.45%的参数激活数。
AI.conclusion: AsyMoE有效建模了视觉-语言间的层级和不对称关系，在提升性能和减少计算资源消耗方面都优于现有方法。

title: LLMs for Cardiovascular Risk Prediction from Structured Clinical Data
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Systems, Blockchain, and Communication Technologies
summary: Coronary artery disease (CAD) remains one of the leading causes of death globally, highlighting the need for reliable predictive systems to support early diagnosis and risk assessment. While traditional machine learning models perform well on structured clinical data, large language models (LLMs) present new possibilities to interpret medical information expressed in natural language. In this work, we develop a hybrid framework that bridges structured clinical data and natural-language representations for CAD prediction. Using a publicly available dataset of 1,190 patient records with 11 clinical attributes, structured variables are converted into interpretable feature representations and synthetic clinical narratives using LLMs. A validation pipeline performs reverse extraction of clinical variables and computes a consistency score with the original records, achieving an average fidelity of 94.61%. We then evaluate four conventional machine learning models and compare their performance with LLM-based classification under zero-shot and few-shot prompting settings. We use two LLMs here, GPT and Gemini. Experimental results show that Random Forest achieves the highest accuracy. Despite this advantage, LLM-based classification remains beneficial in real-world clinical settings. This is because LLMs operate directly on natural language patient descriptions, meaning that sensitive numerical patient data such as exact lab values, blood pressure readings, and diagnostic codes are kept private. Findings suggest that combining structured clinical data with LLM-generated narratives can enable new directions for hybrid clinical prediction systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将结构化临床数据与大语言模型生成的自然语言叙述结合的混合预测框架，用于冠心病（CAD）的早期诊断与风险评估。
AI.motivation: 冠心病仍是全球主要死因之一，迫切需要可靠的预测系统。传统机器学习方法主要依赖结构化数据，而大语言模型能处理自然语言，具备解读医疗叙述的潜力。作者希望探索结构化数据与自然语言模型结合在CAD预测中的新路径。
AI.method: 作者利用包含1190例患者、含11项临床属性的公共数据集，借助大语言模型（如GPT和Gemini）将结构化变量转化为可解释特征以及合成的临床叙述，并设计反向提取和一致性验证管道，以衡量文本与原始记录的一致性。随后比较了四种机器学习模型与不同LLM提示下的分类效果。
AI.result: 反向提取一致性得分平均为94.61%。实验结果表明，传统的随机森林模型在准确率上优于LLM分类，但LLM在无需明示数值数据（保护隐私）的自然语言下，也具备实际临床应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 结构化临床数据与大语言模型生成叙述结合的混合预测方法为临床风险评估系统开辟了新方向，特别是在数据隐私保护及自然场景下患者描述的理解方面具有独特优势。

title: DriveAnchor: Progressive Anchor-based Flow Learning for Autonomous Driving Planning
summary: We present DriveAnchor, a three-stage framework for autonomous driving planning that achieves behavioral diversity, controllability, and safety in a composable pipeline.
