Demonstration Flow Pretraining replaces the unstructured Gaussian prior with a vocabulary of 2,398 trajectory shapes constructed by farthest-point sampling, structurally grounding behavioral diversity in vocabulary coverage. Guided Flow Post-training jointly post-trains an Energy Field module with flow matching (FM), conditioning the Energy Field on static road geometry alone, to relocate anchors toward user-specified corridor polygons before flow generation, adding controllability without differentiable guidance; after Stage 2, new corridor presets require only Energy Field updates, not FM retraining. Reward-Refined Flow Fine-tuning applies zeroth-order reinforcement learning to align each anchor's output with collision-avoidance objectives: because the flow-matching model is a deterministic feedforward network in single-step mode, each anchor uniquely determines the output trajectory, reducing reward optimization to a direction search in anchor space without log-likelihood computation or ODE-to-SDE conversion. Evaluated on approximately 2 million held-out driving scenarios, DriveAnchor reduces near-range collision rates by 89% and improves mean reward by 32% without degradation in imitation accuracy, with 2.06 ms inference on NVIDIA Drive Orin. DriveAnchor has been validated through real-world vehicle testing, confirming its practicality for production deployment.

AI.tldr: DriveAnchor提出了一种三阶段自动驾驶规划框架，实现了多样行为、可控性以及安全，并通过真实车辆验证了其实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶行为规划难以同时兼顾行为多样性、用户可控性和安全性，且行为生成通常依赖于高斯先验，表现出结构性不足。
AI.method: DriveAnchor包括三阶段：1）通过采样得到2398种轨迹形状的行为词汇，提升多样性；2）联合训练能量场模块，使锚点轨迹能根据用户指定走廊多样调节，并且只需更新能量场即可适应新场景；3）利用零阶强化学习方法，使每个锚点输出的轨迹兼顾安全性，把奖励优化简化为锚点空间的方向搜索。
AI.result: 在约200万未见场景上，框架将短程碰撞率降低89%，奖励平均提升32%，且无效仿精度下降。推理速度仅2.06 ms，且已在实际车辆验证通过。
AI.conclusion: DriveAnchor不仅实现了高效、可控和多样的自动驾驶规划，还具备产业级的实时性和安全性，适用于实际部署。

title: Real2SAM2Real: Generative 3D Caches as Complementary Context for Video Diffusion
summary: While Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) excel at synthesizing high-fidelity videos, enabling precise camera and scene control remains challenging. Existing methods predominantly rely on implicit diffusion priors to generate unobserved regions, inevitably leading to structural collapse during high-dynamic movements or complex occlusions. To address this challenge, we propose Real2SAM2Real, a framework that leverages 3D lifting models (e.g., SAM3D) to extract an explicitly editable 3D cache, serving as a robust geometric scaffold for the VDM. By capturing the entire 3D volume of foreground entities rather than just their visible shells, this cache injects holistic spatial priors into the VDM, providing dependable 3D-aware guidance for complex scene dynamics. To effectively leverage this 3D guidance while preserving pre-trained priors, we design a Soft Spatial-Aligned Injection mechanism alongside a minimally invasive fine-tuning strategy tailored for VDMs. Furthermore, we employ masked normal maps as a cross-modal bridge to construct a 3D-free data curation and perturbation pipeline. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Real2SAM2Real enables precise, decoupled control over both camera trajectories and multi-entity motions. By utilizing the complementary context from generative 3D caches, our framework overcomes typical breakdowns caused by over-reliance on diffusion priors, maintaining exceptional spatiotemporal consistency under large camera shifts and severe occlusions. Crucially, by decoupling geometry from appearance, our VDM-tailored 3D cache eradicates perspective ambiguities caused by structural holes and erroneous facades, as well as misleading cues from reflections and refractions. Project website is available at https://jiayi-wu-leo.github.io/real2sam2real

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了Real2SAM2Real框架，通过引入可编辑的3D缓存作为Video Diffusion Models（VDMs）的几何支撑，实现了对摄像机和场景的高精度控制，有效提升了VDMs在复杂场景下的生成可靠性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有VDMs虽然可以生成高质量视频，但对于摄像机和场景动态的精确控制存在较大挑战，特别是在复杂运动和遮挡下容易结构崩溃。其核心原因在于仅依赖于隐式扩散先验，难以处理未观测区域。
AI.method: 该方法提出结合3D lifting模型（如SAM3D）提取可编辑的3D缓存，作为VDMs的显式几何结构支撑。通过捕捉前景实体完整3D体积，给予VDM全面的空间先验。同时，设计Soft Spatial-Aligned Injection机制与最小侵入式的微调策略，并利用masked normal maps作为跨模态数据桥接，实现3D自由的数据整理与扰动流程。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，Real2SAM2Real框架显著提升了摄像机轨迹及多实体动态的精准解耦控制能力。通过结合3D缓存的上下文信息，模型在大幅摄像机运动与严重遮挡情况下依然保持出色的时空一致性，克服了对扩散先验过度依赖导致的结构失真。
AI.conclusion: 本框架通过将几何与外观解耦，为VDMs提供结构化的空间引导，消除视角歧义、结构漏洞以及由反射/折射带来的误导，显著增强了在复杂场景下的生成质量和控制能力。

title: Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Cross-Entity Financial Sentiment Analysis: A Comparative Study
summary:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become foundational for grounding large language models in domain-specific corpora, yet conventional vector-based RAG systems are fundamentally limited in their ability to capture the structured, multi-entity relationships that underpin financial market analysis. This paper presents a comprehensive comparative study of a novel two-hop Graph-RAG architecture versus a standard vector-only baseline for cross-entity financial sentiment analysis. Our system constructs a sentiment-weighted knowledge graph of 59 equity entities from 255 news articles covering 10 major technology stocks, then augments dense retrieval with intensity-filtered graph traversal over INFLUENCES edges to surface relational evidence inaccessible to vector search alone.
  We evaluate both architectures on 100 grounded queries (30 Direct, 70 Relational) using semantic similarity, entity recall, RAGAS metrics, latency benchmarks, and ablation studies. Graph-RAG achieves a statistically significant improvement in entity recall (+6.4%, p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank) and delivers substantially more relevant answers for complex multi-entity queries (+11.7% Answer Relevancy), with gains concentrating in relational question types (+16.1%). Critically, these improvements come at no measurable cost to answer quality (delta = +0.001 semantic similarity, Cohen's d = 0.078), with a modest 22.6% increase in mean latency offset by an 80% reduction in latency variance.
  An ablation study on the graph traversal intensity threshold reveals an inverted-U relationship with answer quality, identifying tau = 0.5 as optimal over the production default of tau = 0.7. These findings characterize a precision-for-coverage trade-off inherent to graph-augmented retrieval and provide actionable architectural guidance for practitioners building RAG systems for multi-entity financial analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并系统评估了一种新颖的Graph-RAG（图结构检索增强生成）架构，显著提升了金融领域跨实体情感分析的检索效果，相较于传统向量RAG系统，尤其在多实体、关系复杂的问题上表现更优。
AI.motivation: 金融市场分析依赖于多实体及其复杂关系的理解。现有基于向量的RAG系统难以充分捕获这些结构化、多实体间的交互信息，限制了其在金融情感分析等任务中的表现。因此，作者希望引入图结构来增强RAG系统，实现更精细化的跨实体信息检索与推理。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种两跳Graph-RAG架构，首先对255篇涵盖10大科技股的新闻构建了59个股票实体的情感加权知识图谱。检索时，结合向量检索与基于INFLUENCES边的、带有置信度阈值的图遍历，从而捕捉传统向量方法无法提供的实体关系证据。对比标准向量RAG与Graph-RAG在100个有实体基础的问题上，涉及语义相似度、实体召回率、RAGAS指标、延迟和消融实验。
AI.result: Graph-RAG在实体召回率（提升6.4%）、多实体复杂查询的答案相关性（提升11.7%）、关系型问题相关性（提升16.1%）上显著优于对照组，且不会牺牲答案质量（语义相似度几乎持平）。虽然平均延迟增长22.6%，但延迟方差大幅下降80%。消融实验发现，采样强度阈值tau=0.5在答案质量上优于生产默认tau=0.7，展现了覆盖率与精度之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 优化的Graph-RAG方法能显著提升金融多实体检索及生成效果，特别适合复杂关系分析。论文为金融分析RAG系统的架构设计提供了技术参考，也表明图增强技术在结构化、多实体任务下优于仅向量RAG。

title: PACE: Phase-Aware Chunk Execution for Robot Policies with Action Chunking
summary: Recent vision-language-action and diffusion-based robot policies often use action chunking, where each policy query predicts a sequence of future actions and the robot executes an open-loop prefix before re-querying. While this interface improves local motion continuity, deployment still requires choosing the execution horizon: how much of each predicted chunk should be executed before acquiring a new observation. However, our experiments show that success is strongly task-dependent and non-monotonic with respect to the execution horizon, making a single constant horizon an unreliable deployment rule. We propose PACE (Phase-Aware Chunk Execution), a training-free test-time execution method that selects the execution horizon online from the predicted chunk itself. PACE exploits the phase-dependent kinematic structure of manipulation trajectories by identifying low-speed transition points in the predicted speed profile and using them as candidate replanning boundaries. Because PACE uses only the predicted action chunk, it is plug-and-play and requires no retraining or access to policy internals. We validate PACE through large-scale evaluations in both simulation and real-robot settings. On 50 RoboTwin2.0 tasks, PACE raises the average success rate from 57.8% to 64.2%. In real-robot experiments on bimanual ALOHA and single-arm Franka platforms, PACE improves the average task score from 60.7 to 77.7 and the average success rate from 50.7% to 70.4%. Ablations and rollout-level analyses show that PACE adapts execution horizons across manipulation phases, shortening near transitions while preserving longer execution during coherent motion.

AI.tldr: 近年来，机器人领域利用视觉-语言-动作多模态模型以及扩散模型增强策略，常采用“动作分段”方式决策和执行。本文发现，实际部署时固定的分段执行长度（执行区间）往往难以适应不同任务。为此，作者提出了一种无需重新训练的动态分段执行方法“PACE”，能基于预测动作序列中的相变点实时自适应调整执行区间，在仿真和实体机器人上均显著提升了任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的动作分段决策虽然提升了运动的连续性，但实际部署时，执行多长的动作片段再重新观测（即分段长度）很难把握，且对任务成败影响显著且复杂，使用固定区间不可靠。作者旨在设计一种自动、智能、无须重新训练的分段调整方法，提高策略推理实用性。
AI.method: 作者提出“PACE”方法。它在测试时从当前预测出来的动作分段序列中，自动检测速度曲线中的低速转折点（即相变点），以此作为是否重新规划的分界线。PACE不依赖策略内部细节或再训练，完全可即插即用。实验覆盖大规模仿真和多种实体机器人平台。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin2.0平台50项任务中，PACE将平均成功率提升至64.2%（相较原本57.8%）。在ALOHA双臂和Franka单臂实体机器人上，PACE分别将评分由60.7提升至77.7、成功率由50.7%升至70.4%。消融实验与详细回放分析显示PACE能在任务关键节点自适应缩短分段，在顺畅动作阶段维持较长分段。
AI.conclusion: PACE为动作分段接口提供了一种无需训练、具任务自适应性的智能执行策略，简单实用，显著提升了多模态大模型驱动机器人的任务成功率和执行表现。

title: Where to Refine, When to Stop: Rethinking Redundancy via Latent Discrepancy for Efficient Visual Autoregressive Generation
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models deliver high-quality image generation but suffer from significant inference latency at high resolutions. Recent acceleration approaches most rely on heuristic measures with layer features to prune tokens. Such heuristics are sensitive to complex contextual semantics, leading to inaccurate identification of redundant computation and poor adaptability across prompts. We rethink redundancy in VAR from the perspective of its impact on pixel-space generation and introduce Latent Discrepancy. This unified metric quantifies a token's contribution by measuring the change in model states during generation. Our analysis shows that redundancy is more accurately identified when guided by image latent or pixel-space signals. We further observed that in classifier-free guidance (CFG), the convergence trend of the discrepancy between conditional and unconditional branches exhibits high dynamics with different prompts. Based on these findings, we propose LD-Pruning (Latent Discrepancy Pruning), a training-free framework that removes redundancy via latent discrepancy by integrating decoding-free region selection and adaptive unconditional-branch skipping. Extensive experiments show that LD-Pruning substantially reduces inference latency while maintaining high generation quality, achieving up to 2.35x speedup on Infinity-8B.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新方法（Latent Discrepancy Pruning, LD-Pruning）来加速视觉自回归（VAR）模型的推理速度，大幅减少低效冗余计算，同时保持高质量的图像生成效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管VAR模型可以生成高质量图像，但在高分辨率下推理速度慢。现有加速方法多依赖启发式特征，容易被复杂语义影响，导致难以准确识别冗余计算且泛化能力差。因此需要更精确、更泛化的冗余识别与裁剪策略。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种“潜在差异度”（Latent Discrepancy）指标，衡量每个token在生成过程中的实际贡献，通过追踪模型状态变化来识别冗余，并结合对分类器无指导（CFG）分支动态的分析，实现基于该指标的解码和区域跳过。最终形成训练无关的LD-Pruning框架。
AI.result: 实验证明，LD-Pruning能在不降低生成质量的前提下，显著减少VAR模型的推理时延。在Infinity-8B模型上最高加速达2.35倍，效果优于现有启发式裁剪方法。
AI.conclusion: LD-Pruning通过度量潜在差异度优化VAR模型推理，兼顾速度与生成质量，具有良好的泛化性，可为后续大规模生成模型的高效推理提供新思路。

title: DLLM-JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures for Masked Diffusion Language Models
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 13 tables. Accepted at SPIGM Workshop, ICML 2026
summary: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have reshaped self-supervised representation learning in vision. The recent LLM-JEPA ported JEPA to autoregressive language models but inherited two steep costs from the causal-attention substrate: it demands explicit multi-view data (e.g., text-code pairs), and it requires two gradient-carrying forward passes per step. We introduce DLLM-JEPA, which pairs JEPA with masked-diffusion language models to eliminate both costs at once. The bidirectional attention of diffusion models yields two semantically distinct views of the same input via different masking rates -- no explicit pairs needed -- and supports a single gradient-carrying forward pass, cutting training FLOPs by 33% relative to LLM-JEPA. DLLM-JEPA improves over diffusion-only fine-tuning in every (task, architecture) combination we evaluate: up to +18.7 pp on LLaDA-8B GSM8K and +11.4 pp on Dream-7B GSM8K, with consistent positive gains on Spider, NL-RX-SYNTH, and Django. Beyond accuracy, DLLM-JEPA exhibits a dual-win property: on LLaDA-8B with the Wide-t configuration, it simultaneously raises GSM8K accuracy (67.1 vs. 65.2, +1.8 pp), drives held-out Wikitext loss below the pre-trained base, and preserves MMLU accuracy at base level across three fine-tuning seeds -- whereas an L2-to-base parameter anchor matches baseline accuracy with no task gain. Layer-wise probing reveals the mechanism: a geometric-functional drift dissociation in which the fine-tuned backbone moves further from the pre-trained weights than the baseline yet forgets less on held-out Wikitext, with the amplification concentrated in middle transformer layers. The pattern appears on Dream-7B as well, indicating the phenomenon is not specific to a single backbone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DLLM-JEPA，将JEPA方法与掩码扩散语言模型结合，有效提升了自监督表征学习在自然语言处理中的效果，同时大幅降低了训练成本。
AI.motivation: 当前JEPA方法在语言模型中应用存在两大瓶颈：一是依赖显式多视角数据（如文本与代码配对）；二是每步训练需两次前向传播，计算开销大。因此，亟需一种更高效且不依赖显式数据对的方法。
AI.method: 作者将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型（diffusion LLM）结合，利用扩散模型的双向注意力机制，通过不同mask率自动生成语义上不同的视角，无需显式配对数据，同时只需单次前向传播，有效减少计算量。
AI.result: DLLM-JEPA在所有评测任务和架构上优于仅扩散微调方法，如在LLaDA-8B GSM8K上提升18.7个百分点，在Dream-7B GSM8K上提升11.4个百分点，在Spider、NL-RX-SYNTH和Django等任务上也取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: DLLM-JEPA方法既提升了任务精度，又降低了预训练模型遗忘现象，实现了兼顾泛化与记忆的“双赢”。其机制为中层transformer的几何-功能漂移解耦，所发现现象对不同背骨均成立，显示方法具有较好推广性。

title: Dynamic Resilient Spatio-Semantic Memory with Hybrid Localization for Mobile Manipulation
comment: Code, CAD model, and real-robot demonstrations are available at https://bjhyzj.github.io/dream-web
summary: Reliable mobile manipulation in dynamic indoor environments requires a scene representation that remains geometrically consistent, semantically queryable, and computationally bounded as the environment changes. Existing systems often rely on pre-built maps, static-scene assumptions, or highly accurate camera poses, which can lead to stale or misaligned scene information when target objects are relocated or pose estimates are corrected. This paper presents DREAM, a real-robot mobile manipulation framework that integrates perception, memory, localization, navigation, and manipulation in previously unseen indoor environments without a pre-built map. DREAM constructs an online spatio-semantic voxel memory from RGB-D observations registered by a LiDAR-inertial-visual SLAM backend. It further introduces pose-graph-aware Redundancy-Aware Memory Pruning (RMP) to update historical observations after pose corrections while keeping long-horizon observation history bounded. For target localization and reacquisition, DREAM combines language-conditioned 3D retrieval, open-vocabulary image detection, and multimodal large language model based semantic verification. Real-robot experiments in four dynamic indoor laboratory scenes show that DREAM improves long-horizon task success rates from 40%-60% with DynaMem to 55%-70%, while maintaining a memory footprint of 0.37-0.63 GB and an online memory-update time of 0.43-0.53 s across scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预先构建地图的移动操作系统DREAM，能在动态室内环境下实现实时感知、建图与目标检测，在多项指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的移动操作方法依赖于静态地图、固定场景或高精度相机定位，面对场景变动（如目标物体移动、定位修正）时出现信息失效或不一致，难以适应动态和未知环境。
AI.method: DREAM系统融合了感知、记忆、定位、导航、操作等模块，通过RGB-D观测和多传感器SLAM构建空间-语义体素记忆，并引入冗余感知的历史数据修剪（RMP），以支持长期、多次修正下的高效记忆管理。同时结合语言条件化3D检索、开放词汇图像检测和大型多模态模型语义验证，实现目标定位和重新获取。
AI.result: 在4个动态室内实验场景的真实机器人测试表明，DREAM将长周期任务成功率从40%-60%提升至55%-70%，内存占用保持在0.37-0.63 GB，在线记忆更新时间为0.43-0.53秒，均优于对比方法DynaMem。
AI.conclusion: DREAM无须预建地图，能够高效、稳健地适应和操作动态未知室内环境，提升了机器人长时间移动操作任务的成功率与系统可实际部署性。

title: Training-Free Object-Agnostic Jam Detection in Fulfillment Centers
comment: 4 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026) as a presentation-only paper
summary: In fulfillment centers, diverse objects move continuously from inbound to outbound operations and can become jammed due to excessive conveyor friction, incorrect orientation, or mechanical failures. Traditional jam detection approaches rely on object detection models to identify objects, followed by tracking algorithms (such as IoU overlap and Kalman filtering) to monitor motion over time. This pipeline requires thousands of manual annotations, consuming approximately two weeks of effort, and is limited to annotated object classes. We present a training-free, object-agnostic jam detection method that eliminates the need for labeled data. Our approach uniformly samples reference points within the monitoring region when no objects are present. As objects occlude these points, we detect motion. When a sufficient fraction remains occluded beyond a temporal threshold, we classify the event as a jam. Unlike conventional point tracking--which treats occlusion as a failure case--our approach repurposes occlusion as a detection signal, monitoring whether reference points remain persistently occluded rather than tracking where they move. Our experimental evaluation on 1,069 videos demonstrates that AllTracker achieves 100.00% precision and 93.33% F1 score, significantly outperforming classical sparse tracking methods while maintaining training-free deployment. This approach offers three key advantages: (1) no training data or manual annotations, (2) object-agnostic generalization to arbitrary object types, and (3) significantly reduced development time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、与物体无关的堵塞检测方法，通过对区域内采样参考点的遮挡情况进行检测，实现更高效、通用的堵塞判断。
AI.motivation: 现有的堵塞检测方法通常依赖物体检测和跟踪算法，需要大量人工标注数据，且不能泛化到未标注类别，开发和部署成本较高。
AI.method: 本文提出在无物体时对监控区域均匀采样参考点，当物体移动遮挡时检测其运动。当有足够多的参考点在一定时间内持续被遮挡，则判定为堵塞发生。不同于传统跟踪遮挡视为失败，创新性地以遮挡为检测信号。
AI.result: 在1,069个视频实验中，该方法（AllTracker）实现了100%精度和93.33%的F1分数，显著优于传统稀疏跟踪方法，并且无需任何训练与标注。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需标注和训练数据，能泛化至任意物体类型，极大减少开发周期，且性能优异，适合实际物流中心部署。

title: Agreement Metrics for LLM-as-Judge Evaluation: What to Report and Why
summary: Validating an LLM judge against human annotations usually means reporting several agreement statistics: accuracy, precision, recall, $F_1$, Cohen's $κ$, and one or more rank correlations. A survey of 24 recent LLM-as-judge papers finds metric choice entangled with the judgment scale, tie handling, invalid outputs, and abstention handling, and those choices rarely stated. For binary criteria -- the common case in rubric-based evaluation, where each criterion is graded MET or UNMET -- most of the reported numbers are redundant: Pearson's $r$, Spearman's $ρ$, Kendall's $τ_b$, the phi coefficient $φ$, and the Matthews Correlation Coefficient all reduce to a single number on non-degenerate binary data, so reporting several of them only creates an illusion of corroborating evidence. Cohen's $κ$ is the one agreement coefficient that adds information: it shares $φ$'s numerator but normalizes differently, and the gap between them measures how far the judge's positive-label rate has drifted from the human's. We then trace what changes when a judge may abstain with a CANNOT_ASSESS verdict: the three common ways of handling abstentions are not interchangeable preprocessing choices but answer different questions, and they break the binary equivalences. The same equivalences reappear, up to a negligible finite-sample correction, for multi-judge ensembles scored with Fleiss' $κ$ or Krippendorff's $α$. We close with a reporting checklist that names the judgment scale, the abstention and tie handling mode, coverage, the confusion matrix, and the aggregation level alongside any scalar agreement coefficient.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在用大语言模型（LLM）作为评审时，与人工标注一致性的衡量方式，指出常见的统计指标之间在特定情境下高度冗余，并提供了指标选择和报告应包括的要素。
AI.motivation: 当前大量LLM评估工作依赖与人类标签一致性的统计指标，但这些指标的选择、实际涵义与冗余性未被系统讨论，导致评估结论可能产生误导。作者希望厘清各指标的关系，并为研究者提供更合理的报告指南。
AI.method: 作者回顾了24篇近期相关论文，分析了常用统计指标与打分尺度、平手和弃权处理间的关系，探究了指标间实际包含的信息量和冗余情况，并对多裁判情境进行了扩展讨论。最后，作者提出了一份详细的报告清单。
AI.result: 研究发现，在二元评判下，多数一致性指标实质上是等价的，仅Cohen's κ能提供额外的信息；在弃权评判等情景下，处理方式会严重影响一致性统计并破坏原有的等价性。多裁判统计如Fleiss' κ和Krippendorff's α也类似。
AI.conclusion: LLM一致性评估中，常用的多个指标往往是冗余的，只需报告关键的、不等价的信息，并明确报告评判尺度、处理方式、数据覆盖情况等关键信息，以避免误导。

title: Global-Local Attention Decomposition for Terrain Encoding in Humanoid Perceptive Locomotion
summary: Although reinforcement learning has significantly advanced humanoid locomotion, perceptive policies still struggle on sparse-foothold terrain and constrained environments. Success in these scenarios requires both broad terrain awareness and precise foothold selection, two perceptual roles that conventional encoders often entangle. To address this challenge, we propose Global-Local Attention Decomposition (GLAD) for terrain encoding in humanoid locomotion. Realized by a coarse-to-fine encoder over a robot-centric elevation map, GLAD explicitly separates these objectives: a global attention branch utilizes attention pooling to summarize the surrounding terrain context, while a state-conditioned local attention branch sparsifies and encodes precise foothold-relevant geometry. This explicit attention decomposition prevents the dilution of fine-grained spatial cues while reducing training overhead. Experiments demonstrate that GLAD enables reliable locomotion over challenging gaps, stepping stones, and stairs. Furthermore, the learned policy exhibits emergent terrain-responsive behaviors, autonomously following narrow paths and avoiding obstacles under simple velocity commands without explicit navigation planners. In real-world deployment on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot using onboard LiDAR, the proposed method achieves robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer across diverse sparse-foothold and obstacle-rich domains.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的地形编码方法GLAD（Global-Local Attention Decomposition），用于提升类人机器人在稀疏落脚点和复杂环境中的运动能力。
AI.motivation: 现有感知策略在稀疏落脚点地形和受限环境中表现不佳，传统编码器难以同时兼顾广域地形感知和精确落脚点选择。
AI.method: 提出GLAD方法，将地形编码为机器人中心的高程图，采用粗到细的编码器。通过全局注意力分支总结周围地形环境，用局部注意力分支编码与落脚相关的精细几何信息，实现感知目标的分离。
AI.result: 实验表明，GLAD显著提升了机器人在间隙、台阶和石块等复杂地形下的行走成功率，策略能够自动跟随窄路径并避障。方法在Unitree G1机器人上实现了无需微调的零样本从仿真到现实迁移。
AI.conclusion: GLAD方法有效分离了全局与局部感知任务，提升了类人机器人的运动鲁棒性和自适应性，为类人机器人复杂地形运动提供了新的感知编码思路。

title: UniVerse: A Unified Modulation Framework for Segmentation-Free,Disentangled Multi-Concept Personalization
summary: Personalized visual understanding has advanced significantly, yet existing approaches struggle to localize and extract specific concepts when input images contain multiple objects. Many prior methods rely heavily on segmentation-based supervision or exhibit poor compositional generalization, limiting their ability to accurately disentangle and manipulate individual concepts. In this work, we propose UniVerse, a Unified Modulation Framework for segmentation-free, disentangled multi-concept personalization in diffusion transformers. Our method allows for composable and decomposable concept extraction, enabling fine-grained localization and representation of target objects without explicit segmentation masks. UniVerse learns to decompose complex scenes into concept-specific representations and then compose them in a unified manner, enabling robust personalization across diverse visual contexts. Through extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, we demonstrate that UniVerse significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both localization accuracy and visual fidelity. Qualitative and quantitative results show that our approach can precisely extract target concepts in cluttered scenes, paving the way for more flexible, interpretable, and personalized visual generation and understanding.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需分割的多概念个性化方法UniVerse，实现了在复杂图像中对特定目标的精确定位与表征，并在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的个性化视觉理解方法在包含多个目标的图像中，难以实现对具体概念的精准定位和解析，且过分依赖分割监督，泛化能力弱。为提升多概念分离与操作能力，亟需一种新的方法。
AI.method: 提出UniVerse框架：基于扩散Transformer，无需显式分割掩码，能实现概念的可组合/可分解提取，学习将复杂场景分解为概念特异性的表征，并进行统一组合表示。
AI.result: 在多个数据集基准上，UniVerse在目标定位准确率与生成视觉逼真度上都显著优于最先进的基线方法，能够在复杂场景中精确抽取并表征目标概念。
AI.conclusion: UniVerse实现了灵活、可解释且更个性化的视觉生成与理解，为复杂场景下的多概念分离与个性化提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Enhancing BiGRU with a KAN Block for Legal Document Classification and Summarization
comment: This paper contains of 10 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables and version 2 after it review from ACL 2026
summary: This study introduces a novel architecture of KAN-based BiGRU model for the task of classification and summarization of legal documents in a low-resource multilingual setup. In order to tackle problems associated with domain language, the usage of different languages, long dependencies within context, and class imbalance, we employ the dataset composed of legal documents from Bangladesh and taken from Manupatra, which include Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali languages. Our classification task involves BiGRU model, along with Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) module, while the summarization part utilizes attention-based GRU, combined with a KAN model head. Classification model yields 67.96% of accuracy and 0.65 F1 score; while ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L measures for summarization yield 0.38, 0.23, and 0.31 F1 scores, correspondingly. Ablation study shows that the use of KAN increases classification accuracy from 57.34% to 67.96%. Moreover, our proposed technique is compared to several baselines, including classical ML algorithms and pretrained language models.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于KAN的BiGRU新型架构，用于多语言低资源场景下法律文档的分类与摘要任务，并在孟加拉法律文档数据集上取得了不错的效果。
AI.motivation: 多语言、低资源的法律文档处理存在语言多样性、领域语言复杂、长依赖和类别不平衡等难题。现有方法在这些场景下的表现有限，因此需要探索新型的架构和方法。
AI.method: 设计了将Kolmogorov-Arnold Network（KAN）模块集成到BiGRU模型中的架构，用于文本分类；摘要部分则采用基于注意力机制的GRU和KAN结合的方法。数据集包含孟加拉国的多语言法律文档（孟加拉文、英文及转写孟加拉文）。
AI.result: 分类模型准确率达67.96%，F1值为0.65；摘要部分ROUGE-1、ROUGE-2和ROUGE-L的F1分别为0.38、0.23和0.31。消融实验显示引入KAN后分类准确率从57.34%提升至67.96%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在多语言低资源法律文档的分类和摘要任务中优于多种传统与预训练模型，KAN模块能够显著提升模型性能。

title: SKIP: Sparse Keyframe Interpolation Paradigm for Efficient Embodied World Models
summary: Embodied world models have emerged as a promising paradigm in robotics by predicting how robot actions affect the surrounding scene. However, the rollout inference remains computationally expensive in pixel space, as long-horizon manipulation videos typically have to be generated frame by frame. This cost cannot be easily reduced by indiscriminately dropping frames, since downstream policies rely on complete preservation of sparse task-relevant events such as approach, contact, grasp, and release. To address this challenge, we propose Sparse Keyframe Interpolation Paradigm (SKIP), an event-preserving sparse-to-dense framework that avoids dense frame-by-frame generation. SKIP first identifies task-relevant keyframes by leveraging robot-aware multimodal features. It then synthesizes only these keyframes with a sparse video diffusion model. A learned gap predictor and an action-conditioned interpolator subsequently reconstruct the missing intervals according to the robot actions. On LIBERO, SKIP generates dense rollouts $4.16\times$ faster than a dense baseline while improving visual fidelity and reducing aggregate FVD by $89.0\%$. Importantly, SKIP-generated videos are effective policy-training data. Even when they fully replace real demonstrations, $π_{0.5}$ success drops only $1.3$ pp in LIBERO simulation and $6.7$ pp on the real robot, whereas fully dense frame-by-frame generation collapses by $48$ to $58$ pp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SKIP（Sparse Keyframe Interpolation Paradigm），通过只合成关键事件帧，极大提升了机器人世界模型视频生成的效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人世界模型需逐帧生成长时序操作视频，计算开销大；但关键任务事件分布稀疏，简单丢帧会损失关键信息，影响下游策略训练。
AI.method: SKIP方法通过提取任务相关的稀疏关键帧，仅用扩散模型合成这些关键帧，并借助间隔预测器及动作条件插值器重建剩余部分，实现稀疏到稠密的视频生成。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上，SKIP相比传统密集生成方法生成速度提升4.16倍，并显著提升了视频保真度，FVD指标降低89%。同时，生成视频可有效训练策略，完全替代真实演示时策略成功率仅下降1.3pp（仿真）和6.7pp（实机），远低于普通方法的48-58pp下降。
AI.conclusion: SKIP有效提升世界模型推理效率与生成质量，同时保证了机器人下游任务的策略可用性，显示出极高的实用价值。

title: HiGS: A Hierarchical Rendering Architecture for Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become the standard for real-time novel view synthesis on commodity GPUs. Its pipeline ties spatial partitioning and rasterization to one tile size, yet the two pull in opposite directions: partitioning, which bins and depth-sorts gaussians, grows cheaper with larger tiles, while rasterization gets cheaper with smaller ones. Prior acceleration work reduces the cost of individual stages but keeps both locked to that single scale, where a few dense tiles dominate frame time. We present Hierarchically Tiled Gaussian Splatting (HiGS), which gives each its own scale: partitioning runs over coarse macro-tiles, while rasterization runs over the fine render tiles within them. Rasterization work is then issued in proportion to the gaussians in each macro-tile rather than per tile, so dense regions spread across many parallel units instead of serializing through one. Across tested scenes, HiGS renders up to 15.8x faster than the original 3DGS and outperforms every other rasterizer we evaluate, while preserving exact front-to-back alpha compositing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hierarchically Tiled Gaussian Splatting (HiGS)的新方法，对现有的3D Gaussian Splatting进行分层分块加速，极大提升了实时新视点合成的渲染速度。
AI.motivation: 目前3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)已成为实时新视点合成的主流方法，但其空间分区和光栅化必须使用统一的分块尺寸，两者的计算需求方向相反，导致在高密度区域渲染效率低下。此前的加速方法均未能打破这一限制。
AI.method: HiGS方法将空间分区和光栅化分至不同的分块尺度，即用大块（macro-tile）做分区，小块（render tile）做光栅化，并按macro-tile中的高斯数量分配光栅化任务，使高密度区域的并行性大幅提升。
AI.result: 在多个测试场景下，HiGS的渲染速度最高比原始3DGS快15.8倍，并在评测中优于所有其它光栅化方法，同时确保了前后alpha混合的精确性。
AI.conclusion: HiGS有效解决了3DGS在高密度场景中的性能瓶颈，实现大幅度并行加速且准确无损，为实时新视点渲染提供了更强的技术支持。

title: RealityTest: How People Probe AI Identity and Whether Models Disclose It
summary: AI systems are increasingly deployed in conversational settings where users may be uncertain whether they are speaking with a human or an AI. Despite mounting regulatory attention to this known safety risk, existing evaluations of AI disclosure are typically English-only, based on machine-generated questions, and restricted to text. We present RealityTest to comprehensively test whether AI systems disclose their identity when asked. The benchmark is the first large-scale multimodal and multilingual evaluation, grounded in human data on how people actually encounter and question AI identity in the real-world. Alongside the benchmark, we release the underlying dataset of 3,152 identity-probing queries collected from ~750 participants across 49 countries and five languages, in text and speech scenarios. We find that only 31% of people ask about identity directly in ambiguous scenarios, and that the questions people ask are far more diverse than machine-generated queries. We test 17 text and 6 speech models, and find substantial variation in disclosure behaviour. However, a single suppression instruction reduces disclosure rates to below 30%, even in the best-performing models. Validating our investment in diverse, human-grounded evaluation data, we find that how the question is phrased and the context of the conversation matter more for disclosure than which model is being tested. Safety evaluations built on narrow or synthetic query sets risk mischaracterising how models behave in realistic deployment settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RealityTest，这是一个首个大规模多模态、多语言的AI身份披露评测基准，利用真实人类数据，测试AI在现实交流场景中的身份披露表现。结果显示，AI身份披露在实际情境下表现不佳，且依赖于问题方式而非具体模型。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统广泛用于对话场景，用户难以判断对方是真人还是AI，而这一“不披露身份”的现象已成为安全隐患，并受到监管关注。现有的评估方法局限于英语、机器生成问题和文本场景，未能反映真实使用情况，因此亟需真实、多样的数据和评测工具。
AI.method: 研究者开发了RealityTest基准，结合文本和语音，涵盖五种语言，采集来自49国约750名参与者的3,152条真实身份探查问题，覆盖这些问题在AI交流中的实际提出方式。然后，用不同的AI文本和语音模型（17个文本模型、6个语音模型）进行测试，并分析其身份披露反应和影响因素。
AI.result: 仅有约31%的人在有疑问时会直接问及对方身份，且真实问题的多样性远高于机器生成。受测AI模型在身份披露上表现差异大，但只需一个抑制身份披露的指令，披露率即可降至30%以下。问题措辞和交流上下文对披露有更大影响，模型类型影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 以人为本、覆盖多样现实情境的评测工具更能反映AI身份披露的真实表现。以往依赖狭窄或合成问题的安全评测极易误判模型实际表现在真实部署环境下的安全风险。

title: Shape Your Body: Value Gradients for Multi-Embodiment Robot Design
summary: We propose to turn generalist multi-embodiment value functions into reusable models for robot design. Instead of running a new reinforcement learning co-design loop for each robot, we first train an embodiment-aware policy and value function across many robot designs. After training, the frozen value function is used as a differentiable surrogate to optimize candidate embodiments through value gradients. We evaluate our approach across different robot design settings, from perturbed single robots to held-out robots across morphology classes, with single models trained on up to 50 robots and design spaces of over 1100 continuous embodiment parameters. Beyond optimizing complete embodiments, we show that value gradients can identify performance-limiting design and control parameters, enabling both the optimization and the analysis of new robot designs.

AI.tldr: 作者提出将通用的多形态价值函数转变为可复用的机器人设计模型，通过预训练的、能感知不同形态的策略与价值函数，实现新机器人设计优化，从而避免每次都需要用强化学习重新联合优化设计和控制。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人联设计方法经常需要在每个新设计上重新运行强化学习，计算和样本复杂度高，效率较低。作者希望通过训练通用模型来加速和简化机器人设计流程，并实现不同形态机器人间的泛化。
AI.method: 首先，作者在大量不同形态的机器人上训练一个感知形态的策略和价值函数。训练完成后，冻结价值函数，并作为连续可微的代理模型，直接通过梯度优化设计参数，实现新机器人的快速设计优化。此外，利用该价值函数的梯度还能识别限制性能的参数，有助于分析和改进设计。
AI.result: 方法在各类机器人设计设置下进行了测试，包括微扰单个机器人、跨形态类别的留出机器人等。单一模型可泛化至高达50种机器人以及包含1100多个连续形态参数的设计空间。实验表明，该方法不仅能优化完整形态，还能定位性能瓶颈参数。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法能大幅提升机器人设计的效率和泛化能力，不仅能优化新设计，还能辅助分析形态及控制参数对性能的影响，对未来自动化和智能化机器人设计有重要意义。

title: LFA: Layer Feature Attention for Run-Time Introspection of 2D Object Detectors in Automated Driving
summary: Reliable object detection is critical for automated driving, yet even state-of-the-art detectors inevitably make errors that can compromise safety. Introspection methods that predict detector failures enable safer deployment by triggering fallback mechanisms or alerting human operators. However, existing approaches rely solely on last-layer features or hand-crafted statistics, discarding valuable information from earlier layers that capture different levels of visual abstraction. We propose Layer Feature Attention (LFA), a lightweight introspection method that learns to aggregate features from multiple backbone layers through an attention mechanism. Our key insight is that detection errors manifest differently across feature hierarchies: low-level layers capture fine-grained details essential for detecting small or occluded objects, while high-level layers encode semantic information for scene understanding. LFA learns layer importance weights end-to-end, enabling both improved error prediction and interpretable analysis of which feature levels are most indicative of detector failures. Extensive experiments on KITTI and BDD100K demonstrate that LFA achieves state-of-the-art introspection performance, outperforming single-layer baselines across multiple detector architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的轻量 introspection 方法LFA，用于自动驾驶中的目标检测错误预测，通过聚合多个骨干网络层的特征显著提高了错误检测的能力。实验结果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶对目标检测器的可靠性要求极高，但现有检测器不可避免地会出现错误，影响安全。目前主要的故障预测方法只利用网络最后一层的信息，忽略了中低层的丰富特征。作者希望利用多层次特征来更全面地评估检测器潜在的失效，从而提升安全性。
AI.method: 提出Layer Feature Attention（LFA），该方法通过注意力机制自动学习聚合来自多个主干网络层的特征，并为每层特征分配不同的重要性权重。这样可同时利用低层的细粒度特征和高层的语义信息，实现端到端训练，并提升对错误的预测能力。
AI.result: 在KITTI和BDD100K两个自动驾驶数据集上的大量实验表明，LFA无论在准确性还是可解释性上都显著优于只用单一层特征的基线方法，适用于多种检测器架构，并提升了错误预测的效果。
AI.conclusion: LFA方法证明了多层特征融合对于目标检测失败的预测有更高的准确性，同时能够提供哪些特征层最相关的可解释性，为自动驾驶目标检测的安全部署提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: BOUTEF: A Multilingual Corpus for FakeNews in North Africa -- Language as a Weapon
summary: The rapid spread of fake news on social media has become a major challenge, particularly in multilingual and under-resourced contexts such as North Africa. In this paper, we introduce BOUTEF, a large-scale multilingual corpus designed to study the propagation, characteristics, and impact of fake news in Algeria and Tunisia. The corpus integrates three complementary components: fake narratives, genuine narratives, and associated user-generated comments, along with verified debunking information. It covers a wide range of languages and linguistic varieties, including MSA, Algerian and Tunisian dialects, Arabizi, French, English, and code-switched language. Building on this resource, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis combining quantitative and qualitative approaches. We examine thematic distributions, linguistic and rhetorical strategies, sentiment patterns, and social engagement dynamics. Statistical analyses reveal significant associations between thematic categories and message veracity, as well as strong correlations between user engagement and the visibility of fake content. Our findings show that fake news relies heavily on emotionally charged narratives, sensational framing, and hybrid linguistic practices that enhance virality and audience engagement. In contrast, debunking content adopts a more factual and verification-oriented style. Furthermore, a comparative analysis between Algeria and Tunisia highlights both shared dynamics and country-specific characteristics shaped by sociopolitical contexts. The results emphasize the role of informal language practices in the diffusion and reception of misinformation. By providing a rich, annotated, and publicly available dataset, this work contributes to advancing research on fake news detection, low-resource language processing, and the understanding of information disorders in complex linguistic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了BOUTEF，多语言、大规模的北非虚假新闻数据集，揭示了阿尔及利亚和突尼斯虚假新闻的传播机制及语言特征。
AI.motivation: 虚假新闻在多语言和低资源地区（如北非）传播迅速，现有研究与数据匮乏，尤其是对当地复杂语言现状与社交媒体环境的系统研究不足。
AI.method: 构建BOUTEF语料库，包括阿尔及利亚和突尼斯的虚假/真实新闻文本、用户评论、反驳文本，涵盖阿拉伯标准语、方言、阿拉伯字母拉丁化、法语、英语及混合语种。采用统计分析、定性分析等手段探究主题分布、语言策略、情绪特征与社交互动关系。
AI.result: 1. 主题与真假新闻相关性显著；2. 用户互动与虚假新闻可见度正相关；3. 虚假新闻常用情绪渲染、耸人听闻、混合语言等手法助推传播；反驳内容更注重事实；4. 两国之间有共同点也有社会背景驱动的差异。
AI.conclusion: BOUTEF为虚假新闻检测、低资源语言处理和多语言复杂环境下信息传播研究提供了宝贵资源，凸显了非正式语言在虚假信息扩散中的关键作用。

title: BEVIO: Efficient Bird's-Eye-View based Sparse-Update Visual-Inertial Odometry for Lunar Day-Night Navigation
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, Vienna
summary: Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) provides smooth, high-rate state estimates and has been widely used for robotic navigation in both terrestrial and planetary applications. However, its performance is typically dependent on the frequency of visual updates, which is a challenge for planetary rovers operating under extreme resource constraints and low frame rates. This work investigates enabling reliable VIO with very sparse visual updates for lunar rover applications, addressing both day and night-time operations where feature associations become especially difficult under self-illumination conditions. We propose a Bird's Eye View (BEV)-based image matching scheme that remains robust to larger inter-frame motions and more reliable feature matching despite significant visual appearance changes. We extensively evaluate our proposed approach, BEVIO, through high-fidelity photorealistic lunar and real-time robotic experiments conducted using a half-scale lunar rover, in a long-term day-night deployment at Plaster City, CA, USA. The results demonstrate that our method enables reliable day and nighttime self-illuminated traverses at visual update rates as low as 0.25 Hz, underscoring its suitability for navigation on power- and compute-limited lunar rovers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于鸟瞰视角（BEV）的视觉-惯性里程计（VIO）方法，可在极低视觉更新率（如0.25 Hz）下实现月球车日夜自照明情况下的高鲁棒导航，解决了视觉特征匹配困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统VIO对视觉传感器数据的依赖较高，而月球车在极端资源受限、低帧率环境（如夜间自照明）下，视觉数据稀疏，特征匹配难，需提升在极低视觉更新率条件下的导航鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于鸟瞰视角的图像匹配方法（BEVIO），能适应月表环境大幅度外观变化与帧间大运动，实现更多鲁棒的特征匹配。方法经过高保真月表仿真与真实半尺寸月球车长时间日夜实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，BEVIO方法能在视觉更新率低至0.25 Hz下，实现月球车白天与夜间自照明环境下的可靠导航，明显优于传统VIO。
AI.conclusion: BEVIO显著提升了月球车在功耗与计算力有限条件下的导航能力，尤其适合低视觉更新率、强自照明等极端应用场景，具有实际工程应用价值。

title: Score-Control for Hallucination Reduction in Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as the backbone of modern generative AI, powering advances in vision, language, audio and other modalities. Despite their success, they suffer from hallucinations, implausible samples that lie outside the support of true data distribution, which degrade reliability and trust. In this work, we first empirically confirm previously proposed hypothesis that score smoothness causes hallucinations in Image Generation diffusion models and provide a density-based perspective. We further formalize this notion by linking the hallucinations probability mass to lipschitz constant of the learned score function. Motivated by this, we introduce a Variance-Guided Score Modulation (VSM) strategy that controls the score Jacobian, in turn reducing score smoothness and better approximating the ground truth score that decreases hallucinations. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach reduces hallucinations (up to ~25%) while maintaining high fidelity and diversity, providing a principled step toward more reliable diffusion-based image generation. We also propose two benchmark datasets with extreme semantic variation for systematic hallucination evaluation. Code and Datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/bhosalems/VSM.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扩散模型在生成图像时出现的幻觉（即生成非真实分布样本）问题，提出了基于方差引导的得分调制（VSM）方法，有效减少了幻觉发生，并提供了用于系统性评价幻觉的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽然在各类生成任务表现突出，但会生成部分“不可信”或不真实的内容（幻觉），影响了模型的可靠性。作者相信幻觉的主要原因在于得分函数的平滑性过高，并希望从理论和实践两个层面解决这一核心痛点。
AI.method: 首先从实验和密度分布角度验证了得分函数平滑性导致幻觉的假说，并提出幻觉概率质量与学到的得分函数的Lipschitz常数相关。基于此，设计了一种方差引导的得分调制（VSM）策略，通过控制得分Jacobian，减缓得分的过度平滑，更好拟合真实分布，以减少幻觉现象。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，VSM方法最多可减少约25%的幻觉，同时保持生成样本的高保真度和多样性。此外，作者还设计了两个带极端语义变化的基准数据集，便于系统评估幻觉表现。
AI.conclusion: VSM方法为提升扩散模型生成的可靠性提供了理论和实证支持，有助于生成内容更加贴近真实分布，并为今后研究幻觉问题提供了新的评测基准和技术工具。

title: DeSQ: Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation
summary: Dominant approaches to Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) fall into two categories. First is the generation of a formal query that suffers from brittleness and limited explainability, and the second is direct answer retrieval through KB exploration that is computationally costly and prone to hallucination. To combine the strengths of both paradigms while mitigating their respective weaknesses, we introduce DeSQ (Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation), a KB-agnostic framework that operates in three stages. First, it decomposes complex questions into Atomic Constraints (ACs) that mirror the relational structure of the underlying KB. Second, it generates a two-part structured output: (a) Mapping of each AC to its corresponding SPARQL Fragment, using standardized variable and URIs placeholders, and (b) URIs Grounding block describing each placeholder. Third, it assembles these fragments into a complete SPARQL query. DeSQ surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on four out of five major benchmarks and demonstrates superior robustness to lexical variation. Beyond performance gains, our framework greatly simplifies evaluation by eliminating the need for a live KB endpoint, and its structured output enables fine-grained error analysis, allowing more targeted interventions for improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的知识库问答（KBQA）方法DeSQ，能够有效生成可解释、鲁棒性强的SPARQL查询，并显著超越现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 当前KBQA方法主要有两类：一类将自然语言转为结构化查询，存在可解释性弱和脆弱性高的问题；另一类通过直接在知识库探索获取答案，但计算量大且易出现臆造答案，因此亟需结合两方面优势的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种与知识库无关的三阶段框架DeSQ：1）将复杂提问分解为原子约束（AC）；2）为每个AC生成标准化SPARQL片段及相应URI占位符的映射和绑定；3）将这些片段拼装为完整的SPARQL查询，实现结构化输出和解释。
AI.result: DeSQ方法在五大主流基准数据集中的四个上超过现有最优方法，在处理词汇变化时具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DeSQ不仅提升了问答准确率，还简化了实验评估和错误分析流程，有助于后续改进和部署，显示出较强的实用性和可推广性。

title: Infeasible optimization problems and the hierarchical augmented Lagrangian method in imitation learning
summary: Imitation learning (IL) is an effective approach to train complex robotics policies. Recent works have introduced hard constraints into imitation-learning optimization problems to ensure safety, stability, and robustness of the learned policy. However, we argue that these constraints are sometimes infeasible, which can lead to unstable or difficult training dynamics. We study a simple remedy for such situations based on recent theoretical results on the augmented Lagrangian method in infeasible settings. We show that our approach drives the learned policy toward the solution of a closest-feasible constrained IL problem with desirable properties. The method is illustrated on a toy driving example with a total-acceleration constraint and pedestrian-safety constraints, a setting in which infeasibility can naturally arise while still allowing a safe learned policy.

AI.tldr: 本文针对仿射学习（IL）中的硬约束不可行问题，提出利用增强拉格朗日方法应对，提升训练的稳定性与可行性。
AI.motivation: 当前将安全等硬约束引入IL优化虽保证策略性质，但当约束无法满足时会导致训练不稳定或难以收敛。现有方法对约束不可行情形处理不足，存在实际应用局限。
AI.method: 基于增强拉格朗日（augmented Lagrangian）方法最近的理论进展，针对不可行约束情境，调整优化目标，将学习策略引导至最接近可行方案。通过玩具驾驶例（含总加速度与行人安全约束）进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验证明，提出的方法可令学习策略逼近最近的可行解，并保持安全性，即使某些约束本身不可行。训练过程中表现出比传统带硬约束方法更高的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 增强拉格朗日方法能有效应对IL中约束不可行问题，在确保策略安全、鲁棒的同时，提升训练可行性和稳定性。该方法适用于实际中存在冲突或不可行多约束的仿射学习任务。

title: Non-Learning Low-Light Stereo Vision
comment: Accepted to ICIP 2026. Code and data available at https://github.com/guo-research-group/nonlearning-lowlight-stereo
summary: We present a non-learning stereo framework for disparity estimation from severely noisy images. Using the Field of Junctions (FoJ), it retains coarse visual features stable under severe noise for cost volume construction while discarding fine textures inseparable from photon noise. The resulting structural information guides boundary-aware Semi-Global Matching (SGM) that dynamically adapts smoothness penalties to preserve true disparity discontinuities. The output is a sparse disparity map more accurate than those of recent stereo algorithms over unmasked pixels on widely-used benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需学习的双目立体视觉算法，结合了Field of Junctions（FoJ）和边界感知的SGM，实现了在高噪声条件下对视差的高精度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的双目立体视觉算法在遇到严重噪声图像时性能大幅下降，因此需要开发一种能在高噪声环境下依然鲁棒的立体匹配方法。
AI.method: 该方法利用FoJ保留在高噪声环境下依然能稳定提取的粗视觉结构特征，并以此构建代价体。同时，提出边界感知的半全局匹配（SGM），通过动态调整平滑惩罚来更好地保留真实视差的边界。最终输出的是稀疏但精度更高的视差图。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的基准数据集上，与最近的立体算法相比，本文方法在未被遮挡像素上的统计精度更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在严重高噪声图像下实现了更准确的视差估计，证明了FoJ结合边界感知SGM在实际低质量环境下的有效性。

title: Effects of Varying LLM Access on Essay Writing Behavior
summary: Investigating the degree to which large language models (LLMs) affect teaching and learning in universities can help identify strategies for integrating LLMs in a way that supports, rather than undermines, student learning outcomes. This study examined how varying levels of LLM assistance affect writing performance, engagement, and perceived authorship. We report a pilot study in which 24 college students were randomly assigned to write a short essay with no LLM access, limited access (<=3 prompts, responses capped at 100 words), or unlimited access. Overall essay quality was statistically indistinguishable across groups. Yet writing behavior and perceived authorship diverged sharply: students with limited access reported higher ownership (62.5% would submit the essay as independent work, vs. 25% in the unlimited group), stronger organizational gains, and more strategic, revision-focused prompting. The unlimited group spent more time writing, produced essays more similar to LLM output, and reported reduced creative expression. Our findings suggest that constraining, rather than banning, LLM access may preserve authorship confidence while retaining the scaffolding benefits of AI assistance.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验考察了大学生在不同大型语言模型（LLM）辅助下写作表现、参与感及作者归属感的变化。结果显示，无限制和有限LLM辅助写作的学生生成的文章质量无显著差异，但有限辅助组感到更多的作品归属感与创造性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在高校教育中的普及，研究其对教学和学生学习成果的影响，探索合理整合LLM的方法，成为教育领域的热门议题。作者希望找到既能利用LLM优势、又不损害学生学习主动性的应用策略。
AI.method: 实验招募了24名大学生，随机分配为无LLM、有限LLM（最多3轮、不超过100词/轮）、无限LLM三组，完成一篇短文写作，比较他们的写作表现、行为和作品归属感。
AI.result: 三组学生的整体文章质量无统计学显著差异。有限LLM组较无限组表现出更高的作者归属感、更强的文章结构进步和更具策略性的提示行为。无限组写作时间更长、文本更接近LLM风格、创造性表现下降。
AI.conclusion: 相比于全面禁止，限制性地开放LLM使用能在保留AI辅助优势的同时，更好地维护学生的作者归属感和创造性。

title: Beyond Pure Sampling: Hybrid Optimization Mechanisms for Non-Convex Model Predictive Control
summary:
This paper investigates the optimization mechanisms of non-convex Model Predictive Control (MPC) using the Maximum Entropy Differential Dynamic Programming (ME-DDP) framework. Navigating non-convex cost landscapes induced by nonlinear dynamics, multiple obstacles, etc. remains a fundamental challenge in robotics, where gradient-based methods frequently converge to suboptimal local minima. We demonstrate a dual-step optimization mechanism designed to overcome these traps. (1) an initial phase of using DDP to exploit the gradient of the cost landscape, followed by (2) disruption of the optimization via sampling from policies characterized by the inverse Hessian of the action-value function. We provide a rigorous analysis of this sampling mechanism of three ME-DDP variants: Unimodal Gaussian ME-DDP, Multimodal Gaussian ME-DDP, and Stein Variational DDP. Furthermore, with navigation tasks of four robotic systems under cluttered environments, we conduct extensive benchmarking of three variants of the ME-DDP, against deterministic DDP, and one of the most successful sampling-based schemes, Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control with three policy parameterizations and update laws that correspond to those of ME-DDPs.
  The results show that in low-dimensional systems where the cost landscapes are relatively simple and local information is sufficiently representative, our framework consistently outperforms MPPIs. In high-dimensional systems, MPPI can occasionally discover aggressive maneuvers that enable it to steer the systems faster than DDP-based methods, whereas our method maintains a higher, more stable success rate.
  Finally, we validate the practical efficacy of the framework through hardware experiments with a quadrotor navigating a dense, non-convex obstacle field, confirming the robustness of the proposed framework for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了基于最大熵微分动态规划（ME-DDP）框架的非凸模型预测控制优化方法，并验证在多种机器人导航任务中的有效性。论文详细分析和比较了三种ME-DDP变体与常用采样和优化方法的性能，展示了新方法在复杂环境下的优越性和稳定性，并在实际机器人中进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 在机器人导航和控制中，非线性动力学和多障碍物等因素导致优化问题成本景观呈现高度非凸，常规梯度法容易陷入次优极值，难以获得全局优解。因此，开发能跳出局部极值、适应复杂非凸环境的优化算法成为重要需求。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种双阶段优化机制：(1) 首先利用微分动态规划（DDP）主导梯度下的优化，(2) 然后通过基于动作价值函数逆Hessian的分布进行采样扰动优化，突破局部极值陷阱。分析了三种ME-DDP变体（单峰高斯、多峰高斯、Stein变分DDP），并在四种复杂机器人导航任务中，与确定性DDP和MPPI等方法进行对比测试。
AI.result: 在低维度任务（成本景观简单）中，该框架持续优于MPPI。在高维度任务中，MPPI偶尔能找到更激进的策略加速收敛，但新方法具有更高、更稳定的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 所提ME-DDP框架能有效克服非凸优化陷阱，实现更稳健的模型预测控制，在实际硬件（四旋翼）测试中同样表现出优异的鲁棒性，适用于复杂真实场景下的机器人控制。

title: SUPREME: A Multi-GPU Framework for Reproducible Image Unlearning Method Evaluation
summary: Machine unlearning removes the influence of specific training data from a trained model without retraining it from scratch. Evaluating an unlearning method requires repeating training, unlearning, and evaluation across multiple seeds, which is computationally expensive. To our knowledge, existing image classification unlearning frameworks run on a single GPU, which limits how many seeds can be evaluated in reasonable time. We introduce SUPREME, an open-source framework that distributes these stages across multiple GPUs. SUPREME makes three contributions: a registry-based design for adding new methods, metrics, models, and scenarios; a multi-GPU architecture supporting multiple accelerators and precision modes; and a demonstration on Pins Face Recognition using ResNet18 and ViT under full-class and random-sample unlearning across ten seeds. The framework is available at https://github.com/pedroandreou/supreme-unlearning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个开源多GPU分布式支持的机器遗忘评测框架SUPREME，提高了评测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的遗忘方法评测框架只能在单GPU上运行，导致多seed评测非常耗时，缺乏高效工具。
AI.method: 开发了SUPREME框架，采用注册式设计支持自定义方法、指标和模型，并实现多GPU和多精度分布式加速，实现评测流程的并行化。
AI.result: 在Pins Face Recognition数据集上用ResNet18和ViT进行全类别和随机样本遗忘评测，支持十个不同种子，展示了系统的高效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: SUPREME显著优化了遗忘方法的评测效率和灵活性，为后续机器遗忘研究提供了强大工具。

title: Parameter Alignment Mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting in Multilingual Expert Language Models
summary: While continual pretraining~(CPT) is a practical way to extend large language models to new languages, naïve finetuning on targeted data erodes existing capabilities through catastrophic forgetting. Organizing training around language families reduces cross-language interference but cannot alone prevent forgetting of the general knowledge needed for downstream tasks. We link this forgetting to parameter drift in multilingual CPT and present a suite of five layer-aware parameter alignment strategies: hard layer freezing, soft regularization, post-hoc weight reversion, and model merging. We systematically compare our alignment strategies against two unregularized CPT baselines on benchmarks spanning 32 training languages from five language families, plus held-out languages, across four evaluation axes: perplexity, reading comprehension, physical reasoning, and translation. Parameter alignment substantially reduces forgetting at minimal cost to language acquisition: layer freezing and regularization best preserve comprehension, whereas post-hoc reversion yields the strongest translation gains. Together, these results map the acquisition--forgetting frontier for family-expert CPT and offer practical deployment guidelines pairing each strategy to the tasks it best serves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并系统评估了多语言持续预训练（CPT）中五种基于层的参数对齐策略，以缓解灾难性遗忘并提升新语言能力。
AI.motivation: 用CPT扩展大型语言模型到新语言时，简单微调会导致已有能力的遗忘，尤其是在多语言环境下，如何在学习新语言的同时保留旧知识成为关键。
AI.method: 作者提出五种层感知参数对齐方法：层冻结、软正则化、事后权重回退、模型融合等，并在32种语言、五个语系上进行系统比较，覆盖感知、推理、翻译等任务。
AI.result: 参数对齐方法在几乎不损失新语言学习能力的前提下，显著减少了遗忘。层冻结和正则化优于保持阅读理解，事后回退对翻译效果最好。
AI.conclusion: 参数对齐策略为多语言CPT实现了更好遗忘与学习平衡，并为实际部署提供了针对不同任务的最佳策略指引。

title: STEM: Semantic Target Search and Exploration using MAVs in Cluttered Environments
comment: Accepted to Autonomous Robots Journal. Nikhil Sethi and Max Lodel contributed equally
summary: Autonomous target search is crucial for deploying Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) in emergency response and rescue missions. Existing approaches either focus on 2D semantic navigation in structured environments -- which is less effective in complex 3D settings, or on robotic exploration in cluttered spaces -- which often lacks the semantic reasoning needed for efficient target search. This paper overcomes these limitations by proposing a novel framework that utilizes a semantically-guided viewpoint planner to minimize target search and exploration time in unstructured 3D environments using an MAV. Specifically, we develop a combinatorial planner that generates efficient semantic exploration plans by prioritizing viewpoints that likely lead to the target. To guide the planner towards the target, an active perception pipeline is developed that propagates semantic priorities of observed objects into neighboring frontier voxels for computing semantic information gains of frontier viewpoints. In addition, we demonstrate how LLM-based similarity scores can be leveraged as semantic priority input to our pipeline. Evaluations in two distinct simulation environments show that the proposed method consistently outperforms baselines by quickly finding the target while maintaining reasonable exploration times. Real-world experiments with an MAV further demonstrate the method's ability to handle practical constraints like limited battery life, small sensor range, and semantic uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于语义引导的视点规划框架，实现微型无人机（MAV）在非结构化三维环境中的高效自主目标搜索，并在模拟和真实世界中验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要针对结构化环境中的二维导航或杂乱三维空间的纯探索，缺乏结合语义推理以高效搜索目标的方法。而在紧急响应和救援等应用中，高效、智能的目标搜索尤为关键。
AI.method: 提出了一个组合式视点规划器，通过优先考虑可能接近目标的语义视点，有效生成三维探索路径。引入主动感知流程，传递已观察到物体的语义优先级至周围未知区域，用以计算各探索点的语义信息增益。此外，通过引入基于LLM的大模型相似性分数，进一步优化语义优先级输入。
AI.result: 在两个不同的仿真环境中，新方法能够更快找到目标且保持合理的探索时间，优于对比基线。在实际MAV平台验证中，还能处理电池续航、传感器范围受限和语义不确定性等实际问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提基于语义引导的组合式视点规划方法有效提升了微型无人机在复杂三维环境下的自主目标搜索效率，为无人机在应急响应和救援等领域的实用化提供了有力支持。

title: αDepth: Learning Single-Pass Soft Boundary Decomposition for Stereo Conversion
summary: Accurately modeling soft boundaries, e.g., hair and defocus blur, is a fundamental challenge in stereo conversion due to the ambiguous blending of foreground and background. Existing depth models primarily predict single-layer depth, leading to ambiguity in depth correspondence at soft boundaries. While matting techniques can capture opacity for layered modeling, they often struggle in complex scenes with multiple targets and usually require user intervention. This paper introduces αDepth, a layered representation that decomposes soft boundaries for high-fidelity stereo conversion. Specifically, we first resolve mixed color and depth ambiguity by estimating layered color and depth values at soft boundaries. Considering complex multi-target scenes, we design a Circular Alpha Representation (CAR) that shifts the paradigm from global target extraction to local boundary decomposition. Unlike prior matting methods restricted to a single foreground/background, CAR enables efficient scene-level inference without manual guidance. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that αDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance in stereo conversion, eliminating background bleeding and structural distortions at soft boundaries.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出αDepth方法，通过分层表示精确建模软边界，实现高保真立体转换，显著提升复杂场景中的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型对软边界（如头发、虚化）的建模能力有限，导致前后景混淆、深度对应不明确，而传统抠图法在多目标复杂场景下表现欠佳且需手动操作。
AI.method: 作者提出αDepth，通过在软边界处估计分层的颜色和深度，解决混合色彩与深度的歧义。引入Circular Alpha Representation（CAR），实现从全局目标提取转向局部边界分解，无需人工干预，适用于多目标复杂场景。
AI.result: αDepth在大量立体转换实验中表现优异，有效消除背景溢出和结构畸变，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: αDepth提供了无监督、高保真的软边界分层建模方案，能在复杂场景下实现优质的立体转换，为相关领域提供了重要参考。

title: Model-Based Quality Assessment for Massively Multilingual Parallel Data
summary: Large-scale multilingual bitext often contains two distinct problems: non-parallel sentence pairs and low-quality translations. We decompose model-based assessment for such data into two independent components: parallelism assessment with multilingual embeddings and reference-free quality estimation (QE). For parallelism, we benchmark four embedding models on FLORES-200 and BOUQuET retrieval tasks, covering 6,654 source--target directions in our target language-pair inventory. For QE, we evaluate nine reference-free evaluators on professional FLORES-200 translations across 41,412 ordered source--target directions. Results show that no model is universally reliable across translation directions. Naive QE ensembles dilute strong model signals, while documented target-language coverage is strongly associated with higher QE scores. Overall, these findings suggest that multilingual parallel-data assessment is best approached as a direction-aware routing and calibration problem, where no single universal metric is expected to suffice across all languages.

AI.tldr: 本文对大规模多语种双语文本的评估方法进行了分解与分析，发现现有模型无法在所有语言对上通用，并提出要以方向感知和校准为基础的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模多语种双语语料常存在非平行句对和翻译质量低等问题，现有的评估方法无法可靠地处理所有语言对。
AI.method: 作者将模型评估分为两部分：一是基于多语种嵌入进行平行度评估（对4个嵌入模型在FLORES-200和BOUQuET检索任务上进行基准测试，涵盖6,654个语言对）；二是无参考质量评估（测试9个评估器在FLORES-200上的表现，覆盖41,412个语言方向）。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，没有任何一种模型能在所有语言对的方向上都表现可靠。简单的模型集成会削弱强势模型的信号，而目标语言的覆盖程度和评估分数密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 多语种双语数据的评估应视为一个方向感知的路由与校准问题，无法仅用单一通用指标解决所有语言。

title: SafeVLA-Bench: A Benchmark for the Success-Safety Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) benchmarks measure whether a policy completes a requested manipulation task, but binary success can hide safety-relevant trajectory behavior: reaching the goal while applying excessive contact, disturbing bystander objects, destabilizing the held object, or entering robot self-contact. We present SafeVLA-Bench, a post-hoc safety-evaluation framework for existing simulator-based VLA benchmarks. It formalizes task-aware safety requirements as Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications and reports native success with two unsafe-success metrics: Succ-But-Unsafe (SBU), the fraction of rollouts that both succeed and violate safety, and Violation Severity Index (VSI), a bounded worst-violation depth score. We instantiate SafeVLA-Bench on LIBERO and RoboCasa-365, evaluating nine policy-benchmark entries across tabletop and kitchen manipulation tasks. High task success does not imply safe execution: high-SR tabletop baselines still leave 13 to 15 percent unsafe-episode rates,and 36 to 56 percent of successful RoboCasa-365 rollouts violate at least one active safety clause. Project page: https://safevla.org.

AI.tldr: SafeVLA-Bench是一个评估机器人视觉-语言-动作（VLA）任务安全性的后验框架，引入了新的安全评估指标，揭示了任务成功背后隐藏的安全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA基准测试只关注任务是否完成，但任务完成并不代表过程安全，可能隐藏如过度接触、扰动其他物体等风险。缺乏针对这些安全问题的通用评估方法，尤其在机器人操控任务中，安全漏洞可能导致严重后果。
AI.method: SafeVLA-Bench结合信号时序逻辑（STL），将安全需求形式化，并针对现有仿真VLA基准进行后验安全评估，引入SBU（成功但不安全率）和VSI（违规严重指数）两大评估指标，对任务成功同时暴露出安全隐患的情况进行量化。
AI.result: 研究团队在LIBERO和RoboCasa-365两个主流数据集上，针对桌面及厨房机械手操控任务评估了九类策略。结果显示：即使高任务成功率（SR）的基线方法，仍有13%~15%的不安全率；RoboCasa-365中，成功的轨迹中36%~56%违反至少一条活跃安全规则。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLA任务中的高任务成功率可能掩盖实际执行过程中的安全问题，安全性评估不可或缺。SafeVLA-Bench可揭示“任务成功但不安全”现象，为后续提升机器人安全操作提供了可量化参考。

title: Zamba2-VL Technical Report
summary: We present Zamba2-VL, a suite of vision-language models built on Zamba2, a hybrid language-model architecture combining Mamba2 state-space layers with a small number of shared transformer blocks. Across a broad range of image understanding, reasoning, OCR, grounding, and counting benchmarks, Zamba2-VL is competitive with leading Transformer-based open-weight VLMs of comparable scale, including the Molmo2, Qwen3-VL, and InternVL3.5 families, and substantially outperforms prior SSM-based and hybrid VLMs such as VL-Mamba, Cobra, and mmMamba. Inheriting the near-linear prefill compute and small, near-constant recurrent state of its Zamba2 backbone, Zamba2-VL delivers roughly an order of magnitude lower time-to-first-token (TTFT) than these Transformer baselines at matched parameter scale, with the efficiency gap most pronounced at the smaller 1.2B and 2.7B scales most relevant to on-device and edge deployment. We release three models -- 1.2B, 2.7B, and 7B -- together with inference code at https://huggingface.co/collections/Zyphra/zamba2-vl.

AI.tldr: Zamba2-VL是一组基于Zamba2架构的视觉-语言模型，在效率与性能方面优于同类模型，尤其适合边缘和端侧部署。
AI.motivation: 当前主流视觉-语言模型多基于Transformer，虽性能强但推理时延较高，限制了其在实时和端侧应用中的使用。因此，亟需兼具高性能与低延迟的新型模型。
AI.method: Zamba2-VL采用Mamba2状态空间层与少量共享Transformer模块混合的架构，结合Zamba2主干网络，实现了高效推理和参数规模下的优秀性能。作者提供了1.2B、2.7B和7B参数规模的模型及推理代码。
AI.result: 在图像理解、推理、OCR、指代和计数任务上，Zamba2-VL在同等规模下性能与主流开源Transformer VLM竞争，显著超过SSM或混合型VLM。同时，其首Token生成延迟较同等规模Transformer低一个量级。
AI.conclusion: Zamba2-VL在保持性能优势的同时，大幅提升推理效率，尤其适合资源受限环境部署，拓宽了VLM实际应用前景。

title: Uncovering Temporal Framing in the News
summary: Temporal language does more than place events on a timeline. In news discourse, references to the past, present, and future can function as rhetorical devices that shape interpretation and persuasion. Here, we study temporal framing, defined as the persuasive use of time-related language to structure meaning rather than to report chronology. We propose a taxonomy of eight temporal frames grounded in prior work on temporality and framing, and we realize it through expert annotation of a multilingual news corpus. The resulting dataset includes 458 English and German news articles, with over 2K temporally framed sentences and approximately 3K temporal framing annotations identified from a corpus of more than 20K sentences. We analyze frame prevalence, co-occurrence patterns, and lexical cues, and evaluate temporal framing detection using supervised fine-tuning and zero-shot classification. Our experiments show that temporal framing is learnable at the sentence level, with supervised models substantially outperforming zero-shot approaches. We publicly release the corpus to support future research on temporal framing: https://mbzuai-nlp.github.io/temporal-framing/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实现了一个时间框架分类体系，通过专家标注英文和德文新闻语料库，分析了时态修辞在新闻报道中的作用，并公开了相关数据集。实验表明监督模型在识别时间框架任务上优于零样本方法。
AI.motivation: 虽然新闻中的时间语言不仅仅是描述事件次序，现有研究却很少关注其修辞和影响力功能。为此，作者希望系统地研究时间性语言如何作为修辞手段影响理解和说服力。
AI.method: 作者提出了八种时间框架分类法，并邀请专家对英文和德文新闻语料库进行逐句标注，获得了丰富的时间框架标记数据。随后分析了框架分布、共现模式及词汇线索，并运用有监督微调和零样本分类模型对框架识别能力进行了评估对比。
AI.result: 统计发现，不同时间框架在新闻中广泛共存，并且有明显的词汇指示特征。实验显示，经过有监督训练的模型，能够比零样本分类方法更好地识别句子中的时间框架。
AI.conclusion: 时间框架不仅广泛存在于新闻话语中且具备可学习性，基于有监督方法的模型识别准确性最高。该数据和分类体系为未来时间修辞研究提供了基础与资源。

title: Coarse-to-Fine Compositional Diffusion for Long-Horizon Planning
summary: Diffusion models provide strong priors for generating structured data, but many tasks require outputs beyond the scale on which these models are typically trained. Compositional generation addresses this by composing overlapping local plans from a pretrained short-horizon prior into a long-horizon output. However, standard composition primarily enforces agreement between neighboring local plans, yielding local consistency without directly specifying the global structure of the full composition. As a result, locally compatible plans may still form an implausible route, task sequence, or temporal evolution. Existing methods improve global coherence by repeatedly propagating local consistency signals or by adding inference-time optimization, but these procedures become expensive as the number or dimensionality of local plans increases. We propose Coarse-to-Fine Compositional Diffusion (CoFi), an inference-time sampler that separates global structure formation from local detail refinement. CoFi first aligns local denoised estimates around a shared coarse structure, producing a global scaffold that captures the long-range task-level arrangement. It then diffuses this scaffold to an intermediate noise level and denoises it with the same pretrained local prior, restoring local fine structure while preserving the scaffold-induced global coherence. Across long-horizon robotic planning, panoramic image generation, and long video generation, CoFi not only improves both global coherence and local sample quality over prior compositional baselines, but also requires 2-8x fewer denoiser evaluations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新方法Coarse-to-Fine Compositional Diffusion (CoFi)，专为改善扩散模型在长尺度结构化数据生成中的全局一致性和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的扩散模型擅长生成结构化数据，但面对长尺度（如长序列、长视频、全景图等）任务时，全局结构难以保证一致性，且提升全局一致性的现有方法计算开销大。
AI.method: 提出CoFi，将全局结构的生成与局部细节还原分开处理：首先将局部规划对齐到一个共享的粗略结构，从而建立全局支架；随后引入一定噪声，再用原预训练的局部先验去噪还原细节，最终兼顾全局与局部的一致性。
AI.result: 在长时域机器人规划、全景图像生成、长视频生成等任务上，CoFi在提升全局一致性与局部质量的同时，推理时的去噪计算次数比以往基线方法少2-8倍。
AI.conclusion: CoFi实现了更高效、更有全局连贯性的结构化数据生成，为长尺度扩散模型相关任务提供了优选方案。

title: Rethinking Amortized Neural Representations for High-Resolution Terrain Elevation Data
summary: Implicit neural representations (INRs) model a signal as a continuous coordinate-to-value function. For terrain elevation data, this supports analytic derivatives, arbitrary-resolution decoding, and a smooth surface model of the underlying heightfield. However, fitting and storing a separate INR for every tile does not scale to large terrain datasets. Amortized neural representations reduce this cost with a shared network: a new tile is mapped to a compact per-tile payload, and a shared decoder reconstructs the heightfield from it. Most such methods are hypernetworks that predict the payload in a single forward pass, while others recover it through a short per-tile optimization. These methods were developed primarily for natural images, and their suitability for terrain heightfields remains unclear. We introduce a controlled benchmark on a 1 m/pixel terrain dataset and evaluate three representative methods under a unified protocol. Observing a clear cross-domain gap, we propose HUVR+SIREN, a hypernetwork that adapts the strongest benchmarked method (HUVR) by replacing its coordinate decoder with a smooth, analytically differentiable one. It attains the best height and derivative fidelity on the benchmark with no additional per-tile storage and lower decode cost, and tolerates aggressive post-training quantization with negligible quality loss, giving a compact terrain neural format. Ablations and diagnostics further identify which design choices transfer to terrain and show that the per-tile bottleneck is already near its useful limit, leaving the remaining gap in the shared hypernetwork's architectural design.

AI.tldr: 本文针对地形高程数据，提出改进的神经表示方法，既解决了大规模数据存储和解码效率问题，又提升了精度，并适合后续模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 虽然隐式神经表示（INR）在地形数据建模中优势明显，但每个地块单独训练和存储INR方法扩展性差，且主流的神经解码器方法多针对自然图像，未验证能否适用于地形高程数据。
AI.method: 作者提出在统一协议下，针对1m/pixel地形数据集，系统性评测了三类主流amortized神经表示方法，并提出HUVR+SIREN，用平滑、可微分的SIREN坐标解码替代HUVR原方案，实现更优地形重建。
AI.result: HUVR+SIREN在无额外存储且解码耗时更低的条件下，在地形高度及其导数精度上表现最佳；同时支持极致的后量化压缩，质量损失甚微。消融实验显示相关设计的迁移性，揭示网络结构已到性能瓶颈，进一步提升需改进超网络架构。
AI.conclusion: 提出的HUVR+SIREN方案显著改善了地形神经表示方法的准确性、压缩性和效率，是地形高程场景下更适用的紧凑神经格式。

title: Bridging Reasoning Trajectories in On-Policy Distillation via Near-Future Guidance
summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves large language model reasoning by training a student model on trajectories sampled from its own policy under teacher supervision. Although OPD operates on trajectories, its learning signal remains token-level: it identifies deviations through high-loss tokens and repairs them through local reverse-KL correction. We show that this "trajectory-sampled but token-learned" mechanism cannot reliably bridge student trajectories toward teacher trajectories. About 30% of high-loss tokens fall into the low-divergence regime, indicating that many are surface-form mismatches rather than real reasoning forks. Moreover, even truly divergent tokens are difficult to repair with isolated token-level supervision, since reasoning failures often unfold as short-horizon distributional drift. We propose Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD), which uses near-future trajectory information to identify real divergent states and distribute guidance across multiple future tokens. Experiments show that suppressing non-divergent high-loss tokens improves standard OPD from 47.8% to 48.2% average accuracy, while TOPD further improves performance to 52.2%, with gains on AIME24 from 60.0% to 63.3% and AIME25 from 46.7% to 53.3%.

AI.tldr: 本文分析并改进了基于轨迹的知识蒸馏方法OPD，并提出了一种新的TOPD方法，显著提升了大语言模型在推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的OPD方法虽然基于轨迹采样，但学习信号仍然停留在token粒度，难以有效纠正学生模型与教师模型的推理差异，导致部分高loss token并不代表真正的推理错误。
AI.method: 作者提出Trajectory-aware OPD（TOPD），利用未来轨迹的信息来识别真正偏离的状态，并将指导分布在多个未来token上，抑制非偏离高loss token的影响。
AI.result: 实验证明，抑制非偏离高loss token可使OPD平均精度提升0.4%，而采用TOPD后性能进一步提升至52.2%，AIME24和AIME25基准集上分别提升至63.3%和53.3%。
AI.conclusion: TOPD能够更有效地识别和纠正推理轨迹中的真实分歧，超越了传统token级别的局部修正，显著提升了推理准确率。

title: From Cues to Horizons: Dynamic Risk Horizon Profiling for Trajectory Prediction
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS)
summary: Accurate and reliable vehicle trajectory prediction is essential for safe autonomous driving. Recent studies have incorporated safety risk into trajectory prediction to quantify dangers posed by surrounding agents. However, most risk-aware approaches use past risk information as a secondary signal to help guide decisions, overlooking its future evolution and uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a risk horizon profiling (RHP) module that incorporates a continuous, learnable potential field model for risk-aware trajectory prediction. The RHP module calculates the spatial-temporal proximity of surrounding objects to profile risk distributions across future horizons, which supports better trajectory prediction by adaptively identifying what human drivers perceive as critical moments. We evaluate our method on two datasets from different driving settings, highD for highway corridors and SHRP2 for urban streets, which cover diverse risk scenarios including safe, near-crash, and crash events. Compared to the baseline methods, our framework achieves a 25.0\% reduction in 5s RMSE on the highD dataset and a 29.1\% reduction in 5s minFDE on SHRP2. These results indicate strong performance for both short and long horizon prediction and robust generalization across highway and urban scenarios. The proposed method enables more realistic AV path planning and strategic selection, thereby supporting safer autonomous driving and more advanced driver-assistance systems. The source code for this work is available at: https://github.com/bilab-nyu/RHP

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型风险识别模块RHP，通过考虑风险的未来演变，提升自动驾驶中轨迹预测的准确性和安全性，在高速和城市等多种道路场景下均显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前轨迹预测多数将风险信息作为补充信号，只利用历史风险，忽视了风险未来的不确定演变，影响实际安全性和预测准确率。
AI.method: 提出了风险视野剖面（RHP）模块，基于可学习的连续势场计算模型，评估周围物体在时空上的接近程度，并对未来各时刻的风险分布进行建模，从而动态识别驾驶关键时刻，提升轨迹预测效果。
AI.result: 在高速公路（highD）和城市道路（SHRP2）两大数据集上，RHP方法相较基线方法，5秒RMSE下降25.0%，5秒minFDE下降29.1%。
AI.conclusion: RHP模块能够出色地提升含风险感知的轨迹预测能力，方法兼具现实性和泛化能力，有助于更高阶的自动驾驶与辅助系统的安全决策和路径规划。

title: 4D Radar Meets LiDAR and Camera: Cooperative Perception under Adverse Weather
summary: Cooperative perception is important for autonomous driving but remains fragile when cameras and LiDAR degrade in adverse weather. We address this challenge by integrating 4D imaging radar as a weather-robust modality into collaborative perception and introducing a Doppler-guided spatial attention mechanism for multi-agent fusion. Our approach extends two representative backbones: a radar-camera pipeline where radar substitutes LiDAR, and a LiDAR-radar pipeline where radar complements LiDAR. To support evaluation, we release radar-augmented benchmarks, OPV2V-R and Adver-City-R, with physics-based LiDAR degradation. Experiments show strong robustness gains in fog and rain, including substantial improvements when radar replaces degraded LiDAR. Additional validation on MAN TruckScenes demonstrates transfer beyond simulation. Overall, our results highlight 4D imaging radar as a robust modality for all-weather collaborative perception. Dataset and code are available at: https://url.fzi.de/SlimComm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用4D成像雷达增强协同感知系统，在恶劣天气下可以有效替代或补充激光雷达，提升自动驾驶感知的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶协同感知在恶劣天气下，即摄像头和激光雷达性能衰减时鲁棒性较差，因此需要引入受天气影响较小的新传感器。
AI.method: 整合4D成像雷达作为新传感器，引入基于多普勒引导的空间注意力机制实现多车协同感知。将雷达用于替代或补充激光雷达，拓展并改进两种主流的协同感知网络结构。同时发布带物理激光雷达退化的雷达增强基准数据集。
AI.result: 实验证明，在雾天和雨天环境下，系统鲁棒性显著提升，尤其在激光雷达失效时用雷达替代，感知性能大幅提高。在真实卡车场景中也获得良好迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: 4D成像雷达可作为全天气条件下鲁棒的协同感知新模态，极大提升自动驾驶系统的恶劣环境适应能力。

title: Which Institutional Frameworks Do Chatbots Assume? Auditing Jurisdictional Defaults in Multilingual LLMs
summary: LLMs increasingly answer questions about taxes, labor protections, healthcare, education, pensions, and administrative procedures, where usefulness often depends on the applicable jurisdiction. Multilingual users may write in their most comfortable language rather than one associated with the country or region whose rules apply. We ask whether deployed LLMs use input language as a default jurisdictional signal when prompts omit any country or region. Prior multilingual audits show that prompt language can shift cultural, political, or normative outputs; we examine which legal-administrative framework models supply when jurisdiction is underspecified. We evaluate seven LLMs developed in the United States or China on 60 underspecified legal-administrative prompts in English and Mandarin Chinese under three system-prompt conditions, yielding 2,520 manually annotated responses. Across models and conditions, Chinese input more often produces China-specific answers, while English input more often produces U.S.-specific, comparative, or generic answers. Prompts requiring a single answer further increase jurisdiction selection: pooled across models, 74.5% of English-input responses adopt a U.S. framework, while 53.3% of Chinese-input responses adopt a China framework. This directional pattern appears in all seven models. We describe this deployment-level pattern as institutional-framework misselection risk: a fluent answer may rely on a legal-administrative context the user did not intend, especially when their preferred language differs from the relevant jurisdiction. LLM interfaces should not route institutional advice by input language alone; when location is absent, they should request it or state the jurisdictional scope of the answer.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了当用户未明确指定司法辖区时，主流大模型（LLM）是否会默认以输入语言作为判断适用法律行政框架的依据。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型在税务、社会保障、医疗、教育、养老金等与司法辖区密切相关的领域应用增多，用户常常用自己熟悉的语言提问，但语言和实际适用的地区不必然一致。此前研究发现，输入语言会影响模型输出的文化、政治倾向，作者希望进一步了解在法律行政问题中，如果未指定国家或地区，模型会采用何种法律体系。
AI.method: 作者针对7个美国或中国开发的主流大模型，设计了60个未指明司法辖区的法律行政类英文和中文问题，并设置三种系统提示条件，共获得2520条人工标注的回答，通过比较分析模型更倾向采用哪国的法律行政框架。
AI.result: 所有模型在不同条件下均展现出输入语言与司法框架的匹配倾向。中文输入更常得到中国特有的回答，英文输入更常给出美国特有、对比性或通用回答。如只要求一个答案时，74.5%的英文回答采用美国框架，53.3%的中文回答采用中国框架。这一趋势在所有模型中均一致。
AI.conclusion: 主流大模型存在明显的“制度框架误选风险”——流畅的回答可能采用了用户并未意图的法律行政体系，特别是当用户输入语言和实际需求的辖区不一致时。模型界面不应仅依据语言生成制度建议，应在缺少地区信息时主动请求或声明答案适用的司法范围。

title: Generative Multi-Robot Motion Planning via Diffusion Modeling with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Guidance
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. This paper has been accepted for publication in the proceedings of ASME IDETC-CIE 2026
summary: Coordinating multiple robots in shared environments requires generating feasible trajectories for each agent while accounting for interactions among agents. Centralized planning approaches become difficult to scale as the number of robots increases, while decentralized approaches that allow each agent to plan independently do not inherently account for inter-agent interactions. This paper presents a framework for coordinated multi-robot motion planning that combines decentralized generative trajectory planning with multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL)-based coordination. Each robot independently generates candidate trajectories using a diffusion model trained on single-agent motion data, leveraging the generative model's ability to produce feasible and diverse trajectories. To reduce conflicts between agents, a centralized value function trained via MARL guides the reverse diffusion process through gradient-based steering, enabling interaction-aware trajectory generation without centralized joint planning or retraining of the generative model. This guidance follows an exponential tilting formulation, in which the value function biases the denoising distribution toward trajectories with higher expected multi-agent return. The framework is evaluated in a simulated maze environment with four mobile robots. Experimental results show that the proposed value-guided diffusion planning reduces the inter-agent interference rate from 55.4% to 41.8%, demonstrating that coordination can be effectively achieved while preserving the scalability of decentralized trajectory generation. These results suggest that MARL-based value guidance can effectively introduce coordination into decentralized generative planners without requiring a fully joint multi-robot model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合去中心化生成式轨迹规划与多智能体强化学习（MARL）协调的新框架，能有效提升多机器人轨迹的协调性，显著减少冲突率。
AI.motivation: 多机器人在共享环境中需要协调规划轨迹以避免冲突。集中式方法难以扩展到大量机器人，而去中心化方法又缺乏对相互作用的有效处理，因此需要兼具扩展性和协调性的解决方案。
AI.method: 每个机器人独立采用扩散模型生成多样、可行的候选轨迹（该模型在单智能体数据上预训练），同时通过用MARL训练的中心化价值函数，在轨迹生成逆扩散过程中用梯度引导，偏向于预期回报更高、协调性更好的轨迹，从而在去中心化轨迹生成过程中注入协调性。
AI.result: 在一个含有四台移动机器人的模拟迷宫实验中，该方法将机器人间的干扰率从55.4%降至41.8%，显著提升了轨迹协调性。
AI.conclusion: MARL价值引导可在无需联合多机器人模型的前提下，有效提升去中心化生成式轨迹规划器的多机器人协调性，兼顾扩展性与性能。

title: Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, known as mirage (Asadi et al. 2026), is especially concerning in medical and document visual question answering, where plausible but visually ungrounded responses may be mistaken for image-based evidence.
