We study pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, the goal is to determine whether a VLM should answer or abstain before producing a response. We propose Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA), a model-agnostic method that probes patch-token representations across the layers of a CLIP ViT-H/14 vision encoder. TC-LIA projects layer-wise image patch tokens into the final CLIP embedding space and measures their similarity to the question embedding, allowing the method to track whether question-relevant visual evidence emerges across vision layers. The resulting alignment trajectory is summarized using final image-text cosine similarity, late-layer top-k patch-text alignment, early-to-late gain, and layer-wise slope. These features are combined with pixel-statistic blank/noise detection, zero-shot domain routing, and structured VLM self-assessment in an ensemble. Across five VQA domains, three input conditions, and twelve VLM backbones, the best systems achieve approximately 94.6-94.7% three-class detection accuracy with mirage rates below 3%, while baseline mirage rates range from 21.7% to 66.6%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用于视觉-语言模型（VLM）“幻象”（mirage）失效模式检测的方法——TC-LIA，并在多个任务和模型中大幅度减少了错误回答率。
AI.motivation: VLM在缺乏必要视觉证据时仍可能自信地产生视觉答案，尤其在医学或文档问答等场景下，可能导致严重后果，因此亟需在生成答案前检测并避免此类“幻象”失效。
AI.method: 提出了Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment（TC-LIA）方法，通过在CLIP ViT-H/14视觉编码器多个层次中，投影patch-token并与问题embedding计算相似度，从而追踪问题相关视觉证据的渐进显现。同时提取多个层级的alignment特征，并结合像素统计的空白/噪声检测、零样本域选择、结构化VLM自评，组成集成模型。
AI.result: 在5个VQA领域、3种输入条件及12种VLM上评测，最佳系统在三分类检测任务上实现了94.6%-94.7%的准确率，mirage率低于3%，显著优于基线（21.7%-66.6%）。
AI.conclusion: TC-LIA及其集成方案能够有效检测VLM潜在的幻象失效，大幅降低错误回答概率，增强VLM在高风险应用中的可靠性。

title: Isolating LLM Lexical Bias: A Curation-Free Triangulated Metric for Preference-Stage Learning
summary: Various language domains have undergone remarkable changes in recent years; these shifts are largely attributed to the advent of Large Language Models and their misalignment with natural language usage. These misalignments are thought to partly originate in the preference-learning stage, e.g. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback, which generally makes models more useful but simultaneously may introduce systematic lexical bias. In terms of lexical behavior, this is visible in a model's preference for certain formats or the overuse of words (delve, furthermore), even when such patterns are not present in base model outputs. Research on lexical misalignment induced during preference training is constrained by reliance on manual curation. We address this, by introducing the Triangulated Preference Shift score, a metric that triangulates between human gold standards, base models, and instruct variants to isolate shifts induced specifically by preference learning, without manual curation. We provide data across six model families, anchor the results in the literature, and illustrate the general approach's utility by analyzing whether preference learning shifts models toward what could be interpreted as a "language of prestige". The metric provides an initial automated method to quantify behavioral shifts attributable to preference tuning, and thus, may help inform model alignment and development of trustworthy AI.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新指标Triangulated Preference Shift（TPS）来自动发现大语言模型偏好学习阶段产生的词汇偏移，无需人工筛选，并分析其对模型“高贵语言”倾向的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在偏好学习阶段（如人类反馈强化学习）通过优化实用性，但却可能引入体系性词汇偏向，导致输出用词上的失真或失调。相关研究大多依赖繁琐的人工标注，缺乏自动化、客观的度量方法。
AI.method: 作者提出Triangulated Preference Shift分数，综合对比人工金标准、基础模型输出以及经过指令微调的模型输出，以自动隔离并量化偏好学习特有的词汇偏移现象，全流程自动化，无需人工数据。
AI.result: 在六类模型家族上的实验，配合文献理论基础，展示了TPS指标的有效性，并分析了偏好学习是否诱发模型输出趋于所谓“高贵语言”。
AI.conclusion: TPS为评估偏好微调阶段行为变化提供了首个自动化方法，有助于模型对齐与可靠AI的评估与开发。

title: Threading Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Model Inference in Low-Cost Smart Agricultural Manipulation
summary: Vision-Language Action (VLA) models continue to face challenges such as slow inference speed and difficulty performing fine-grained motion adjustments, limiting their widespread adoption in industry. While the Real-Time Action Chunking (RTAC) algorithm has been proposed to address these bottlenecks, bridging the gap between the algorithm provided in pseudocode to a stable, real-world deployment on a low-cost robotic arm remains a challenge. In this work, we present a complete system-level implementation of RTAC tailored for a low-cost robotic manipulation system. We advance beyond the original high-level pseudocode by optimizing the threading implementation for the policy inference and control pipeline, reducing end-to-end latency and improving responsiveness without modifying the underlying policy. We evaluate this system on tasks involving the manipulation of agricultural produce, specifically garlic bulbs and walnuts. Experimental results demonstrate that our custom threading implementation significantly improves control stability and speed compared to the base implementation of RTAC.

AI.tldr: 本文实现了RTAC算法在低成本机器人手臂上的系统级部署，并通过自定义线程优化显著提升了操作速度和稳定性。
AI.motivation: VLA模型推理速度慢、难做精细动作调整，制约了工业应用。此前RTAC虽能提升效率，但从伪代码到稳定实际部署仍有难度。本文欲解决此问题。
AI.method: 基于原有RTAC算法，本文对机器人操作系统进行系统级实现，并对策略推理与控制流程的线程管理进行优化，以降低延迟，提高响应速度，但不改变RTAC本身的策略。
AI.result: 在大蒜和核桃的抓取任务中，实验结果表明该自定义线程实现较基础RTAC在控制稳定性和速度上有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过对线程系统的优化，RTAC能在低成本机器人平台上高效、稳定运行，有助于VLA模型走向实际应用。

title: Physical Object Understanding with a Physically Controllable World Model
summary: A central challenge in visual intelligence is learning the physical structure of scenes from raw videos: how regions form objects and the laws that govern their interactions. Solving these tasks requires world models capable of inferring distributional states of the world from partial observations - capabilities that current architectures do not provide. We introduce a new class of probabilistic world models that support estimation of the probability of any visual variable, such as appearance and dynamics, conditioned on any other variables. Here, we identify that these models can be trained efficiently with autoregressive sequence modeling, yielding world models from which rich object understanding emerges. First, we demonstrate that our model captures the physical laws governing how objects move by generating multiple plausible future states of the world through sequential inference. Then, by analyzing motion correlations across these futures, we extract objects and articulated object subparts. Having discovered these objects, we show that our world model can manipulate them in 3D. Finally, we demonstrate how physical relationships between objects can be computed from the world model, enabling applications such as Visual Jenga.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的概率性世界模型，能够从原始视频中学习场景的物理结构，实现对对象外观、动态等各种视觉变量之间的条件概率建模，并展现了强大的物体理解与推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有架构难以从部分观测的视频中，推断世界对象的结构和物理交互规律，亟需能够处理复杂概率推断、且能进行丰富物体理解的世界模型。
AI.method: 作者提出新的概率世界模型类，可通过自回归序列建模高效训练。此模型能以条件概率形式建模任一视觉变量，利用顺序推断生成多种合理未来世界状态，并据此分析运动相关性以自动提取对象和部件。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能准确预测物体运动，分辨出场景中的独立对象及其结构，并在世界模型空间完成3D操控等多种应用，包括视觉版的“叠叠乐（Jenga）”。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法展现了强大的三维物体结构理解与推理能力，为基于视频的物理世界建模、物体识别与操控带来了新的突破。

title: How Far Do Auto-Interpretation Labels Generalize: A Controlled Study Across Languages, Scripts, and Rewordings
summary: Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features are increasingly used to interpret language models, with auto-generated natural-language labels serving as the primary interface for understanding what each feature represents. We ask whether these labels generalize: does a feature labeled for a concept actually track that concept across languages and scripts? Using Serbian digraphia as a controlled testbed -- the same language written in both Latin and Cyrillic via deterministic transliteration -- we first find that SAE feature sets activated by the same content in different languages, scripts, and wordings share substantial overlap (peak Jaccard similarity 0.57 vs.\ 0.13 random baseline), suggesting genuine cross-lingual semantic features. We then test whether auto-interpretation labels keep pace. They often do not: features whose labels describe semantic content miss the same meaning in Serbian up to $4\times$ more often than within English, and miss Serbian Cyrillic more than Serbian Latin -- two scripts that are deterministic transliterations of each other -- suggesting the failures track how well each form is represented in training. The gap grows with network depth, yet the labels give no indication that they fail. These results suggest that auto-interpretation labels may reflect a feature's behavior on well-represented inputs rather than the concept itself.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了稀疏自编码器(SAE)生成特征的自然语言标签能否在不同语言和文字系统间泛化。通过对塞尔维亚语的拉丁与西里尔两种书写系统实验，发现同一语义内容在不同语言/文字下激活的SAE特征有明显重叠，但自动生成的特征标签常常无法准确反映其在新语言/文字下的表现，尤其是在训练数据覆盖较少的情况下。
AI.motivation: 为了评估当前自动生成的SAE特征标签能否真正反映语义概念，而不仅仅是对训练集中高频输入的描述，尤其关注多语言、多文字系统下标签泛化能力。
AI.method: 以塞尔维亚语的双文字环境为对照实验平台，通过将相同语义内容以不同语言、不同文字形式输入SAE模型，分析激活特征集的重叠性，并评估相应特征自动标签在新环境下的语义准确率。
AI.result: 同内容在不同书写系统下SAE特征集有可观的重叠性（Jaccard相似度0.57），但自动解释标签在塞语下误判比例可达英语的4倍，且在西里尔文字下表现更差，与训练数据分布相关。该现象在网络更深层时更显著，标签本身却无任何提示。
AI.conclusion: SAE自动解释标签未必能真实反映特征语义内涵，更依赖于训练集中相应输入的分布。仅靠标签可能会高估模型在弱覆盖输入上的泛化解释能力。

title: Make Your VLA More Robust Without More Data By Interleaving Motion Planning
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown remarkable progress for mobile manipulation, but their performance on long-horizon tasks remains poor. These tasks are especially challenging because (1) progress toward high-level goals must be maintained across extended sequences of spatially distributed subtasks, and (2) early execution errors compound rapidly over the task horizon. These challenges persist despite finetuning on large human teleoperated mobile manipulation data, indicating that more data alone may not resolve the problem. To address these challenges, we propose MPVI: Motion Planner / VLA Interleaving, a framework that integrates model-based motion planning with VLAs to improve robustness without further training. The proposed integration enables localization and navigation to distant or occluded target objects through cluttered scenes using open-vocabulary object detection, frontier exploration and motion planning. However, such integration is non-trivial, requiring reliable switching between modules; we show one way forward via VLM-based completion checking with proprioceptive triggers. We evaluate our approach on the BEHAVIOR-1K benchmark and demonstrate 113% improvement in task progress over a top end-to-end VLA baseline. Additional details are available at the project page: https://mpvi.netlify.app/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将运动规划与视觉-语言-动作模型相结合的新框架（MPVI），有效提升长时序任务中移动操控机器人的表现，并在BEHAVIOR-1K基准测试上取得了显著进步。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型虽然在移动操控场景中进展显著，但在需要持续多步操作的长时序任务上表现不佳，主要因为难以保持全局任务目标和早期错误积累带来的影响，仅靠扩充数据难以解决。
AI.method: 提出MPVI框架，将基于模型的运动规划与视觉-语言-动作模型相互交替地结合。核心机制在于：使用开放词汇的目标检测来感知对象，前沿探索实现环境探索，运动规划进行路径规划，并通过视觉-语言模型完成判定与本体感觉触发，可靠地在各子模块间切换，无需重新训练。
AI.result: MPVI在BEHAVIOR-1K基准测试上，相较于最强的端到端VLA方法，任务进度提升达113%。
AI.conclusion: 集成运动规划与视觉-语言-动作模型，不仅提升了长时序移动操控任务中的健壮性和表现，还无需额外训练，展示了这一思路对未来机器人智能的提升潜力。

title: Real-Time Physics Simulation with Dynamic Mesh-Gaussian Reconstructions
summary: Integrating dynamic 3D reconstructions into physics simulation requires fixed mesh topology for efficient collision detection, but state-of-the-art methods like DG-Mesh produce varying topology optimized for geometric quality. We investigate whether topology conversion can enable physics integration while preserving reconstruction fidelity. We propose a dual-representation framework combining fixed-topology meshes for physics with Gaussian splatting for rendering, achieving 4.65$\times$ speedup over varying-topology baselines through runtime vertex buffer updates. We evaluate two conversion strategies, temporal correspondence tracking and template-based projection, against native fixed-topology methods (MaGS) on the DG-Mesh dataset. Our evaluation reveals that both conversion approaches incur 65-80% geometric degradation, producing results inferior to MaGS despite DG-Mesh's superior initial quality. This demonstrates that high-quality reconstruction and physics-compatible topology represent fundamentally distinct objectives that cannot be reconciled through post-processing. Our findings inform future development of physics-aware reconstruction methods and our framework enables real-time simulation with any fixed-topology approach.

AI.tldr: 为了解决动态3D重建与物理仿真集成中的拓扑不匹配问题，本文提出了一种结合固定拓扑网格和高斯渲染的双重表示框架，但发现通过后处理转换拓扑会导致较大几何损失，无法兼顾高质量重建与物理仿真需求。
AI.motivation: 动态3D重建方法通常优化几何质量而产生不断变化的拓扑结构，而高效的物理仿真又必须依赖固定拓扑以便快速碰撞检测，因此需要寻找能够兼容两者的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种双重表示框架，将物理仿真与固定拓扑网格结合，将渲染与高斯点渲染结合。尝试两种拓扑转换策略：时序对应追踪，以及模板投影，并在DG-Mesh数据集上与原生固定拓扑方法MaGS做对比实验。
AI.result: 通过运行时更新顶点缓冲，框架比变拓扑基线加速4.65倍；但两种转换策略带来了65-80%的几何精度损失，效果均不如专用固定拓扑重建，即使DG-Mesh原始质量更高。
AI.conclusion: 高质量动态重建与物理仿真对网格的需求根本不同，通过后处理转换不可兼得，这一发现对未来物理可用的重建方法设计有指导意义，该框架也为任意固定拓扑方案集成物理仿真提供了实时支持。

title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
summary: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various agent backbones (4B to 284B parameters) and three retrievers on offline and live-web agentic search benchmarks. We find that the accuracy gain from masking follows an asymmetric inverted-U shape when plotted against the model's accuracy without context management: a plateau under weak retrievers, a peak when a strong retriever meets a mid-capacity model, and a sharp collapse when the model is saturated. This pattern reflects the interaction between retriever recall and the model's implicit filtering capacity, rather than either factor in isolation. Mechanistically, masking implements a token-for-turn trade-off: it removes observations the model has largely stopped attending to and pages the agent rarely re-opens. The added turns help when they convert failures into successes, but they fail when masking removes evidence the model would otherwise have used. We therefore reframe context management as a regime-dependent intervention and provide a holistic perspective for analyzing context use in agentic deep search. We release our scaffold and trajectories here (https://github.com/i-DeepSearch/observation-masking) to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了在长时序智能体搜索任务中，掩蔽过时观测信息对提升模型效果的作用，提出其效果依赖于模型和检索器的匹配情况。
AI.motivation: 长时序搜索智能体需多次检索并累积大量上下文，为保证有限上下文窗口的利用效率，需要管理和优化上下文内容，例如通过掩蔽陈旧观测信息，但其作用机理和适用条件尚不明确。
AI.method: 在不同参数规模（4B到284B）的模型和三类检索器下，分别在静态和在线Web搜索基准上，系统评估了观测掩蔽策略对模型表现的影响，总结其效果与模型准确率和检索器能力的关系，并对掩蔽的具体机制进行了剖析。
AI.result: 掩蔽带来的准确率提升呈现非对称倒U型曲线：弱检索器下提升有限，强检索器-中等容量模型组合下效果最佳，模型能力饱和后效果显著下降。该结果反映了检索召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 上下文管理（如观测掩蔽）应视为依赖具体模型-检索器配置的策略，不能一概而论。为后续研究提供了新的分析视角及开源实验框架和数据。

title: OSCAR: Obstacle Survival Curves for Adaptive Robot Navigation
summary: A mobile robot following a graph of known routes can make costly navigation errors when a temporary obstacle blocks a critical edge: waiting too long behind a parked cart wastes time, but immediately rerouting around a person who would move in a few seconds is also inefficient. Standard reactive obstacle avoidance addresses local motion around obstacles, while fixed wait-or-reroute rules ignore how long different obstacle types tend to persist. We propose OSCAR: an adaptive survival-modeling framework for graph-based navigation with temporary blockages. Assuming obstacle class labels are available at encounter time, the robot learns class-conditioned residual clearance-time distributions from online experience, including right-censored observations when it reroutes before observing clearance. These survival models are integrated into a time-dependent graph planner that maintains obstacle memory and computes a patience threshold at each blocked edge: how long to wait before taking an alternate route. The method continuously updates its clearance estimates across episodes and uses them to balance waiting against rerouting. We evaluate the approach in simulation and on a real mobile robot in a university atrium with obstacles including people, chairs, bins, and tubes. In simulation, the learned policy's time-to-goal converges to within 1% of an oracle with access to ground-truth clearance distributions after fewer than 20 observations per obstacle class, outperforming all heuristic baselines. Real-world deployment confirms that the policy improves online, adapting its patience thresholds from experience across 50 navigation episodes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向临时障碍的自适应生存建模导航框架OSCAR，实现了机器人在已知路径图受阻情况下对等待与绕行策略的学习和优化。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人在按图导航时，会因临时障碍（如人、推车）而陷入等待与绕行的困境。目前的办法要么仅关注局部避障（效率低），要么简单遵循固定规则（不够智能），都未充分利用不同障碍持续时间的先验经验。
AI.method: 提出OSCAR框架，基于类别标注的障碍，在线学习障碍剩余清除时间的分布（包括因绕行产生的删失数据）。这些生存模型被集成到时间依赖的图规划器中，为每个受阻边动态设定应等待多长时间再改道。该方法持续迭代更新，优化等待与绕行的平衡。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境（大学中厅）下验证了该方法。仿真中，学习到的策略只需每障碍类别20次观测，表现已接近真实分布下的“全知”策略（目标时间误差<1%），优于所有启发式基线。在实际部署中，策略通过50次导航逐步优化耐心阈值。
AI.conclusion: OSCAR框架能通过经验适应导航障碍的动态变化，显著提升机器人在复杂临时障碍下的自主决策与执行效率。

title: DarkVesselNet: Multi-Modal Remote Sensing and Trajectory Reasoning for Dark Vessel Detection
summary: Dark vessel detection requires fusing what vessels report through AIS with what satellites observe through radar and optical sensors. DarkVesselNet is a multi-modal remote sensing stack that combines Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical imagery, geospatial foundation model backbones, AIS trajectory reasoning, TGARD-style gap detection, and a Pi-DPM-inspired anomaly head. The repository exposes the system as a tested Python package and a public Hugging Face Space. The paper presents the sensor stack, backbone abstraction, fusion path, anomaly head, and current validation. The evidence currently available is software-grounded: tests for SAR speckle filtering, optical band ratios, Haversine distance, TGARD gap emission, sensor coregistration, backbone token shapes, and differentiable anomaly scoring.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了DarkVesselNet，一个结合多模态遥感数据和AIS信息用于检测“暗船”的系统。
AI.motivation: 当前对“暗船”（未报告其位置的船只）的检测主要依赖卫星观测与AIS（自动识别系统）数据的融合，但这一技术存在诸多挑战，如数据异构、缺失等，亟需更有效的融合与异常检测方法。
AI.method: DarkVesselNet结合了Sentinel-1的SAR（合成孔径雷达）、Sentinel-2的光学影像、地理空间基础模型作为backbone、AIS轨迹推理、TGARD风格的空缺检测机制以及Pi-DPM启发的异常检测头。系统实现为Python包，并公开在Hugging Face Space供使用。
AI.result: 目前系统在多项基础组件上完成了软件级验证，包括SAR斑点滤波、光学波段比率计算、Haversine距离、TGARD gap检测、传感器配准、backbone token结构，以及可微分异常评分。
AI.conclusion: DarkVesselNet完成了关键功能与组件的集成验证，展示了多模态融合和异常检测在暗船检测中的可行性。未来可进一步进行实际场景验证与优化。

title: ProtStructQA: A Denotation Threshold in Protein Structural Reasoning
summary: Protein-language systems are often evaluated by whether they generate plausible biological text, but a structural question has a sharper semantics: it denotes a measurement in a 3D coordinate system. We introduce ProtStructQA, an executable benchmark for protein structural question answering in which each natural-language question is generated from a hidden typed domain-specific language (DSL) program and the answer is obtained by executing that program on an AlphaFold-predicted structure. ProtStructQA releases 382.2K questions covering confidence, distances, predicted aligned error (PAE), solvent exposure, secondary structure, topology and contacts, and held-out compositions: a 330K active benchmark over 10K proteins from four species, plus a 52.2K hard-negative robustness pool. Without fine-tuning, we evaluate Qwen3 models from 0.6B to 8B under direct prompting, chain-of-thought, grammar-constrained executable voting, executable voting with chain-of-thought, and multi-turn ReAct-style tool use, and replicate the headline finding on Gemma-3-1B and Gemma-3-12B. We find a capability-dependent denotation threshold between Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B: below it, tool-mediated ReAct dominates because models often fail to produce executable denotations; above it, chain-of-thought flips from mostly harmful to strongly beneficial and becomes the strongest strategy on most splits. Parse-failure and family-level analyses show that the threshold is a transition from unparseable language to executable structural denotation, while grammar and execution remain selectively valuable for PAE and secondary-structure queries. ProtStructQA reframes scientific QA as compilation from language to measurement and provides a diagnostic testbed for when language models can map words to executable 3D structural measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ProtStructQA，一个针对蛋白质结构问答的新型可执行基准，允许通过执行特定程序在蛋白质三维结构上取得答案，对现有多种大语言模型进行了全面评测。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质语言模型常常只评估其生成生物相关文本的能力，但结构问题给予了更精确的语义，即三维坐标系统上的具体测量，当前缺乏能自动化衡量模型结构理解与推理能力的基准。
AI.method: 作者设计了ProtStructQA基准：每个自然语言问题由隐藏的类型化领域专用语言(DSL)程序生成，然后通过在AlphaFold预测结构上执行该程序得出答案。题目涵盖置信度、残基距离、PAE、溶剂暴露、二级结构、拓扑、接触等，包含活跃基准与难例鲁棒性测试池，并无微调地测试多种LLM在不同推理策略下的表现。
AI.result: 发现Qwen3模型在1.7B至4B参数量之间存在能力门槛：1.7B以下模型更依赖ReAct工具式推理，因其不能生成正确“可执行”答案；4B以上模型链式思考（Chain-of-thought）反而大幅提升，成为最优策略，对特定问题语法约束仍有帮助。
AI.conclusion: ProtStructQA将科学问答方法由“文本到文本”升级为“文本到结构测量的可执行程序”，为衡量和提升语言模型在生物结构领域的能力提供了诊断测试平台，促进了语言到结构理解的桥接。

title: GraspGen-X: Cross-Embodiment 6-DOF Diffusion-based Grasping
summary: We study cross-embodiment 6-DOF robot grasping. Unlike prior works, we require the model not only to generalize to novel objects / scenes but also to novel gripper morphologies and physical grasping processes. Our method extends diffusion model based generative 6-DOF grasping models to condition on the additional gripper's representation. We propose a swept-volume heuristic for encoding the gripper. We train our cross-embodiment model with procedural grippers and a large-scale dataset of 2 Billion grasps. In simulation experiments, our model has the best zero-shot generalization to novel real-world grippers and objects over baseline methods. Our model also serves as a good initialization for fine-tuning to adapt to novel grippers. In ablations, we demonstrate the efficiency of our sweep-volume gripper representation and our procedural gripper training dataset. Last, we show zero-shot generalization to real-world novel grippers for 6-DOF grasping, surpassing baselines in cross-embodiment generalization.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种能跨不同机械手形态实现6自由度抓取的生成模型，专注于对新机械手和新物体的无训练泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有6-DOF机器人抓取方法大多只针对特定机械手，缺乏对新型机械手或夹爪的泛化能力。机器人多样性和工业需求促使研究者开发对不同形态机械手更具泛化性的抓取算法。
AI.method: 作者提出将扩散模型应用于6-DOF抓取任务，并引入基于‘扫掠体积’的夹爪表征，将机械手特征引入生成过程中。同时，使用程序化生成的多样夹爪和20亿抓取案例的数据集进行训练，提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在仿真实验中，该方法对全新机械手和物体展现出优异的零样本泛化能力，超过现有基线方法。同时，该模型也为快速适应新机械手提供了良好的初始权重。消融实验表明扫掠体积表征和程序化夹爪数据集带来了关键的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的跨机械手形态6-DOF抓取模型，在数据和建模方法上均显著提升了对未知夹爪泛化能力，为实际中不同机械手快速部署提供了有效工具。

title: GeoSAM-3D: Geodesic Prompt Propagation for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Segmentation from Monocular Video
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D scene segmentation usually assumes RGB-D video, calibrated multi-view imagery, or a reconstructed mesh. GeoSAM-3D studies a lighter setting: a user uploads a short monocular video, clicks or names an object in one frame, and receives a propagated 3D mask over a Gaussian scene. The implementation combines frozen image and video foundation models with a monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction and a differentiable graph-geodesic propagation kernel over Gaussian centroids. The central design choice is to propagate prompts by heat-kernel distance on the reconstructed scene graph, rather than by Euclidean nearest neighbors in 3D. This preserves continuity around curved surfaces and reduces leakage across nearby but disconnected objects. This paper describes the repository state, the mathematical kernel implemented in geosam3d.propagate, the feature head trained from Segment Anything masks, and the validation already present in the codebase. The evaluation protocol separates implementation validation, graph propagation quality, leakage control, and interactive latency.

AI.tldr: GeoSAM-3D提出了一个轻量级的3D场景分割方法，用户只需上传单目短视频并提供一个目标提示，即可获得在高斯场景上的3D掩码。该方法结合了视觉基础模型、高斯重建与图核传播技术，有效提升了分割的连续性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 目前开放词汇3D场景分割大多依赖RGB-D视频、校准的多视角图像或重建的网格，这对设备和预处理要求较高。GeoSAM-3D旨在降低门槛，只需常规单目视频即可实现高质量3D分割，便于实际应用。
AI.method: 该方法利用冻结的图像和视频基础模型获取特征，采用单目视频进行3D高斯点云重建。在重建的高斯场景图上，通过可微分的图-测地热核核传播用户提示信息，实现目标掩码的3D传播。传播采用基于测地距离的核，而非传统的欧氏近邻，以提升在复杂表面上分割的连续性。
AI.result: GeoSAM-3D在现有代码库中进行了功能实现，并开源了相关计算内核、特征头和基于SAM的掩码训练。实验协议综合评估了实现有效性、图传播质量、分割泄漏控制及交互延迟。结果显示该方案具备良好的分割质量和实时互动性能。
AI.conclusion: GeoSAM-3D在降低硬件和前处理依赖的前提下，实现了高效、连续的3D语义分割。其基于图测地传播的设计有效减少了分割泄漏问题，是3D分割领域的一项具有实际意义的进展。

title: SALSA: Speech Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activation Vectors
summary: Speech-aware large language models often generalize poorly to out-of-domain settings. We propose SALSA (Speech-Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activations), a lightweight adaptation method that learns layer-wise steering vectors. Unlike commonly used steering approaches that rely on contrastive activation differences, SALSA directly optimizes steering vectors using a supervised objective. Across children's speech, multilingual speech, and Mandarin-English code-switching benchmarks, SALSA substantially improves performance over zero-shot inference and speech in-context learning baselines, achieving up to 46.8% relative improvements over zero-shot. Analysis further demonstrates that steering the encoder, particularly the later layers, is more effective than steering the LLM backbone. These findings suggest that steering improves downstream ASR performance by adapting higher-level acoustic and phonetic representations to better align with the pretrained language model representation space, rather than by modifying the decoder itself.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的轻量化适配方法SALSA，通过学习逐层引导向量促进语音感知大语言模型更好泛化至新领域，在多项语音任务上大幅提升了ASR表现。
AI.motivation: 现有针对语音的大语言模型在遇到新的、领域外的数据时表现较差，现有的引导方法也存在不足，如依赖对比差异而非直接优化。针对这个问题，需要一种更有效的模型适配方法。
AI.method: SALSA直接通过有监督目标学习每一层的引导向量，无需对比激活差分。方法轻量，对每层网络单独学习引导（steering）向量，从而调整模型表现。与只引导LLM主干不同，SALSA重点对编码器中后部层进行引导，以适配更高层次的语音和语音学特征。
AI.result: SALSA在儿童语音、多语言语音和中英代码混合等基准上显著优于零样本（zero-shot）和语音上下文学习（in-context learning）基线，部分任务上相对提升高达46.8%。分析表明编码器（尤其后层）的引导比主干LLM的引导更有效。
AI.conclusion: 逐层引导能显著提升语音感知大语言模型在新领域的表现。核心机制是调整高阶语音/语音学特征，使其与预训练语言模型表征空间更匹配，而不是调整解码器本身。

title: AI-IoT-Robotics Integration: Survey of Frameworks, Emerging Trends, and the Path Toward Connected Robotics
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Published in IEEE Internet of Things Journal
summary: The convergence of Artificial Intelligence, the Internet of Things, and Robotics is no longer a futuristic vision; it is rapidly becoming the foundation of real-time, intelligent, and context-aware systems. AI enables perception and reasoning, IoT provides scalable sensing and communication, and robotics delivers embodied actuation. Despite significant progress in pairwise combinations such as AIoT and the Internet of Robotic Things (IoRT), there remains a lack of unified design frameworks that fully integrate all three. This survey synthesizes the state-of-the-art across these domains, emphasizing the emerging role of Small Language Models (SLMs) at the edge and Large Language Models (LLMs) in the cloud for distributed cognition and autonomous decision-making. We propose a modular system architecture that aligns with these trends, analyze persistent gaps in interoperability and feedback control, and classify existing work by integration depth. Our review highlights how hybrid SLM-LLM systems, when coupled with IoT infrastructure and robotic agents, can address challenges in real-time adaptation, scalability, and reliability. This work offers a conceptual and technical roadmap for designing next-generation AI-IoT-Robotic ecosystems that are modular, interpretable, and capable of learning within dynamic environments, paving the way for the emerging paradigm of Connected Robotics and Physical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能（AI）、物联网（IoT）与机器人三者融合的最新进展，特别关注小型语言模型（SLM）与大型语言模型（LLM）在边缘和云端的应用，并提出了统一的模块化架构与技术路线图。
AI.motivation: AI、IoT与机器人领域分别取得了重大进展，二者组合（如AIoT、IoRT）应用广泛，但目前缺乏三者深度融合的统一设计框架，无法充分发挥各自优势来响应实时智能系统的需求。
AI.method: 本文通过文献调研，总结并分析了AI、IoT和机器人三者融合的现状与挑战，重点分析SLM与LLM分布式认知与自治决策的作用，提出了模块化系统架构，并按集成深度对现有工作进行分类。
AI.result: 提出了一个模块化架构，指出混合SLM-LLM系统与IoT和机器人协同，可显著提升系统的实时自适应、可扩展性与可靠性。还分析了当前在互操作性和反馈控制等方面存在的持续性难题。
AI.conclusion: 本文为AI-IoT-机器人深度融合提供了理论和技术基础，兼顾模块化、可解释性和动态环境下的自学习能力，为打造下一代互联机器人与物理人工智能生态系统指明了方向。

title: Optimizing 3D Gaussian Splatting via Point Cloud Upsampling
comment: Accepted in Journal of Computational Vision and Imaging Systems (JCVIS)
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a technique for creating and rendering 3D scenes, however its performance depends heavily on the quality of initial seed points. To improve 3DGS initialization, this study presents and evaluates several point cloud upsampling approaches: linear interpolation, triangular interpolation, spline-based surface reconstruction, moving least squares surface fitting, and Voronoi-based point generation. Additionally, this research introduces a depth-guided point lifting method that leverages depth maps to maintain geometric consistency with Structure-from-Motion (SfM) reconstructions. Through extensive experiments on the Mip-NeRF360 and Replica datasets, the proposed methods demonstrate improvements in reconstruction quality across diverse scene types. Results indicate that different upsampling strategies excel in different scenarios: surface reconstruction methods perform better with organic, detailed scenes, while simpler interpolation approaches are more suited for scenes dominated by piecewise-smooth geometries. In comparison, the depth-guided approach shows promise for adding geometry-aware points across the entire scene, importantly in texture-less regions. These findings, which provide preliminary practical guidelines for selecting appropriate upsampling methods based on scene characteristics and computational constraints, advances the understanding of how point cloud initialization affects 3DGS quality.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多种点云上采样策略对3D高斯溅射（3DGS）初始化及重建质量的提升作用，提出了基于深度引导的新点云提升方法，并通过实验验证了不同方法在不同场景下表现的优劣。
AI.motivation: 3DGS的表现高度依赖于初始点云质量，但现有点云初始化方法有限。本研究旨在探索和提升3DGS初始化质量，以增强最终渲染与重建效果。
AI.method: 对比并评估了线性插值、三角插值、样条曲面重建、移动最小二乘曲面拟合、Voronoi生成等点云上采样方法，并提出基于深度图的点云提升策略，结合SfM深度保持几何一致性，在Mip-NeRF360和Replica数据集上进行实验分析。
AI.result: 实验表明表面重建方法适合有机复杂场景，而简单插值对分段平滑场景效果较佳。深度引导策略有助于在全局和无纹理区域补充几何一致的点，有效提升整体重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 初始点云质量对3DGS效果影响显著，不同场景与约束应选用不同上采样策略。本文为实际应用中如何选择点云上采样方法提供了指导意见，促进了3DGS初始化优化的理解与进步。

title: Short-form Text Rewriting with Phi Silica
summary: Short-form text rewriting is a constrained variant of paraphrasing in which limited context and high semantic density leave little room for variation. While large language models perform well on general paraphrasing, small language models (SLMs) often struggle with semantic fidelity and hallucination robustness in short-form settings. In this work, we present an empirical study of adapting an SLM, Phi Silica, for short-form rewrite through dataset curation, prompt distillation, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, and evaluation. We curate a dataset of short presentation-style text from public slide decks and use GPT-5-chat both to generate rewrite supervision and to conduct LLM-as-a-judge evaluation. Our results show that finetuning improves semantic fidelity, reduces hallucinations, and increases preference win rate against GPT-5-chat rewrites. The findings suggest that targeted adaptation for SLMs can substantially narrow the gap to cloud models and provide practical guidance for adapting SLMs to precision-critical rewrite tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对小型语言模型（SLM）在短文本改写任务中表现有限的问题，提出通过数据集优化、提示蒸馏和高效参数微调等方式改进SLM在该任务下的性能。
AI.motivation: 短文本改写受限于上下文和语义密度，对模型的语义保真和抗臆造能力要求很高。大模型虽表现优良，但小模型面对短文本任务常出现语义偏离和幻觉。研究动机是让资源有限的SLM更好地应用于对精度要求高的实际改写场景。
AI.method: 作者采用了四种方法对Phi Silica SLM进行适应性改造：1）针对短文本从公开幻灯片中构建数据集；2）利用GPT-5-chat生成改写监督数据；3）提示蒸馏强化模型指令理解能力；4）参数高效微调模型；并用GPT-5-chat作为评估判官。
AI.result: 实验表明，经上述改造后，SLM在短文本改写上的语义保真度提升、幻觉现象减少，优选率超过GPT-5-chat生成的改写，显著缩小与云端大模型在该任务上的差距。
AI.conclusion: 结论是针对性优化和微调能大幅提升SLM在高精度短文本改写任务中的表现，为SLM实际工程应用和落地提供技术路径和操作指南。

title: $τ_0$-WM: A Unified Video-Action World Model for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Robotic manipulation requires models that generate executable actions while anticipating and evaluating their future consequences before physical execution. We present $τ_0$-World Model ($τ_0$-WM), a unified video-action world model that integrates policy learning, video prediction, and action evaluation within a single future-predictive framework. Built on a shared video diffusion backbone, $τ_0$-WM provides two complementary interfaces. First, a video action model jointly predicts future visual latents and continuous action chunks from multi-view observations, language instructions, and robot state. Second, an action-conditioned video simulator rolls out candidate action chunks into multi-view futures and predicts dense task-progress scores. The model is trained on approximately $27{,}300$ hours of real-robot teleoperation, UMI-style interaction, egocentric human videos, and rollout or failure trajectories using modality-specific supervision masks. At inference time, $τ_0$-WM uses test-time computation to sample action candidates, rank them with re-denoising consistency, and invoke simulator-based rectification for low-quality candidates. On challenging long-horizon and fine-grained robotic manipulation tasks, $τ_0$-WM shows superior performance over other relevant baselines.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一个统一的视频-动作世界模型$τ_0$-WM，能够在机器人操控中预测未来结果、生成可执行动作并进行动作评估，在多种复杂任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 机器人操控需要生成不仅可执行还需预测未来结果的动作，但传统方法往往将策略学习、视频预测和动作评估分离，缺乏高效统一的建模方式。
AI.method: 提出$τ_0$-WM，一个基于视频扩散骨干的统一模型，集成策略学习、视频预测和动作评估。其有两大接口：（1）视频动作模型，能从多视角观测、指令和机器人状态联合预测未来视觉特征和连续动作片段；（2）动作条件视频模拟器，将候选动作展开成多视角未来视频，并预测任务进展分数。模型在2.73万小时的真实和模拟机器人数据上进行多模态训练，推理时通过采样、重排序和自适应纠错提升动作质量。
AI.result: $τ_0$-WM在需长时段和细粒度控制的机器人操控任务中，相较其它相关基线性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 统一的视频-动作世界模型（$τ_0$-WM）能更好地支持复杂机器人任务，实现高效的动作预测、评估和生成，推动了机器人自主控制的发展。

title: Beyond Static Gaussians: An Empirical Investigation of Architectural Paradigms for Dynamic 3D Scene Reconstruction
comment: Accepted in Journal of Computational Vision and Imaging Systems (JCVIS)
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction via 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a compelling approach for representing evolving environments, yet understanding trade-offs between methodologies remains crucial. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of dynamic 3DGS methods, categorizing them into two paradigms: structure-guided methods employing auxiliary representations (deformation fields, canonical spaces, grids) to model temporal changes, and gaussian-centric methods encoding dynamics directly into primitives via continuous functions or 4D representations. We evaluate representative methods from both paradigms on the D-NeRF benchmark. Our findings reveal that structure-guided methods achieve superior reconstruction fidelity and compact model sizes, while gaussian-centric approaches demonstrate significantly higher rendering speeds enabling real-time performance, though with greater quality variability and potentially substantial storage overhead. This analysis highlights a fundamental trade-off between reconstruction quality/compactness versus rendering speed, providing insights to guide future research and application development in dynamic scene reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了动态3D高斯散点重建(3DGS)方法，将其分为结构引导和高斯中心两大类，比较其重建质量、模型大小与渲染速度之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 动态场景重建需求增长，但不同3DGS方法在质量、效率上各有取舍，理解其中权衡对学术与应用很重要。
AI.method: 将动态3DGS分为结构引导（利用辅助表示如变形场、规范空间、网格建模时序变化）和高斯中心（直接用连续函数或4D表示编码动态信息）两类，在D-NeRF基准上评测代表性方法。
AI.result: 结构引导法在重建保真度和模型紧凑性上表现更优；高斯中心法渲染速度显著更快，支持实时，但质量波动和存储开销更高。
AI.conclusion: 动态3DGS在重建质量、模型紧凑性与渲染速度间存在本质权衡，本文为相关研究和应用开发提供了重要参考。

title: On the Limits of LLM Adaptability: Impact of Model-Internalized Priors on Annotation Task Performance
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 (Oral & Spotlight); PMLR vol. 306. 9 pages, 4 figures
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for zero-shot annotation and LLM-as-a-judge tasks, yet their reliability hinges on how model-internalized priors interact with user-provided instructions. We investigate three dimensions of this interaction: (1) how an LLM's familiarity with data and task definitions affects performance, (2) the extent to which additional information in prompts can correct zero-shot errors ("decision stickiness"), and (3) model susceptibility to misaligned task definitions. Through experiments on toxicity detection across diverse datasets (spanning social media, gaming, news, and forums) using both dense and mixture-of-experts models, we find that nearly two-thirds of zero-shot errors are resistant to correction, with an overall rescue rate (fraction of initial errors corrected by prompting) of only 34.8%. High-confidence errors prove especially resistant to correction. When given misaligned definitions, LLMs follow them while maintaining confidence levels unchanged from the aligned condition. Crucially, we introduce Definition-Specific Familiarity (DSF), which measures alignment between a model's internal concept and the task definition. After controlling for dataset-level confounds, DSF shows a positive association with model performance (partial r = +0.41), while three distinct memorization metrics (ROUGE-L, BERTScore, and embedding cosine similarity) all fail to show a positive association. These findings show the limitations of prompt-based correction in annotation tasks, highlighting the importance of definition alignment over text-level memorization.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型（LLMs）在零样本注释和评判任务中的表现，发现模型的固有知识与用户指令的交互影响可靠性，大部分错误难以通过提示纠正，且定义对齐性优于文本记忆。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs被广泛应用于无需额外训练的文本标注任务和充当“裁判”的角色，但其输出易受模型已有知识（先验）和用户任务定义之间交互的影响。作者希望探究模型对数据/任务熟悉度、提示纠错能力及对错误或偏差定义的敏感性等方面的机制。
AI.method: 作者设计了三个实验维度：（1）分析模型对数据及任务定义熟悉度如何影响表现；（2）评估在提示中加入更多信息是否能纠正零样本错误；（3）考察模型对错误任务定义的敏感性。实验涵盖不同类型数据集，用密集模型和专家混合模型做毒性检测，并引入Definition-Specific Familiarity（DSF）指标，结合多种记忆性指标进行比较分析。
AI.result: 结果发现：近2/3的零样本错误无法通过提示纠正，纠正率仅34.8%；高置信度错误尤其难以纠正。模型在任务定义对齐与错误情况下表现一致，自身置信度未变。DSF与任务表现正相关（偏相关系数+0.41），而常用的三种文本记忆指标未展现正相关。
AI.conclusion: 提示纠错对于大多数零样本错误无效，仅定义与模型知识对齐才能提升表现，单纯依赖模型记忆（文本相似）并不能保证任务准确度。因此，在LLMs注释与判别任务中，任务定义的对齐尤为重要。

title: Position: Good Embodied Reward Models Need Bad Behavior Data
comment: This position paper has been accepted by the ICML 2026 position track as a spotlight paper
summary: This position paper argues that to obtain reliable embodied reward models, the community must invest in ``bad'' robot data: failed, suboptimal, error-prone, and even hazardous behaviors. While reward models are central to any foundation model's lifecycle, today's embodied reward models are trained primarily on successful behaviors. We analyze three state-of-the-art embodied reward models and find that they systematically over-reward behaviors that real human evaluators would penalize, including unsafe interactions, poor execution, and shortcut strategies that only superficially satisfy tasks. We attribute these failures to a key data gap: the scarcity of negative embodied data which is costly to collect and often filtered out or withheld in existing robotics datasets. Furthermore, we show that even modest exposure to real bad behavior data can improve alignment with human preferences and reduce costly false positives. We therefore call on the embodied AI community to curate and release their bad robot data, build synthetic bad data generation engines, develop more decentralized physical evaluation systems, and design benchmarks for fine-grained embodied reward model evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁机器人和强化学习领域应重视并公开“失败、错误、危险的机器人行为数据”，以提升奖励模型对人类偏好的对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的身体奖励模型主要使用成功的行为数据进行训练，导致模型容易高估一些不安全、执行不佳或走捷径的行为，这些行为实际上会被人类评估者惩罚。出现这种现象的根本原因是负面身体数据不足，而这些数据收集代价高、常被过滤或不公开。
AI.method: 作者分析了三种最先进的身体奖励模型，通过实验证明：模型系统性地高估了人类不会认可的行为。随后，作者进一步验证，只需引入少量真实的负面数据，就能有效改善模型与人类偏好的对齐情况，减少高成本的误判。
AI.result: 分析显示主流奖励模型高估了违规或表现不佳的行为。实际引入‘坏行为’数据后，模型对人类偏好的对齐和安全性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 作者呼吁业内积极整理、释放‘坏机器人数据’，构建合成坏数据引擎，促进去中心化物理评估系统和更细粒度的奖励模型评测基准的发展，以促进奖励模型与人类目标更好地对齐。

title: An explainable hierarchical self attention-based approach for tremor detection in the time domain
summary: Tremor is a common movement disorder associated with conditions like Parkinson's disease and Essential tremor, traditionally diagnosed through expert clinician assessment. Current automated detection methods rely on frequency-domain features informed by clinical expertise. In this work, we present an explainable, two-stage hierarchical framework for tremor detection in the time domain that learns tremor patterns directly from 3D kinematic marker time-series data across entire tremor-provoking trials. Our framework combined a deep convolutional and long short-term memory network to learn tremor representations from short, discrete, non-overlapping time segments of kinematic time series data from trials, which are then processed by a vision transformer that models their long-term temporal dynamics of time segment features for trial (session) level classification. Evaluated across nine body parts, the framework achieved F1-scores of 0.594 - 0.947 depending on body parts (average: 0.765), falling short of the frequency-domain state-of-the-art performance (0.909) while requiring minimal preprocessing. Attention weights and gradient-based class activation maps (Grad-CAM) identified time-domain features of tremor across body parts. This proof of concept demonstrated the feasibility of data-driven time-domain modeling for tremor detection across anatomically diverse body parts, while reducing reliance on expert-engineered spectral features and providing posthoc interpretability of temporal and anatomical patterns of tremor.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种可解释的两阶段时间域震颤检测框架，能直接从3D动力学时间序列数据学习并识别震颤，无需依赖复杂预处理和专家特征，同时提供了可解释性，验证了时间域模型在多个身体部位上的可行性。
AI.motivation: 目前震颤大多依靠医生人工诊断，自动化方法则严重依赖基于频域的专家知识提取的特征，缺乏对时间域数据端对端学习的探究，且可解释性有限。作者希望减少专家依赖，实现时间域直接建模与可解释自动检测。
AI.method: 提出包含深度卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短时记忆网络（LSTM）的二阶段分层框架，首先在非重叠时间片段内提取震颤特征，然后用视觉Transformer建模长时程动态，实现以试验为单位的震颤分类，同时借助注意力权重与Grad-CAM提高可解释性。
AI.result: 在九个身体部位上检测的F1分数介于0.594至0.947不等（平均0.765），略低于当前频域专家方法（F1=0.909），但框架依赖最少预处理和专家特征，并且实现了有效的特征可视化。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法证实了直接基于时间域3D运动数据的数据驱动模型用于震颤检测的可行性，不仅减少了对频域专家特征的依赖，还提供了良好后验可解释性，适用于解剖结构多样的身体部位，为自动化、可解释的运动障碍诊断提供了新途径。

title: Do Text Edits Generalize to Visual Generation? Benchmarking Cross-Modal Knowledge Editing in UMMs
comment: Published at ICML 2026; Code and data available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for general-purpose multimodal intelligence. As they are deployed in real-world applications, effectively updating internal knowledge becomes critical. While knowledge editing has matured for text-only models, it remains unclear whether edits that successfully modify textual outputs also transfer to image generation in UMMs. To study this question, we introduce UniKE, the first benchmark for cross-modality knowledge editing in UMMs, comprising 2,971 edit subjects spanning attribute and relation edits. Using VQA-based visual verification, we reveal a striking modality gap: text-side efficacy can reach approximately 92%, whereas the best overall VQA accuracy under direct image generation is only 18.5%. We further propose Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, which explicitly activates edited knowledge before generation and improves overall VQA accuracy for all evaluated model-editor pairs, with gains up to 18.6 percentage points. Mechanistic analysis shows that this gap is associated with partial alignment between edited textual representations and the conditioning pathways for visual generation, where edits sufficient for text outputs may remain too weak or misaligned to steer image synthesis. These findings show that textual knowledge edits do not guarantee reliable cross-modality transfer and motivate modality-aware editing methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了统一多模态模型（UMMs）中知识编辑能否跨文本与图像任务有效转移，提出了首个相关评测基准UniKE，并发现文本端知识编辑效果远优于图像端。提出了一种新的推理增强参数编辑，可提升跨模态编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 随着UMMs广泛应用于实际场景，如何高效和准确地编辑模型内部知识成为关键难题。尽管文本模型的知识编辑技术已较成熟，但其在多模态模型中的跨模态有效性尚未明确。
AI.method: 作者首先构建了涵盖2971个编辑主题的UniKE基准，用以系统评测跨模态知识编辑效果。通过VQA视觉验证测试文本端与图像端编辑有效性。此外，提出推理增强参数编辑（Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing）方法，在生成任务前显式激活被编辑知识。
AI.result: 文本端知识编辑效果可以达到约92%的准确率，但图像端VQA准确率（直接图像生成）最高仅18.5%。所提出的方法使所有模型-编辑器组合的VQA表现提升，最大可提升18.6个百分点。机制分析显示该差距源于文本编辑后的表达未能充分或准确影响图像生成过程。
AI.conclusion: 文本知识编辑无法确保跨模态转移有效性。应发展面向不同模态的编辑方法。所提基准和方法为推动多模态知识编辑研究提供了工具和新方向。

title: Robust Integrated Planning and Control for Quadrotors in Dynamic Environments via NMPC with CBF Penalties
comment: Accepted to Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV 2026), Vancouver, Canada
summary: This paper presents a new robust integrated planning and control (IPC) strategy for multirotor uncrewed aerial vehicles. We propose a nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) formulation that embeds control barrier functions (CBFs) as exponential penalties, improving feasibility while ensuring smooth obstacle avoidance under tight input bounds. The penalty weights provide a practical tuning knob to trade off tracking accuracy against avoidance aggressiveness. We enhance the system robustness by employing a high-gain disturbance observer (HGDO) to estimate and compensate for external disturbances. We also incorporate a Kalman filter (KF) for computationally efficient, real-time prediction of obstacle motion, enabling avoidance of moving obstacles. Comparative studies against both conventional NMPC and NMPC with hard CBF constraints, validated in Gazebo and hardware experiments, demonstrate superior feasibility, safety, and robustness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first hardware-validated NMPC-CBF IPC framework, offering a practical step toward safe quadrotor deployment in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了适用于多旋翼无人机的新型集成规划与控制策略，在实现平滑避障的同时提升了系统的可行性和鲁棒性，经仿真与实验证明优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）在避障和鲁棒性上存在局限，特别是在输入受限和动态环境中难以兼顾跟踪与安全。本研究为了解决这些实际部署中的瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 将控制屏障函数（CBF）作为指数型惩罚项嵌入到NMPC中，优化避障的平滑性与可行性，通过调节惩罚权重平衡跟踪精度与避障激进性。同时使用高增益干扰观测器（HGDO）对外部扰动进行估计补偿，以及用卡尔曼滤波器（KF）有效预测动态障碍物。
AI.result: 在Gazebo仿真平台和真实无人机硬件实验中，与传统NMPC及强制CBF约束的NMPC做对比，提出方法在可行性、安全性与鲁棒性上均表现优越。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了经过硬件验证的NMPC-CBF集成规划与控制框架，为多旋翼无人机在动态环境下安全实用部署提供了新途径。

title: MUSCLE-NET: Predicted-Multiscale-Aware Network for Pedestrian Trajectory Forecasting
comment: This manuscript has been accepted to the IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems as a regular paper
summary: Accurate pedestrian trajectory prediction is essential for safe navigation in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems. Despite substantial progress made by recent methods, most existing approaches are limited in fully exploiting diverse observations and often overlook the scale dependency of future motion, treating multiscale features uniformly regardless of underlying motion dynamics. This limits their robustness across diverse pedestrian behaviors. To address these challenges, we propose a Predicted-MUltiSCale-Aware Network (MUSCLE-NET) for Pedestrian Trajectory Forecasting that integrates complementary multimodal cues with scale-adaptive prediction mechanisms. The proposed framework is built upon a Multiscale Multimodal Feature Extraction (MMFE) module, which combines multiscale representation, modality-aware recalibration, and directional cross-modal fusion to construct semantically aligned representations from bounding boxes, velocities, and pose information. Building on these features, a Multiscale Enhanced Hierarchical Prediction (MEHP) module performs prediction-aware future-motion refinement via a probabilistic coarse predictor, scale-aligned fusion, and progressive refinement, adaptively selecting scale-relevant cues to mitigate spatial drift. Extensive experiments on the JAAD and PIE benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed MUSCLE-Net achieves competitive performance and consistent gains compared with state-of-the-art trajectory prediction methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的多尺度感知网络（MUSCLE-Net）提升行人轨迹预测，能更好利用多模态信息，同时按不同运动尺度自适应地做预测，效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有行人轨迹预测方法难以充分利用多种观测信息，且普遍忽视了运动尺度的差异，导致不同行为下的预测鲁棒性有限。
AI.method: 提出MUSCLE-Net，包括两个核心模块：1) 多尺度多模态特征提取（MMFE），整合边框、速度、姿态等多源信息，通过多尺度表示、模态感知校准和跨模态融合，得到语义一致特征；2) 多尺度增强分层预测（MEHP），通过概率粗预测、尺度对齐融合和逐步细化，自适应选择相关尺度特征进行预测，减少空间漂移。
AI.result: 在JAAD与PIE两大行人轨迹预测基准上广泛实验，MUSCLE-Net在准确性与鲁棒性上均超越当前主流方法，取得持续领先。
AI.conclusion: MUSCLE-Net通过多模态、多尺度自适应设计，提升了行人未来运动的可预测性和迁移性，为自动驾驶等实际应用提供更安全的轨迹预测能力。

title: LaSR: Context-Aware Speech Recognition via Latent Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in Speech Large Language Models (Speech LLMs) have significantly enhanced spoken language understanding and reasoning. However, their contextual awareness is limited, struggling to perform speech recognition that effectively reflects the speaker's intent and topical context. In this paper, we propose LaSR (Latent Speech Reasoning), a novel training paradigm featuring a context-aware reasoning trajectory that leverages the latent reasoning process. Instead of generating explicit intermediate tokens, LaSR aligns chain-of-thought (CoT) supervision around the acoustic feature region of the targeted word, and introduces latent reasoning periods for context information grounding and transcriptional transition. Furthermore, to effectively benchmark contextual recognition on specialized vocabulary, we propose Spoken Darwin-Science, a large-scale corpus focusing on academic terminologies. Preliminary experiments on Fun-Audio-Chat demonstrate that LaSR significantly improves terminology recognition without introducing additional latency and consistently outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning baselines. Our findings highlight the potential of latent reasoning in building efficient, context-aware speech assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型训练方法LaSR，通过在语音LLM的声学特征层级引入上下文感知的推理轨迹，提高了对学术术语等专用词汇的语境识别能力，显著优于传统方法。作者还发布了用于测试的新语料库Spoken Darwin-Science。
AI.motivation: 当前语音大模型在理解和推理能力上有进步，但对于说话人的意图、话题等语境信息把握有限，导致在语音识别时对专业、上下文相关词汇的识别效果不足。该问题亟需解决以提升语音助手等系统效率。
AI.method: 提出了Latent Speech Reasoning（LaSR）训练范式：1）不显式生成中间token，而是在目标词的声学特征区围绕chain-of-thought（CoT）进行对齐，2）引入潜在推理窗口以承载上下文信息和转录过渡。3）为专用词汇语境识别构建了专属评测语料库Spoken Darwin-Science。
AI.result: 在Fun-Audio-Chat实验中，LaSR在专业术语识别上取得了显著提升，无新增延迟，并持续超越了常规的有监督微调方法基线。
AI.conclusion: 潜在推理机制有望在构建高效且具上下文感知能力的语音助手方面发挥重要作用。LaSR体系有效提升了对语境词汇的识别能力。

title: Learning Multi-Modal Trajectory Policies for Data-Efficient Robotic Manipulation
summary: Robotic manipulation requires the effective integration of heterogeneous inputs, including visual observations, language instructions, and trajectory representations, to generate accurate actions. Existing transformer-based policies typically process these heterogeneous modalities within a shared parameter space, which often leads to modality interference and inefficient representation learning, especially in data-scarce scenarios. While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) offers a scalable solution through expert specialization, conventional routing mechanisms are often sensitive to such cross-modal representation discrepancies, resulting in unstable expert assignment and expert collapse. In this work, we propose MATE (Multi-ModAl TrajEctory Policies), a novel trajectory prediction framework built upon MoE. Specifically, we introduce a Multi-Modal MoE architecture to achieve fine-grained sub-token feature decoupling, and design a cross-modal cosine router for stable and scale-invariant expert assignment across heterogeneous modalities. We further employ temperature-controlled routing and stochastic noise injection to improve expert balance and prevent premature routing collapse under scarce demonstrations. Experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that our MATE consistently outperforms prior work under data scarcity. It achieves a 4.75% improvement in average success rate over the trajectory-guided counterpart. Real-world experiments on robotic ping-pong also suggest that the predicted trajectories can provide useful guidance for downstream robotic execution, further indicating the practical feasibility of our algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的多模态轨迹预测框架MATE，能更好地融合视觉、语言和动作轨迹输入，解决现有方法在多模态下表现不佳的问题，尤其是在数据稀缺场景中表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的策略在处理视觉、语言和轨迹等多模态输入时，容易发生模态干扰，导致特征学习低效，且在数据稀缺情况下更突出。Mixture-of-Experts虽然能提供专家分工但遇到路由不稳定、专家崩溃等问题。
AI.method: 提出Multi-Modal MoE结构，实现子token级特征解耦，设计跨模态余弦路由器来稳定地给不同模态分配专家，并引入温度调控和随机噪声注入机制，提升专家使用平衡和防止路由提前坍塌。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，MATE在数据稀缺场景下平均成功率比轨迹指导对比方法提高了4.75%；在真实机器人乒乓球实验中，MATE预测的轨迹也为下游机器人执行提供实际有效的指导。
AI.conclusion: MATE方法在多模态机器人操作任务中，在数据稀缺情况下显著优于现有工作，且在实际机器人系统中具有可行性和应用潜力。

title: CodeCytos: AI-assisted spatial molecular imaging analysis via code-augmented agent action space
summary: Conventional tissue image analysis software provides foundational capabilities for cellular analysis, including segmentation, basic morphological feature extraction, and spatial organization analysis. However, these tools often require manual intervention and are not well integrated with code-driven automation, limiting efficiency and scalability for complex spatial tissue studies. In addition, they offer limited flexibility for custom analyses, as they typically support only a fixed set of pre-implemented spatial cellular features. To address these limitations, we propose CodeCytos, a coding-based reasoning agent framework that enables dynamic, programmable interaction with spatial molecular imaging data to improve automation and customization. CodeCytos is designed to streamline the exploration of custom spatial cellular features and adapt to diverse research needs. We demonstrate its utility through case studies on four expert-curated datasets from distinct tissue types: frontal cortex, non-small-cell lung cancer, pancreas, and tonsil. We evaluate CodeCytos under a realistic minimal prompt setting, where bioscientists pose simple questions without task-specific instructions or contextual information about spatial cellular analysis, and benchmark multiple LLM backbones with strong coding capabilities. We further show that incorporating tailored, domain-agnostic few-shot in-context coding-reasoning examples (randomly sampled demonstrations outside the spatial analysis domain) can substantially improve performance without requiring costly, expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations. Overall, CodeCytos outperforms baseline approaches, highlighting the potential of code-action agents to assist with custom feature exploration in spatial molecular imaging and to accelerate biomarker discovery.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了CodeCytos，一种基于代码推理的代理框架，用于实现空间分子成像数据的自动化和定制化分析，提高了效率和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 当前的组织图像分析软件在处理复杂空间组织数据时存在自动化不足、定制性有限以及依赖人工操作等缺陷，因此需要新的工具提升分析效率和灵活性。
AI.method: 提出了CodeCytos框架，将具备强编码能力的大语言模型应用于空间分子成像数据分析，通过少样本、领域无关的上下文示例提升模型泛化和自动化能力。通过四种不同组织类型的数据集进行案例验证。
AI.result: CodeCytos在没有领域特定指令和背景的极简提示下，表现显著优于传统方法。跨多种LLM后端和实际生物学应用展示了优异性能；仅需领域无关的少样本演示即可大幅提升分析效果。
AI.conclusion: CodeCytos展现了基于代码行动的智能体在空间分子成像分析尤其是定制特征探索和生物标志物发现中的巨大潜力，将有助于推动此类研究的自动化和高效化。

title: Skill or Skip? Learning Selective Skill Invocation in Agentic Tasks via Dual-Granularity Preference Learning
summary: Agent skills are callable procedural modules that provide reusable knowledge and execution policies for complex agentic tasks. However, existing methods mainly focus on selecting relevant skills or improving the skills themselves, while overlooking whether a relevant skill should actually be invoked at the current decision point. Unhelpful invocations may introduce irrelevant context and disrupt an otherwise correct execution process. To address this issue, we propose SelSkill, a dual-granularity preference-learning framework for selective skill invocation. SelSkill formulates skill use as a skill-or-skip decision, uses predictive uncertainty to prioritize candidate decision points, and constructs controlled invoke-skip preference pairs from shared trajectory prefixes. It further combines episode-level outcome preferences with step-level invocation preferences to capture both overall trajectory quality and the local effectiveness of skill invocation. On ALFWorld with Qwen3-8B, SelSkill improves task success by 10.9 percentage points and execution precision by 29.1 percentage points. On BFCL, it improves task success by 5.7 percentage points and execution precision by 29.5 percentage points. Zero-shot results on Tau-bench and PopQA further suggest that the learned invocation policy transfers to new domains with previously unseen skills.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法SelSkill，用于智能体在调用可复用技能模块时，智能地决定是否真正需要调用某一技能，从而提升整体任务性能。核心思想是自动判断应当调用还是跳过技能，以避免无效或干扰性的技能调用。方法在多个基准测试中显著提升了任务成功率和执行精度，并具有良好的跨领域迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体技能库主要关注于如何选择相关技能或改进技能本身，较少考虑在实际决策点，某些相关技能是否真的需要被调用。不必要的调用会带来无关上下文甚至干扰执行。因此，需要一种机制来智能选择在决策点是否应调用技能。
AI.method: 提出SelSkill方法，将技能调用转化为“调用或跳过”二元决策，引入预测不确定性来优先处理关键决策点，通过轨迹片段构造成对偏好数据。SelSkill结合了整体任务成功结果的偏好与单步调用偏好，实现粗细粒度的偏好学习。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld环境（结合Qwen3-8B）下，SelSkill将任务成功率提升10.9个百分点、执行精度提升29.1个百分点；在BFCL上，分别提升5.7和29.5个百分点。Zero-shot实验表明，所学技能调用策略可迁移到新领域和新技能。
AI.conclusion: SelSkill有效解决了智能体是否应在某时刻调用技能的问题，显著提升了执行精度和任务成功率，并且可以泛化到新的领域和技能。

title: Expanding Spatial and Temporal Context for Robotic Imitation Learning With Scene Graphs
summary: Imitation learning enables robots to learn how to execute tasks via observation. However, real-world environments like homes and offices are often severely partially observed due to their large spatial scales. In addition, many tasks involve executing a series of subtasks requiring autonomous robots to reason over extended time horizons. To address these challenges, we propose using scene graphs as an explicit and structured memory mechanism in imitation learning. By maintaining a dynamic scene graph that captures object-centric relationships and their evolution over time, our method allows the agent to retain relevant historical context during task execution to efficiently reason over incrementally accrued scene information. Our experiments on simulated mobile manipulation and real-world tabletop manipulation demonstrate that our approach substantially improves policy performance, particularly in settings that demand long-term reasoning and robust generalization under partial observability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在模仿学习中引入场景图作为结构化记忆机制，有效提升机器人在部分可观测、需长时间推理环境下的任务执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中，环境如家庭和办公室由于空间大，信息采集受限，机器人难以全局感知。同时，多数任务需机器人跨越多个子任务进行长期自主推理，现有模仿学习方法难以应对。
AI.method: 作者提出在模仿学习过程中，采用动态场景图对环境中的对象及其关系进行持续建模，并将其作为结构化记忆，使机器人能保留和利用历史上下文信息来指导决策。
AI.result: 实验覆盖了模拟移动操作与真实桌面操作场景，结果表明该方法显著提升了策略性能，在需要长期推理和面对部分可观测环境时表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 基于场景图的记忆机制有效提升了模仿学习的泛化能力与长期决策能力，适用于复杂真实环境下的机器人执行任务。

title: 3D Segment Anything Model with Visual Mamba for Diagnosing Placenta Accreta Spectrum
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP2026). More modifications may be performed
summary: Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS) is a rare but highly dangerous obstetric disease. Early and accurate PAS diagnosis is critical for maternal health. Traditional PAS diagnosis relies on experienced doctors by analyzing the cesarean history and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data. However, district-level hospitals often lack the expertise and resources for accurate PAS diagnosis. To address these challenges, we establish the first MRI-based PAS dataset, which includes both fine-grained segmentation and classification annotations. Meanwhile, diagnosing PAS can be significantly enhanced by segmenting lesion areas from MRI images of the uterus. To achieve automatic PAS diagnosis, we propose 3DSAMba, a novel feature learning framework for effective lesion segmentation. More specifically, we first design a 3D Segment Anything Model (SAM) and incorporate medical domain information into the model through an efficient adapter mechanism. In addition, we introduce a Multi-Level Aggregation Mamba (MLAM) to aggregate feature maps across different levels and a Fusion State Space Model (FSSM) to fuse multi-scale features from both the encoder and decoder. Finally, we apply segmentation masks to the original MRI images through element-wise multiplication, effectively isolating lesion areas for more accurate PAS diagnosis. Extensive experiments validate that our framework significantly improves the PAS diagnostic performance. To facilitate further research in PAS diagnosis, we have released the dataset and source code at https://github.com/Drchip61/PASD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于胎盘植入（PAS）自动诊断的MRI分割与分类新方法，并建立了首个针对PAS的MRI数据集。通过3D分割模型和融合机制，显著提升了诊断精度，相关数据与代码公开。
AI.motivation: PAS是一种罕见但危险的产科疾病，早期诊断对孕妇健康至关重要。但基层医院普遍缺乏专业资源，难以依赖人工准确判断，因此亟需自动、精准的诊断技术。
AI.method: 建立了包含精细分割与分类标注的PAS MRI数据集。提出了3DSAMba特征学习框架，创新点包括3D Segment Anything Model（SAM）结合医学知识适配器、多层聚合模块（MLAM）、多尺度特征融合模块（FSSM），最终利用分割掩膜提取病灶区用于诊断。
AI.result: 所提方法在PAS诊断任务上取得了显著的性能提升。大量实验验证了该方法的有效性。数据集及源码已公开，便于后续相关研究。
AI.conclusion: 结合创新的3D分割模型与医学领域适配器，有效提高了PAS的自动诊断准确性，有望解决基层医院诊断资源短缺问题，对临床实际具有重要意义。

title: ProactiveLLM: Learning Active Interaction for Streaming Large Language Models
summary: Standard Large Language Models (LLMs) follow a read-then-generate paradigm, causing unnecessary latency and computation. Streaming LLMs alleviate this issue by generating while receiving inputs, but still struggle to decide when to interact with the stream. Existing methods either hard-code interaction timing or rely on costly external alignment signals, such as timing labels, reasoning trajectories, or stronger teachers. In this paper, we propose ProactiveLLM, which achieves active interaction by leveraging the model's endogenous states to guide interaction decisions. The model first learns to perceive semantic sufficiency from partial inputs through two complementary training mechanisms: mask-based streaming modeling and synchronized privileged self-distillation (SPSD). The former applies monotonic random masking to the input during training, simulating progressively revealed streaming inputs and enabling the model to learn local semantic dependencies from partial-input views. The latter aligns the partial-context student view with a full-context teacher view generated by the same evolving model, allowing privileged full-context evidence to guide the student's understanding under incomplete observations. Together, these mechanisms induce endogenous sufficiency cues without requiring external teachers or annotations, providing a versatile foundation for the plug-and-play integration of diverse decision heads. Extensive evaluation across text and speech streaming tasks confirms that ProactiveLLM significantly reduces interaction latency while maintaining quality, validating its capacity for dynamic and active interaction. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/StreamingLLM/tree/main/ProactiveLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ProactiveLLM方法，以提升大型语言模型在流式输入场景下的主动交互能力，通过内部状态引导输出时机，实现低延迟与高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型多采用读完输入再生成输出的模式，导致计算和响应延迟；现有流式模型虽可边接收输入边生成输出，但交互时机难以自适应，多依赖硬编码或外部昂贵信号。因此，亟需一种无需外部资源、能动态决策交互时机的方法。
AI.method: ProactiveLLM依靠模型自身的内部状态来做交互决策。其训练包含两种机制：（1）基于遮盖的流式模拟，随机逐步遮盖输入，学习从部分上下文分析语义充分性；（2）同步特权自蒸馏（SPSD），利用模型自身全上下文输出指导部分上下文视角下的学习，从而无需外部标注或教师。两者结合，培养模型内生的语义判断能力，并可灵活接入不同决策头。
AI.result: 在文本和语音流式任务上，ProactiveLLM大幅降低了交互延迟，且保证了生成质量。在多项任务中优于现有做法。
AI.conclusion: ProactiveLLM通过内生信号实现了无外部资源的主动流式交互，为后续多样流式场景提供了通用有效的基础。代码已开源，便于社区进一步研究和应用。

title: Beyond Task Success: Behavioral and Representational Diagnostics for WAM and VLA
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies and World-Action Models (WAM) represent two increasingly important paradigms for robotic manipulation. However, it remains unclear whether future prediction in WAMs leads to behaviorally meaningful improvements beyond final task success. In this paper, we ask whether WAMs merely add future prediction, or whether they change robot behavior and internal representations in ways that are actionable for control. We introduce a model-agnostic diagnostic framework that compares WAMs and VLAs through two complementary lenses: behavioral rollout analysis and sparse-autoencoder-based feature analysis. The behavioral protocol measures action dynamics consistency, target-object progress, distractor disturbance, and runtime cost. The feature-space protocol characterizes internal representations as memorized, reactive, or predictive, revealing whether models encode future-oriented structure. Across LIBERO and RoboTwin2.0, we evaluate 7 policies spanning direct VLAs and joint, sequential, and auxiliary WAMs. Our results show that success alone hides key differences: WAMs often improve object-level behavior and target selectivity, but their gains depend on architecture and incur higher inference cost. Sequential WAMs show the clearest predictive structure, while auxiliary and joint WAMs respectively compress or entangle future information. These findings suggest future directions for WAMs design to preserve behaviorally actionable future representations for efficient manipulation.

AI.tldr: 论文对比了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略和世界-动作模型（WAM）在机器人操作中的作用，发现WAMs虽提升部分行为表现但以更高推理成本为代价。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人操作任务的复杂化，VLA和WAM两大范式日益受到关注。然而，尚不清楚WAM中的未来预测能力是否真正带来了行为上的改进，还是只是提升了最终任务成功率。因此，作者希望深入探讨WAM在内部表征和行为层面上的实际影响。
AI.method: 提出一个与模型无关的诊断框架，分别从行为和特征空间两个方面对比分析WAM和VLA策略。行为角度测量动作一致性、目标进展、干扰物影响和运行时成本；特征空间通过稀疏自编码器划分模型内表征为记忆型、反应型或预测型，以揭示模型是否具备未来导向结构。
AI.result: 作者对多个数据集（LIBERO和RoboTwin2.0）上的7种策略进行了系统评测。结果显示，单纯的成功率无法体现核心差异：WAM常提升了物体级行为表现和目标选择性，但实际效果取决于模型结构，并导致了更高的推理成本。
AI.conclusion: WAMs具有提升机器人操作行为表现的潜力，尤其在对象选择和预测结构上表现突出，但需平衡模型结构与推理成本。未来应聚焦如何设计能够高效保留具备行为指导意义的未来信息的WAM模型，以促进机器人操作的高效性与可靠性。

title: Pre-Deployment Robustness Stress Testing for CT Segmentation Systems Using Clinically Motivated Multi-Corruption Augmentation
summary:
Deep learning-based CT segmentation systems often achieve high accuracy on clean benchmark images, but their performance may degrade under heterogeneous clinical imaging conditions such as noise, resolution loss, contrast variation, intensity shift, and artifacts. This instability can limit reliable deployment in real-world medical imaging workflows.
  We propose Robustness via Augmented Multi-corruption Pipeline (RAMP), a robustness-oriented augmentation framework for CT segmentation. RAMP combines anatomically constrained spatial perturbations, CT intensity transformations, and stochastic multi-corruption composition to expose models to clinically plausible image degradation during training.
  Across two CT segmentation evaluation settings, RAMP achieved the strongest corrupted-image performance and the smallest clean-to-corrupted robustness gap. In the five-organ noisy evaluation benchmark, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.610 to 0.753 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.264 to 0.064 compared with the nnU-Net baseline. In Abdomen1K, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.633 to 0.789 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.290 to 0.070. Although RAMP did not achieve the highest clean-image Dice, it substantially mitigated worst-case segmentation collapse under severe image degradation.
  These results suggest that multi-corruption augmentation can serve as a practical pre-deployment strategy for improving the reliability of CT segmentation systems in heterogeneous clinical environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RAMP（一种面向鲁棒性的CT分割增强方法），通过多种仿真退化增强训练，显著提升了模型在受损图像下的分割稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习CT分割模型在标准数据集表现良好，但在实际临床环境（如噪声、清晰度降低、对比度变化、强度漂移和伪影等不良成像条件下）表现鲁棒性差，影响实际部署。
AI.method: RAMP包括三部分：1）满足解剖结构约束的空间扰动；2）CT图像强度变换；3）多种扰动的随机组合，模拟临床可能遇到的多样图像退化，在训练阶段暴露模型于这些真实世界中的异常情况。
AI.result: 在两个CT分割评测中，RAMP在受损图像的分割精度和鲁棒性上均优于基线模型，例如在五脏器噪声基准上，受损图像Dice分数由0.610提升至0.753，鲁棒性差距显著缩小；在Abdomen1K上表现类似。虽然RAMP在无损图像上非最佳，但极大缓解了受损图像下模型分割性能骤降的问题。
AI.conclusion: 采用多重扰动增强能显著提升模型在多变临床成像条件下的实用性和稳定性，RAMP为CT分割模型实际部署前的有效鲁棒性提升策略。

title: Learning to Retrieve: Dual-Level Long-Term Memory for Text-to-SQL Agents
summary: Interactive text-to-SQL agents solve database tasks through multi-turn interactions involving schema exploration, query execution, feedback interpretation, and decision revision. Long-term memory helps agents reuse past experiences, but existing retrieval methods remain limited. Static methods rely on fixed similarity heuristics that do not optimize downstream utility, while dynamic methods often learn from sparse final outcomes and retrieve memories at a single decision horizon. This is insufficient when memory usefulness changes across interaction stages, since memories useful for initial planning may differ from those needed for local, state-conditioned execution. We propose MERIT, a dynamic multi-horizon memory retrieval framework. MERIT maintains episode-level memory for global strategic guidance and turn-level memory for local decision support. Both levels use learned retrieval policies optimized with reinforcement learning. To train turn-level retrieval despite limited intermediate supervision, MERIT uses a lightweight Process Reward Model to provide dense proxy rewards for local memory selection. Experiments on BIRD-Interact show that MERIT outperforms no-memory, static-retrieval, and dynamic-retrieval baselines in success rate while reducing average interaction turns. Transfer results on Spider2-Snow further show positive cross-benchmark transfer without benchmark-specific tuning. These results suggest that multi-horizon retrieval improves experience reuse in interactive text-to-SQL agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于交互式text-to-SQL智能体的多视角记忆检索框架MERIT，通过分层记忆检索优化决策过程，提升了任务成功率并减少交互回合数。
AI.motivation: 现有的记忆检索方法无法充分复用历史经验，静态方法缺乏针对任务优化，动态方法则依赖稀疏回报且检索阶段单一，难以适应不同交互阶段对记忆的需求。
AI.method: 提出MERIT框架，结合了回合级（战略层次）与互动级（局部决策）两层记忆，均采用基于强化学习优化的检索策略。为缓解回合级监督稀缺问题，引入轻量级的过程奖励模型，对局部记忆选择提供密集代理奖励以辅助训练。
AI.result: 在BIRD-Interact基准上，MERIT在任务成功率和交互回合数上均优于无记忆、静态和动态检索的基线。转移到Spider2-Snow数据集时也展现出无需调优的跨基准迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 多视角记忆检索机制有效提升了交互式text-to-SQL智能体对过往经验的复用能力，推动了任务执行表现的提升。

title: Implicit Drifting Policy: One-Step Action Generation via Conditional Expert Geometry
summary: Generative action policies based on diffusion or flow matching excel in behavior cloning, yet their iterative sampling is prohibitive for high-frequency robot control. While recent one-step formulations alleviate this latency, they inevitably discard the intermediate trajectory evolution that provides crucial action correction. Directly recovering this mechanism by explicitly estimating a training-time drifting field is mathematically ill-posed due to extreme conditional demonstration sparsity. We introduce Implicit Drifting Policy (IDP), a one-step imitation learning framework that brings the training-time correction of Drifting into policy learning without explicit vector field estimation. IDP extracts a conditional expert geometry from the local variation of observation-similar expert actions, and compares it against a global reference geometry to isolate condition-specific constraints. This local geometric structure adaptively weights a scalar potential objective. Combined with an expert-proximal terminal evaluation, IDP directly enforces manifold constraints on the one-step generator during training. Extensive evaluations across 2D, 3D, and real-world manipulation tasks show IDP effectively maintains adherence to valid action manifolds, improving upon explicit drifting methods and achieving competitive performance with strong one-step baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了IDP（Implicit Drifting Policy），一种不需要显式向量场估计的单步模仿学习方法，用于高频机器人控制，提升了策略生成效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 迭代采样的生成式策略（如扩散模型）在行为克隆上表现优异，但采样效率低，难以用于高频机器人控制；现有单步方法牺牲了漂移修正机制，难以保留专家行为的中间优化信息。
AI.method: IDP利用观测相似动作的局部变化，提取条件专家几何约束，并与全局参考几何对比，提取特定约束，通过权重调整目标函数和终端损失来直接约束单步生成器，从而免除直接估计漂移向量场的困难。
AI.result: 在2D、3D和真实操作任务中，IDP表现优于显式漂移方法，并可与主流单步基线竞争，有效保证动作合法性。
AI.conclusion: IDP在无需显式估计向量场情况下，将漂移修正机制引入单步模仿学习，提升了在高频控制任务中的实用性和性能。

title: OptiWorld: Optimal Control for Video World Generation under Physical Constraints
summary: Video generation models are becoming a scalable form of world models, but they mainly generate plausible motion rather than proactively control or optimize the underlying dynamics. As a result, an object in the generated video may follow trajectories that are unsafe, not smooth, inefficient, or physically inconsistent. In this work, we propose \textbf{OptiWorld}, a framework that brings classical optimal control into video generation at inference time. OptiWorld first extracts a compact, task-relevant world state, then plans an optimal trajectory under physical constraints, and finally renders the video conditioned on this trajectory. We formulate planning as a geometric problem on a continuous manifold, which converts 3D geometry and task-dependent physical constraints into a unified planning geometry. By adding this optimal-control layer, OptiWorld generates videos with preferable dynamics, demonstrating strong potential in multiple tasks including goal-conditioned image-to-video generation, video dynamics editing, and counterfactual generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OptiWorld方法，将经典最优控制引入视频生成过程，使生成视频中的物体运动更加安全、平滑、符合物理规律。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能产生合理的运动，但无法主动控制或优化运动动力学，可能导致生成的视频轨迹不安全、不平滑或物理不一致。为此，提出将最优控制思想用于视频生成。
AI.method: OptiWorld方法包含三步：（1）提取与任务相关的紧凑世界状态；（2）在物理约束下规划最优轨迹（将三维几何及物理约束转为连续流形上的几何规划问题）；（3）根据所规划轨迹生成视频。通过在推理阶段引入最优控制模块，引导视频中物体运动。
AI.result: OptiWorld能生成动态表现更优的视频，广泛适用于目标图像扩展为视频、视频动力学编辑、反事实视频生成等多种任务，表现出较强的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入最优控制，OptiWorld显著提升了视频生成中物体运动的合理性与多样性，为视频生成与编辑提供了新范式。

title: Revisiting Parameter-Based Knowledge Editing in Large Language Models: Theoretical Limits and Empirical Evidence
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Equal contribution by the first two authors. 9 pages main paper, 10 figures, with appendix
summary: Parameter-based knowledge editing updates the internal knowledge of large language models (LLMs) via localized weight modifications and has attracted significant attention. However, most existing methods overlook fundamental theoretical limitations and are rarely evaluated under realistic, practice-oriented settings. In this paper, we first present a theoretical analysis based on the dimensional Collapse Hypothesis, explaining how localized parameter edits can propagate along fragile directions in the representation space, inducing global interference and ultimately causing reasoning collapse. Building on this insight, we conduct a comprehensive empirical evaluation by systematically varying knowledge complexity, number of edits, evaluation dimensions, and baseline methods. Our results show that parameter-based editing methods consistently damage core LLM capabilities. In contrast, a simple retrieval-based baseline achieves consistently stronger performance than all parameter-editing methods across all evaluated conditions. These findings highlight that preserving the fundamental capabilities of LLMs after knowledge editing should be a central concern for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文指出参数编辑方法可能损害大模型核心能力，检验了当前方法的理论和实际局限，并发现检索式方法表现更优。
AI.motivation: 参数化的知识编辑在更新LLM知识时受到关注，但其理论限制和实际影响常被忽视，动机是深入剖析和量化这些方法的潜在问题。
AI.method: 首先提出了基于“维度坍塌假说”的理论分析，解释参数局部编辑如何通过表征空间的脆弱维度传播，引发推理崩溃。随后在多种设置下系统评估参数编辑与检索基线的表现。
AI.result: 实验证明参数编辑方法会持续损伤LLM的关键能力，而简单的检索式基线在所有设置下都优于参数编辑方法。
AI.conclusion: 论文指出，未来知识编辑工作中，需高度重视对模型核心能力的保护。

title: Tether-Aware Dynamic Collision Avoidance for USV-HROV Systems
summary: Heterogeneous marine robotic systems composed of an unmanned surface vehicle (USV) and a hybrid remotely operated vehicle (HROV) have shown great potential for subsea cable inspection. In such missions, the USV tracks the HROV at the surface while supplying power and communication through an umbilical tether. However, dynamic collision avoidance for the USV during HROV tracking is challenging because the submerged tether may scrape against passing vessels, while evasive maneuvers can enlarge the USV--HROV separation, thereby increasing the likelihood of tether tautness and compromising HROV operations. To address these challenges, this work proposes a tether-aware dynamic collision avoidance method for a USV tracking an HROV. First, a tether safety-aware planar domain is introduced to represent the three-dimensional collision risk between the tether and obstacle vessels without an explicit tether shape model. Second, a tether tautness-aware velocity obstacle method is developed to achieve safe avoidance while reducing the likelihood of tether tautness. Finally, the method is integrated with line-of-sight guidance to coordinate HROV tracking and collision avoidance. Gazebo-based simulations show that the proposed method avoids dynamic obstacle vessels while maintaining tether safety and reducing the likelihood of tether tautness during USV evasive maneuvers.

AI.tldr: 本文针对异构海洋机器人系统（USV与HROV组成）在水下电缆巡检任务中的动态避碰挑战，提出了一种考虑缆绳安全性的USV动态避碰方法，有效提升了安全性和提高了作业效率。
AI.motivation: 在海洋机器人协同作业中，表面无人艇（USV）通过缆绳为水下混合遥控机器人（HROV）供能及通信。但在USV动态避障时，缆绳会有被他船划擦、拉紧等问题，威胁系统安全与HROV作业。因此亟需兼顾缆绳安全和机器人协同的避障方法。
AI.method: 该方法首先引入一种基于缆绳安全的平面域，用于在无明确缆绳模型条件下表示三维中缆绳与障碍船之间的碰撞风险。其次，提出了一种考虑缆绳拉紧风险的速度障碍避障方法。最后，方法与视线引导互相结合，实现HROV跟踪与避障协调。
AI.result: 基于Gazebo仿真验证，所提方法能在USV规避动态障碍船时，有效保障缆绳安全，降低缆绳拉紧概率，维持HROV正常作业。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的缆绳安全驱动的动态避障方法可有效提升异构海洋机器人系统在恶劣海况下的安全性和执行效率，为实际水下协同作业提供可行思路。

title: V-LynX: Token Interface Alignment for Video+X LLMs
summary: This study introduces an intriguing phenomenon in Video LLMs: rather than merely translating frames into textual embeddings, Video LLMs establish a continuous manifold, token interface, allowing visual tokens to operate as standalone entities within the architecture. Exploiting this discovery, we propose V-LynX, a scalable framework that integrates novel modalities into Video LLMs by repurposing the internalized interface. Departing from conventional paradigms that necessitate heavy modality-specific encoders or paired supervision, V-LynX employs a lightweight auxiliary pathway in parallel with the frozen vision encoder. Our method integrates new sensory inputs with intrinsic video priors by aligning both attention responses and statistical distributions using unpaired unimodal data sets. This ensures manifold compatibility while preserving the integrity of the Video LLMs. Extensive benchmarks demonstrate that V-LynX achieves SOTA and efficiency across audio-visual QA, 3D reasoning, high-frame-rate, and multi-view video understanding. The code is available at https://github.com/park-jungin/lynx.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了Video LLMs中视觉token可作为独立实体参与架构运作，并提出了V-LynX框架，可高效扩展多模态输入，提升了多任务视频理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有Video LLM主要聚焦于视觉帧的文本嵌入转换，对于拓展新模态需大量专门编码器和成对监督，效率低。作者发现视觉token可作为独立接口，希望借助该特性提升视频LLM的可扩展性与多模态能力。
AI.method: 提出V-LynX框架，通过重用Video LLM内部的token接口，采用轻量级辅助通路并行于冻结视觉编码器，实现新模态（如音频、3D等）输入的引入。该方法无需大规模成对监督，仅用非配对的单模态数据集，通过对齐注意力响应和统计分布，保证新模态与原有流形兼容。
AI.result: 在多个视频相关任务如音视频问答、3D推理、高帧率和多视角视频理解等领域，V-LynX在准确性和效率上均达到了SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: V-LynX验证了视频LLM可通过流形兼容性无缝拓展多模态输入，为高效、多模态视频理解提供了新方案，并推动了相关领域技术进步。

title: Sandboxed Coding Agents are Competitive Omni-modal Task Solvers
summary: As multimodal LLMs increasingly target video and audio, it is often assumed that such tasks require native omnimodal models. We show that this is not always the case: coding agents with only text+image access and a sandboxed tool-use interface can match, and in several settings outperform, SOTA native omnimodal models and predefined multimodal agent scaffolds across multiple audio-video benchmarks. Our trajectory analysis suggests that their strength comes from writing code and orchestrating tools to extract relevant evidence from transcripts, frames, and other modality signals, thereby converting omnimodal tasks into retrieval and information-processing problems rather than ingesting entire media streams. We further characterize their limitations through a failure taxonomy and process-level trace analysis, and show that simple skill injection, including human-written and self-distilled skills, substantially improves performance. To explore open-source elicitation, we introduce Code-X, a training recipe with the OmniCoding trajectory dataset and verifiable reward, and provide baselines on Qwen-3.5-9B and Qwen-3.6-27B. Finally, we argue that the next frontier is many-modality processing, and introduce TerminalBench-O, a process-level benchmark for real-world omnimodal processing tasks. Code will be available at https://github.com/Dongping-Chen/OmniCoding.
