AI.tldr: 本论文发现，具备文本+图像处理能力和工具接口的代码智能体，可以在视频音频基准上与原生全模态模型媲美，甚至超越其表现。提出了Code-X训练方案和TerminalBench-O基准，并开放源代码。
AI.motivation: 近年来多模态大模型聚焦视频、音频处理，普遍认为需本地全模态模型支持，但这种假设缺乏系统验证。作者旨在探索文本+图像智能体配合代码调度工具，在复杂多模态任务中的潜能和局限。
AI.method: 以仅具文本+图像访问和沙盒工具接口的代码智能体为核心，对比现有全模态和多模态智能体在多项视频音频任务基准的表现。通过轨迹分析研究其优势，并构建失败案例与过程级追踪。引入人类撰写或自蒸馏的新技能以提升模型表现，开发OmniCoding数据集与训练配方Code-X，并在Qwen-3.5-9B、Qwen-3.6-27B上做基线实验。
AI.result: 结果显示，此类代码智能体在多个音频视频基准上可以媲美甚至超越原生全模态模型和既有多模态框架。在技能注入（如人类写的/自蒸馏技能）后性能显著提升，并通过失败分类与过程跟踪准确识别智能体局限。
AI.conclusion: 挑战全模态模型在多模态AI任务中的『唯一解』假设，表明结合文本、图像与高效工具链调度的代码智能体可有效完成复杂多模态任务。呼吁关注多模态进程级基准测试，并为社区提供开放框架和数据集以推动研究。

title: ImagineUAV: Aerial Vision-Language Navigation via World-Action Modeling and Kinodynamic Planning
summary: Vision-language navigation (VLN) for UAVs demands grounding free-form instructions into 6-DoF flight under partial observability. While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models excel at semantic reasoning, they suffer from brittleness due to geometric inconsistency and dynamics mismatch. To address this, we propose ImagineUAV, an imagination-driven framework leveraging cascaded world-action modeling. Instead of direct regression, ImagineUAV employs a latent video diffusion model to generate instruction-conditioned future observations, explicitly imagining environmental evolution, from which 6-DoF motions are inferred via an action extractor. A kinodynamic planner then refines these estimates into collision-free trajectories. Additionally, a step-distilled inference pipeline ensures real-time execution. With only 1.3B parameters, ImagineUAV outperforms prior VLN and VLA baselines on benchmarks and real-world flights, validating the practicality of imagination-driven aerial navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的无人机视觉-语言导航方法ImagineUAV，通过引入“想象”机制建模未来观测，实现更稳健的6自由度导航，在多个基准与实际飞行中超过以往方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型虽然能较好地理解指令与视觉语义，但对无人机导航来说，几何不一致和动力学匹配问题导致模型表现不稳定，因此需要更强环境理解与规划能力。
AI.method: ImagineUAV采用级联的世界-动作建模结构，使用潜变量视频扩散模型基于任务指令生成未来观测，从中通过动作提取器获得6自由度动作，并结合动力学规划进一步得到无碰撞导航轨迹；另设计推理流程使系统具备实时性。
AI.result: 在参数量仅为1.3B的情况下，ImagineUAV在多个基准和实际飞行测试中均显著超过现有VLN和VLA方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入“想象”建模理念，可大幅提升无人机视觉-语言导航的安全性与实际可用性，为复杂环境下的多模态机器人导航提供了新范式。

title: Structure-Aware Consistency Priors for Shape from Polarization in Complex Media
summary: Recovering surface normals from single view polarization images in complex media remains challenging. This paper focuses on ice as a representative complex medium, where intricate light matter interactions lead to a nonlinear mapping between polarization observations and surface normals. To address this, a structure-aware polarization prior based on autocorrelation functions is proposed to capture the local spatial consistency of AoLP. Building on this, a dual-branch network (IceSfP) is designed to integrate raw polarization features with priors via cross modal attention and multi-scale feature fusion, enabling accurate surface normal estimation under complex media conditions. To evaluate the method, the first real-world ice SfP dataset is constructed. Experimental results show that the method outperforms existing approaches across all metrics, achieving a MAE of 16.01 deg, which is 2.74 deg lower than the second-best method. The framework provides a generalizable solution for high-precision geometric perception in complex media.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对复杂介质（以冰为例）中表面法线恢复的新方法，结合结构感知先验和双分支神经网络，并建立了首个实测冰面极化数据集，实验效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在复杂介质如冰的单视角极化成像下，光与物质互动复杂，极化观测到表面法线的映射高度非线性，现有方法难以精准恢复法线信息，亟需新方法提升恢复精度。
AI.method: 首先引入基于自相关结构感知的极化先验用于捕捉极化角（AoLP）的空间一致性；然后设计了融合原始极化特征与先验的双分支网络（IceSfP），通过跨模态注意力和多尺度特征融合增强法线预测；并采集建立了首个真实冰面SfP数据集以验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 方法在新建冰面数据集上表现优异，主流评价指标均超越已有方法，平均绝对误差(MAE)为16.01度，较次优方法提升2.74度。
AI.conclusion: 该结构感知极化先验和双分支网络框架可在复杂介质下实现高精度法线估计，具有良好的泛化能力和推广价值。

title: SPADER: Step-wise Peer Advantage with Diversity-Aware Exploration Rewards for Multi-Answer Question Answering
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as tool-augmented agents to acquire information beyond parametric knowledge. While recent work has improved long-horizon tool-use reasoning, most approaches focus on tasks with a single correct answer. In contrast, many real-world queries require discovering a comprehensive set of valid answers, a setting known as Multi-Answer QA. This setting raises two challenges: fine-grained credit assignment over long search trajectories and reward alignment for sustained exploration beyond easy high-frequency entities. We propose SPADER, a reinforcement learning framework for long-horizon tool use in Multi-Answer QA. SPADER includes Step-wise Peer Advantage (SPA), a critic-free step-level credit assignment mechanism that aligns parallel trajectories by decision step and estimates advantages from peer returns. It also includes a diversity-aware exploration reward that promotes long-tail entity discovery by upweighting rare findings and downweighting redundant ones. Experiments on QAMPARI, Mintaka, WebQSP, and QUEST show that SPADER generally improves recall and overall F1 over prompting-based agents, outcome-supervised RL methods, and recent step-level supervision approaches. Our code and model weights are available at https://github.com/KhanCold/spader.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPADER强化学习框架，解决大语言模型在多答案问答中的长期工具使用问题，实现更全面的答案发现并提升多项指标。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的问答任务往往存在多个正确答案（Multi-Answer QA），传统方法多关注单一答案，难以全面覆盖所有正确答案，因此需要能更好地探索和收集多样答案的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了SPADER框架，引入创新的Step-wise Peer Advantage（SPA）机制进行无评论员的逐步奖励分配，通过与平行轨迹比较优势，并增加多样性驱动的探索奖励，鼓励发现低频长尾答案、抑制冗余答案。采用了强化学习训练方式，适用于多步骤工具调用情景。
AI.result: 在QAMPARI、Mintaka、WebQSP和QUEST多答案问答数据集上，SPADER在召回率和F1分数上优于基于提示的智能体、结果监督的强化学习方法及现有逐步监督方法，展现了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPADER有效提升了大语言模型在多答案问答任务中的全面探索与答案覆盖，能更好利用工具并发现稀有答案，有潜力推广至实际复杂查询任务。

title: Training-Free Imitation Learning with Closed-Form Diffusion Policies
summary: While diffusion-based policies have impressive performance and expressivity, their long offline training slows down the data collection and policy deployment loop. We introduce Closed-Form Diffusion Policies, a class of training-free diffusion-based policies for imitation learning using the closed-form score derived from the demonstration dataset. We deploy CFDP with real-time inference with a mobile CPU in hardware experiments, showing it can successfully perform imitation directly from the dataset in milliseconds and with faster inference than neural diffusion policies. In experiments on imitation learning benchmarks, we show that CFDP is competitive against neural baselines that require hours of training, providing a favorable tradeoff between training time and performance. Finally, we show how closed-form diffusion policies act as a composable primitive that enables data-driven inference-time editing of pre-trained neural diffusion policies, including policy guidance and novel demonstration augmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练即可使用的闭式扩散策略（CFDP），能在模仿学习任务中实现实时推理，同时推理速度快，性能媲美需要长时间训练的神经扩散策略。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的策略虽然表现和表达能力强，但离线训练耗时长，严重拖慢数据采集和策略部署流程。亟需一种训练效率高、推理速度快的方法。
AI.method: 作者直接从示范数据中导出闭式分数（closed-form score），构造出一种无需训练的基于扩散的模仿学习策略CFDP，并能够在手机CPU上实现实时推理。同时，提出该方法可作为神经扩散策略的可组合基元，在推理时实现数据驱动的编辑，如策略引导和演示增强。
AI.result: CFDP可在硬件实验中用移动CPU实现毫秒级推理，能直接从数据集中进行模仿。基准测试中，CFDP在训练时间与性能之间实现了良好平衡，速度快于神经扩散策略，性能极具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CFDP不仅减少了训练时长，还能实现实时推理和对已训练策略的灵活编辑，为扩散策略在模仿学习中的实际应用提供了新思路。

title: An Effective Solution for the CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure, CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 3
summary: In this work, we present our solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence (DOST). Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework Segment Any Motion (SegAnyMo), which provides powerful mask generation and motion tracking capabilities. To further boost the segmentation performance under severe atmospheric distortions, we propose two key improvements. First, we employ a data-centric domain adaptation strategy. We significantly expand our training data by incorporating selected sequences from the DAVIS dataset alongside a subset of the DOST dataset, and apply simulated atmospheric fluctuation degradations to enhance the model's robustness against complex geometric distortions. Second, we introduce a spatio-temporal post-processing module. This refinement step effectively removes persistent boundary-connected false foregrounds and short-lived fragmented noise, while strictly preserving genuine small targets and maintaining original individual labels across frames. With these combined strategies, our proposed method ranks the 2st place in the challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大气扰动下动态目标分割的新方法，在CVPR 2026的UG2+挑战赛DOST任务中取得了第二名。关键创新包括数据域自适应增强和时空后处理模块，有效提升了分割鲁棒性与精度。
AI.motivation: 大气扰动会极大影响动态目标分割的准确性，现有方法在复杂畸变场景下表现不佳。因此，作者希望提升模型在复杂大气扰动下的分割性能和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 方法基于SegAnyMo框架，主要提升有两点：1) 采用数据域自适应策略，结合DAVIS与DOST数据，通过模拟大气扰动增强模型适应性；2) 增加时空后处理模块，消除伪前景与噪声，同时保留真实小目标，维持标签一致性。
AI.result: 所提出方法在UG2+ DOST挑战中获得第二名，验证了其在严重大气畸变下分割和目标追踪效果的有效提升。
AI.conclusion: 数据域适应和时空后处理相结合，显著增强了动态目标分割在恶劣大气环境下的性能，为大气扰动场景下的视觉任务提供了有力方法参考。

title: Toward Responsible and Epistemically Grounded Multilingual LLMs for Computational Social Science and Humanities
summary: Large language models have rapidly evolved in multilingual competence and reasoning capacity, enabling their integration into Social Sciences and Humanities research workflows. Yet existing evaluation paradigms remain anchored in task-based NLP benchmarks and fail to address interpretive validity, cultural situatedness, and epistemic mediation. This paper reconceptualizes multilingual reasoning LLMs as hermeneutic instruments that actively structure meaning production across linguistic and cultural contexts. Drawing on hermeneutics, philosophy of technology, science and technology studies, multilingual NLP research, and computational social science methodology, we develop a theoretically grounded framework for evaluating multilingual reasoning in Social Sciences and Humanities (SSH) research. We articulate a rigorous experimental protocol with operationalized metrics for cultural alignment, cross-lingual stability, and reasoning faithfulness, along with transparency requirements tailored to interpretive research tasks. We illustrate the framework through a concrete application scenario involving multilingual political discourse analysis. The paper contributes a conceptual and methodological foundation for responsible integration of multilingual reasoning LLMs into computational social science infrastructures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用大语言模型（LLM）作为解释性工具的全新视角，聚焦多语种推理能力在社会科学与人文学科中的应用与评估。
AI.motivation: 目前对于LLM的评估多停留在NLP任务型基准上，未能考虑解读的有效性、文化语境以及知识中介等社会人文相关的重要层面。
AI.method: 作者借助解释学、技术哲学、科技与社会(STS)、多语言NLP和计算社会科学方法等多学科理论，设计了评估多语种推理LLM的理论框架，并提出包含文化契合度、跨语种稳定性、推理可信度以及透明度在内的实验流程和量化指标。通过多语种政治话语分析的案例验证了该框架。
AI.result: 提出了操作性强、理论基础扎实的多语种推理LLM评估方案，能具体测量与社会科学研究相关的指标，并在具体案例中得到有效应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为多语种推理LLM在社会科学与人文学科中的责任集成提供了坚实的理论与方法基础，有助于推动其在学科基础设施中的实际应用。

title: OneVLA: A Unified Framework for Embodied Tasks
summary: Navigation and manipulation are fundamental capabilities of embodied intelligence, enabling robots to interpret natural language commands and interact physically with their surroundings. However, current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain constrained by task-specific architectures, specializing in either navigation or manipulation, which hinders the development of general-purpose robotic agents. To bridge this gap, we introduce OneVLA, a unified architecture that integrates these distinct tasks into a single, cohesive framework. Specifically, we design a unified action head capable of generating both navigation and manipulation actions without requiring task-specific variants. Furthermore, we propose a multi stage progressive training strategy-incorporating curated data construction and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fine-tuning that facilitates strong positive transfer and mutual reinforcement between the two domains. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that OneVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming both specialized single-task and existing cross-task models. By unifying these core capabilities, OneVLA paves the way for truly general-purpose robotic systems. The model and source code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OneVLA，一种统一的视觉-语言-行为（VLA）模型，首次同时支持机器人导航与操作两项核心任务，并在真实与模拟环境中取得了领先结果。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型通常只能解决导航或操作中的单一任务，架构过于任务专用，制约了通用机器人的发展。作者为了解决这一问题，目标是设计能处理多任务的统一VLA模型。
AI.method: 作者提出了OneVLA架构，采用统一的action head，可无需任务划分地处理导航与操作。此外，提出了多阶段、逐步的训练策略，包括精心设计的数据集构建及Chain-of-Thought微调，实现任务间的积极迁移与强化。
AI.result: OneVLA在模拟与真实环境的多个实验中，明显优于只针对单一任务的模型及现有的跨任务VLA模型，刷新了性能指标。
AI.conclusion: OneVLA成功实现了导航与操作的统一，推动了通用机器人系统的发展。模型与代码将公开，有望促进该领域研究。

title: ETC: Extreme Token Compression via Task-aware Visual Information Distillation in VLMs
summary: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), high-resolution images produce a large number of visual tokens, resulting in high computational costs and KV-cache overhead during inference. To address this problem, we propose an Extreme Token Compression (ETC) framework that minimizes task loss when reducing the number of input tokens based on the principle of variational information distillation. Specifically, from an information-theoretic perspective, we show that minimizing task loss requires the compact representation to preserve the instruction-aware sufficient statistic of the task-relevant visual information for prediction. In practice, ETC leverages text-to-image cross-attention to weight the original visual features to approximate the latent instruction-aware predictive statistic. Moreover, ETC introduces a variational information distillation, enabling the compact representation to preserve the essential information to recover this predictive statistic. Experiments on LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen3-VL-2B show that ETC remains effective even under single-token compression, substantially reducing KV-cache overhead while retaining strong task performance.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉语言模型高分辨率图片带来的高计算和KV-cache成本，ETC 框架通过极致压缩视觉 token，同时保持任务表现。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图片导致视觉token数量大量增加，从而带来推理时计算和存储（KV-cache）开销过大。
AI.method: 提出Extreme Token Compression（ETC）框架，通过变分信息蒸馏原理，利用文本到图像的cross-attention权重对视觉特征，压缩输入token数量，并在压缩过程中保留与任务相关的重要统计信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，在LLaVA-1.5-7B 和 Qwen3-VL-2B模型上，ETC 框架在单token压缩下依然有效，显著降低KV-cache占用，同时保持较强任务性能。
AI.conclusion: ETC可以极大降低视觉语言模型的存储和计算开销，并且不显著损失模型在下游任务上的表现。

title: Linguistics-Aware Non-Distortionary LLM Watermarking
summary: Watermarking should identify language-model output without degrading quality or limiting verification to the model provider. Multilingual deployment makes this harder because morphology, segmentation, and script change where watermark evidence can enter naturally. We introduce LUNA, a linguistically adaptive watermark that combines model-free detection with single-token non-distortion under the standard random-key model. LUNA estimates normalized next-tag entropy from part-of-speech contexts in an external corpus and uses it to set the depth of a non-distortionary binary tournament sampler; the detector reconstructs the same schedule from text, a tokenizer, a tagger, and a secret key. We evaluate six typologically diverse languages and two domains against eight primary baselines. LUNA attains an AUROC of 0.9959 and the lowest mean absolute median perplexity shift of 0.045 across the twelve settings; its 95% bootstrap interval [0.022, 0.073] lies below all baseline intervals. LUNA also records the lowest mean Self-BLEU, Distinct-1, surprisal, and entropy shifts. It is the only method that simultaneously achieves AUROC > 0.99 and an absolute median perplexity shift below 0.1 in a majority of settings, reaching this regime in 9 of the 12 settings while no baseline reaches it in more than 2. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Shinwoo-Park/luna_watermark

AI.tldr: LUNA是一种新型多语言自适应水印方法，能在保持文本质量的前提下准确识别AI文本，且无需依赖特定模型。
AI.motivation: 多语言环境下，对生成文本添加水印以辨别AI输出变得更复杂，传统方法在不同语言、语法结构和书写系统中表现有限。需要一种既不影响文本质量、又无需限定验证方的水印方法。
AI.method: 提出LUNA方法：利用外部语料库中的词性上下文估计归一化下一个生成标签的信息熵，然后用该熵值设定二元抽样深度，实现不扭曲单个token（非失真）条件下的数据嵌入。检测时使用文本、tokenizer、词性标注器和密钥重现同样的抽样计划以进行水印识别。
AI.result: 在六种语言、两个领域与八个主流基线方法对比中，LUNA取得了0.9959的AUROC和0.045的平均困惑度中位数偏移（95%置信区间[0.022, 0.073]，均低于所有基线），以及最低的Self-BLEU、Distinct-1意外度和熵偏移。LUNA是唯一能在大多数设置下同时达成AUROC>0.99及困惑度中位数偏移<0.1的方法（12组实验中9组达标，基线均不超2组）。
AI.conclusion: LUNA为多语言AI文本水印提供了高鲁棒性、无需依赖模型、几乎无文本质量影响的有效策略，优于当前所有主流方法。相关代码已开源，有助于未来多语言、大规模场景的文本水印应用。

title: DeepIPCv3: Event-Aware Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion for Sudden Pedestrian Crossing Avoidance
summary: Current end-to-end autonomous driving systems predominantly rely on frame-based sensors, which suffer from inherent perception latency and motion blur during highly dynamic encounters, specifically sudden pedestrian crossings. To address this critical safety vulnerability, we propose DeepIPCv3, a novel multi-modal autonomous navigation framework that synergizes the dense 3D spatial geometry of LiDAR point clouds with the microsecond-level asynchronous event streams of a Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS). We introduce a Transformer-inspired cross-modal attention mechanism to dynamically correlate these distinct modalities, allowing the network to instantaneously prioritize high-speed dynamic updates without sacrificing structural scene awareness. The fused latent representations are then mapped to safe local waypoints and executable control commands via a hybrid policy network that blends heuristic trajectory tracking with direct neural predictions. Due to the severe physical risks associated with live testing of these sudden crossing scenarios, the framework is rigorously evaluated offline using a custom multi-modal dataset collected across both well-illuminated noon and challenging evening conditions. Extensive comparative and ablation studies demonstrate that DeepIPCv3 achieves state-of-the-art predictive performance. By effectively eliminating exposure failures and motion blur, the proposed LiDAR and DVS fusion yields the lowest trajectory and control command errors, enabling highly reactive, mathematically bounded evasive maneuvers regardless of ambient illumination. To support future research, we will release the codes to our GitHub repo at https://github.com/oskarnatan/DeepIPCv3.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合LiDAR点云与DVS事件流的新型多模态自动驾驶导航系统DeepIPCv3，并利用Transformer风格的跨模态注意力机制实时应对突发行人穿越等动态场景，显著提升了感知与控制性能。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶系统主要依赖帧式传感器，面临感知延迟和运动模糊问题，尤其在高速动态事件（如突发行人出现）下存在安全隐患。为弥补这一感知短板，作者希望融合更时效性的传感器和更强的多模态感知能力。
AI.method: 作者提出DeepIPCv3架构，将LiDAR的稠密3D空间信息和动态视觉传感器（DVS）的微秒级异步事件流进行融合，采用受Transformer启发的跨模态注意力机制，即时关联、突出动态信息。最终通过混合策略网络，将融合特征输出为安全路径点及控制命令。（策略网络结合了启发式轨迹跟踪与神经网络预测）
AI.result: 通过自建多模态数据集，在明亮正午和复杂傍晚环境下离线测试，对比和消融实验显示：DeepIPCv3的预测性能优于现有方法，融合LiDAR与DVS数据能有效规避曝光失败和运动模糊，轨迹及控制命令误差最低。
AI.conclusion: DeepIPCv3实现了高反应、高安全性的自动驾驶导航，尤其提升了对突发动态事件的应对能力，具有环境光鲁棒性和可推广性。代码和数据集将开源，为相关研究发展提供支持。

title: CAFOSat: A Strongly Annotated Dataset for Infrastructure-Aware CAFO Mapping Using High-Resolution Imagery
comment: Accepted at CVPR Workshop-2026. First two authors has equal contribution
summary: Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) play an important role in agricultural production but are also associated with environmental, public health, and disease surveillance concerns. Large-scale mapping of CAFOs from remote sensing imagery remains challenging due to heterogeneous infrastructure layouts, noisy location records, inconsistent annotations, and incomplete inventories. We introduce CAFOSat, a strongly annotated, infrastructure-aware dataset for CAFO mapping across the United States. CAFOSat integrates high-resolution National Agriculture Imagery Program (NAIP) imagery with multi-source CAFO inventories collected across multiple states and transforms weak geolocation records into refined annotations through a human-in-the-loop pipeline combining AI-assisted annotation, GradCAM-based localization, and geometric clustering. To improve dataset quality, we curate challenging negative samples using land-cover-guided sampling with spatial exclusion constraints and provide infrastructure-level annotations, including barns, manure ponds, and grazing-related features, through manual verification. The resulting dataset contains more than 45,000 image patches spanning 20 states and four major CAFO categories. We benchmark a diverse set of convolutional, transformer-based, and vision-language models, demonstrating the value of refined annotations and curated negative samples for CAFO classification and generalization. In addition, we introduce a synthetic augmentation pipeline that generates infrastructure-aware variations to increase training diversity and improve robustness under distribution shifts. CAFOSat provides a large-scale benchmark for advancing infrastructure-aware agricultural monitoring and CAFO mapping from high-resolution remote sensing imagery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并构建了CAFOSat，一个针对美国CAFO（集中式畜禽养殖场）的大规模强标注遥感数据集，为基础设施感知的农业监测和CAFO制图提供了重要资源。
AI.motivation: CAFO对农业生产极为重要，但其环境及健康影响备受关注。现有遥感下CAFO制图因地理标注不准确、基础设施布局异质等问题面临困难。缺乏高质量标准数据集，限制了相关自动化监测和研究进展。
AI.method: 整合多州多源CAFO数据与高分遥感影像，通过人机协同的AI辅助标注，结合GradCAM定位和几何聚类，生成精细标注。采用土地覆盖引导的负样本采集、人工审核基础设施（如畜舍、粪池等），并引入基础设施感知的数据增强方式扩展数据多样性。评测多种深度学习模型。
AI.result: 得到包含超4.5万个图像块，覆盖20州及四大CAFO类型的高分辨率数据集。实验证明，精细标注和高质量负样本显著提升模型对CAFO识别及泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: CAFOSat数据集为利用遥感影像开展农业基础设施监测及CAFO自动识别、进而改善环境与健康监控研究，提供了高价值基准和创新方法。

title: MemPro: Agentic Memory Systems as Evolvable Programs
summary: Long-horizon autonomous agents require memory systems to retain historical information, track evolving states, and reuse relevant knowledge beyond finite context windows. Existing agentic memory systems typically follow a memory construction-retrieval (MCR) pipeline, but often adapt mainly the memory bank while keeping the surrounding pipeline fixed after deployment. This fixed-pipeline design struggles to handle heterogeneous task-specific failure modes and can become misaligned with memory banks that evolve in scale and structure over time. To address these limitations, we propose MemPro, a system-level evolution framework that treats the entire MCR pipeline as an evolvable program rather than adapting only the memory bank or prompt text. MemPro maintains a version tree of runnable memory-system implementations, where an Evolving Agent iteratively selects promising versions, diagnoses recurring failures, and creates improved child versions through failure-mode-guided edit-debug refinement. Experiments on LongMemEval, LoCoMo, HotpotQA, and NarrativeQA show that MemPro consistently outperforms strong static and prompt-level evolving baselines within a few iterations, continues to improve with evolution, and achieves a favorable performance-cost trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/wanghai673/MemPro.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种系统级可演化记忆系统MemPro，能够动态优化长时序自主体的记忆管理流程，并在多个基准任务中优于现有静态及提示级可演化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有长时序自主体的记忆系统大多只在记忆库层面做调整，而保持整个记忆处理流程固定，这限制了它们针对不同任务特有的失败模式和日益扩展的记忆结构做出适应调整。
AI.method: MemPro将整个记忆构建-检索（MCR）流水线视作可演化程序，通过维护实现版本树，由演化代理选择、诊断并改进记忆流水线，通过针对性地编辑和调试演化出更优版本。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval、LoCoMo、HotpotQA和NarrativeQA等实验中，MemPro在仅需数轮迭代后持续超越强静态和提示级演化基线，并在性能与成本方面取得更优权衡。
AI.conclusion: MemPro使记忆系统能够跟随任务和记忆结构变化动态进化，显著提升长时序自主体在各种任务中的表现，对实现更智能的自主体记忆管理具有重要意义。

title: PSG-Nav: Probabilistic Scene Graph Navigation via Multiverse Decision Making
summary:
Open-vocabulary navigation requires embodied agents to manage significant perception uncertainty stemming from semantic ambiguity and model errors.
  However, most existing works settle for local optimal deterministic approaches, depriving complex navigation decision-making over multiple composite possibilities that are critical for globally better solutions.
  In this paper, we propose Probabilistic Scene Graph Navigation (PSG-Nav), which constructs a 3D Probabilistic Scene Graph that uses full semantic categorical distributions to account for perception uncertainty.
  To efficiently use the local distributions to compose and reason about the optimal navigation landmarks, we propose Multiverse Decision to sample multiple most likely world settings from the joint distribution, and evaluate navigation landmarks based on the compatibility between landmarks and multiverses.
  To mitigate false positives due to epistemic uncertainty in open-vocabulary navigation, we introduce the Evidential Experience Calibrator, which enables online lifelong adaptation by cross-validating detections against memories of past successes and failures.
  Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks MP3D, HM3D, and HSSD demonstrate that PSG-Nav establishes new state-of-the-art results, achieving Success Rates of 66.1%, 44.8%, and 67.9%, respectively. Code is available at: https://psg-nav.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的概率场景图导航方法PSG-Nav，通过引入概率场景建模和多世界采样，有效应对开放词汇导航中的感知不确定性问题，并在主流基准上刷新最优表现。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇导航要求主体在语义模糊和模型误差带来的高感知不确定性下完成复杂决策，现有方法大多采用局部确定性策略，难以得到最优全局路径。
AI.method: 方法分为三部分：1）构建3D概率场景图，对场景中每个类别采用全概率分布建模不确定性；2）提出Multiverse Decision机制，从联合分布中采样多个最可能场景组合，用以多重世界假设下推理最优导航路径；3）开发Evidential Experience Calibrator，利用历史成败经验对当前检测进行交叉验证，实现在线、终身自适应。
AI.result: 在MP3D、HM3D和HSSD等主流导航基准上，PSG-Nav分别取得了66.1%、44.8%和67.9%的成功率，均创下新的SOTA成绩。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了概率化场景建模、多重世界推理和证据自适应机制能有效提升开放词汇导航中的全局决策能力和导航性能。

title: Improving Visual Grounding in Remote Sensing via Cluster-Guided Refinement and Model Ensemble Voting
summary: Visual grounding aims to locate image regions that correspond to natural language descriptions and is a key component of interpretable vision systems. In remote sensing imagery, grounding is particularly challenging due to complex scenes, small objects, and large variations in scale. Relying on a single model is often insufficient to address these diverse challenges. In this work, we propose two grounding pipelines, Sequential Grounding Refinement (SGR) and Cluster-Aware Grounding Refinement (CGR), that combine the complementary strengths of RemoteSAM, a visual grounding model specialized for remote sensing, and SAM3, a powerful general-purpose segmentation model. Our approach first uses RemoteSAM to obtain an initial estimate of object location, which is then refined using SAM3 to produce more accurate and spatially consistent segmentations. Additionally, we explore an ensemble strategy based on majority voting across six diverse grounding pipelines, each with distinct capabilities. This multi-model framework improves robustness and significantly enhances localization accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed pipelines and ensemble approach outperform individual models, leading to more reliable and precise visual grounding predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模型集成的遥感图像视觉定位方法，有效提升了语言与图像间的区域对应准确性。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像视觉定位因场景复杂、物体小、尺度变化大而极具挑战。单一模型难以应对所有挑战，因此需要结合多模型的优势以提升定位准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者提出了顺序定位细化（SGR）和聚类感知定位细化（CGR）两种管道，结合专为遥感设计的RemoteSAM和通用分割模型SAM3。首先用RemoteSAM粗定位目标位置，然后利用SAM3进一步细化分割。此外，引入多达六种不同模型能力的集成策略，通过多数投票进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的多模型流程和集成方法在定位准确率和鲁棒性上均优于单一模型。
AI.conclusion: 多模型协同与集成策略在遥感图像视觉定位任务中可显著提升分割精度和稳定性，对实际应用具有重要价值。

title: Robust Reasoning via Dynamic Token Selection for Distribution-Aligned Self-Distillation
summary: Self-distillation improves learning efficiency by rewriting reference answers as training data that better matches the model's own distribution. However, reference answers also introduce strong stylistic biases, causing the generative model to imitate surface forms rather than learn useful reasoning patterns. We observe that the rewriting data contains a large number of high-perplexity (PPL) tokens, coming from two distinct sources: beneficial knowledge-enhancing logical corrections, and harmful stylistic drift induced by reference imitation. Treating all such tokens equally can disrupt the base model's original distribution and degrade performance, especially on difficult reasoning tasks. To address this, we propose Distribution-Aligned Self-Distillation (DASD), which uses an answer-aware reference model to generate candidate tokens and dynamically filters them according to the base model's confidence. DASD preserves tokens that encode useful logical knowledge while suppressing distributionally misaligned style noise. Experiments on math, code, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks show that DASD consistently outperforms competitive baselines, reduces high-PPL tokens, and improves robustness across tasks of varying difficulty.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了DASD方法，通过自蒸馏优化模型训练数据分布，有效降低风格偏差，提高在多项任务上的推理效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的自蒸馏方法虽能提升学习效率，但容易带来风格偏移问题，使模型模仿参考答案的表面表达而非理解底层推理能力，尤其在复杂推理任务下影响较大。
AI.method: 提出Distribution-Aligned Self-Distillation (DASD) 方法，利用感知答案的参考模型生成候选tokens，并依据基础模型的置信度动态筛选，有效保留包含有益逻辑知识的tokens，抑制仅有风格上的偏移噪声。
AI.result: DASD在数学、代码、常识推理等多项基准任务上均优于当前主流baseline，显著减少高困惑度（PPL）token比例，且在不同难度下均表现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DASD方法能缓解自蒸馏带来的分布失调和风格噪声问题，提升生成模型学习有效推理的能力，增强多任务下模型整体表现。

title: S2M-Trek: From Single to Multi-Sphere Transport via Per-Frame Deep Sets on a Wheel-Legged Robot
summary: We study the problem of scaling dynamic loco-manipulation from a single free-rolling sphere to multiple spheres transported simultaneously on the back of a wheel-legged quadruped, without fences, grippers, or mechanical stops. Multiple identical free-rolling spheres form an unordered set with no persistent identity: their ordering may change independently at each history frame, creating a \emph{per-frame permutation symmetry} that standard history-concatenation set encoders do not explicitly enforce -- these encoders impose only a shared, diagonal permutation symmetry over the full history. We show that this symmetry mismatch leads to a concrete failure mode in curriculum-based reinforcement learning. Within the same PPO training budget, flat MLPs and branch-wise encoders plateau at or below the two-sphere stage, while a history-concatenation Deep Sets baseline (\HCDS) fails to progress past the two-sphere stage in our runs unless ball-to-slot assignments are randomised during training, suggesting that it exploits slot indices as a curriculum shortcut rather than learning identity-free multi-sphere dynamics. We propose \textbf{Per-Frame Deep Sets (\PFDS)}, which performs permutation-invariant pooling within each history frame before temporal readout; we prove that \PFDS is $\Gframe$-invariant and universally approximates continuous $\Gframe$-invariant policies. A $2{\times}2$ ablation over encoder architecture and slot randomisation separates the architectural and data-augmentation pathways, and \PFDS reaches the five-sphere stage with 100\% no-drop transport in simulation across all five random seeds. We further distill the \PFDS teacher into \TactSet via DAgger, replacing privileged sphere-state observations with a $16{\times}16$ Boolean union contact map, yielding a compact and naturally $\Gframe$-invariant tactile representation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无机械约束或夹持器的情况下，带腿四足机器人背部同时运输多个自由滚动球体的动态操作问题，提出了每帧深度集合（Per-Frame Deep Sets, PFDS）方法来应对球体在历史帧中的置换对称性缺陷，使得多球体操作效率显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的强化学习编码方法无法很好地处理多球体操作中的每帧置换对称性，导致随着球体数量增加，策略训练容易陷入局部最优，无法实现高效的多球体动态操作。
AI.method: 作者提出了Per-Frame Deep Sets（PFDS）编码器，对历史帧中的每一帧单独进行置换不变的聚合池化，理论证明其对于球体的每帧置换具有不变性，并可近似任意连续的不变策略。此外，通过2x2消融实验和数据增强，将PFDS与随机球位分配相比，对比不同编码与数据处理路径对表现的影响。
AI.result: 在相同的PPO训练预算下，传统MLP及分支编码器最多只能处理两个球体，标准Deep Sets若不混淆球位，同样无法突破两球瓶颈。而PFDS编码器在五个随机种子下，成功实现了100%的无落球五球运输。
AI.conclusion: PFDS有效地解决了多球体操作中的置换对称性难题，显著提升了动态操作能力，并且可通过教师-学生模型蒸馏，用低维触觉表示替代特权观测，进一步增强其实用性和泛化能力。

title: DeepLatent: Think with Images via Parallel Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: The emerging paradigm of "thinking with images" embeds visual states into intermediate reasoning steps, defining a new frontier for Vision-Language Models. Existing approaches diverge along two lines. Tool-assisted methods apply explicit visual operations but suffer from high latency and restricted manipulation types. Latent reasoning methods autoregressively produce implicit visual states, but underperform tool-assisted methods, and their latent tokens fail to capture effective visual information. In this work, we propose DeepLatent, a parallel framework for latent visual reasoning. First, we introduce LatentFormer. It uses learnable 2D tokens to generate context-conditioned latent states in parallel, anchoring every visual update directly in the original image features. Second, we design a continuous-space reinforcement learning algorithm. It optimizes latent modulation parameters directly in the embedding space, significantly improving latent representation quality. The framework is trained via knowledge distillation followed by this continuous-space RL algorithm. Furthermore, we contribute DeepLatent-180K, a large-scale dataset tailored for latent visual reasoning. Extensive evaluations across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DeepLatent achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉-语言推理范式DeepLatent，能够高效并行地生成和优化隐空间中的视觉状态，并显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有“以图像思维”的视觉-语言模型存在两类路线：一是通过工具辅助显式操作，但速度慢且操作受限；二是通过隐空间自回归生成视觉状态，但效果不佳且视觉信息捕获能力有限。因此，需要一种方法结合两者优势，提升推理效率及视觉状态表达能力。
AI.method: 1）提出LatentFormer，采用可学习2D token并行生成与原始图像特征相关联的隐空间视觉状态。2）设计连续空间强化学习算法，直接优化隐空间内的调制参数，提升表示质量。整个框架先通过知识蒸馏预训练，再用连续空间RL算法优化。此外，构建了DeepLatent-180K大规模数据集，专用于隐空间视觉推理。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，DeepLatent取得了当前最优的性能，显著优于工具辅助方法和自回归隐空间方法。
AI.conclusion: DeepLatent展示了高效、强表达的隐空间视觉推理能力，为视觉-语言理解开辟了新路径，既兼顾了效率又提升了性能，具有良好的推广应用前景。

title: French parsing enhanced with a word clustering method based on a syntactic lexicon
summary: This article evaluates the integration of data extracted from a French syntactic lexicon, the Lexicon-Grammar (Gross, 1994), into a probabilistic parser. We show that by applying clustering methods on verbs of the French Treebank (Abeillé et al., 2003), we obtain accurate performances on French with a parser based on a Probabilistic Context-Free Grammar (Petrov et al., 2006).

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何将法语句法词典Lexicon-Grammar中的数据整合到概率分析器中，并通过聚类法提升法语句法分析的准确率。
AI.motivation: 法语句法分析是自然语言处理的重要任务，但现有的分析器在处理复杂结构和词汇知识时仍有提升空间。作者希望通过利用Lexicon-Grammar这种丰富的词汇-句法资源，提高分析准确性。
AI.method: 作者将Lexicon-Grammar中提取的数据整合到基于概率上下文无关文法（PCFG）的句法分析器中，并对法语树库中的动词进行了聚类，以改进分析模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合聚类方法后，基于PCFG的句法分析器在法语句法分析任务上取得了更高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合丰富的句法词典资源和词汇聚类技术可以有效提升法语概率句法分析器的性能。

title: ActMVS: Active Scene Reconstruction with Monocular Multi-View Stereo
summary: Active scene reconstruction enables robots/UAVs to autonomously plan trajectories and reconstruct environments without costly manual data acquisition. Unlike passive methods, active reconstruction requires real-time construction of high-confidence occupancy maps for collision-free navigation. Existing approaches rely on depth sensors for occupancy map updates, increasing platform cost and weight. To advance spatial intelligence, we aim for a vision-only monocular solution. However, current monocular scene reconstruction methods operate offline and fail to deliver globally consistent dense depth at the frame rates required for robots/UAVs navigation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ActMVS, the first framework for monocular active reconstruction. Our framework integrates a view factor graph construction for informed Multi-View Stereo depth prediction, along with a global depth optimization, to enable the online generation of high-quality, globally consistent dense depth maps. This enables monocular robots/UAVs to maintain reliable occupancy maps for safe trajectory planning during reconstruction. Experiments on Replica datasets demonstrate performance competitive with RGB-D methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/TrickyGo/ActMVS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ActMVS框架，实现了视觉单目下的主动场景重建，在不依赖深度传感器的前提下，能够在线生成高质量的稠密深度图，支持机器人/无人机进行安全的轨迹规划和环境建图。
AI.motivation: 现有主动重建依赖深度传感器，导致机器人/无人机的成本和重量增加；而视觉单目的方法多为离线且速度慢，难以应用于实时导航和地图构建，因此亟须轻量、实时且精度高的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ActMVS框架，引入视点因子图用于多视角立体（MVS）深度预测，并进行全局深度优化，实现了单目条件下在线、全局一致且稠密的深度估计和占据图更新。
AI.result: 在Replica数据集上实验，ActMVS单目方法的表现已接近RGB-D方法，具备实用性和竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ActMVS首次实现了基于单目视觉的实时主动场景重建，为低成本、轻量级机器人/无人机的自主导航和环境建图提供了一种可行方案。

title: Decomposed On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Reasoning: Steering Gradients for Visual Grounding
summary: While on-policy distillation offers dense supervision for training small reasoning models, its optimization dynamics in the multimodal domain remain under-explored. In this work, we challenge the standard monolithic view of Vision-Language Model (VLM) distillation by mathematically decomposing the loss into two distinct components: the language prior and visual grounding. Our analysis uncovers that gradient vectors for these components are nearly orthogonal, indicating that the objective of aligning with the teacher's language distribution is geometrically independent from the objective of matching its visual perception. Consequently, standard optimization passively follows a suboptimal compromise trajectory that implicitly balances the two objectives. Hypothesizing that visual grounding constitutes the primary bottleneck for vision-language reasoning, we introduce Visual Gradient Steering (VGS), a method that dynamically reorients the update vector to prioritize the visual subspace. Experimental results on multiple distillation settings and complex multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that VGS significantly outperforms the standard monolithic formulation of on-policy distillation, achieving superior grounding with minimal training overhead.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了视觉-语言模型(VLM)蒸馏中的损失，提出了视觉梯度引导(VGS)方法来优化多模态推理模型的训练，显著提升了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 当前小型多模态推理模型的训练过程中，主流的on-policy蒸馏方法虽然提供了密集监督，但针对其优化动力学的研究较少，特别是各损失分量在视觉-语言领域如何互相作用尚不清晰。
AI.method: 作者提出将VLM蒸馏的总损失数学分解为语言先验和视觉定位两个独立部分，并分析二者梯度几乎正交。基于视觉定位是主要瓶颈的假设，提出Visual Gradient Steering(VGS)方法，训练时优先沿视觉子空间引导更新。
AI.result: 在多种蒸馏设定和复杂多模态基准上实验，VGS方法优于传统单一损失蒸馏方式，在几乎不增加训练成本的情况下显著提升了视觉定位效果。
AI.conclusion: VGS有效突破了视觉-语言模型蒸馏中的瓶颈，改善了模型推理性能，为多模态蒸馏优化提供了新思路。

title: LinguIUTics at PsyDefDetect: Iterative Imbalance-Aware Fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B for Psychological Defense Mechanism Classification
comment: Accepted at PsyDefDetect, a shared task at the 25th BioNLP Workshop (BioNLP 2026), co-located with ACL 2026 in San Diego, CA, USA
summary: Detecting psychological defense mechanisms in conversational text remains a challenging clinical NLP problem. For the PsyDefDetect 2026 shared task (nine-class utterance classification evaluated via macro F1), our team LinguIUTics achieves a macro F1-score of 0.3917 on the official positive-class leaderboard, ranking 4th out of 21 registered teams and improving over the Ministral-8B task baseline (31.48 macro F1) by 7.7 absolute points (24.4 percent relative). BERT-family encoders and zero-shot LLMs proved ineffective on rare classes due to severe class imbalance, leading us to QLoRA fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B. We leverage three key strategies: grouped stratified cross-validation (preventing leakage), minority-class round-robin lexical augmentation, and a post-processing pipeline with logit bias tuning and ensemble blending. Together, these components close much of the validation-to-leaderboard gap and substantially improve minority-class recall, driving the critical "Unclear" class (Level 8) from near-zero performance to an F1 score of 0.797.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新方法来检测对话文本中的心理防御机制，并在PsyDefDetect 2026比赛中获得了优异成绩。
AI.motivation: 心理防御机制的自动检测是临床NLP中的一项挑战，尤其是在对类别极度不平衡的数据集下。
AI.method: 方法包括三个核心策略：1）分组分层交叉验证，防止数据泄露；2）少数类别轮转分词增强，提升稀有类表现；3）后处理流程，结合logit偏置调整和集成混合。主要模型采用Qwen3-8B，通过QLoRA微调。
AI.result: 该团队在官方排行榜上macro F1达到0.3917，排名第4，较基线提升了7.7百分点，显著提升了少数类的召回，尤其是关键的“Unclear”类别F1从接近零提升至0.797。
AI.conclusion: 采用针对类别不平衡的新策略和QLoRA微调显著提升了心理防御机制检测模型的性能，尤其在少数和难判别类别上效果突出。

title: Autopilot-Preserving Residual Q-Learning with HJB-Inspired Finite-Action Risk Filtering for Fixed-Wing UAV Command Supervision
comment: 47 pages, 12 figures, 20 tables. Simulation-based study with a code-traceable benchmark, source code and a demonstration video are linked in the paper
summary: A fixed-wing UAV must hold airspeed, altitude, and heading references under wind, gusts, and turbulence, channels coupled so that correcting one can degrade another. Classical autopilots stabilize the airframe well but adapt poorly when a hard crosswind meets an aggressive turn, while reinforcement-learning (RL) policies acting directly on the surfaces concentrate exploration risk at the actuator interface. We place a learned supervisor above an unchanged autopilot rather than inside it: it selects a residual from a finite, bounded action set on the commanded airspeed, altitude, and heading; the modified reference is projected into an admissible command envelope before reaching the autopilot, which stays the only actuator-facing controller. What is new is how the residual is chosen. HJB residual scores candidates with a semi-discrete value-iteration critic in the spirit of the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation, ranks them by a no-op-relative Hamiltonian advantage, and filters them through a control-Lyapunov- and control-barrier-inspired finite-action shield that always keeps a no-op fallback. On a shared 12-state runtime holding the plant, autopilot, and actuator model fixed, so the comparison is at the package level, HJB residual lowers mean RMS path-tracking error to 44.809 m, against 338.617 m for the baseline autopilot and 88.809 m for a tabular-Q residual, an 86.77% reduction over the baseline and 49.54% over Q-learning. The gain concentrates where the baseline fails worst and comes with a measured rise in airspeed error, so no method dominates every metric. We present this autopilot-preserving residual command-supervision design and benchmark with its trade-offs reported intact.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种固定翼无人机（UAV）的飞行控制新方法，通过在传统自动驾驶仪之上添加智能监督器，实现多通道耦合情况下的更优路径跟踪性能。该方法显著降低路径跟踪误差。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶仪在多难度环境下适应性较差，特别是在强侧风与剧烈转向时容易失效。直接将强化学习策略应用于舵面存在较高风险，如何利用数据驱动方法增强传统控制系统的表现成为关键。
AI.method: 将强化学习得到的监督器置于不变的自动驾驶仪之上，以有限且受控的方式修改速度、高度和航向参考指令，其修正量通过一种结合 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方程和半离散值迭代的打分方法选取，并结合Lyapunov和Barrier思想确保安全性，最终所有信号进入不变的自动驾驶仪。
AI.result: 在相同平台下，HJB残差监督方法能将平均 RMS 路径跟踪误差由基线自动驾驶仪的 338.617m 降至 44.809m，比Q-learning残差（88.809m）也显著更优，实现了86.77%和49.54%的误差下降。同时带来一定空速误差提升，显示不同方法在各指标间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能在不更改自动驾驶仪的前提下大幅提升无人机在复杂扰动下的路径跟踪能力，但各项性能存在权衡。本方法为经典自动驾驶仪系统与智能算法的集成提供了新范式。

title: Improving Visual Representation Alignment Generation with GRPO
summary: Recent diffusion transformers have demonstrated strong image synthesis capabilities but remain inefficient to train due to weak alignment between generative and discriminative representations. While representation alignment frameworks such as REPA improve convergence by aligning noisy denoising features with pretrained visual encoders, their externally supervised alignment loss is static and lacks adaptivity during training and inference. Existing methods rely on fixed cosine alignment or contrastive objectives, which cannot dynamically balance representation consistency and generation quality, resulting in limited discriminative benefit and failing to optimize alignment in a task-adaptive manner. To address this, we propose VRPO, a reinforcement-based optimization strategy that replaces REPA's static alignment loss with a generative representation policy optimization objective. Instead of enforcing a fixed similarity constraint, VRPO treats representation alignment as a reward-guided process: the model receives adaptive rewards based on generation fidelity, perceptual quality, and semantic coherence between the diffusion features and pretrained visual embeddings. This formulation enables the generator to continuously refine its internal representations toward semantically meaningful directions while improving image quality. Our VRPO-driven training seamlessly integrates into diffusion transformers, introducing negligible computation cost and preserving full compatibility with SiT and DiT architectures. Extensive experiments on ImageNet-256x256 demonstrate that our VRPO-Alignment substantially enhances both convergence and fidelity, achieving up to +1.8 FID improvement and 2.3x faster training compared to REPA under identical compute budgets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于强化学习的生成表示对齐策略（VRPO），以提升扩散Transformer图像合成的收敛速度和生成质量，相较于现有方法带来明显性能提升。
AI.motivation: 扩散Transformer在图像生成上表现强大，但训练效率低，主要因生成和判别的特征表征对齐不佳。现有如REPA等表示对齐方法虽能改善这一问题，但监督信号静态、缺乏训练和推理阶段的自适应性，导致判别能力和最终表现受限。
AI.method: 提出VRPO方法，将特征对齐建模为奖励驱动过程，利用奖励信号（生成保真度、感知质量、语义一致性）动态调整生成器的内部表征方向，而非简单采用固定的相似性损失。该方法可轻松融入主流扩散Transformer架构，且计算开销极小。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-256x256实验中，VRPO方法在同等资源下训练收敛速度提升2.3倍，FID分数提升最高1.8分，显著优于REPA等现有方案。
AI.conclusion: VRPO显著提升了扩散Transformer的生成质量和训练效率，验证了动态任务自适应对齐策略对生成及判别双重性能的价值，方法通用性强，可无缝集成到现有主流模型中。

title: FineVerify: Scaling Test-Time Compute with Fine-Grained Self-Verification for Agentic Search
summary: Agentic search requires language model agents to explore many sources and answer complex information-seeking questions. Scaling test-time compute is a promising way to improve these agents, but current approaches can fail, because correct answers are often sparse and score-based selection depends on model calibration. We propose FineVerify, a fine-grained self-verification framework that decomposes each question into checkable sub-questions, verifies sampled candidates against each sub-question, and selects the candidate with the highest aggregated score. This per-check structure turns selection into simpler local judgments and produces scores under the same explicit criteria. Across four agentic search benchmarks and two models, FineVerify consistently outperforms standard scaling baselines. With only four sampled trajectories, it improves GPT-5-mini by 8.2 accuracy points and Gemini-3-flash by 5.6% on average. With 12 samples, FineVerify enables GPT-5-mini to surpass frontier GPT-5 on BrowseComp-Plus. Beyond accuracy, FineVerify produces interpretable verification traces that help audit benchmark errors, suggesting broader applications for inspecting agentic search systems. Code and data are available at https://github.com/XuZhao0/fineverify

AI.tldr: 提出一种细粒度自验证框架FineVerify，显著提升了大模型agentic search任务的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有agentic search方法在答案稀疏性和模型校准不足时，分数筛选常常失败，导致准确率难以提升。亟需更细致、可解释的答案选择机制。
AI.method: FineVerify将复杂问题分解为可检验的子问题，对每个候选答案针对各子问题逐一验证，把原本全局的分数选择转化为多个局部判定，并根据这些局部得分进行最终选择。
AI.result: 在四个agentic search基准和两个主流模型测试中，FineVerify始终优于常规扩算基线。仅用4条采样轨迹，GPT-5-mini准确率提升8.2个百分点，Gemini-3-flash提升5.6%；12条采样使GPT-5-mini在BrowseComp-Plus上性能超过最强的GPT-5。
AI.conclusion: FineVerify不仅提高了答案准确性，还提供了可审计的验证痕迹，对大模型agentic系统的透明化和可靠性具有重要意义，具备更广泛的实际应用潜力。

title: A Sonar-Visual Dataset for Cross-Modal Underwater Robot Perception
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to IEEE ICRA 2026 S2S Workshop (From Sea to Space: Advancing Perception in Harsh Domains)
summary: Underwater robots typically use both cameras and sonar for perception to leverage the rich semantic details of vision and the robust range measurements of acoustics. However, learning to map between these modalities via cross-modal prediction remains underexplored due to limited sonar-visual paired datasets. We present SOVIS, a sonar-visual dataset for cross-modal underwater perception. SOVIS comprises over 76,000 paired frames collected across 17 dives at six sites in the Trondheimfjord, supported by an end-to-end pipeline that cleans and synchronizes the cross-modal sensor data. We also introduce an interactive annotation tool designed to accelerate the labeling process for this paired data. Finally, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept cross-modal fish detection task using a small subset of labeled data, achieving a 7x improvement in mAP@0.10 over a monocular camera baseline. SOVIS serves as the first step toward advancing cross-modal underwater perception research, enabling research directions such as dense sonar prediction from monocular images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了SOVIS水下声纳-视觉对齐数据集，支持异模态感知研究，并通过一个小规模实验展示其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有水下机器人通常结合相机和声纳以互补感知，但两种模态间的预测映射研究受限于缺乏大规模声纳-视觉配对数据集。
AI.method: 作者采集同步声纳和视觉数据，涵盖17次潜水6个站点，构建了含76000多对帧的SOVIS数据集，并开发数据清洗、同步及人工标注工具。同时，使用部分已标注数据验证了跨模态鱼类检测任务。
AI.result: 在跨模态鱼类检测实验中，利用新数据集的模型mAP@0.10指标较单目视觉提升7倍。
AI.conclusion: SOVIS作为首个公开的水下声纳-视觉大规模配对数据集，将极大推进相关跨模态研究，并为未来多样研究方向（如视觉推断声纳）打下基础。

title: Response-Aware Multimodal Learning for Post-Treatment Visual Acuity Forecasting
summary: Long-term visual acuity (VA) outcomes after anti-VEGF therapy are central to patient counseling, expectation setting, and follow-up planning in diabetic macular edema (DME). However, in clinical practice, physicians must often estimate long-term visual trajectories based only on early post-treatment findings, making reliable prognostication difficult. Although prior OCT-based learning approaches have largely focused on short-term response or single-endpoint prediction, modeling VA trajectories across multiple future time points from early longitudinal observations remains insufficiently explored. In this study, we assembled a real-world cohort of 188 anti-VEGF-treated DME patients with paired baseline and month-1 OCT scans, along with tabular OCT-derived biomarkers and non-imaging clinical variables. Using only these early data, we formulate a multi-horizon VA forecasting problem aimed at predicting visual outcomes at 3, 6, 12, 18, and 24 months, reflecting clinically meaningful follow-up intervals. We propose ReVA, a response-aware multimodal framework that integrates structural features from baseline and month-1 OCT with the tabular variables to capture baseline disease status and early treatment response. ReVA uses spatial attention to preserve localized prognostic imaging features and a dependency-aware tabular encoder to model interactions among clinical variables. These multimodal representations are fused to predict patient-specific long-term visual acuity trajectories. The proposed framework achieves MAE=0.1246, RMSE=0.1621, and R^2=0.6064 for 24-month VA prediction, with consistent performance across all forecast horizons. Our findings show that incorporating early treatment-response signals enables clinically meaningful long-term visual acuity forecasting, supporting data-driven decision support for routine anti-VEGF management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态机器学习框架（ReVA），利用糖尿病性黄斑水肿患者早期的OCT影像资料与临床数据，实现对抗VEGF治疗后多时点远期视力变化的准确预测。
AI.motivation: 目前在临床实际中，医生常常只能通过患者接受抗VEGF治疗早期的检查结果来预测其远期视力恢复情况，但这种基于早期表现的长程视觉预后评估准确性不足。而现有相关研究大多只关注短期疗效预测，缺乏多时间点、长期趋势的系统建模方法。该论文旨在填补多时间点远期预测的临床需求。
AI.method: 该研究收集了188例接受抗VEGF治疗的DME患者，获得其治疗前及1个月后的OCT影像、OCT衍生生物标志物及临床变量。搭建多模态预测模型ReVA，整合早期OCT结构及表型数据，利用空间注意力模块提取影像关键特征，以及依赖性敏感（dependency-aware）的表格编码器以建模临床变量之间关系，最终融合各模态信息预测3/6/12/18/24个月的个体化视力变化轨迹。
AI.result: ReVA模型能够仅基于早期数据，对5个远期随访时间点的视力结果进行精准预测，其中24个月的预测表现MAE=0.1246, RMSE=0.1621, R^2=0.6064，并且在所有时间点均表现出稳定的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 引入早期治疗反应信息并用多模态融合模型，能够实现准确且有临床意义的糖尿病黄斑水肿患者远期视力变化预测，为抗VEGF治疗随访与患者管理提供了数据驱动的决策支持。

title: OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering
summary: Recent progress in the development of language models has been defined by scale, with each generation absorbing more of the world's knowledge into its weights. However, many practical applications benefit more from robust reasoning than from extensive parametric knowledge. In this setting, task-specialized small language models (SLMs) offer a principled design choice. We introduce Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC), a family of SLMs built around this premise. As a variant of OCC, we present OCC-RAG, optimized for faithful question answering (QA) grounded in the provided context. This task directly aligns with the OCC design approach, requiring multi-hop reasoning over supplied passages while ignoring memorized knowledge. To train OCC-RAG, we implement a novel pipeline for synthesizing multi-context, multi-hop QA data at scale, producing a corpus of over three million examples targeting multi-hop reasoning, strict context faithfulness, and calibrated abstention. We release OCC-RAG-0.6B and OCC-RAG-1.7B, both mid-trained on this corpus. The models produce structured reasoning traces with source citations grounded in literal quotes from the context. Through OCC-RAG, we demonstrate that compact, task-specialized SLMs can match or exceed general-purpose models 2 -- 6x their size across multi-hop reasoning (HotpotQA, MuSiQue, TAT-QA), faithfulness (ConFiQA), and refusal (MuSiQue-Un) benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC)系列任务专用小语言模型（SLMs），尤其是其变体OCC-RAG，专注于忠实依赖上下文的多跳问答任务，并通过特制的多语境、多跳QA数据集进行训练，展现出在推理、忠实性和拒答等方面优于更大通用模型的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型以规模为进步主要标志，但实际应用中许多任务更需强健的推理能力而非庞大的参数知识。因此，针对具体任务的小型化模型可能更加高效和实用。
AI.method: 作者提出OCC结构，设计出OCC-RAG模型，针对需要多跳推理和上下文忠实问答的任务，通过创新数据生成流程，构建了一个逾三百万样本的高质量多跳QA数据集，并用其对小模型进行“中期训练”。模型的输出包含带文献出处的结构化推理过程。
AI.result: OCC-RAG-0.6B和OCC-RAG-1.7B模型在HotpotQA、MuSiQue、TAT-QA等多跳推理任务，以及ConFiQA的忠实性和MuSiQue-Un的拒答基准上，表现与大2-6倍的通用模型相当甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑、任务专用的小语言模型可在推理和忠实性等任务上媲美或超越庞大的通用模型，实现了更高效的实际应用，表明未来可通过任务定制化小模型来满足实际需求。

title: LEGS: Fine-Tuning Teleop-Free VLAs for Humanoid Loco-manipulation in an Embodied Gaussian Splatting World
summary: Training vision-language-action (VLA) policies for humanoid loco-manipulation is constrained by the high cost and complexity of collecting human teleoperation demonstrations. VLA policies fine-tuned in simulators have, until now, failed to transfer effectively in humanoid loco-manipulation tasks. We present LEGS (Loco-manipulation via Embodied Gaussian Splatting), a hybrid simulator that composites a mesh foreground (robot, objects, props) over a photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) background reconstructed from a handheld scene capture. LEGS uses a procedural motion-primitive generator to synthesize labeled demonstrations at scale without human teleoperation, and a deterministic two-stage color calibration to align the rendered 3DGS image to the robot's deployment camera. On a Unitree G1 humanoid robot, across three pick-and-place tasks of increasing whole-body difficulty and three VLA backbones (psi_0, pi_0.5, GR00T N1.6), a policy trained purely on LEGS data matches or exceeds one trained on human teleoperation demos on every experiment. It also outperforms a mesh-only simulation baseline that ablates the effect of the 3DGS background, showing that photorealistic rendering is a key enabler for synthetic data transfer. Humanoid motion is recorded independently of scene appearance in LEGS, allowing the same auto-generated demonstrations to be re-rendered under new backgrounds and object meshes--covering a new scene at more than 15x lower cost than teleoperation--to augment training data for robustness to scene variations. Under combined object-and-scene appearance shift, the policy trained on re-rendered LEGS-AUG data maintains task success while the baseline trained on teleoperation data fails entirely. Our project page is located at https://legsvla.github.io/.

AI.tldr: LEGS提出了一种结合真实3D背景和机器人前景的混合模拟器，通过自动生成大规模有标签演示，显著提升了视觉-语言-动作策略在仿人机器人复合任务中的迁移和泛化效果。
AI.motivation: 训练仿人机器人进行复杂的视觉-语言-动作任务需要大量昂贵且难以获得的人类遥操作演示数据，现有数据驱动方法难以有效迁移到实际环境，导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: LEGS系统将机器人和物体的mesh前景与基于手持相机重建出的高真实度3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)背景合成，利用程序化运动基元生成器批量生成有标签演示数据，并采用两阶段色彩校准使渲染图像与真实相机对齐。其生成的数据可覆盖多种场景变化，极大提升合成数据的场景多样性和可用性。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1仿人机器人上进行三项难度递增的取放任务，LEGS合成的数据训练出的策略在所有实验中都能匹配或超越基于人类遥操作演示的数据，且远优于只用mesh仿真（无真实背景）的基线方法，同时通过重新渲染增强了对不同场景的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LEGS显著降低了高质量训练数据采集成本，并提升了策略的泛化能力及实际迁移效果。使用高真实度背景对仿真数据合成和增强至关重要，可为仿人机器人在复杂场景下的学习与部署提供高效数据支持。

title: Through the PRISM: Principle-Aware, Interpretable, and Multi-Scale Evaluation of Visual Designs
summary: Effective visual communication stems from the harmony of multiple design principles, such as readability, contrast, alignment, overlap, and coherence, which collectively govern clarity and intent of the communicator. While human designers reason holistically over these principles, machine agents typically condense them into a single heuristic score, offering limited interpretability and diagnostic precision. To address this gap, we introduce PRISM (PRinciple-aware, Interpretable, and Structure-guided Design Modifications), a benchmark that systematically perturbs professional layouts from the Crello dataset along measurable design principles. The benchmark comprises 100K perturbed training samples and 10K perturbed validation designs, each isolating a specific principle violation for controlled analysis of multimodal reasoning about design quality. We show that models like Qwen-2.5-VL and GPT-4o-mini are largely insensitive to targeted principle degradations, whereas GPT-4o exhibits global awareness without fine-grained disentanglement. Building on these insights, we propose a multi-scale evaluation framework that integrates lightweight scorers for quantitative assessment, instruction-tuned vision-language models for localised feedback, and prompt-based methods for global reasoning. Our framework provides interpretable explanations of design failures. Using these localised insights, we show targeted refinements that improve layout quality. Together, PRISM and our framework lay the foundation for interpretable design-literate multimodal reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PRISM基准，通过系统性干扰专业布局，分别测试与诊断不同的设计原则对视觉传达的影响，并提出了可解释、分层的多模态评估框架。实验表明主流多模态大模型对设计原则的敏感性有限，通过本方法可提供更精细和可解释的设计反馈。
AI.motivation: 人类设计师能整体性地平衡多种设计原则，但目前机器模型多用单一分数衡量，难以解释具体设计失误。作者希望填补机器和人类在设计理解上的差距，提高模型的可解释性和诊断能力。
AI.method: 构建了PRISM基准集，对Crello数据集中的专业布局根据不同设计原则进行有针对性的扰动，得到大量只包含单一原则违背的训练和验证集。同时，提出多尺度评估框架，结合量化得分器、指令微调的视觉-语言模型和提示式全局推理，为设计诊断提供局部和全局解释。
AI.result: 实验证明，Qwen-2.5-VL和GPT-4o-mini对设计原则退化的敏感性较差，GPT-4o能整体感知但难做细致区分。引入本框架后，可为不同设计问题生成更具体的解释，并基于这些解释实现针对性的设计微调，提高版式质量。
AI.conclusion: PRISM基准和提出的评估方法为多模态模型提供了可解释的设计推理能力，有助于面向视觉设计的AI系统更准确地分析和优化版式，推动可解释、设计素养多模态智能系统的发展。

title: EPIC: Efficient and Parallel Inference under CFG Constraints for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Controlling language model outputs is essential for ensuring structural validity, reliability, and downstream usability, and diffusion language models are no exception. Recent advances in diffusion language model decoding have extended output control beyond regular constraints to context-free grammar (CFG) constraints. Existing methods, however, can be up to four times slower than unconstrained decoding. More importantly, they substantially diminish one of the key advantages of diffusion language models over autoregressive models, namely parallel decoding. This slowdown arises because sequential validity checking introduces significant overhead during parallel generation. We propose an efficient CFG-constrained decoding framework, EPIC, that addresses this limitation. Our method improves decoding efficiency by combining lexing memoization, validation using Earley-style parsing instead of deterministic automata, and relaxed compatible subset selection for parallel commit. It reduces repeated lexing and validation overhead while allowing multiple compatible tokens to be committed together. Experiments on three benchmarks using four models show that our method reduces inference time by up to 67.5% and decreases the additional overhead by up to 90.5% compared with existing CFG-constrained decoding methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/hyundong98/EPIC-Decoding.git .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的CFG约束解码框架EPIC，显著提升了扩散语言模型在含上下文无关文法约束下的解码效率，同时保留了并行性优势。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（Diffusion Language Models）在并行解码方面优于自回归模型，但在应用于复杂约束如CFG时，现有约束方法极大增加了解码延迟，尤其是因顺序校验带来的效率损失，影响实际应用。
AI.method: 提出EPIC框架，创新地结合了lexing备忘、Earley风格解析替换确定性自动机、以及可兼容子集选择机制，实现了并行批量提交token并减少冗余校验，从根本减少了重复性开销。
AI.result: 在3个数据集、4个模型上实验证明，EPIC方法在保持准确性的同时，将推理时间最多缩短67.5%，约束带来的额外开销也大幅下降最高达90.5%。
AI.conclusion: EPIC显著提高了CFG约束下扩散语言模型的解码效率，使其实用性显著提升，对多种结构化生成任务有直接意义，且源码已开源便于社区进一步研究和应用。

title: Crazyflow: An Accurate, GPU-Accelerated, Differentiable Drone Simulator in JAX
summary: High-quality, large-scale synthetic data from simulations is becoming a cornerstone for pushing the capabilities of robot algorithms. While aerial robotics simulators have evolved to support specialized needs such as fidelity, differentiability, and swarms independently, a unified platform that can synthesize data across all these domains is missing. In this work, we propose Crazyflow, a simulator designed to push the limits of aerial-robotics algorithm development, from model-based to data-driven methods, gradient-based to sampling-based approaches, and single-agent to multi-agent systems. Compared to existing state-of-the-art drone simulators, it achieves speeds more than an order of magnitude faster for a single drone and can simulate thousands of swarms of 4000 drones each. Real-world experiments show Crazyflow supports both analytical-gradient-based policy learning, achieving sub-centimeter trajectory tracking accuracy without domain randomization, and sampling-based obstacle avoidance at speeds exceeding half a billion steps per second. Breaking the traditional train-then-deploy paradigm, we show that its unprecedented speed even enables in-flight reinforcement learning; we demonstrate this by throwing a physical drone into the air and training a recovery policy from scratch in 0.38 seconds, successfully stabilizing the drone. Crazyflow supports multiple levels of simulation abstraction, is directly compatible with all open-source Crazyflie models, and enables rapid reconfiguration across custom drone platforms and applications by providing a light-weight system identification pipeline. By pushing accuracy, speed, and differentiability simultaneously, Crazyflow serves as an open-source resource for synthetic data generation, with emerging capabilities for large-scale parallelization for online, in-execution learning and optimization, opening the door to novel algorithm development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Crazyflow的新型空中机器人仿真器，兼顾高准确性、高速度和可微分性。该平台支持从单个无人机到超大规模无人机群的仿真，能加速数据合成和算法迭代，并突破传统仿真与实际部署的边界。
AI.motivation: 现有的空中机器人仿真器各自支持高保真、可微分、多机协作等某一特性，但缺乏统一的平台能同时覆盖这些需求。此外，快速且大规模数据合成对于推动机器人算法的发展至关重要。
AI.method: 作者设计并实现了Crazyflow仿真平台。该平台支持多层次仿真抽象，兼容所有开源Crazyflie无人机模型，并能通过轻量级系统辨识工具快速适配各类无人机。其核心优势包括极高的仿真速度、可微分性支持、对单机与万级无人机群的并行仿真能力，以及对基于取样和基于梯度的多样学习、规划算法的兼容。
AI.result: 相较于现有先进无人机仿真器，Crazyflow单机速度提升数十倍，能支持同时仿真上千组万级无人机群。实验证明该平台可在实际无人机上实现无域随机化的高精度政策学习及快速避障，其速度甚至允许实飞过程中边学边改。一个典型演示是在无人机空抛后用0.38秒在线训练回收策略，实现稳定飞行。
AI.conclusion: Crazyflow作为一个开源空中机器人仿真平台，显著提升了仿真速度和可定制性，同时支持在线超大规模学习与优化，为机器人算法开发打开了新可能。

title: ASAP: Advancing Medical Volumetric Representation Learning with Anatomy-aware Semantically-adaptive Pre-training
summary: Learning transferable and interpretable representations from medical volumetric scans remains challenging due to complex anatomical structures and weak, heterogeneous supervision provided by radiology reports. In this paper, we propose Anatomy-aware Semantically-Adaptive Pre-training (ASAP), a principled vision-language pre-training framework for fine-grained medical volumetric representation learning from large-scale chest CT scans and their corresponding radiology reports. ASAP integrates three key components: (1) an anatomy-aware knowledge injection module that incorporates organ-level structural priors via off-the-shelf segmentation tool to encourage anatomically coherent representations; (2) a semantically-adaptive selective alignment mechanism that dynamically associates sentence-level findings with localized volumetric regions; and (3) a semantically-adaptive fusion module for effective interaction between anatomically informed visual features and grounded textual cues under dual-modal masked modeling paradigm. Beyond methodological contributions, we establish a comprehensive benchmark for medical volumetric vision-language pre-training on chest CT, covering 15 datasets and 22 downstream tasks spanning abnormality classification, segmentation, disease prognosis prediction, report generation, vocabulary classification, cross-modal retrieval and visual question answering. This benchmark provides standardized evaluation protocols to systematically assess representation quality under diverse clinical settings and data regimes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASAP consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance across tasks and datasets, with particularly pronounced gains under limited supervision and distribution shift, validating its effectiveness in learning transferable and clinically meaningful volumetric representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASAP（Anatomy-aware Semantically-Adaptive Pre-training）框架，通过结合解剖结构知识和语义自适应机制，实现从医学胸部CT影像及对应报告中学习可迁移和可解释的表征，并在多个任务和数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 医学三维影像结构复杂，监督主要来源于放射报告，通常较弱且异质性强，导致难以高效学习通用且可解释的表征。
AI.method: ASAP框架包括：1）注入解剖结构知识，通过分割工具加入器官级结构先验，提升表征解剖一致性；2）语义自适应对齐机制，动态将报告中的句子级发现与影像局部区域匹配；3）在双模态遮蔽建模下，语义自适应融合模块促进视觉与文本特征的深度交互。
AI.result: 构建了覆盖15个数据集、22个下游任务的综合评测基准，实现了异常分类、分割、预后、报告生成、词汇分类、跨模态检索和视觉问答等多任务评估。大量实验显示，ASAP在上述任务和数据集上持续超越现有方法，特别是在弱监督和分布偏移场景下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: ASAP方法显著提升了医学三维影像的可迁移性和临床实用性，为医学影像跨模态预训练提供了有效途径和标准评测体系。

title: WaveFilter: Enhancing the Long-Context Capability of Diffusion LLMs via Wavelet-Guided KV Cache Filtering
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLMs) have demonstrated significant advantages across various tasks. However, constrained by their multi-step iterative inference mechanism, their computational overhead and inference latency in long-context tasks have become core bottlenecks restricting their large-scale deployment. When processing long sequences, existing Key-Value (KV) caching mechanisms often face a dilemma where generation quality degrades drastically, where the core challenge lies in precisely and efficiently filtering critical tokens within ultra-long contexts. Inspired by the human reading process, we propose \textbf{WaveFilter}, a universal and training-free caching framework. This framework innovatively introduces the wavelet transform for decomposition of long sequences to achieve precise identification of key tokens, based on which a sparse KV Cache is constructed to compute the final contextual representation. Experimental results demonstrate that WaveFilter, as a plug-and-play generic framework, significantly enhances the performance of existing mainstream KV Cache methods in complex long-context tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WaveFilter的通用且无需训练的KV缓存框架，通过引入小波变换精确筛选超长上下文中的关键token，有效提升了Diffusion大模型在长文本任务中的推理效率和表现。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散大语言模型在长文本推理时，由于多步迭代推理机制，计算开销和延迟大大增加，并且传统KV缓存方案在超长序列中生成质量严重下降；其核心难题是如何高效、精准筛选关键信息。本文受人类阅读机制启发，致力于突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 创新性地引入小波变换对长序列进行分解与分析，实现对关键token的精准识别，并据此构建稀疏KV缓存，从而提升推理效率。该方法无需额外训练、可直接应用到不同大模型上。
AI.result: 实验显示，WaveFilter作为即插即用泛化框架，在复杂长上下文任务中大幅提升了主流KV缓存方案的生成表现。
AI.conclusion: WaveFilter极大缓解了扩散大模型处理长文本时的效率与效果瓶颈，为长上下文生成任务和模型推广部署提供了高效优质的解决方案。

title: Spatio-Temporal Reconnection for Multi-Robot Networks using Adaptive Prescribed-Time CBFs
summary: In multi-robot systems, maintaining persistent communication graph connectivity is often overly restrictive, especially when robots have limited communication ranges but operate in large environments. Instead, allowing robots to temporarily disconnect and later reconnect is often more desirable for efficient task execution while still ensuring timely information sharing across the team. In this paper, we propose an adaptive prescribed-time control barrier function (adaptive PT-CBF) framework that enables robots to temporarily disconnect and re-enter the communication range within an adjustable and feasible prescribed time. Moreover, we introduce a reconnection triggering mechanism that jointly considers task execution and reconnection urgency, thereby providing a principled way to decide when reconnection should occur. Theoretical analysis justifies convergence to the satisfying reconnection within a prescribed finite time. Experimental results validate the performance of our proposed adaptive PT-CBF with improved task efficiency and satisfying reconnections.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种适用于多机器人系统的自适应规定时间控制屏障函数（adaptive PT-CBF）方法，不再要求通信一直连通，而是允许机器人临时断开、按需重连，提升任务效率并保证信息及时共享。文中还提出了兼顾任务和重连紧急性的触发机制，实现理论保证的有限时间重连，实验结果验证了方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 在大环境、有限通信范围下，保持多机器人系统通信图持续连通过于苛刻，影响任务效率。实际应用中，更希望机器人能有策略地临时断开，按需及时重连，兼顾效率与信息传递。
AI.method: 提出自适应规定时间控制屏障函数（adaptive PT-CBF）框架，允许机器人在可调节的规定时间内临时断开和重入通信范围。设计兼顾任务进展和重连紧急性的重连触发机制，并进行理论分析和实验验证。
AI.result: 理论分析证明，该方法在规定有限时间内可以实现有效重连。实验结果显示，所提方法提升了任务执行效率，并能实现令人满意的重连效果。
AI.conclusion: 自适应PT-CBF方法能够为多机器人系统带来更高的任务效率和合规的及时重连，比传统持续连通策略更灵活有效。

title: FiSeR: Fine-Grained Source Representations for Cross-Domain AI Image Detection
summary: Real-world synthetic image detectors often generalize poorly under domain shift despite strong in-domain performance. Using unsupervised UMAP projections, we find that natural and synthetic features remain partially separable on unseen datasets, yet performance still drops, suggesting that the classification head overfits to training-domain artifacts. Therefore, the key is to learn more transferable representations so that the decision criterion is more stable and robust to domain shifts. Based on the structural fact that synthetic images are produced by diverse generators, we propose a hierarchical contrastive learning framework that improves the separability between natural and synthetic images while preserving generator identity information. It jointly optimizes (i) a coarse contrastive objective between natural and synthetic images and (ii) a fine contrastive objective among synthetic images using generator identities. Trained on WildFake, our method achieves an average AUROC gain of +10.22 on cross-domain evaluation over Chameleon, AIGIBench, Community Forensics, and GenImage under the same settings as the strong baseline DIRE. For few-shot adaptation, we freeze the backbone and fit an SVM head on 10 labeled samples per class, improving AUROC by +10.64 on AIGIBench and +17.41 on Chameleon, averaged over 12 widely used detectors. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/heyongxin233/FiSeR.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种分层对比学习方法，以提升合成图像检测器在跨域场景下的泛化能力，取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的合成图像检测器虽然在训练域表现良好，但在跨域测试时表现显著下降，主要原因是分类头过拟合于训练域的伪影，导致在新域上识别能力减弱。因此亟需更具迁移性的特征表示以增强模型在不同域间的稳健性。
AI.method: 基于合成图像由不同生成器生成的结构特性，提出了一种分层对比学习框架。该方法联合优化两种对比目标：（1）在自然图像与合成图像间进行粗粒度区分；（2）在合成图像内部依据生成器身份进一步细粒度区分，增强类别信息。
AI.result: 在WildFake训练，跨域评测于Chameleon、AIGIBench、Community Forensics、GenImage等数据集上，平均AUROC相较于强基线DIRE提升10.22。在小样本自适应场景下，冻结主干网络、仅用每类10个样本训练SVM头，平均AUROC在AIGIBench和Chameleon上分别提升10.64和17.41，优于12种主流检测器。
AI.conclusion: 分层对比学习能有效提升合成图像检测器的跨域泛化能力，捕捉到更加稳定、可迁移的特征表示，在归一化使用情景下优于多种现有算法。

title: From Empathy to Personalized Empathy: Adapting Empathetic Strategies to Individual Users
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long-term interactions with users, empathy has become an increasingly important capability. However, existing research overlooks the influence of users' personality traits on empathetic strategies during long-term interactions. To address this gap, we introduce the task of personalized empathy, which focuses on adapting empathetic strategies according to users' personalized characteristics derived from history. To study and enhance this capability, we construct PersonaEmp, a personalized empathy dataset built from long-term user-AI interactions, featuring rich user histories, persona information, and empathy-seeking queries. We further propose PereGRM, a reward modeling framework that combines the empathy evaluation structure with dynamic evaluation criteria generation for fine-grained reward modeling. Experimental results across different settings and multiple judge models show that PereGRM consistently achieves the strongest performance improvements, indicating its effectiveness for enhancing personalized empathetic capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出了个性化同理心任务，并构建了PersonaEmp数据集和PereGRM奖励建模框架，有效提升了大模型的个性化同理心表现。
AI.motivation: 现有同理心生成方法忽略了用户人格特质在长期交互中的重要影响。为提升人机互动中的个性化同理心，作者希望结合用户历史及人格信息，提高模型的应对能力。
AI.method: 1) 创建了PersonaEmp数据集，涵盖丰富用户历史、个性特征和同理心相关问答。2) 提出PereGRM奖励建模框架，将同理心评测结构与动态评判标准结合，实现细粒度的奖励建模进一步优化大模型表现。
AI.result: 在不同环境和多种评测模型下，PereGRM方法均带来了显著和持续的性能提升，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合用户个性与历史特征实现的个性化同理心建模，是提升人机长期交互体验的有效方式。PereGRM框架对推动大模型同理心能力发展具有实际应用价值。

title: Hierarchical Object Representation for Spatial Robot Perception: Points, Meshes, and Superquadrics
summary: Hierarchical 3D Scene Graphs (3DSG) have emerged as an actionable and scalable representation for long-term autonomy incorporating metric, semantic, and topological information in the scene. However, the question of geometric representation of objects in 3DSG has been overlooked as most methods use simplified geometric models such as partial point clouds or 3D bounding boxes. In this work, we introduce a hierarchical object representation that can be leveraged for high-fidelity object-level reconstruction, object-based robust re-localization or map alignment, and efficient and analytical collision checking for safe robot navigation planning in dense and cluttered environments. The representation is structurally organized into four distinct layers, progressively abstracting the scene from raw sensor data to dense 3D meshes to analytical primitives such as superquadrics, which provide a sparse and analytical representation for object geometry. We develop a pipeline that builds the hierarchical object representation from RGB-D image stream captured by a robot, and demonstrate its working in real-world open-set object scenes in both indoor and outdoor environments. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets including HOPE, ReplicaCAD, Kimera-Multi, and NUS Campus Dataset collected using Unitree B2 Robot validate our pipeline in both indoor and outdoor environments. We show that our superquadric-based map alignment method outperforms the current state-of-the-art object based map alignment method ROMAN. Our code can be found at https://github.com/perceptica-robotics/Hickory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种层次化物体表示方法，用于3D场景图（3DSG），实现高精度重建、定位与碰撞检测。该方法经过多数据集实验证明优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 当前3DSG多用于长期自主系统，但物体几何表示长期被忽视，大多数方法使用简单的几何模型（如点云、3D包围盒），无法满足高精度和复杂场景的需求。
AI.method: 提出了四层次的层次化物体表示结构，从原始传感数据逐步抽象为致密三维网格再到超二次曲面等稀疏解析表示。搭建了完整管线，从RGB-D图像流自动构建该结构。并在多套数据集和现实机器人平台上进行实验。
AI.result: 在HOPE、ReplicaCAD、Kimera-Multi和NUS校园等数据集上，涵盖室内与室外环境，实验表明所提方法在地图对齐、物体级重定位等应用中优于现有ROMAN方法。
AI.conclusion: 层次化超二次曲面物体表示结构提升了3DSG的精度和适用性，可广泛用于重建、定位、地图对齐与安全导航等任务，是高密度复杂环境下机器感知和规划的新突破。

title: Pause and Think: A Dataset and Benchmark for Video-Grounded Assistive Action Suggestion
summary: Recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle with grounded reasoning, temporal consistency, and context aware planning in videos. We introduce pause-and-think-T, a reasoning-centric training dataset that encourages models to pause, reason over visual evidence, and produce concise, actionable responses. The dataset promotes structured reasoning prior to answer generation, guiding models toward human-like, scene-grounded assistance. We fine-tune a compact 4B-parameter model and evaluate it on our pause-and-think-B benchmark targeting contextual understanding and goal planning tasks. The model achieves 58.0% accuracy at 59x fewer parameters than Qwen3-VL-235B (58.9%), matching GPT-5.2 on scene understanding and surpassing GPT-4o. Beyond our benchmark, it also shows strong out-of-distribution performance on EgoThink and TempCompass, with substantial gains in affordance, assistance, attribution recognition, situated reasoning, and temporal order, without benchmark-specific training. Our results indicate that targeted reasoning supervision enables compact models to deliver actionable, visually grounded guidance while generalizing beyond training data, without requiring large-scale model expansion.

AI.tldr: 提出了以推理为核心的视频视觉-语言模型训练数据集，支持小参数量模型实现高效、泛化性强的场景推理和规划。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言大模型在视频的情境推理、时序一致性、计划性等方面能力不足，难以进行类人、基于场景的辅助与决策。
AI.method: 设计并构建了pause-and-think-T数据集，鼓励模型在答题前进行结构化、以证据为基础的推理。使用该数据集对参数量为4B的小型模型进行微调，并在自建及多类公开基准集上进行评测。
AI.result: 在pause-and-think-B基准集上，小型模型以4B参数达到58.0%准确率，仅用Qwen3-VL-235B模型59分之一的参数量，性能近似GPT-5.2并超越GPT-4o。同时，在EgoThink、TempCompass等外部分布任务上获得显著泛化和推理能力提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性的推理监督训练，小型视觉-语言模型能够高效地实现可行动的、以视觉证据为基础的推理辅助，并在无需显著扩展参数量的前提下获得良好的泛化表现。

title: I-WebGenBench : Evaluating Interactivity in LLM-Generated Scientific Web Applications
summary: Recent advances in visual language models have enabled autonomous agents for complex reasoning, tool use, and document understanding. However, existing document agents mainly transform papers into static artifacts such as summaries, webpages, or slides, which are insufficient for technical papers involving dynamic mechanisms and state transitions. In this work, we propose a Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent that converts research papers into executable interactive web systems. Given a PDF paper, the agent performs end-to-end processing without human intervention, including paper understanding, system modeling, and interactive webpage synthesis, enabling users to manipulate inputs and observe dynamic behaviors. To evaluate this task, we introduce a benchmark of 19 research papers paired with expert-built interactive systems as ground truth. We further propose PaperVoyager, a structured generation framework that explicitly models mechanisms and interaction logic during synthesis. Experiments show that PaperVoyager significantly improves the quality of generated interactive systems, offering a new paradigm for interactive scientific paper understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种将学术论文自动转化为可交互网页系统的智能代理，实现论文内容的动态展现与操控。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型能辅助论文理解，但大多只输出摘要、网页或PPT等静态成果，难以支持动态机制和状态变化的技术论文。研究需要更高级的自动化工具来实现更深层次的论文理解与交互。
AI.method: 提出Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent，可以端到端地处理PDF论文，自动理解和建模论文内容，并合成可让用户操作和交互的网页系统。提出基准数据集，并提出结构化生成框架PaperVoyager，用于显式建模论文中的机制和交互逻辑。
AI.result: 实验表明，PaperVoyager能大幅提升生成交互式系统的质量。基于19篇配有人工作为真实标签的论文，PaperVoyager在多个评估维度上超越基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为技术论文的交互式理解开辟了新方向，有望提升学术交流和知识获取效率。

title: Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation: Optimal Transport and Graph-Driven Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation
comment: Published in NeurIPS 2025, address some typos
summary: Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) poses a formidable challenge for autonomous agents, requiring seamless integration of natural language instructions and visual observations to navigate complex 3D indoor spaces. Existing approaches often falter in long-horizon tasks due to limited scene understanding, inefficient planning, and lack of robust decision-making frameworks. We introduce the \textbf{Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation (HSAN)} framework, a groundbreaking approach that redefines VLN-CE through three synergistic innovations. First, HSAN constructs a dynamic hierarchical semantic scene graph, leveraging vision-language models to capture multi-level environmental representations, from objects to regions to zones, enabling nuanced spatial reasoning. Second, it employs an optimal transport-based topological planner, grounded in Kantorovich's duality, to select long-term goals by balancing semantic relevance and spatial accessibility with theoretical guarantees of optimality. Third, a graph-aware reinforcement learning policy ensures precise low-level control, navigating subgoals while robustly avoiding obstacles. By integrating spectral graph theory, optimal transport, and advanced multi-modal learning, HSAN addresses the shortcomings of static maps and heuristic planners prevalent in prior work. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging VLN-CE datasets demonstrate that HSAN achieves state-of-the-art performance, with significant improvements in navigation success and generalization to unseen environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新的分层语义增强导航（HSAN）框架，大幅提升了视觉-语言导航任务中复杂3D室内环境的智能体表现，并在多个基准数据集上取得了领先成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航方法在长距离导航任务时，易因场景理解不足、规划低效及决策能力薄弱而表现不佳。作者旨在解决这些瓶颈，提升智能体对复杂环境的理解和导航能力。
AI.method: HSAN框架有三大创新：（1）动态构建分层语义场景图，通过视觉-语言模型提取多级环境语义信息（如物体、区域、分区）；（2）采用基于最优传输理论的拓扑规划器，结合语义相关性与空间可达性进行目标选择，具备最优性理论保障；（3）利用图感知强化学习实现精准低层次控制，有效处理子目标与障碍规避。该方法融合了谱图理论、最优传输及多模态学习。
AI.result: 在多个具挑战性的VLN-CE数据集上，HSAN框架显著提升了导航成功率，并在泛化到新环境时展现出更强的性能，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层语义增强导航（HSAN）有效弥补了现有静态地图与启发式规划方法的不足，在视觉-语言导航领域实现了导航效果和泛化能力的重大提升。

title: FlowNar: Scalable Streaming Narration for Long-Form Videos
summary: Recent Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), primarily designed for offline settings, are ill-suited for the dynamic requirements of streaming video.
