While recent online adaptations improve real-time processing, they still face critical scalability challenges, with resource demands typically growing at least linearly with video duration. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose FlowNar, a novel framework for scalable streaming video narration. The core of FlowNar is a dynamic context management strategy for historical visual context removal, combined with our CLAM (Cross Linear Attentive Memory) module for streaming visual history retention, ensuring bounded visual memory usage and computational complexity, crucial for efficient streaming. We also introduce a realistic self-conditioned evaluation protocol and complementary evaluation metrics to assess streaming narration models under deployment-like conditions. Experiments on the Ego4D, EgoExo4D, and EpicKitchens100 datasets demonstrate that FlowNar substantially improves narration quality over strong baselines while being highly efficient, supporting processing of 10$\times$ longer videos and achieving 3$\times$ higher throughput (FPS). The code is available at https://github.com/zeyun-zhong/FlowNar.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FlowNar框架，实现了高效可扩展的视频流叙述，并在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前主流多模态大模型（LMMs）多为离线处理，难以应对实际视频流中对实时性和扩展性的需求。即使是一些优化后的在线方法，在处理长时间视频时依然存在资源和计算需求随视频长度线性增长的瓶颈。因此，亟需一种能够高效处理长时长视频流、同时又保证较低计算资源消耗的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了FlowNar框架，核心方法包括：1）动态历史视觉上下文管理，及时移除过时内容；2）设计CLAM（Cross Linear Attentive Memory）模块，有效保留关键历史信息，在保证模型感知过往信息的同时，将计算与视觉内存资源消耗控制在固定范围内，并不会随着视频时长增长。还提出了更贴近实际部署环境的自条件评估协议和配套评测指标。
AI.result: 在Ego4D、EgoExo4D和EpicKitchens100等主流视频数据集上的实验表现出色，在叙述质量上显著超过强力对比方法。同时，其可处理视频长度达到主流方法的10倍，处理速度提升3倍（FPS），体现了极高的效率和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: FlowNar为流式视频叙述提供了新思路，兼具高质量和高效率，适合实际应用落地，突破了以往随视频时长增长而资源消耗急剧增加的难题。

title: Internalize the Temperature: On-Policy Self-Distillation as Policy Reheater for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards improves the reasoning ability of large language models, but often suffers from entropy collapse, in which increasingly concentrated policies reduce rollout diversity and useful learning signals. Existing remedies either constrain the RL objective (e.g., entropy regularization) or adjust sampling temperature during rollout collection, but these interventions remain external to the model parameters. We propose Temperature-Scaled On-Policy Self-Distillation (TS-OPSD), a lightweight policy reheating method that internalizes the exploratory effect of temperature into model parameters. Starting from an entropy-collapsed RL checkpoint, TS-OPSD constructs a self-teacher by applying high-temperature scaling to the model's own logits, then distills the resulting smoother distribution back into the student. This policy reheating requires no external teacher, privileged data, or additional inference cost. Experiments on Qwen3-4B-Base and Qwen3-8B-Base show that policy reheating yields a stronger initialization for continued RL than both standard continued RL and rollout-level temperature reheating. Further analyses show that TS-OPSD mainly reduces output sharpness while preserving intermediate representations, top candidate sets, and reasoning capability. These results suggest that entropy restoration can serve as a simple post-collapse intervention for extending reasoning-oriented RL.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了TS-OPSD方法，通过自蒸馏与温度缩放提升大语言模型在强化学习训练中的推理能力，并克服熵塌缩带来的多样性损失。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习优化大语言模型推理能力时易出现熵塌缩，导致输出多样性和有效学习信号减少，现有手段侧重于外部调整温度或正则化，未能内化探索能力到模型参数。
AI.method: 提出了温度缩放的在策略自蒸馏（TS-OPSD）方法：基于熵塌缩后的模型，先对其logits应用高温度缩放获得平滑的分布，作为教师信号，再将该分布蒸馏回学生模型，实现参数内化的策略再加热，无需外部教师或额外推理成本。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B-Base和Qwen3-8B-Base上实验证明，TS-OPSD相比传统RL和仅调整采样温度的方法，能更好恢复多样性、降低输出尖锐性，并保持中间表征和推理能力。
AI.conclusion: TS-OPSD为RL熵塌缩后的干预提供了参数内化的简单有效途径，可延展以推理为目标的RL。”

title: Physics-Informed Modeling and Control of Emergent Behaviors in Robot Swarms
summary: Robot swarms can exhibit coherent collective behaviors through local perception, limited communication and decentralized decision-making, yet modeling and controlling such emergence remains challenging when behaviors unfold over multiple phases. Here we introduce PhySwarm, a physics-informed micro--macro framework that represents multi-stage swarm emergence as physically constrained density-field evolution coupled to executable robot motion. At the macroscopic level, a multi-phase advection--diffusion--reaction model (Macro-ADR) describes phase-dependent swarm-density evolution through directed transport, diffusion-based spatial regulation and behavioral phase transitions. At the microscopic level, an equivalent deterministic motion model (Micro-EDM) realizes these mechanisms through potential-field advection, density-gradient compensation and rate- or event-gated phase switching. A neural-physics controller (NPC) maps local observations and temporal memory to bounded physical parameters, and is trained with a reinforcement learning--PINN objective that combines task rewards with macro-scale density residuals and micro-scale motion-consistency constraints. In several proof-of-concept swarm missions -- including trail-guided foraging, formation-reconfigurable navigation and role-adaptive search and rescue -- we demonstrate that PhySwarm can generate distinct multi-stage emergent behaviors within a unified physics-informed modeling framework. The learned density fields and physical parameters provide interpretable evidence of how advection, diffusion and reaction jointly regulate multi-stage swarm organization. These results establish a physics-informed route for learning, interpreting and controlling emergent behaviors in robot swarms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PhySwarm框架，用于多阶段机器人集群行为的建模、解释和控制，通过物理约束的密度场演化及具体机器人运动，实现了多阶段涌现行为的统一建模。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器人集群能够通过局部感知、有限通信和分散决策实现群体协同行为，但复杂多阶段的行为涌现过程建模和控制仍然具有挑战性。缺少一个统一且可解释的框架来描述和操控多阶段群体组织的动态变化。
AI.method: 作者提出了PhySwarm，包括宏观和微观两个层面。宏观上用多阶段的平流-扩散-反应（Macro-ADR）模型描述群体密度的演化和相变，微观上用确定性运动模型（Micro-EDM）实现这些机制。通过神经物理控制器（NPC）将局部观测与时序记忆映射为受物理约束的参数，并以强化学习结合物理引导神经网络（PINN）进行训练，融合了任务奖励、宏观密度偏差和微观运动约束。
AI.result: 在多种典型集群任务中（如路径引导觅食、可重构编队导航和角色自适应搜救），PhySwarm能在统一框架下成功实现不同的多阶段集群涌现行为，并通过学习到的密度场和物理参数展示了各机制（平流、扩散、反应）如何协同调控集群组织。
AI.conclusion: PhySwarm为机器人集群多阶段行为的学习、解释和控制提供了物理驱动的新范式，能帮助更深入地理解和实现涌现现象的调控，在集群机器人领域具有重要意义。

title: MM-Snowball: Evaluating and Mitigating Hallucination Snowballing in Multimodal Multi-Turn Dialogue
comment: Accepted by The International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) demonstrate remarkable visual understanding, yet their reliability in interactive settings is severely undermined by hallucination snowballing: a phenomenon where initial errors amplify across conversational turns, leading to a collapse in coherence. This failure reveals a fundamental vulnerability where models progressively neglect visual grounding in favor of over-relying on polluted textual history. Existing benchmarks are predominantly confined to single-turn VQA, which fail to capture the complex dynamics of error propagation in long-horizon interactions. To address this, we introduce MM-Snowball, the first benchmark for fine-grained diagnosis of hallucination snowballing within dialogues. Extensive evaluation shows that our benchmark poses a significant challenge even to advanced MLLMs and reveals the inefficacy of existing mitigation methods designed for single-turn VQA. To counteract this degradation, we propose Conflict-Aware Visual Rectification (CAVR). This training-free method mitigates snowballing through a synergistic dual-mechanism that refreshes visual grounding at the representation level and rectifies output distributions at the logit level, effectively re-anchoring the model to visual facts. Experiments demonstrate that CAVR achieves state-of-the-art performance, offering a promising path toward more reliable interactive AI. Data and code are available at: https://frenkie-chiang.github.io/MM-Snowball

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-Snowball基准，专注于评测和诊断多模态大模型在对话过程中的幻觉滚雪球问题，并提出了新的缓解方法CAVR，显著提升对话鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型虽视觉理解优秀，但在多轮对话中易出现错误积累，导致模型忽视视觉信息而过度依赖文本历史，现有基准多为单轮VQA，无法评估互动中复杂的错误传播。本研究旨在填补此空白，对幻觉滚雪球现象进行细致诊断。
AI.method: 作者提出了MM-Snowball，这是首个针对多模态对话中幻觉滚雪球的细粒度基准。通过全面评测，揭示了现有先进模型和单轮VQA缓解方法的局限性。为应对这一问题，提出了无需再训练的CAVR方法，从表征层和logit输出层联合增强视觉锚定，矫正模型输出。
AI.result: 实验表明，MM-Snowball对主流多模态模型构成很大挑战，曝光了其易受幻觉滚雪球影响的弱点。CAVR方法在该基准及相关任务上均取得了最优性能，显著改善了交互过程中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作首次系统评估了多模态对话中的幻觉滚雪球问题，并提出行之有效的缓解新方法，有望促进更可靠的多模态交互式AI系统发展。

title: Not All Flips Are Conformity: Decomposing Stance Convergence in Multi-Agent LLM Debate
summary: Multi-agent debate (MAD) is a promising strategy for improving LLM reasoning, but when agents converge on a shared answer, it is unclear whether that convergence reflects genuine deliberation or social compliance. We show that the conventional answer flip rate conflates three distinct mechanisms: spontaneous instability, stance-induced conformity, and reasoning-induced persuasion. Our three-source decomposition framework isolates each through controlled counterfactual conditions. In the primary MMLU-Pro setting, 37% of agent-question observations change under self-reflection alone, while robustness tests show substantial model-dependent instability across GPQA-Diamond and three model families; strict conformity is 29% in the primary setting and remains predominantly harmful across model replications (57-77% correct-to-wrong). A controlled information-gradient experiment reveals that even vacuous reasoning is associated with 20-39% error adoption among resistant agents, with reasoning-like presentation carrying substantial persuasive weight. Harmful conformity can be predicted from Round 0 features (AUC = 0.79), and risk-targeted intervention reduces it by 13.6 percentage points (p < 0.001). However, without correctness labels or self-reflection controls, reducing peer adoption does not improve accuracy, because harmful and beneficial influence cannot be distinguished.

AI.tldr: 本论文分析了多智能体辩论（MAD）中答案一致性的真实含义，提出了一种三元分解框架，区分了三种机制，并证明了有害的从众现象广泛存在且可预测、可部分干预。
AI.motivation: 虽然MAD可提升大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，但现有的答案一致性指标无法判别一致性背后的动力，即区分是真正的推理协商还是仅仅的从众。
AI.method: 作者提出了三源分解框架，将答案反转现象分为自发性不稳定、立场诱导型从众和推理驱动型说服三种机制。通过设计对照实验和反事实条件，并借助信息梯度实验分析不同条件下的行为变化。
AI.result: 实验发现，仅自我反思就能导致37%的答案变化，严格从众现象为29%，且多在正确到错误间转变。即便是空洞理由也能诱发20-39%的误判。通过初始特征可较好预测风险，从众风险干预可显著降低有害影响。
AI.conclusion: 不能通过单纯限制同伴答案采纳来提升准确率，因现有框架难以区分有益与有害影响。设计更细致的控制变量和干预手段对于真正提升模型推理有实际必要。

title: Embedding Semantic Risk into Distance Fields and CBFs for Online Monocular Safe Control
summary: We propose an online monocular perception-to-control framework that embeds semantic risk into the distance field used by Control Barrier Function (CBF)-based safe navigation and teleoperation. Many perception-based safety filters assign the same distance-based safety margin to all mapped obstacles or use semantics only as a downstream controller adjustment, rather than encoding semantic risk in the spatial representation. Our framework instead reasons online about obstacle geometry and class-dependent risk by embedding semantic information directly into the Euclidean Signed Distance Field (ESDF). This design encodes semantic risk before control optimization, so high-risk objects exert a larger spatial influence in the safety field while retaining efficient ESDF queries at runtime. Specifically, a foundation-model-based SLAM front end reconstructs dense 3-D geometry from monocular RGB video, while per-frame semantic segmentation provides pixel-level class labels that are fused into the reconstructed geometry. The resulting geometric-semantic representation is then converted into an ESDF, where semantic labels identify safety-relevant regions and impose class-dependent inflation before field computation. The semantic-aware ESDF provides the local distance values and spatial derivatives required by the CBF controller, while class-dependent gains further regulate the controller response. Extensive simulation and hardware experiments demonstrate online operation at 10--20 Hz and semantic-aware safe behavior in both teleoperation and autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将语义风险嵌入距离场的可控式安全导航与遥操作在线感知-控制框架，通过语义增强安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全控制滤波多对所有障碍采用相同安全边界，或将语义仅用于控制调整，缺乏对障碍类别风险差异的空间直观表达。
AI.method: 采用基于基础模型的单目SLAM重建3D几何，同时用每帧语义分割获得像素级类别标签，融合进几何重建后生成语义几何表示。再转为语义感知ESDF，根据障碍类别对距离场进行膨胀，编码类别风险，并供CBF安全控制器使用。
AI.result: 在模拟和实际硬件中，系统可实现10-20Hz的在线运行，支持语义感知的安全遥操作和自主导航。
AI.conclusion: 直接将类别风险嵌入距离场，实现了分类相关的主动安全控制，提高了导航与遥操作任务中的安全性和实际可行性。

title: A Systematic Benchmark of Intraoperative Ultrasound-to-MR Synthesis for Brain Tumour Surgery
summary: Intraoperative ultrasound (ioUS) is a versatile, cost-effective modality in brain tumour surgery, but its interpretation is difficult: acquisition planes are non-standard, artefacts are modality-specific, and its appearance differs markedly from the preoperative MRI on which surgical-planning tools, segmentation models and the surgeon's experience rely. Synthesising MRI-like images from ioUS could let this MRI-based infrastructure be reused intraoperatively without an extra scan. Most prior work evaluates a single architecture in isolation; to our knowledge, no benchmark has spanned architectural paradigms, inference regimes and downstream-task endpoints under a common protocol. We address this gap on the public ReMIND data set (76 patients; 153 paired ioUS/T2w and 104 paired ioUS/FLAIR studies; 60/16 patient-level train/held-out split). Six generators (four GAN baselines: Pix2Pix, SwinPix2Pix, CycleGAN, CUT; the transformer-augmented ResViT; and the few-step diffusion model SynDiff) were each trained under four inference regimes (2D, 2.5D, 2D + 3D-refinement, full-3D) and two targets (T2w only; T2w + FLAIR multi-task), yielding 48 experiments. Image-fidelity metrics (SSIM, PSNR, MAE, LPIPS) were complemented by an nnU-Net v2 downstream segmentation evaluation (tumour and resection cavity) and by subgroup analyses by histological grade and reoperation. No architecture dominated every axis, and, critically, perceptual quality tracked downstream utility most closely (LPIPS, r=-0.66, p<0.001), whereas higher SSIM was associated with worse utility (r=-0.64, p<0.001); SynDiff-2.5D best preserved downstream segmentation (U_Dice=0.55). Perceptual and downstream-task metrics should therefore be reported alongside or in preference to global SSIM, and architecture choice conditioned on surgical phase, patient history and clinical objective.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性评估了多种生成模型将术中超声(ioUS)图像转换为MRI样图像的效果，并通过下游分割任务展示，感知质量指标比传统结构相似度指标（如SSIM）更能反映实际临床有用性。
AI.motivation: 术中超声(ioUS)常用且成本低，但图像解读困难，且与术前MRI差异大，影响术中重用MRI相关工具或模型。若能将ioUS图像转化为MRI样图像，可无缝利用MRI基础设施，提升手术导航与辅助决策。
AI.method: 作者在ReMIND公开数据集上，针对76例患者，共153对ioUS/T2w和104对ioUS/FLAIR配对影像，分为训练/测试集。比较了六种生成器（含GAN、变换器与扩散模型），在4种推理方式（2D、2.5D、2D+3D微调、全3D）及2种目标（T2w单一与T2w+FLAIR多任务）下，共48组实验。除常规图像保真指标，还用nnU-Net v2做下游肿瘤及切除腔分割评估，并探讨不同病理分级或再手术亚组表现。
AI.result: 无单一模型在所有维度优于其它方法。感知质量指标（LPIPS）与下游分割表现相关性最强（r=-0.66），而传统SSIM指标表现反而与下游任务为负相关（r=-0.64）。SynDiff-2.5D方案在下游分割达最佳U_Dice=0.55。
AI.conclusion: 作者建议评估和报告生成模型时，优先考虑感知质量及下游任务指标而非单一结构相似度（如SSIM）。模型/架构选择需根据手术阶段、患者史及具体临床目标定制。

title: Momento: Evaluating Persistent Memory and Reasoning with Multi-Session Agentic Conversations
summary: Recent advances in agentic AI have enabled agents to complete complex tasks through tool use, reasoning, and multi-step planning. Yet existing benchmarks evaluate agents within a single session, ignoring past actions, stated preferences, and prior decisions that agents must integrate to fulfill personalized user goals. We introduce Momento, a benchmark for persistent agentic task completion in multi-session service environments, requiring agents to take consequential, tool-mediated actions while resolving temporal dependencies and evolving user goals across sessions. Experimental results reveal that current agents fail primarily through misestimation of user state, treating prior session history as a reliable proxy for current context rather than stale information requiring re-validation, highlighting a substantial gap between current agent capabilities and realistic long-horizon human-agent interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Momento基准，用于评估智能体在多会话环境下的持久任务完成能力。实验表明，现有智能体普遍在状态估计和历史信息利用方面存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准仅在单会话场景中评估，忽略了用户历史、偏好以及智能体跨会话整合和长时任务执行的能力，这与现实多会话服务环境存在巨大差距。
AI.method: 作者提出了Momento基准，通过设置多会话、用户目标随时间变化、包含工具使用和要处理的时序依赖等任务场景，系统评估智能体在跨会话任务中的表现。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前主流智能体主要由于错误估计用户状态而失败，将历史会话信息误当作当前环境的可靠依据，忽视信息可能已经过时，导致任务失败。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体在跨会话、持久性任务完成方面与真实人机长周期互动的需求有显著差距，未来需关注信息时效性和用户意图演变能力的提升。

title: FlipItRight: Stable Pose-Targeted Throw-Flip Across Diverse Objects
summary: We propose FlipItRight, a framework for stable planar pose-targeted throw-flip with a high-DoF manipulator. The task is decomposed into an object-level planner, which generates candidate release states satisfying the desired landing pose, and a robot-level planner, which evaluates executability and constructs a feasible swing motion. Treating the release state as an explicit intermediate representation enables principled candidate filtering, adaptive selection of release and pre-swing configurations, and structured near-release motion design -- in particular, approximately constant end-effector velocities during the final swing phase to improve robustness to release-timing uncertainty. We validate on a real platform across objects of varying shape, size, and mass, achieving a 90% success rate across 120 trials. Ablation studies confirm that each design choice contributes to throwing performance, and the framework requires no prior data or learned model, enabling direct deployment on new objects and targets without environment-specific calibration or data collection.

AI.tldr: 提出FlipItRight框架，实现高自由度机械臂的稳定俯面姿态目标抛投。该系统分为物体级与机器人级两层规划，并在实际平台测试验证，成功率达90%。不依赖先验数据或模型，适应新物体新目标。
AI.motivation: 高自由度机械臂在执行精准抛掷及姿态控制任务时，面临释放时机不确定、物体多样化等挑战。希望不依赖先验数据，能快速部署于新环境与新物体。
AI.method: 方法包含两个层次：物体级规划器生成满足目标落地姿态的释放状态候选，机器人级规划器评估可执行性并构建实际挥臂动作。释放状态作为中间表达，便于候选筛选、自适应选择动作、结构化接近释放的运动设计（如末端执行器在最终挥臂阶段速度近似恒定以提升鲁棒性）。
AI.result: 在不同形状、大小和质量的物体上，实物平台实验达到了90%的成功率，共120次实验。消融实验表明每个设计细节均促进了性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FlipItRight框架无需预先数据或模型，可直接用于新物体和新目标，具备良好的普适性和实用性。每项设计均提升了抛掷表现。

title: An Attribute-Based Measure of Video Complexity
summary: A new framework for the estimation of the complexity posed by video-question pairs to video-LLMs, Video Attribute-Based Complexity (VideoABC), is proposed. Video complexity is defined as the probability of failure of a video-LLM for a given video-question pair. VideoABC is a non-parametric complexity measure, using a reference video dataset and a pre-defined vocabulary of video attributes informative of complexity, \eg the scene complexity or the speed of the video event informative of the question. In a training phase, reference videos are projected into the space of these attributes, which is then quantized. The expected ABC of each quantization cell is then computed. Given a new video and its projection into the attribute space, complexity is estimated by the expected ABC of the associated quantization cell. To enable the use of VideoABC with small reference video datasets, two quantizers are combined: a k-means quantizer that enables accurate complexity estimates for samples in the distribution of the reference dataset and a universal lattice quantizer that guarantees generalization to out-of-distribution samples. A synthetic video generation procedure, inspired by target-distractor manipulations of psychophysics studies, is proposed to populate the cells of the lattice quantizer during training, enabling the computation of their expected ABCs. Experimental results show that VideoABCis effective even with very low-dimensional attribute representations, substantially outperforming approaches like `video-LLM as judge' with much less complexity. Finally, the explainable nature of the VideoABC score, in terms of well-defined attributes, is shown to provide insights on how the attribute composition of benchmarks affects their complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频-LLM复杂性评估框架VideoABC，通过视频属性量化视频问答对的难易程度。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大模型（如视频-LLM）应用的兴起，客观、可解释地衡量视频与问题对给模型带来的复杂性需求日益突出，传统方法如“模型预测错误率”缺乏解释力和泛化能力。
AI.method: 方法基于视频的属性（如场景复杂度、事件速度等）定义复杂性空间。将视频投影到属性空间后，使用量化方法（结合k-means与普适格量化）将属性空间离散化。在训练阶段，统计每个格点的失败概率（复杂性估计）。提出合成视频填充格子的方式，解决小样本参考问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，即便采用低维属性，VideoABC在复杂性评估上效果显著优于“视频-LLM评分”方法，且属性解释性强。
AI.conclusion: VideoABC不仅准确评估了视频-LLM任务的复杂性，还具备良好的可解释性，有助于分析数据集属性对模型任务难度的影响。

title: IDEAFix: Evaluation Framework for Creative Defixation Prompting in LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for tasks involving creative problem solving and idea generation. However, there is a lack of consensus concerning their creative capabilities: some studies report superior performances compared to humans, while others highlight structural limitations such as fixation and the homogenization of outputs. Existing evaluation approaches either rely on narrow, decontextualized tasks that do not capture goal-oriented generation or on broader settings that confound multiple aspects of the creative process, making it difficult to isolate the effects of task formulation, prompting, and evaluation design. Significantly, the role of structured prompting strategies in shaping idea generation remains underexplored. Therefore, we introduce IDEAFix, an evaluation framework for analyzing divergent thinking in open-ended idea generation tasks. We prompt models to generate multiple original solutions to controlled variations of short design scenarios, task attributes, and defixation prompting strategies. This design enables systematic analysis of how structured guidance influences LLMs' idea generation. Our results show that both task formulation and attribute selection significantly affect models' performance, and that simple prompting strategies can boost the originality of solutions. However, we also observe persistent output homogenization across models, confirming inherent limits in their ability to generate diverse solutions. Overall, IDEAFix provides a controlled, extensible framework for studying the mechanisms underlying LLMs' creativity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了IDEAFix评测框架，用以系统研究大语言模型（LLMs）在开放式创意生成任务中的表现及其受不同提示策略影响的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有评价方法不足以精确衡量LLMs在创意思维上的能力，且传统方法或缺乏目标导向性，或混淆多个创意过程要素，特别是有结构的提示策略对生成的影响缺乏深度研究。
AI.method: 作者提出IDEAFix框架，通过对模型进行结构化提示，在多种受控短设计场景及任务属性下生成多个原创方案，分析任务与提示对创意生成的影响。
AI.result: 实验显示，任务表述与属性选择对模型输出有显著影响，简单的提示策略可以提升方案的原创性；但所有模型依然存在输出同质化的问题，显示了在生成多样性方面的固有限制。
AI.conclusion: IDEAFix为研究和提升LLMs创造力提供了受控且可拓展的评测平台，可帮助深入理解大模型创意生成的内在机制和局限。

title: Trans2Occ: Voxel Occupancy Estimation and Grasp for Transparent Objects from Simulation to Reality
summary: Transparent objects remain challenging for robotic perception due to unreliable depth sensing caused by refraction and reflection. While prior approaches rely on multi-view reconstruction or depth completion, they are often difficult to scale or deploy in real-world robotic systems. In this paper, we present a practical framework for transparent object perception and manipulation based on single-view RGB input. Our approach predicts voxel-space occupancy directly from a single image, providing a geometry-aware representation that supports downstream robotic grasping. To enable large-scale training, we construct a simulation pipeline that generates paired RGB images and voxel occupancy annotations under diverse materials and lighting conditions. We demonstrate that the predicted occupancy representation is robust to domain shifts and transfers effectively from simulation to real-world robotic setups without fine-tuning. A simple rule-based grasping strategy built on top of the occupancy further achieves reliable grasp performance on transparent objects. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments show that our framework provides accurate 3D understanding and enables practical manipulation of transparent objects. These results suggest that single-view occupancy prediction offers a scalable and effective solution for transparent object perception in robotics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于单视图RGB输入的透明物体感知与操作方法，通过直接预测体素占用，从而实现对透明物体的准确3D理解和抓取，且在仿真和实际机器人环境中均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人难以感知和操作透明物体，主要因为其折射与反射造成深度传感不可靠，且现有方法如多视角重建和深度补全天然难以扩展或在实际系统中应用。
AI.method: 提出一种只需单张RGB图像即能直接预测物体体素占用（Voxel Occupancy）的新框架，并通过构建可模拟多种材质和光照的大规模仿真生成训练数据。利用规则基础的抓取策略将占用预测用于机器人实际操作，并测试该方法在仿真与现实中的迁移能力。
AI.result: 实验显示，模型在透明物体的3D感知与抓取任务中，无需微调即可从仿真有效迁移至真实环境，并实现准确的姿态识别和可靠的抓取成功率。
AI.conclusion: 单视图体素占用预测为机器人对透明物体的感知与操作提供了可扩展且实用的解决方案，有效克服了现有方法在真实环境中的局限。

title: Collaborative Few-Step Distillation and Low-Bit Quantization for Wan2.2 Dual-Expert Video Diffusion Models
summary: Large video diffusion models achieve strong visual quality but remain expensive to deploy because each sample requires many denoising steps and a large resident parameter footprint. This paper studies a deployment-oriented compression pipeline for Wan2.2-T2V-A14B by combining few-step distribution-matching distillation with low-bit quantization. The pipeline follows the model's dual-expert denoising route, calibrates the high-noise and low-noise branches separately, protects sensitive entrance layers, and uses HiF4-style low-bit representation to improve dynamic-range coverage. Quantization is calibrated on the distilled few-step student rather than on the original long-step trajectory, reducing activation-distribution mismatch during inference. The proposed co-design keeps the quantized model close to the same-step full-precision model and surpasses the original full-precision baseline at 8 and 20 steps on average. The 20-step setting gives the best quality-efficiency trade-off in the tested configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向部署的大型视频扩散模型压缩方案，通过少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化相结合，大幅提高生成效率同时保持高视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但推理过程需要多次去噪和庞大的模型参数，导致部署成本极高，难以实际应用。
AI.method: 提出结合少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化的方法，同时遵循模型的双专家去噪结构，对高噪声和低噪声分支分开校准，保护敏感输入层，并采用HiF4风格的低比特表示提升动态范围。特别地，量化在蒸馏得到的少步学生模型上进行，从而减少推理时的分布偏差。
AI.result: 在8步与20步推理配置下，压缩后的量化模型在生成质量上与同步数全精度模型接近，且平均超过原始全精度长步骤基线。20步配置在测试中表现出最优的质量-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 所提蒸馏与量化联合优化方案能显著降低模型部署成本，同时兼顾生成效果与推理效率，为大规模视频扩散模型的实际应用提供了可行路径。

title: Chunking Methods on Retrieval-Augmented Generation - Effectiveness Evaluation Against Computational Cost and Limitations
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has demonstrated significant capabilities in enhancing the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs). One of the key tasks in RAG systems is the chunking process. Traditionally, fixed-size chunking and semantic chunking have been the standard approaches. However, interest in chunking strategies has been increasing, leading to a growing number of proposed methods that often claim improved performance over these conventional techniques. Many of these approaches are tailored to specific use cases and data types, with limited evidence of their effectiveness across diverse scenarios. As a result, it remains challenging to directly compare different techniques and assess their relative strengths. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first to systematically evaluate the effectiveness of a wide range of chunking methods and emphasize the underlying challenges of chunking strategies in RAG systems. While chunking is commonly treated as a simple preprocessing step, we show that it introduces a range of impactful and often overlooked issues.

AI.tldr: 本论文针对RAG系统中的分块（chunking）方法进行了系统性评估，发现分块虽然被视为简单预处理，却带来重要且易被忽略的问题。
AI.motivation: 近年来，越来越多的研究提出了新的分块策略，并宣称能在RAG系统中提升性能，但这些方法多针对特定场景，缺乏跨场景的有效性验证，导致难以直接横向比较其优劣。因此，亟需有系统性评估不同分块方法的工作。
AI.method: 作者系统评估了多种主流及新兴的RAG分块策略，比较它们在不同场景和数据类型下的表现，重点分析分块策略带来的实际挑战。
AI.result: 研究显示，不同的分块方法在多场景下表现差异明显，且分块作为预处理步骤会引入一系列对RAG性能有较大影响但常被忽略的问题。
AI.conclusion: 分块不应仅被视为简单的预处理操作，其方法选择对RAG系统效果有重要影响，未来需重视分块策略的选择和相关问题的研究。

title: DisFlow: Scene Flow from Distance Field for Object Pose, Velocity Tracking, and Dynamic Object Reconstruction
summary: We present \emph{DisFlow}, a novel framework for online scene flow estimation from distance field that enables \emph{6DoF dynamic object pose estimation}, \emph{motion tracking}, and \emph{surface reconstruction}. The scene is represented by Gaussian Process Implicit Surfaces (GPIS), with surface normals serving as derivative constraints, enabling accurate signed distance computations near the surface and gradient queries with uncertainty. With this representation as a foundation, we compute a scene flow from the distance field that describes how surface points are transported over time in consecutive frames. Through our flow, we can estimate an object's pose and motion by incrementally registering a new observed point cloud via an elegant closed-form optimisation. Unlike prior methods that operate in the camera or world frame, our approach performs probabilistic fusion directly in the \emph{object frame}, where the object remains geometrically consistent over time. The tight coupling of the DisFlow method in space and time yields dense geometry, surface normals, object pose trajectories, velocities, and uncertainty, all at real-time rates. We evaluate DisFlow on dynamic object sequences and demonstrate that it achieves accurate pose and motion tracking while simultaneously reconstructing high-quality object surfaces. Code publicly available at \href{https://github.com/LanWu076/disflow_ros2}{https://github.com/LanWu076/disflow\_ros2}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DisFlow的新框架，实现了动态场景下物体6自由度位姿估计、运动跟踪和表面重建，具备实时性和高精度。
AI.motivation: 现有场景流估计方法在物体动态跟踪和表面重建上存在精度和鲁棒性不足，通常在相机帧/世界帧完成数据融合，导致物体的几何一致性难以保证，因此需要更为一致和高效的方法。
AI.method: 作者采用高斯过程隐式曲面（GPIS）表示场景，并以表面法线作为导数约束。通过距离场计算表面点随时间的运动（场景流），并基于解析式优化方法实现新点云的增量配准。创新点包括直接在物体坐标系下进行概率融合，提高了跟踪和重建的一致性。
AI.result: 在动态物体序列上进行了评测，DisFlow能够准确估计物体的位姿和运动，且同时重建出高质量的物体表面。
AI.conclusion: DisFlow方法在空间和时间上高度耦合，实现了密集几何、法线、物体轨迹、速度和不确定性的实时估计，在动态场景下表现出色，并公开了代码。

title: TAP-JEPA: Frozen Future-Latent Probing and Two-Stage Score Fusion for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Anticipation
comment: The runner-up solution for the Action Anticipation Challenge, EPIC-KITCHENS-100 at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026
summary: This report presents TAP-JEPA, our runner-up submission to the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 (EK-100) Action Anticipation Challenge at EgoVis 2026. The task is to anticipate the next verb, noun, and verb-noun action from an egocentric clip that ends before the target action begins. Instead of fine-tuning a large video backbone, TAP-JEPA builds a compact anticipation model on frozen V-JEPA 2.1 features: a ViT-G/384 encoder extracts visible pre-action tokens, the pre-trained latent predictor estimates near-future tokens from the observed context, and both token groups are fused by attentive probes with task-specific queries for verbs, nouns, and action pairs. For the final submission, we expand supervised training with the official training split and most of the validation split, reserving a small subset for sanity checks and qualitative inspection, and adopt a two-stage score fusion that first averages eight independently initialized probe replicas within each epoch and then merges candidates from epochs 12-20 with field-dependent weights. On the official open-testing leaderboard, our sunshinesky entry achieves 27.91 percent overall action Mean Top-5 Recall (MT5R), ranking second and only 0.04 percentage points behind the top score.

AI.tldr: TAP-JEPA是EPIC-KITCHENS-100视频预判挑战赛的第二名方案，利用冻结的V-JEPA 2.1特征和定制化的轻量级结构，实现了无需视频骨干微调的高效动作预测。最终成绩仅比第一名低0.04%。
AI.motivation: 当前视频动作预测任务通常需要微调大型视频模型，计算和资源消耗很高，因此需要开发更高效、更紧凑但有效的动作预判方法。
AI.method: TAP-JEPA固定视频主干V-JEPA 2.1，仅基于其特征构建动作预测模型。主要方法包括：（1）用ViT-G/384提取动作前可见特征；（2）用预训练的latent predictor预测未来特征；（3）用任务相关query对两组特征进行融合；（4）采用两阶段分数融合策略提升稳定性。
AI.result: 最终方法在EPIC-KITCHENS-100官方排行榜上取得27.91%的MT5R分数，名列第二，成绩仅比第一名低0.04%。
AI.conclusion: 论文展示了一种无需fine-tune大规模模型的新颖高效视频动作预测方案，在主流挑战赛中表现优异，显示了冻结特征上精致建模的巨大潜力。

title: Citation Grounding: Detecting and Reducing LLM Citation Hallucinations via Legal Citation Graphs
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Code and data: https://huggingface.co/datasets/overthelex/citation-grounding-eval
summary: Large language models systematically hallucinate legal citations -- fabricating statute references, citing repealed provisions, and confusing jurisdictions -- yet no automated method exists to measure or reduce this behavior at scale. We propose citation grounding (CG), a metric that verifies LLM-generated legal citations against a ground-truth citation graph extracted from 100.8 million Ukrainian court decisions (502 million edges, 21,736 unique statute nodes). CG decomposes into three components -- citation precision (does the cited provision exist?), citation relevance (is it contextually appropriate?), and citation temporality (was it valid at the relevant date?) -- enabling differential diagnosis of hallucination types. Empirical evaluation on 100 Ukrainian legal queries across five systems -- four commercial LLMs via AWS Bedrock (Claude Haiku 4.5, Mistral Pixtral Large, Amazon Nova Pro/Lite) and one RAG-augmented production system -- reveals CG ranging from 0.791 to 0.873, with 13-21% of citations hallucinated. To reduce hallucinations without human annotation, we introduce Citation Grounding DPO (CG-DPO): a method that constructs preference pairs algorithmically by corrupting verified citations from real court decisions via four targeted strategies. On a dataset of 2,244 court decisions, a Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model fine-tuned with LoRA achieves 98.5% mean validation accuracy in distinguishing correct from corrupted citations (rewards margin +14.9, std < 0.3 pp across 3 seeds). The citation graph, evaluation framework, and CG-DPO dataset are released as open resources.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为引文基础性（Citation Grounding, CG）的指标，用于自动检测并减少大型语言模型在法律引用中的虚假生成（幻觉）现象，并在乌克兰司法判决大规模数据上进行了实证和方法验证。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型（LLM）常在法律引用中出现虚假或错误引用（如引用不存在的条文、使用已废止条款、混淆管辖区），但缺乏可规模化检测和减少这些现象的自动化方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了Citation Grounding（CG）这一新指标，将引文基础性分为三类：引用准确性（条款是否存在）、引用相关性（上下文适用性）和引用时效性（条款时间有效性）。通过对超1亿份乌克兰法院判决构建真实引用图，并基于不同模型自动评估幻觉比率。另外，提出CG-DPO方法，通过四种策略自动腐化真实引用，生成偏好对数据，无需人工标注，对模型进行奖励微调。
AI.result: 在对100个法律查询和5个不同系统的实验中，CG分数在0.791-0.873之间，幻觉引用比例为13-21%。利用CG-DPO在2,244个法院判决数据上训练后的模型，验证准确率达98.5%，与原始模型相比，奖励间隔提升14.9个百分点（标准差低于0.3个百分点、3次实验种子一致）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效自动评估和减少法律引用幻觉，无需人工标注，实证证明新指标和方法具有较高精度及可扩展性。相关引用图、评测框架和数据集均已开源，为法律AI研究和实务落地提供基础资源。

title: The Lie We Tell: Correcting the Euclidean Fallacy in Vision Language Action Policies via Score Matching on Tangent Space
summary: Diffusion-based Vision-Language-Action policies achieve remarkable success in robotic manipulation, yet commit a fundamental geometric error we term the $\textbf{Euclidean Fallacy}$: representing SE(3) poses as flat $\mathbb{R}^{12}$ vectors. This approximation induces (1) manifold drift violating SO(3) constraints, (2) broken equivariance under coordinate transformations, and (3) non-geodesic trajectories with excessive kinematic cost. We introduce $\textbf{Lie Diffuser Actor (LDA)}$, a diffusion framework operating intrinsically on SE(3). Our method injects noise through left-invariant SDEs, predicts scores in the tangent space, and retracts samples via the exponential map. This formulation eliminates manifold drift by construction while guaranteeing coordinate-frame equivariance and geodesic optimality. On CALVIN ABC$\rightarrow$D, LDA improves average task length from $3.27$ to $3.51$ ($+7.3\%$). We further validate our method on real robot and the results show that our methodology outperforms the baseline on majority tasks.

AI.tldr: 本论文指出现有扩散模型在视觉-语言-动作策略中的SE(3)位姿表示存在几何缺陷，提出在SE(3)流形上原生运作的Lie Diffuser Actor (LDA)来解决这一问题，在仿真和真实机器人操作中均取得更优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的视觉-语言-动作策略将SE(3)的位姿近似为欧式空间向量，导致违反SO(3)约束、坐标变换下的不等变性及非测地路径等问题，需要一种在SE(3)上固有定义的方法。
AI.method: 提出Lie Diffuser Actor (LDA)，在SE(3)流形上实现扩散过程：通过左不变SDE注入噪声，在切空间预测分数，并用指数映射回收样本，从而本质上消除流形漂移并保证等变性和测地最优。
AI.result: 在CALVIN ABC→D数据集上将平均任务长度从3.27提升到3.51（提升7.3%），且在真实机器人上的多数任务中新方法优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Lie Diffuser Actor能够解决SE(3)位姿表示中的几何本质问题，提升了机器人操作策略的效果，在虚拟和真实环境下都有良好验证。

title: T-CLIP: Enabling Thermal Perception for Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining
summary: Thermal imaging offers a powerful alternative to visible-spectrum vision under challenging conditions such as low illumination and adverse weather, yet foundational vision-language models like CLIP fail to align thermal images with textual descriptions due to a fundamental thermal perception gap. We identify three major challenges: the lack of captioned thermal datasets, the inability of standard LLMs to reason about thermal phenomena, and a key representational challenge in thermal imaging where global scene context and object-level heat signatures conflict when learned together in a single embedding space. To address these, we introduce IR-Cap, the first physics-aware thermal captioning pipeline and dataset providing complementary global and fine-grained thermal descriptions across three public benchmarks, and T-CLIP, a decoupled dual-LoRA framework that independently adapts CLIP for scene-level and object-level thermal understanding. T-CLIP achieves consistent improvements over all baselines across three thermal benchmarks in cross-modal retrieval, and we provide an exploratory demonstration of its applicability to text-conditioned thermal image generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了IR-Cap和T-CLIP，用于解决热成像与文本对齐中的关键挑战，并在多个基准上实现了跨模态检索性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）无法有效处理热成像与文本描述的对齐，原因包括缺少配对数据、LLM对热现象理解有限，以及同时建模场景和对象热特征时出现的表征冲突。解决这些问题对于现实中低照明和恶劣天气条件下的视觉任务极其重要。
AI.method: 提出物理感知的热成像描述数据集与流程（IR-Cap），融合全局和细粒度热信息；提出分离式双LoRA架构（T-CLIP），分别对场景级和对象级热特征进行自适应学习，对CLIP进行改造。
AI.result: T-CLIP在三个公开热成像基准上的跨模态检索任务均超越所有现有方案，并演示其在文本引导热成像生成任务中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 针对热视觉与语言对齐的三大挑战，IR-Cap与T-CLIP为热成像理解提供了新方法，并推动了该领域研究进展。

title: MLLM-Microscope: Unlocking Hidden Structure Within Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: This work presents MLLM-Microscope, a novel system designed for analyzing the hidden representations within Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Our system evaluates the linearity, intrinsic dimension, and anisotropy of multimodal token embeddings across transformer layers. Utilizing the ScienceQA dataset, we evaluate two state-of-the-art MLLMs, LLaVA-NeXT and OmniFusion. We find that both the main and residual streams for tokens of both modalities exhibit highly linear behaviors across transformer layers. However, LLaVA-NeXT's image tokens reveal a slight decline in linearity, whereas OmniFusion's remain consistent. Image token dimensions in OmniFusion remain consistently higher across layers compared to LLaVA-NeXT. Also, the OmniFusion's anisotropy is observed to stay consistently low throughout the layers. These findings suggest that the inner workings of MLLMs highly depend on the nature of modality fusion performed before passing the token sequence into LLM. This and other new potential insights obtainable from our system are surely capable of enhancing our understanding of the inner workings of MLLMs, informing future model design and optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MLLM-Microscope系统，用于剖析多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）内部隐表示特征，对主流模型LLaVA-NeXT和OmniFusion在嵌入线性性、内在维数和各向异性等方面进行了层级分析，揭示了模型不同融合机制下表示特性的显著差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在多种任务中表现卓越，但其内部表示机制尚不透明，尤其是各层的表征如何演化、不同模态信息如何融合等问题未被深入剖析。为此，作者希望通过系统剖析模型隐表示结构，揭示模型在处理多模态数据时的行为和特征。
AI.method: 作者提出了MLLM-Microscope系统，从线性性、内在维数、各向异性等维度对嵌入表征进行定量分析。以ScienceQA数据集为基准，选用LLaVA-NeXT和OmniFusion两种主流MLLM，对其不同层级中的文本和图像嵌入进行结构化对比和可视化分析。
AI.result: 实验发现：两种模型在各层主流与残差分支的多模态嵌入表现出高度线性；但LLaVA-NeXT的图片嵌入线性性略有下降，而OmniFusion则稳定。OmniFusion模型各层的图像嵌入维数均高于LLaVA-NeXT，且其各向异性始终较低，表明融合机制影响内在表征特性。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs的内部表示特性高度依赖于前置模态融合策略。MLLM-Microscope能够揭示模型层级表征演化模式，为后续MLLM结构优化与设计提供参考和理论依据。

title: PHASOR: Phase-Anchored Universal Action Representations for Humanoid Embodiments
summary: Learning a good action embedding space is fundamental to scalable robot policy learning, yet existing methods treat action latents as task-specific intermediates rather than first-class representations. The resulting latents are unstructured, embodiment-specific, and weakly tied to motion semantics, limiting interpretability, controllability, and transferability across robots. We position the action embedding space itself as a first-class design target, with downstream policy quality emerging from representation quality. Exploiting motion's intrinsic periodicity, we factorize it into a phase manifold that captures cyclic structure via FFT-parametric coefficients, together with a pose branch that conditions the manifold on non-periodic configuration detail. Combined with motion-semantic distillation, this factorized structure yields a cross-embodiment motion manifold that is interpretable and embodiment-agnostic by design. Anchoring multiple humanoid robots to a shared human-pretrained manifold then produces a unified action embedding space across diverse platforms, achieving strong cross-embodiment retrieval and consistent gains on downstream robot tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以动作嵌入空间为核心的新方法，通过周期性与非周期性因素解耦，提升跨机器人平台的一致性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有动作嵌入方法多为任务定制，中间层缺乏结构性，难以解释与迁移，限制了多机器人间的操作共享和泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用运动的内在周期性，通过傅里叶变换（FFT）参数化的系数，提出‘相位流形’，同时结合包含非周期配置信息的‘姿态分支’，并引入运动语义蒸馏，构建能跨多种机体、结构化且可解释的动作嵌入空间。
AI.result: 通过让多种仿人机器人共享由人类先验训练的嵌入流形，实现了跨机体的一致动作检索、下游任务性能提升，并验证了方法的通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将动作嵌入空间作为设计核心，通过结构化与运动语义对齐，能显著提升多机器人系统的泛化性、可解释性和下游任务表现。

title: A Modelling and Evaluation Framework for EuroCrops-Driven Sentinel-2 Crop Segmentation
summary:
This work presents a configurable pipeline for generating semantic-segmentation-ready agricultural datasets from Sentinel-2 imagery and EuroCrops parcel-level annotations. The workflow transforms heterogeneous vector crop annotations into aligned multispectral image--mask pairs through label harmonization, Sentinel-2 product selection, spatial alignment, rasterization, patch extraction, quality filtering, and class-aware sample selection. The generated dataset contains 67,337 patches from five European countries and uses a reduced taxonomy of ten crop classes plus background.
  A four-level U-Net with Group Normalization was trained using 10 Sentinel-2 spectral bands and a composite loss combining class-weighted cross-entropy and Dice loss. On the internal EuroCrops-based test split, the model achieved a mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) of 0.7665, a pixel accuracy of 0.8693, and a mean class accuracy of 0.9072. Compared with spectral and spatial-context Random Forest baselines, the U-Net showed the importance of learned multi-scale spatial representations for crop segmentation.
  External evaluation was performed on unseen Belgian EuroCrops subsets, DACIA5, and PASTIS. The results show a clear performance gap under external and cross-dataset evaluation, especially for benchmarks with different taxonomies, annotation protocols, spatial coverage, or temporal organization. The model transfers more reliably to dominant and taxonomically aligned classes such as maize and wheat, while performance remains limited for several minority classes and for the adapted single-date PASTIS setting. These findings highlight both the potential and the limitations of using EuroCrops-derived supervision for Sentinel-2 crop segmentation under realistic domain shifts.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个用于从Sentinel-2图像和EuroCrops地块级注释生成适用于语义分割的农业数据集的可配置流水线，进一步训练和评估了基于U-Net的作物语义分割模型，并讨论了其在交叉数据集下的表现和局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏高质量、适用于深度学习语义分割的遥感作物数据集，特别是在不同标注、分类标准和数据领域偏移的情况下。因此，需要一个自动化流程来高效生成标准化、可用于训练的农业遥感数据集，并探索其在实际部署下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 本研究设计了一个从EuroCrops多源异构矢量标注到Sentinel-2多光谱图像配对分割掩码的流水线，包括标签对齐、数据筛选、栅格化、图像块提取和多类别采样等步骤。模型方面，使用四层U-Net结构（带Group Normalization），结合十个Sentinel-2波段输入，损失函数为类别加权交叉熵与Dice Loss的复合。设置了内部测试、外部跨数据集评估（包括Belgian EuroCrops, DACIA5, PASTIS）。
AI.result: 内部EuroCrops测试集上，模型取得了mIoU 0.7665、像素准确率0.8693、平均类别准确率0.9072。与传统Random Forest方法相比，U-Net多尺度空间表达显著提升了绩效。在外部和异构数据集评估中，尤其是数据集间存在分类体系、注释协议、空间和时间差异时，模型性能明显下降。特定主流类别（如玉米、小麦）转移性较好，但小类和单日期场景表现受限。
AI.conclusion: EuroCrops自动生成的遥感作物数据集与U-Net深度学习模型结合，在主流作物和内部测试场景下表现优异，但在现实中的域转移和类别不对齐下存在局限，未来应关注提高数据集多样性、标签规范性和模型对小类及异质性场景的泛化能力。

title: Towards Lightweight Reliability: Using Soft Prompts for Hallucination Mitigation in Large Language Models
comment: 20 pages, 5 tables, 2 figures. Accepted for publication in DBSec 2026. The final publication will be available at Springer
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have seen widespread adoption across various domains, yet their reliability is frequently undermined by hallucinations - responses that are plausible-sounding but factually incorrect. In high-stakes domains, these errors can reduce trust and introduce real-world risk. To address this challenge, we present a parameter-efficient approach that uses soft prompts to mitigate hallucinated content and promote responsible abstention in generative question-answering (QA) tasks.
  Our method, called Responsible Contrastive Soft Prompting (RCSP), uses a composite loss to train soft prompts that balance three goals: suppressing hallucinatory content, encouraging abstention under uncertainty, and preserving or improving factual recall. To achieve these goals, we incorporate contrastive loss, curriculum learning, and KL regularization into our training mechanism. We evaluate our approach on five diverse generative QA datasets using an LLM-as-a-Judge framework. Experimental results on the Gemma 3 (12B) and Llama 3.1 (8B) backbones demonstrate that RCSP effectively balances factual recall with hallucination suppression and abstention, yielding a generally superior F-score over standard reasoning and instruction-based prompting baselines. Notably, these improvements are achieved by training only a fraction of the parameters required by other tuning techniques. Our results demonstrate that soft prompts provide a modular and computationally efficient path toward improving LLM reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的软提示方法（RCSP），能有效抑制大模型幻觉，鼓励在不确定时选择回避，同时提升事实召回率，在多项问答任务中优于常规提示方法。
AI.motivation: 大模型的幻觉问题对高风险领域应用带来信任和安全隐患，亟需有效且参数高效的解决方法。
AI.method: 提出Responsible Contrastive Soft Prompting（RCSP）方法，通过复合损失联合对抗幻觉、鼓励回避并保护事实召回。具体方法结合对比损失、课程学习和KL正则化，仅需训练少量软提示参数。
AI.result: 在五个问答数据集上，用LLM评分框架评估，基于Gemma 3（12B）和Llama 3.1（8B）模型，RCSP在事实召回、幻觉抑制与回避之间取得更优F-score，且所需参数远低于全量微调。
AI.conclusion: 软提示是一种高效、模块化提升大模型可靠性的路径，RCSP证明其有效性，可推广至相关高风险应用场景。

title: Set-Supervised Diffusion Policy: Learning Action-Chunking Diffusion through Corrections
summary: Diffusion policies have recently emerged as a powerful framework for robotic manipulation. However, like other behavior cloning methods, they remain vulnerable to distributional shift, often requiring human-in-the-loop interventions to correct failures during deployment. These interactions naturally provide paired supervision in the form of the robot's undesired actions and the human teacher's corrective actions. Yet existing data aggregation pipelines and standard behavior cloning losses largely ignore this negative signal from undesired actions, leading to overfitting to teacher's actions and an increasing reliance on costly expert data. To address this limitation, we propose Set-Supervised Diffusion Policy (SDP), a novel learning framework that utilizes contrastive action-chunk data to train diffusion policies from human corrections. From paired positive and negative action-chunks, SDP constructs a set of desired action-chunks and designs a training pipeline that encourages the diffusion policy to align with the set. Through extensive experiments across multiple robotic manipulation tasks, we demonstrate that SDP consistently improves policy performance, with particularly strong gains in robustness to noisy data. Moreover, SDP induces high-quality aggregated datasets, enabling more efficient and reliable policy learning from human-in-the-loop corrections. Our code is available at https://set-supervised-diffusion-policy.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的扩散策略学习框架SDP，能够更高效地利用人类干预中的正负反馈，提高机器人操作策略的鲁棒性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散策略和行为克隆方法容易陷入分布漂移，需要大量昂贵的专家数据且对不良行为的学习信号利用不足，导致泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出Set-Supervised Diffusion Policy（SDP）框架，通过将人类纠正提供的正、负行动片段进行对比学习，构建期望行动集合并通过新的训练流程优化模型，使扩散策略对正面行动更为敏感、对负面行动产生区分。
AI.result: 在多个机器人操作任务中，SDP显著提升了策略性能，尤其在面对噪声数据时表现出更强鲁棒性，并能高效聚合高质量的数据集。
AI.conclusion: SDP方法能更有效地从人类干预中学习，减少对专家数据的依赖，提高策略泛化与实际部署时的可靠性。

title: Shape-Prior-Based Point Cloud Completion for Single-Stage Fully Sparse 3D Object Detection
summary: Single-stage fully sparse 3D object detectors rely on point clouds data to detect objects in autonomous driving scenarios. However, the sparsity and incompleteness of point clouds significantly limit the performance of 3D object detection. To address this issue, this paper proposes a point clouds completion method specifically designed for single-stage fully sparse detectors. The entire shape-prior-based completion process consists of two consecutive steps. In the first step, we design a novel Instance Selection module, which is capable of identifying point clouds corresponding to foreground objects even when the baseline model does not generate proposals, while effectively ignoring the point clouds of background regions. In the second step, we introduce a novel Alignment-Based Point Completion module, which aligns the point clouds of foreground objects with prototypes in terms of both their centers and orientations. Subsequently, points are selected from the prototype to fill in the missing parts of the foreground object. We evaluated our method on two single-stage fully sparse detectors using the KITTI dataset. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves the detection performance, confirming its effectiveness and generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文针对单阶段全稀疏3D目标检测中点云稀疏和不完整的问题，提出了专门的点云补全方法，并在KITTI数据集上显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 单阶段稀疏型3D检测器在自动驾驶点云数据上受限于点云稀疏和不完整，导致检测效率和准确率降低，需要新的方法提升点云信息的完整性，从而提升检测性能。
AI.method: 提出两步式形状先验点云补全方法：第一步设计了实例选择模块，能识别前景目标的点云并忽略背景点；第二步引入基于对齐的补全模块，将前景目标点云与原型在中心和朝向上对齐，从原型中选择点以补全遗漏区域。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集和两种单阶段全稀疏检测器上，实验显示所提方法能显著提升3D目标检测的性能，证明有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的点云补全策略，有效缓解了稀疏检测器中点云不完整的问题，提升了自动驾驶场景下的3D目标检测精度。

title: Detection vs. Execution: Single-Bucket Probes Miss Half the Mamba-2 State Sink
summary:
Mechanistic interpretability often assumes that probes identifying a representational signature also identify the circuit executing the corresponding computation. We show that this assumption can fail systematically in Mamba-2. Studying the state sink (disproportionate Delta-gate activation on boundary tokens, analogous to the attention sink), we find that single-bucket probes recover only a small execution layer while missing a much larger detection layer with the same representational signature.
  In Mamba-2, the state sink decomposes into two functional head sets. Single-bucket BOS-specialist heads (about 5% of heads at 2.7B) causally support both BOS-context and newline-target predictions across model scales and corpora. Dual heads (27-35% of heads, recovered by multi-class aggregation of the same probe) show stronger BOS-newline representational similarity but substantially weaker causal effects under ablation. Representational similarity does not imply functional equivalence.
  This distinction matters for downstream behaviour: ablating BOS-specialist heads collapses RULER NIAH retrieval accuracy from 1.00 to 0.00 at 1024 context length in both Mamba-1 2.8B and Mamba-2 2.7B, while size-matched complements preserve baseline performance. A random channel-bucketing control rules out substrate granularity alone, implicating Mamba-2's head-shared Delta projection. Probe-derived specialty can identify execution circuits; at coarse granularity the same probe also recovers detection circuits, and separating them requires class-conditional ablation rather than class-conditional cosine.

AI.tldr: 本论文讨论了在 Mamba-2 模型中，单纯依靠探针（probe）确定的表征特征未必等同于实际执行相关计算的电路。研究发现，探针可能漏检重要的执行层，并且表征的相似性不等同于功能等价。
AI.motivation: 当前许多机理解释性工作假设，能够通过探针识别的特征就能对应到模型中的真实计算路径。但这一假设在实际模型分析中可能存在系统性误区。本研究旨在揭示并深入分析这一假设的局限性。
AI.method: 作者主要分析了 Mamba-2 中关于 'state sink' 现象，通过单 bucket 和多类别探针，对执行层与检测层的区分进行了实验。开展了头（head）失活（ablation）实验，并比较了不同类别探针的捕获情况，验证了表征与因果效应的关系。
AI.result: 实验显示，单 bucket 探针仅捕捉了少部分执行层而漏检较大的检测层。表征最相似的 dual heads 在失活实验中的因果效果较弱，而 BOS-specialist heads 的失活极大影响了下游任务性能。检测与执行电路可被区分。
AI.conclusion: 同一探针可能同时识别到执行电路和检测电路，但两者非等价。区分它们需要基于类别的失活实验而非表征相似性，从而对模型机理解释性工作提出重要提醒。

title: Closed-Form Pose Estimation of Endoluminal Medical Devices via Gradiometer-Based Electromagnetic Localization System
summary: Embedded magnetic tracking holds highly attractive prospects for remote navigation of endoluminal medical devices. However, existing six-degree-of-freedom pose recovery approaches often require pre-calibrated workspace field maps or iterative nonlinear optimization. This letter presents a Gradiometer-Based Electromagnetic Localization System (GELS), a closed-form tracking framework that uses a compact magnetometer array as an embedded quasi-gradiometer to estimate local magnetic fields and gradient tensors. These quantities are mapped by the Euler homogeneous relation to displacements between source and array, from which multi-source Procrustes registration recovers the array orientation and position using at least three non-collinear sources. The algorithm requires known source positions and array geometry, but no pre-calibrated workspace field maps, initial pose guesses, or calibrated excitation-source moments. The recovered pose also enables a proof-of-concept sub-level dipole localization task by serving as a mobile magnetic reference frame. Benchtop experiments across sensor-array configurations and excitation modes demonstrate sequence-averaged position errors of \SI{10.80}{\milli\meter}--\SI{15.57}{\milli\meter}, a fastest update rate of \SI{14.49}{\hertz}, and a median solver runtime of \SI{172.00}{\micro\second}. A perturbation-based error propagation analysis further identifies inter-sensor inconsistency and dipole-model mismatch as the dominant accuracy limits, thereby informing future sensor array and magnetic source design for further reducing pose-estimation error.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于梯度计的电磁定位系统（GELS），无需预先校准磁场地图，实现医疗器械的高效、闭式六自由度定位，实验显示其具有较高精度和实时性能。
AI.motivation: 远程导航内腔医疗设备需要高精度、实时的六自由度位姿跟踪。现有方法常需繁琐的校准、初值或优化，实际应用受限。因此，亟需一种简化流程、计算高效但精度可靠的新型定位方法。
AI.method: 本文提出GELS系统，将紧凑磁场传感器阵列作为准梯度计，测量局部磁场和梯度张量，通过欧拉同质关系计算源和阵列的相对位移，并用多源Procrustes配准恢复阵列的位置与姿态。该方法仅需已知激励源的位置和阵列几何信息，无需预校磁场地图或初值估计。
AI.result: 台架实验在不同传感器阵列和激励模式下实现了10.80~15.57毫米的平均定位误差、14.49 Hz的最快更新率和172微秒的中位数求解时长。误差分析表明，主要误差来源为传感器一致性和偶极子模型不匹配。
AI.conclusion: GELS系统实现了无需繁琐校准、实时高效的医疗器械六自由度定位，误差分析为后续传感器阵列和磁源设计提供了方向，有望进一步提升定位精度，促进远程医疗导航发展。

title: Wavelet-Fusion Diffusion Model for Multimodal Brain MRI Synthesis with Modality and Metadata Conditioning
comment: 51 pages, 7 figures, including supplementary material. Submitted to Imaging Neuroscience
summary: Multimodal MRI provides complementary information for neuroimaging analysis, where different imaging modalities capture distinct anatomical, tissue, and pathological features that support the development and evaluation of downstream AI applications. Although large-scale structural MRI resources are increasingly available, their modality coverage is often uneven across public and pooled neuroimaging datasets. This uneven modality coverage is further complicated by heterogeneity across sites, scanners, and acquisition protocols, as well as demographic and clinical variables that are often sparse, inconsistently recorded, or unavailable across studies. Synthetic MRI generation can help address this imbalance by synthesizing target-modality volumes for dataset augmentation and controlled synthetic cohort creation. However, many existing MRI synthesis approaches are trained on narrow modality sets or relatively homogeneous cohorts, limiting their applicability to large pooled neuroimaging resources where modality availability, acquisition protocols, and metadata coverage vary substantially across datasets. Diffusion models have become an attractive approach for MRI synthesis because of their strong sample fidelity and diversity, but sampling directly in 3D voxel space is computationally expensive and slow at inference. Latent diffusion improves practicality by synthesizing MRI in a learned, 3D latent space, although generation quality depends on the autoencoder's reconstruction fidelity and the resulting latent distribution. Our approach combines a Wavelet-Fusion variational autoencoder (WF-VAE) latent compressor with a conditional 3D U-Net diffusion model trained in the learned latent space using explicit modality and metadata conditioning. Our proposed Wavelet-Fusion Diffusion Model (WFDM) achieved the strongest distributional alignment among the evaluated synthetic MRI generators.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的多模态MRI合成方法，用于解决大规模神经影像数据中模态不均和元数据异质性的问题，提高合成MRI数据的质量和分布一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经影像公开和合并数据集中，不同MRI模态的覆盖率不均，且受限于采集协议、硬件、人口学和临床变量等多样性，影响AI下游应用开发及评估。通过高质量的合成MRI可以平衡数据集、增强训练集及控制性队列创建，但目前的合成方法多局限于有限模态或同质队列，适用性有限。
AI.method: 作者提出将Wavelet-Fusion变分自编码器（WF-VAE）与条件3D U-Net扩散模型结合，在学到的3D潜空间中进行MRI合成，并结合模态和元数据进行显式条件化训练。这样既提高了合成效率又保证了合成质量。
AI.result: 该方法在多种合成MRI生成器中表现出最强的分布一致性，即合成数据与真实数据的统计分布最为接近。
AI.conclusion: WFDM方法为多模态MRI合成提供了更高效且表现更佳的解决方案，有望促进医学影像AI的发展，提升神经影像大数据的可用性和泛化能力。

title: HypothesisMed: Inference-Time Answer Fusion and Structured Hypothesis-Space Reporting for Biomedical Question Answering
summary: Biomedical question answering with large language models is commonly evaluated using answer accuracy, but answer accuracy alone does not indicate whether a model can produce parseable outputs, follow structured reliability instructions, recognize weak answer spaces, or avoid confident incorrect commitments. This paper presents HypothesisMed, an inference-time reliability pipeline for biomedical multiple-choice question answering. It combines direct, chain-of-thought, HypothesisMed-v3 prompting, and answer fusion. The final answer is selected by fusion, while HypothesisMed-v3 supplies SPACE labels and confidence information. SPACE labels mark the answer space as VALID, INCOMPLETE, or CONTRADICTED. We evaluate Qwen2.5-7B, Phi-4-mini, DeepSeek-R1-32B, and BioMistral-7B on MedQA, MedMCQA, and PubMedQA using 1,000 examples per dataset. The pipeline improves weighted accuracy over each model's best direct or chain-of-thought baseline while increasing parse and SPACE coverage. We also scale evaluation to Qwen2.5-7B and Phi-4-mini using 10,183 examples per model. Fusion improves Phi-4-mini accuracy from 0.4296 to 0.5192, while Qwen2.5-7B chain-of-thought remains slightly higher in answer accuracy. However, Qwen2.5-7B fusion achieves complete parse and SPACE coverage with much lower false commitment. A 12,000-example SPACE stress test shows answer-space diagnosis remains difficult, with SPACE accuracy of 0.3074 for Qwen2.5-7B and 0.4168 for Phi-4-mini. These results show that answer accuracy, parseability, structured reliability reporting, calibration behavior, and false-commitment behavior are separable capabilities. The main contribution is not a universal state-of-the-art claim, but a reproducible inference-time framework for evaluating biomedical question answering models as auditable workflow components under structured reliability constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了HypothesisMed，一种用于生物医学多项选择题问答的推理时可靠性评估流程，大幅提升了答案准确性、可解析性以及结构化可靠性标签覆盖。
AI.motivation: 传统生物医学问答模型大多仅通过答案准确率评估，但这不足以反映模型是否能生成可解析的输出、遵循结构化可靠性指导、识别答案空间不确定性以及避免自信但错误的断言。为了更全面地评价和提升问答系统的可靠性和可解释性，作者提出了本研究。
AI.method: 提出HypothesisMed推理管线，将直接推理、思维链（chain-of-thought）、HypothesisMed-v3提示工程与答案融合结合。HypothesisMed-v3会给出答案空间的结构化标签（SPACE：包括VALID, INCOMPLETE, CONTRADICTED）与置信信息。最终答案通过融合机制选择，同时输出解析性和SPACE标签信息。
AI.result: 在MedQA、MedMCQA和PubMedQA 3个数据集上，管线在Qwen2.5-7B、Phi-4-mini、DeepSeek-R1-32B和BioMistral-7B等模型上均提升了加权准确率，并大幅提升了解析率和SPACE标签覆盖。扩大量级实验表明，Phi-4-mini准确率由0.4296提升至0.5192，Qwen2.5-7B融合则实现了更高解析率与几乎无虚假承诺。此外，SPACE压力测试表明不同模型的空间诊断依然存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 答案准确率、可解析性、结构化可靠性报告、校准行为与虚假承诺是可区分的模型能力。该工作核心贡献是提供了可复现的推理时评估框架，可作为生物医学问答模型在结构化可靠性约束下的高审计性工作流组件，而非追求单一指标的SOTA。

title: Learning Action-Conditional and Object-Centric Gaussian Splatting World Models for Rigid Objects
summary: World models enable intelligent agents to predict the consequences of their actions on the environment. In this paper, we propose Multi Rigid Object Gaussian World Model (MRO-GWM), a novel model that learns action-conditional dynamics of rigid objects in 3D. By representing the scene by object-centric Gaussians, we can represent arbitrary object shapes and multi-object scenes. We develop a novel spatio-temporal transformer architecture that predicts future rigid body motion from a history of object Gaussians and future actions. Objects are represented by their Gaussians in a canonical frame, which allows for describing object motion as rigid body transformation. Our model is trained on reconstructions from multiple viewpoints, which requires the model to handle partial observations of objects due to occlusions. We analyze prediction performance of our approach on synthetic datasets composed of typical household objects with multi-object dynamics and interactions by a robot end effector. We also evaluate our model in model-predictive control for non-prehensile manipulation in simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于高斯表示的3D多刚体对象世界模型（MRO-GWM），用于预测复杂场景下物体的运动及控制。
AI.motivation: 当前世界模型对多刚体对象及其复杂交互模拟能力较弱，尤其在3D场景下难以精准描述和预测物体间的动力学和结果。本文旨在提升模型在多物体、三维刚体交互与机器人操作控制中的预测表现。
AI.method: 作者提出了MRO-GWM方法，将场景中各物体以高斯函数在规范坐标系中表达，利用新的时空Transformer结构，结合历史Gaussians及未来动作，预测多刚体的运动轨迹。训练方式基于不同视角重建，能处理物体遮挡与局部观测的不完整性。
AI.result: 在合成的多物体三维交互数据集（如典型家庭物品与机器人末端执行器）上，MRO-GWM展示了优异的物体动力学预测能力。同时在仿真环境下，实现了基于模型预测控制的高效非抓取操作。
AI.conclusion: MRO-GWM能有效建模和预测3D多刚体对象的动作后果，适用于复杂交互场景和机器人控制任务，有望提升智能体在实际环境中的自主行为能力。

title: FROST-STA: Frozen Dense Features for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation
summary: Short-term anticipation in egocentric video requires more than recognizing the current scene: a system must infer which object the camera wearer will contact, which action will follow, and how soon the contact will happen. This report describes FROST-STA, our submission to the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation (STA) Challenge at EgoVis 2026. For each query time, the model produces a ranked set of structured hypotheses containing an active-object box, noun label, verb label, time-to-contact (TTC), and confidence. FROST-STA builds on the V-JEPA 2.1 STA evaluation protocol, but adapts it to the challenge by using object-centric decoding, multi-head prediction, and a submission-oriented training and ensembling recipe. We keep the V-JEPA 2.1 ViT-G backbone fixed and extract two dense token streams: video tokens from a short clip resized to 384 pixels before the query, and image tokens from the last observed high-resolution frame. A compact alignment module, consisting of an attentive probe and frame-guided temporal pooling, maps the clip representation onto the spatial reference of the final frame before fusing it with image features. The fused maps are decoded by Faster R-CNN-style STA heads that estimate box offsets, nouns, verbs, TTC values, and interaction quality. For the final leaderboard entry, we train for 25 epochs with the official training split plus additional permitted validation annotations, and combine predictions across eight heads and checkpoints from epochs 15-25. FROST-STA obtains 5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP on the official test server, ranking second in the challenge and showing that frozen dense image-video features can serve as a strong basis for object-level interaction forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了FROST-STA方法，在Ego4D短期物体交互预测挑战中取得第二名（Top-5 mAP为5.13），该方法基于冻结的ViT-G骨干网络，通过融合高分辨率帧与视频片段特征进行多头预测，实现对即将发生的物体交互的盒、名词、动词、接触时间等的结构化预测。
AI.motivation: 现有的以第一视角视频为基础的短期预测任务，需要系统不仅仅识别当前场景，还要推断将交互的对象、接下来的动作及其发生的时间，对模型提出了更高要求。为此，团队基于已有评测协议设计了更适合挑战任务的解决方案。
AI.method: 方法基于V-JEPA 2.1评测协议，使用冻结的ViT-G模型提取短视频片段的稠密视频Token流和最后一帧的高分辨率图像Token流。采用注意力对齐模块（由探针和时序池化组成）将片段特征与图片特征融合，然后由Faster R-CNN风格的多头预测头解码出目标框、名词、动词、接触时间等。提交时联合多头和不同训练时期的模型结果进行集成。
AI.result: 最终模型在官方测试集上Top-5 mAP为5.13，挑战排名第二。实验表明冻结的密集图像-视频特征为物体级交互预测提供了有力基础。
AI.conclusion: 作者证明了不用微调大型骨干网（ViT-G），只通过精心设计的融合机制与多头结构，就能实现优异的短期物体交互预测效果，具有明确的实用价值和推广潜力。

title: Lost in Delusion: Examining LLM Safety Under User Delusions and Distress
summary: LLM chatbots increasingly serve as a first source of support for people in psychological distress, including those whose distress is entangled with delusional beliefs. Prior work on LLM mental-health safety largely evaluates general therapeutic quality or single-turn crisis detection, leaving unclear how models behave when distress is intertwined with delusion over sustained conversations. We address this gap with matched multi-turn simulations, across clinically grounded personas and six LLMs, that pair each delusional conversation with a distress-only control to isolate the effect of delusional framing. This reveals a recognition-intervention gap: models detect distress at comparable rates regardless of framing, yet sharply fail to act on it once distress is embedded in delusion, with safety interventions suppressed by up to 4.5x. The failure tracks accumulated acceptance of the user's premises rather than emotional validation. Worse, the intuitive fix of prompting models to assess user distress backfires under delusional framing; only delusion-aware prompting with explicit response guidance closes the gap, and even this depends on a delusion classifier that is itself unreliable on the most vulnerable models. Safe deployment therefore requires treating delusional framing as a distinct risk signal that overrides conversational accommodation.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了大型语言模型（LLM）在长对话情境下应对心理困扰与妄想混合时的安全性表现，发现模型对妄想嵌入困扰时干预大幅减少，提示安全部署需区别对待妄想场景。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM心理健康安全研究多关注一般性疗愈质量和单轮危机检测，缺乏对心理困扰与妄想交织、长对话场景下的模型行为评估。
AI.method: 采用匹配的多轮对话模拟方法，基于临床设定设计多种角色，六种主流LLM参与，每组妄想困扰对话均有非妄想困扰对照，分析模型接受度、困扰识别、干预行为等指标。
AI.result: 模型能以相近频率识别困扰，无论是否有妄想情境，但面对妄想时明显减少安全干预，干预下降最高达4.5倍。模型干预缺失与接受用户妄想前提有关，而非简单情绪安抚。带妄想的显式引导提示能改善表现，但依赖妄想分类器，分类器对部分模型的识别不可靠。
AI.conclusion: LLM面对含妄想的困扰时存在安全干预缺口，安全部署需将妄想情境作为独立风险信号处理，以避免“顺应式”对话造成安全风险。

title: Co-training with Ego-centric Video and Demonstration for Robot Navigation Task
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are promising for diverse robotic tasks, but their performance heavily depends on large-scale high-quality training data, whose collection on real robots is costly and time-consuming. While prior work has explored augmenting manipulation datasets with egocentric human videos, applying such approaches to mobile robot navigation remains challenging due to viewpoint changes during locomotion. In this paper, we propose a framework that converts egocentric walking videos into datasets for mobile robot imitation learning. The proposed method estimates camera motion from human videos and transforms it into action representations compatible with ground mobile robots. By jointly training a VLA model on human-derived and robot-collected datasets, the model achieves improved language understanding and more robust action generation than training with either data source alone. Experiments on a fruit-search navigation task demonstrate that human egocentric videos provide an effective and scalable data source for mobile robot learning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种方法，将人类第一视角步行视频转化为移动机器人模仿学习的数据集，并显著提升了机器人导航任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）在机器人任务中具有巨大潜力，但高质量训练数据获取成本高。虽然已有研究尝试用人类视频拓展操控数据集，但这种方法在移动机器人导航领域因视角变化较大而难以直接应用。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个新框架：估算人类第一视角视频中的相机运动，并将其转化为地面移动机器人适用的动作表示。然后将这些由人类视频转换而来的数据与真实机器人采集的数据集联合训练VLA模型。
AI.result: 在水果搜索导航任务上实验证明，使用人类第一视角视频显著提升了语言理解能力和动作生成的鲁棒性，而且比单一数据源训练效果更好。
AI.conclusion: 将人类第一视角视频用于移动机器人学习是一种高效、可扩展的数据获取方式，有助于提升移动机器人在复杂任务中的表现。

title: VICR: Visual In-Context Restoration for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) requires balancing structural fidelity to degraded observations with realistic detail synthesis. However, existing generative Real-ISR methods often rely on entangled conditioning mechanisms, leading to structural drift or semantically inconsistent details. To address this issue, we propose Visual In-Context Restoration (VICR), a Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based framework that formulates Real-ISR as image completion. Specifically, we introduce a decoupled visual prior injection mechanism that derives local and global cues from the low-quality (LQ) image: local cues help recover image structures and support high-frequency detail synthesis, while global cues guide overall generation and promote semantic consistency. For ambiguous regions under severe degradation, VICR employs an inference-time agent to refine semantic prompts using visual evidence from the LQ input while keeping model parameters fixed. Experiments show that VICR achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple Real-ISR benchmarks with only 127M trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种基于扩散变换器（DiT）的新型图像超分辨率（Real-ISR）方法，能更好地恢复真实图像结构与细节，性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式真实图像超分辨方法容易引起结构漂移或语义不一致，因为其条件机制交织复杂，导致重建出的细节与原始结构不符。为了解决这一关键问题，作者希望在结构保真与细节真实感之间取得更好平衡。
AI.method: 作者提出了视觉上下文修复（VICR）框架，将真实超分辨视为图像补全问题。方法核心是解除耦合的视觉先验注入机制：分别从低质量图像中提取局部和全局线索进行引导。局部线索有助于结构恢复与高频细节合成，全局线索则用于整体生成与语义一致性。此外，对严重退化区域，VICR还引入推理时智能体优化语义提示，仅利用低质量输入的视觉证据，无需改变模型参数。
AI.result: 实验证明，VICR在多个真实图像超分辨基准上均达到当前最优性能，并且模型参数量只有127M。
AI.conclusion: VICR创新性地采用解除耦合的视觉先验，能更有效地兼顾结构保真与细节还原，显著优于现有方法，为真实图像超分辨提供了新方向。

title: Robust Asynchronous Planning via Auto-Formalization
summary: LLMs can plan by either generating action sequences directly as a Planner or translating tasks into domain specific language for an external solver as a Formalizer. While most real-world tasks are asynchronous with non-uniform durations, concurrency, and execution-time constraints, existing benchmarks hardly cover them. We unify these asynchronous planning challenges under a single formulation and introduce the first three benchmarks that address each at scale. We conclude that the choice of formal representation primarily determines whether planning scales: as dependency graphs grow from 5 to 100 actions, Planner collapses from 96% to 5% plan accuracy and PDDL2.1 Formalizer from 13% to 0%, while CP-SAT Formalizer averages 94% and still achieves 83% at 100 actions. Faithfulness diagnostics show that PDDL2.1's predicate-based planning representation becomes brittle compared to general constraint satisfaction programs, when LLMs must keep predicates, effects, and goals consistent. Execution-time updates of planning constraints further degrade performance sharply (Planner 23.9%, PDDL2.1 0.7%, CP-SAT 46.1%), but a state-aware repair strategy that updates only event-induced constraints recovers CP-SAT Formalizer to 84.5%.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLMs）在应对包含异步性、并发和执行时约束等复杂实际任务中的规划能力，比较了不同表示下的性能，并提出了新的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的规划任务具有异步性、不同持续时间、并发和执行时约束，而现有的基准和研究很少全面涵盖这些挑战。作者希望统一定义并系统性评估LLM在复杂异步任务中的规划能力。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种统一的异步规划表述方式，并设计了三套大规模基准任务来评测LLM在Planner（直接生成动作序列）、PDDL2.1 Formalizer（转化为PDDL2.1）、CP-SAT Formalizer（转化为约束满足问题）三种方式下的性能。此外，还分析了在计划执行中约束动态变化和状态修复对模型表现的影响。
AI.result: 当依赖关系图规模从5个动作扩大到100个时，Planner的正确率从96%跌至5%，PDDL2.1 Formalizer从13%跌至0%，而CP-SAT Formalizer平均有94%，在100动作时依然有83%。在执行过程中出现新的约束后，各种方法的性能都大幅下降，但引入只修复受影响约束的策略后，CP-SAT的准确率能恢复到84.5%。
AI.conclusion: CP-SAT类型的通用约束表示对大规模异步规划任务更稳健，而且在动态不确定条件下配合高效的约束修复方法，能持续保持较高准确率。相比之下，基于谓词的PDDL2.1表达和直接生成动作的方式对大规模和复杂执行时约束任务都不够鲁棒。

title: WALL-WM: Carving World Action Modeling at the Event Joints
summary: WALL-WM is a World Action Model that shifts video-action learning from chunk-centric optimization to event-grounded Vision-Language-Action pretraining, using semantically coherent action events as the atomic unit of learning. Existing WAMs commonly initialize from multimodal or video foundation models and then optimize fixed-length action chunks conditioned directly on the current observation and instruction. Although convenient, this chunk-centric formulation creates a fundamental granularity mismatch. Language describes semantic goals and events, vision evolves through continuous scene dynamics, and actions operate at control-level timescales; forcing all three into the same fixed-length prediction window turns VLA training into short-horizon correlation fitting. WALL-WM addresses this mismatch by organizing both supervision and data around semantic events. Specifically, it pairs event-grounded VLA pretraining with a data ecosystem built from event-level captions and cluster-balanced sampling, enabling scalable learning over diverse behaviors, scenes, and task structures. From the same event-pretrained backbone, WALL-WM supports two complementary inference modes. The event mode consumes next-event descriptions and enables variable-length execution chunks, while the unified mode uses a VLM with Staircase Decoding to condition conventional fixed-length chunk inference while preserving a gradient-continuous VLA path. Together with Muon-optimizer-based large-scale pretraining infrastructure, WALL-WM provides a practical scale-up recipe for general-purpose WAMs. Experiments show that WALL-WM generalizes broadly across language, scenes, and tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance in large-scale real-world generalization evaluation.

AI.tldr: WALL-WM提出了一种事件为基础的视频动作学习模型，通过基于事件的视觉-语言-动作预训练提升通用性和泛化能力，取得了优异的实验效果。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAM）普遍使用基于固定长度片段的优化方法，但这与语言、视觉和动作的天然粒度不匹配，限制了模型的泛化和表现能力。
AI.method: WALL-WM以语义一致的动作事件为学习的原子单位，采用事件为中心的数据监督和数据采样策略，通过配对事件级的文本描述和集群均衡采样，推动视觉-语言-动作（VLA）预训练，并设计了支持事件模式和统一模式（Staircase Decoding）的推理方式，结合大规模优化基础架构。
AI.result: WALL-WM展现出跨语言、场景和任务的强泛化能力，在大规模真实世界泛化评测中达到了最先进的表现。
AI.conclusion: 基于事件的预训练和推理可以有效解决粒度不匹配问题，为更通用高效的视频动作理解和执行打下基础。

title: CR-JEPA: Cross-Modal Joint-Embedding Predictive Learning for Remote Sensing Image Retrieval
summary: Cross-modal remote sensing image retrieval aims to retrieve semantically related scenes across heterogeneous sensing modalities. This remains challenging because paired observations may differ substantially in imaging physics, spatial resolution, spectral configuration, and visual appearance. Moreover, a single retrieval projection trained with one objective may be insufficient to jointly support cross-modal semantic alignment and same-modal neighbourhood preservation. We propose CR-JEPA, a Cross-modal Retrieval Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for dual-modality remote sensing retrieval. The model uses modality-specific stems, a shared transformer trunk, and JEPA-style predictive objectives to estimate masked latent target features within and across modalities. Inspired by LeJEPA, we apply Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization to raw retrieval projections to stabilize embeddings and mitigate collapse. CR-JEPA further employs a decoupled-head design with a unified retrieval head for same-modal retrieval and a cross-modal retrieval head for cross-modal search. We evaluate CR-JEPA on BEN-14K, CBRSIR_VS, and DSRSID. On BEN-14K, CR-JEPA improves S1 to S2 retrieval from 61.23% to 75.82% and S2 to S1 retrieval from 63.73% to 75.40% over X-JEPA, while also achieving competitive same-modal retrieval with fewer parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的跨模态遥感图像检索方法CR-JEPA，能有效提升异构感知模态间的检索表现，同时保持同模态检索效果，参数量更少。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感图像检索在处理不同模态（如不同传感器、分辨率、光谱等）之间的语义对齐和保持同模态语义邻近性方面存在困难，单一检索投影难以兼顾两者。
AI.method: 提出CR-JEPA，采用模态专属特征提取、共享transformer主干和JEPA风格的预测目标，利用Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization来稳定嵌入并避免崩溃。同时采用解耦检索头，分别应对同模态和跨模态检索。
AI.result: 在BEN-14K、CBRSIR_VS、DSRSID等数据集上验证，尤其在BEN-14K上，跨模态检索准确率远超基线X-JEPA（S1 to S2: 61.23%提升至75.82%，S2 to S1: 63.73%提升至75.40%），同模态检索也保持良好且参数更少。
AI.conclusion: CR-JEPA在提升跨模态遥感图像检索精度的同时，也兼顾了同模态检索效率，具有参数精简、通用性强等优点。

title: A Registry-Bound LLM Pipeline for Evidence-Grounded Trait Extraction across Tropical Plants, Aquatic Species, and Exotic Pets
summary: We describe a registry-bound large-language-model extraction pipeline producing evidence-grounded structured trait records at scale, on cultivated tropical plant, aquatic, and pet species. Four mechanisms render LLM-derived rows auditable: a versioned 39-key closed-vocabulary trait registry constraining every admitted value to a typed schema; a per-row verbatim evidence quote tying each value to source text; a per-row confidence label (high or medium; low dropped pre-persist); and multi-version preservation. Applied to 409,880 publishable species from the Tropical Species Encyclopedia, the pipeline executed 706,220 runs and persisted 5,489,881 trait records across 409,820 species (99.985%), 81.57% at high confidence. We report three validation layers in descending evidentiary strength: at full population, 90.12% of 5,427,588 evidence-bearing rows have their quote as a verbatim source substring (93.49% excluding one compliance meta-trait); a quote-supports-value audit on n=100 stratified non-red-zone rows yielded 100/100 (lower bound 96.30%); face-validity on n=50 red-zone rows yielded 50/50 Accept (lower bound 92.86%). Per-record correctness is not claimed; 100% pending human curation. The contribution is the four-mechanism framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一套大语言模型（LLM）驱动的信息抽取流程，用于从热带物种百科中大规模生成可验证的结构化性状记录。
AI.motivation: 随着物种数据库数据量的增长，需要一种自动化、可审核、可追溯且可扩展的方法，从文本或数据库中提取高质量、结构化的性状属性，以支撑科学研究。
AI.method: 设计了四重机制用于保证LLM抽取记录的可审计性：1）受控属性注册表限定每个属性的合法值及类型；2）每条数据附带原文证据引用；3）每条数据有置信标签（低置信舍弃）；4）多版本数据保存。流程已应用于热带物种百科的40万种物种，分多次运行生成数百万条性状记录。
AI.result: 流程在409,820个物种上共生成5,489,881条性状记录，其中81.57%为高置信数据。多层次验证显示大部分数据能溯源至文献原文，少量人工抽检验证全部通过。
AI.conclusion: 该工作主要贡献在于提出并大规模实践了四重机制的LLM抽取框架，显著提高了结构化数据抽取的可验证性和可追溯性，实现了规模化的自动化信息结构化，但仍需人工审查确保每条数据准确。

title: Market-Based Replanning for Safety-Critical UAV Swarms in Search and Rescue Missions
summary: Reliable autonomous UAV swarms in Search and Rescue (SAR) missions require fault-tolerant coordination capable of sustaining operations despite agent degradation. This paper introduces the Intelligent Replanning Drone Swarm (IRDS), a distributed coordination architecture designed for resource-constrained environments. The proposed framework employs a Reverse-Auction market mechanism where agents bid to service search sectors based on a distance-weighted cost function, coupled with a geometric consensus protocol for target verification. We evaluate the approach through physics-based simulations (N=8 agents, 8x8 grid) subjected to stochastic fault injection. Results indicate that the swarm autonomously reallocates tasks from failed agents with low latency relative to the total mission duration, maintaining a mission success rate of 93% under 25% workforce degradation. The proposed framework demonstrates a robust, empirically tested method for self-healing aerial robotic coordination.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式协调架构IRDS，使无人机群在部分故障情况下依然能可靠执行搜救任务。通过市场竞价和协同协议实现任务自适应分配，经仿真验证可自愈并高效完成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机群在搜救任务中容易因单点故障或部分无人机失效导致整体任务失败，急需开发具备容错与自愈能力的分布式协调方案，以提高任务可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了IRDS架构，采用反向拍卖市场机制让各无人机基于距离加权成本为搜索区块竞标，并用几何共识协议进行目标验证，在模拟环境中加入随机故障测试方法的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在8架无人机、8x8网格、随机25%故障条件下，该方法可低延迟地进行任务重分配，保障任务成功率高达93%。
AI.conclusion: IRDS架构能够为资源受限环境下的无人机群提供强健的、可自我修复的任务协调方法，显著提升了群体在复杂环境下的任务完成率。

title: CASTLE2026 Team WDL Technical Report
summary: The CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026 evaluates long-form egocentric video question answering over 600+ hours of multi-perspective recordings. Each four-choice question requires evidence from videos, transcripts, auxiliary photos, people, days, rooms, and temporal context. We propose an evidence-aware multimodal reasoning pipeline based on Qwen. Our system parses question hints, retrieves ASR chunks, attaches auxiliary images, samples candidate video frames, and routes questions into static visual, speech/text, temporal, and mixed types with specialized prompts. Multiple inference passes are aggregated by confidence-weighted voting and converted into the official Codabench format. In ablation, LoRA improves the score from 0.21 to 0.50, and more sampled frames further raise it to 0.58. Our final system ranks first in the CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向长时 egocentric 视频问答的证据感知多模态推理系统，在CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026 中取得第一名。
AI.motivation: CASTLE Challenge 任务复杂，涉及多模态、长时间、多实体、多背景的证据联合推理，亟需高效的自动化分析系统提升问答效果。
AI.method: 基于Qwen搭建证据感知多模态推理流水线：解析题干、检索ASR文本、附加辅助图像、采样候选帧，并将问题划分为四类（静态视觉、语音/文本、时间、混合），采用专用prompt推理；多轮推理通过置信加权投票融合，输出官方格式结果。引入LoRA微调及增加候选帧采样进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 加入LoRA微调后分数从0.21提升到0.50，进一步增加采样帧后达到0.58。最终系统排名挑战赛第一。
