AI.conclusion: 系统通过多模态特定策略和模型微调大幅提升了长时多模态视频问答效果，在CASTLE Challenge 中取得领先，证明方法有效。

title: Decoding in Order-Agnostic Language Models: Chain-Rule Deviation and Uniform Spreading
summary: Order-agnostic language models (OALMs), including discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs), are trained to predict masked tokens under arbitrary conditioning sets, allowing sequences to be generated or scored under arbitrary reveal orders at inference time. In LLaDA-2.1, we report three findings. First, the learned conditionals are not exact factorizations of a coherent joint distribution: changing only the reveal order shifts target log-likelihood by up to 0.49 nats/token, so likelihood alone mixes content difficulty with path-dependent artifacts. Second, although confidence-first (CF) decoding is order-agnostic, its reveal orders are close to left-to-right (L2R) on content tokens. Third, we propose a complementary diagnostic based on the shape of the confidence trace. A uniform-spreading theorem shows that, at fixed total likelihood, target recoverability is maximized when per-step confidence is spread uniformly; the resulting deviation motivates $\mathrm{Var}(\log q_t)$ as a diagnostic for comparing decoding paths. Across C4 and four downstream benchmarks, low variance separates structured paths from random ordering, and variance is consistently associated with downstream correctness. These results support reporting mean confidence and confidence variance jointly when comparing OALM decoding paths.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了顺序无关的语言模型（OALM）在不同生成路径下的行为，包括提出诊断指标来更好比较不同生成顺序的表现，以及其对下游任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 虽然OALM支持灵活的token揭示顺序，但其学习到的条件概率分布并不严格对应于一个一致且连贯的联合分布，对模型评估和生成路径依赖提出了挑战。
AI.method: 1）分析在不同揭示顺序下目标token的log-likelihood波动；2）研究confidence-first（CF）解码路径与传统左到右生成之间的关系；3）提出基于步骤置信度分布的诊断方法，并用置信度方差Var(log q_t)来量化生成路径的结构性。
AI.result: 揭示顺序变化会显著影响目标token的似然，且置信度优先路径在内容token上与左到右生成近似。引入的置信度方差指标能有效区分结构化与随机生成路径，并与下游任务表现相关，低方差对应更高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 仅报告平均似然不足以全面评价OALM，应联合报告均值和置信度方差。本文提出的新诊断指标有助于理解与改进顺序无关语言模型的解码与应用。

title: World-Task Factorization for Robot Learning
summary: Robot learning must produce policies that generalize to new combinations of constraints, teammates, and environments. To achieve this, we must structurally factor the policy, which is a choice that dictates what generalizes, what requires retraining, and what remains entangled. Existing methods span a wide spectrum, from expecting structure to emerge from data scaling, to hand-designing it via hierarchies, skill libraries or learned specializations. In this paper, we study what we argue is the most fundamental factorization in robotics: separating the world from the task. We investigate the conditions under which this factorization is principled. World factors are properties of the embodied system and the environment; they exist independently of intent. Task factors are defined by the task's logic over what the world admits. We formalize this asymmetry through Bayesian model evidence: it aligns with the data-generating process, maintains high likelihood through an analytical world model, and reduces the Occam razor's penalty on task parameters. We instantiate this factorization by pairing AICON, a differentiable graph of recursive estimators and interconnections that is compositional, operates without task-specific data, and propagates cost gradients to actuators, with a compact, learned policy that modulates gradient paths. Gradients serve as the interface between the two factors: they carry world structure through the graph and task structure through costs, enabling low-dimensional learning while preserving structural generalization. We test the world/task factorization across three problems that encompass heterogeneous robots, environments, task logic and sensorimotor modalities. Our framework outperforms end-to-end baselines and analytical heuristics in all settings, generalizes zero-shot to out-of-distribution configurations, and transfers to real hardware without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将机器人学习策略分解为“世界-任务”两个基本要素的结构化方法，并通过梯度作为桥梁，实现了高效泛化与迁移能力，在多个异构任务上优于端到端和启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人学习方法要么依赖海量数据让结构自发涌现，要么依赖人工构建复杂的层级结构或技能库，不易泛化到新约束和任务。为实现更强泛化，作者认为最根本的结构化方式是将“与意图无关的世界因素”与“由任务目标定义的任务因素”解耦。
AI.method: 提出了通过贝叶斯模型证据形式化“世界-任务”结构分解的合理性，利用AICON（可微分图结构）建模世界因素，结合紧凑可学习策略来调制梯度传递路径。梯度作为两者的接口，将世界结构和任务结构结合，使学习能够低维高效，并具有良好的结构泛化能力。
AI.result: 在3个涵盖不同机器人、环境、任务逻辑与传感运动形态的问题上实验，结构化方法在所有场景下均优于端到端神经网络和分析启发式基线，并能zero-shot泛化到分布外新配置，在真实硬件迁移时无需再训练。
AI.conclusion: “世界-任务”分解为机器人学习带来了显著的泛化、迁移与高效性优势，对大规模、多样环境下的机器人自主学习具有重要意义。

title: Scaling Parallel Sequence Models to Foundation-Scale Vision Encoders
summary:
Vision foundation models are bottlenecked by the quadratic cost of self-attention, which limits usable resolution and increases the cost of large-scale pretraining. Subquadratic alternatives such as linear attention and state-space models reduce this cost, but often serialize images into 1D token streams and weaken the 2D spatial structure important for vision. Generalized Spatial Propagation Networks (GSPN) instead propagate context directly on the 2D grid through line-scan recurrences, achieving near-linear complexity without positional embeddings, but have seen little use as foundation-scale encoders.
  We present C-GSPN, a foundation-scale vision encoder based on 2D spatial propagation. C-GSPN makes the operator practical through three improvements: (1) a fast GSPN CUDA kernel that fuses per-step launches into a single warp-specialized implementation with shared-memory tiling, coalesced access, and a compact multi-channel propagation, reaching over 90% of peak memory bandwidth and running up to 40--52x faster than the original GSPN implementation; (2) a compressed latent-space propagation block with fused normalization, which turns kernel-level speed into block- and model-level efficiency; and (3) a two-stage cross-operator distillation recipe that trains the new architecture from an attention teacher without the cost of from-scratch foundation-scale training. Distilled with 600M image-text pairs, C-GSPN matches an isomorphic ViT baseline with 15% fewer parameters, improves ADE20K segmentation by +2.1%, transfers to high resolution with a fraction of the data needed from scratch, and delivers a 4x end-to-end block speedup at 2K with single-pass, tiling-free inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉基础模型编码器C-GSPN，通过高效的2D空间传播方法，兼顾运算效率和空间结构表达，显著提升了大规模训练和高分辨率推理的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉基础模型常用自注意力机制，但其计算复杂度随输入规模呈二次增长，限制了高分辨率处理和大规模预训练。已有的线性替代方法往往忽略2D空间结构。此外，基于2D空间传播的GSPN虽保留了空间特性，但实际应用受限。
AI.method: C-GSPN模型采用2D空间传播（GSPN）为核心，通过三项创新提升其实用性：1）高效的GSPN CUDA内核，从算子级极致优化，提高显存带宽利用率，实现数十倍速度提升；2）融合归一化的压缩式潜在空间传播结构，实现模型级效率提升；3）两阶段跨算子蒸馏，通过模仿注意力模型，无需从零大规模训练，缩短开发周期。
AI.result: C-GSPN在600M图文对蒸馏后，参数量较等结构ViT减少15%，ADE20K分割任务性能提升2.1%，在高分辨率下可用更少数据实现迁移，端到端速度提升4倍。
AI.conclusion: C-GSPN打破了视觉基础模型的计算瓶颈，实现了高效的2D空间建模，易于大规模预训练和高分辨率推理，并兼顾精度和效率，有望替代现有自注意力方案。

title: PolySpeech-100: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Speech Understanding Across 100+ Languages and Dialects
summary: While End-to-End (E2E) Speech-Large Language Models (Speech-LLMs) are rapidly evolving, their evaluation methodologies remain limited to the era of simple transcription. Existing benchmarks suffer from three critical limitations: a pronounced bias towards high-resource languages, a focus on low-level recognition (ASR) rather than semantic reasoning, and a neglect of regional dialects. To bridge this gap, we introduce PolySpeech-100, a massive-scale benchmark designed to assess `native-level' speech comprehension across 110 linguistic variants. We employ a novel hybrid construction pipeline that augments gold-standard human recordings with instruction-driven synthetic speech, allowing us to cover 19 distinct Chinese dialects and over 80 low-resource languages. Extensive evaluation of 22 state-of-the-art models (including Gemini-3, GPT-Audio, and Qwen2.5-Omni) yields pivotal insights. First, we demonstrate that open-source E2E models outperform Cascade (ASR+LLM) systems on heavy dialects, proving that direct audio processing preserves critical paralinguistic cues and prosodic features (e.g., intonation, stress) that are often lost in standard transcription. Second, we reveal a significant performance gap: while commercial models maintain robustness, open-source models suffer catastrophic degradation on low-resource languages. Finally, counter-intuitively, we observe that under standard zero-shot settings, Chain-of-Thought prompting frequently degrades speech understanding performance for most evaluated models, revealing a potential modality alignment gap in current architectures. PolySpeech-100 establishes a rigorous standard for the next generation of inclusive, omni-capable Speech-LLMs. The data, demo, and code are publicly available at https://github.com/YoungSeng/PolySpeech-100.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PolySpeech-100大规模评测基准，致力于衡量110种语言变体下的‘母语级’语音理解能力，填补现有Speech-LLM评测中资源倾斜、语义理解不足和方言覆盖差等短板。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端语音大模型（Speech-LLMs）的评测主要局限于高资源语言、自动语音识别（ASR）层面，且极少覆盖方言和低资源语言，难以全面反映模型实际语音理解能力。
AI.method: 构建了PolySpeech-100基准，结合真人录音与基于指令的合成语音，覆盖19种中文方言和80多种低资源语言。对22个SOTA模型（如Gemini-3、GPT-Audio等）进行了系统性评测，并分析多种模型架构和推理策略（如Chain-of-Thought）。
AI.result: 发现：（1）端到端开源模型在方言重语种上优于ASR+LLM串联系统，可保留语调、重音等特征；（2）开源模型在低资源语种上性能大幅下降，而商用模型表现稳定；（3）CO-Thought 推理在零样本设置下反而会降低语音理解效果。
AI.conclusion: PolySpeech-100为未来具包容性、全能型的Speech-LLM评测提供了权威标准，对模型改进与多语种语音理解发展具有重要指导意义。

title: Network Distributed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Consensus Control of Quadcopters
comment: This is the Author Accepted Manuscript version of a paper accepted for publication. The final published version is available via IEEE Xplore
summary: This paper proposes a Network Distributed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (ND-MARL) framework for quadcopter consensus control. Compared to conventional multi-agent MARL formulations that rely on centralized planning or fully decentralized execution, ND-MARL incorporates the swarm communication graph into the decision process. Under a 2-Neighbor communication topology, each agent observes information of only two neighbors and outputs an action through a distributed policy. A high-level distributed consensus planner is trained using Multi-Agent Soft Actor-Critic (MASAC) and embedded in a hierarchical stack to generate reference target positions tracked by a low-level quadcopter controller. Results demonstrate smooth consensus trajectories and planner-tracker integration when compared to a centralized MARL controller. Most notably, the learned controller exhibits zero-shot scalability, as policies trained on a three-agent system are deployed to swarms of up to 250 agents under the same 2-Neighbor communication topology without retraining or fine-tuning, achieving consistent convergence with increasing steady-state spread at large team sizes due to sparse information propagation. These findings highlight ND-MARL as a stable framework for distributed, communication-aware quadcopter consensus control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于四旋翼共识控制的网络分布式多智能体强化学习（ND-MARL）框架，能够实现大规模无人机群的分布式、通信感知共识控制。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法要么依赖集中式规划，要么完全分布式，但在实际无人机群协作中，这些方式受限于通信约束和扩展性。本文旨在结合通信拓扑，提升协同控制的稳定性与可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出ND-MARL框架，将群体通信图直接嵌入决策过程中。在2邻居通信拓扑下，每个智能体只观测两个邻居的信息，并通过分布式策略输出动作。利用分层架构，用MASAC训练高层共识规划器，输出目标轨迹，再由低层控制器跟踪。
AI.result: 实验显示，与集中式MARL方法相比，该方法能实现平滑的共识轨迹和更好的规划—跟踪协同。此外，单在三智能体系统上训练的策略可零样本推广到多达250个智能体，无需再训练，表现出良好的扩展性和一致性——大团队规模下稳态分布增大但能收敛。
AI.conclusion: ND-MARL为分布式、通信感知的四旋翼共识控制提供了一个稳定且可扩展的方案，特别适用于大规模无人机编队等实际场景。

title: SkyShield: Occupancy as a Safety Interface for Low-Altitude UAV Autonomy
summary: For low-altitude Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) autonomy, 3D spatial understanding is not merely a perception objective, but the safety interface between human instructions and physical flight. In human-scale urban airspace below 20 meters, thin geometry, occlusions, vegetation, and urban clutter define whether an aerial agent can safely enter the space ahead. However, existing UAV datasets mainly provide 2D annotations or 3D boxes, while driving-oriented occupancy benchmarks assume stable ground-level sensor rigs. Both miss the defining regime of low-altitude flight: a front-facing monocular camera observing occupied and free space from a moving aerial body with frame-wise changing 6-DoF pose and camera extrinsics. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{SkyShield}, to the best of our knowledge the first front-view monocular semantic occupancy benchmark for urban UAV flight below 20 meters. Built on CARLA, SkyShield contains 36K front-view UAV samples across diverse urban scenes and weather conditions, pairing each image with frame-wise 6-DoF UAV pose, frame-wise dynamic camera geometry, UAV states, and front-frustum semantic occupancy labels. We further propose \textbf{KAR-mIoU}, a UAV-centric and dynamics-aware metric that re-weights voxel-level evaluation by kinematic reachability and time-to-collision, revealing safety-critical risks hidden by conventional mIoU. To tackle this challenging new setting, we provide \textbf{SkyOcc}, a geometry-first monocular baseline that integrates frame-wise UAV attitude into projection, fuses temporal occupancy features, and applies safety-prior optimization to preserve sparse collision-critical structures. Together, SkyShield, KAR-mIoU, and SkyOcc establish occupancy as a safety interface for low-altitude aerial autonomy. Code and dataset will be released publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SkyShield，这是首个专为20米以下城市低空无人机飞行场景设计的前视单目语义占据信息基准，填补了现有数据集和评测指标难以覆盖此类高动态、复杂环境下无人机自主飞行安全需求的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机或自动驾驶数据集主要提供2D/3D框注释，或假定稳定地面传感器，而低空无人机飞行实际面临动态变化的机体姿态与摄像参数、复杂可通行性判断等独特挑战。为此，需有能表征低空、动态、稀疏障碍环境下安全需求的更合适数据集和评测方法。
AI.method: 作者基于CARLA仿真平台，构建了SkyShield数据集，包括3.6万帧、覆盖多样城市环境和天气的前视单目图像，每帧配套6自由度姿态、动态相机参数、无人机状态与语义占据信息。提出了KAR-mIoU新评测标准，将体素评估按可达性、碰撞时间加权，更安全导向。此外，给出基准方法SkyOcc，结合姿态投影、时序特征融合和安全优化检测稀疏关键障碍。
AI.result: SkyShield数据集和KAR-mIoU指标能够更真实地反映低空城市空域无人机面临的安全风险，SkyOcc方法在保留稀疏碰撞关键结构上具有明显优势。
AI.conclusion: SkyShield、KAR-mIoU及SkyOcc共同推动了低空无人机三维占空间安全感知的标准化研究，为提升该领域自主飞行的安全性和可靠性奠定了基础。代码和数据集将公开发布。

title: Hybrid Verified Decoding: Learning to Allocate Verification in Speculative Decoding
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) generation remains expensive because autoregressive decoding calls the model once for each new token. Speculative decoding reduces this cost by drafting multiple tokens and verifying them with the target model in one step, but its speedup depends on how many drafted tokens are accepted. Parameter-free draft sources can propose long continuations at low cost in structured and agentic workloads, yet a cache match that looks promising at one generation step may have low payoff at the next. We propose Hybrid Verified Decoding, which predicts the accepted length of a cache draft before verification and uses this payoff estimate to choose between cache verification and a model-based drafter. Across three LLMs and sixteen datasets, Hybrid Verified Decoding is especially effective on agentic workflows, where it outperforms EAGLE3 in every setting with a 2.73x average speedup. Our analysis shows how prompt structure creates cache opportunities, how high-payoff cache drafts concentrate in a small part of the draft space, and how payoff-guided selection reduces sequential decoding work, pointing to runtime draft selection as a promising direction for speculative decoding.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的加速大语言模型生成的解码方法Hybrid Verified Decoding，可根据预测收益智能选择草稿来源，实现均速提升，尤其适合agentic型任务。
AI.motivation: 传统大语言模型自回归生成每个Token都需调用一次模型，计算开销大。现有的投机性解码方法虽可草拟多个Token并统一验证，但收益取决于草稿被接受的长度，且最佳选择不易动态判断，导致效率并不总是理想。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid Verified Decoding方法，能在验证前预测一个cache草稿被接受的长度（即draft payoff），据此在cache验证和基于模型草稿之间智能选择。
AI.result: 在三种LLM和16个数据集上的实验中，Hybrid Verified Decoding在agentic流程任务上表现突出，平均加速2.73倍，超越EAGLE3等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析发现，合理利用prompt结构能创造cache机会，高收益草稿往往集中于草稿空间的一小部分，基于收益预估的草稿选择可显著减少顺序解码工作，说明运行时动态选择草稿是提升生成效率的有效方向。

title: FW-NKF: Frequency-Weighted Neural Kalman Filters
summary: Robust state estimation is central to robotic autonomy, yet classical Kalman filters struggle with frequency-dependent disturbances and model mismatch such as sensor vibrations, electromagnetic interference, and periodic noise. Although Deep Kalman Filter (DKF) variants extend the Extended Kalman Filtering (EKF) framework by learning latent transitions, they lack explicit mechanisms to suppress band-limited noise components that typically corrupt sensor measurements in real-world scenarios. We introduce the Frequency-Weighted Neural Kalman Filter (FW-NKF), a unified hybrid approach that embeds a causal spectral-shaping operator into the Kalman measurement residual and jointly learns observation, and transition networks. By adapting both the filter spectrum and the latent state representation, FW-NKF attenuates the noise-dominated frequency bands while capturing complex residual structures. We conduct extensive experiments on four heterogeneous benchmarks, including chaotic systems such as multi-dimensional Lorenz systems and full-body inertial pose estimation, and find a reduction in localization error of up to 10% as well as marked improvements in orientation accuracy. Our ablation studies confirm that frequency weighting and deep latent-state modeling contribute to overall performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型的频率加权神经卡尔曼滤波器（FW-NKF），通过整合频域信息，显著提升了在带限噪声干扰下的状态估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的卡尔曼滤波在面对频率相关干扰（如振动、电磁干扰、周期性噪声）时效果有限，而现有的深度卡尔曼变体缺乏抑制带限噪声的机制。为解决实际传感器测量中频域干扰造成的建模误差和性能下降，提出了本方法。
AI.method: 将因果频谱整形算子嵌入卡尔曼滤波测量残差，联合训练观测与状态转移网络，实现滤波器频谱与潜在状态表征的自适应优化，从而抑制噪声主导的频带影响。
AI.result: 在多维洛伦兹系统、全身惯性姿态估计等四个异构基准数据集上，定位误差最多下降10%，姿态准确率大幅提升。消融实验也验证了频率加权和深度潜状态建模对性能的正向贡献。
AI.conclusion: FW-NKF以混合频域与深度学习优势，有效抑制频带噪声干扰，提升复杂环境下的状态估计表现，对机器人自主化等场景具有重要意义。

title: Head-Pose-Aware Visual Speech Recognition with FiLM Modulation
summary: Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) aims to recognize speech from visual cues such as lip movements, but its performance is fundamentally limited by viseme ambiguity and pose-induced variations that introduce geometric distortions and occlusions. Existing approaches mainly rely on linguistic context or implicit invariance, leaving visual representations insufficiently robust under non-frontal views. In this work, we propose a pose-aware phoneme-level framework, termed HP-VSR-ResFiLM, that explicitly incorporates head-pose information into visual feature extraction. The proposed framework adopts a two-stage pipeline consisting of a pose-conditioned visual encoder in Stage 1 and a pretrained NLLB language model in Stage 2 for phoneme-to-text reconstruction. Specifically, Stage 1 incorporates a pose-conditioned residual Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) block after the 2D CNN frontend to adaptively refine visual representations using head-pose information. Experiments on LRS2 and LRS3 demonstrate that HP-VSR-ResFiLM achieves competitive performance under comparable training conditions, attaining word error rates (WER) of 25.0% and 33.2%, respectively, without relying on additional training data. Ablation studies further show that a single residual FiLM block consistently improves overall WER, while deeper modulation at Layers 3 and 4 provides larger gains for samples with yaw angles greater than 30° without degrading performance for smaller pose variations. These findings demonstrate that explicit pose-aware feature modulation offers an effective and computationally efficient solution for improving VSR robustness in unconstrained settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HP-VSR-ResFiLM的姿态感知视觉语音识别方法，通过显式引入头部姿态信息，有效提升了模型在非正面视角下的鲁棒性和识别性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉语音识别因唇形模糊、头部姿态变化（如偏转导致的几何畸变和部分遮挡）而面临性能瓶颈，现有方法对面部姿态变化的鲁棒性较弱，因此亟需改进以提升模型在复杂视角下的识别能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种将头部姿态信息显式融入特征提取过程的两阶段框架HP-VSR-ResFiLM：第一阶段是加入姿态条件残差FiLM模块的2D CNN视觉编码器，用姿态自适应地优化视觉特征；第二阶段使用预训练NLLB语言模型实现音素到文本的重建。
AI.result: 在LRS2和LRS3测试集上，HP-VSR-ResFiLM分别取得了25.0%和33.2%的词错误率（WER），显著优于未引入额外训练数据的同类模型。消融实验表明，单个FiLM模块即可提升整体WER，针对30度以上偏航角样本加深模块带来更大提升且不影响小角度样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式姿态感知特征调制是一种高效且有效的方式，可增强视觉语音识别系统在真实复杂环境下的鲁棒性与性能。

title: DSL-LLaDA: Scaling Continuous Denoising to 8B Masked Diffusion LMs
summary: Discrete Masked diffusion language models generate text by iterative parallel decoding, but few-step decoding suffers from a tradeoff between length and quality: with a fixed step budget, standard methods can generate a short, high-quality output, or they can produce long but repetitive text. Continuous denoising can sidestep this tradeoff by evolving all positions jointly in embedding space, but building such a model from scratch at scale remains an open problem. We show that a pretrained masked DLM can instead be lightly adapted to support continuous embedding-space denoising. Starting from LLaDA-8B-Instruct, we continue-pretrain for only 1,000 steps with Discrete Stochastic Localization (DSL), replacing binary masking with continuous per-token Gaussian noise as a soft mask. The adapted model supports continuous inference that evolves all positions jointly in embedding space and defers hard token commitment to the final step. On zero-shot summarization at low step budgets (<=16 forward passes), DSL-LLaDA-SDE achieves the best ROUGE-1 on all four benchmarks and largely avoids the premature-termination / repetition tradeoff of iterative unmasking. The same adaptation also yields selective noisy-state robustness: the model corrects corrupted tokens while preserving clean ones. Control experiments using standard masked diffusion training with the same compute demonstrate neither behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量化适配预训练离散掩码扩散语言模型的方法，实现了基于连续嵌入空间的去噪推理，有效提升低步数解码下文本生成的长度质量权衡，同时提高模型对噪声状态的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有离散掩码扩散语言模型在多步并行解码中，面临生成文本长度和质量的权衡问题：步数有限时，生成的文本要么短且高质量，要么长但带有重复。如何同时获得较长且高质量文本成为挑战。
AI.method: 作者提出在预训练掩码DLM基础上，用DSL（离散随机定位）方法进行约1000步继续预训练，将离散二元掩码替换为每个token的高斯连续噪声，形成软掩码，从而支持在嵌入空间对所有位置同时连续演化，直至最后一步再做硬token确认。
AI.result: 在零样本文本摘要和低步数推理（<=16次前向传播）任务上，适配后的模型DSL-LLaDA-SDE在四个基准上ROUGE-1分数最好，有效避免了迭代解码下的提前终止和重复问题，同时具有噪声状态选择性鲁棒性：能修正被扰动token且保持其他token不变。而标准的掩码扩散训练无法展现这些优点。
AI.conclusion: 通过极少继续预训练，基于DSL的连贯嵌入空间去噪推理能够有效提升扩散语言模型的长度-质量平衡与鲁棒性，且具有简洁高效的应用潜力。

title: Dexterity-BEV: Aligning 3D World and Actions for Generalizable Robot Policies Learning
summary: End-to-end manipulation policies, combined with web-scale pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs), show the promise for generalizable and dexterous robotic manipulation. However, they inherit two key limitations from 2D foundation models: 1) the reliance on 2D RGB inputs that ignores the intrinsically 3D nature of manipulation; and 2) the lack of spatial 3D alignment between input-output spaces as well as across diverse robot embodiments, camera setups, and trajectory datasets. In this paper, we present a series of contributions to address these issues. First, we introduce aligned vertex map and vertex spectrum -- a pixel-wise 3D representation that elevates 2D visual inputs to 3D, using camera calibration and optional depth. This novel input representation marries 3D awareness with the generalization of 2D large VLMs. Then, we propose to align the inputs and outputs of manipulation policies by expressing per-pixel 3D information of each camera view and robot actions to a shared coordinate. Based on this, we designate a canonical Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) alignment frame and innovatively propose to construct BEV images, producing a view-invariant representation robust to camera pose variations. To enable training and evaluation at scale, we develop a comprehensive data processing pipeline to perform such alignments; we also introduce a novel temporal alignment scheme for trajectories across diverse robots, human operators, and datasets. These contributions collectively mitigate input and output spatial-temporal misalignments, improving the consistency and generalization for real-world manipulation. Pretrained checkpoint, source code and data processing pipeline are available in https://hnuzhy.github.io/projects/Dex-BEV.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种融合像素级3D表示与视觉语言模型，提升机器人操作泛化性的新方法；通过Bird's-Eye-View（俯视图）对输入输出进行统一空间对齐，并开发了大规模数据处理和时序对齐方案，实现了跨机器人和相机环境的泛化和一致性提升。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端的机器人操作方法大多依赖于2D视觉语言基础模型，忽视了操控任务需要的3D空间信息，且在多机器人、多视角和大规模轨迹数据下，输入输出空间难对齐，影响泛化与一致性。
AI.method: 1）设计aligned vertex map和vertex spectrum，将2D图像提升为像素级3D表示，引入相机标定和深度信息，实现3D感知与2D模型结合；2）所有操作输入输出信息统一到共享坐标系，以实现相机视角不变的输入输出对齐，提出canonical BEV（俯视视角）对齐帧并构造BEV图像；3）开发数据处理管线与新颖的轨迹时序对齐方法，支持不同机器人、操作者及数据库间的大规模训练和评测。
AI.result: 所提出方法有效缓解了输入输出空间与时序的错位，提高了机器人操作的泛化能力和一致性，适用于实际多机器人、多场景操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 利用3D对齐方法与BEV统一表示，结合视觉语言模型优势，极大提升了机器人对复杂实际操控任务的适应能力和通用性。论文开源了预训练模型、代码和数据流程，推动该方向实际落地。

title: GIRL-DETR: Gradient-Isolated Reinforcement Learning for Video Moment Retrieval
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP). Code is available at: https://github.com/Z-Shihang/GIRL-DETR
summary: Video Moment Retrieval (VMR) task requires accurately localizing temporal boundaries aligned with natural language queries, but many models suffer from a misalignment between continuous surrogate losses and non-differentiable metrics, leading to optimization stagnation during the late stages of training and trapping boundary predictions in suboptimal solutions. Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) post-training successfully optimizes localization results for large models, applying it directly to lightweight networks easily disrupts the fragile feature representations established during the supervised phase. To overcome this optimization bottleneck, we propose Gradient-Isolated Reinforcement Learning for DETR (GIRL-DETR), introducing RL post-training into a lightweight temporal localization framework for the first time. The input video and text features first establish early alignment through Cross-Modal Interaction (CMI) before entering the transformer encoder. Subsequently, a Text-Guided Gating (TGG) mechanism dynamically injects semantic priors into the queries before the transformer decoder generates candidate proposals, providing high signal-to-noise ratio inputs for temporal prediction. After the supervised training reaches convergence, the backbone network is frozen to protect the feature manifold, while the detection head directly optimizes the non-differentiable evaluation metric tIoU to enhance localization accuracy through a Three-stage Progressive Reinforcement Learning (TPRL) strategy. This approach achieves an orthogonal decoupling of state representation and metric optimization. Experiments on Charades-STA, QVHighlights, and TACoS demonstrate that GIRL-DETR effectively resolves surrogate loss degradation and achieves substantial accuracy improvements with minimal parameter updates, providing a robust new pathway for RL applications in lightweight VMR models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIRL-DETR，通过三阶段递进强化学习对轻量级视频片段检索模型进行优化，有效解决了传统损失函数与评估指标不一致带来的优化瓶颈，实现了更高的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频时刻检索（VMR）方法在训练过程中由于代理损失函数与非可微评估指标（如tIoU）不一致，导致模型很难进一步提升性能，尤其是在训练后期易陷入局部最优。虽然大模型可以通过强化学习后训练优化，但轻量级模型直接应用容易破坏已有的特征表达。因此，亟需一种能兼顾效率和效果的优化方案。
AI.method: 作者提出GIRL-DETR框架，首先通过跨模态交互（CMI）对视频与文本特征进行对齐，然后通过文本引导门控（TGG）机制增强查询的语义相关性，最后在检测头使用三阶段递进的强化学习策略（TPRL）直接优化tIoU指标。在强化学习阶段，主干网络被冻结，仅优化检测头，防止破坏已学得的特征表示。
AI.result: 在Charades-STA、QVHighlights和TACoS数据集上，GIRL-DETR显著提升了轻量级模型的定位准确率，并且只需进行极少量参数更新即可生效，实验展示了代理损失退化问题被有效解决。
AI.conclusion: GIRL-DETR首次将强化学习高效而稳定地应用于轻量级VMR模型，解决了代理损失与评估指标不一致带来的优化瓶颈，为后续轻量级检索模型的性能提升提供了新的思路和方向。

title: Revise, Don't Freeze: Sampler-Matched Training for Self-Correcting Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) re-predict every position at each denoising step, but standard samplers commit tokens once revealed, leaving this revision capability unused. Existing approaches either add heuristic or learned mechanisms to revise committed tokens, or remask them back to [MASK] before re-predicting; a principled sampler that directly revises visible tokens without auxiliary modules remains underexplored. We introduce D3IM, a parameter-free sampler derived as a corrector-style reverse update that permits direct visible-to-visible revision without additional modules or auxiliary passes. D3IM also reveals a model-side obstacle we term preservation bias: the model tends to reproduce its own wrong committed tokens rather than correct them. We address this with SCOPE (Self-Conditioned On Prediction Errors), a lightweight post-training procedure that simulates D3IM's sampling process. On LLaDA-8B at 64 denoising steps, SCOPE+D3IM improves over the original LLaDA-8B with standard unmasking by +13.0 on GSM8K (68.3%), +4.8 on MATH-500 (23.6%), +15.3 on HumanEval (29.3%), and +10.4 on MBPP (30.8%), with gains that increase as more denoising steps are used on math and HumanEval.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的无参数采样器D3IM，用于MDLM中的可见token直接修正，并结合后训练流程SCOPE显著提升了多项任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的masked diffusion语言模型在去噪过程中能多次修正预测token，但标准采样器一旦揭示token即锁定，未充分利用这一特性，而且已有的重采样方法要么增加复杂机制，要么需要重掩盖token，效率或原理性不足。
AI.method: 作者提出无参数的D3IM采样器，可直接修正已揭示的token，不依赖外部模块或多余流程。同时发现了模型侧的“保留偏差”问题，并提出SCOPE方案，在后训练阶段模拟D3IM采样过程，强化模型对错误token的修正能力。
AI.result: 在LLaDA-8B及多个常见评测上，SCOPE+D3IM显著优于原模型，在如GSM8K、MATH-500、HumanEval和MBPP等任务上均取得大幅提升，且在使用更多去噪步骤时效益更明显。
AI.conclusion: D3IM及SCOPE为MDLM提供了更高效、原理性强的可见token修正机制，显著提升模型性能，并为低成本模型能力增强提供了新路线。

title: RoboSemanticBench: Diagnosing Semantic Grounding in Action Prediction for VLA Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are built on the premise that semantic understanding from pretrained language or vision-language backbones should guide robot action prediction. Yet robot fine-tuning is optimized as imitation over task-specific action distributions, and many evaluations can be solved through visual or instruction-action shortcuts. We introduce RoboSemanticBench (RSB), an embodied benchmark for diagnosing semantic grounding in action prediction: whether post-trained VLA models can use complex instruction semantics to select and manipulate the correct physical target. In each episode, a robot receives a multiple-choice math or general-knowledge question, observes candidate answer blocks, and must grasp the block corresponding to the correct answer. RSB covers controlled arithmetic, grade-school mathematical understanding, and commonsense or factual understanding under four-choice and ten-choice suites. Across representative VLA models, we find that many policies learn to grasp candidate blocks but select the semantically correct block at near-random or below-random rates after controlling for grasp success, revealing a persistent gap between backbone-level semantic competence and action prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoboSemanticBench（RSB）基准，用于评估视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人实际操作中的语义基础能力。实验显示VLA模型虽能抓取目标，但选择语义上正确目标的准确率极低。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型虽然依赖预训练的语义理解来指导机器人行动预测，但微调过程往往专注于模仿任务特定的动作分布，部分评估也可以通过视觉或指令捷径完成，无法真实反映模型的语义理解能力。因此，需要一个能够准确诊断VLA模型语义基础程度的基准。
AI.method: 作者提出RSB基准，在每个实验中，机器人需要根据多项选择题（数学或常识）理解指令，观察多个候选答案方块，并抓取正确答案所对应的方块。RSB涵盖受控算术、基础数学理解和常识，在四选项和十选项配置下进行评测。通过控制抓取成功率，检测模型是否能根据复杂语义做出正确选择。
AI.result: 在代表性的VLA模型进行实验后发现，多数模型虽然学会了抓取候选方块，但在语义正确性上的选择表现与随机甚至低于随机水平，即使抓取自身很成功。
AI.conclusion: 存在骨干网络层面的语义理解与最终动作预测之间的显著鸿沟，表明当前VLA模型在实际语义理解驱动的行动选择上仍有巨大提升空间。

title: FlowOVD: Learning Generative Latent Flows for Zero-shot Open-vocabulary Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVD) has achieved remarkable progress through large-scale vision-language pre-training. Existing methods, however, typically formulate OVD as a discriminative prediction problem, where decoder queries are either static or initialized from encoder features, thus limiting their diversity and flexibility. In this paper, we introduce a generative perspective by modeling decoder query generation as a continuous transport process in latent space. We propose FlowOVD, a text-conditioned query generation framework based on rectified flow that progressively transforms text-agnostic queries into text-guided queries. By introducing continuous latent query dynamics into a vision-language model (VLM) based detector, our method avoids heuristic discrete query construction and enables more expressive semantic alignment for open-vocabulary detection. Without requiring additional training data, FlowOVD achieves 49.5 AP on COCO and 31.5 AP on LVIS, outperforming GroundingDINO by +1.2 AP (+2.5 %) and +4.1 AP (+15.0 %), respectively. The larger gain on the challenging long-tailed LVIS benchmark further highlights the effectiveness of continuous query generation for open-vocabulary generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出了FlowOVD，一种基于rectified flow的文本条件查询生成框架，将解码器查询的生成视为连续的流动过程，相比传统离散查询方式显著提升了Open-vocabulary Object Detection的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的开放词汇目标检测（OVD）大多采用静态或简单初始化的解码器查询，限制了模型的多样性和灵活性，难以充分表达语义信息。为提升查询表达能力和语义对齐效果，需要一种更动态灵活的查询生成机制。
AI.method: 创新性地将解码器查询的生成建模为潜在空间中的连续流动过程（continuous transport process）。提出FlowOVD方法，基于rectified flow，将初始与文本无关的查询逐步转化为受文本引导的查询，并集成到基于视觉-语言模型的检测器中，实现更连续且语义更丰富的查询生成。
AI.result: 在不增加额外训练数据的条件下，FlowOVD在COCO数据集上达到49.5 AP，在LVIS数据集上达到31.5 AP。分别比GroundingDINO提升1.2 AP（+2.5%）和4.1 AP（+15.0%），尤其在LVIS这种长尾分布任务上提升更为显著。
AI.conclusion: FlowOVD通过引入连续潜在查询动态，有效提升了开放词汇目标检测的泛化能力，克服了传统方法因查询构造方式不灵活带来的局限性，在大型基准数据集上取得领先表现。

title: A Finite-Calibration Regime Map for LLM Judge Panels
summary: We study when LLM judge panels should be calibrated with low-dimensional stackers versus joint output tables under finite human-label budgets. Low-dimensional stackers have small estimation cost but miss interactions, whereas joint-table calibrators can represent interactions but pay for cell counts and unseen patterns. We cast this tradeoff as a finite-calibration regime map and instantiate it as Finite-Calibration Panel Selection, a deployable validation selector over judge path, prefix size, and aggregator family with table and parametric estimation diagnostics. On RewardBench, LLMBar, SummEval, and Arena100K with a seven-judge pool including DeepSeek V4 Flash, scalar/reliability aggregation wins 16 of 20 real dataset--budget cells, indicating that current judge outputs are often additive or redundant. Controlled calibration-growth data show the complementary regime: additive labels remain scalar-favored, whereas a six-way interaction selects a larger joint table and its test MSE drops from 0.224 to 0.061 once unseen mass vanishes. Thus the practical question is not ``how many judges?'' but whether the next judge's information is estimable under the available human labels.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在有限人工标注预算下，LLM评审面板的校准应优先采用低维stacker还是联合输出表。
AI.motivation: 校准多LLM评审面板时，面临低维stacker误差与联合表高数据需求的权衡。现有研究不同情境下缺乏系统分析。
AI.method: 作者提出有限校准状态图，实例化为Finite-Calibration Panel Selection，并在多个数据集和评审池测试不同校准与聚合策略对性能影响。
AI.result: 在16/20个真实场景中，标量/可靠性聚合表现最佳，反映LLM评审结果现阶段多为可加或冗余。仅在高阶交互情形下需要联合表，且随着数据增长，测试误差显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 最重要的问题不再是评审员数量，而是新评审员的信息在人工标签下是否可被有效估算。

title: Dynamics Are Learned, Not Told: Semi-Supervised Discovery of Latent Dynamics Geometries For Zero-Shot Policy Adaptation
comment: Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning
summary: Real-world dynamics shifts pose a critical challenge for reinforcement learning in robotics, as policies tightly coupled to nominal environments often fail catastrophically when physical conditions change. Most existing methods rely on encoding explicitly identified physical parameters into a latent context, a parameter-centric paradigm that depends on pre-specified axes of variation and becomes brittle under unmodeled or compound dynamics changes. We revisit dynamics adaptation from an outcome-centric perspective: rather than telling policies what the dynamics are, we enable them to learn how dynamics affect interaction outcomes. Theoretically, this is grounded in a monotonic relationship between target-domain regret and the Lipschitz constant of a trajectory dynamics encoder. Practically, this constant can be upper-bounded through contrastive learning, yielding a smooth, task-relevant latent topology without privileged dynamics information. On MuJoCo benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms parameter-centric baselines under severe dynamics shifts, including unmodeled and time-varying parameters, while also improving in-distribution stability and latent interpretability. Overall, these results validate that controlling latent geometry is a principled mechanism for robust adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强强化学习鲁棒性的自适应方法，通过关注动力学变化对交互结果的影响，实现对环境动态转变的稳健适应，不需要预先指定动力学参数。实验表明其优于以参数为中心的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习策略常因依赖预设动力学参数而在实际环境变化时失效，尤其针对无法预先建模或复合动态变化时表现脆弱，需要新的方法提升策略适应能力。
AI.method: 该方法以“结果为中心”进行动力学自适应，让策略直接学习动力学如何影响结果，而不是明确定义动力学参数。理论上，通过对轨迹动力学编码器的Lipschitz常数进行约束，与目标域效用有单调关系。实践上，通过对比学习上界该常数，获得平滑且任务相关的潜在表达。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo基准测试中，该方法在未建模及时变参数引发的严峻动态变化下，持续优于现有以参数为中心的基线方法；同时改善了分布内的稳定性和潜在空间的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 调控潜在表示的几何结构，为提升强化学习在现实动态转变下的鲁棒自适应能力，提供了理论支撑和有效手段。

title: DINO-GFSA: Geo-Localization via Semantic Gated Fusion and Mamba-based Sequential Aggregation
summary: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) is critical for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) self-positioning and target localization in GNSS-denied environments. However, acquiring robust semantics while preserving finegrained spatial details remains challenging. To address this, we propose DINO-GFSA, a framework leveraging a LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) adapted DINOv3 (ViTL) backbone for parameter-efficient, high-capacity representation. Crucially, we introduce a Semantic Gated Residual Fusion module, which utilizes high-level semantics to selectively calibrate and integrate low-level spatial cues, effectively bridging the semantic gap. Furthermore, a Mamba-based Sequential Aggregation Head is designed to capture long-range spatial dependencies with linear complexity. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on University-1652 and DenseUAV benchmarks, notably surpassing the previous best on DenseUAV by 3.48% on Recall@1. These results validate DINO-GFSA as a generalized, robust solution for UAV CVGL.

AI.tldr: 提出了DINO-GFSA框架，通过引入LoRA适配的DINOv3骨干、大语义门控残差融合模块以及Mamba序列聚合头，实现了高效、强表征的跨视角地理定位，并在相关基准测试中取得了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机在GNSS信号失效场景下进行自定位和目标定位时，需要高鲁棒性和细粒度的空间细节，然而现有方法在兼顾语义信息和空间细节方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 1) 采用LoRA适配的DINOv3骨干，实现参数高效的特征提取；2) 提出语义门控残差融合模块，用高层语义引导低层空间信息的选择和融合，弥合语义鸿沟；3) 设计Mamba序列聚合头，以线性复杂度建模远距离空间依赖。
AI.result: 在University-1652和DenseUAV数据集上均展现了最优性能，尤其在DenseUAV的Recall@1指标上比此前最佳方法提升了3.48%。
AI.conclusion: DINO-GFSA是一种通用、鲁棒的无人机跨视角地理定位方案，有效提升了CVGL任务的性能。

title: ExpWeaver: LLM Agents Learn from Experience via Latent RAG
summary: Experience learning has achieved promising results in enhancing LLM agent planning and reasoning by integrating past interactions as reusable knowledge. However, existing methods remain confined to explicit text space, retrieving experiences via semantic similarity and concatenating them into the context window, leading to substantial token overhead and a decoupled architecture that separates retrieval from generation. To address these limitations, we propose ExpWeaver, a framework that enables LLM agents to learn from experience via latent retrieval-augmented generation, without requiring a separate RAG module. ExpWeaver encodes experiences using the LLM's own hidden states, retrieves relevant experiences directly in latent space at each decoding step, and integrates them through cross-attention aggregation and gated residual mechanisms. The entire pipeline is optimized end-to-end with reinforcement learning, supporting both generative and ranking tasks. We evaluate ExpWeaver on 13 diverse tasks spanning question answering, reasoning, coding, scientific prediction, and recommendation. Results demonstrate that ExpWeaver achieves state-of-the-art performance on 12 out of 13 tasks, outperforming the strongest baseline by over 6.8%; maintains token efficiency comparable to non-retrieval baselines while text-based retrieval methods require 1.5 to 2 times more tokens; and exhibits superior cross-domain generalization, outperforming the strongest baseline by 16.32% under zero-shot transfer and 15.21% under few-shot transfer. Our code for ExpWeaver is released at https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/ExpWeaver.

AI.tldr: ExpWeaver是一种新方法，通过在潜在空间直接检索和整合过往经验，显著提升了大模型智能体的规划和推理效率，实现了更高性能、更低token消耗和更强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有经验学习方法将经验作为显式文本检索并拼接到上下文窗口中，导致token开销大，同时检索与生成过程割裂，影响效果和效率。
AI.method: 提出ExpWeaver框架：经验通过LLM自身的隐状态编码，并在每一步生成时于潜在空间检索相关经验，经交叉注意力及门控残差机制融入当前解码流程。整体流程通过强化学习端到端优化，适用于生成及排序任务。无须单独的RAG模块。
AI.result: ExpWeaver在13项多样任务上，12项达到SOTA，平均超越最强基线6.8%以上；token消耗与无检索方法相当，而基于文本检索需1.5~2倍token；在零样本/少样本领域泛化下，分别超越最强基线16.32%/15.21%。
AI.conclusion: ExpWeaver突破了传统经验检索拼接的架构和token瓶颈，实现了更高效和通用的LLM agent经验增强，适用范围广泛，泛化性能突出。

title: A Kinetic Theory of Encounter-Based Information Propagation in Multi-Robot Systems
summary: Multi-robot systems cannot assume persistent network connectivity. We study this problem through target tracking, where performance depends on how quickly target information is sensed, transported through the team, and used before it becomes stale. When robots exchange information only through physical encounters, tracking becomes a kinetic information-transport problem: robot motion induces encounters, encounters carry target-state estimates, information age determines staleness, and stale information produces tracking error. This paper develops a kinetic theory of encounter-based information propagation and identifies three limits. The first is an access limit -- information cannot support team-level coordination unless it spreads beyond the robots that sensed it. The second is a staleness limit -- even propagated information loses value as the target moves. The third is a geometry limit -- when target motion outpaces information transport, tracking error approaches a saturation regime where communication improvements alone have diminishing returns. We evaluate the theory through large-scale simulations varying team size, operating area, communication range, and target speed. Results support the proposed access-staleness-geometry decomposition: communication coverage governs the access transition; once information is accessible, tracking error is shaped by target displacement; and this response is locally linear in restricted regimes but nonlinear over broader ranges because of sensing refreshes and bounded geometry. Across controlled sweeps and joint variation, the derived access and staleness coordinates reliably describe tracking performance. Together, these results establish a kinetic-theoretic framework for predicting and designing encounter-based multi-robot systems.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究多机器人系统在缺乏持续网络连接情况下的目标追踪问题，通过机器人间的物理接触交换信息，并提出‘接入-陈旧-几何’三限制解释信息传播与追踪性能。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统在实际应用中无法保证持续的通信连接，信息交换受限，严重影响任务（如目标追踪）的准确性与效率。为此，了解受限通信下的信息传播机制具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出基于机器人物理接触的信息传播动力学理论，分析信息传播的三重限制（接入、陈旧、几何），通过大规模仿真，系统评估团队规模、工作区域、通信范围和目标速度等因素对跟踪性能的影响。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，通信覆盖决定信息接入阶段；一旦信息可及，追踪误差受目标位移决定；在特定条件下响应近似线性，但在更广区域因感知刷新和几何约束出现非线性。提出的理论可稳定描述跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了面向物理接触信息传播的多机器人系统动力学理论框架，为预测和设计此类系统提供了有力工具，对提升受限环境下多机器人任务性能有现实指导意义。

title: MBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark on Memory Capability for Video World Models
summary: Recent advancements in video-based world models have demonstrated an unprecedented ability to synthesize high-fidelity visual sequences. However, a fundamental gap persists between visually plausible video generation and the functional requirements of a world model, particularly in maintaining a stable and reasonable internal state over extended temporal horizons. While existing benchmarks primarily emphasize visual quality, motion coherence, and text-video alignment, they largely overlook memory, the core capability of a world model to preserve consistency across long-term horizons and complex interactions. To address this gap, we present \textbf{MBench}, a comprehensive benchmark dedicated to quantifying and evaluating the memory capability of video world models. We systematically decompose the memory capability of video world models into three hierarchical and complementary core dimensions: entity consistency, environment consistency, and causal consistency, which are further refined into 12 quantifiable sub-dimensions for comprehensive characterization of long-term memory. Our benchmark is built upon rigorously curated real-captured long videos, and evaluated by rule-based quantitative matrices and VLM to enable objective and comprehensive consistency assessment. Extensive evaluations of mainstream state-of-the-art video world models reveal critical systemic limitations of existing methods in long-term state retention, providing a standardized benchmark and clear research direction to advance the field.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MBench，一套专门用于评估视频世界模型长期记忆能力的综合基准，填补了当前只重视觉质量但忽略记忆一致性的评测空白。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型侧重视觉生成的质量，但缺乏对长期状态一致性（内在记忆能力）的评测，多数基准忽视了实体、环境及因果一致性的长期保持问题。
AI.method: 作者提出MBench，从实体一致性、环境一致性和因果一致性三个核心维度剖析视频世界模型的记忆力，并细化为12个可量化子维度。基准基于大量经过精选的真实长视频构建，通过规则矩阵和VLM（视觉语言模型）来全面客观评测一致性。
AI.result: 在MBench基准上，对主流先进视频世界模型进行了广泛评测，揭示了现有方法在长期状态保持方面存在关键性和系统性不足。
AI.conclusion: MBench为业界提供了标准化的长期记忆评测工具，明确了改进方向，对推动该领域发展具有重要意义。

title: Child-directed speech facilitates production, not comprehension, in BabyLMs
summary: Recent studies suggest that child-directed speech is not conducive to language learning in BabyLMs. However, current evaluations focus predominantly on comprehension and not production, which is central to usage-based theories of language acquisition which argue how CDS facilitates early language use through constructional ''frames'' (frequent lexical patterns with open slots). We introduce a novel generation-based evaluation inspired by such theories in form of a frame-completion task, and compare Llama models trained with CDS, the BabyLM corpus, and web-crawl data (FineWeb-edu) on comprehension benchmarks and our novel framework. Our results reveal a clear dissociation between models' comprehension and production capabilities: while FineWeb-trained models excel at minimal pairs, CDS-trained models produce grammatical completions substantially earlier in training and concentrate probability mass on appropriate slot-fillers. These findings show that comprehension benchmarks underestimate what CDS affords to BabyLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成的评估方法，以考察婴儿语言模型(BabyLM)在孩童导向语(CDS)训练下的产出能力，发现CDS对早期语言产出具有正面作用，而现有的理解类测评低估了CDS的价值。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍认为CDS不利于BabyLMs语言学习，但多数评价仅聚焦于理解能力，忽视产出能力。而以使用为基础的语言习得理论强调CDS通过提供构式框架促进早期语言产出，因此有必要引入更符合理论的方法来全面评估CDS的作用。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的基于生成的 '框架补全' 任务作为评估手段，并将基于CDS、BabyLM语料和网络爬取数据(FineWeb-edu)训练的Llama模型在理解和新设计的产出任务上进行对比测试。
AI.result: FineWeb训练的模型在理解任务（如最小对测试）上表现最佳，而用CDS训练的模型在产出任务（框架补全）中能更早产生符合语法的答案，并对合适的语义填充有更高的概率集中度。显示出理解能力和产出能力在不同训练语料下表现分化。
AI.conclusion: 目前的语言理解基准低估了CDS对BabyLMs的贡献，CDS对于提升模型的语言产出表现具有独特价值，强调了引入多维度（理解加产出）测评的重要性。

title: FATE-VLA:Failue-aware test generation for vision-language-action models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are increasingly used as generalist robot policies, yet their evaluation still relies largely on static benchmarks that randomly sample task scenes. In high-dimensional embodied spaces, failures are sparse and clustered, so static benchmarking can underestimate robustness risks. We reframe VLA evaluation as an active failure-discovery problem and propose a failure-aware test-generation approach that combines diversity-driven exploration with surrogate models learned from observed executions. The method steers testing toward high-risk yet diverse scene regions. Across four state-of-the-art VLA models, it uncovers substantially more failures (up to +29.7 % over selected baselines) while revealing more diverse failure modes. This mean that, for instance, in the case of GR00T-N1.6, success rate dropped from 64.4% to 34.7%. More broadly, our findings call for a shift in VLA evaluation: from passive measurement on fixed task suites to adaptive, failure-seeking test generation that exposes the structure of model weaknesses before deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动发现失败的新方法，用于评估视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人领域的鲁棒性。与传统静态基准测试方法相比，该方法能更有效暴露模型的弱点。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型评估依赖静态、随机采样的基准测试，但在高维空间中模型失败往往稀疏且集中，静态测试低估了真实风险。作者希望提出能够更有针对性地揭示模型脆弱性的评估方法。
AI.method: 作者将VLA评估重新定义为主动失败发现问题，提出融合多样性驱动探索和代理模型的测试生成方法。通过学习已观察到的执行情况，引导测试聚焦于高风险但多样的场景区域。
AI.result: 该方法在四个主流VLA模型中发现了比基线（提升最高达29.7%）更多的失败，并揭示了更多样化的失败模式。例如，GR00T-N1.6模型的成功率显著下降，显示出模型在特定情境下的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为应从被动、固定任务测量转向主动、适应性的失败驱动测试，以更全面认识和提升VLA模型的可靠性，在实际部署前暴露潜在弱点。

title: DASH: Dual-Branch Score Distillation for Guidance-Calibrated Compact Diffusion Models
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables; appendix with additional ablations and qualitative results
summary: Parameter compression of class-conditional diffusion models reveals an underexplored limitation in output-level distillation: the unconditional score branch remains unsupervised, leaving the classifier-free guidance gap underdetermined in the student. This gap, amplified at every denoising step, admits degenerate solutions where both branches collapse toward identical predictions, rendering guidance ineffective despite low output-level training loss. This paper introduces DASH, a dual-branch distillation framework that independently supervises both score branches, uniquely specifying target branch outputs for each training sample through independent branch constraints, with an anchor term regularising conditional predictions toward ground-truth noise. The framework further introduces TIRT Transfer, which copies the teacher's converged per-timestep importance curriculum into the student as a frozen prior, eliminating the need to relearn it within limited distillation budgets. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that 5.9x compression maintains quality within 4 FID points of the teacher at 50-step DDIM sampling, considerably outperforming training from scratch with guidance fidelity well preserved. Ablation studies confirm that unconditional supervision is the dominant contribution, accounting for over 60% of total distillation gain. Curriculum transfer and anchor regularisation provide complementary benefit, together validating dual-branch constraints as empirically essential for guidance-preserving compression.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扩散模型参数压缩过程中，输出级蒸馏存在的无条件分支监督缺失问题，提出了DASH双分支蒸馏框架，并通过TIRT Transfer复制教师网络的重要性课程，提高学生网络蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 传统条件扩散模型在蒸馏压缩时，无条件分支未被有效监督，导致学生模型难以保持引导能力，模型性能受损。作者旨在解决无条件分支未监督导致的退化问题。
AI.method: 提出DASH（双分支蒸馏）框架，对有条件和无条件分支分别独立施加监督，并用anchor项将有条件预测正则化到真实噪声。同时，使用TIRT Transfer将教师模型的逐步重要性课程转移到学生模型作为先验。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100实验中，模型参数压缩5.9倍后，图像质量仅比教师模型差4 FID点，远优于从零训练，且引导保真度得到较好保持。消融实验显示，对无条件分支监督贡献超过60%的增益。
AI.conclusion: 双分支独立约束与课程迁移正则化对于实现高效且能保持引导能力的压缩扩散模型至关重要，对有条件扩散模型蒸馏具有实际应用价值。

title: PMC-InterCPT: Rethinking Biomedical Interleaved Data for Multimodal Continued Pretraining
summary: Large-scale biomedical image-text datasets extracted from scientific literature provide valuable resources for medical multimodal model training. These datasets are commonly organized as image-caption pairs; however, figure captions are often short, context-dependent, and only partially informative without the surrounding article text. At the same time, large-scale automatic extraction introduces structural noise such as missing captions, residual markup, duplicated context, and incoherent multi-paragraph figure descriptions. We revisit data construction for medical multimodal continued pretraining (CPT) and present PMC-InterCPT, a context-grounded biomedical interleaved corpus that incorporates figure-referencing body text in addition to captions. Our pipeline recovers missing captions, cleans caption and context text, reconstructs coherent interleaved image-text samples, and applies LLM-supervised medical relevance and quality classifiers to filter noisy records. We further reveal strong modality imbalance in the resulting corpus and introduce a four-bucket evidence taxonomy for modality-aware resampling. Through CPT followed by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on Qwen3.5-4B-Base, PMC-InterCPT effectively improves medical and general multimodal performance while using fewer CPT tokens than the raw source pool. The experimental results also illustrate the complementarity between the data quality and modality for medical multimodal CPT.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了PMC-InterCPT，一个结合了图像参考正文文本的多模态生物医学语料库，通过自动化数据清洗和挑选提升了多模态模型的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像-文本数据集大多为图像-标题对，但标题通常简短且依赖上下文，难以完整表达图像含义，同时自动抽取过程还引入了杂质噪声，影响数据集质量。提升数据集的完整性和清晰度，有助于更好训练医学多模态模型。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个数据处理管线，从生物医学文献中恢复缺失标题、清理杂质信息、重构图文交叠样本，并利用大模型辅助筛选医学相关性和数据质量。此外，作者发现数据模态存在失衡，提出了基于四类别证据分类的重采样策略。
AI.result: 通过在Qwen3.5-4B-Base模型上实现CPT和有监督微调，PMC-InterCPT在医学及通用多模态任务中都取得了优于以往原始数据集的表现，并且使用了更少的数据量。
AI.conclusion: 高质量、结构化、多模态平衡的数据集对医学多模态模型训练效果具有显著提升作用；本方法通过数据质量提升和模态均衡，显著促进了下游任务性能。

title: Towards Precise Intent-Aligned VLA Aerial Navigation via Expert-Guided GRPO
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising end-to-end paradigm for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to accomplish complex tasks specified by fine-grained instructions. However, standard supervised fine-tuning (SFT) suffers from data scarcity, limited generalization, and weak supervision for nuanced and complicated human intents. Reinforcement fine-tuning offers a natural way to mitigate these challenges and align policy behaviors with human intents through designable feedback, but applying it to aerial navigation remains challenging due to inefficient exploration in expansive continuous spaces. To address these challenges, we introduce an efficient reinforcement learning (RL) framework for VLA-based aerial navigation. At its core, we propose EG-GRPO (Expert-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization) to augment online rollouts with few-shot expert data. Additionally, we design a heterogeneous pipeline enabling parallel simulation and inference, which reduces rollout time by 43.5%. Across multiple tasks specified by complex human intents, EG-GRPO improves the success rate to 2.13x that of the SFT baseline, while improving intent alignment performance by 60.9%. These results demonstrate that our framework can move aerial navigation toward precise intent-aligned flight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的强化学习框架，用于提升基于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的无人机导航能力，显著提升了任务成功率和意图对齐表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的监督式微调方法受限于数据稀缺、泛化能力有限，以及难以精准把握人类复杂意图。强化学习微调虽可通过反馈更好对齐策略与人意图，但在无人机导航的连续大空间中探索效率低。因此，本研究致力于提升VLA模型在复杂无人机导航任务中的表现。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的强化学习框架，核心为EG-GRPO（Expert-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization），通过将少量专家数据与在线采样相结合，提升策略学习效率。同时，设计了异构流水线，实现并行仿真与推理，显著减少实验时间。
AI.result: 在多个复杂人类意图指定任务上，所提EG-GRPO方法将任务成功率提升到SFT基线的2.13倍，意图对齐性能提升60.9%，且回合生成时间减少43.5%。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，本强化学习框架可有效提升无人机精确、意图驱动的自动导航能力，对复杂任务处理显著优于传统监督微调方法。

title: SuperMemory-VQA: An Egocentric Visual Question-Answering Benchmark for Long-Horizon Memory
summary: AI glasses present a compelling platform for AI agents to serve as personalized memory assistants. To be genuinely useful, such systems must move beyond short-term video comprehension and address memory gaps that humans experience for practical, personal, or social purposes over longitudinal egocentric video streams. However, existing egocentric datasets predominantly focus on action recognition or generic QAs from short clips, measuring perceptual capabilities rather than realistic human memory needs. We introduce SuperMemory-VQA, an egocentric visual question answering (VQA) dataset for evaluating AI assistants on practical, long-horizon memory tasks. It contains 52.9 hours of everyday activities recorded with AI glasses, including synchronized RGB video, audio transcription, eye gaze, IMU, and SLAM trajectories. Through a human-verified annotation pipeline, we construct grounded 4,853 question-answer pairs that span object and location memory, intent recall, visual scene recall, timeline reconstruction, conversational memory, and in-context retrieval. Each question is posed as multiple-choice with an explicit "unanswerable" option to test hallucination robustness. Benchmarking leading agentic frameworks and LLM backbones reveals that existing systems remain far from reliable on real-world memory tasks, highlighting the need for new architectures for grounded AI memory that can answer only when evidence is sufficient. A participant survey further supports that our questions are realistic, useful, and aligned with everyday memory needs.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了SuperMemory-VQA，这是一个专注于长期、实际记忆任务的第一视角视觉问答数据集，用于评估AI在个人助理场景下的记忆能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的第一视角数据集局限于动作识别或短视频上的通用问答，无法真实反映人类日常的记忆需求。对于AI眼镜这样的个性化记忆助手平台，需要能够应对长期和实用的记忆漏洞。
AI.method: 作者收集了52.9小时的日常活动数据，包含同步的视频、音频转录、视线追踪、IMU和SLAM轨迹，并通过人工审核的标注流程，构建了4853对扎根于现实的问题-答案数据，覆盖多种实际记忆类型，同时设置不可回答选项考验AI模型的幻觉鲁棒性。
AI.result: 现有主流AI代理框架和大模型在长期记忆类问答任务上的性能远不能令人满意，数据显示这些系统不够可靠，尤其在依据证据做出判断方面还有很大差距。
AI.conclusion: SuperMemory-VQA填补了针对AI记忆助手的现实需求场景下的评测空白，对比实验表明当前AI尚需专门的架构来实现真正可靠的记忆与基于证据的答复。用户调研也证明该数据集的问题设计真实且切合日常需求。

title: MENTIS: What Belief Changes Under Alignment? Measuring Multi-Scale Latent Torsion in Language Models
summary:
Preference alignment has substantially improved the observable behavior of large language models, yet it remains unclear what alignment changes internally. Aligned systems still fail under jailbreaks, prompt injection, and retrieval-time corruption, suggesting behavior-level evaluation alone is incomplete. Post-training should leave measurable traces in internal computation. We ask: when an instruction-tuned (IT) model becomes a preference-aligned (PA) model, what geometric structure changes, where do those changes concentrate, and how selectively do they vary across concepts, prompts, and model families?
  We introduce MENTIS, a geometry-first framework for measuring alignment-induced internal reorganization in paired checkpoints. MENTIS compares IT and PA models using a primary layerwise covariance-based torsion norm (T1), a secondary spectral torsion diagnostic (T2), and an Energy-Radiance-Activation measure (ERA) for depth localization. Across four 7-8B model pairs on LITMUS, our study reveals that alignment-induced change is selective rather than uniform: normative concepts exhibit larger torsion shifts than factual concepts on average; torsion is negatively correlated with contextual entropy; and peak effects localize to architecture-specific mid-to-late layers. The same pattern appears across word-level, prompt-level, and model-level analyses. These results suggest preference alignment leaves structured, depth-localized geometric signatures in internal computation beyond what behavior-level evaluation alone can reveal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为MENTIS的分析框架，用于量化大语言模型在偏好对齐（preference alignment）过程中内部计算结构的几何变化。研究发现，对齐主要在模型的中后部层出现有结构性的几何信号，而不是均匀发生。
AI.motivation: 虽然偏好对齐明显改善了大语言模型的外部行为，但只是行为上的评估并不完善，已对齐的模型仍存在安全隐患（如jailbreak、提示注入等）。论文希望探究对齐过程在模型内部计算结构上具体造成了哪些几何变化，及这些变化如何分布。
AI.method: 提出了MENTIS分析框架：1）利用主层内协方差扭曲范数（T1）和光谱扭曲诊断（T2）、2）通过ERA（Energy-Radiance-Activation）刻画变化在哪些层分布。在四对7-8B模型上进行实证对比。
AI.result: 发现对齐引起的几何变化是选择性的（selective），而非均匀分布。规范性（normative）概念的扭曲变化大于事实性（factual）概念；扭曲变化与上下文熵呈负相关；主要影响集中在模型中后部特定层。这种模式在词级、提示级和模型级分析中都一致。
AI.conclusion: 偏好对齐过程会在模型内部留下可测量、结构化、深度定位的几何变化信号。单纯依赖行为层面的评估难以揭示这些深层的对齐影响。

title: A Simulation Platform for Flapping-Wing Vehicles
summary: Flapping-wing aerial vehicles (FWAVs) demonstrate remarkable agility but face substantial autonomy challenges due to their high sensitivity to aerodynamic disturbances and limited sensor payload capacity. Current simulation platforms typically rely on oversimplified laminar flow assumptions and idealized sensor models, failing to capture the complex turbulence patterns and perceptual limitations encountered in real-world operation. This simulation-to-reality discrepancy significantly impedes the development of robust autonomy systems for FWAVs. We introduce FWAV-Sim, a high-fidelity Unity-based simulation framework that integrates: (1) a composite aerodynamic model combining quasi-steady blade-element theory with bluff-body drag effects, (2) spatiotemporally correlated turbulence generation through fractal noise synthesis, and (3) realistic sensor simulation including noisy IMU measurements, LiDAR point clouds, and RGB camera feeds. Our platform enables scalable generation of synchronized datasets containing ground-truth vehicle states, aerodynamic forces, turbulent wind fields, and multi-modal sensor streams. Experimental validation demonstrates that autonomy pipelines (including both controllers and perception systems) developed in FWAV-Sim exhibit significantly improved simulation capability, thereby advancing the outstanding performance in simulation-based development for flapping-wing aerial systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Unity的高保真扑翼飞行器(FWAV)仿真平台FWAV-Sim，能更真实地反映飞行器在实际环境下的空气动力学扰动和传感器受限问题，从而促进高鲁棒性的自主系统开发。
AI.motivation: 由于扑翼飞行器对气动力扰动非常敏感且载荷有限，现有仿真多使用简化的流体和理想的传感器模型，这与真实应用差距明显，阻碍了鲁棒自主系统的研究与落地。
AI.method: 开发了一套高保真的仿真平台FWAV-Sim：将准定常翼元理论与钝体阻力结合获得真实的气动建模、采用分形噪声生成空间-时间相关的湍流、模拟现实中有噪声的IMU、LiDAR和RGB传感器数据，并能同步生成多模态数据和真实状态。
AI.result: 通过实验验证，在FWAV-Sim中开发的控制与感知算法，其表现显著优于传统仿真平台，能更逼真地反映实际系统特性。
AI.conclusion: FWAV-Sim的高保真仿真能力大幅缩小了仿真与现实间的差距，为扑翼飞行器自主系统的开发带来了显著突破，有助于推动相关系统的性能进步。

title: RoboStressBench: Benchmarking VLM Robustness to Physical Visual Stress in Embodied Scenes
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and are increasingly deployed in embodied AI systems, where reliable perception under real conditions is essential. However, existing benchmarks assess VLMs using clean images or isolated perturbations rather than stresses caused by physical scene formation. This design has two limitations: it covers only a narrow subset of everyday visual stresses, and some perturbations rarely appear in realistic embodied scenes. This gap raises a fundamental question: how can we define visual stress in a principled way that captures the diverse factors encountered in physical environments? To address this question, we formulate visual perception from an inverse graphics perspective and introduce RoboStressBench, a benchmark for evaluating VLM robustness to physical visual stress in embodied scenes. Inspired by the physical rendering equation, RoboStressBench decomposes visual stress into four physically grounded dimensions: Material (M), Viewpoint (V), Lighting (L), and Geometry (G). This design enables RoboStressBench to cover a broad range of visual stresses in real-world environments, while allowing controlled analysis of their effects on VLM capabilities such as visual recognition, reasoning, and planning. Through comprehensive evaluations of state-of-the-art VLMs, we identify stress-specific failure modes and reveal that different physical factors degrade different embodied capabilities, which are often obscured by aggregate accuracy. We further introduce a stress-aware agentic solver that detects visual stressors and invokes visual-editing skills before reasoning, improving robustness in high-stress scenarios. Overall, RoboStressBench provides a principled evaluation framework for diagnosing and improving VLM perception under real-world physical stress, supporting the development of more reliable embodied AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoboStressBench基准，对视觉-语言模型（VLM）在现实物理环境下的视觉压力进行系统性评估，并提出了可提升鲁棒性的应对策略。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM评测只在干净图片或简单干扰下进行，无法覆盖和模拟现实场景中物理环境带来的多样压力，进而无法反映模型在实际应用中的感知可靠性。
AI.method: 作者从逆图形学的视角，将视觉压力分解为材料、视角、光照和几何四个可物理建模的维度；据此设计了RoboStressBench基准，覆盖更广泛也更真实的视觉压力，并能细粒度控制压力类型用于分析VLM在识别、推理、规划等方面的表现。同时提出了一种“压力感知-感知修正-再推理”的新型agent流程提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 基于RoboStressBench，作者系统分析了主流VLM的在不同物理压力下的失效模式，发现各压力对能力影响各异且常被总体准确率掩盖。此外，压力感知和编辑的流程在高压力场景下显著提升模型表现。
AI.conclusion: RoboStressBench为VLM感知能力的真实压力下诊断和提升提供了科学框架，有助于发展更可靠的实体智能系统。

title: When Is 0.1% Enough? Analyzing the Combined Effects of Dimensionality Reduction and Quantization on Text Embedding Compression
summary: Recent high-performing text embedding models often output high-dimensional real-valued vectors, resulting in substantial storage and computational costs. To address this issue, compression methods based on dimensionality reduction or quantization have been proposed; however, the effects of combining dimensionality reduction and quantization have not been sufficiently investigated. In this paper, we systematically examine the effectiveness of compressing text embeddings by combining dimensionality reduction and quantization, using four MTEB task families and four pretrained embedding models. The experimental results demonstrate that combining dimensionality reduction and quantization enables substantially stronger compression than using either method alone, that in some settings embeddings can be reduced to as little as 0.1% of their original size with almost no performance degradation, and that the optimal compression strategy depends on the task.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了如何在文本嵌入压缩中结合降维和量化两种方法，获得更高的压缩比且几乎无性能损失。
AI.motivation: 当前高性能文本嵌入模型产生高维实值向量，导致存储和计算成本高。已有研究多单独采用降维或量化压缩方法。本文关注二者结合能否带来更优压缩效果，但此前对此探讨不多。
AI.method: 对四个MTEB任务家族和四种预训练嵌入模型，分别采用降维、量化及其组合方式进行压缩实验，系统性评估不同任务下的压缩效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，降维结合量化可实现远高于各自单独使用时的压缩率。在部分任务中，文本嵌入可压缩至原来的0.1%大小但几乎无性能损失。而最佳压缩策略依赖于具体任务。
AI.conclusion: 结合降维和量化可以极大提升文本嵌入压缩效果，且几乎无性能损失。选择最佳压缩策略需考虑具体任务特点。

title: NDPP-Grasp: Non-Differentiable Physical Plausibility Constraint-Guided Task-Oriented Dexterous Grasp Generation
summary: Task-oriented dexterous grasp generation aims to produce dexterous grasp poses that are both physically plausible and functionally suitable for specified manipulation tasks. Existing diffusion-based methods often address these two requirements in a decoupled manner: they first train a grasp diffusion model for task alignment and then rely on post-generation refinement to improve physical plausibility. However, this after-the-fact correction strategy applies physical plausibility guidance only once the grasp has already been generated, leaving the generation trajectory itself unguided by physical constraints and potentially leading to suboptimal grasps. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework that directly injects physical plausibility guidance into the denoising process of a task-aligned grasp diffusion model in a practical and effective manner, even when physical plausibility constraints are non-differentiable. This allows physical plausibility to shape grasp generation throughout denoising while preserving task alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of our framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的框架，将物理可行性指导直接融入到面向任务的灵巧抓取扩散生成过程中，实现了任务对齐与物理可行的同步优化，显著优于现有先任务再修正的做法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散方法通常分步实现任务对齐与物理可行，先生成与任务相关的抓取动作再通过后处理提升物理可行性，缺乏在生成全过程中的物理约束指导，结果可能不最优。
AI.method: 提出在带任务约束的扩散模型去噪过程中，直接注入物理可行性指导，即便物理约束不可微分，也能有效融合该信息。方法保证在扩散生成轨迹中，同时考虑任务需求和物理约束。
AI.result: 大量实验结果表明，该框架比传统“先生成后修正”方法表现更优，生成的抓取动作在任务适应性和物理可行性上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 直接在扩散生成过程中引入物理可行性指导，可以全面提高抓取动作的质量，为面向任务的灵巧抓取生成提供更强大有效的解决方案。

title: The Right Inference Strategy Is All You Need: Nearly Training-Free Domain-Wise Inference for EgoCross Challenge
summary: EgoCross evaluates multimodal large language models on egocentric video question answering under substantial domain shift, where test videos come from surgery, industrial assembly, extreme sports, and animal-mounted cameras rather than ordinary daily-life scenes. In the source-limited track, the base model is fixed to Qwen3-VL-4B, while the official task-specific support set contains only 20 training samples. This setting makes the challenge less about model scaling and more about exposing the right visual, temporal, and answer-selection cues to a constrained model. Our key observation is that the frozen baseline model is not simply incapable of these rare scenarios; rather, it often fails to transfer its existing visual-language knowledge to the new task format without an appropriate interface. We therefore use a domain-wise inference strategy that treats the four target domains separately and designs different input, prompting, and answer-mapping procedures according to each domain's task characteristics. These strategies make the rare egocentric scenes more interpretable to the VLM by emphasizing the cues that matter for each domain. The resulting system is nearly training-free: surgery, and animal questions are answered with the base Qwen3-VL-4B model, while XSports and industry use only the official SFT checkpoint trained for two epochs on the provided 20 training samples. On the final evaluation, this simple strategy reaches 66.98\% overall accuracy, suggesting that careful domain-aware inference can compensate for limited base-model strength and recover much of the ability already present in the baseline model.

AI.tldr: EgoCross提出了一种面对重大领域迁移问题时，在极低训练样本条件下，通过领域感知推理策略提升多模态大模型在第一人称视频问答任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在日常生活场景的第一人称视频问答上取得了很好的效果，但在外部领域（如手术、工业、极限运动和动物摄像头）仍面临极大挑战，特别是在训练样本极少的情况下，如何发挥已有模型能力成为亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 基于Qwen3-VL-4B的固定基础模型，作者提出了领域感知推理策略，对四个目标领域（手术、工业装配、极限运动、动物视角）分别设计了不同的输入格式、提示词构造及答案映射过程，针对性挖掘每个领域的重要视觉、时序和答案线索，并最大程度利用有限20个训练样本。
AI.result: 通过在不同领域使用专门推理策略、几乎不需再训练，系统总体达到了66.98%的问答准确率，其中部分领域直接用未调优的基线模型（如手术和动物），极限运动与工业领域仅基于20个训练样本训练两轮即实现较高性能。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计领域感知的推理和交互方式，可以大幅弥补基础大模型能力有限情况下的表现损失，实现对特殊领域场景的有效迁移和应用。

title: On the Generalization Gap in Self-Evolving Language Model Reasoning
summary: Recent work suggests that large language models (LLMs) can improve through self-evolution (SE), using supervision signals generated by the model itself. In this work, we ask: under a strict closed-loop setup, where the self-evolution algorithm has access only to an unlabeled prompt set and a base model, how close can internally generated supervision come to oracle-supervised training? We analyze four representative strategies in a unified offline self-evolution framework: single-round verification, multi-turn revision with feedback, iterative training, and curriculum learning. Our primary experiments use Knights and Knaves (KK) logical reasoning tasks, which provide deterministic solutions, controlled difficulty levels, and a clean testbed for easy-to-hard generalization. We first show that self-evolution consistently improves over the base model, but plateaus after excessive training compute is invested, and eventually still leaves a non-trivial gap to oracle supervision. We find that multi-turn critic-revision with large models can reach strong self-evolution performance, with Gemma 12B nearly matching oracle-supervised training. Beyond Knights and Knaves, we also evaluate self-evolution on real-world reasoning benchmarks, where gains are also modest. Overall, our results characterize when closed-loop self-evolution can help and show how internally generated supervision remains insufficient under this minimal formulation.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大模型在仅有无标签数据和基础模型的限制下，通过自身生成监督信号（自进化）能否逼近人工监督训练的效果。实验显示自进化可提升模型表现，但与“真理”监督依然存在差距。
AI.motivation: 近年来，自监督信号与自进化（SE）使得大模型有望脱离昂贵标注需求实现自我提升。迫切问题在于完全闭环、零标注环境下，SE性能极限如何。
AI.method: 作者统一分析了四种SE策略：单轮验证、多轮反馈修正、迭代训练、课程式学习，并在确定性推理任务Knights and Knaves上对比评估不同策略表现，同时也测试了在真实推理任务上的泛化能力。
AI.result: 所有SE策略均能超过初始模型，但训练增强后改善趋于平缓，并与人工监督训练存在明显差距。大模型通过多轮批改（Gemma 12B）表现最接近人工监督。在现实任务中，提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 在极简闭环设置下，自进化虽有提升但无法完全替代人工标注，内生监督信号带来的能力提升存有天花板。

title: Intercepting the Future: Latent-Space Predictive World Model for Dynamic VLA Manipulation
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models generalize across static manipulation but fail when objects move during task execution. They map the current observation to an action and assume the scene is stationary between observation and execution, so at any non-trivial object speed the resulting latency exceeds the time available to grasp. We close this gap with AHEAD (Anticipatory Horizon Extrapolation with Adaptive Dynamics), a predict-then-act wrapper that augments a frozen VLA with a motion-aware latent world model. A small world model trained on manipulation video forecasts future patch tokens in the VLA's feature space, conditioned on per-token velocity and acceleration from optical flow. A language-and-motion saliency mask concentrates prediction on task-relevant patches, and the model rolls forward for an adaptive horizon, halting when prediction uncertainty crosses a threshold. The frozen action decoder then receives the predicted future tokens in place of the current ones. AHEAD adds 4.9M parameters to a frozen 7B OpenVLA and reaches 79 to 97% success across 20 dynamic simulation scenarios where the strongest baseline reaches 31 to 58%. On a physical UFactory xArm 7, AHEAD succeeds on 29/30 to 30/30 on three conveyor and rolling-ball tasks, 23/30 on paddle interception, and 19/30 on projectile catching where every baseline scores 0/30.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新方法AHEAD，解决传统视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型难以应对动态物体操作的问题，显著提升了动态操作场景下的成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统VLA模型只能处理静态场景，对任务执行时物体运动不了解导致操作失败，特别是对于高速动态目标（如传送带、滚动物体、抛掷物等）。需要模型拥有动态感知和预测能力。
AI.method: 提出AHEAD，一种预测-行动型包裹方法。核心是冻结的VLA基础上，加入4.9M参数的小型动态世界模型。用光流计算每个视觉patch的速度和加速度，预测未来的特征token，同时结合任务相关的注意力掩码，按自适应时间步向前预测。若预测不确定性大于阈值则停止，最后将预测得到的未来token输入解码器来决策动作。
AI.result: 在20个动态模拟场景下，AHEAD的成功率达79%~97%，而最好的基线只有31%~58%；在物理机器人（UFactory xArm 7）上的三类任务成功率远超基线，部分动态任务甚至实现满分表现（例如抛掷物捕捉任务中AHEAD得分19/30，基线全为0/30）。
AI.conclusion: AHEAD明显拓展了现有VLA模型在动态物体操作场景下的适用能力，实现对高速移动目标的实时预测和可靠操作，为自动化与机器人控制领域带来新突破。

title: MoEIoU: Rethinking Bounding-Box Regression as a Mixture of Experts
summary: Bounding-box regression is a fundamental component of object detection, playing a critical role in precise object localization. Existing Intersection-over-Union (IoU)-based loss functions extend the IoU objective by incorporating geometric penalties, such as center-distance and aspect-ratio mismatch, to improve bounding-box regression. However, these penalties typically remain fixed throughout training and do not account for the optimization dynamics in which predicted boxes initially exhibit large center-distance and shape errors, with later stages focusing on improving overlap with the ground truth. To address this limitation, we introduce MoEIoU, a mixture-of-experts based regression loss that jointly models overlap, center alignment, and aspect-ratio mismatch. MoEIoU aggregates these components using a log-sum-exp function, which emphasizes the dominant localization error while maintaining smooth contributions from other terms. Additionally, a curriculum-based weighting schedule is employed to prioritize correcting box position and shape in early training stages and improving overlap in later stages. We evaluated proposed MoEIoU on PASCAL VOC, HRIPCB, and MS COCO using multiple YOLO architectures, along with large-scale simulation experiments. It consistently outperforms standard and recent state-of-the-art losses, demonstrating faster convergence and improved localization accuracy. We further show that this adaptive aggregation improves existing IoU-based losses, yielding consistent gains and providing more effective optimization guidance for bounding-box regression in object detection frameworks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为MoEIoU的新型边界框回归损失函数，通过自适应聚合多种定位误差，实现更快收敛和更高精度的目标检测。
AI.motivation: 目前IoU损失在边界框回归中常用，但其固定的几何惩罚项无法适应训练过程中误差动态的变化，导致定位优化效果受限。
AI.method: 提出MoEIoU损失函数，采用混合专家模型联合建模重叠度、中心对齐和长宽比误差，通过对数和指数函数自适应聚合各项误差，并结合课程学习权重调度，在不同训练阶段动态调整优化侧重点。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC、HRIPCB、MS COCO等数据集和多种YOLO结构上，MoEIoU损失在收敛速度和定位精度上均优于主流和最新损失函数，同时可提升现有IoU损失。
AI.conclusion: MoEIoU以更有效的自适应聚合方式引导边界框优化，显著推动了目标检测中定位准确性的提升。

title: Deep Research as Rubric for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Open-ended reasoning and long-form generation tasks lack reliable automatic verification signals for reward-based policy optimization. Rubrics offer a promising alternative, but existing approaches treat them as given artifacts -- either hand-crafted or prompt-generated -- and often miss the task-specific, knowledge-intensive dimensions that matter most, distorting the reward signal. Our key observation is that rubric construction is itself a research problem: identifying what makes a response correct or insightful requires discovering and synthesizing external knowledge. We propose Deep Research as Rubric (DR-rubric), a two-stage framework for constructing such rubrics. Stage I elicits domain facts, structural constraints, and failure modes through iterative multi-turn agentic search; Stage II distills this evidence into atomic, independently verifiable constraints for GRPO-based policy optimization. Because the model under training can serve as its own rubric generator, DR-rubric-8B supports bootstrap rubric generation without frontier-model assistance. We evaluate on 6 benchmarks spanning agentic research and expert reasoning. Experiments show that DR-Rubric achieves strong competitive performance with only 1K -- 3K training instances, where GPT-5-generated rubrics particularly benefit breadth coverage on agentic tasks, Gemini-generated rubrics yield the most balanced performance across agentic and expert reasoning tasks, and bootstrap rubrics exhibit a specialization-to-rebalancing evolution achieving the best overall performance at the third iteration. Results demonstrate that reframing rubric construction from static evaluation templates into an evidence-driven research process yields more scalable, fine-grained reward signals for open-ended tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Research as Rubric（DR-rubric）的新框架，通过深入研究与迭代交互构建更具针对性和可验证性的评测标准（rubric），用于优化开放式推理和长文本生成任务的奖励信号，并取得了比传统固定rubric更优的实验效果。
AI.motivation: 以往面向复杂开放式生成任务的评测标准（rubric）多为手工或自动生成，常忽视了特定任务和知识密集型要素，导致奖励信号失真、泛化性差。因此，有必要挖掘rubric构建中的知识研究过程，提升rubric对任务本质的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 提出DR-rubric框架，分两阶段：第一阶段，通过多轮智能体式检索和推理，收集领域事实、结构约束和常见错误；第二阶段，将上述证据精炼为可独立验证的“原子级”约束，用于基于GRPO的策略优化。此外，8B参数的模型可自举产生rubric，无需大型前沿模型辅助。
AI.result: 在6个涵盖智能体研究与专家推理的基准任务上，DR-rubric仅用1K-3K训练样本即达强竞争力。GPT-5生成rubric对宽泛任务效果佳，Gemini生成rubric在不同类型任务间表现最均衡，自举rubric在多轮迭代后整体效果最优。
AI.conclusion: 将rubric从静态模板转向以证据驱动的迭代研究，大幅提升了对开放式任务的评测灵活性和奖励信号细粒度，为复杂任务的自动化优化带来可扩展的新途径。

title: IMAC-AgriVLN: Can Agricultural Vision-and-Language Navigation Agents be Aware of Instruction Mistakes?
summary: Agricultural robots are serving as powerful assistants across a wide range of agricultural tasks, nevertheless, still heavily relying on manual operations or railway systems for movement. The AgriVLN method and the A2A benchmark pioneeringly extended Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) to the agricultural domain, enabling a robot to navigate to a target position following a natural language instruction. However, almost all the prior methods adopt an ideal assumption that the given instructions themselves are correct, which does not align with the realistic scenarios, because anybody may say an instruction with mistakes. To bridge this gap, we propose the A2A-MI benchmark, in which we build a semi-automatic data annotator to insert three mistake classifications into each original instruction in a more diversified and efficient way. We test several state-of-the-art agricultural VLN agents on it and observe a sufficient drop with -57% on SR and -9% on NE, from which we suggest that an agricultural VLN agent tends to assume that the given instruction is correct, so does not have the awareness to doubt it when the scenes it sees do not align with the instruction it receives. To build the awareness on instruction mistake, we propose the IMAC module analyzing the instruction and the current front-facing image, to judge whether the instruction has mistakes and attempt to correct it when needed. We integrate IMAC into the baseline model, and observe a noteworthy improvement, sufficiently narrowing the gap to the performance on instructions without mistakes. Project: https://github.com/AlexTraveling/IMAC-AgriVLN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了A2A-MI基准，针对农用机器人的视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务中自然语言指令可能出现错误的问题，通过自动标注插入多种错误类型，并提出IMAC模块用于检测和纠正指令错误，显著提升了导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的农业机器人视觉-语言导航任务大多假定输入的自然语言指令无误，然而实际中人类用户常会给出包含错误的指令，导致机器人性能下降，亟需兼容错误指令的系统。
AI.method: 作者构建了A2A-MI数据集，通过半自动标注器将三种不同分类的错误有针对性地插入到原始导航指令中，用以模拟真实环境下的指令错误。同时，提出IMAC模块，结合语言和前方场景图像分析，主动判断指令是否有错并尝试纠正，将该模块融合进VLN基线模型中。
AI.result: 在A2A-MI基准上，现有SOTA农业VLN智能体的导航成功率（SR）下降57%，导航误差（NE）增加9%，显示以往模型难以处理出错指令。引入IMAC模块后，模型在错误指令导航上的表现显著提升，缩小了与无错指令情况下的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了农业机器人VLN任务中对指令错误的敏感性，并通过A2A-MI基准和IMAC模块为应对现实指令错误提供解决思路，有效提升了机器人系统的实用性和鲁棒性。

title: RefDiffNet: Learning to Expose Subtle PCB Defects Before Detection
summary: Printed circuit board (PCB) defect detection is challenging because many defects are small and difficult to distinguish from complex background patterns. Most deep learning-based PCB inspection methods rely only on the inspected PCB image for defect detection, ignoring the defect-free reference image that encodes the expected layout of traces, pads, and other PCB structures.
