In this work, we propose RefDiffNet, a lightweight plug-and-play input enhancement block placed before the detector backbone to enhance the image before defect detection. RefDiffNet brings one proven idea from classical inspection into the deep learning era, using a defect-free reference image to reveal defects. RefDiffNet compares the defective image with the aligned reference, captures structural changes relative to the reference, and uses a lightweight encoder to output the original image with defective regions highlighted, thereby making the downstream detector's task easier. Results on HRIPCB and DeepPCB show that RefDiffNet consistently improves performance across detector families, including one-stage detectors from YOLOv8 to YOLOv26, the transformer-based RT-DETR, and the two-stage Faster R-CNN. It achieves up to 18% relative mAP50:95 gain with negligible overhead, introducing only 0.004 - 0.005M additional parameters and 0.7 - 0.8 GFLOPs, amounting to at most 0.25% of the parameter count of any evaluated detector. Results establish RefDiffNet as a lightweight, plug-and-play, detector-agnostic input enhancement module that substantially improves PCB defect detection with minimal computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的轻量级模块RefDiffNet，可以在现有检测器前端增强输入图像，从而更好地检测印刷电路板（PCB）缺陷。RefDiffNet通过参考无缺陷图像辅助检测，极大提升检测准确率且几乎不增加计算量。
AI.motivation: 当前PCB缺陷检测主要依赖被检PCB图像，容易受复杂背景干扰，难以捕捉小且不明显的缺陷；而传统人工检测常利用无缺陷参考图。如何在深度学习方法中融合参考图像信息提升检测表现，是一大挑战。
AI.method: 提出RefDiffNet输入增强模块，将无缺陷参考图像与待测图像进行比对，对结构信息变化进行编码，并通过轻量级编码器输出高亮缺陷区域的图像。该模块可插拔于主流检测器前端，与各类型检测框架兼容。
AI.result: 在HRIPCB和DeepPCB上实验，RefDiffNet应用于一阶段（如YOLOv8）、两阶段（如Faster R-CNN）及transformer（如RT-DETR）等主流框架，对检测精度提升显著，mAP50:95最高提升18%。与此同时，新增参数与计算几乎可以忽略，仅占主检测器参数的0.25%。
AI.conclusion: RefDiffNet是一种轻量级、通用、即插即用的输入增强模块，可在极小的计算开销下有效提升多种主流检测网络的PCB缺陷检测性能，具有较强实用价值。

title: MiCU: End-to-End Smart Home Command Understanding with Large Language Model
summary: Command understanding systems in smart home ecosystems can automate device control and substantially improve user experience. However, while they perform well on precise utterances (e.g., "turn on the bedroom light"), they struggle with ambiguous or misaligned commands (e.g., "make the bedroom cozy"). Large language models (LLMs) generalize well across various domains and can outperform traditional rule-based systems on such tasks, but their effectiveness is often constrained by scarce domain-specific data, insufficient task-specific adaptation, and high computational costs. In this paper, we propose an automated training data synthesis workflow using user logs and LLMs; then we build MiCU, a domain-specific LLM that excels at command understanding. Specifically, we employ curriculum learning to inject domain knowledge into the base LLM, then we enhance its reasoning ability via cold-start training combined with reinforcement learning (RL) guided by domain-specific thinking rules. Additionally, we introduce a token compression technique that condenses device description into a single special token, substantially reducing inference overhead and enabling \model-fast, an efficient variant optimized for long inputs. Extensive experiments show that MiCU significantly outperforms baselines, with an average accuracy gain of 20.01% across all device categories. We have deployed MiCU in the Xiaomi Home app, receiving approximately 1.7 million page views per day. Production evaluations show that MiCU reduces user correction rate by 1.57% and increases human audited accuracy by 32.05%. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/xiaomi-research/iot_spec_llm

AI.tldr: MiCU 是一个面向智慧家庭领域的命令理解大模型，采用自动数据合成、课程学习、强化学习等技术，提升对模糊命令的理解效果，并已成功在小米家庭应用部署。
AI.motivation: 现有智能家居语音命令理解系统对精确指令效果理想，但难以应对用户常见的模糊表达；大模型虽有潜力，但受限于数据稀缺和高推理成本。
AI.method: 提出了一整套自动训练数据构建流程，结合用户日志和大模型生成合成数据。利用课程学习和领域知识注入提升适应性，通过冷启动强化学习进一步提升推理能力，并用特殊 token 压缩设备描述，实现快速高效的长输入处理。
AI.result: 在所有设备类别上，MiCU 的平均准确率提升 20.01%；实际部署在小米家庭，日均页面浏览量达 170 万次，用户纠正率降低 1.57%，人工审核准确率提升 32.05%。
AI.conclusion: MiCU 在智能家居命令理解场景取得了显著效果，兼顾高效和实用，验证了自动数据合成和大模型自适应技术在现实应用中的可行性和优势。

title: AFUN: Towards an Affordance Foundation Model for Functionality Understanding
summary: Affordance understanding bridges visual perception and physical action, serving as an explainable interface for robot manipulation in open and unstructured real-world environments. Yet, building an affordance foundation model that not only understands where and how the interaction should happen, but also generalizes across diverse environments, objects, and tasks, remains a long-standing research challenge. Existing methods typically address only part of this challenge, either localizing task-relevant regions without specifying executable motion, or predicting motion but with limited scalability. In this paper, we present ourmodel, a step towards an affordance foundation model for functionality understanding. From a single RGB-D observation and a language task description, ourmodel predicts a task-conditional functional mask (where to interact) and a 3D post-contact motion curve (how to interact). To support open-world generalization, we build a large-scale standardized data pipeline that converts heterogeneous robot, human, simulation, and real-world scan data into a shared affordance schema with language, masks, and object-centric 3D motion labels. We evaluate ourmodel from three aspects: for affordance segmentation, ourmodel outperforms all baselines by a large margin across 8 test sets from 4 benchmarks, improving mean gIoU/cIoU by +23.9/+26.3; for contact-point prediction, it predicts substantially more accurate points, with a 12.7--61.3% hit-rate gain over the best baseline; and for 3D motion, it achieves the best performance on all three test sets. ourmodel can be deployed for real-world robot manipulation without finetuning for robot embodiment or using task-specific heuristics, demonstrating the ability to adapt to open-world affordance tasks. Project page: https://www.zhaoningwang.com/AFUN

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的可供性基础模型，可以根据RGB-D观测和任务描述预测功能性掩码及3D运动轨迹，适用于开放世界的机器人操作。该方法在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法，并能在无需精调的情况下直接应用于真实机器人任务。
AI.motivation: 可供性理解在视觉感知与机器人实际操作之间起桥梁作用，已成为机器人在开放、复杂场景操作的重要挑战。现有方法在泛化、定位、可操作性等方面各有局限，缺乏通用性强、能结合多源数据的统一模型。
AI.method: 提出了一种模型ourmodel，输入单帧RGB-D图像和语言描述，输出任务相关的空间掩码（交互位置）和3D接触后运动轨迹（交互方式）。同时构建了大规模数据处理流水线，整合人类、机器人、仿真以及现实扫描数据，统一转化为包含语言、掩码、三维运动标签的标准化数据集。
AI.result: ourmodel在8个测试集、4大基准上，gIoU/cIoU提升+23.9/+26.3，接触点精准度提升12.7%-61.3%；3D运动预测在所有测试集表现最佳。显著优于所有对比方法。
AI.conclusion: ourmodel不仅性能领先，更具有良好的泛化性，可直接部署于真实机器人，支持多场景、多任务操作，为通用型机器人可供性理解迈出坚实一步。

title: Benchmarks for Vision-Language Models in Urban Perception Should Be Reliability-Aware and Negotiated
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to generate structured descriptions of street-level imagery for tasks such as streetscape auditing, mapping, and public consultation. These uses combine observable attributes with appraisal categories, and the human targets are often distributions of judgments with disagreement and explicit non-response. This paper argues that benchmarking VLMs for urban perception should treat disagreement and abstention as measurement outcomes, report inter-annotator reliability alongside model alignment, and treat the label space and scoring policy as negotiable artifacts when outputs are intended to inform urban governance. We ground the argument in a benchmark of 100 Montreal street scenes annotated along 30 dimensions by 12 participants from seven community organizations, and in a deterministic zero-shot evaluation of seven VLMs. Across dimensions, model agreement with human consensus co-varies with dimension-level human reliability, and for the appraisal dimension Overall Impression models and annotators exhibit distributional mismatch including different rates of Not applicable. We close with actions for benchmark creators, model developers, and institutions to make uncertainty and benchmark assumptions visible in evaluation reports.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦于视觉-语言模型在城市街景感知评价中的应用，强调基准测试应重视标注分歧与弃权现象，并提出相关报告与改进建议。
AI.motivation: 目前视觉-语言模型常用于街景评价、城市审计等任务，但面临标注者间分歧、弃权率较高等实际问题。作者认为当前评测方法未充分反映这一现实，对实际城市治理决策存在局限。因此，研究动机在于提出更贴合实际需求的模型评测与报告方法。
AI.method: 通过收集100张蒙特利尔街景图片，由7家社区组织的12名参与者按照30个不同维度进行标注；随后用零样本（zero-shot）方式对7种视觉-语言模型进行一致性测试，并分析模型与人类标注的差异，特别关注弃权和分歧的数据表现。
AI.result: 在人类内部和模型-人之间，不同评价维度呈现一致性与分歧共存，且模型与人类共识的一致性随不同维度的人类一致性变化。此外，在“总体印象”等主观维度，模型与人类表现出分布性不一致，包括对“不适用”选项反应的差异。
AI.conclusion: 建议基准测试和报告应包含分歧与弃权作为评价结果，强调在用于城市治理及决策时，标签空间和评分策略应具有协商性。并提出具体措施，鼓励基准设计者、模型开发者和相关机构在评估时显式揭示不确定性和前提假设，以支持透明和有效的城市治理。

title: From Outliers to Errors: Auditing Pali-to-English LLM Translations with Multi-Reference Adjudication
comment: Preprint. This manuscript has not yet been peer reviewed
summary: Single-score translation metrics can conflate legitimate variation with error, a problem especially acute for classical languages where multiple defensible English renderings of the same passage coexist. We audit Pali-to-English output from four flagship large language models (LLMs): GPT-5.5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Grok 4.3, on 1,700 passages from the Pali Canon, using three established human translations by Bhikkhu Sujato, Thanissaro Bhikkhu, and Bhikkhu Bodhi as a local reference envelope rather than a single gold standard. Each candidate's normalized embedding drift from the reference centroid serves as a triage signal, not an error label; the 1,203 candidates above a 1.5 drift threshold are then adjudicated by a blinded three-model LLM judge panel, calibrated against a 300-instance author-adjudicated validation set. Two results stand out. First, drift predicts severity rather than error per se: the major-error rate among adjudicated high-drift candidates rose monotonically from 7.9% in the 1.5-2.0 band to 51.6% above 3.0, while approximately 80% of 1.5-2.0 outliers were judged valid translation variations. Second, model differences were clearest in the high-drift tail: GPT-5.5 had the lowest adjudicated high-drift major-error rate, with confidence intervals overlapping those of Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro; Grok 4.3 had both the largest outlier volume and the highest tail major-error rate (27.6% overall, 74.4% above drift 3.0). The dominant major-error categories (e.g. omission or truncation, doctrinal term errors) are precisely the failures most likely to mislead readers of doctrinal text. The contribution is a reusable audit design for classical-to-modern translation: define a local reference envelope from multiple human translators, use embedding drift to prioritize review, and adjudicate the flagged tail rather than treating outlier status as error.

AI.tldr: 论文评估了大型语言模型（LLM）在巴利语到英语翻译中的表现，提出了一种多译本本地参照与嵌入漂移检测结合的人机混合审查方法。结果揭示：高漂移并不等同于错误，大部分异常为合法变体，但部分模型在高漂移段错误率高且易产生严重误译。
AI.motivation: 现有单一分数翻译评价方法容易将多样化且合理的译文误判为错误，此问题在存在多个权威译本的古典语种（如巴利语）文本翻译中尤为明显。
AI.method: 以三位知名巴利经译者的译文作为多对照参考，对四个主流LLM（GPT-5.5、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Grok 4.3）在1700段译文上的归一化嵌入漂移进行初筛，高漂移样本由三模型盲审小组判别，并用人工标定的300实例集校准。
AI.result: 1）大部分高漂移样本为合法译法而非错误，仅极高漂移才高发重大错误；2）不同模型在高漂移尾部区分度最大，GPT-5.5重大错误率最低，Grok 4.3高漂移尾部错误率最高，且常见错误类型会误导宗教文本读者。
AI.conclusion: 提出并验证了一种可复用的古典文本翻译模型审核框架：以多译者围成本地参照，借助嵌入漂移优先筛查，再对异常部分人工判别，避免了单一金标的问题，提升了评测的准确性和效率。

title: Permissive Safety Through Trusted Inference: Verifiable Belief-Space Neural Safety Filters for Assured Interactive Robotics
comment: Accepted to the 17th World Symposium on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR 2026)
summary: Autonomous robots that interact with people must make safe and efficient decisions under human-induced uncertainty, such as their preferences, goals, competency, and willingness to cooperate. Safety filters are a popular approach for ensuring safety in interactive robotics, since their modular design separates safety from performance, allowing robots to operate safely around people with minimal impact on task efficiency. While traditional safety filters typically operate only in the physical space, neglecting the robot's ability to learn and adapt online, the recently proposed belief-space safety filter (BeliefSF) reasons about robot safety in closed-loop with runtime inference that actively reduces the robot's uncertainty online, thereby reducing conservativeness in filtering. However, providing formal safety guarantees for robots deploying BeliefSF remains a significant challenge due to errors in runtime inference and neural approximation of safety filters required to handle the high dimensionality of belief spaces. In this paper, we propose an algorithmic approach to certify high-probability safety of BeliefSF using conformal prediction, while explicitly accounting for the reliability of the robot's runtime inference module. Our method leverages the structure of belief-space safety filtering by focusing verification on a region where inference is expected to be reliable. It preserves the simplicity and sample complexity of standard conformal prediction, yet can certify a substantially less conservative safety filter. Through a simulated human-vehicle interaction benchmark, we show that our approach verifies a significantly more permissive belief-space safety filter than a standard conformal prediction baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合置信预测的算法，有效为自主机器人在面对不确定性人机互动时提供高概率安全保证，并在仿真人车交互中验证了其保守性更低、效率更高。
AI.motivation: 传统安全过滤器仅在物理空间作用，忽略了机器人在线学习和适应的能力，这导致在面对人类带来的不确定性时过滤器过于保守。近期的BeliefSF融合了在线推断减少不确定性，但难以对其安全性提供正式保证，尤其是在推断误差和高维度神经近似下。为此，本文希望为BeliefSF提供形式化、高置信度的安全认证。
AI.method: 本文提出通过置信预测（conformal prediction）为BeliefSF进行高概率安全认证，并显式考虑机器人在线推断模块的可靠性。通过聚焦推断可靠区域对BeliefSF进行验证，既保持了置信预测的简洁和低样本复杂度，又能实现较少保守性（即更灵活和高效）的安全过滤。
AI.result: 在仿真人-车交互基准测试中，本文方法能够验证和支持比标准置信预测方法更宽松（即允许更多行为）的BeliefSF，说明其在安全性保证下有更高的任务效率与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 与传统或更保守的置信预测方法相比，文中提出的方法为自适应、在线学习的机器人提供了更宽松、有效的高概率安全保证，有助于实际人机互动场景中实现更高效、更安全的机器人决策。

title: Images as Tables: In-Context Learning with TabPFN for Low-Data Detection of AI-Generated Images
comment: Accepted as a Spotlight Oral at the ICML 2026 Workshop Foundation Models for Structured Data. *Equal Contribution
summary: AI-generated image detection is a moving-target problem: detectors trained on one generator often fail when a new generator appears, and only a few labeled examples are available. We study a simple image-to-table formulation for this regime, where each image is encoded by a frozen DINOv3 backbone, its CLS feature is reduced to a 500-dimensional structured row with PCA, and TabPFN performs real/fake classification by in-context tabular inference rather than task-specific classifier training. This turns fake-image detection into low-data structured prediction over learned visual features, making detector adaptation depend on the labeled context set instead of gradient-based fine-tuning. On GenImage, LATTE, a recent state-of-the-art detector, remains stronger when many labeled samples from all generators are available, by 7.4% in the largest pooled setting, but DINOv3-PCA-TabPFN is stronger in the practically important low-data regime, outperforming LATTE by up to 8.2%, and in transfer settings where the detector must generalize from one generator to another. These results position tabular foundation models as a strong complementary adaptation mechanism for image forensics, shifting adaptation from detector retraining to lightweight in-context updates with a small labeled set of examples. Code URL: https://github.com/jpwalter30/Towards-Generalizable-Detection-of-AI-Generated-Images

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新方法，将AI生成图像检测问题转化为表格推理任务，并利用TabPFN实现更高效的低数据量场景下的检测和自适应能力，在多个泛化任务上优于现有主流方案LATTE。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像的检测器常常遇到“移动靶”问题：针对特定生成器训练的检测器在新出现的生成器下表现会显著下降，而且通常只有少量标记样本可供使用。因此，开发无需大规模重训练、能快速适应新生成器的检测方法极具实际价值。
AI.method: 作者提出用冻结的DINOv3模型对图片提取CLS特征，并用PCA降维到500维，作为结构化表格行送入TabPFN模型。该模型无需针对新任务单独训练分类器，而是依赖于表格推理的能力，通过少量已标记样本“在上下文”进行判断，实现模型快速自适应。
AI.result: 在GenImage数据集及迁移任务上进行实验，发现：在标注样本数充足时，主流检测器LATTE性能更好（高7.4%）；但在低数据和跨生成器迁移情景下，DINOv3-PCA-TabPFN方法最高比LATTE高8.2%，表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 基于表格推理基础模型（TabPFN）的方法，在AI生成图像检测的低样本和迁移场景下优于现有方法，展示了无需梯度微调，仅通过上下文小样本更新即可实现自适应，是图像取证方向有潜力的补充方案。

title: Not All Explanations Simulate Equally: Comparing Verbalized Feature Attributions and Self-Generated Rationales
summary: Natural-language explanations are often treated as a unified interface for understanding model behavior, but different explanation sources may support simulation in different ways. This paper compares two families of explanations for question answering models: verbalized feature attributions and self-generated rationales. We evaluate them under a shared counterfactual simulation setting, using an LLM judge as predictor and measuring whether it can better predict a model's answers to follow-up questions when given its explanation. Across multiple instruction-tuned models, we analyze how explanation source, verbalization strategy, and feature granularity affect the simulatability of explanations. Our results show that explanation format and granularity affect simulatability: attribution-based explanations and self-generated rationales differ in how much they improve counterfactual prediction, with effects that vary across models and formats.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种用于问答模型的解释方法，即特征归因解释和模型自生理由，并评估了它们在支持反事实推理时的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管自然语言解释被视为理解模型行为的统一界面，但不同来源的解释可能在帮助模拟模型方面表现不同，因此需要比较各种解释方式的优劣。
AI.method: 作者在统一的反事实模拟设定下，使用大型语言模型（LLM）作为评判者。具体地，给LLM相应的解释，检测其在预测模型对后续问题的回答时准确率提升程度。对不同模型、不同解释来源、语言表达策略和特征粒度进行了系统分析。
AI.result: 解释的形式和粒度都会影响模型答案的可模拟性。特征归因和自生理由在提升反事实预测能力上的表现不同，不同模型和不同解释格式下这种效果存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，选择合适的解释来源和表达方式对于提升模型可解释性和模拟能力具有重要意义，但最佳方案依赖于具体模型和场景。

title: RoboDream: Compositional World Models for Scalable Robot Data Synthesis
summary: Scaling robot learning requires large-scale, diverse demonstrations, yet real-world data collection via teleoperation remains prohibitively expensive and time-consuming. While video diffusion models offer a promising avenue for data scaling, existing generative approaches are often limited to superficial visual augmentation, or suffer from embodiment hallucinations that yield physically infeasible motions. We present a generalizable embodiment-centric world model that achieves scalable data generation by synthesizing photorealistic demonstrations with novel objects, in novel scenes, and from novel viewpoints. Our approach anchors generation to rendered robot motion while conditioning on explicit scene and object priors, effectively decoupling trajectory execution from environment synthesis. This formulation has the potential to unlock two powerful data scaling capabilities: (1) retrieval and rebirth, which repurposes existing trajectories into entirely new contexts without new motion data; and (2) prop-free teleoperation, where operators manipulate empty air and the model hallucinates the target objects and scene afterwards, eliminating reset time. We demonstrate with real-world experiments that our generated data consistently improves downstream policy performance and significantly reduces real-world data requirements across diverse manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种以具身性为核心的世界模型，通过生成真实感的机器人操作演示，在新场景和新对象上实现大规模多样化的数据合成，从而提升机器人学习的规模和效率。
AI.motivation: 机器人学习需要大量、多样的演示数据，但真实世界数据采集（如遥操作）成本高昂且耗时。现有生成式方法要么只能做表面视觉增强，要么出现“不切实际”的动作幻觉。为了解决这一难题，需要能生成高质量、真实感的机器人演示数据的技术。
AI.method: 提出了一种通用的、以具身性为核心的世界生成模型。模型基于真实的机器人运动渲染，并通过显式的场景和物体先验进行条件生成，将轨迹执行与环境合成有效解耦。两种关键能力包括：（1）“检索与重生”：让已有轨迹在全新场景中复用，无须采集新运动数据；（2）“无道具遥操作”：让操作者对着空气操作，模型后续自动生成目标物体与场景，免除了复位的时间。
AI.result: 通过与真实世界的实验，证明所生成的数据能持续提升下游策略的性能，并大幅减少对实际操作数据的需求，适用于多种机器人操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为机器人学习中数据规模扩展提供了高效可行的解决方案，有望显著降低采集成本，提升多样性及下游任务表现。

title: GABI: Geometry-Aware Boundary Integration for Spacecraft Segmentation
summary: Accurate segmentation is crucial for autonomous spacecraft, as it directly affects downstream tasks related to 3D situational awareness. The harsh illumination conditions of space, however, produce images with high variability in appearance, hindering the generalization of segmentation approaches across different spacecraft and environments. In this work, we propose GABI, a lightweight boundary-aware multi-task segmentation architecture that augments a convolutional backbone with an auxiliary distance-field prediction head. The distance field provides dense geometric supervision around object boundaries, encouraging the network to learn spatially consistent representations of spacecraft structures while maintaining low model complexity suitable for onboard perception systems. We evaluated GABI against both an established convolutional baseline and a heavier transformer-based architecture. On the SPARK benchmark, distance-field supervision improves the baseline by up to $5\%$ in Average Precision while achieving performance comparable to the transformer models. In generalization experiments, GABI improves Average Precision by more than $50\%$ over the baseline. In cross-domain evaluation, the lightweight GABI variant performs within $5\%$ in IoU and F1-score of the heavier transformer model while being approximately ten times smaller. At the same time, the heavier GABI variant surpasses the transformer architectures while remaining nearly three times lighter.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GABI的新型轻量级多任务分割架构，通过边界感知和辅助距离场预测提升航天器图像分割效果，兼具高精度与低模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 太空环境下的极端光照条件导致航天器图像外观变化大，现有分割方法难以在不同航天器和环境间泛化，影响自主航天器的三维感知任务。
AI.method: 提出GABI方法：以卷积神经网络为主干，辅以距离场预测分支（用于提供物体边界密集几何监督），以实现边界敏感的多任务分割，同时保持网络的轻量化，适合机载实时应用。
AI.result: 在SPARK数据集上的实验显示，距离场监督使基础模型平均精度提升最高可达5%，综合表现可比肩体积更大的transformer模型；泛化实验中，GABI较基础模型提升超过50%；跨域评测中，轻量版GABI仅比transformer差5%以内，但模型体积仅为其1/10；重型GABI在性能超越transformer的同时，模型大小只有其1/3。
AI.conclusion: GABI实现了结构轻量、边界感知且高分割精度，显著提升了航天器图像在不同环境下的泛化能力，适合应用于资源受限的机载感知系统。

title: Thinking Economically: A Hierarchical Framework for Adaptive-Complexity Reasoning in LLMs
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has significantly enhanced LLM reasoning, yet often incurs substantial computational overhead due to "overthinking": generating excessively long rationales without commensurate accuracy gains. Existing efficiency methods typically apply uniform compression, which overlooks a critical observation that reasoning complexity is heterogeneous at two distinct granularity: across different problems and within individual reasoning steps. This motivates our principle of Thinking Economically: intelligently allocating computational resources based on intrinsic task and step demands rather than pursuing uniform brevity. We propose Hierarchical Adaptive Budgeter (HAB), a training framework that operationalizes this principle through coarse-to-fine budgeting. At the inter-step level, HAB predicts the optimal reasoning depth for each problem. At the intra-step level, HAB learns step-specific token budgeting signals from PPL-derived step comparisons and an adaptive Pareto optimization objective that captures the local quality-efficiency trade-off, while a Fisher Information-based pruner further provides fine-grained training-time guidance, thereby encouraging the generator to internalize more economical reasoning patterns. Experiments on GSM8K and MATH500 show that HAB not only surpasses standard CoT in accuracy but also reduces token usage, achieving a stronger performance-efficiency trade-off than the compared baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的链式思考（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）方法，通过智能分配计算资源，减少推理时的“过度思考”，既提升了推理准确率，也降低了生成的token数量。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT方法在提升大模型推理能力的同时，常因推理路径过长带来很大计算开销，而现有压缩方法对不同问题和推理步骤的复杂性区分不足。作者希望实现基于任务和步骤需求，动态分配计算资源的推理方式。
AI.method: 提出了一种层次化自适应预算器（Hierarchical Adaptive Budgeter, HAB）训练框架。在问题层面预测每个问题需要的推理深度，在步骤层面则根据每步推理的难度自适应分配token预算。HAB结合步骤比较的困惑度信号和自适应Pareto优化目标，同时引入基于Fisher信息的剪枝方法，促进生成器内部学习更加经济的推理模式。
AI.result: 在GSM8K和MATH500数据集上，HAB较标准CoT在准确率上有提升，同时显著降低了token消耗，获得了更优的性能-效率权衡，超过了已有的效率提升基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HAB框架能实现对推理复杂度的细粒度感知与计算资源自适应分配，提升了大模型的推理表现和效率，为CoT推理的实际应用和进一步优化提供了新思路。

title: Cohort-Scale Neural Atlases of Ultrasound Video
summary: Ultrasound is the most widely used real-time imaging modality in clinical practice, yet per-frame video annotation remains a major bottleneck: expert labels are scarce and costly, and image appearance varies with speckle, shadowing, attenuation, and operator-dependent probe pose. This is especially limiting because clinically relevant information is often dynamic, from left-ventricular motion in echocardiography to muscle and bone kinematics in musculoskeletal imaging. Population atlases can amortize annotation cost by registering observations to a shared canonical coordinate system, but existing neural atlas methods mainly target single videos, small test-time image sets, or object-centric image collections. We introduce a cohort-scale neural atlas for ultrasound video: a single canonical chart with per-video Generative Latent Optimization embeddings, trained jointly over thousands of frames in DINOv3 feature space. Across five cardiac and musculoskeletal datasets with point landmarks and segmentation masks, our method learns coherent canonical templates and enables accurate atlas-space annotation transfer. On EchoNet-Dynamic and MSK-Bone, it supports single- and few-shot transfer with accuracy competitive with strong dense-correspondence baselines, while training in minutes on a single consumer GPU. The learned embeddings are interpretable: linear projections reveal structured cohort variation, image-decoder interpolation produces anatomically plausible intermediate frames, and test-time latent inversion reconstructs held-out frames through the atlas. These results suggest that cohort-scale neural atlases offer a practical, interpretable representation for reducing expert annotation burden in ultrasound video analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于超声视频的队列级神经图谱方法，能够在数千帧上联合训练，实现高效且准确的注释转移，从而显著减少专家注释负担。
AI.motivation: 超声视频广泛应用于临床，但逐帧标注极为耗时且昂贵，受限于数据稀缺、图像质量变化及操作者差异。现有神经图谱方法难以扩展到大规模、多样化数据集，限制了临床中利用动态信息进行分析和标注自动化的能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种将所有视频对齐到单一规范坐标系统的神经图谱框架，每个视频通过生成式潜表示嵌入，基于DINOv3特征空间进行联合训练，支持多数据集、多标注类型（点、分割），并可在消费级GPU上高效训练。
AI.result: 在多个心脏与肌肉骨骼数据集上，该方法自动学习一致的规范模板，实现了准确的图谱空间注释转移，单/少量样本下性能与强基线方法持平，训练效率高，且潜嵌入具有良好解释性（如群体变异、可插值等）。
AI.conclusion: 队列级神经图谱能够实用、可解释地表示超声视频，有望极大降低专家标注负担，为大规模动态医学图像分析提供有效工具。

title: CA-BED: Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at static reasoning tasks, yet their performance often degrades in interactive scenarios where information must be actively acquired through questioning. A key challenge lies in selecting questions that reduce uncertainty while incorporating responses that may be ambiguous or only partially informative. To address this, we propose Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design (CA-BED), an inference-time probabilistic dialog planning framework that integrates Bayesian Experimental Design with LLM-based likelihood estimation to optimize question selection over multiple conversational turns. CA-BED maintains a belief distribution over hypotheses, anticipates possible answers, and propagates expected information gain through a simulated conversation tree. Across two structured entity-deduction benchmarks, CA-BED yields an average 21.8% improvement in success rates over direct prompting, with comparable gains relative to alternative information-seeking methods. It achieves these gains with an average increase of only 1.8 conversational turns compared to direct prompting.

AI.tldr: 提出了CA-BED方法使大语言模型在交互式任务中能够有效选问降低不确定性，实验验证方法提升了任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统大语言模型在静态推理任务表现优异，但在需要主动提问获取信息的交互场景中表现下降。核心挑战在于如何选择最优问题来最大化信息获取，同时应对模糊或部分有用的回复。
AI.method: 提出了Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design (CA-BED) 框架。该方法在推理阶段基于贝叶斯实验设计理论，结合LLM模型进行似然估计，维护对假设的信念分布，预测各类答案并在对话树中传递信息增益，从而优化多轮对话下的问题选择策略。
AI.result: 在两个结构化实体推理基准测试中，CA-BED方法相比直接prompt提升平均21.8%成功率，对比其它寻求信息方法也有显著提升，且额外所需轮次有限（只增加1.8轮）。
AI.conclusion: CA-BED能够在交互式推理场景中显著提升LLM的解决任务能力，带来更高信息获取效率且对话轮数增加有限，显示该框架的实用价值。

title: MMDG-Bench: A Benchmark for Multimodal Domain Generalization
summary: Multi-modal Domain Generalization (MMDG) seeks to leverage complementary modalities to enhance model robustness on unseen domains. Despite extensive progress in Multi-modal Learning (MML) and Domain Generalization (DG) as individual fields, their systematic integration remains under-explored. Current MMDG research is largely confined to action recognition and lacks standardized evaluation protocols. To address this, we introduce MMDG-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring two foundational frameworks: DG then MML (D2M) and MML then DG (M2D). We provide unified experimental protocols across diverse tasks, including video-audio-flow action recognition and RGB-Depth-IR face anti-spoofing. By instantiating ten MMDG baselines through pairing a unified MML configuration with five DG techniques under both D2M and M2D orderings, we demonstrate that these structured combinations frequently outperform existing state-of-the-art methods, underscoring the necessity of a unified benchmarking effort. Our analysis yields three key insights: (1) Integrating DG techniques provides consistent generalization gains across various backbones, whereas non-DG methods are highly sensitive to backbone shifts; (2) The optimal framework choice depends on inter-modal stability: D2M excels when modal relations are stable across domains, while M2D is more robust to cross-domain relational variance; (3) Stronger backbones yield amplified performance dividends when integrated into our structured frameworks. MMDG-Bench provides a principled foundation and actionable design guidelines for future research in multi-modal robustness. Code is released at https://github.com/qszhan/MMDG-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MMDG-Bench，一个多模态领域泛化（MMDG）的大型基准测试平台，统一了不同方法和评测协议，并验证了结构化集成多模态学习与领域泛化方法的效果，填补了该领域标准化和系统性研究的空白。
AI.motivation: 目前多模态领域泛化研究较少，且主要集中在动作识别任务，同时缺乏标准评测协议。这限制了方法的可复现性和横向比较，也阻碍了领域稳健性相关理论和方法的发展。作者希望通过系统整合多模态学习和领域泛化，推动多模态模型对新领域的鲁棒性研究。
AI.method: 作者搭建了一个多模态领域泛化基准：MMDG-Bench。该平台包含两种集成顺序——先领域泛化后多模态（D2M）与先多模态后领域泛化（M2D），覆盖动作识别和人脸反欺诈等任务。通过统一配置、多种任务和评价协议，系统评估了现有五种领域泛化和多模态方法的十种组合。
AI.result: 实验表明：1）集成DG方法，相比仅用多模态方法能稳定提升模型泛化，且不同主干网络下都有效；2）D2M在模态间关系跨域稳定时表现更好，M2D则更能适应模态间域间关系变化；3）更强大的主干模型在结构化方法中会进一步提升表现。
AI.conclusion: MMDG-Bench为多模态泛化研究提供了统一的评测平台和科学的设计原则，有助于推动多模态鲁棒性领域发展。相关代码已发布，便利后续研究和落地应用。

title: Low-Resource Safety Failures Are Action Failures, Not Representation Failures
summary: Safety alignment learned in high-resource languages transfers poorly to low-resource languages. Models refuse harmful prompts in English but fail to refuse when the same prompts are translated into Swahili or Burmese. Adaptive steering methods like AdaSteer and CAST inherit this failure cross-lingually. We diagnose where transfer breaks down. Across Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma-2-9B, and Llama-3.1-8B on 23 languages, the harmfulness direction extracted from high-resource activations linearly separates harmful from harmless low-resource prompts nearly as well as high-resource ones. The relevant representation is present. Yet harmful refusal drops from 87.9% to 43.9%. The model fails to convert the representation into refusal. What fails to transfer is calibration of the safety decision, not the underlying representation. We exploit this by recalibrating, rather than retraining, a high-resource gate: a low-rank logistic readout with its decision threshold reset using as few as 1 to 4 target-language examples per class. The gate routes between refusal steering and harmfulness-direction ablation, substantially raising mean refusal selectivity ($Δ$ = harmful $-$ harmless refusal) from 33.6 for the strongest adapted baseline to 54.5 while preserving MMLU utility. These results suggest that some low-resource safety failures can be repaired by recalibrating existing representations rather than learning new ones. Our code is released: https://github.com/rashadaziz/low-resource-safety.

AI.tldr: 论文发现，目前大多基于高资源语言（如英语）训练的安全对齐方法在低资源语言（如斯瓦希里语、缅甸语）上的泛化效果差，模型更容易对有害提示产生错误响应。作者进一步分析了原因，并提出通过简易的门控重校准技术显著提升了低资源语言下的安全表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型的安全性主要依赖于在高资源语言（英语等）的对齐训练，但在低资源语言上安全泛化能力不足，导致有害提示难以正确拒绝。这一现象对模型的多语言安全应用带来极大隐患。作者希望找出原因，并寻找无需耗费大量资源的新型修正方法。
AI.method: 作者系统评估了AdaSteer、CAST等安全自适应方法在Qwen2.5-7B、Gemma-2-9B、Llama-3.1-8B等模型上的23种语言表现，并分析高资源激活下的“有害性方向”在低资源语言下的区分能力。最后提出了一种门控重校准方案：通过极少量目标语言数据（每类1-4个例子），调整高资源门控器的判别阈值（低秩逻辑读出），以强化低资源下的拒绝能力。
AI.result: 实验发现，只靠翻译原有安全对齐方案，模型在低资源语言下的拒绝率严重下降（从87.9%降至43.9%），主要问题是门控校准失效而非表示本身缺乏。提出的门控重校准后，平均拒绝选择性指标大幅提升（从33.6升至54.5），且不损失下游能力（如MMLU）。
AI.conclusion: 低资源语言安全故障的核心是门控校准而非基础表示缺失。可通过简单的门控重校准，无需额外大规模对齐训练，即可有效提升多语言安全表达。代码已开源，为后续研究和实际部署提供易用方法。

title: hZACH-ViT: Curved Latent Geometry for Compact Vision Transformers in Low-Data Medical Imaging
comment: 17 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Code, execution notebooks, and aggregated result summaries will be released at https://github.com/Bluesman79/hZACH-ViT upon publication
summary:
Compact Vision Transformers are attractive for medical imaging in low-data and resource-constrained settings, but most existing variants assume that Euclidean latent geometry is sufficient for organizing image representations. We introduce hZACH-ViT, a family of curved-geometry extensions of ZACH-ViT, a compact zero-token Vision Transformer that removes positional embeddings and the class token and relies on global average pooling over patch representations. To isolate the role of geometry, we preserve the verified ZACH-ViT backbone and modify only the final representation space and prototype-based classifier head, enabling a controlled comparison between Euclidean, hyperbolic, and spherical latent geometries.
  We evaluate Poincaré, Klein, and spherical hZACH-ViT heads on seven MedMNIST datasets under an identical few-shot protocol with 50 samples per class and five random seeds. The completed benchmark contains 770 training runs spanning seven datasets, three non-Euclidean geometries, seven curvature magnitudes, and a Euclidean baseline. Across all seven datasets, the best non-Euclidean hZACH-ViT configuration improves over Euclidean ZACH-ViT, with an average gain of +0.021 in the dataset-specific primary metric and the largest improvement on OCTMNIST (+0.055 MacroF1). Fixed low-curvature configurations retain positive gains on the majority of datasets, and low curvature values (c = 0.1 or 0.2) account for six of the seven dataset-level winners.
  Rather than identifying a universally optimal manifold, our results establish geometry and curvature as dataset-dependent model-selection variables, with fixed low-curvature analyses confirming that gains persist beyond exhaustive per-dataset tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非欧几里得曲率空间(如双曲、球面)的紧凑型视觉Transformer(hZACH-ViT)变体，在多医疗影像小样本任务中优于传统欧氏空间模型。
AI.motivation: 当前紧凑视觉Transformer在医学影像中广受欢迎，但普遍假设欧几里得空间足以表达特征，忽略了不同几何空间（如双曲、球面）可能带来的表征优势。论文旨在研究不同潜在几何空间对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 作者对ZACH-ViT骨干架构仅更换输出表征空间和原型分类器头，分别采用Poincaré、Klein（双曲）、球面等几何空间，并与欧氏基线进行对照。所有模型在7个MedMNIST数据集上采用完全相同的小样本设定（每类50样本，5个随机种子）进行770次训练对比实验。
AI.result: 实验显示，非欧几里得hZACH-ViT在全部七个数据集上，最佳配置均优于欧氏基线，平均提升0.021，OCTMNIST的MacroF1提升达0.055。固定低曲率设置下，多数数据集仍有明显提升，六个数据集的最佳模型对应曲率为0.1或0.2。
AI.conclusion: 不同曲率和几何类型的表征空间对于小样本医学影像任务确实重要，但最优选择依赖于具体数据集，不存在单一最优空间，低曲率非欧几何空间表现出广泛的优势。

title: Implicit Geographic Inference in LLM Medical Triage: Language-Driven Disparities in Emergency Recommendations
comment: 7 pages, 4 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/wongqihan/ai-behavioral-experiments
summary: We investigate whether large language models produce different medical triage recommendations for identical symptoms based solely on the language of the patient prompt. Using Gemini 3.5 Flash, we evaluate a neurological symptom profile (persistent headache, blurred vision, nausea) across six languages (English, Spanish, Chinese, Hindi, Japanese, Arabic) with 30 runs per condition (n=450 total API calls). We find that the model recommends emergency room visits at rates ranging from 0% (Japanese, Hindi) to 30% (English, Arabic), despite assigning nearly identical severity scores (7.7-8.0/10) across all languages. Adding a single sentence specifying the patient's US location increases ER recommendations by up to 76.7 percentage points for non-English prompts, while the reverse anchor (English prompt with a Tokyo location) reduces the ER rate from 30% to 6.7%. A back-translation control (Japanese to English) produces ER rates comparable to the English baseline, confirming that the disparity is not caused by translation quality but by implicit geographic inference from the input language. We release the complete dataset, experiment code, and results.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现，大语言模型（例如Gemini 3.5 Flash）在处理相同医疗症状时，仅因输入语言不同，其紧急就诊（ER）建议率存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 随着多语种大语言模型在医疗场景的应用，研究者关注其是否会因语言而影响医疗建议的一致性和公正性，尤其是在全球化的健康信息服务背景下。
AI.method: 研究者通过Gemini 3.5 Flash对相同神经症状（持续头痛、视力模糊、恶心）分别用六种语言（英语、西班牙语、中文、印地语、日语、阿拉伯语）进行30次重复询问，并统计各条件下的ER推荐率，共450次API调用。同时，改变患者位置信息进行比较和对照实验，并通过回译验证语言翻译质量的影响。
AI.result: 不同语言下模型推荐去急诊室的比率极不一致：日语、印地语为0%，英语、阿拉伯语高达30%，尽管对所有语言均给出几乎一致的病情严重度评分（7.7-8.0/10）。指定美国地理位置信息时，非英语的ER推荐率最高提升76.7个百分点，反向指定日本地理位置则使英语ER推荐率从30%降至6.7%。回译对照表明分歧根源于模型对输入语言的地理推断而非翻译质量问题。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在医疗分诊建议时，语言本身可能引发模型对患者地理位置的隐式推断，导致建议明显不一致，此类AI在医疗部署时需警惕语言偏见，确保公平与安全。

title: Reason, Retrieve, Re-rank: A Zero-Shot Reasoning-Aware Framework for Composed Video Retrieval
summary: Composed Video Retrieval (CoVR) seeks the target video that results from applying a free-form textual modification to a reference video. We address the \emph{Reason-Aware} CoVR (CoVR-R) challenge at the CVPR~2026 VidLLMs workshop, where retrieval is strictly zero-shot. We present \textbf{R3-CoVR} (\emph{Reason, Retrieve, Re-rank}), a training-free pipeline built entirely from frozen foundation models. A multimodal large language model (Qwen3-VL-8B) reasons about the \emph{after-effects} an edit implies -- state transitions, action phases, scene, camera and tempo -- and verbalises a concise post-edit description; a contrastive video--text encoder (SigLIP-2) embeds this description and the gallery for first-stage retrieval; finally a constraint-aware re-ranking stage uses the same multimodal model as a judge that scores each shortlisted candidate against the intended edited result. On the challenge test set, R3-CoVR attains \textbf{91.9\% R@1} and \textbf{98.2\% R@10}. Two findings drive these results: (i)~matching the description length to the contrastive encoder's text window lifts \Rk{1} from $67.5$ to $72.7$; and (ii)~the constraint-aware re-ranker, which reorders only the shortlist, lifts \Rk{1} from $72.7$ to $91.9$ -- the single largest gain. We analyse the re-ranker's behaviour, the retrieve/re-rank blend, and the shortlist depth, and we release a clean three-layer implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了R3-CoVR，一个无需训练、完全基于冻结大模型的多阶段推理-检索-重排流程，实现了零样本的理由感知复合视频检索任务，在CVPR2026 VidLLMs竞赛中达到91.9% R@1的SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 复合视频检索任务要求检索结果视频对应于引用视频经过自由文本修饰后的状态，此任务的理由感知版本更强调模型对编辑后结果的因果推理能力。然而，目前方法在零样本场景下推理能力有限、性能有待提升。
AI.method: 提出R3-CoVR流程，利用冻结的大型多模态语言模型（Qwen3-VL-8B）推理编辑后的因果变化、生成简要描述；对描述和图库视频利用对比式编码器（SigLIP-2）做初步检索；再用同一多模态大模型作为评审者对候选结果进行约束感知的重排序，全流程无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在挑战赛测试集上，R3-CoVR取得了91.9%的R@1和98.2%的R@10。实验发现：将描述长度与编码器输入匹配，R@1从67.5提升到72.7；增加约束感知的重排序，R@1从72.7大幅提升到91.9%。
AI.conclusion: 冻结大模型推理结合对比检索与约束感知重排，在零样本条件下大幅提升复合视频检索表现。重排序阶段贡献最大，三层流程简单有效，实现代码公开。

title: DiscourseFlip: An Oblique Discourse-Level Opinion Manipulation Attack against Black-box Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are widely deployed and increasingly influential, but their reliance on external corpora exposes new security risks from poisoned retrieval content. Existing RAG attacks are largely focusing on individual queries or narrow topic-local query sets, which limits their practical reach and offers limited camouflage in real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce discourse-level opinion manipulation, a new threat model in which coordinated influence across a semantic query network induces opinion shifts over a holistic, multi-topic query space. We formalize this threat in a black-box setting and propose DiscourseFlip, an agentic, graph-guided attack that dynamically allocates a limited poisoning budget to maximize discourse-level opinion deviation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiscourseFlip consistently induces targeted opinion shifts across the contextualized query network and significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of coverage and effectiveness. User studies further confirm that DiscourseFlip is effective while remaining well camouflaged from user detection. Moreover, systematic analyses show that existing mitigation strategies are ineffective against discourse-level manipulation, underscoring the urgent need for more robust and adaptive defenses to address discourse-level vulnerabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对RAG系统的新型攻击手法DiscourseFlip，通过在语义查询网络中对检索内容实施协调性投毒，实现在多主题空间中影响整体意见分布。实验和用户调查显示，该方法有效且难以被察觉，现有防御手段对此无效。
AI.motivation: 当前RAG系统普遍依赖外部知识库，易遭受投毒攻击，然而现有攻击聚焦单一或小范围主题，难以在实际中产生大规模影响且容易被检测，因此亟需研究更具隐蔽性和实效性的攻击方式。
AI.method: 在黑盒设定下，作者提出DiscourseFlip方法，将攻击建模为有限投毒预算下最大化语篇级意见偏移的优化问题。该方法基于图结构动态分配攻击资源，对整个查询网络进行意见操纵。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DiscourseFlip在广泛的多主题语境下能显著引发预期的意见偏移，覆盖范围及效果远超现有基线方法。用户研究也证明其隐蔽性强，普通用户难以察觉。
AI.conclusion: 针对此类语篇级投毒攻击，现有防御措施均难以奏效，研究呼吁开发更健壮、具自适应能力的新型防护手段以应对该类风险。

title: RoboTrustBench: Benchmarking the Trustworthiness of Video World Models for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Video world models are increasingly used in robotic manipulation, yet existing benchmarks mostly evaluate them under valid, feasible, and safe instructions. We introduce RoboTrustBench, a benchmark for evaluating the trustworthiness of video world models under four scenarios: Normal, Constraint-Sensitive, Counterfactual, and Adversarial. Built from real-world DROID episodes, RoboTrustBench contains 1,207 expert-validated instruction-image pairs and a six-dimensional evaluation protocol with 13 fine-grained criteria. Evaluating seven representative video world models with human and MLLM assessment, we find that current models often generate visually coherent videos, but struggle with constraint reasoning, counterfactual grounding, physical interaction, and unsafe-instruction suppression. These results show that visual quality and surface-level instruction following are insufficient for trustworthy robotic video world modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoboTrustBench，用于评估视频世界模型在多种情景下（如约束敏感、反事实等）的可靠性，并发现当前模型在复杂推理和安全性等方面存在短板。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型评估主要集中在简单或理想的指令情景，缺乏对模型在复杂、具有挑战性的实际情景下可靠性的评估，为了推动机器人视频世界模型的真实应用，亟需更具挑战性的基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了RoboTrustBench基准，包括从真实机器人操作数据中提取的1,207对经过专家验证的指令与图像，涵盖正常、约束敏感、反事实、以及对抗性等四种情景，并提出了涵盖13个细化标准的六维度评价协议。对七种主流视频世界模型采用人工与多模态大模型相结合的方式进行评测。
AI.result: 评测发现，虽然现有视频世界模型能生成视觉上连贯的视频，但在约束推理、反事实理解、实际物理交互以及对不安全指令的抑制方面表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠视觉质量或表面指令的遵循，难以实现真正值得信赖的机器人视频世界模型。提升推理、理解和安全性能力是未来关键。

title: Bridging Topology and Deep Representation Learning: A TDA-ViT Fusion Model for Four-Class Brain Tumor Classification
summary:
Accurate brain tumor classification from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a key requirement for early diagnosis and clinical decision-making. Vision Transformers (ViTs) have shown strong performance in medical image analysis by learning global contextual representations, but they often fail to capture intrinsic structural and topological patterns present in tumor regions. To address this limitation, we propose a fusion framework that combines Topological Data Analysis (TDA) features with pretrained Vision Transformer representations for four-class brain tumor classification.
  In the proposed method, TDA is used to extract complementary topological descriptors that capture geometric structure, connectivity, and shape information from MRI images. In parallel, a pretrained ViT model learns high-level semantic representations from the same images. These two feature spaces are then fused to form a unified and more discriminative representation for classification.
  The model is evaluated on the BRISC2025 dataset, which contains four brain tumor classes: glioma, meningioma, pituitary tumor, and non-tumor cases. Experimental results show that combining topological and transformer-based features significantly improves performance compared to using either approach alone. The proposed TDA-ViT fusion model achieves an accuracy of 99.10%, precision of 99.27%, recall of 99.15%, F1-score of 99.21%, and an AUC of 99.98%. It also outperforms several state-of-the-art models, including ResNet50, ResNet101, EfficientNetB2, and standalone Vision Transformers. These results demonstrate that topological features provide valuable complementary information that enhances deep representation learning, leading to a robust and highly accurate framework for automated brain tumor classification.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合拓扑数据分析（TDA）特征和预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）特征的融合模型，用于四分类脑肿瘤MRI影像自动分类，显著提升了分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉Transformer的脑肿瘤MRI影像分类虽然表现出色，但难以捕捉肿瘤区域的结构和拓扑特征，导致模型表达能力有限。因此，作者希望通过引入TDA特征补足Transformer不足，提高分类准确性。
AI.method: 方法上，作者利用TDA从MRI中提取捕捉几何结构、连通性和形状等信息的拓扑描述符；同时使用预训练ViT提取高层语义特征。之后将两种特征空间融合，形成更具判别性的特征，用于脑肿瘤四分类任务。
AI.result: 在BRISC2025数据集上，提出的TDA-ViT融合模型在准确率（99.10%）、精确率（99.27%）、召回率（99.15%）、F1分数（99.21%）及AUC（99.98%）等多个指标上均优于ResNet50、ResNet101、EfficientNetB2及单独ViT等多种SOTA模型。
AI.conclusion: 融合拓扑特征与Transformer特征可有效提升深度学习模型在脑肿瘤分类中的表现，TDA特征为深度特征学习提供了有价值的补充，使模型更加健壮、高效，适合实际的自动化诊断场景应用。

title: Connecting the Dots: Benchmarking Reflective Memory in Long-Horizon Dialogue
summary: Despite substantial progress in long-context modeling, existing benchmarks remain confined to factual memory for explicit recall, failing to measure the reflective memory required to synthesize fragmented, multimodal cues into high-level interpretations. To address this gap, we introduce RefMem-Bench, a benchmark for reflective memory in long-horizon dialogue. RefMem-Bench contains 26K annotated QA instances with eight reflective-memory dimensions and three task formats, requiring models to move beyond surface-level retrieval and infer latent meanings from evidence distributed across interaction histories. To enhance reflective memory capability, we propose REflective Memory INDuction (REMIND), a hierarchical framework that treats reflective memory as progressive meaning construction. REMIND couples question-conditioned evidence retrieval, salience-aware grounding, and abstraction-level supervision, and uses Progressive Reflective Alignment to distill high-level reflective reasoning into the factual inference pathway. Experiments show RefMem-Bench poses a substantial challenge to current models, while REMIND consistently improves both answer accuracy and memory recall through progressive evidence perception, grounding, and abstraction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新的长对话中的反思记忆评测基准RefMem-Bench，并提出了REMIND反思记忆归纳框架，提升模型对高层次隐含信息的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的长上下文建模评测多聚焦于表层事实记忆与回忆，但实际应用中高阶反思记忆（如整合碎片化、多模态线索推断抽象意义）同样重要，却缺乏有效测量标准。
AI.method: 作者构建了RefMem-Bench数据集(2.6万QA样本包含8个层面的反思记忆任务，3种任务格式)，并提出了REMIND框架，将反思记忆建模为逐步的意义建构，包含基于问题的证据检索、显著性感知归因及多层次监督，通过渐进式反思对齐将高阶推理融入事实推理流程。
AI.result: 实验表明RefMem-Bench对现有模型具有很大挑战性；REMIND框架显著提升了模型在反思记忆任务上的答题准确率与记忆召回能力，归因于其分层、渐进式证据感知及抽象能力。
AI.conclusion: RefMem-Bench拓展了基于事实回忆的评测边界，覆盖更复杂的高层次认知推理。REMIND有助于显著提升模型反思记忆与理解综合能力，为发展更强AI记忆力提供了新路径。

title: Goal2Pixel: Grounding Goals to Pixels for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a common foundation for vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE). Yet most VLM-based methods cast navigation as low-level action prediction, an interface that is ambiguous, tied to short-horizon motion primitives, and inefficient due to repeated VLM querying. We propose Goal2Pixel, a pure pixel-based paradigm that reformulates VLN-CE as navigable pixel grounding. Rather than predicting actions, Goal2Pixel uses the image plane as a unified spatial interface between VLM reasoning and robot motion: the model predicts a visible navigable pixel to the agent, which is back-projected into a 3D waypoint for forward navigation. For non-forward actions, we append auxiliary directive regions to the image plane, where the left/right/bottom regions are interpreted as turning left, turning right, and stopping, respectively. To enable long-horizon navigation, we propose a visibility-aware keyframe memory for compact and informative history representation. To adapt pretrained VLMs to navigable pixel grounding, we introduce semantic embeddings and coordinate-aware auxiliary losses. Goal2Pixel achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance while requiring fewer VLM inference calls than prior methods. On R2R-CE Val-Unseen it achieves 54.1% SR and 52.5% SPL with just 7.75 VLM calls per episode, 6x fewer than the 46.62 required by direct action prediction at 32.9% SR. The same trend holds on RxR-CE.Project Page: https://baobao0926.github.io/Goal2Pixel/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉-语言导航方法Goal2Pixel，通过像素级定位提升导航效率与效果，显著减少了模型推理次数并取得更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航方法大多依赖于低层次动作预测，这种方式存在接口模糊、效率低下和推理次数太多的问题，限制了视觉-语言模型在实际导航中的应用。作者旨在通过创新接口和机制，提高效率和效果。
AI.method: Goal2Pixel将导航任务重新表述为“可导航像素定位”，即模型直接在图像平面上预测目标像素，该像素回投影到3D空间用于导航；非前进动作则在图像平面上设定左右/停止等辅助指令区域。同时引入可见性感知关键帧记忆机制，以及为适应VLM引入语义嵌入和坐标感知辅助损失。
AI.result: 在标准数据集R2R-CE上，Goal2Pixel在只需每个episode 7.75次模型推理的情况下，达到了54.1%的SR和52.5%的SPL，推理次数仅为传统方法的1/6，性能远优（46.62次推理/32.9% SR）。类似结果在RxR-CE也成立。
AI.conclusion: Goal2Pixel以新颖的像素级导航接口和高效机制，推动了视觉-语言导航任务性能提升和推理效率显著优化，在减少VLM调用的同时取得了更好的导航表现。

title: Single-Channel Tissue Segmentation via Cross-Modal Distillation from Foundation Models
summary: Multiplexed fluorescence microscopy improves tissue segmentation by providing complementary channels including nuclear (DAPI) and membrane (E-cadherin), that together encode richer spatial context than single-channel imaging alone. However, multiplexed models require all channels at inference, limiting deployment where only a subset is available. This work proposes a cross-modal knowledge distillation framework that transfers semantic information from a frozen foundation model teacher processing multiplexed input to a lightweight student operating on the nuclear channel only. The distillation objective combines MSE-based probability matching, boundary-aware supervision, and learnable uncertainty weighting. SAM ViT-H and CellSAM are evaluated as teachers across four U-Net students: Swin-Tiny (27M), ResNet18 (11M), EfficientNet-B0 (5.3M), and MobileNetV3 (1.5M), on TissueNet and BBBC038. On TissueNet, the SAM-distilled Swin-Tiny student achieves Dice 78.36 (plus or minus 1.44), a 13.05-point improvement over the no-KD baseline (65.31 plus or minus 1.35) and 87.9% recovery of teacher oracle performance (89.12 plus or minus 1.21) at a 23x parameter reduction. KD consistently improves all four students by approximately 12 Dice points, confirming architecture-agnostic distillation. SAM ViT-H outperforms CellSAM as teacher across all settings. Cross-dataset evaluation on BBBC038 shows consistent gains without teacher retraining.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种跨模态知识蒸馏框架，实现仅基于单通道（如DAPI）图像时，也能获得接近多通道模型的组织分割性能。
AI.motivation: 多通道荧光成像能丰富组织分割空间信息，但推断阶段需全通道输入，现实中经常只获取部分通道，限制模型应用场景。
AI.method: 提出从处理多通道输入的冻结大模型（如SAM ViT-H）向仅用单通道的小模型（如U-Net家族）进行知识蒸馏。蒸馏目标结合MSE概率匹配、边界感知监督和可学习的不确定性加权。
AI.result: 在TissueNet数据集上，Swin-Tiny学生模型仅依赖DAPI通道，Dice得分提高13.05点，达到78.36，恢复了教师模型87.9%的性能，参数量减少23倍。四种学生架构均提升近12个Dice点。跨数据集（BBBC038）无须重新训练教师也能获得相似提升。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态知识蒸馏显著提升单通道下组织分割性能，且独立于学生网络架构，为现实资源受限场景下模型部署提供新思路。

title: Efficient RAG with Intent-Aware Retrieval and Semantics-Preserving Chunking
summary: The demand for powerful instruction following and reasoning capability of large language models (LLMs) has promoted rapid development of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). The RAG system assists LLM generation by retrieving chunks of query-fit supplementary knowledge from an external database. Conventional RAG systems, however, suffer from information insufficiency due to two factors, which are intent-agnostic retrieval and information fragmentation. Our work proposes a RAG framework, termed InSemRAG, that addresses these challenges via an iterative retrieve-and-check mechanism with two supporting modules, an intention-aware retriever (IAR) and semantics-preserving chunking (SPC). IAR implements a dynamic hybrid retrieval method that adaptively weights the retrieval channels based on the query intent, while SPC performs detection and reparation to the damaged evidence chunks to preserve the semantic integrity. To alleviate the computational latency brought by our iterative mechanism, we leverage small language models (SLMs). Extensive experiments across several benchmark datasets consistently demonstrate the competitiveness of our method against recent state-of-the-art RAG mechanisms. Particularly, our method achieves significant gains on multi-hop and evidence-sensitive tasks, with a 2.65-point improvement in F1 on HotPotQA and a 1.5-point increase in accuracy on FEVER. Our method also achieves competitive performance to Multi-Hop RAG with 4.32$\times$ lower latency with the utilization of SLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InSemRAG框架，通过意图感知检索和语义完整切分模块提升了检索增强生成（RAG）系统的性能，特别在多跳和证据敏感任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG系统在检索时与用户意图无关，且检索片段易导致信息碎片化，从而造成信息不足，影响最终生成质量。作者希望通过新方法解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出了InSemRAG框架，包含意图感知检索器（IAR）和语义保持切分（SPC）两大模块。IAR根据查询意图动态调整检索方式，SPC检测并修复证据片段以保持语义完整。为降低计算延迟，引入小型语言模型（SLM）协作迭代机制。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，InSemRAG在多跳推理和证据敏感任务上均优于最新方法。在HotPotQA数据集F1分数提高2.65，在FEVER数据集准确率提升1.5。同时，通过SLM支持，推理延迟比Multi-Hop RAG降低4.32倍。
AI.conclusion: InSemRAG显著提升了RAG在复杂推理和证据敏感任务中的检索与生成能力，同时保证运行效率，展示出在实际应用的广阔前景。

title: FlatVPR: Plug-and-play Geo-linear Residual Adapter for Geometric Rectification of Foundation Model Feature Manifolds
summary: This paper proposes ``FlatVPR,'' a novel geometric rectification paradigm that effectively bridges the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in visual place recognition (VPR) by enforcing a feature manifold structure where any descriptor between two adjacent anchors $\mathbf{z}_A$ and $\mathbf{z}_B$ can be accurately reconstructed via linear interpolation $\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{pseudo} = (1-t)\mathbf{z}_A + t\mathbf{z}_B$, where $t \in [0,1]$ denotes the relative position. While state-of-the-art foundation models such as DINOv2-ViT-S/14 provide robust semantic features, their latent manifolds exhibit prominent curvature, projecting uniform linear motion in physical space onto highly non-linear trajectories in the feature space, which hinders reliable reconstruction under sparse anchor conditions. To enable the aforementioned interpolation-based reconstruction, we introduce a residual transformation $\hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z})$ to the raw foundation features $\mathbf{z}$, where $\text{Res}(\cdot)$ represents a learnable adapter. Our method explicitly suppresses manifold curvature using a mathematically grounded Pullback Flatness Loss that minimizes the deviation of intermediate features from the linear segment connecting adjacent anchors, thereby minimizing the intrinsic curvature of the manifold. Through this spatial flattening, map construction is formulated within an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework, decoupled into a continuous M-step for manifold adaptation and a conceptual E-step for optimal anchor selection guidelines. Experiments on the NCLT dataset demonstrate that the application of our adapter leads to significant performance improvements even under extremely sparse anchor conditions with 100m intervals and extreme seasonal changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的VPR（视觉位置识别）几何校正范式“FlatVPR”，通过扁平化特征流形，提高了稀疏地标条件下的地图轻量化和定位精度的平衡。主要通过引入可学习的残差变换和拉回平坦损失来实现流形扁平化，从而使特征线性插值可行。实验证明，该方法在大间隔和复杂环境下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 当前先进视觉基础模型（如DINOv2-ViT-S/14）虽然特征表征强大，但其特征流形曲率大，导致在锚点稀疏时，线性插值重构不可靠，影响地图瘦身和VPR定位效果。亟需找到在不损失精度的前提下实现地图轻量化的新方法。
AI.method: 1. 对于任意相邻锚点特征，在流形上强制其线性结构，通过残差变换（可学习适配器）校正基础特征；2. 利用理论支撑的拉回平坦损失，直接约束插值点偏离直线段的程度以抑制曲率；3. 用期望-最大化（EM）框架分离流形自适应（M步）和锚点选择（E步）两大流程。
AI.result: 在NCLT数据集上进行实验，验证所提方法在极其稀疏锚点（100m间隔）和极端季节变化下，Adapter提升了VPR定位精度，结果显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过流形扁平化，可有效提升稀疏锚点条件下基于视觉的定位系统精度和地图的轻量性，实验验证了新范式的实用价值。

title: CV-Arena: An Open Benchmark for Instructional Computer Vision Problem Solving with Human-AI Collaborative Preferences
summary: Instruction-guided image editing is becoming a general interface for visual work, yet existing benchmarks still focus largely on narrow appearance edits and do not fully capture the diversity of real-image tasks in professional workflows. Here, we define instructional computer vision problem solving as a broader formulation of image editing: given a real input image and a natural-language instruction, a system must produce an edited output that realizes the requested transformation while satisfying explicit preservation, geometric, physical, and usability constraints. We introduce CV-Arena, an open benchmark designed to evaluate this capability at professional scales. CV-Arena contains 12K high-resolution real-image instruction pairs spanning 16 instruction-based visual task types, constructed using CogRetriever, a dual-track retrieval-and-curation pipeline that combines targeted web search, agentic query refinement, verification, and traceability. To evaluate models at scale while preserving human fidelity, we propose Active Elo, a human-AI collaborative preference protocol that leverages CV-Judge, a logic-gated, multi-dimensional VLM evaluator, to reject clear failures and resolve high-confidence comparisons; and to route close, high-quality comparisons to expert raters. Mixed human and AI supervision is then aggregated through reliability-weighted Elo updates. Our comprehensive evaluation of 21 systems, including proprietary, open-source, and agentic models, on CV-Arena reveals persistent gaps in instruction adherence, physical reasoning, structural control, and fine-grained detail preservation. We further develop CV-Agent, a lightweight agentic model that combines planning, editing, and verification, and demonstrate that closed-loop reasoning is a promising direction for professional-grade instruction-following visual editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CV-Arena基准，用于评估基于指令的图像编辑模型在更广泛且专业的实际任务中的表现，填补现有基准关注点过窄的不足。还介绍了一种结合人类与AI反馈的评价方法，并开发了新型智能体模型CV-Agent。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑基准主要关注外观层面的小范围编辑，无法全面反映专业实际工作流程中对图像编辑的需求和多样性。因此，亟需更通用、更复杂的评测基准和方法，以及新模型来提升实际应用能力。
AI.method: 1. 提出指令式计算机视觉问题求解新定义，涵盖保真性、几何、物理、可用性等约束。2. 构建CV-Arena基准，包含1.2万对高分辨率真实图像指令对，涉及16类任务，通过新型检索与整理管线CogRetriever获取。3. 创新地提出Active Elo评价协议，引入VLM和人工混合审评，增强评价的规模化和一致性。4. 评测21种当前主流模型，并开发轻量级智能体模型CV-Agent。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，无论是专有、开源还是智能体模型，在满足指令、物理推理、结构控制和细节保留等方面依然存在明显差距。CV-Agent模型中的闭环推理策略在专业级指令视觉编辑任务上表现出较好前景。
AI.conclusion: CV-Arena为大规模、专业级图像编辑模型提供了更具挑战性和多维度的评估平台。Active Elo方案帮助实现高效可靠评价。闭环智能体方法（如CV-Agent）展示了提升复杂指令跟随能力的潜力，为相关研究和产业应用指明了方向。

title: Unlocking the Black Box of Latent Reasoning: An Interpretability-Guided Approach to Intervention
summary: Latent reasoning enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to perform multi-step inference within continuous hidden states, offering efficiency gains over explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT). However, the opacity of these continuous thought vectors hinders their reliability and controllability. This paper bridges the gap between mechanistic interpretability and actionable control. We first present a systematic analysis using structural, causal, and geometric probes, revealing that latent vectors encode compressed, faithful representations of reasoning steps, with early vectors acting as critical causal hubs. Building on this, we operationalize these interpretability insights into a suite of training-free, decode-time interventions that refine the latent reasoning process by imposing the identified geometric and semantic priors. Extensive experiments across multiple model scales and diverse task domains demonstrate that our approaches consistently improve reasoning accuracy. Our interpretability-guided interventions consistently unlock latent capabilities and improve reasoning accuracy without any parameter updates.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了通过对大型语言模型（LLM）隐式推理向量的结构化分析，并据此设计训练外干预手段以提升多步推理准确性的方案。
AI.motivation: 显式Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理虽有效，但效率较低，而隐式潜在推理虽然高效却难以解释和控制，导致模型可靠性和可控性不足。
AI.method: 作者首先利用结构、因果和几何探针系统性分析了LLM的潜在推理向量，发现这些向量高度压缩且忠实地表征了推理步骤。基于此分析，作者提出了一套无需训练、仅在解码时介入的可操作干预方法，通过向潜在推理过程施加几何与语义先验来改进推理质量。
AI.result: 在多个模型规模和任务领域的大量实验中，作者的方法能在不改变模型参数的情况下，一致性地提升推理准确率，并激发LLM的潜在推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过解释性分析指导的干预措施，能够有效提升LLM多步推理的准确性与能力，实现无参数更新下的模型性能优化。

title: TIDES: Time-Derivative Event Simulation via Deformable Reconstruction
summary:
Event cameras emit asynchronous events in response to environmental appearance changes. The scarcity of real-world event datasets makes simulation essential. However, most simulators infer event timestamps from frame sequences, forcing many threshold crossings to share a small set of discrete times; a failure mode we term timestamp batching that worsens under fast motion and occlusion.
  We present TIDES, a continuous-time event simulator built on dynamic Gaussian splatting. Because TIDES operates on an explicit 3D scene representation with learnt geometry and motion, it can derive per-pixel intensity dynamics directly from the scene, rather than by differencing rendered frames. This enables accurate threshold-crossing prediction, including multiple crossings per rendering step, without temporal upsampling or frame interpolation. The same 3D scene model reveals where objects partially occlude one another; TIDES uses this to guide adaptive time stepping, concentrating computation only in regions where occlusion dynamics make simple models of brightness change unreliable.
  Finally, we model finite sensor bandwidth using a tile-level arbiter whose throughput, jitter, and event drops reproduce realistic sensor artifacts. Across paired RGB-event benchmarks, TIDES attains state-of-the-art event-stream fidelity. We also show that events simulated by TIDES transfer more effectively to real downstream tasks than competitors'.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TIDES的新型连续时域事件相机模拟器，大幅提升了事件数据的真实性及下游任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现实中事件相机的数据集稀缺，现有模拟器采用逐帧推断事件时间戳，导致"timestamp batching"问题，尤其在高速运动和遮挡情况下严重影响数据真实性。
AI.method: TIDES基于动态高斯展布（dynamic Gaussian splatting）的3D场景显式表示，结合学习得到的几何和运动信息，直接建模每个像素的强度变化，无需帧差分、时间上采样或帧插值。TIDES还能感知遮挡区域，并自适应时间步长以优化计算。此外，还引入了模拟传感器带宽限制和异常的机制，使输出事件流更贴近真实。
AI.result: TIDES在多个RGB-事件标准评测数据集上，生成的事件流保真度达到当前最优水平。同时，与同类模拟器相比，TIDES模拟的事件数据迁移到真实下游任务时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: TIDES有效缓解了现有事件相机模拟中时间戳离散化等问题，提高了数据仿真质量，对实际感知和智能任务具有更高实用价值。

title: One Channel to Rule Them All: Rethinking Input Representation for Visual Place Recognition
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is fundamental to long-term robot localization and SLAM, yet current systems overwhelmingly rely on RGB input, implicitly assuming color is necessary for global place recognition. We challenge this assumption, investigating the role of chromatic information across training regimes, model architectures and standard benchmarks under real-world appearance variation. We find that grayscale matches RGB performance generally and outperforms it under severe appearance shifts where color invariance is insufficiently learned, while color provides meaningful gains only where persistent and discriminative chromatic cues are present. Across selected benchmarks, a fully gray-trained MixVPR model achieves an average 82.4% Recall@1 compared to 81.2% for its RGB counterpart. In some cases, lightweight grayscale variants with 60% fewer parameters can outperform heavier RGB models. Grayscale further offers practical advantages in storage, bandwidth and alignment with resource-constrained systems. We conclude that for global VPR where scenes vary across illumination, weather, season and setting, color contributes minimally, and grayscale alone is sufficient for reliable place recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了VPR任务中过度依赖彩色（RGB）图像的做法，实验证明灰度图像在多种情况下可媲美甚至优于RGB输入。
AI.motivation: 现有VPR/SLAM系统普遍采用RGB输入，默认彩色特征是不可或缺的，但作者们认为这一假设值得商榷，在多变环境下彩色特征未必始终有用。
AI.method: 作者在不同训练方法、模型结构和标准数据集下，系统性地比较了使用灰度图像与彩色图像的VPR性能，包括对极端外观变化情况的测试。
AI.result: 灰度模型在广泛情况下与RGB模型性能相当，甚至在外观剧变时优于RGB模型；部分灰度模型只需原有60%的参数即可超越更大RGB模型。此外，灰度在存储和带宽等方面也更具优势。
AI.conclusion: 在光照、天气、季节等多变场景下，彩色信息对VPR作用有限，灰度图像已经足够实现高质量的地点识别。

title: Understanding LLM Behavior in Multi-Target Cross-Lingual Summarization
summary: Multi-target cross-lingual text summarization (MTXLS), which summarizes a source document into multiple target languages, is increasingly important as users consume content in diverse languages, but remains underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce multi-target cross-lingual element-aware (MEA), a new MTXLS benchmark covering 24 target languages. We benchmark end-to-end and pipeline approaches across various LLMs and show that MTXLS performance still substantially lags behind English monolingual summarization. To better understand MTXLS in LLMs, we propose a layer-wise analysis framework for investigating how LLMs internally perform MTXLS. Our analyses suggest that translation and summarization behaviors emerge jointly within later layers rather than as distinctly decomposed stages. Most task-relevant processing occurs within these layers, and errors also tend to arise at similar depths. Motivated by these findings, we introduce an inference-time activation steering method that leverages hidden representations from English summarization to guide MTXLS generation. Experiments show that our method consistently improves MTXLS quality across target languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了多目标跨语种摘要（MTXLS）新基准和分析方法，旨在提升多语言文本摘要的效果，并通过激活引导显著提升表现。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标跨语种文本摘要研究不足，缺乏全面的基准和对大模型处理机制的深入理解，且其性能远低于英文单语摘要，因此亟需更优的数据集和方法提升性能。
AI.method: 1）提出了覆盖24种目标语言的多目标跨语种摘要基准集合MEA；2）对多种LLM的端到端及流水线方法进行系统测评；3）提出逐层分析方法探查MTXLS在大模型内部的实现机制；4）据分析结果，设计了利用英文摘要隐层表征引导MTXLS生成的推理时激活引导方法。
AI.result: 实验发现：各类主流LLM在多目标跨语种摘要上的表现远逊于英文单语摘要；分析揭示翻译与摘要行为在模型后层同时出现且大多数相关处理亦在此阶段发生；所提出的激活引导方法可在各语言下稳定提升跨语种摘要的质量。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在MTXLS任务面临较大挑战，但通过针对性的分析和引导方法，可以有效提升其多语种摘要质量，为将来改进多语言内容理解和生成提供了新思路。

title: Not All Points Are Equal: Uncertainty-Aware 4D LiDAR Scene Synthesis
comment: CVPR 2026 E2E3D Workshop; GitHub at https://github.com/worldbench/U4D
summary: Constructing faithful 4D worlds from LiDAR-acquired sequences is crucial for embodied AI, yet current generative frameworks apply uniform modeling capacity across all spatial regions. This ignores that perceptual difficulty varies dramatically within a single scan: distant surfaces, occluded boundaries, and small-scale objects carry far higher uncertainty than well-observed structures. We present U4D, a new framework that explicitly leverages spatial uncertainty to guide LiDAR scene generation in a "hard-to-easy" schedule. U4D derives per-point uncertainty maps via Shannon Entropy from a pretrained segmentor, then applies an unconditional diffusion stage to synthesize high-entropy areas with precise geometry, followed by a conditional completion stage that fills in the remaining regions using these structures as priors. A MoST (Mixture of Spatio-Temporal) block further maintains cross-frame coherence by dynamically balancing spatial detail and temporal continuity. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI demonstrate state-of-the-art scene fidelity, temporal consistency, and downstream performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了U4D框架，根据空间不确定性由难到易地引导LiDAR场景生成，显著提升4D世界（时空场景）重建的真实性与一致性。
AI.motivation: 目前的点云生成方法对空间区域一视同仁，忽略了不同区域的不确定性差异，导致远处、遮挡边界和小物体的重建效果较差。为解决这一问题，作者希望提升不确定区域的重建质量，从而获得更加真实和有用的4D世界表示。
AI.method: U4D框架首先利用预训练分割器计算每个点的不确定性（采用Shannon熵），然后采用扩散模型先无条件合成高不确定性区域的几何结构，再通过条件补全阶段以这些结构为先验补全其余部分。通过MoST（时空混合）模块，动态平衡空间细节和时间连续性，保证跨帧一致性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI数据集上的实验表明，U4D在场景真实感、时序一致性及后续任务性能方面均达到了最新水平，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于空间不确定性的生成框架U4D能以“难到易”策略优化点云重建，有效提升4D场景生成的质量和实用性，对具身智能等实际应用具有重要意义。

title: COLLAR: Cascaded Object-Level Latent Refinement for High-Fidelity Conditional Generation
summary: Achieving high-fidelity object-level control in Diffusion Transformers remains a significant challenge despite the introduction of structural priors like depth and Canny maps. Current object-level conditional generation methods frequently suffer from visual artifacts and struggle to maintain precise control over objects within small localized regions. To address these limitations, we propose Cascaded Object-Level Latent Refinement (COLLAR), a training-free framework that progressively optimizes object-level features via the Field-of-View (FoV) expansion. First, we propose the Cross-Scale Semantic Alignment (CSSA) module to address spatial-semantic gaps by injecting object-level features into extended-FoV branches via attention mechanisms. To further optimize these features, the Cyclic Feature Injection (CFI) module introduces a reciprocal background feedback mechanism. It leverages a frequency-based adaptive strategy to selectively update the global backbone with context-aligned local information. Finally, the extended-FoV branch serves as a hub for feature optimization, ensuring that object-level features are integrated into the global generation process without compromising final image quality. Extensive experiments on the COCO-MIG and COCO-POS benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across semantic alignment, image quality, and spatial fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cascaded Object-Level Latent Refinement (COLLAR)的无训练新框架，能显著提升Diffusion Transformers在对象级别上的生成控制和图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有Diffusion Transformers即使引入结构先验（如深度图、边缘图）后，在对象级别的精确生成仍面临视觉伪影和局部细节控制不足的问题。作者意在解决这些对象级生成难点，提高图像区域的定位和语义一致性。
AI.method: 提出COLLAR无训练优化框架，通过Field-of-View (FoV) 扩展逐步优化对象级特征，包括：1）Cross-Scale Semantic Alignment (CSSA)模块利用注意力机制在扩展的FoV分支中注入对象级特征，缓解空间与语义的错配问题；2）Cyclic Feature Injection (CFI)模块通过频率自适应策略和互馈机制，优化全局骨干与局部特征协同；3）将扩展FoV分支作为全局特征优化枢纽，确保对象级特征融入最终生成流程且不影响整体画质。
AI.result: 在COCO-MIG和COCO-POS基准数据集上的实验表明，COLLAR在语义对齐、图像质量和空间精度等指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 自提出的COLLAR框架无须额外训练，即可显著提升Diffusion Transformers生成图像的控制力和质量，尤其是在复杂对象级条件生成场景中效果突出。

title: Agentic Clustering: Controllable Text Taxonomies via Multi-Agent Refinement
summary: Recent text-clustering methods use large language models to propose a cluster taxonomy from a corpus and then assign each text to it. These pipelines are fundamentally programmatic: the sequence of LLM calls and the rules for stopping, merging, and splitting clusters are fixed in code in advance, so they generalise poorly across corpora of different structure and cannot easily incorporate user-supplied constraints such as a target cluster count or a clustering intent. We propose an agentic alternative in which an orchestrator LLM inspects the state of the discovery process at each step and dispatches one of a small set of specialised agents - proposer, synthesizer, auditor, investigator, and critic - adapting the pipeline to the corpus rather than executing a fixed one. On seven public text-clustering benchmarks the method achieves state-of-the-art performance, beating the strongest prior LLM baseline by up to 32% in ARI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以LLM为核心的智能体框架来实现自适应的文本聚类，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM文本聚类流程程序化强、泛化能力较弱，难以适应不同语料或用户特定需求。
AI.method: 设计了由LLM主控的多智能体体系（包括策略分派agent），实时分析聚类状态，动态调用不同特化角色的agent（如提议、合成、审核、调查、评审）。整个流程根据数据与目标自动调整，而非死板执行预设方案。
AI.result: 在包含7个公开文本聚类基准的数据集上，该方法表现优于最强基准LLM方法，ARI最高提升32%。
AI.conclusion: 基于多agent和自适应管线的LLM聚类方法在泛化性和性能上优于固定流程，对多样应用更具实用价值。

title: Boundary-Protection W8A8 HiFloat8 Quantization for Large-Scale Text-to-Video Diffusion Transformers
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to ICME 2026 Grand Challenge
summary: We present a post-training quantization (PTQ) approach for Wan2.1-T2V-14B, a 14-billion-parameter text-to-video diffusion transformer, targeting the W8A8 HiFloat8 (HiF8) format on Ascend 910B NPUs. A central challenge in quantizing video DiT models is the heterogeneous activation distribution across transformer blocks: boundary blocks (the first and last few blocks) exhibit fundamentally different statistical properties from middle blocks, making uniform quantization ineffective. We conduct a systematic per-block activation analysis across all 40 WanAttentionBlocks and use the findings to motivate a boundary-protection strategy that retains the first two and last three blocks in BF16 while quantizing the remaining 35 blocks with W8A8 HiF8. The proposed PTQ method matches or marginally exceeds the BF16 baseline on all five VBench dimensions evaluated, indicating no measurable accuracy loss within the 5-prompt evaluation set. An ablation study over four protection configurations confirms that full boundary protection yields the highest average VBench score, validating the data-driven block selection. We additionally investigate quantization-aware training (QAT) as a complementary fine-tuning stage and analyze the conditions under which it fails to outperform plain PTQ on single-card hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文针对14亿参数的文本到视频扩散大模型Wan2.1-T2V-14B，提出了一种针对Ascend 910B NPU的后训练量化（PTQ）方法。通过分析不同transformer block的激活分布统计特性，提出边界保护策略，提升量化精度。最终得到几乎不损失精度的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模文本到视频生成模型推理资源需求巨大，而NPU支持的低精度量化格式（如W8A8 HiFloat8）可提升效能，但传统统一量化策略在视频DiT模型中因激活分布异质性导致精度损失。解决量化后精度损失问题，提升实际部署可行性，是本工作的出发点。
AI.method: 首先对Wan2.1-T2V-14B中所有40个WanAttentionBlock的激活分布进行逐块系统性分析，发现边界块与中间块的分布差异显著。基于此，提出边界保护策略：模型首2和末3个Block采用BF16精度，其余35个Block采用W8A8 HiF8量化。同时，完成不同保护策略消融实验；并探索量化感知训练(QAT)作为补充微调手段。
AI.result: 提出的PTQ方法在五项VBench评测维度上与BF16基线持平或略优，在5样本的评估集内未见精度下降。消融实验显示，完全的边界保护方案获得最高的平均得分，验证了数据驱动的块选择有效性。此外，QAT微调阶段并未在单卡硬件上明显优于PTQ。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的边界保护策略可有效缓解大模型统一量化导致的精度损失，使得高效低精度部署成为可能。提出的方法无需精细QAT即可达到极佳效果，具有实际工程应用价值。

title: IndoBias: A Dual Track Culturally Grounded Benchmark for LLMs Bias Evaluation in Indonesian Languages
summary: Despite being home to more than 1300 ethnic groups and 700 indigenous languages, bias in Large Language Models has not been fully studied in Indonesia, thus leaving a critical gap in evaluating representational fairness and localized stereotypes within its uniquely vast, multilingual, and diverse sociocultural landscape. To address this, we introduce IndoBias as a culturally-grounded bias benchmark to assess LLMs bias in Indonesian and three local languages: Javanese, Sundanese, and Makasar. IndoBias features dual perspective evaluation tracks: depth-oriented (with contrastive-pairs) and breadth-oriented (with generation-based), where the latter is grounded in social science frameworks (SPI, O*NET, and WGI). Our results show that existing LLMs -- particularly decoder models -- exhibit strong bias towards prototypical sentences in Indonesian, while local languages suffer higher bias under Ideology and Religion category. We also find that LLMs responses exhibit a non-uniform Stereotype Polarity when prompted with various local entities. Finally, we discover that, in Indonesian, Common Crawl texts introduce more bias during pretraining, compared to human-reviewed article texts (e.g., Wikipedia, News), whereas introducing local languages to pretraining generally increases bias. This work highlights the importance of studying bias in culture-specific context. Warning: This paper contains example data that may be offensive, harmful, or biased.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了印尼及其本地语言（爪哇语、巽他语和望加锡语）的大型语言模型偏见评测基准IndoBias，揭示了模型在本地多语言环境下存在显著的文化及意识形态偏见。
AI.motivation: 印尼拥有庞大的族群和多种语言，但在LLM中的偏见问题尚未被充分研究，这导致对代表性公平性和本地刻板印象评估存在空白。
AI.method: 提出名为IndoBias的偏见基准，涵盖印尼语及三种地方语言，通过深度（对比样本）和广度（基于社会科学的生成）两种评测方式，对现有LLM进行偏见分析。
AI.result: 发现现有LLM（尤其是decoder模型）对印尼语原型句偏见明显，当分析本地语言时，在意识形态与宗教类别下偏见更重。爬取类数据集比人工审核数据集引入更多偏见，预训练时加入本地语言会整体提升偏见水平。
AI.conclusion: 应重视在特定文化环境下对LLM偏见的系统性研究，传统大模型在多语多元背景下表现出复杂且加剧的偏见现象。

title: Reasmory: 3D Reconstruction as Explicit Memory for VLMs Spatial Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit emerging spatial reasoning capabilities, yet they remain unreliable on tasks requiring precise spatial understanding, such as viewpoint reasoning, directional comparison, and distance estimation. In multi-view images and monocular videos, relevant spatial cues are often sparse and distributed across redundant observations, making them difficult to organize and exploit. Reconstruction-based Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) offer a natural way to aggregate such observations into explicit spatial memory, such as point clouds. However, simply exposing reconstruction models as free-form tools is brittle, VLMs may invoke tools incorrectly, skip required spatial transformations, or misuse intermediate results. We propose \textbf{Reasmory}, a framework that formulates spatial reasoning as structured program execution over reconstructed spatial memory. Reasmory constructs explicit 3D memory, augments it with semantically grounded 3D object instances, and introduces a lightweight Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that constrains how VLMs query objects and cameras, transform viewpoints, and render observations during reasoning. Generated programs are parsed and validated before execution, enabling more reliable interaction with spatial memory than unconstrained tool use. Experiments on multi-view image and video spatial reasoning benchmarks show consistent gains of 6--18\% over strong baselines, including GPT-5-mini and Gemini-3-flash, indicating that explicit 3D memory is most useful when accessed through constrained, validated operations rather than free-form tool calls.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Reasmory的新框架，通过结构化程序执行在重建的空间记忆上进行空间推理，显著提升视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在需要精准空间理解任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs虽然在空间推理（如视角、方向、距离等）方面展现了潜力，但在实际精确任务中表现不可靠。多视角图像和单目视频中的空间线索分散且稀疏，难以有效整合。此外，直接使用重建模型为VLM提供自由形式工具较脆弱，易导致错误操作。
AI.method: 提出Reasmory框架，通过构建显式3D空间记忆（如点云），并增强带有语义信息的3D物体实例，同时引入轻量级领域专用语言（DSL），对VLMs查询、视角变换等操作加以约束。在推理过程中，自动解析和验证生成的程序，以确保操作正确。
AI.result: 在多视角图像和视频空间推理基准上，Reasmory相比于强基线（如GPT-5-mini和Gemini-3-flash）有6-18%的提升，显示结构化受约束访问比自由工具调用更有效。
AI.conclusion: 结构化程序执行和显式3D空间记忆结合的方式，可以显著提升VLMs在复杂空间推理任务中的可靠性和表现。

title: Worlds Within Words: Translating Culture in Ancient Chinese Texts with Multi-Agent Coordination
comment: The preprint manuscript is 20 pages long and is currently under review
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based machine translation has advanced cross-cultural communication, yet it still struggles with culture-loaded words (CLWs) in ancient Chinese texts. The challenge extends beyond lexical alignment to deciding when and how culture-dependent knowledge should be explicated for readers lacking relevant background. Literal translation often preserves surface forms while missing underlying concepts, whereas over-explicitation harms conciseness and readability. To address this problem, we formulate CLW translation as a selective explicitation task and propose \textbf{MACAT}, a \textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{A}gent \textbf{C}ulture-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{T}ranslation framework that dynamically identifies culturally salient phrases and injects concise explanatory knowledge when necessary. MACAT further incorporates a quality-aware reranking module for candidate selection and a multi-round evaluation agent that assesses translations across terminological precision, readability, fidelity, cultural preservation, and cultural explicitation. Experiments on traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) classics and the \textit{Analects} show that, under a unified GPT-5.4 evaluation setting, MACAT consistently outperforms both the backbone model and general-purpose MT baselines on 100 TCM documents and a 20-chapter subset of the \textit{Analects}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多智能体的文化感知翻译框架（MACAT），改善大模型对古文中文化负载词的翻译表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在机器翻译、跨文化交流方面表现优异，但对古文中具有文化背景的词语（文化负载词CLWs）处理不足。主要难题在于不仅要词汇对齐，还需判断何时、如何为无相关文化背景的读者补充文化知识，仅直译会遗漏深层内涵，过度说明又影响简洁和可读性。
AI.method: 将CLWs翻译问题建模为有选择的外显任务，提出MACAT框架。该方法由多智能体组成，能动态识别文化关键短语，必要时注入简明解释性知识，并引入基于翻译质量的候选重排序模块和多轮多维评估（术语准确性、可读性、忠实性、文化保留与阐释）。
AI.result: 在中医典籍与《论语》部分章节实验表明，在GPT-5.4评测下，MACAT在多个维度显著超越基础大模型和通用机器翻译基线模型，数据涵盖100篇中医文献和20章《论语》。
AI.conclusion: MACAT有效提升了大模型对古文文化负载词的翻译效果，兼顾准确性、可读性和文化信息传递，为跨文化古文翻译提供了新范式。

title: Flexible Control of 3D CT Generation via Text and Semantically-Defined Segmentation Prompts
summary: Generative models for volumetric medical images have found many applications in medical imaging, ranging from data augmentation to serving as priors for inverse problems. For these applications, generating high-resolution 3D images with strong controllability is essential but remains highly challenging. Existing approaches typically control generation either through radiology reports used as text prompts or through full image segmentation.
