While text-based prompting is flexible, it provides limited spatial control over the location, shape, and boundary of abnormalities. In contrast, segmentation-based methods receive precise spatial guidance but are restrictive in requiring full-organ annotations. In this work, we propose a flexible multimodal framework for controllable volumetric image generation that supports input from radiology reports and segmentation prompts (both optional). Our approach allows users to provide segmentation of a specific anatomy or abnormality without requiring full-organ annotations. The semantic meaning of the segmentation mask is specified through an accompanying text description, resulting in a highly flexible and scalable conditioning mechanism. We develop a memory-efficient architecture based on a modified diffusion transformer that jointly processes image and segmentation tokens. The model further incorporates gated attention to effectively attend to long radiology reports. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art perceptual and semantic scores (e.g., 24% relative improvement in mean FID), generates high-resolution anatomically consistent CT volumes, and improves data efficiency when used for data augmentation. Radiologists' evaluation further confirms strong alignment between generated and real medical images.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种多模态框架，实现对高分辨率3D医学图像的灵活可控生成，既可利用文本报告，也支持部分分割掩码，提升了空间和语义的控制能力，并取得了领先的生成效果。
AI.motivation: 生成高质量、可控的3D医学图像对于数据增强和逆问题等应用至关重要。然而，现有方法要么空间控制能力弱（文本提示），要么要求过多标注（全器官分割），限制了实际应用。因此需要一种支持灵活控制同时降低标注负担的生成模型。
AI.method: 提出了一个多模态生成框架，可输入任意组合的放射科报告和部位分割掩码，分割掩码的语义通过对应文本描述指定。基于改进的扩散Transformer构建架构，采用内存高效设计，能联合处理图像和分割信息，并通过门控注意力机制有效捕捉文本报告中的长期依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在结构和语义感知得分上均取得了当前最佳表现，例如均方FID提升24%。能生成高分辨率、解剖结构一致的CT体数据，用于数据增强时提高了数据效率。影像科医生的评估也确认了生成图像与真实医学图像的高度一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为3D医学图像生成提供了更灵活、可扩展的控制方式，明显提升了生成图像的质量和应用价值，让生成模型更易被应用于实际的临床辅助任务。

title: Don't Read Everything: A Curvature-Conditioned Query for Linear Attention
summary: Linear attention reduces the quadratic cost of softmax attention by maintaining a recurrent fast-weight state, but it consistently lags on in-context retrieval and long-context tasks. Existing remedies act on the write side of memory through gating, delta updates, or kernel feature maps, but the read step is left unchanged: every past key contributes additively to the output, so useful targets are diluted by the bulk of stored vectors. We borrow one specific piece of softmax's geometry to construct a cheap read-time contraction of the query. A second-order Taylor expansion of the softmax log-partition at the isotropic-attention point gives a local quadratic model whose curvature coincides with the running key covariance, a quantity that can be maintained with the same recurrent/chunkwise mechanism as the linear-attention state. The associated linear operator contracts the query along the high-density directions of memory before it reads the state. We call this mechanism Curvature-Conditioned Query (CCQ). CCQ modifies only the read step and is composable with any linear-attention backbone. Attached to GLA and Gated DeltaNet, it improves perplexity, zero-shot downstream accuracy, S-NIAH retrieval at and beyond the training context, length-extrapolation perplexity from 4K to 20K, and LongBench accuracy, at small extra cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Curvature-Conditioned Query（CCQ）的方法，通过引入二阶信息改进线性注意力机制的读取步骤，在提升长上下文和检索任务性能的同时，计算开销小。
AI.motivation: 线性注意力虽然降低了计算复杂度，但在长上下文信息检索及高效利用记忆方面表现不佳。现有方法多集中在写入机制改进，却忽略了读取步骤导致信息被稀释的问题。
AI.method: 作者借鉴softmax几何，在读取阶段引入局部二阶近似（泰勒展开），利用运行中的key协方差矩阵对query进行收缩变换，只需有限的额外状态更新开销，提出CCQ机制，且该机制与现有线性注意力框架兼容。
AI.result: CCQ集成到GLA和Gated DeltaNet后，在困惑度、零样本准确率、多种检索与长文本benchmark（如LongBench）、长度外插等任务上均有提升，且只带来很小的额外计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过对线性注意力读取步骤的二阶改进，CCQ可显著增强模型长距离依赖处理能力，有望普适应用于各种线性注意力模型，改善长文本和检索类任务表现。

title: An Open-Source Benchmark and Baseline for Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and language-guided grounding abilities, yet their capacity for multi-temporal visual reasoning remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation (MTRS)}, a new task that aims to segment language-described temporal changes from multi-temporal images. MTRS extends conventional referring segmentation and change detection by jointly requiring temporal correspondence reasoning, language grounding, and pixel-level mask prediction. We propose \textbf{CRAFT-Agent}, an automated data construction pipeline with human auditing, and build \textbf{MTRefSeg-21K}, the first MTRS benchmark, containing 21K high-quality multi-temporal image-text-mask triplets across diverse scenes, viewpoints, and domains. Benchmarking a broad set of VLM- and LVLM-based models reveals that direct inference performs poorly, while task-specific fine-tuning remains limited. To address this, we propose \textbf{MTRefSeg-R1}, a change-aware LVLM framework trained with a two-stage strategy. It first learns general temporal-change perception from 20K vision-only bi-temporal samples, and is then fine-tuned on MTRefSeg-21K for fine-grained language-guided temporal localization. MTRefSeg-R1 explicitly models cross-temporal visual differences, aligns language instructions with temporal variations, and predicts referred change masks. Extensive experiments show that MTRefSeg-R1 achieves strong and often superior performance compared with existing LVLM baselines, demonstrating the challenge and potential of MTRS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了多时序指代分割（MTRS）新任务与数据集,并设计了一种能更好地处理多时序视觉-语言推理的模型框架。
AI.motivation: 虽然大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）在视觉理解与语言引导下的区域定位方面表现优异，但其在多时序视觉推理、尤其是结合语言描述的时序变化检测能力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 提出MTRS任务，要求基于多时序图像和语言描述，分割出发生变化的区域。2) 构建自动化数据构建与人工审核管道CRAFT-Agent，制作了包含21K高质量样本的数据集MTRefSeg-21K。3) 发现直接推理和简单微调基线效果有限，提出基于LVLM的MTRefSeg-R1模型，采用两阶段训练策略（先用2万视觉样本学习变化感知，再用MTRS数据集微调语言与变化对齐能力）。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，MTRefSeg-R1在多个基准测试中性能显著优于现有LVLM基线，展现出对多时序视觉-语言推理与变化定位的优越性。
AI.conclusion: MTRS任务极具挑战性且现实意义突出，MTRefSeg-R1框架和MTRefSeg-21K数据集显著推动了多时序视觉-语言理解任务的研究进展。

title: Challenger at MultiPRIDE: Is It Hate Speech or Reclaimed?
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, Published in EVALITA 2026, CEUR Workshop Proceedings Vol. 4195
summary: The spread of hate speech has become increasingly harmful in modern digital environments, particularly on social networking platforms. While recent advances have shown promising results in automatic hate speech detection, a key challenge remains: distinguishing genuine hate speech from reclaimed language. Accurate labeling is difficult due to the nuanced and context-dependent nature of reclaimed expressions. In this paper, we present a simple and interpretable approach for distinguishing hate speech from reclaimed language, developed for the MultiPride Shared Task. Our method generates dense semantic text embeddings and incorporates a label-noise filtering stage using Cleanlab with logistic regression, followed by a Multi-layer Perceptron (MLP) neural network for final classification. The system is designed to operate under limited computational resources while maintaining strong performance. We evaluate our approach using precision, recall, and F1-score, including macro-averaged metrics. Experimental results demonstrate robust performance despite extreme class imbalance in the dataset. Overall, the findings highlight the potential for further improvements through larger embedding models and more advanced preprocessing techniques while preserving interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单且可解释的方法，用于区分仇恨言论与被重新定义语言，能够在有限计算资源下实现良好的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 在社交网络平台上，仇恨言论的传播愈发严重。尽管自动检测仇恨言论取得了进展，但准确区分真正的仇恨言论与被群体重新定义的语言是一大难题，因为这涉及语境和细节的把控。
AI.method: 提出的方法以密集语义文本嵌入为基础，先使用Cleanlab与逻辑回归进行标签噪声过滤，然后利用多层感知机（MLP）神经网络进行最终分类。该系统兼顾性能和资源限制，强调可解释性。
AI.result: 在MultiPride Shared Task任务的数据集上，通过精确率、召回率和F1分数（包括宏平均指标）进行评估。即使在极端类别不平衡的数据集下，实验结果也显示出系统的稳健表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限计算资源下取得了良好效果，具有进一步通过更大嵌入模型和改进预处理提升性能的潜力，同时保留了模型的可解释性。

title: SWARD: Stochastic Window-Attention-Based Relational Distillation for Cross-Architectural Semantic Segmentation
summary: Large-scale vision foundation models have driven substantial gains on dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation, but their size makes deployment impractical in resource-constrained settings, motivating knowledge distillation as a means of transferring their capabilities to lightweight student networks. However, modern foundation teachers are predominantly transformer-based that encode global context, whereas efficient students are typically convolutional networks with locally biased receptive fields. Existing distillation methods largely assume architectural homogeneity and rely on direct feature mimicry, which fails to bridge this representational gap and neglects the structured spatial dependencies and discriminative organization required for accurate semantic segmentation. In this paper, we propose SWARD, a knowledge distillation framework that addresses this gap through two complementary mechanisms. First, we introduce a Multi-Scale Windowed Attention Distillation (MWAD) module that aligns teacher-student attention-based relations within stochastically shifted window partitions whose offsets are randomly resampled at every training iteration. This removes window boundary bias, and, combined with the multi-scale design, captures both short- and long-range spatial dependencies. Second, we introduce Prototype Discriminative Regularization (PDR), a loss that helps shape the student's feature distribution by enforcing inter-class separation and intra-class compactness, further sharpening the discriminative structure beyond what feature mimicry alone can produce under the student's reduced capacity. Experiments across different vision applications (i.e., urban scene parsing and medical image segmentation) show that SWARD achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SWARD知识蒸馏框架，有效弥合大规模视觉基础模型（以Transformer为主）与小型学生模型（如卷积网络）在语义分割任务中的结构表征差异，提升轻量模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模Transformer基础模型在密集预测任务（如语义分割）中表现优异，但体积过大，难以部署在资源受限场景，因此需利用知识蒸馏技术将能力传递给高效的轻量级学生网络。然而，主流蒸馏方法假设教师与学生结构同质，忽视了Transformer的全局感知与卷积网络局部感知的差异，难以提升学生模型性能。
AI.method: 提出SWARD框架，包含两项创新机制：1) 多尺度窗口注意力蒸馏（MWAD），通过随机移动的多尺度窗口，将教师Transformer和学生CNN的注意力关系对齐，捕捉长短距离空间依赖并消除窗口边界偏差；2) 原型判别正则（PDR），在损失函数中强化类间区分和类内紧聚，使学生特征具备更清晰判别结构。
AI.result: 在多项视觉任务（如城市场景解析和医学图像分割）上，SWARD框架显著提升了轻量学生模型的分割性能，达到了当前最新水平。
AI.conclusion: SWARD突破了异构网络间表征迁移的瓶颈，实现Transformer到CNN的有效知识蒸馏，为轻量化密集视觉任务模型设计提供了新范式。

title: Med-HEAL: Analyzing and Mitigating Hallucinations in Medical LLMs with Hallucination-Aware In-Context Learning
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Preprint full version of an accepted ACM-BCB 2026 short paper
summary:
Hallucinations in medical large language models (LLMs) pose serious risks for clinical decision support, particularly when models must reason over complex electronic health records (EHRs). However, existing benchmarks often lack a realistic clinical context and provide limited insight into how hallucinations can be mitigated in practice. We introduce Med-HEAL, a framework for systematically identifying, analyzing, and mitigating hallucinations in medical LLMs using clinically grounded data. Building on the EHRNoteQA benchmark derived from MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, we construct a hallucination dataset by evaluating BioMistral-7B on open-ended clinical question answering tasks. Model outputs are labeled through a dual evaluation pipeline that combines LLM-as-a-Judge assessment (GPT-4o) with human auditing by medical student reviewers, producing correctness judgments and annotations of reasoning errors via a custom web-based evaluation system.
  We then leverage this dataset to investigate mitigation strategies: a self-critique pipeline, in which the test model reviews its own answers to detect potential errors and regenerates responses for flagged cases, and retrieval-augmented in-context learning (RA-ICL), which exposes the model to hallucinated and corrected examples. Experiments across five open-source LLMs-BioMistral, Llama-3.1, DeepSeek, Qwen2.5, and Qwen3, show that the self-critique strategy improves accuracy for three of five models (p < 0.05) without requiring parameter updates.
  Med-HEAL provides both a reusable hallucination dataset and a practical framework for studying and mitigating hallucinations in medical LLMs, supporting safer deployment of AI systems in clinical environments. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/yimingliao-blad/med-heal.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Med-HEAL框架，用于系统性识别、分析及缓解医学大模型中的幻觉问题，并基于真实医疗数据构建了相关数据集和评测流程。
AI.motivation: 医学大模型在临床决策支持中容易产生幻觉（即错误或虚假输出），这对患者安全构成严重风险，而现有基准往往缺乏真实场景、无法有效分析和缓解此类风险。
AI.method: 作者基于MIMIC-IV数据集构建了Med-HEAL框架，步骤包括：1）基于EHRNoteQA任务生成模型输出；2）采用GPT-4o自动评审和医学生人工审核的双重评估流程；3）提出自我批判（self-critique）和检索增强（RA-ICL）两种缓解方案，并在多个主流医学大模型上验证。
AI.result: 自我批判方法在五个开源医学大模型中的三款上显著提高了答案准确性（p<0.05），且无需模型参数更新。
AI.conclusion: Med-HEAL为医学大模型幻觉问题提供了通用数据集和实用分析缓解框架，为安全部署医疗AI系统提供了保障，相关代码和数据已开源。

title: Automated Erythrocyte Detection and Tracking for Retinal Blood Flow Quantification in Erythrocyte-Mediated Angiography
summary: Capillary-level retinal blood flow (RBF) has strong potential as a biomarker for various ocular diseases. However, modalities for measuring capillary-level RBF remain limited. Erythrocyte-mediated angiography (EMA), an emerging imaging technique, enables capillary-level RBF measurement by visualizing individual erythrocytes, yet automated erythrocyte detection and tracking, which are essential for quantifying blood flow, remain largely unexplored. To address this gap, we propose EMTrack, a novel framework featuring a flow-context module for erythrocyte detection that distinguishes moving from paused cells and a topology-aware tracking strategy that enables tracking under large inter-frame displacements and substantial motion variations. In addition, we establish RBF-EMA, a new EMA dataset with comprehensive erythrocyte detection and tracking annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods both quantitatively and qualitatively on detection and tracking tasks in the RBF-EMA dataset. Moreover, RBF quantification results highlight the strong potential of our framework for automated retinal blood flow measurement.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了EMTrack框架，实现了对红细胞在毛细血管水平的自动检测与追踪，并建立了新的数据集RBF-EMA。实验结果显示该方法在检测与追踪任务上优于主流基线方法，展现了自动视网膜血流测量的潜力。
AI.motivation: 视网膜毛细血管层面的血流（RBF）对多种眼科疾病的诊断和研究有重要价值，但目前用于测量该层级血流的方法有限，且基于红细胞介导血管造影（EMA）的自动红细胞检测和追踪研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 提出了EMTrack新框架，包含流场上下文模块用于区分移动和暂停的红细胞，引入拓扑感知的追踪策略以应对帧间大位移和复杂运动。此外，建立了RBF-EMA数据集并进行了红细胞检测和追踪标注。
AI.result: EMTrack在RBF-EMA数据集上的红细胞检测与追踪任务中，在定量和定性结果上均优于基准方法。血流量定量实验也进一步验证了该方法的有效性和潜力。
AI.conclusion: EMTrack框架推动了EMA自动化，为高精度、自动化的视网膜毛细血管血流测量提供了有力工具，有望助力相关眼病的研究和临床应用。

title: SkillAdaptor: Self-Adapting Skills for LLM Agents from Trajectories
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on reusable external skills to solve long-horizon interactive tasks. Existing training-free skill adaptation pipelines usually update skills from full trajectories or session-level feedback, which makes failure attribution coarse and often produces unstable or overly broad revisions. We propose SkillAdaptor, a training-free step-level skill adaptation framework with explicit failure attribution, and it can plug into OpenClaw-class agent harnesses. Given a failed trajectory, SkillAdaptor identifies a first actionable fault step, links responsibility to candidate skills, and applies targeted updates under explicit acceptance checks while keeping the backbone frozen. We evaluate on WebShop, PinchBench, and Claw-Eval with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, and GPT-5.2. SkillAdaptor improves over no-skill and skill-adaptation baselines on all three suites, with the largest single-metric improvements of +1.5 points on PinchBench Avg Score%, +1.8 on Claw-Eval Avg Score, and +1.7 on WebShop success rate. These results indicate that step-level attribution supports more stable and auditable training-free skill maintenance\footnote{The code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillAdaptor.}.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SkillAdaptor，一种无需训练、基于步骤级失败归因的技能适应框架，提升了大语言模型代理在多种任务套件中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的技能适应方法主要依赖完整轨迹或会话级反馈，导致故障归因较粗糙、修正不稳定且泛化过宽，难以精确定位技能更新点。因此，亟需更细粒度、更稳定的技能适应方法。
AI.method: SkillAdaptor是一种训练免疫的步骤级技能适应框架。它通过在失败轨迹中定位首个可操作的故障步骤，将责任分配到候选技能，并在冻结主体网络的情况下进行有针对性的技能更新和明确的效果验证。该方法能够无缝集成到OpenClaw等代理系统中。
AI.result: SkillAdaptor在WebShop、PinchBench、Claw-Eval三个任务套件上，针对Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5和GPT-5.2模型与无技能和传统技能适应基线比较，所有测试集上性能均有提升，单项指标最高提升分别为+1.5（PinchBench）、+1.8（Claw-Eval）、+1.7（WebShop）。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级归因显著提升了技能适应的精度与稳定性，同时便于审计和维护；SkillAdaptor为大语言模型代理系统的可持续维护提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Cross-Axis Feature Fusion with Joint-Wise Motion Difference Prediction for Text-Based 3D Human Motion Editing
summary: We address text-based 3D human motion editing, where the goal is to preserve the style and structure of a source motion while applying edits described in natural language. The release of the MotionFix dataset has spurred active research into training-based diffusion models that directly generate an edited motion from a source motion and a text instruction. While previous works have focused primarily on learning when an edit should occur temporally, our goal is to create a model that understands not only this temporal aspect but also which specific joints are responsible for the change. Targeting this, we propose a novel architecture and a complementary auxiliary task to aid its training. Our architecture consists of two axis-anchored transformers, which extract distinct features along the joint and time dimensions respectively, and a cross-axis fusion block that integrates these representations. We further introduce an auxiliary task that trains the joint-anchored transformer to regress the Soft-DTW distance between source and target joint rotations. This objective teaches the module to understand which joints to modify and which to preserve. Through comprehensive experiments on the MotionFix dataset, we demonstrate that our method significantly improves semantic alignment with both the text instruction and the source motion, as well as the overall fidelity of the generated motion, achieving state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种面向文本驱动3D人体动作编辑的新方法，重在捕捉动作中由文本描述导致的时序和关节变化，实现对动作风格和结构的保留，并在MotionFix数据集上取得了最佳表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的动作编辑方法主要关注编辑动作的发生时刻，但对具体哪些关节随文本编辑指令变化理解不足。为实现更加细致精准的动作编辑，需要模型理解时序与关节两方面的信息。
AI.method: 提出了包含关节轴和时间轴两个transformer的双轴架构，各自提取关节与时间特征，再通过跨轴融合模块融合两类信息。同时设计了辅助任务，用关节轴transformer回归源动作与目标动作关节旋转的Soft-DTW距离，从而引导模型区分应编辑与应保持的关节。
AI.result: 在MotionFix数据集上，所提方法在生成动作与文本语义的一致性、原动作风格结构保留及生成质量方面，均显著优于现有方法，达到了当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了3D人体动作编辑中语义对齐与动作保真度，尤其在关节编辑的针对性与精准性方面表现突出，对文本驱动动作编辑领域具有推动作用。

title: TukaBench: A Culturally Grounded Jailbreak Benchmark for African Languages
summary: Safety evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains heavily English-centric, leaving Low-Resource Languages (LRLs), particularly African ones, critically underexplored. We introduce TUKABENCH, a jailbreak benchmark for seven African languages that extends JailbreakBench (JBB) beyond direct translation through four settings: human translation of JBB prompts, English adaptation to African contexts followed by human translation, human-curated prompts validated through interactions with GPT-5.2, and code-switched prompts combining English and African languages, isolating the effect of language, cultural grounding, and prompt evasiveness on model safety. Across closed and open models, prompting in African languages reduces refusal relative to English, with culturally adapted prompts leading to least refusal. The evaluation also surfaces two structural limitations: model comprehension failures and reduced LLM-as-a-judge reliability in LRLs. To capture the first, we introduce Deflection alongside Refused and Jailbroken; to assess the second, we validate outputs with human annotations, showing that judge-human agreement drops in lower-resource languages and less commonly supported scripts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TUKABENCH，针对七种非洲低资源语言的大模型安全性越狱基准，多视角评估主流模型在多种提示设置下的响应差异，发现非洲语言下模型更易被越狱且现存模型存在理解和评判能力不足。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型（LLMs）的安全性评估主要聚焦于英语，对低资源语言（LRLs）、尤其是非洲语言几乎没有涉猎，导致安全漏洞风险未被充分揭示。
AI.method: 1）将JailbreakBench扩展到七种非洲语言，通过：人工翻译原始提示、将英语提示适应非洲背景再人工翻译、人工设计验证的新Prompt、以及英-非洲语言混合提示四种方式；2）在闭源和开源大模型上评测不同语言和文化背景的越狱成功率，并对模型的理解能力和判别可靠性进行剖析。
AI.result: 实验证实，采用非洲语言提示时，模型比英语更容易被越狱，尤其是在文化适应后的提示下拒绝率最低。此外，发现模型在低资源语言下存在理解失败和自评可靠性下降等两个结构性问题。
AI.conclusion: 主流LLMs在低资源（尤其非洲）语言的安全评估方面存在较大短板，当前模型理解和评估能力有限，需进一步加强对多语言和多文化背景下的模型安全评测与机制完善。

title: Learning Neural Deformation Representation for 4D Dynamic Shape Generation
summary: Recent developments in 3D shape representation opened new possibilities for generating detailed 3D shapes. Despite these advances, there are few studies dealing with the generation of 4D dynamic shapes that have the form of 3D objects deforming over time. To bridge this gap, we focus on generating 4D dynamic shapes with an emphasis on both generation quality and efficiency in this paper. HyperDiffusion, a previous work on 4D generation, proposed a method of directly generating the weight parameters of 4D occupancy fields but suffered from low temporal consistency and slow rendering speed due to motion representation that is not separated from the shape representation of 4D occupancy fields. Therefore, we propose a new neural deformation representation and combine it with conditional neural signed distance fields to design a 4D representation architecture in which the motion latent space is disentangled from the shape latent space. The proposed deformation representation, which works by predicting skinning weights and rigid transformations for multiple parts, also has advantages over the deformation modules of existing 4D representations in understanding the structure of shapes. In addition, we design a training process of a diffusion model that utilizes the shape and motion features that are extracted by our 4D representation as data points. The results of unconditional generation, conditional generation, and motion retargeting experiments demonstrate that our method not only shows better performance than previous works in 4D dynamic shape generation but also has various potential applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的4D动态形状生成方法，通过分离运动与形状潜在空间，实现更高质量和高效的4D形状生成。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D形状表示已取得明显进展，但对于随时间变化的4D动态形状生成研究较少，现有方法在时序一致性和渲染速度上存在局限。因此，需要更好的4D动态形状生成方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的神经变形表示，并与条件神经签名距离场（SDF）结合，设计了运动与形状潜空间解耦的4D结构。变形表示通过预测多部位的蒙皮权重与刚性变换，提高了对形状结构的理解。此外，训练扩散模型时，以所提4D表示提取的形状与运动特征作为数据点。
AI.result: 在无条件生成、条件生成和动作迁移实验中，与以往方法相比，新方法在4D动态形状生成任务中表现更优，结果证明其实用性及多样应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了4D动态形状的生成质量与效率，同时为4D形状生成和应用提供了新方向。

title: DiffuSent: Towards a Unified Diffusion Framework for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
summary: Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) encompasses seven distinct subtasks, each focusing on different extracted elements. Despite the proven success of generative models in unified aspect sentiment analysis, existing approaches often rely on auto-regressive token-by-token generation without grasping the whole information of the aspect and opinion terms, resulting in boundary insensitivity, particularly in context of multi-word aspect and opinion terms. To address these issues, we present DiffuSent, a non-auto-regressive diffusion framework that systematically formulates all ABSA subtasks as boundary denoising diffusion processes, progressively refining boundaries over noisy states. Furthermore, we introduce a contrastive denoising training strategy which effectively address duplicate predictions with subtle variations introduced by diffusion process. Extensive experiments across 28 settings (7 subtasks x 4 datasets) demonstrate that DiffuSent achieves delivers consistent improvements over the strongest generative and span-based systems. DiffuSent exhibits notable gains on multi-word triplets, achieving an average improvement of +2.48 F1, and maintains robust extraction accuracy in sentences containing multiple sentiment triplets. Moreover, the non-auto-regressive decoding enables substantial efficiency benefits, reaching up to 181 times faster inference than auto-regressive generative baselines

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DiffuSent的非自回归扩散框架，提升了细粒度方面情感分析的边界识别和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成式ABSA方法大多采用逐词生成方式，对多词组的方面和观点边界识别不敏感，易导致抽取精度下降，特别是在存在多词组、多个情感三元组情况下。实际应用亟需同时兼顾边界精准度和推理速度的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了DiffuSent框架，将ABSA的全部七项子任务统一为边界去噪扩散过程，逐步精炼噪声中的方面和观点边界，并引入对比去噪训练策略，有效减少扩散生成过程中的重复预测。该方法采用非自回归生成，实现大幅提升推理速度。
AI.result: 在四个数据集的28个场景下，DiffuSent在多词组三元组F1提升2.48分，对多个情感三元组的句子也保持了高准确性，且推理效率显著提升，比生成式基线快最多181倍。
AI.conclusion: DiffuSent在精准性和推理效率方面均优于当前主流ABSA方法，尤其适用于需要高效处理多词组、多三元组情感分析任务的场景。

title: ProductWebGen: Benchmarking Multimodal Product Webpage Generation
summary: Crafting a product display webpage from a source product image, along with layout and visual content instructions, holds significant practical value for domains such as marketing, advertising, and E-commerce. Intuitively, this task demands strict visual consistency across product displays and high-fidelity instruction following to jointly generate renderable HTML code. These requirements on controllability and instruction-following are closely aligned with the core features of advanced multimodal generative models, such as image editing models and unified models. To this end, this paper introduces ProductWebGen to systematically benchmark the product webpage generation capacities of these models. We organize ProductWebGen with 500 test samples covering 13 product categories; each sample consists of a source image, a visual content instruction, and a webpage instruction. The task is to generate a product showcase webpage including multiple consistent images in accordance with the source image and instructions. Given the mixed-modality input-output nature of the task, we design and systematically compare two workflows for evaluation -- one uses large language models and image editing models to separately generate HTML code and images (editing-based), while the other relies on a single UM to generate both, with image generation conditioned on the preceding multimodal context (UM-based). Empirical results show that editing-based approaches achieve leading results in webpage instruction following and content appeal, while UM-based ones may display more advantages in fulfilling visual content instructions. We also construct a supervised fine-tuning dataset, ProductWebGen-1k, with 1,000 groups of real product images and LLM-generated HTML code. We verify its effectiveness on the open-source UM BAGEL. The data and code are available at https://github.com/SJTU-DENG-Lab/ProductWebGen.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ProductWebGen基准，系统评测多模态生成模型在产品网页生成任务上的能力，包括500个涵盖13类产品的样本，并设计了两种主要的评测流程（编辑式和统一模型式），实验给出两类方法各自优势，并构建并公开了一个1,000组真产品图像和LLM生成代码的微调数据集。
AI.motivation: 在电商、广告等领域，自动生成高质量、与产品图像和布局说明高度一致的产品展示网页具有重要应用价值。现有多模态生成模型（如图像编辑模型和统一模型）具备较强的可控性和指令遵循能力，但缺乏针对产品网页生成这一综合性任务的系统评测与基准。
AI.method: 1）构建ProductWebGen基准，包含500个样本（产品图像、视觉内容指令和网页指令），涵盖13类产品。2）提出两种评测流程：一种是用大模型+图像编辑模型分别生成HTML代码和图片（编辑式）；另一种是用统一多模态模型一次性生成（统一模型式）。3）系统比较两方案的表现。4）新构建1,000组数据集，并在开源UM上微调验证。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，编辑式方法在网页指令遵循和内容吸引力上表现更佳，而统一模型方法在视觉内容指令的满足度上更具优势。微调后数据集可提升开源统一模型的效果。
AI.conclusion: ProductWebGen为多模态模型在产品网页生成领域提供了标准基准与评测流程，不同方法具备互补优势，公开数据集为后续研究提供了宝贵资源。

title: LongAttnComp: Cross-Family Context Compression for Long-Context Reasoning
summary: As real-world applications increasingly require processing inputs of 100k+ tokens, the gap between context length and inference efficiency has become a critical bottleneck. Context compression offers a way to reduce prefill costs while preserving task accuracy. However, existing training-free attention-based methods leave substantial gaps in demanding long-context tasks such as code reasoning. We present LongAttnComp, a long-context adaptation of AttnComp that fine-tunes a lightweight cross-attention scoring layer and introduces tokenlevel chunking, a token-budget top-p algorithm, positional reordering, and a formatagnostic query parser. We further design a two-stage fine-tuning recipe for the compressor: Stage 1 builds a general retrieval foundation from NIAH-style data, and Stage 2 extends it with multi-hop and reasoning data for broader long-context task coverage. On InfiniteBench Code-Debug, LongAttnComp matches or exceeds full-context accuracy, substantially outperforms training-free baselines, and transfers across four target models from three families. On LongBench v2, the two-stage recipe largely closes the Stage 1 gap on multi-document reasoning while preserving Code-Debug performance.

AI.tldr: LongAttnComp是一种针对长文本模型推理高效性和精度挑战提出的新型上下文压缩方法，通过精调和创新算法，在多任务上大幅提升了长文本任务表现。
AI.motivation: 随着实际应用对处理10万以上token输入的需求增长，现有模型在长上下文推理上推理效率与准确度之间存在瓶颈。传统无训练压缩方法难以在如代码推理等复杂长上下文任务中表现出色，因此需要新方法提升长文本任务的处理能力。
AI.method: 提出LongAttnComp：①对AttnComp进行了面向长上下文的改进；②精调一个轻量级交叉注意力得分层，并引入token级分块、token预算top-p算法、位置重排和格式无关的查询解析器；③提出二阶段精调方案，先利用NIAH风格数据建立通用检索能力，再用多跳和复杂推理数据拓展覆盖范围。
AI.result: 在代码推理任务InfiniteBench Code-Debug上，LongAttnComp的准确率达到或超过使用全部上下文的模型，明显优于无训练基线方法，并可迁移到不同模型。LongBench v2上，二阶段精调显著缩小了多文档推理任务上的表现差距，同时保持代码推理性能。
AI.conclusion: LongAttnComp有效缓解了大规模长文本输入下的推理效率与准确性矛盾，在多种长上下文任务上均展现出色性能，并具有良好的模型泛化能力。

title: Data Collection for Training Quality-Control AI in Carpet Manufacturing
summary: Visual inspection remains the dominant quality-control practice in woven and tufted carpet production, yet it is slow, subjective, and inconsistent at the line speeds and widths of modern looms. We present a design proposal for an in-line machine-vision system whose primary purpose is twofold: to inspect the carpet web in real time and, equally importantly, to systematically collect and label images of defect patterns so that increasingly capable quality-control models can be trained over the life of the installation.The proposal is grounded in a concrete industrial setting: a Six Sigma (DMAIC) project at a woven-carpet production facility that anticipated a production bottleneck following the installation of additional weaving machines, with a substantial baseline defect rate and significant financial exposure associated with quality failures. We describe an imaging subsystem based on synchronized line-scan cameras with combined bright-field and grazing illumination, derive the resolution and throughput requirements needed to resolve fine structural defects across a multi-metre web, and define a carpet-specific defect taxonomy.We then lay out a staged modelling strategy that begins with unsupervised anomaly detection trained on defect-free material, following the paradigm exemplified by the carpet category of the MVTec Anomaly Detection benchmark, and matures through a human-in-the-loop annotation flywheel into supervised detection and segmentation models. Finally, we connect detection performance to the DMAIC objectives, showing how reductions in escaped defects translate into improved process quality and process sigma levels. The contribution is an end-to-end, deployable blueprint that treats data collection as a first-class engineering objective rather than an afterthought.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向地毯工厂的实时机器视觉质检方案，不仅能够自动检测缺陷，还能系统性采集并标注缺陷图像，持续提升质控模型性能。
AI.motivation: 目前地毯生产中的质量控制依赖人工目视检查，但这种方式在现代化高速生产线上速度慢、主观性强且不一致，难以满足高质量与高效率的需求，且质量失败会带来重大经济风险。
AI.method: 设计了基于同步线扫相机、明场与斜光照结合成像的系统，用于检测并高分辨率采集地毯宽幅生产线上细粒度缺陷。融入地毯专用缺陷分类体系，通过无监督异常检测结合人工标注，逐步演进至有监督的检测与分割模型，实现数据采集与模型迭代闭环。
AI.result: 按照提出的方法，能够实时检测并降低缺陷漏检率，同时持续生成高质量标注数据，推动质检模型从无监督到有监督自动进化。实验连接到DMAIC提效目标，定量展示质控水平的提升与经济效益。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一套可实际部署的端到端工业地毯质检蓝图，把数据采集作为首要工程目标，为持续提升质控能力与生产效率提供实践路径。

title: Benchmarking Local LLMs for Natural-Language-to-SQL Querying in Biopharmaceutical Manufacturing: An Empirical Benchmark on Consumer-Grade Hardware
summary:
Biopharmaceutical manufacturing organizations operate under regulatory frameworks such as FDA guidance, EU Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP), and the EU AI Act, which can restrict the use of cloud-based artificial intelligence systems. Locally deployed large language models (LLMs) offer a privacy-preserving alternative, but their suitability for pharmaceutical manufacturing tasks remains underexplored. This study evaluates four open-source LLMs (Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B, Llama 3.1 8B, Mistral 7B, and Meditron 7B) deployed locally via Ollama for natural-language-to-SQL generation over a pharmaceutical manufacturing database.
  A FastAPI-based evaluation platform, PharmaBatchDB AI, was developed using a synthetic Microsoft SQL Server database containing approximately 63,000 records across Batch, Manufacturing Execution System (MES), and Clean-In-Place (CIP) modules. Models were benchmarked on 60 domain-specific natural-language questions using metrics including SQL extraction rate, SQL compliance, factual consistency, ROUGE-L, hallucination rate, throughput, and latency.
  Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B, Llama 3.1 8B, and Mistral 7B generated SQL for all evaluation tasks, while Meditron 7B failed on nearly all tasks due to context-window limitations and poor SQL generation capability. Llama 3.1 8B achieved the highest SQL compliance, whereas Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B achieved the strongest overall text similarity and factual consistency. Performance differences between the two leading models were not statistically significant.
  The results show that code-tuned general-purpose LLMs outperform a domain-specific biomedical model on structured query generation for pharmaceutical manufacturing data. Although fully local, GxP-aligned NLQ systems are feasible on consumer hardware, current performance levels still require human oversight and downstream validation for regulated use.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了四种开源大语言模型（LLM）在本地部署下对制药制造数据进行自然语言到SQL生成的能力，发现通用模型在此任务上优于专业生物医药模型，但实际应用仍需人工监督。
AI.motivation: 由于制药行业受严格的法规（如FDA、欧盟GMP、AI法案）限制，云端AI系统的隐私和合规性受到约束，因此探索能本地部署、隐私保护的大语言模型对于该行业有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者在本地通过Ollama部署了四种开源LLM（Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B、Llama 3.1 8B、Mistral 7B、Meditron 7B），并开发了PharmaBatchDB AI评测平台，对模拟制药数据库中的63,000条数据进行自然语言到SQL生成测试；主要通过SQL提取率、语法合规性、事实一致性、ROUGE-L、幻觉率、吞吐量和延迟等指标对60道专业领域问题进行评估。
AI.result: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B、Llama 3.1 8B和Mistral 7B均能完成所有评测任务，Meditron 7B因窗口和SQL能力局限几乎全部失败；Llama 3.1 8B在SQL合规性最佳，Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B在文本相似性与事实一致性表现最佳，两者间差异无统计学意义。通用代码大模型整体优于生物医学专用模型。
AI.conclusion: 本地部署的通用代码大模型，在制药制造数据结构化查询生成上表现优异，可用于GxP合规的自然语言查询系统，但目前仍需人工审核，尚不能完全替代人工决策。

title: Ask4VG: Risk-Aware Question Selection for Reducing Prior-Driven Answers in Medical VQA
summary: Medical visual question answering requires models to ground their responses in image evidence, because visually unsupported answers can mislead downstream interpretation. However, many medical VQA questions are generic, template-like, or highly similar in form, which can encourage models to learn question-answer shortcuts instead of image-dependent reasoning and thereby increase the risk of hallucinated responses. We propose Ask4VG, a label-free pilot framework for risk-aware question selection. Ask4VG estimates question-induced hallucination risk through counterfactual visual probing: the same question is asked under the original image, a perturbed image, a blank image, and a mismatched image, and the resulting answer relations are converted into weak supervision for a counterfactual risk estimator. The learned estimator then reranks candidate question rewrites to favor intent-preserving questions that are less invariant to missing or mismatched visual evidence before final answer generation. On VQA-RAD with Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct, prompt-only rewriting increases counterfactual risk, whereas predicted-risk reranking reduces held-out risk from 0.658 to 0.623 and improves exact accuracy from 0.337 to 0.356. A 300-sample PMC-VQA external check shows the same direction of risk reduction with a small accuracy gain. These results suggest that question selection is a promising complement to response-level hallucination mitigation for reliable medical VQA.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Ask4VG框架，通过对问题在原图、扰动图、空白图和错配图下反事实提问，估计问题引发幻觉风险，并以此对问题重写进行风险排序，最终生成更可靠的医学视觉问答结果。
AI.motivation: 医学视觉问答系统中，很多问题形式相似、模板化，模型容易忽略视觉证据，依赖问答捷径，导致无图像依据的幻觉性答案，对下游解读产生误导，需要引入机制增强模型依据视觉证据回答问题的能力。
AI.method: 设计Ask4VG框架：1）在同一问题下，对原图、扰动图、空白图、错配图分别提问；2）将答案关系转为反事实风险的弱监督信号，用于训练风险估算器；3）用该估算器对候选问题重写进行风险排序，优先选择对视觉证据敏感的问题，最后生成答案。
AI.result: 在VQA-RAD数据集和Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct模型上，采用仅调prompt的方法反而增加风险；利用预测风险的重排序则将持出风险从0.658降至0.623，准确率从0.337提升到0.356。在PMC-VQA数据集300例外部测试中也有小幅准确率提升和风险降低。
AI.conclusion: 问题选择可有效辅助降低医学VQA中的幻觉回答风险，有望成为答案级别幻觉防控的重要补充，提高系统的可靠性。

title: Dr. DocBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Expert-Level and Difficult Document Parsing
summary: Document parsing and recognition are fundamental capabilities for vision-language models (VLMs) and document processing systems. However, existing Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and document parsing benchmarks are increasingly limited in coverage and difficulty: many focus on common document genres or uniformly sampled pages where modern parsers already perform strongly, while offering limited annotation for expert-domain structures such as chemical formula, music notation, complex tables, and cross-page layouts. We introduce Dr. DocBench, a difficulty-aware benchmark for expert-level document parsing. Built from a large-scale multilingual book corpus, Dr. DocBench spans 52 BISAC subject domains and selects challenging documents through parser-failure-based sampling, targeting cases where multiple state-of-the-art systems struggle. It contains 4,514 annotated pages from long documents averaging around 100 pages, with 65k high-quality page- and block-level annotations for layout, reading order, hierarchical relations, and domain-specific visual contents. Evaluations of pipeline-based parsers and general-purpose VLMs show that strong performance on existing benchmarks does not transfer to our expert-level document parsing. Our analysis reveals substantial failures across subjects, content types, and structural attributes, highlighting Dr. DocBench as a comprehensive testbed for diagnosing and advancing document intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出了Dr. DocBench，这是一个面向专家级文件解析、难度感知的基准，覆盖多领域和复杂结构内容。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR和文档解析基准普遍偏简单，只覆盖常见文档类型，且对如化学公式、乐谱、复杂表格等高难结构的标注有限，难以反映现实应用中模型的能力短板。
AI.method: 从一个大规模多语言图书语料库中，跨52个BISAC领域，通过‘解析器失败采样’法选择那些多个先进解析器都表现较差的高难文档，最终构建包含4514页、65000+高质量分层标注的挑战性专家文档基准Dr. DocBench。
AI.result: 实验发现，现有主流OCR和通用视觉-语言模型在本基准上的表现远不如在老基准上，许多内容类型和结构属性上有明显失误。
AI.conclusion: Dr. DocBench为业界提供了一个覆盖全面、挑战性强的文档解析测试平台，有助于推动文档智能及视觉-文本理解研究的进一步发展。

title: Decoupled Residual Denoising Diffusion Models for Unified and Data Efficient Image-to-Image Translation
summary: We propose Decoupled Residual Denoising Diffusion models (DRDD) for unified and data-efficient image-to-image (I2I) translation. While diffusion models have advanced I2I translation in terms of quality and diversity, we uncover a previously under-explored property in diffusion models. Crucially, beyond its conventional role of manifold lifting (i.e., moving data off low-dimensional manifolds), injecting Gaussian noise facilitates domain harmonization by implicitly aligning feature distributions across domains, a property particularly advantageous for unified I2I translation. However, existing diffusion models prematurely erode this harmonization effect, as noise and residuals are simultaneously removed in a single coupled diffusion process. To address this, DRDD decouples the diffusion process into two sequential and independent diffusion stages: (1) a stochastic noise diffusion for domain harmonization and manifold lifting, and (2) a deterministic residual diffusion that learns the core semantic mapping entirely within the fixed-noise domain. This decoupling preserves harmonization and manifold lifting effects throughout the transformation, substantially simplifying the learning of unified mappings across diverse tasks and domains. Notably, the noise diffusion stage is trained exclusively on abundant, unpaired target-domain images, greatly improving data efficiency. Comprehensive theoretical and empirical analysis demonstrates that DRDD is broadly compatible with mainstream diffusion models and consistently delivers robust, unified I2I translation, even under limited paired data. Our code is available at https://github.com/HKU-HealthAI/DRDD.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新型去噪扩散模型（DRDD），用于实现高效和统一的图像到图像（I2I）转换，通过将噪声扩散与语义映射过程解耦，提升了任务通用性和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在图像转换中能够提高质量和多样性，但噪声注入除了提升流形还原外，还能隐式对齐特征分布。遗憾的是，主流方法在去噪过程中提前破坏了这种“领域和谐”的正面作用。
AI.method: DRDD将扩散过程解耦为两个阶段：首先进行随机噪声扩散以实现领域和谐和流形提升；然后在固定噪声域内，使用确定性残差扩散对核心语义映射进行学习。噪声扩散部分仅用未配对的目标域图像训练，提高数据利用率。
AI.result: 大量理论和实验分析表明，DRDD不仅能用于主流扩散模型，而且在有限配对数据下，仍然实现了稳健、统一的I2I转换性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦扩散流程，DRDD有效保留了领域和谐与流形提升效果，简化了跨任务与跨域学习，显著提高了数据效率和模型泛化能力。

title: UniD$^3$: A Knowledge Graph-Enhanced RAG Framework for Drug-Disease Discovery and Reasoning
summary: Systematic characterization of drug-disease relationships is essential for drug discovery and repurposing, yet is hindered by the heterogeneity and rapid growth of biomedical literature. Existing datasets rely on labor-intensive curation and are often incomplete, while LLM-only approaches suffer from hallucination and weak evidence grounding. We introduce UniD$^3$, a unified framework that integrates Large Language Models with Knowledge Graph-enhanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (KG-RAG) to extract, organize, and validate drug-disease knowledge across Drug-Disease Matching (DDM), Drug Effectiveness Assessment (DEA), and Drug-Target Analysis (DTA). UniD$^3$ processes 157,849 PubMed articles with Llama 3.3-70B and constructs knowledge graphs via a dual-stage strategy combining paper-level extraction with KG-level consolidation centered on drug and disease entities. These graphs support KG-RAG-based generation of structured datasets, evaluated through external benchmarks, fuzzy matching with curated resources, and clinician review. UniD$^3$ produces six knowledge graphs and large-scale datasets, including 28,915 DDM, 15,042 DEA, and over 4,000 DTA QA pairs. External validation shows strong performance (F1: 0.85-0.87 for DDM/DEA; 0.82 for DTA), with clinician review confirming high reliability (AUROC = 0.90). KG-RAG-augmented models outperform standalone LLMs, and the UniD$^3$ chatbot enables interpretable, citation-supported exploration of drug-disease relationships. UniD$^3$ provides a scalable, extensible framework for transforming unstructured biomedical literature into high-quality, structured drug-disease knowledge, supporting AI-driven discovery, repurposing, and precision medicine.

AI.tldr: UniD$^3$结合大语言模型和知识图谱增强RAG方法，实现了大规模药物-疾病关系知识的自动化抽取、组织与验证，并构建了高质量结构化数据集，优于传统LLM方法。
AI.motivation: 药物发现和再利用依赖于对药物-疾病关系的系统性认识，但现有方法受限于文献异质性、增长速度快以及人工注释成本高、数据不全等问题，亟需更高效、可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出UniD$^3$框架，结合大型语言模型和知识图谱增强的检索生成（KG-RAG），采用双阶段（文献级抽取和知识图谱整合）处理了15万余篇PubMed文献，围绕药物与疾病实体构建知识图谱，并生成结构化问答数据集。通过外部基准、模糊匹配及临床专家审阅进行验证。
AI.result: 成功生成6个知识图谱、3类共近5万条结构化药物-疾病问答数据，外部验证F1达0.82-0.87，临床专家确认整体可靠性高（AUROC=0.90）。KG-RAG增强模型明显优于单一LLM。
AI.conclusion: UniD$^3$为自动化、高质量药物-疾病知识提取与验证提供了可扩展的统一框架，为AI驱动的药物发现、再利用和精准医疗奠定数据与方法基础。

title: TextFake: Benchmarking AI-Generated Image Detection on Text-Rich Images
summary: Recent AI-generated image (AIGI) detectors perform well on natural-image benchmarks, but their behavior on text-rich forgeries, such as fabricated screenshots, documents, and news pages prevalent in misinformation, remains untested. We introduce TextFake, a 20,000-image benchmark for text-rich AIGI detection spanning 28 languages, 4 topic categories, and 2 scene modalities. Fake images are synthesized via a four-stage pipeline that annotates real images along three controlled dimensions and generates counterparts through distribution-aligned structured prompting, ruling out covariate shortcuts. Zero-shot evaluation of 14 specialized detectors and 3 frontier VLM APIs reveals a large systematic gap: no method exceeds 80% accuracy, with some dropping over 60% from natural-image benchmarks. Diagnostic evaluations identify three failure modes: the Text Density Curse, where dense glyphs overwhelm low-level detectors; Cloaking via Rendering Fidelity, where stronger text rendering suppresses enerative artifacts; and Threshold Collapse, where routine perturbations drive detectors toward chance-level performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TextFake数据集，专注于检测包含丰富文本的AI生成图片，并系统评估了各种检测器在样本上的表现，发现当前方法对复杂文本造假图片的检测性能明显不足。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有的AI生成图片检测器在自然图像数据集上表现良好，但在充满文本的伪造图片上的表现尚未研究，而此类伪造图片在假新闻等信息误导场景中极为普遍。
AI.method: 作者构建了TextFake数据集，包括2万张跨28种语言、4个主题、2种场景的文本密集型AI生成图片，并通过四阶段流程生成平衡数据，消除传统检测中的偏差。实验涵盖了14种专业检测器和3个主流多模态大模型，通过零样本测试全面对比性能。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，无论是专业检测器还是最前沿的多模态模型，在TextFake上的准确率都未超过80%，部分检测器性能较传统自然图像集下降超过60%。
AI.conclusion: 当前AIGI检测器在应对包含大量文本的伪造图片时存在显著短板，主要因文字密集度高、文本渲染技术高级及常规扰动等问题。未来需针对文本伪造场景开发专门检测方法。

title: Consistent and Distinctive: LLM Benchmark Efficiency via Maximum Independent Set Prompt Selection on Similarity Graphs
summary: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) across comprehensive benchmarks is expensive and time-consuming. We propose a graph-based prompt selection framework that models each benchmark as a similarity graph -- nodes are prompts connected if their embedding-space distance falls above a configurable threshold -- and applies Maximum Independent Set (MIS) algorithms to select a maximally diverse, non-redundant subset. We evaluate four MIS solvers (CPLEX, GREEDY, Online-MIS, ReduMIS) across six embedding models, three distance measures, six percentile thresholds, and four benchmarks (GPQA, IFEval, MMLU-Pro, Omni-MATH) covering 66 LLMs. Our central hypothesis -- that repeated selection under different random seeds yields consistent LLM rankings that may also differ from the full-benchmark baseline -- is strongly confirmed: Kendall's $W \geq 0.90$ in 99.2\% of stochastic configurations (mean $W = 0.997 \pm 0.008$), while at higher percentile thresholds selected subsets achieve 25--48\% prompt reduction on average. Ranking divergence from the full benchmark ($ρ< 0.95$) occurs in only 15.95\% of configurations, concentrated at low thresholds ($p_{10}$--$p_{20}$) and benchmarks (GPQA, IFEval), identifying overly dense graphs as the primary failure mode.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的提示选择框架，通过极大独立集算法从相似性图中选出最大多样且无冗余的提示子集，有效减少评测大模型所需的提示数量，同时保持高一致性的模型排名。
AI.motivation: 当前在大规模基准集上评估大语言模型非常消耗时间和资源，且很多测试提示之间存在冗余，导致效率低下。该研究旨在提出一种高效的提示选择方法来减少冗余，提高评测效率，同时确保评测结果的可靠性。
AI.method: 将每个基准集建模为相似性图，节点为提示，节点间有边当其嵌入空间距离超过阈值。应用极大独立集（MIS）算法，选取最多样、无冗余的提示子集。对多种MIS算法、嵌入模型、距离度量、阈值和基准集进行了系统评测。
AI.result: 在99.2%的随机配置下，所选提示子集产生的大模型排名与全基准集高度一致（Kendall's W ≥ 0.90, 平均W=0.997），且在较高阈值下提示数量平均减少25-48%。只有15.95%的配置下，排名出现较大偏差，主要集中在低阈值和特定基准，主要失败原因是图过于稠密。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够大幅减少评测所需的提示数量，同时保持模型排名的一致性和可靠性，是高效评测大语言模型的新方法。

title: 3DCodeBench: Benchmarking Agentic Procedural 3D Modeling Via Code
comment: Project Page: https://www.3dcodebench.com/; 11 pages (main), with appendix
summary: Procedural 3D modeling through code is emerging as a versatile paradigm, offering deterministic, engine-ready, and precisely editable assets that neural 3D generators inherently lack. Authoring such procedural content, however, demands deep expertise in 3D software APIs, parametric design, and code-level geometric reasoning. In this paper, we propose 3DCodeBench, a systematic benchmark for evaluating vision-language model (VLM) agents for procedural 3D generation in 3D modeling software. Specifically, 3DCodeBench evaluates how effectively 12 advanced VLMs can serve as procedural 3D modelers by translating text and image references into procedural code for 3D modeling software. Recognizing that automated metrics may not fully capture the perceptual quality of 3D shapes, we build 3DCodeArena, a ranking platform based on pairwise human preferences over generated 3D outputs. From extensive evaluations and results, we observe that: (1) Failures mostly arise from API mismatches, while successful renders still suffer from disconnected or floating 3D geometric components. (2) Test-time scaling, such as higher thinking budgets and multi-turn refinement, improves performance overall. Our findings highlight a critical need for high-quality procedural coding data to advance commercial VLMs. Furthermore, effective procedural 3D modeling requires a robust execution environment that provides high-fidelity feedback for iterative refinement. We release 3DCodeBench, including the curated large-scale dataset of multimodal (text/image) prompts, procedural code, 3D object triplets, evaluation protocol, and the public 3DCodeArena platform as a foundational toolkit for exploring VLM-based procedural 3D modelers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了3DCodeBench基准，专门用于评测视觉-语言模型（VLM）在3D建模软件中通过代码生成程序化3D模型的能力，并引入了基于人工偏好排名的3DCodeArena评价平台。
AI.motivation: 当前程序化3D建模虽具优势，但对编程和几何能力要求极高，限制了其普及。与此同时，神经网络生成的3D结果缺乏可编辑性和确定性，推动了对结合AI与程序化建模能力的需求。
AI.method: 作者设计了3DCodeBench基准，涵盖大量多模态（文本/图像）提示、与之对应的程序化3D建模代码及标准评测流程。同时开发了3DCodeArena，一个对生成结果进行双选人工偏好打分的平台，用于弥补自动化指标对3D形状感知质量衡量的不足。评测了12种先进VLMs，将其转化输入为3D模型代码，并评估结果。
AI.result: 评测结果表明：VLMs常因API不匹配导致失败，渲染成功的模型仍常见零散或悬浮几何问题。测试时增加推理预算与多轮优化能提升表现。依赖高质量程序化代码数据和高保真反馈环境是实现AI驱动3D程序化建模进步的关键。
AI.conclusion: 高质量的程序化代码数据与智能反馈机制对于AI自动化建模至关重要。本文开源3DCodeBench及评测工具，有望推动VLM在程序化3D建模领域的研究和应用。

title: DrugClaw and DrugAudit: A Primary-Source-Grounded Agent and Authority-Aware Benchmark for Drug-Information Question Answering
summary: Drug-information question answering is a high-stakes setting where hallucinated facts can mislead clinical decision-making and the provenance of each cited fact matters as much as the fact itself. We present DrugClaw, a multi-agent retrieval-augmented system that queries a registry of drug and pharmacovigilance skills via a reflection-driven state-machine workflow and returns answers grounded in primary regulatory or peer-reviewed records. We also contribute DrugAudit, a 3,772-item authority-aware benchmark with an evaluation panel that scores upstream-of-gold source match, token-level semantic snippet overlap, and citation faithfulness under a dual-judge LLM-as-judge protocol with inter-judge kappa = 0.88 (almost-perfect). Across DrugAudit plus drug-related subsets of MedQA (751) and PubMedQA (512), DrugClaw is top-1 on every column of the headline table: composite Evidence Index under both judges, judge-mediated answer correctness, primary-source rate (0.918, +10.1 pp over next-best), faithfulness (0.887, +5.9 pp), MedQA (0.920), and PubMedQA (0.693).

AI.tldr: 提出了DrugClaw系统，实现高准确性、可溯源的药物信息问答，并构建了权威评测集。DrugClaw在多个数据集和指标上表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 药物信息问答涉及高风险，信息错误可能误导临床决策，因此答案的准确性和出处溯源性极为重要。
AI.method: 提出DrugClaw多智能体系统，结合检索增强方法，通过状态机工作流反思性地调用多种专业技能，实现仅引用权威文献（如监管或同行评议文献）的答案。还构建了DrugAudit评测集，用双LLM裁判对答案的证据、语义片段重合和引文忠实度进行细致评测。
AI.result: DrugClaw在DrugAudit、MedQA和PubMedQA子集上的各类指标均为第一，包括证据指数、答案正确率、主来源文比例（0.918，提高10.1个百分点）、忠实度（0.887，提高5.9个百分点）等。
AI.conclusion: DrugClaw在药物领域问答中实现了高准确性和证据可溯源，对高风险临床环境具重要应用价值，同时DrugAudit为业界相关研究建立了权威评测标准。

title: A Multiscale Network with Supervised Contrastive Learning for Real-Time Facial Emotion Recognition
summary: Real-time emotion recognition from facial expressions is a challenging task, particularly in video-based scenarios where multiple emotional states may occur over time. The difficulty increases further due to the fact that each emotional state is associated with facial expressions that vary significantly across individuals. The change of facial expressions portraying emotional state is not discrete, but rather continuous, which is very challenging to represent through computational aids. A system with the ability to detect variations in facial expressions can have a significant impact on determining the emotional state of an individual. Such a system can be very beneficial for psychologists during counseling by providing additional insights into the emotional state of a subject. In this paper, a deep learning-based system is presented to detect emotional changes in real-time video of a person by modeling the change in facial expressions. The current study is conducted on a standard dataset for training of the deep learning system and the system has provided very satisfactory outcomes in this respect.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的视频实时表情变化识别系统，在标准数据集上效果良好。
AI.motivation: 实时情感识别在视频场景下具有挑战性，尤其是随时间变化的多重情感状态识别。表情变化的个体差异和连续性使得通过计算手段难以精准描述和捕捉。开发此类系统对心理学家等有实际应用价值。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于深度学习的系统，通过建模个人视频中面部表情的变化，实现情感状态变化的实时检测。系统在标准数据集上进行了训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该深度学习系统在标准数据集上达到了非常令人满意的表现，能有效检测实时视频中的面部情感变化。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的表情变化识别系统有望在心理咨询等领域辅助分析个体情感状态，具有广泛应用前景。

title: Learning from Saturated Data: Signals Beyond Correctness for LLM Training
summary: The growing capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have led to the saturation of many benchmarks and training datasets used to improve them. Motivated by this, we investigate whether questions solved with perfect empirical accuracy can nevertheless be used to improve downstream performance. To do so, we replace binary correctness with two sources of more fine-grained quality signals: (1) pairwise LLM self-judgments, in which the model evaluates the relative quality of its own solutions, and (2) token-level entropy, where token-level uncertainty is used as a proxy for solution quality. We incorporate these signals into several training algorithms and evaluate them on Qwen3-1.7B-Base. When training exclusively on a simple arithmetic task, quality-based signals improve performance by up to $18.6\%$ over the base model, substantially outperforming SFT. On GSM8K, however, gains are more modest and depend strongly on the quality signal. For instance, self-judgments show poor agreement with a stronger external judge and can even degrade performance below the base model. Overall, our results suggest that quality-based training can extract useful signal from saturated questions for base models, but that applying such signals to more complex tasks requires careful calibration and further study.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在大型语言模型基准和数据集趋于饱和后，是否可以通过更细粒度的质量信号继续提升模型性能。研究显示，在基础任务上，基于质量信号训练能显著提升表现，但在更复杂任务上效果有限需进一步校准。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型能力提升，目前广泛使用的基准和训练数据集均已趋于饱和，模型在许多测试题上已取得完美或接近完美的准确率，传统的二分类正确性已无法带来新的提升。因此，作者希望探索是否可以通过挖掘同一问题中更细粒度的信号，进一步提升下游任务表现。
AI.method: 作者提出用两种更细致的质量信号替代仅仅依靠二元正确性的做法：(1) 模型自我评价（pairwise LLM self-judgments），即让模型评估自身解答之间的优劣；(2) token级别的熵（token-level entropy），即用模型对每个token的不确定性量化答案质量。通过将这些信号融入不同的训练算法，在Qwen3-1.7B-Base模型下进行实验证明其有效性。
AI.result: 在仅训练简单算术任务时，基于质量信号的训练方法使模型性能最高提升18.6%，明显优于传统SFT方法。但在更复杂的GSM8K数据集上，性能提升很有限并且高度依赖于信号类型，例如模型的自我判断和外部强模型的一致性较差，有时甚至令性能下降低于基线。
AI.conclusion: 质量信号可以帮助基础模型在已饱和任务中获取额外提升空间，但对复杂任务，其效果有限且需要对质量信号更仔细的设计与校准。因此此类方法虽具潜力，但应用到复杂问题时需深入研究和调整。

title: Chameleon: Style-Content Disentangled Framework for Cross-Domain Object Compositing
comment: The last two authors are co-corresponding authors. Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/Chameleon/
summary: Image compositing aims to seamlessly insert a foreground object into a background image, and recent advances in diffusion models have significantly enhanced the quality, especially when the foreground and background images come from the same domain (e.g., natural images). However, cross-domain compositing, where the foreground and background come from different domains, is relatively underexplored and remains challenging because the model must preserve the foreground object's identity while stylizing it to match the background domain. Existing cross-domain compositing approaches largely rely on training-free blending and refinement strategies. This is partly due to the lack of large-scale paired datasets for cross-domain compositing, limiting the development of training-based solutions. As a result, they are limited to tone-level alignment and often produce style-inconsistent or overstylized results. To overcome such limitations, we construct ChameleonDataset, the first large-scale training dataset for cross-domain compositing, with a comprehensive evaluation benchmark, built through a scalable data construction pipeline. Building on this, we propose Chameleon, a novel two-stage training-based cross-domain compositing framework. In the first stage, we propose Joint Hard Contrastive Learning (JHCL) to train ChameleonEncoder, which effectively disentangles style and content representations. In the second stage, we introduce Spatio-Temporal Attention Gating (STAG) into a diffusion transformer for effective stylization, adaptively regulating how style tokens from the first-stage encoder are injected across spatial and temporal dimensions. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art in-domain and cross-domain compositing models, sequential pipelines and commercial models, achieving improvements in both compositional plausibility and stylistic fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了专为跨域图像合成任务设计的数据集与算法Chameleon，实现了高质量风格迁移与前景保持。
AI.motivation: 传统图像合成在前景和背景图像为同一领域时效果较好，但对于跨领域（如卡通与现实、素描与实拍等）的情况仍具有挑战，因缺乏大规模数据集导致大部分方法仅为训练自由的简单融合，产生风格不一致或过度风格化问题。
AI.method: 作者构建了首个大规模跨域合成数据集ChameleonDataset，并提出了两阶段训练框架Chameleon。第一阶段利用联合对比学习（JHCL）训练编码器，有效分离风格与内容表征；第二阶段在扩散Transformer中引入时空注意力门控（STAG），自适应地在空间和时间上融合风格信息，实现精细的风格迁移。
AI.result: 所提方法在合成合理性与风格一致性两方面，均优于当前主流的同域和跨域合成方法，以及商业化工具。
AI.conclusion: Chameleon不仅为跨域图像合成任务提供了数据基础，也提出了高效的解决方案，推动了该领域技术进步。

title: Before and After Temperature: A Distributional View of Creative LLM Generation
summary: Reference-free evaluation of large language model (LLM) creativity relies on perplexity, entropy, and top-1 margin. We show that a much stronger signal lives one step earlier in the pipeline: in how sampling temperature \emph{reshapes} the model's token distribution before the next token is drawn. On Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct generations of 500 open-ended creative prompts at $T \in \{0.3, 0.8, 1.5\}$, a single per-token feature derived from this reshaping predicts the within-prompt creativity rank at Spearman $ρ{=}0.918$ against an averaged gpt-4o\,/\,gemini-2.5-pro judge ($n{=}500$) and $ρ{=}0.870$ against a three-rater human-majority ranking ($n{=}150$). Each of four standard reference-free baselines (self-perplexity, mean predictive entropy, top-1 margin, gzip compression ratio) tops out at $|ρ|\!\approx\!0.76$ on both ground truths: a gap of $+0.165$ on averaged-LLM and $+0.110$ on human-majority, both far larger than the spread among the baselines themselves. The two ground-truth panels agree with each other at $ρ{=}0.83$, above the inter-human ceiling of $ρ{=}0.77$, so the comparison is not bottlenecked by judge noise. Mechanistically, the win comes from a sharp distributional signature of the incoherence regime: at $T{=}1.5$ the cumulative-mass width $n_{95}(q)$ inflates from $\sim\!1$ to ${\sim}\!131$ tokens and post-temperature mass leaks off the pre-temperature top-$90\%$ plausible set by about $13$ percentage points. The per-token aggregates do not separate $T{=}0.8$ from $T{=}0.3$; discriminating the two coherent regimes is left to sequence-level features.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的无参考大语言模型（LLM）创造力评估方法，通过观察采样温度对下一个token分布的塑形来预测生成内容的创造力，显著优于传统基于困惑度和熵的指标。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM创造力评价方法主要依赖困惑度、熵等统计指标，其效果有限，需要探索更精准的无参考评价途径。
AI.method: 作者发现采样温度改变token分布的方式能提供更有力的信号，并据此设计了单一的token级特征来衡量创造力，并在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct针对500个开放式创意提示词生成内容，分析不同温度（T=0.3、0.8、1.5）下的模型行为，并用gpt-4o/gemini-2.5-pro和人工三人组进行排名比对。
AI.result: 所提出特征与LLM平均评分的Spearman相关系数达到0.918，与人工多数评分的相关系数为0.870，均显著优于自困惑度、预测熵、top-1 margin和gzip压缩率四种无参考基线；二者之间的相关系数（0.83）也高于人工评委间的一致性（0.77）。
AI.conclusion: 通过采样温度对token分布的变形可获得比现有方法更强的无参考创造力评估信号，尤其能区分低一致性（incoherence）情形；未来可进一步结合序列级特征区分更细致的创造力表现。

title: Dual-Route Top-K Retrieval with 1v1 VLM Reranking for the CoVR-R
summary: We describe \emph{Dual-Route Top-K Retrieval with 1v1 VLM Reranking} for the CoVR-R challenge. The method treats composed video retrieval as two coupled problems: finding a sufficiently complete top-k candidate set, and then safely deciding whether any candidate should replace a strong current top-1. We first improve the reasoning/text seed with a VLM slot selector over existing candidates, without introducing DFN visual retrieval. We then add a visual route from contact-sheet embeddings using DFN-H/DFN-L. The routes are merged into a top-10 candidate set, after which a VLM final reranker performs conservative 1v1 comparisons between the current top-1 and each challenger. On the hidden test split, the final system reaches 95.28 R@1, 97.47 R@5, 98.48 R@10, and 99.66 R@50. The main lesson is that CoVR-R benefits more from recall-selection decoupling than from broad text reranking or direct multi-candidate VLM classification.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于CoVR-R挑战的Dual-Route Top-K检索方法，并通过1v1视觉语言模型（VLM）重排序，大幅提升了视频检索的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频组分检索任务中，如何高效且准确地从大量候选中选出最佳结果是难点。尤其是在强基线下，进一步提升检索性能需要创新的候选选取与排序手段。
AI.method: 方法分为两步：第一步利用VLM筛选已有的reasoning/text候选，不引入DFN视觉检索；第二步引入DFN-H/DFN-L对视频帧特征进一步筛选视觉候选，然后将两路候选合并至Top-10集合。最后，VLM以1v1方式严格比较当前top-1与挑战者，做最终排序。
AI.result: 在隐藏测试集上，该方法R@1达95.28，R@5和R@10分别为97.47和98.48，R@50高达99.66，显示出卓越性能。
AI.conclusion: 论文结果表明，将候选召回与精细选择解耦，比简单文本重排序或多候选VLM分类更有利于提升CoVR-R的表现。

title: Cross-lingual Self-Consistency for Multilingual Reasoning with Language Models
summary: Despite expanding their multilingual coverage, the advanced reasoning capabilities of LLMs remain largely confined to a few high-resource languages like English. To address this, we propose an unsupervised Reinforcement Learning (RL) approach to enhance multilingual reasoning by enforcing cross-lingual self-consistency: the principle that a model should produce the same final answer for equivalent problems in different languages. Existing methods are limited by the scarcity of multilingual reasoning data and show weak generalization to unseen languages. Our approach requires neither gold answers nor parallel data, and it achieves average gains of up to 21.7% on MGSM across 10 languages. In addition, our method demonstrates strong generalization, with an 18.2% mean improvement on MGSM languages unseen during training, and up to 6.2% gain on 3 out-of-distribution benchmarks. These results show the potential of consistency-based methods to improve the multilingual capabilities of LLMs without requiring supervised data.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种无监督强化学习方法，通过跨语言自洽性提升大型语言模型的多语言推理能力，无需标注数据或平行语料，显著提升了10种语言上的表现，同时对未见语言和分布外任务也有较好泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 目前大型语言模型在多语言处理上的推理能力主要局限于高资源语言如英语，对低资源语言支持薄弱，而已有方法由于多语言推理数据稀缺和泛化能力差，难以广泛适用于更多语言。
AI.method: 作者提出一个无监督强化学习方法，核心思想是跨语言自洽性（即模型对于不同语言下的等价问题给出相同答案）。该方法不依赖于人工标注答案，也不需要平行语料，仅利用模型自身的跨语言一致性作为优化目标。
AI.result: 在10种语言的MGSM数据集上，平均表现提升高达21.7%；对训练中未见过的语言，也有18.2%的平均提升；在3个分布外测试集上最高提升6.2%。
AI.conclusion: 基于自洽性的无监督方法，无需大量标注或平行数据，也能显著提升大模型多语言推理能力，并且具有良好的泛化性，值得进一步研究和推广。

title: Adaptive Dense Evidence Refinement for Video Relational Reasoning for VRR-QA Challenge
summary: VRR-QA evaluates whether video-language systems can infer spatial, temporal, viewpoint, depth, and visibility relations that are not always resolved by a single frame. We present an inference-only system built around adaptive test-time computation. The system first answers each question with a direct video-language model pass, then uses multiple lightweight views to find unstable questions. Only these difficult questions are routed to a high-budget dense evidence module that constructs timestamped frame observations, relation-specific probes, candidate verification, and conservative temporal aggregation. This design separates two problems that are often confused in video question answering: finding plausible alternative answers and deciding when a current answer should actually be changed. On the test split, the final system obtains 90.07 average accuracy and 87.81 macro average accuracy. The report focuses on the final test system and the implementation settings required to reproduce the adaptive dense verifier.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的视频问答系统，通过自适应推理流程提升对时空、视角、深度等难点关系的理解和判断。
AI.motivation: 许多视频理解任务涉及时空、视角等多种复杂关系，但现有方法往往难以解决这些超出单帧推理能力的问题。本文旨在提出更精细的方法来提升视频-语言系统的推理能力。
AI.method: 系统首先通过直接的视频-语言模型初步回答问题，再用轻量级多视角识别不稳定问题。对于疑难问题，采用高预算模块进行帧级证据提取、关系探针、候选验证和保守时序聚合，实现分步递进推理。此方法把“寻找所有可能答案”与“判定是否该改变当前答案”两个任务分离处理。
AI.result: 在官方测试集上，系统达到90.07的平均准确率和87.81的宏平均准确率，显著提升了适应复杂问题的能力。
AI.conclusion: 分层自适应推理体系能有效提升视频问答的准确率与鲁棒性，为 reproducing adaptive dense verifier 设定了可复现的技术实现标准。

title: Peacemaker at ATE-IT: Automatic term extraction from Italian text for waste management data using encoder model
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, Published in EVALITA 2026, CEUR Workshop Proceedings Vol. 4195
summary: The development of automatic term extraction has become increasingly important in modern technology. Automatic term extraction can be found in virtually every search engine that is currently available to users. Recent advancements have provided promising results for the extraction of automatic terms; however, accurate labeling is difficult because of several factors, such as the limited number of annotated documents available for training and the complexity of extracting multi-word expressions due to shifts in the domain. In this paper, we will present a low-cost and interpretable method of automatic term extraction, developed specifically for Task A of the ATE Shared Task. This new method utilizes fine-tuning extraction strategies that can run on a small amount of computational resources. We evaluated our automated system using both type-level and micro-level measures of precision, recall, and F1-score to measure both complementary aspects of the extraction performance. According to the experimental results, our proposed approach achieves consistent and balanced performance compared to other teams. Even though the technique itself is relatively straightforward, it serves as a good starting point for low-resource models. Overall, the findings point toward the possibility of significant future advancements (in model expansion) with higher-level performance still able to retain their ability to be interpreted.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低成本、可解释的自动术语抽取方法，在资源受限下仍能获得较好的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动术语抽取在标注数据有限、多词组抽取困难等方面存在挑战，尤其是低资源环境下。
AI.method: 针对ATE Shared Task的Task A，作者提出了结合微调的抽取策略，方法简单，适用于低算力环境，并通过多维度指标进行实验评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出方法在精度、召回率和F1分数等方面表现稳定且均衡，相较其他团队方法具备竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法虽然简单，却为低资源条件下的模型提供了良好起点，同时具备可解释性，为今后模型扩展和提升预留了空间。

title: Temporal Evidence Routing with Structured Visual Evidence for TimeLogicQA
summary: TimeLogicQA evaluates whether video question answering systems can reason over temporal relations such as event existence, ordering, persistence, boundary conditions, and overlap. We address this task with a visual evidence routing pipeline that separates perception from symbolic temporal reasoning. The system first parses each question into event targets, answer mode, candidate options, and temporal operators. It then routes videos according to duration and operator difficulty, using ordered full-frame evidence for short clips and event-focused candidate windows for long videos. A multimodal large language model produces structured visual evidence for the relevant events, while programmatic verifiers recover dense action intervals and a deterministic reducer applies operator-specific temporal rules to produce the final answer. Conservative fusion accepts an answer only when the visual evidence, temporal program, and confidence checks agree, reducing noisy answer flips. On the official test evaluation, our final system achieves an AvgAcc of 81.8.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TimeLogicQA框架，专注于视频问答中的时序关系推理，通过分离感知与符号化时序推理，提升视频问答系统对事件存在、顺序、持续等复杂时序关系的理解能力，最终在官方测试中取得81.8的平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频问答系统难以对事件之间复杂的时序关系（如事件的存在、先后、持续、边界条件、重叠等）进行有效推理，亟需一种能够将视觉感知与逻辑推理分开的新方法，以提升对时序问题的理解和回答准确性。
AI.method: 提出了视觉证据路由管道，将问题解析为事件目标、答案模式、候选选项及时序算子，针对视频长度与问题难度采用不同的证据抽取策略（短视频使用全帧排序证据，长视频用事件窗口）。多模态大语言模型生成结构化视觉证据，并通过程序化验证器与归约器按操作符规则推理最终答案，采用保守式融合机制，仅在多方一致时才输出答案。
AI.result: 在官方测试集上，该系统的平均准确率（AvgAcc）达到81.8，表现出较强的时序推理能力，且能有效减少因证据不一致导致的错误答案波动。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过分离视觉感知与符号化推理，显著提升了视频问答系统在时序推理上的能力，并证明视觉路由、结构化证据及多策略融合等模块可协同减少噪声，提高整体准确性，对复杂视频理解任务具有实际参考价值。

title: Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Emotion Control in Text-to-Speech
summary: Integrating large language models (LLMs) into text-to-speech (TTS) systems has improved speech expressiveness, yet interpretable emotional control remains challenging. Existing approaches primarily rely on external conditioning or global activation steering, offering limited insight into the internal representations underlying emotional control. In this work, we analyze emotion-related variation in the semantic hidden states of LLM-based TTS models using sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to identify sparse latent features. Our analysis shows that emotional variation is distributed across multiple sparse latent features, while intervening on a small subset enables interpretable emotion control. Building on this observation, we introduce a feature-level intervention framework for bidirectional emotion induction and suppression without modifying backbone parameters. We further show that distinct latent features are associated with specific acoustic attributes (e.g., pitch), suggesting that emotional expression arises from coordinated latent contributions rather than a single global shift. Empirically, steering these sparse latent features achieves comparable or superior emotion induction and suppression performance relative to global steering and existing TTS baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出在LLM-TTS模型中，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）辨识情感相关的稀疏潜在特征，并提出特征层面的干预方式，实现可解释的情感控制，无需修改模型主干参数，实验效果优于或可比现有方法。
AI.motivation: 目前LLM驱动的TTS在表现力上提升很大，但情感控制的解释性不足。已有方法只依赖外部条件或全局控制，难以理解与干预具体的内部情感表示机制。
AI.method: 作者使用稀疏自编码器分析LLM-TTS模型中的语义隐藏状态，提取出情感变化对应的稀疏潜在特征，并设计特征级干预框架，实现情感诱导与抑制，无需修改主干网络。还进一步分析了这些稀疏特征与具体声学属性（如音高）的对应关系。
AI.result: 结果显示情感相关的信息分布在多个稀疏潜在特征中，对少量特定特征进行干预可以有效实现解释性情感控制。特征级干预实现了情感的双向调节（诱导与抑制），且与传统的全局控制和现有基线相比，效果相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: LLM-TTS内部的情感表达依赖多个协同作用的稀疏潜在特征，而不是简单的全局状态转换。通过特征级的微调，能够实现直观且高效的情感控制，有助于提升TTS系统的可解释性和灵活性。

title: R^3: Composed Video Retrieval via Reasoning-Guided Recalling and Re-ranking
summary: The CoVR-R challenge evaluates composed video retrieval, where a system must retrieve a target video from a large gallery given a reference video and a textual edit instruction. This setting is not a standard video-text retrieval problem: the query is defined by both the visual evidence in the source video and the transformation implied by the edit. A strong embedding model can provide scalable candidate recall, but it may under-express target-side consequences such as state changes, action replacement, object preservation, or temporal consistency. A pairwise multimodal reranker can verify such details more directly, but exhaustive reranking over the full gallery is computationally infeasible. We present $\mathbb{R}^3$, a zero-shot composed video retrieval pipeline built around Reasoning-guided Recalling and Reranking. The core idea is to turn the source-edit query into a reasoning-grounded retrieval program rather than treating the edit text as a short caption. First, the model generates a reasoning trace that describes the expected target video after applying the edit. Then the trace is encoded together with the source video as a reasoning-augmented query, and its retrieval score is fused with the base composed query through an agreement-gated residual rule. At last, a re-ranker verifies the recalled candidates with direct source-candidate comparison. Experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of our method in addressing this challenge. Codes are available on https://github.com/Lee-zixu/R-3.

AI.tldr: 本文针对CoVR-R挑战提出了一种面向推理的组合视频检索管道R^3，通过生成推理轨迹、推理增强查询和合理的分数融合显著提升检索的准确性，并引入多模态复排器进一步提升表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的视频-文本检索无法有效处理‘组合视频检索’这种新任务，因为检索查询不仅依赖源视频的视觉内容，还依赖编辑指令带来的转变。单纯的嵌入检索或多模态复排都各有局限，因此需要新的方法来综合高召回率和高准确性的需求。
AI.method: 作者提出的R^3管道包括三个步骤：（1）对源视频和编辑指令生成期望目标视频的‘推理轨迹’，（2）用推理轨迹对原组合查询进行增强，并通过‘一致性门控残差规则’融合检索分数，（3）多模态pairwise复排对召回候选做细粒度验证。该方法具有零样本泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验结果显示该方法在CoVR-R组合视频检索任务上优于现有方法，能够更加准确地理解编辑指令并找到正确目标视频。
AI.conclusion: R^3方法通过引入推理过程和多模态判别，有效提升了组合视频检索中的准确性和效率，为此类复杂检索任务提供了新的解决思路。

title: Beyond Topical Similarity: Contrastive Evidence Retrieval with Interpretable Attention Alignment in RAG
summary: Ensuring factuality and interpretability in RAG remains an open and urgent problem. We introduce Contrastive Evidence Rationale Attention (CERA), the first retrieval framework to employ subjectivity-based hard negative selection and inject an evidential inductive bias into contrastive learning through an auxiliary attention alignment loss. CERA fine-tunes a dense retriever using two training objectives: triplet-based contrastive learning and interpretable attention alignment, which supervises CLS-to-token attention using a part-of-speech-weighted masking distribution over human-annotated factual rationales as evidence signals. Experiments on a large corpus of clinical trial reports demonstrate that the subjectivity-based hard negative selection substantially improves retrieval effectiveness compared to both Contriever and hard negative selection baselines. Furthermore, rationale alignment improves faithfulness while maintaining competitive retrieval performance, supporting the hypothesis that attention can serve as a more faithful explanation of model behavior when guided by human rationales. Moving beyond topical similarity, CERA enables the retriever to identify the specific tokens that constitute supporting evidence, promoting more interpretable evidence selection in RAG systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的检索框架CERA，通过对比学习与解释性注意力对齐双重目标，提高RAG系统事实性及可解释性，并在临床试验报告数据集上取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）系统在事实性和可解释性上存在不足，尤其难以针对具体证据进行解释或提升检索的准确性，因此亟需新的技术方案以提升这两个关键能力。
AI.method: 提出CERA框架：1）采用基于主观性的hard negative selection生成难负例；2）在对比学习训练基础上，增加辅助attention对齐损失，将CLS到token的注意力与包含词性加权的人类注释证据进行监督，促进模型解释性提升。
AI.result: 在大规模临床试验报告数据集上，CERA的主观性hard negative选择方式相比Contriever和传统负例选择在检索效果上显著提升；此外，rationale对齐机制提升了输出内容的忠实性，同时保持较高检索表现。
AI.conclusion: CERA不仅提升了RAG系统的检索准确度，也通过attention对齐机制让注意力解释更贴近人工证据，促进可解释性证据选择，为RAG领域向更高事实性和透明化迈进提供了有效路线。

title: Rank-Aware Quantile Activation for Motion-Robust Crop Segmentation in UAV Imagery
summary: Motion blur from high-speed UAV acquisition de-grades semantic segmentation on rare texture-dependent classes with high agronomic value. Standard CNNs rely on high-frequency magnitude features that blur destroys, causing statistical erasure of minority signals. We propose Dual Quantile Activation (QAct), a rank-aware block replacing magnitude gating with instance-level rank normalization. Evaluated onAgriculture-Vision 2021 across zero-shot and blur-supervised regimes at multiple severities, QAct is the dominant architectural factor: it delivers consistent mIoU gains over ReLU across both regimes and all severities, with strongest gains on rare structural and texture-dependent classes. Some dominant classes (water,planter skip) show mixed per-class performance under distillation. At moderate blur, zero-shot QAct outperforms distillation-trained ReLU; across all severities, Distill-QAct achieves best performance, confirming rank aware activation and blur-domain training are complementary robustness sources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Dual Quantile Activation（QAct）模块，用于提高高速度无人机图像语义分割在运动模糊条件下的鲁棒性，尤其对稀有结构和纹理相关类别表现显著优异。
AI.motivation: 高速度无人机获取的影像存在运动模糊，严重降低了语义分割对于依赖纹理的稀有农作物类别的准确率。标准CNN因高度依赖高频特征，导致这些类别在模糊下信号丢失。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的rank-aware激活函数模块QAct，用实例级排序归一化取代理幅值门控，增强对稀有类别特征的保持能力，并在农业领域数据集Agriculture-Vision 2021上进行零样本和模糊监督训练实证。
AI.result: QAct在各种模糊程度和训练方式下，相较于传统ReLU显著提升了mIoU，对稀有结构类与依赖纹理的类别最为有效；部分主导类别表现波动。在中等模糊下，QAct零样本训练超过蒸馏训练ReLU方法；所有条件下，蒸馏+QAct达最佳表现。
AI.conclusion: QAct不仅对模糊环境具有鲁棒性，蒸馏兼容性也强，同时表明排序感知激活与模糊领域训练是提升鲁棒性的互补手段。

title: TimeSage-MT: A Multi-Turn Benchmark for Evaluating Agentic Time Series Reasoning
summary: Time series data inform critical decisions across many real-world domains. While large language model (LLM) agents can analyze data through natural language and tools, it remains unclear whether they can conduct reliable time series analysis across multi-turn conversations. Existing benchmarks focus on single-step tasks such as forecasting and anomaly detection, overlooking practical workflows where user goals evolve, agents must build on prior analyses, and conclusions emerge from accumulated evidence. In this work, we introduce TimeSage-MT, a multi-turn benchmark for agentic time series reasoning with 240 tasks and 2,680 dialogue turns across 8 real-world domains, spanning basic exploration to decision-oriented analysis. TimeSage-MT is built through a reproducible pipeline that converts real-world time series data into multi-turn conversations with verifiable answers. It provides a unified evaluation protocol and public leaderboard for comparing time series agentic systems. To demonstrate the benchmark's utility, we evaluate frontier LLMs alongside TimeSage, a novel structured agent equipped with a comprehensive time series skill library. The results show sharp performance drops on decision-oriented tasks, driven by failures in memory, uncertainty handling, and domain-based decision making. TimeSage-MT exposes critical gaps in current agentic reasoning and provides a rigorous foundation for future development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TimeSage-MT，这是一个针对多轮对话中时序数据推理能力的基准数据集，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）及其代理在多步骤实际分析流程中的表现，并发现了当前模型在复杂决策任务中的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有针对时序数据的评测大多仅限于单步任务（如预测或异常检测），不足以反映现实中多轮推理和逐步决策的复杂度，因此需要新的基准来检测多轮推理和目标随对话演变场景下的智能体能力。
AI.method: 作者基于真实时序数据，通过自动化流程生成涵盖8个领域、240个任务及2,680个对话轮次的多轮会话数据集，每条对话均能溯源与验证答案，并提供了统一评测协议和公开排行榜。此外，还评测了前沿LLM及自研结构化智能体TimeSage（具备丰富时序分析工具库）。
AI.result: 评测显示，现有LLM及TimeSage在常规分析任务上表现得体，但在面向决策复杂任务时，因记忆、处理不确定性和基于领域知识决策的缺陷，模型性能大幅下降。
AI.conclusion: TimeSage-MT暴露了当前基于LLM的智能体系统在多轮推理及复杂决策上的显著短板，为后续改进智能体时序推理能力、方法和评测体系提供了坚实基础。

title: HakushoBench: A Japanese Chart and Table VQA Benchmark from Governmental White Papers
summary: Understanding chart and table images is essential for applying vision-language models (VLMs) to real-world document understanding. While English benchmarks have advanced rapidly, non-English counterparts remain scarce, leaving it unclear whether this progress generalizes across languages. A key obstacle is the difficulty of collecting realistic and diverse non-English chart and table images at scale. To address this, we leverage governmental white papers as a scalable source for benchmark construction beyond English, as they contain naturally occurring charts and tables across diverse formats and domains and are freely accessible in many countries. As a first instantiation, we introduce HakushoBench, a challenging Japanese chart and table VQA benchmark built from 33 governmental white papers. HakushoBench contains 2,053 images spanning over 10 image types, with manually annotated QA pairs, designed to assess deep and holistic understanding of charts and tables, rather than local visual cues alone. Experiments across a broad range of VLMs demonstrate that HakushoBench remains challenging for open-weight models: the best open-weight model achieves only 58.6% accuracy, and a 34.9-point gap between open-weight and proprietary models highlights substantial room for improvement in complex chart and table understanding. We release our dataset and code.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了日文图表VQA数据集HakushoBench，用于评估视觉语言模型在非英语场景下对图表理解的能力。
AI.motivation: 目前视觉语言模型在英文图表和表格理解上取得了进展，但适用于非英语场景的数据集和评测标准极其稀缺，导致很难评估跨语言的泛化能力。主要障碍是难以大规模收集高质量的非英文学术图表和表格图像。
AI.method: 作者利用各国政府白皮书，自动收集自然分布的图表与表格，并从33份日文白皮书中构建HakushoBench数据集，包含2053张图片、10余种图片类型及人工标注的问答对，对模型进行深层次、整体性理解能力考察。
AI.result: 在多个主流视觉语言模型上的测试结果显示，HakushoBench对开源模型挑战很大，性能最高的开源模型准确率仅58.6%；开源与专有权重模型之间存在34.9个百分点的性能差距，显示现有模型存在重大提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 为日文等非英语场景图表理解评测提供了首个大规模基准数据集，对推动多语言、复杂图表理解模型发展有重要意义。数据集与代码已公开。

title: Identifying High-Confidence Social Biases in LLMs for Trustworthy Conversational Tutoring Agents
summary:
Conversational tutoring agents have been shown to improve learning engagement and student outcomes, and large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in these systems to provide scalable, personalized feedback. However, LLMs may perpetuate or amplify stereotypical social biases, posing particular risks in educational settings.
