  In this study, we evaluate LLMs in conversational tutoring scenarios to identify high-confidence social biases, instances where models are unable to identify biased judgments in tutoring conversations while maintaining strong confidence in their assessments, potentially affecting their reasoning and the feedback they provide to learners. We present a new dataset generation method that enables bias evaluation under naturalistic instructional conditions by regenerating student-AI tutor interactions and introducing turns with controlled bias derived from a benchmark dataset.
  Using this data, we assess multiple LLMs' ability to detect stereotypical biases and analyze the confidence and reasoning underlying their responses through computational and human evaluations. We find that bias detection is substantially more challenging in conversational tutoring contexts than in benchmark-based evaluations, and that state-of-the-art LLMs are overconfident in their incorrect assessments of stereotypical bias statements. Moreover, model confidence strongly influences reasoning and feedback, highlighting the risks of overconfident, biased behavior in LLM-based tutoring agents. We conclude by discussing implications, mitigation considerations, and directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文分析大型语言模型（LLMs）在对话式辅导场景中检测社会偏见的能力，发现其在此类场景下不仅识别偏见更难，还常常对错误判断表现出过度自信，可能影响学生反馈。
AI.motivation: LLMs日益应用于教育领域，为学习者提供个性化反馈，但其可能放大社会偏见，教育场景对此尤为敏感，亟需系统评估其潜在风险。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新数据集生成方法，通过重新生成学生-智能导师对话，并在自然教学内容中注入源自基准数据集的受控偏见内容，从而更真实地模拟和评估偏见识别能力。随后对多个LLM的偏见检测能力、信心程度及推理过程进行计算与人工评测。
AI.result: 研究发现，当前LLMs在对话式辅导中的偏见检测能力远低于基准测试表现，常常对错误的偏见判断表现出高度自信。模型的自信程度直接影响其推理过程和提供的反馈质量。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在教育辅导中存在高自信错误和偏见传播风险，需关注高自信偏见带来的问题。作者讨论了减缓措施和未来研究方向。

title: CoSTL: Comprehensive Spatial-Temporal Representation Learning for Moment Retrieval and Highlight Detection
summary: Video Moment Retrieval (MR) and Highlight Detection (HD) are crucial tasks in video analysis that aim to localize specific moments and estimate clip-wise relevance based on a given text query. Recent approaches treat them as similar video grounding tasks and use the same architecture to solve them. These tasks require both fine-grained comprehension at the image level and high-level temporal understanding across the entire video. Existing approaches have primarily focused on temporal modeling using frame-level features, often neglecting the rich visual information related to the text query within individual frames. This oversight leads to inaccurate grounding results. To address this limitation, we propose a Comprehensive Spatial-Temporal Representation Learning Framework (CoSTL), which captures both fine-grained image-level information and temporal dynamics. Specifically, CoSTL incorporates a text-driven progressive fine-grained image encoder, performing a two-step text-driven knowledge extraction process to learn fine-grained spatial representations. Furthermore, a multi-scale temporal perception module captures comprehensive spatial-temporal representations, enhancing the model's ability to process temporal dynamics. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on four public benchmarks: QVHighlights, Charades-STA, TACoS, and TVSum.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的综合时空表征学习框架（CoSTL），能够结合图像级细粒度信息与时序动态，提升视频片段检索和高光片段检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频时刻检索和高光片段检测中主要依赖帧级特征进行时序建模，忽视了帧内与文本查询相关的丰富视觉信息，导致定位结果不准确。该工作旨在弥补这一不足。
AI.method: 提出CoSTL框架，包括文本驱动的渐进式细粒度图像编码器和多尺度时序感知模块。编码器通过两步提取与文本相关的细粒度空间表征，时序模块用于捕获全面的时空动态特征。
AI.result: 在四个公开基准数据集（QVHighlights、Charades-STA、TACoS、TVSum）上取得了最新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: CoSTL能够有效结合时空信息，提升视频内容定位与相关度评估的准确性，是视频分析领域的有力工具。

title: EvoPool: Evolutionary Programmatic Annotation for Label-Efficient Specialized Supervision
summary: Large language models excel at general tasks but underperform smaller supervised models in specialized, high-stakes domains where training labels are costly. We address this regime with EvoPool, an evolutionary multi-agent framework inspired by Darwinian evolution. Three specialized agents iteratively propose executable annotator code, a small validation set provides a fitness signal, and a deterministic gate keeps only annotators that pass viability, diversity, and marginal-contribution checks across generations. Pool votes are mapped to soft training labels by EvoAgg, a text-aware aggregator combining semantic features with annotator-vote features. The authored pool runs at near-zero per-example cost and is 4500 to 31000x faster than LLM annotation on 100K examples. Across 7 of 8 LLM-weak specialized and complex tasks spanning biomedical relation extraction, legal-clause classification, complex reasoning, and dense multi-label biomedical classification, EvoPool beats the strongest LLM annotation baseline by an average +0.141 macro-F1, peaking at +0.301 on ChemProt and +0.265 on PubMed. Code is available at: https://github.com/tianyi0216/EvoPool

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoPool框架，通过进化多智能体方法，自动产生高质量标注器，极大提升了专用高风险领域任务的训练标签效率和模型表现。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽通用性强，但在如生物医疗、法律等高风险且标注昂贵的专业领域，往往不及较小的有监督模型。如何低成本高效获取高质量训练标签，是提升这些领域模型性能的关键难题。
AI.method: 作者设计了EvoPool——一个受达尔文进化启发的多智能体框架。多个专用agent生成可执行标注代码，通过小规模验证集获得适应度信号，经过生存、差异性和边际贡献的筛选迭代进化。最终，多agent的标注结果经EvoAgg聚合器整合，用于给大量数据赋软标签。
AI.result: EvoPool每例几乎零成本，标注速度比LLM快4500到31000倍。在7个专业细分高难任务上，EvoPool平均宏F1超最强LLM基线0.141，部分任务峰值提升高达0.301。
AI.conclusion: EvoPool实现了高效且高质量的数据自动标注，显著优于主流LLM标注方式，并有望大幅降低专用领域的数据标注成本。

title: HiTokSR: A Coarse-to-Fine Tokenizer with Hierarchical Codebooks for High-Fidelity Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Vector-quantized (VQ) generative models have shown promising results in real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR). However, existing methods typically rely on a monolithic latent space that entangles low-frequency structures with high-frequency textures. This entanglement forces a single codebook to capture a combinatorially complex set of structure-texture pairings, which constrains representational capacity and limits codebook utilization. To address this issue, we present HiTokSR, a hierarchical token prediction framework. Instead of using a single codebook, HiTokSR partitions the latent space along the channel dimension into frequency-aware groups, quantizing each with an independent sub-codebook. This coarse-to-fine design disentangles global structures from fine details, enhancing combinatorial expressiveness while circumventing the optimization instability of high-dimensional nearest-neighbor lookups. To further improve semantic consistency, our generator integrates priors from a vision foundation model via adaptive feature modulation, multi-scale class tokens, and a representation alignment loss. Additionally, we introduce an index-level perturbation strategy during decoder fine-tuning to bridge the train-test discrepancy in discrete token prediction. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that HiTokSR achieves state-of-the-art performance in both perceptual quality and reconstruction fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了HiTokSR，一种用于图像超分辨率的分层token预测框架，通过将潜在空间按频率分组、独立量化，有效提升重建质量，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前VQ生成模型在图像超分辨率任务中表现优异，但由于仅依赖单一潜在空间和单一本码本，导致结构与纹理信息纠缠，限制了模型的表达能力和码本利用度。
AI.method: 作者提出HiTokSR框架，将潜在空间按通道分成不同频率群组，每组独立使用子码本量化信息，从而分离结构与细节。模型还结合视觉基础模型的先验，通过自适应特征调制、多尺度类别token和表示对齐损失等提升语义一致性，并在解码器微调中引入index-level扰动，缓解训练与测试分布间差异。
AI.result: 在真实图像超分辨率基准测试上，HiTokSR在感知质量和重建精度上均达到最新水平，优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: HiTokSR通过分层token预测和频率分组量化，有效解耦结构与纹理，提升了码本表达能力和利用率，并在实际任务中取得了显著性能提升。

title: Benchmarking LLM-as-a-Judge for Long-Form Output Evaluation
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for long-form generation, reliably evaluating long-form outputs has become a critical challenge. LLM-as-a-judge offers a scalable alternative to human evaluation, yet its reliability in long-form output evaluation remains underexamined: existing meta-evaluation benchmarks focus mainly on short-form outputs. Compared with short-form evaluation, long-form evaluation is not merely a matter of output length; it often requires judges to handle more complex document-level demands. In this work, we introduce LongJudgeBench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLM judges on long-form outputs across diverse real-world scenarios and judging protocols. We systematically evaluate a broad range of LLM judges, covering multiple base models and judging settings. Our results reveal a substantial reliability gap: current LLM judges remain unstable across scenarios, and rubrics or references are helpful but not always sufficient. We hope LongJudgeBench will support future research on more robust, context-aware, and human-aligned LLM-as-a-judge methods. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LongJudgeBench-F782.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于评测大语言模型(LLM)判官在长文本生成任务中的表现的新基准LongJudgeBench，发现目前LLM判官对于复杂长文本的评价稳定性较差，现有方法有局限。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM广泛用于长文本生成，对其生成内容的准确评估成为关键挑战。目前以模型为判官的自动化评测虽具扩展性，但其在长文本输出场景下的可靠性还缺乏系统检验，且现有主流评测多聚焦于短文本。
AI.method: 作者设计了LongJudgeBench，一个涵盖多种真实应用场景和评判规范的基准，用于系统性测试不同基础模型与评判设置下LLM判官对长文本输出的评测性能。
AI.result: 实验发现，当前LLM判官在不同场景下的表现波动大，稳定性不足。使用评判准则或参考答案有一定帮助，但无法保证评价的一致性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: LongJudgeBench揭示了LLM判官在长文本评估方面存在显著可靠性缺口，可作为推动更稳健、符合真实需求的自动评价模型发展的重要工具。

title: Towards Interactive Video World Modeling: Frontiers, Challenges, Benchmarks, and Future Trends
comment: Under review. The GitHub repository is publicly available at: https://github.com/liujiuming123/Awesome-Interactive-World-Model
summary: With rapid development of large language models and diffusion-based content generation, world modeling has attracted increasing research attention, benefiting various downstream domains such as game engines, embodied AI, autonomous driving, etc. Through explicitly incorporating user actions into world state transition, recent literature empowers world modeling with interactivity in an action-conditioned video or 3D generation paradigm, further enhancing controllability over world evolutions and facilitating users to freely traverse, manipulate, navigate, and personalize the state evolution. In this paper, we aim to systematically review recent research trends, technical developments, evaluation benchmarks, and also propose future potential directions in interactive world modeling. Specifically, we first summarize recent efforts and trends in terms of application scenarios, world state evolution, and scene modality. Afterwards, we delve into three crucial technical challenges, including action-conditioned controllability, long-horizon interactions and memory, and action-following responsiveness for real-time interactivity. Furthermore, we also thoroughly compare existing benchmarks and metrics in four specific application fields: open-world exploration, game engine, autonomous driving, and robotics. Finally, we discuss several promising future directions in achieving next-generation interactive world modeling. The corresponding repository is publicly available at: https://github.com/liujiuming123/Awesome-Interactive-World-Model.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地综述了近年来交互式世界建模的发展趋势、技术进展及评测基准，并展望了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型和扩散模型的发展，世界建模逐渐成为支持游戏引擎、具身智能和自动驾驶等多领域的关键技术，而现有文献通过引入用户动作，实现了对虚拟世界演化的更强可控性，亟需系统性的调研总结。
AI.method: 作者首先总结了交互式世界建模的应用场景、状态演变和场景模态等最新进展，进一步深入分析了受控性、长时分交互与记忆、实时响应等三大技术难点，并对当前主要应用领域（开放世界、游戏引擎、自动驾驶、机器人）的基准与指标进行了系统对比。
AI.result: 系统梳理并分析了技术发展现状，归纳了交互世界建模关键挑战，对比了不同场景与评测体系，提供了领域发展全景视角。
AI.conclusion: 交互式世界建模正处于快速发展阶段，未来需围绕增强可控性、扩展交互时长、提升实时响应能力等方向继续攻关，以推进下一代智能世界建模技术。

title: AlphaToken: Decoupling Adaptation and Stability for Path-Aware Response Token Valuation in LLM Post-Training
summary: Token selection is pivotal for effective LLM post-training. However, existing methods mostly rely on local heuristics and rarely formulate token selection as a principled valuation of individual response tokens. We introduce $\textbf{AlphaToken}$, a response token valuation framework that decouples valuation into $\textbf{adaptation}$ (promoting target-task learning) and $\textbf{stability}$ (preserving pre-trained capabilities), and makes each objective $\textbf{path-aware}$ by combining the direct-path signal from local token gradients with the downstream causal-path signal in autoregressive generation. Since retention data are typically unavailable, AlphaToken approximates stability via a $\textbf{Fisher-drift proxy}$ anchored at the pre-trained reference model. For efficient computation, we extend Ghost Dot-Product to token-level valuation. AlphaToken masks low-value response tokens during fine-tuning and preference optimization, concentrating training signals on more valuable positions. Experiments show that AlphaToken improves post-training performance and mitigates catastrophic forgetting.

AI.tldr: AlphaToken提出了更为系统和高效的LLM标记选择框架，通过分解和量化“适应性”及“稳定性”，提升后训练表现并减轻灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM训练中，如何挑选和分配训练信号给不同token主要依靠经验法则，缺乏理论依据，也未充分权衡新任务适应和原能力保留。作者意在提出更系统的分值评估方法，实现高效的token筛选。
AI.method: AlphaToken将token价值度量分解为适应性（促进目标任务学习）和稳定性（保持预训练能力），综合局部梯度（直接路径）和因果推理路径（下游路径）信号。缺乏保留数据时，用Fisher-drift proxy近似稳定性；为高效实现，扩展Ghost Dot-Product到token级别。训练时mask低价值token，集中优化高价值位置。
AI.result: 实验表明，AlphaToken能显著提升模型后训练表现，并在训练新任务时减少灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: AlphaToken为LLM训练中token筛选提供了原理性方案，不仅提升训练效率和性能，还兼顾对模型原有知识的保护，具备实际应用价值。

title: Reusing Fusion-Time Spectral Reliability for Adaptive Fusion and Expert Routing in RGB-Infrared Object Detection
summary: RGB-infrared detectors typically discard the statistics generated during cross-modal fusion, leaving downstream modules unaware of whether the current interaction is reliable. We propose to extract a parameter-free, 7-dimensional spectral reliability descriptor -- summarizing band energy, amplitude ratio, phase consistency, and cross-modal correlation -- and to reuse it beyond the fusion stage. The descriptor drives both Spectral Reliability Fusion (SRF), which gates a spectral residual against a conservative spatial base, and Reliability-Conditioned Expert Routing (RCER), which combines the descriptor with pooled content to steer sparse post-fusion experts. Under matched ablations, descriptor-aware gating improves mAP50 over content-only adaptive gating; a $2{\times}2$ factorial analysis further shows that descriptor-conditioned routing provides the larger marginal gain over expert architecture alone at near-equal parameter count. Under six synthetic degradations on DroneVehicle, average retention rises to 95.0%, versus 92.0% for content-only MoE and 87.9% for concatenation, with the largest gain under modality drop; the same model also improves mAP50 by +5.2/+5.3 on the natural day/night split. These results suggest that preserving fusion-time reliability as an explicit signal benefits both adaptive fusion and post-fusion conditional computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在RGB-红外跨模态融合检测中，保留并利用融合阶段的可靠性统计特征，通过无参数的7维频谱可靠性描述符提升后续模块性能，从而显著提升抗干扰能力与检测精度。
AI.motivation: 以往RGB-红外检测器在模态融合阶段，未考虑保留和利用融合过程中各模态间的可靠性信息，导致下游任务难以自适应当前融合结果的可靠性，影响复杂环境下的表现。
AI.method: 提出7维的频谱可靠性描述符（包含带能量、幅度比、相位一致性、跨模态相关性等），并将其在融合后分两步使用：1）光谱可靠性融合，利用描述符对融合特征进行门控，2）可靠性条件专家路由，将描述符与内容特征共同引导专家网络分配。与现有内容自适应门控和专家结构做对比实验与消融分析。
AI.result: 带描述符的门控提升了mAP50，描述符条件专家路由对比单纯专家结构有显著增益；在6种合成退化场景下检测保真率提升至95.0%（显著高于对比组）；自然日夜场景中mAP50提升5.2/5.3点。
AI.conclusion: 融合可靠性作为显式信号保存和利用，可同时提升自适应融合和后级条件计算两方面性能，有助于跨模态检测系统鲁棒性和检测精度。

title: Easier to Mislead Than to Correct: Harmful and Beneficial Revision in LLM Conformity
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in multi-agent systems, where they see and respond to other agents' answers. A key risk is conformity: a model may abandon its own answer simply because others agree on a different one. Prior studies show that LLMs often revise toward a majority answer, but it remains unclear whether these revisions help correct mistakes as often as they introduce new errors. In this paper, we conduct a controlled study in which an LLM first answers a question, then sees simulated peer responses before making a final decision. We manipulate two social cues: consensus structure and authority labels assigned to peers, and measure how they influence beneficial and harmful revisions. Across four open-weight LLMs and seven QA datasets, we find that peer agreement makes it much easier to mislead initially correct models than to correct initially wrong ones. Authority labels make models more likely to choose the endorsed answer, regardless of whether it is correct. More concerningly, generic reasoning interventions such as chain-of-thought and reflection do not reliably reduce harmful revision while preserving beneficial revision. These findings suggest that multi-agent LLM systems should verify peer answers rather than simply aggregate them.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大模型在多智能体系统中容易受到同伴答案的一致性和权威标签的影响，容易被误导做出错误修改，而常用的推理干预并不能有效避免这一风险。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型（LLMs）在多智能体环境中应用，模型常常需要看到其他代理的答案并做出响应。但模型会否因为大多数同伴答案不同而轻易改变自身本来正确的回答？这种“从众效应”背后的好坏影响尚不清楚。
AI.method: 设计受控实验：LLM先独立回答问题，再观察到模拟的同伴回答（可调整一致性结构与权威标签），最后做出最终答复。使用4种开源大模型和7个问答数据集，分别统计同伴因素对正确和错误修正的影响。
AI.result: 同伴一致性更容易导致模型放弃原本正确答案（被误导），而难以纠正其错误答案。权威标签让模型不论答案对错都倾向采纳权威立场。常见推理方法（如思维链、反思）不能有效减少错误修正。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体大模型系统不能只简单汇总同伴答案，而应构建机制对答案进行核查以降低从众导致的错误风险。

title: PairedGTA: Generating Driving Datasets for Controlled Photometric Shift Analysis
summary: Evaluating the performance of visual perception systems for autonomous driving is essential to ensure reliable operation across diverse environmental scenarios. Ideally, a balanced and fair analysis across different adverse conditions would require perfectly paired images of the same scene under different weather or illumination changes. This would allow evaluating the effect of photometric shifts independently of geometry and semantic changes. Unfortunately, real-world datasets rarely provide images of the same scene under different environmental conditions, because, normally, camera pose, traffic, and locations of dynamic objects (vehicles, pedestrians, etc.) vary over time, thus yielding only coarsely paired data. To address this challenge, this work introduces a data generation framework based on a high-fidelity game engine for extracting perfectly paired images. By leveraging software APIs that communicate with the GTA game engine, the framework modifies illumination and weather conditions while preserving scene geometry, camera pose, and the identity and placement of dynamic objects. For each sampled location, it procedurally instantiates dynamic entities and renders pixel-aligned images under diverse adverse conditions. The benefit of the proposed generation framework in driving scenarios is demonstrated through a systematic analysis of semantic segmentation models, whose output degradation can be attributed more directly to photometric shifts rather than to uncontrolled semantic or geometric factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高保真游戏引擎的数据生成框架，用于自动驾驶视觉系统评测，在保持场景几何和动态对象不变的情况下，生成不同光照和天气条件下的配对图像。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据很难获得在相同场景下不同环境条件（如光照、天气）下的完全配对图像，由于相机位置、交通流和动态物体变化，这使得对视觉系统在恶劣环境下的公正评测极具挑战。
AI.method: 利用GTA高保真游戏引擎开发API，通过修改光照和天气设置，同时保持场景几何、相机位姿、及动态物体身份和位置完全一致，从而为每个采样地点程序化地生成不同环境下的像素级对齐配对图像。
AI.result: 利用该框架，能系统性地分析语义分割模型对恶劣环境（如不同光照、天气等）的性能退化情况，这些退化主要归因于光照/天气变化而非几何或语义因素。
AI.conclusion: 新提出的生成框架为视觉系统在自动驾驶环境下的可靠性评测提供了更公正、精确的手段，有助于单独分析光度变化带来的影响。

title: When Meaning Travels: A Granular Lens on Hybrid-MoE's Role in Idiomatic Understanding for Language Models
summary: In the contemporary epoch of multilingual education, learning idioms provides a fascinating gateway towards creativity, cultural values, historical context, and diverse perspectives inherent to various linguistic traditions. This paper showcases the navigation of retaining figurative and cultural semantics in low-resource Southeast Asian languages such as Hindi, Bengali, and Thai, where culturally rich idioms pose significant obstacles for computational modeling and cross-linguistic transfer due to their deep metaphorical complexity. To tackle such complexity, we present Varnika, a reconstructed multimodal idiom corpus comprising 3,533 multilingual idioms, enriched with seven idiomatic tones aligned with both textual and visual representations. Additionally, to infer informative idiomatic understanding, we introduce a Hybrid Mixture-of-Experts (HybridMoE) framework that embeds multiple idiomatic expert opinions while mitigating expert sparsity by integrating outputs from both selected and unselected experts through controlled hybridization, further augmented with Idiomatic Property Signals via masked multimodal embeddings. To analyze the performance across multiple dimensions, we propose the IDIO-TONE and Idiomatic Validation Score, a three-stage evaluation pipeline measuring (i) literal translation fidelity, (ii) visual-semantic alignment, and (iii) idiomatic meaning retention. Empirical evaluations highlight that HybridMoE achieves 5--6\% performance gains across advanced vision language models, demonstrating improved representation of figurative language and culturally embedded meaning in multilingual multimodal settings

AI.tldr: 本文关注于低资源东南亚语言中的习语建模，提出了多模态习语语料库Varnika和HybridMoE框架，实现了更好的习语语义和文化信息建模。
AI.motivation: 东南亚等低资源语言中的习语富含文化和隐喻，但因资源缺乏和语义复杂，难以用现有的计算方法进行建模、翻译和迁移，因此需要新的数据和方法来提升对这些习语的理解与表示。
AI.method: 1. 构建包含3,533条多语种习语的Varnika多模态习语语料库，结合文本和图像，并标注7种语气。2. 提出HybridMixture-of-Experts (HybridMoE) 框架，融合多种专家观点，通过混合选中和未选专家的输出，并引入习语属性信号与多模态嵌入。3. 设计IDIO-TONE与Idiomatic Validation Score三阶段体系，从字面翻译、视语对齐和语义保留三个维度评估表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，HybridMoE在先进视觉语言模型上提升5-6%的多语种多模态习语建模性能，特别在习语的比喻性和文化语义理解方面表现更好。
AI.conclusion: Varnika语料库和HybridMoE方法有效提升了对低资源多语种习语的理解能力，为多语种、跨文化习语的自动建模和应用提供了新的工具和思路。

title: Feature Alignment Determines Fusion Strategy: A Comparative Study of Cross-Attention and Concatenation in Multimodal Learning
summary: The choice between cross-attention and concatenation for multimodal fusion remains governed by practitioner intuition rather than principled understanding. In this paper, we demonstrate that feature alignment quality, not data scale alone, is the primary determinant of which fusion strategy excels. Through controlled experiments on Flickr8k using two feature extraction backbones (ResNet18 and CLIP ViT-B/32), we show that concatenation outperforms cross-attention by 4.1-5.1 percentage points across all tested scales (2048-16384 samples) when features are pre-aligned by a vision-language pretraining objective. We provide a theoretical explanation grounded in sample complexity analysis: concatenation requires O(d_v + d_t) samples to learn its fusion projection, while cross-attention requires O(d_v * d_t) samples to learn bilinear attention weights, over 256 times as many for 512-dimensional CLIP features. When features are already aligned, the approximation error gap between the two methods vanishes, and concatenation's sample efficiency dominates at all practical dataset sizes. An alignment degradation study confirms a monotonic trend: as feature alignment degrades, concatenation's advantage grows from 1.3% to 2.8%. These findings provide a principled decision framework for fusion method selection in multimodal systems, with direct implications for the design of Multimodal Large Language Models.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了多模态融合中cross-attention和concatenation两种主流方式的优劣，提出在特征对齐质量高时，拼接方式更高效，并给出了理论解释。
AI.motivation: 过去关于cross-attention与concatenation选择主要凭经验，缺乏理论指导。当前多模态系统设计需更深入理解不同特征融合方法的适用场景。
AI.method: 在Flickr8k数据集上，结合ResNet18和CLIP ViT-B/32两种特征提取主干，通过精心控制实验，比较两种融合方式在不同特征对齐质量和数据规模下的表现，并结合样本复杂度分析进行理论解释。
AI.result: 当特征经过视觉-语言预训练对齐后，无论数据规模如何，concatenation比cross-attention高出4.1-5.1%；理论上，拼接对于样本需求远低于交叉注意力。特征未对齐时两者差距缩小，且随着对齐程度下降，拼接优势逐渐增加。（优势扩大1.3%到2.8%）
AI.conclusion: 特征对齐质量而非数据规模决定了多模态融合方法的优劣。对于已对齐特征，拼接明显更高效；特征对齐度降时其优势更明显。本研究为多模态系统的融合方式选择提供了理论依据和设计建议。

title: Why Do Self-Harm Prediction Models Struggle to Generalise? Lexical and Semantic Variations in Emergency Department Triage Notes
summary: Self-harm presentations to emergency departments (EDs) are strongly associated with higher suicide risk. NLP models have shown robust performance in detecting self-harm from triage notes within single hospitals, yet performance often declines across institutions. To examine potential causes, we compare ED triage notes from two hospitals by analyzing lexical characteristics, highly associated predictive features, and salient topics. Our results reveal variation in lexical expression and feature importance related to self-harm across hospitals, despite consistent core themes such as self-poisoning and self-injury. These documentation differences are associated with reduced cross-site performance. Our findings provide insight into how institutional variation affects the identification of self-harm in clinical text and highlight potential methods to improve model generalisability.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了两个医院急诊分诊记录中自伤相关文本的差异，并探讨这些差异对自然语言处理（NLP）模型跨机构泛化能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 急诊分诊记录中自伤行为的识别对于预防自杀至关重要，但现有NLP模型在单一医院表现良好，却在不同机构间表现下降。作者希望探究跨机构表现下降的原因。
AI.method: 作者对两个医院的急诊分诊记录进行对比，分析词汇特征、高关联预测特征及主题内容，比较自伤记录在不同医院中的表述和特征差异。
AI.result: 结果发现，虽然两家医院有关自伤的核心主题（如自我中毒与自伤）一致，但词汇表达和关键特征存在显著差异，这些文档差异导致了模型跨医院泛化能力下降。
AI.conclusion: 医院之间的文本记录差异会显著影响NLP模型对自伤行为的识别和泛化能力。改进模型泛化性能需关注不同机构间的文本表达差异。

title: TECCI: Tricky Edits of Collected and Curated Images
summary: Despite tremendous recent progress, current text-guided image editing methods still struggle with many aspects of editing involving instruction following, minimally editing the source image, and ensuring high visual quality. These problems are especially apparent when the requested edit is challenging, such as those that involve position, motion, viewpoint, scale and creative edits. To systematically test generative image editors, we propose a novel image editing benchmark -- TECCI: Tricky Edits of Collected and Curated Images. TECCI consists of a completely new set of images we are releasing. The images in TECCI span 7 image categories. The images and these categories were curated intentionally to target weaknesses of existing methods. The edit instructions in TECCI are automatically generated by Gemini, covering 5 edit types per source image. We also curated a set of 530 images for which we created challenging manually written edit instructions. Overall, TECCI contains 7550 pairs of images and edit instructions. We conduct human evaluations of five leading image editing models on TECCI. Humans judge outputs along three dimensions: 1) instruction following, 2) minimality of the edits, and 3) visual quality. To scale-up the evaluation, we also build an auto-rater using Gemini that achieves 74.7% accuracy in matching human evaluations. Our evaluations reveal that: 1) none of the models exceed a 22% overall success rate, demonstrating the challenging nature of TECCI, 2) Nano Banana Pro is the best performing model overall, 3) models perform significantly better at instruction following compared to minimal edits and visual quality, 4) models struggle with editing architecture and nature images which require strong understanding of spatial layout and intricate visual details. 5) reasoning and creative edits are the most difficult, whereas color and appearance edits are the easiest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为TECCI的新图像编辑基准，专门用于评估文本指导下的图像编辑模型在复杂编辑任务中的表现，发现现有方法在高难度编辑上表现有限。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导的图像编辑方法面对涉及位置、运动、视角、比例及创造性编辑常常表现不佳，尤其是在遵循指令、最小化对原图的编辑和保持高视觉质量等方面。作者希望通过创建一个专门评测这些薄弱环节的新基准，推动领域进步。
AI.method: 作者推出了TECCI基准，该数据集包含7类图像和共计7550个图像及编辑指令对。其中有530幅图配有手工撰写的更具挑战性的编辑指令，编辑指令主要由Gemini自动生成。并对五种主流图像编辑模型在该基准上进行人工三维度（遵循指令、编辑最小性、视觉质量）和自动化（由Gemini构建）评测。
AI.result: 1. 没有模型的总体成功率超过22%，TECCI极具挑战性；2. Nano Banana Pro表现最佳；3. 各模型在指令遵循上表现优于编辑最小性和视觉质量；4. 架构及自然类图像的高阶空间与细节处理难度大；5. 推理和创造性编辑最难，色彩/外观编辑最容易。
AI.conclusion: TECCI公开后，有望成为衡量复杂图像编辑能力的新标准。现有模型在复杂编辑任务上的表现距离令人满意仍有显著差距，未来需在最小编辑、视觉质量及理解复杂指令等方面进一步提升。

title: Encoded but Not Routed: Explaining the Table-Chart Gap in Scientific Claim Verification
summary: Multimodal LLMs are increasingly used to assist scientific peer review, where a core requirement is verifying whether claims in a paper are supported by its evidence. Prior work has shown that models perform substantially better at this task when the evidence is a table than when it is a chart of the same underlying data. This raises the question of whether models fail to extract information from charts, or do they extract it but fail to use it when forming their prediction? We study this question through layer-wise linear probing and attention analysis on three open-weight VLMs over table and chart evidence, representing the same underlying data. We find consistent evidence for the latter. Chart information is encoded in the models' intermediate representations but does not reach the prediction position, a gap that is absent for tables and holds across all conditions tested. Attention analysis further reveals that this disconnect takes two architecturally distinct forms across model families. These findings reframe the table-chart gap as a failure of how encoded visual information is routed at prediction time, rather than a failure of encoding itself.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模态大模型（VLMs）在科学同行评议中，对表格和图表证据理解支持声明的表现差异，并揭示出模型虽然能编码图表信息，但在预测时未能有效利用它，形成了表格与图表之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在科学评审中需要核查论文中的声明是否由证据支持。此前研究表明模型在处理表格证据时表现较好，而面对相同数据转为图表时表现较差，激发了作者探究模型到底无法从图表中提取信息，还是提取后在推理时没有有效利用。
AI.method: 作者通过对三种开源视觉语言模型（VLM）的层级线性探查和注意力分析，对比了模型在处理相同数据组成的表格与图表时的表征方式，研究了信息在模型内部的编码与传递路径。
AI.result: 研究发现，模型对图表的信息在中间表征中已经编码，但是在做最终预测时，这些信息没有被有效利用，预测用到的表征未能反映图表内容。而表格则不存在此问题，这一现象在所有测试条件下均成立。同时，不同架构的VLM在信息传递断裂上表现出两种不同的模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文重新定义了表格与图表证据处理能力差异的本质——不是编码失败，而是预测阶段视觉信息路由失败。这为改进模型在图表推理上的能力提供了新方向。

title: Distilling Neuro-Symbolic Programs into 3D Multi-modal LLMs
summary: Current 3D spatial reasoning methods face a fundamental trade-off: neuro-symbolic 3D (NS3D) concept learners achieve interpretable reasoning through compositional programs but are constrained to closed-set concept vocabularies and simple programs; end-to-end 3D multi-modal LLMs (3D MLLMs) could handle complex natural language and open-vocabulary concepts but suffer from black-box reasoning without explicit spatial verification. We introduce APEIRIA, a neuro-symbolic 3D MLLM to bridge two paradigms by distilling symbolic reasoning patterns into MLLMs with natural language chain-of-thought. Our three-stage curriculum progressively builds reasoning capabilities: a) 3D perception alignment grounds object visual-geometric features to the LLM, b) CoT-SFT teaches query decomposition and stepwise verification from symbolic program traces, and c) CoT-RL extends reasoning patterns to open-set concepts and deeply nested instructions. By transferring reasoning patterns rather than concept-specific knowledge, APEIRIA preserves key NS3D virtues: transparent reasoning and modular interchangeability of planning and perception components. Evaluations on grounding, question answering, and captioning show that APEIRIA surpasses prior NS3D methods and matches state-of-the-art 3D MLLMs on 3D spatial reasoning datasets, unifying symbolic methods' systematic reasoning with MLLMs' flexibility. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/APEIRIA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型神经符号3D多模态大模型（APEIRIA），通过融合符号推理和大模型链式思维，推动3D空间推理领域，兼具可解释性和开放词汇推理能力，实现了性能和泛化能力的双提升。
AI.motivation: 现有3D空间推理方法存在取舍：神经符号方法可解释但仅限于封闭词汇和简单任务，而端到端的多模态大模型能处理开放自然语言却缺乏推理透明度。迫切需要一种方法，兼顾符号方法的可解释性和大模型的灵活性。
AI.method: 提出APEIRIA，通过三阶段课程学习：（a）3D感知对齐，绑定视觉几何特征和语言大模型；（b）利用链式思维微调（CoT-SFT），模仿符号推理规划过程；（c）基于强化学习（CoT-RL），推广到开放词汇和复杂指令。传递推理模式而非固定概念，实现规划与感知模块独立可替换。
AI.result: 在多个3D空间推理任务（定位、问答、描述）上，APEIRIA效果优于先前NS3D方法，且达到当前最优3D多模态大模型的水平。方法在系统性推理和灵活性之间实现统一。
AI.conclusion: APEIRIA有效融合了符号推理优势与大模型的开放性，提升了3D空间推理的性能和泛化能力，为未来3D智能系统提供了更具解释性和扩展性的解决方案。

title: Off-the-Shelf LLMs as Process Scorers: Training-Free Alternative to PRMs for Mathematical Reasoning
summary:
Selecting the best response from multiple small-model samples using a stronger scorer is a simple inference-time strategy, but fails when the small model has already committed to incorrect reasoning paths. PRM guided search avoids this by scoring candidate continuations during generation, but requires a reward model trained with step-level labels.
  We propose Chunk-Level Guided Generation, a training-free alternative that uses an off-the-shelf large language model as a process scorer. At each step, a small model samples k fixed-length candidate chunks, while the larger model scores the candidates using likelihoods without generating any text. The selected chunk is committed before the next step, steering generation before errors can propagate.
  We instantiate this framework with two selection rules: Likelihood-Guided Selection (LGS), which selects the chunk with the highest length-normalized large-model log-probability, and Contrastive-Guided Selection (CGS), which subtracts the small model's log-probability to favor chunks where the large model's preference diverges from the small model's. We show that scoring variable-length reasoning steps with large-model likelihoods is unreliable due to a systematic length bias that persists even after length normalization, and that fixed-length chunks avoid this confound.
  On GSM8K, MATH, Minerva Math, AMC23, and AIME24 with Qwen2.5-1.5B guided by Qwen2.5-32B and Llama-3.2-1B guided by Llama-3.1-70B, CGS outperforms majority voting by up to 28 pp and, under matched guidance budgets, matches or outperforms Qwen2.5-Math-PRM-72B guided search on most benchmarks without reward-model training. With Qwen2.5-7B guided by Qwen2.5-72B, CGS reaches 81.8% on MATH and 63.6% on Minerva Math at k=16, surpassing majority voting by 4--6 pp. Finally, Chunk-Level Guided Generation produces substantially shorter reasoning traces than PRM guided search.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种训练免疫的Chunk-Level Guided Generation方法，通过大模型对小模型生成的候选块进行评分，在生成过程中实时引导小模型，显著提升了推理质量且无需训练奖励模型。
AI.motivation: 多模型组合方法常用于优化小模型生成结果，但小模型一旦走入错误推理路径，传统方法无法挽回。已有的PRM guided search可在生成过程中修正错误，但需训练奖励模型，实际应用复杂，阻碍了推广。因而亟需一种更简便、无需训练奖励模型的引导策略。
AI.method: 提出Chunk-Level Guided Generation方法：在每个生成步骤，小模型生成若干等长候选块；大型语言模型仅对这些块进行似然评分并不生成文本。选取高分候选块后再进行下一步，避免错误推理链延续。文中给出了两种选择规则：1) LGS——选择大模型标准化后似然最高的块；2) CGS——更偏向大模型与小模型评分差异较大的块，从而充分利用大模型的信息优势，并避免长度偏置影响。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在多个推理与数学数据集上，小模型+大模型组合（如Qwen2.5-1.5B被Qwen2.5-32B引导，Llama-3.2-1B被Llama-3.1-70B引导）在CGS策略下可较majority voting提升最高28个百分点。在同等推理预算下，性能媲美或超越PRM guided search（无需奖励模型训练）。并且推理轨迹更短，更高效。
AI.conclusion: Chunk-Level Guided Generation是一种高效、实用、无需额外奖励模型训练的推理引导策略。通过逐步、块级引导，小模型在复杂推理任务上能够有效提升准确率，且方法简单，易于应用和扩展。

title: Analysis of Ethnic Disparities in Autism Spectrum Disorder among Toddlers
comment: Third International Conference Biomedical Engineering Science and technology
summary: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by challenges in communication and behavior. This study examines the relationship between ethnicity and ASD traits, along with behavioural scores, sex and neonatal jaundice across three ethnic groups: White Europeans, Asians, and Middle Eastern individuals. We perform a logistic regression and show that ethnicity has a significant effect on incidence of ASD. White Europeans are 81% increased risk of ASD and Middle Easterners are at 79\% reduced risk of ASD compared to Asians. We also confirm earlier studied which show that neonatal jaundice is a significant predictor of ASD, while male children are at much higher risk of ASD compared to female children. These results suggest the need for diagnostic frameworks and interventions that account for ethnic in the presentation and assessment of ASD traits

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了不同族群与自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）特征之间的关系，发现族群对于ASD的发病率有显著影响。
AI.motivation: ASD 的发病率在不同族群间有显著差异，理解这些差异有助于改进诊断和干预策略。
AI.method: 对三大族群（白人欧洲人、亚洲人和中东人）使用逻辑回归分析ASD发病率，结合行为评分、性别和新生儿黄疸等变量进行探讨。
AI.result: 与亚洲人相比，白人欧洲人ASD发病风险增加81%，中东人风险降低79%。新生儿黄疸和男性性别也分别是ASD显著的风险因子。
AI.conclusion: ASD的诊断与干预需结合族群差异，推动更有针对性的评估和应对措施。

title: RCEM: Embedder Equipped with Query Rewriting Skill for Robust Conversational Search in Distributional Shift
summary: Conversational search has become increasingly important in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, where users interact with AI assistants through multi-turn conversations containing context-dependent queries. We propose RCEM, a conversational dense retrieval model that distills the query reformulation capability of LLMs into the embedding model, enabling context-aware retrieval without explicit query rewriting during inference. Unlike prior conversational dense retrieval approaches that learn direct conversation-to-document matching, RCEM aligns conversational-query embeddings with rewritten-query embeddings, improving robustness under distributional shift. RCEM does not require conversational query-to-document relevance mappings for training, which are often expensive and difficult to obtain with high quality. Extensive experiments on QReCC, TopiOCQA, and TREC CAsT demonstrate that RCEM consistently outperforms strong conversational retrieval baselines, achieving particularly large gains under distributional shift, including up to 20% improvement in Recall@10. RCEM further extends the base embedding model with conversational query rewriting capability while preserving its original retrieval functionality, allowing both standalone and conversational queries to be encoded by a single model and searched against existing document indexes without rebuilding the retrieval database.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为RCEM的会话稠密检索模型，在无需显式查询重写的情况下，实现了支持多轮对话、上下文感知的检索，并在分布式偏移场景下有显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前的RAG系统需要对多轮对话中的上下文相关查询进行有效检索，现有方法往往依赖复杂且昂贵的训练数据（如会话查询到文档的相关性标注），且在分布式偏移时鲁棒性较差，迫切需要更高效、更稳健的会话检索方法。
AI.method: RCEM将大语言模型（LLM）的查询重写能力蒸馏到嵌入模型中，通过对齐会话查询与重写查询的嵌入，提升模型对上下文的感知能力且无需显式重写。训练不需要高质量的会话查询-文档相关性标注，仅用重写后的查询做监督。
AI.result: 在QReCC、TopiOCQA和TREC CAsT等主流公开数据集上，RCEM在检索效果（尤其是Recall@10）上大幅超过现有会话检索方法，在分布式偏移环境下最高提升达20%。
AI.conclusion: RCEM有效整合了查询重写能力与原始嵌入检索功能，可以同时支持独立和会话查询，不需要重建检索库，有效提升了实际部署的可扩展性与鲁棒性。

title: Where to Look: Can Foundation Models Reach a Target Viewpoint Through Active Exploration?
summary: Humans can reproduce the viewpoint specified by a target image through active head and body motion, yet spatial intelligence in foundation models has largely been studied as passive understanding of pre-collected observations. We introduce Target Viewpoint Reproduction (TVR) -- an active task where an agent adjusts its viewpoint in a 3D environment until its observation matches a given target image -- and TVRBench, an indoor-simulation benchmark spanning scene scale and target-view visual richness. TVR is far from solved: on the evaluation split, the strongest open-source and closed-source models reach only 7.8% and 12.0% success. Fine-grained analysis identifies two consistent bottlenecks: off-the-shelf models struggle with multi-turn visual history, and performance drops sharply when viewpoint reproduction requires body translation rather than in-place rotation, exposing a gap in mapping spatial discrepancies to embodied movement. To study reducing this gap, we build a unified TVR post-training framework covering expert-trajectory SFT, rationale-supervised CoT-SFT, offline Single-turn GRPO, and on-policy Multi-turn GRPO from live simulator rollouts. Visual-action SFT supplies the main gain, raising a 9B open-source model to 50.8% success; Multi-turn GRPO provides targeted multi-room refinement and reaches 51.4% overall, while CoT supervision and Single-turn GRPO degrade closed-loop performance. These results establish TVRBench as a testbed for measuring and training foundation models that actively perceive and act in 3D environments. Our code, data, and models are available at https://github.com/aim-uofa/TVRBench.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了主动空间智能任务Target Viewpoint Reproduction（TVR）及其基准测试集TVRBench，用以评测和提升模型在3D环境中依据目标图像调整视角的能力。实验显示，现有基础模型表现有限，通过提出的统一后训练框架显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在空间智能方面多为被动理解模式，很少关注主动在环境中探索与动作选择，更缺乏能够根据目标图像主动调整视角的能力，限制了模型在3D环境中感知和互动的能力。
AI.method: 提出TVR任务，让智能体通过头部和身体移动在3D环境中主动探索，以复现目标图像的视角，并构建了丰富的TVRBench基准。设计了包括专家轨迹SFT、推理监督CoT-SFT、离线单步GRPO和在线多步GRPO等统一后训练方法，全面测试不同增强措施对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 基准测试显示，现有开源、闭源模型成功率分别仅7.8%和12%。采用视觉-动作SFT后，9B开源模型成功率提升至50.8%；多步GRPO达到51.4%；而CoT-SFT与单步GRPO并未带来提升。多步历史和身体移动是当前模型主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: TVRBench构建了空间智能领域的重要测试平台，提出的统一后训练框架大幅提升了基础模型的主动感知与动作规划能力，有力促进了3D环境下主动探索型基金模型的进步。

title: Argument Collapse: LLMs Flatten Long-Form Public Debate
summary: As LLMs are increasingly used to draft public-facing arguments, they may flatten public debate by repeatedly introducing the same polished, plausible arguments. We study argument collapse, the tendency of essays generated by different LLMs to converge to a smaller set of main arguments, sub-arguments, and paragraph-level structures. We compare 1,039 human responses from 195 New York Times (NYT) debates, 448 human responses from 61 longer-form Boston Review (BR) forums, and 23,384 LLM-generated essays. In the NYT corpus, 65.3% of human main arguments are unique within a debate, compared to 3.4% of LLM main arguments. Asking LLMs to generate diverse answers adds variation, but a typical model recovers only about half of the distinct human main arguments, with much of the added variation falling outside the observed human argument space. Collapse also appears in sub-arguments, where among essays with the same main argument, 41.0% of human sub-arguments are unique versus 9.1% from LLM responses. Qualitatively, LLMs often reuse generalized and hedged sub-arguments, while humans prefer more concrete and topic-specific ones. Structure-wise, LLM-generated essays tend to follow a more fixed arc, often opening with a direct claim and moving quickly toward proposals. The same patterns hold in longer BR essays, suggesting that argument collapse extends beyond short-form responses.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型（LLM）在生成公开辩论观点时，常常导致“论点收敛”现象，即生成的多篇文章往往呈现出极为有限、重复的主要论点和结构，明显缺乏多样性。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地用于撰写公开辩论和意见陈述，作者担心这些工具会让原本多元的公共讨论变得单一乏味。本文意在实证考察人类和LLM生成的辩论文本在主论点、论据与结构上的多样性表现。
AI.method: 作者首先收集了195个纽约时报辩论的1,039份人类回应、61个Boston Review专题的448个人类回应，以及23,384篇LLM自动生成的文章。通过定量和定性对比分析每组文本中主要论点、子论点及段落结构的唯一性与分布，进一步分析LLM对引入多样性的能力。
AI.result: 在NYT辩论中，65.3%的人类主论点在同一场辩论下具有唯一性，而LLM仅有3.4%；子论点层面，41%的人类子论点为唯一，LLM为9.1%。即使通过提示增添多样性，LLM也只捕捉到约一半人类独特主论点。LLM更常采用概括、模糊的子论点和模式化的段落结构。长篇文章（BR数据集）也观察到类似现象。
AI.conclusion: 大模型生成的公开辩论文本存在明显的“论点收敛”问题，多样性大幅低于人类，主要体现在主要论点、子论点乃至文本结构上。LLM虽然可增加变体，但很难覆盖或模仿人类实际讨论的多元化。这一现象对用LLM参与或替代公共讨论提出了重要警示。

title: Exploiting In-Sensor Computing for Energy-Efficient Earth Observation
comment: Accepted at the XXIV Annual Conference on Sensors and Microsystems (AISEM) 2026
summary: The rapid growth of the satellite industry has driven a significant increase in geospatial data acquisition, highlighting a critical bottleneck: the severe disparity between the volume of collected sensor data and the limited downlink bandwidth available to ground stations. While On-Board Computing (OBC) has helped address this by pre-processing data in orbit, this article further advances the paradigm by introducing an in-sensor computing framework. We present an optimized end-to-end Earth Observation (EO) pipeline tailored for strict computational constraints by integrating TinyML techniques with the Sony IMX500 Intelligent Vision Sensor. Specifically, our approach shifts processing directly to the sensor level, offloading the computation from the primary embedded device, and effectively mitigating the downlink transmission of noisy or irrelevant data. We evaluated several efficient Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), i.e., SqueezeNet, ShuffleNetV2, and MCUNetV1, on the EuroSAT dataset. Experimental results show that, despite the optimizations required for deployment on the IMX500 platform, our models maintain a competitive 96.68% accuracy while operating within its 8 MB constraints. Specifically, the models reach an average processing throughput of 17.40 FPS with a latency of 27.43 ms. Furthermore, our system profile exhibits high energy efficiency, with a low energy footprint of 14.19 mJ per inference and an efficiency rating of 42.26 GMAC/J, demonstrating its viability for in-sensor deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于TinyML和智能视觉传感器（Sony IMX500）的端到端地球观测数据处理框架，将计算下沉至传感器层，显著减少了需下行传输的数据量，使地面带宽瓶颈问题得到缓解。
AI.motivation: 随着卫星行业扩张，采集到的大量遥感数据远超地面站带宽，成为瓶颈。此前虽有轨道端预处理（On-Board Computing），但仍亟需更高效的数据筛选和处理方法。
AI.method: 将高效的卷积神经网络（如SqueezeNet、ShuffleNetV2、MCUNetV1）与Sony IMX500智能传感器结合，实现TinyML模型在传感器端的直接推理，并优化模型，使其满足8MB内存限制和实时推理需求。
AI.result: 优化后的模型在EuroSAT数据集上达到96.68%准确率，平均每帧处理17.40 FPS，时延27.43 ms。能效表现优异，每次推理仅14.19 mJ，效率42.26 GMAC/J，充分展示其传感器端部署的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 将TinyML部署于智能传感器，能有效缓解卫星数据下行压力，提升能效并保证高精度，极具实际应用价值。

title: THRD: A Training-Free Multi-Turn Defense Framework for Jailbreak Attacks on Large Language Models
summary: Multi-turn jailbreak attacks pose a growing threat to LLMs by exploiting conversational dynamics such as gradual escalation and cross-turn coordination. Existing defenses either rely on costly retraining -- often degrading model utility -- or apply single-turn analysis independently at each turn, failing to capture how risk accumulates along interaction trajectories. We observe that safety behavior in multi-turn interaction is trajectory-dependent: dialogue history continuously reshapes the model's conditioning context, making it insufficient to evaluate each turn in isolation. Motivated by this insight, we present THRD, the first training-free framework that explicitly models temporal risk accumulation for multi-turn jailbreak defense. THRD integrates four modules: a Turn-level Risk Assessor (TRA) for instantaneous risk estimation, a Historical Context Analyzer (HCA) for cross-turn intent escalation detection, a Response Evaluator (RE) for identifying facilitative outputs, and a Decision Module that combines these signals through a time-evolving scoring mechanism with attenuation-based modulation and trend-aware adjustment. Experiments against state-of-the-art multi-turn attacks -- including tree-search-based and multi-agent collaborative methods -- across two target models show that THRD reduces ASR to 0.2--4.0% while preserving model utility within 1.5% degradation on MMLU and GSM8K. Ablation studies confirm non-redundant module contributions and stable cross-architecture generalization. Analysis of first rejection triggers reveals that over 70% of multi-turn attacks require Turn~2 or later to detect, validating the necessity of explicit temporal aggregation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了THRD框架，一种无需额外训练即可防御多轮（multi-turn）Jailbreak攻击的大语言模型（LLMs）安全方案，有效捕捉对话过程中的累积风险，显著提升安全性且对模型性能影响极小。
AI.motivation: 多轮Jailbreak攻击通过对话逐步升级和跨轮协作越来越有效，而现有防御方法无法有效捕捉对话全程的风险积累，要么成本高要么无法解决历史信息影响。作者认为多轮对话的安全表现依赖于整条对话轨迹，单轮分析并不够，因此需要一种能够考虑历史对话影响的新方法。
AI.method: 提出THRD框架，包括逐轮风险评估器、历史上下文分析器、响应评估器和决策模块，组合实现实时、趋势感知的风险评分。该框架无需额外训练，通过融合每轮和历史对话信息，捕捉风险的累计和意图的升级，实现对多轮攻击的专门防御。
AI.result: 在对两种主流大模型的多轮攻击测试中，THRD将攻击成功率（ASR）降低至0.2-4.0%，同时MMLU和GSM8K等基准模型性能损失控制在1.5%以内。消融实验验证了各模块的必要性，跨模型泛化性好。进一步分析证明对话需要多轮风险累积才可检测，大部分攻击在第2轮及之后才被拦截。
AI.conclusion: THRD有效解决了多轮对话中风险累积对LLMs安全性的挑战，无需重新训练即显著提升了现有模型的防御能力，并兼顾了性能和安全性，为多轮安全防御提供了新的思路。

title: Event-Based Vision in Space: Applications, Trends, and Future Directions
comment: Accepted at the XXIV Annual Conference on Sensors and Microsystems (AISEM) 2026
summary: Earth Observation (EO) is undergoing a significant transformation driven by the deployment of novel sensing technologies. Traditional frame-based optical sensors often struggle with motion blur, high power consumption, and extreme data redundancy in challenging orbital environments. In contrast, event-based sensors, also known as neuromorphic cameras, offer a bio-inspired asynchronous approach. By capturing only local illumination changes, they provide microsecond temporal resolution, an extremely high dynamic range, and exceptional energy efficiency. Although the use of these sensors is rapidly expanding from terrestrial systems to orbital platforms, the scientific literature surrounding their space-based applications remains heavily fragmented. To bridge this gap, this article presents a comprehensive review of the state-of-the-art in event-based vision in the space domain. Based on the retrieved literature, we introduce a taxonomy structured around four primary domains: 1) atmospheric and high-speed observation; 2) environmental monitoring and change detection; 3) operational support and onboard processing; and 4) geospatial modeling and predictive analysis. As a result, this survey highlights that neuromorphic engineering is far more than a supplementary imaging technique; it is a paradigm shift that can be used to directly address critical bottlenecks in modern remote sensing and sustainable space exploration.

AI.tldr: 随着新型传感技术的发展，地球观测（EO）领域发生了重大变化。本文系统综述了类脑（事件型）视觉在空间遥感中的最新进展，强调其将对遥感与空间探索带来范式转变。
AI.motivation: 传统帧式光学传感器在轨道环境中存在运动模糊、高能耗和数据冗余等问题，需要寻找更优的传感方案。类脑事件型传感器通过仅捕获局部光照变化，能显著提升时域分辨率、动态范围和能效。
AI.method: 本文通过收集和梳理相关文献，将空间领域的事件型视觉应用划分为大气与高速观测、环境监测与变化检测、任务支持与板载处理、地理建模与预测分析四个主要类别，进行系统性综述与分析。
AI.result: 该综述揭示了类脑传感器在提升测量时效性、动态范围、能效与空间遥感任务适应性等方面的突出优势，系统总结了其在不同空间遥感场景下的应用进展及代表性工作。
AI.conclusion: 事件型视觉技术不仅是传统成像技术的有效补充，更是推动遥感领域突破关键瓶颈、实现可持续空间探索的重要范式转变。

title: Construction of Historical Knowledge Graphs Based on BERT and Graph Neural Networks
summary: Through digital humanities research and scale-up historical data analysis, a significant amount of traditional historical text is converted into structured knowledge graphs. This paper provides a high-level architecture that combines bidirectional encoder representations of transformers (BERT) and graph neural networks (GNN) to extract the entities and relationships from various types of historical texts. The texts of traditional history resolve linguistic ambiguities, references limited by context, and a lack of established grammatical norms in a systematic way. This study develops a new image retrieval system based on FastRQNet and pre-trained vision-language model Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet in accordance with the aforementioned recommendations. The experiments make full use of a comprehensive collection of municipal records, parliamentary documents, and historical correspondence. When compared to conventional rule-based techniques and other popular deep-learning baselines, the joint BERT-GNN system obtains greater Precision, Recall, and F1-score (Table 2). Complex nested structures and implicit reference issues can be handled by this structure with sufficient accuracy and thoroughness when creating knowledge graphs. The aforementioned experiments show that combining relational graph learning algorithms with context-sensitive semantic representation techniques can automatically extract historical data to add accumulated wisdom to the knowledge repository.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合BERT和GNN的高层架构，实现历史文本中的实体及关系抽取，并在历史知识图谱构建上取得优异效果。其新开发的图像检索系统利用FastRQNet和多模态预训练模型，优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统历史文本因语义歧义、上下文指代、语法不规范，难以自动化提取结构化知识，影响数字人文和智能化历史研究进展。
AI.method: 构建基于BERT和图神经网络（GNN）的联合系统，用以自动抽取历史文本中的实体及其关系，同时研发FastRQNet+Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet的新型图像检索系统，对多种历史档案进行实验。
AI.result: 该方法在精确率（Precision）、召回率（Recall）和F1分数上均优于规则方法及主流深度学习基线，能较好处理复杂嵌套结构和隐含指代。
AI.conclusion: BERT与GNN结合可应对历史文本复杂性，提高知识图谱构建效果，实现历史数据自动化提取，有助于知识积累与数字人文学科发展。

title: KG-FairDiff: Knowledge Graph-Guided Prompt Refinement for Demographically Fair Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Text-to-Image (TTI) systems are now everyday infrastructure for journalism, education, advertising, and public communication, and the demographic and cultural stereotypes they inherit from training data (rendering women, people of colour, older adults, and non-Western cultures as under-represented or caricatured) become a population-level harm at deployment scale. Existing mitigations either require costly retraining, infeasible for the closed-source backbones that dominate consumer products, or rely on fixed demographic templates that ignore cultural context. We present KG-FairDiff, a model-agnostic, inference-time framework that formalises fairness-aware prompt refinement as a constrained optimisation problem and operationalises it as a closed-loop pipeline: a knowledge graph of ~1,200 culture- and bias-related triples retrieves structured context, an LLM rewriter proposes refinements, and a validator accepts only prompts that reduce a divergence-based fairness loss while preserving semantic fidelity to the user's original intent. We prove a finite-termination bound for the refinement loop, contribute a mathematically consistent evaluation suite linking Bias-P/Bias-W to divergence from target distributions and ENS to KL divergence, and audit eight widely-deployed backbone generators. KG-FairDiff substantially reduces gender, race, age, and intersectional disparities while preserving prompt semantics, offering a practical, deployment-ready route to more equitable generative AI.

AI.tldr: KG-FairDiff 是一种面向文本到图像（TTI）系统的、公平性增强的推理时框架，能在不需重训练的情况下减少性别、种族、年龄等偏见，并保证用户意图。
AI.motivation: TTI系统广泛用于媒体、教育等领域，但因训练数据固有偏见，导致对女性、有色人种、老年人和非西方文化的刻板表现，这在大规模应用时会成为普遍的社会性伤害。现有解决方式如重训练成本高、开放源代码受限，模板式方法又缺乏文化适应性，均难以实际落地。
AI.method: 提出KG-FairDiff推理时公平性提升框架，无需模型重训练。它以约1200个与文化和偏见相关三元组的知识图谱为依托，通过大语言模型（LLM）自动润色用户提示，再用验证器筛选优化提示，确保公平性损失减小且语义与原意一致。整个流程为封闭式循环，并有理论终止界限。
AI.result: KG-FairDiff在八种主流TTI系统上极大减少了性别、种族、年龄及其交叉偏见，同时保持了用户输入语义。评测套件具有数理一致性，可用KL散度等指标严格衡量公平目标和算法表现。
AI.conclusion: KG-FairDiff为实际部署的生成式AI提供了高效、泛用、无须重训练的公平性提升方案，显著改善了TTI系统中的人口与文化偏见，有助于AI系统更广泛和公正的应用。

title: HarnessForge: Joint Harness and Policy Evolution for Adaptive Agent Systems
summary: LLM agents are increasingly expected to operate across heterogeneous task regimes that require distinct execution paradigms. This challenges fixed agent systems and motivates system-level meta-adaptation beyond isolated component updates. While existing works have adapted external harness or trained underlying reasoning policies, full-system adaptation remains insufficiently characterized. The adaptation space between structure and execution is rarely made explicit, and the compatibility between the external harness and the internal reasoner is not optimized jointly. We propose HarnessForge, a meta-adaptive framework for evolving LLM agent systems. HarnessForge formulates an agent system as a harness--policy pair, defining a stable adaptation space that separates harness-level execution structure from policy-level reasoning behavior. It then performs harness--policy co-evolution through fault-guided harness tailoring and harness-conditioned policy alignment. Experiments across five benchmarks from diverse domains show that HarnessForge consistently improves both Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B backbones, outperforming harness-only and policy-only baselines with gains of up to 12.0\% over the strongest baseline and achieving favorable rollout-efficiency tradeoffs, demonstrating that harness--policy co-evolution is effective, and that executable compatibility between the harness and reasoning policy is essential for agent-system adaptation. The code is available at https://github.com/mingju-c/HarnessForge.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体需要在不同任务和执行范式间适应，现有方法多只关注部分优化。本文提出HarnessForge框架，实现系统级的meta自适应，并通过同时优化外部管理结构和内部推理策略，在多个基准测试中显著优于单独优化的方法。
AI.motivation: LLM agent通常需要应对多样化任务，固定结构已无法适应复杂环境，现有研究只关注外部结构或内部推理的局部优化，缺乏系统级综合适应的探索。
AI.method: 提出HarnessForge框架，将agent系统形式化为管理结构（harness）和推理策略（policy）对，区分两者适应空间，并采用基于故障的结构调整与结构条件下的策略对齐，实现两者协同演化。
AI.result: 在五个不同领域任务基准上，HarnessForge在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型上均优于只优化结构或策略的基线方案，最优提升达到12%，且兼顾执行效率。
AI.conclusion: 系统级的管理结构-推理策略协同演化，对提升LLM agent适应能力非常有效，建议未来agent设计时重视结构与推理策略间的可执行兼容性。

title: Knowledge-Intensive Video Generation
summary: Text-to-video generation has advanced rapidly in visual quality, but remains under-evaluated for factuality and practical usefulness. We introduce knowledge-intensive video generation (KIVI), where models generate videos from short information-seeking prompts that ask for explanations, procedures, or demonstrations. To evaluate this setting, we construct KIVI-Bench, a benchmark of 1,080 prompts, and propose automatic metrics for factuality and helpfulness. Human evaluation shows that our metrics significantly better align with human annotations than existing alternatives. Experiments on seven state-of-the-art video generation models show that current systems still lag behind human performance, especially on visual properties, procedural operations, and clear information presentation. These results highlight KIVI as a challenging direction for factual and instructionally useful video generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了知识密集型视频生成任务（KIVI），并为其构建了专门的评测基准（KIVI-Bench）及自动评价指标，发现现有视频生成模型在事实性和实用性上仍有较大差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到视频生成在视觉质量方面进步显著，但在事实性和实际有用性上的评估仍显不足，现实中往往需要能解释、演示和程序说明型的视频内容。
AI.method: 提出知识密集型视频生成（KIVI）任务，根据要求生成解释、过程或演示类型的视频；构建包含1,080个提示的KIVI-Bench评测集，设计了新的自动化指标评判事实性和有用性，并通过人工评估验证这些指标与人工标注的一致性优于现有替代方法。
AI.result: 在七个先进的视频生成模型上的实验结果显示，这些系统在视觉属性、过程操作以及信息清晰呈现方面均显著落后于人类表现。新的评价指标与人工一致性较高。
AI.conclusion: 现有生成方法在知识密集型视频生成上仍有明显不足，KIVI为事实性和指导性视频生成提供了新的挑战方向和评测工具。

title: Multilinguality of Large Language Models From a Structural Perspective
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have excelled in processing multiple languages through pre- and post-training on multilingual data, even though English dominates the training data. Prior work focusing on token representations has revealed how those LLMs process non-English text. Although these analyses have provided insightful findings, they fail to capture a structural view, which is an inherent property of language. In this study, we explore the multilinguality of LLMs through representational structural analysis. Our findings reveal that low-resource languages are structurally more different from English than high- and mid-resource languages, and that language-specific post-training alters their structures while preserving inter-language relationships.

AI.tldr: 本文采用结构表征分析方法研究大语言模型（LLMs）处理多语言的能力，发现低资源语言与英语的结构差异更大。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在多语言处理上表现优异，但现有研究多关注于token层面的表示分析，未能揭示语言的结构性差异。作者意识到结构分析对于理解模型多语言能力的重要性，故进行本研究。
AI.method: 作者采用表征结构分析（representational structural analysis），比较不同语言（特别是低资源与高资源语言）在LLMs中的结构特征，并观察语言特定的后训练过程对这些结构及语言间关系的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）低资源语言在结构上与英语的差异远大于高、资源语言；2）语言特定的后训练虽会改变各语言的内部结构，却不会破坏它们之间的结构关系。
AI.conclusion: 结构性视角揭示LLMs处理多语言时，低资源语言面临更大挑战，且后训练过程可调整其表征结构却保持了语言间整体关系，为多语言建模和低资源语言处理提供了新见解。

title: Beyond Visual Memory: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Recent latent visual reasoning methods achieve substantial gains by inserting continuous latent tokens into multimodal language models. These gains are commonly attributed to the tokens encoding visual evidence; recent analyses, however, reveal a paradox: the tokens are loosely tied to the image and contribute little to the answer. Critically, these analyses treat latent tokens as a single unit, obscuring the true source of the gains. We therefore decompose latent tokens into three testable components: latent slots, boundary markers, and format, and develop a state-of-the-art method as a probe under favorable conditions. Across six method-stage settings and four perception-heavy benchmarks, latent slots fail every prediction of the visual-memory account. Strikingly, retaining only the boundary markers preserves 78 to 100% of the gain in several settings, while the model attends to the image more narrowly at latent positions than at answer positions. The gain therefore comes from boundary markers, format, and this attention pattern, not from latent slots. How each method engages this mechanism depends on its training supervision: at matched accuracy, mechanisms can still differ markedly. Latent visual reasoning thus needs evaluation not only by accuracy but by what the model actually relies on.

AI.tldr: 现有的视觉推理方法通过向多模态语言模型插入连续的潜在token获得显著提升，但这些提升并非来源于token编码的视觉证据。本文将潜在token分解为不同组件，并发现实际起作用的是边界标记和格式等，而非token本身承载的视觉内容。
AI.motivation: 尽管插入潜在token的多模态模型在视觉推理任务上取得了提升，但分析发现token与图像本身关联较弱。现有分析通常将其视为整体，未能澄清到底是哪些机制带来提升。因此，作者希望进一步细化、解释提升的真实来源。
AI.method: 作者提出将潜在token分解为三种可测成分：潜在slot、边界标记和格式，并设计了一套先进方法以在有利条件下检验这些成分对模型表现的作用。通过在六组方法-阶段设定，以及四个以感知为主的基准上验证各自作用。
AI.result: 实验显示，潜在slot未能实现以往认为的视觉记忆作用。仅仅保留边界标记即可在多个情况下保留78-100%的性能提升。同时，发现模型在处理潜在token时对图像的关注范围比在作答阶段更窄。提升的主要来源是边界标记、格式以及这种注意机制模式，而非潜在slot。
AI.conclusion: 潜在视觉推理模型提升表现的机制复杂多样，不仅仅取决于准确率，还取决于模型真正依赖的信息来源。未来对相关模型的评估需要关注其实现机制本身，而不是只以最终准确率为标准。

title: ProbeScale: Probing Analysis to Optimize Neural Scaling Laws for Efficient Small Language Model Inference
summary: Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a balance between capability and computational feasibility. Neural scaling laws inform their optimal training, suggesting that they possess rich internal representations that scale with their size. However, deploying even these SLMs can be challenging under strict resource constraints. Language model probing provides methods for analyzing the linguistic knowledge encoded in a model's internals. We propose ProbScale, a framework that unifies insights from scaling laws and probing to identify parameter-efficient subnetworks within pre-trained SLMs. ProbScale utilizes the high-quality representations of well-scaled SLMs and uses task-specific probes to mathematically quantify the relevance of each layer for target downstream capabilities. This allows selecting subnetworks that optimally trade off performance against parameter size. We formulate the subnetwork selection as finding a layer subset maximizing aggregated, task-weighted probe performance under a parameter budget. Experiments on representative SLMs such as RoBERTa-Large and T5-Base demonstrate that ProbScale identifies subnetworks achieving significant parameter reduction, from 5 to 10 times, while maintaining high performance (95% to 98% of the original SLMs) on targeted tasks, outperforming heuristic baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了ProbScale方法，通过结合神经网络扩展规律和模型探测技术，在预训练小型语言模型（SLM）中高效选出参数最优的子网络，可显著减少参数量且保持高性能。
AI.motivation: 小型语言模型虽在能力与算力消耗间有所平衡，但在受限资源下部署仍然有挑战。作者希望通过更有效的方法，挑选并压缩模型参数，同时不损失重要的下游任务表现。
AI.method: 提出ProbScale框架，将模型扩展规律与任务探测结合，将每层对下游任务表现的贡献量化，构建数学优化问题，在参数预算下筛选贡献最优的层组合，形成高效子网络。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-Large和T5-Base等主流SLM上实验，ProbScale选出的子网络参数量可减少5至10倍，同时下游任务性能保持原模型的95%-98%，优于现有启发式剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: ProbScale可高效识别SLM中的关键子网络，显著压缩参数规模，几乎无损性能表现，为资源受限场景下SLM部署提供了新策略。

title: DeblurNVS: Geometric Latent Diffusion for Novel View Synthesis from Sparse Motion-Blurred Images
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a fundamental problem in computer vision and graphics. Recent advances in neural radiance fields (NeRF), 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), and generative view synthesis have substantially improved its quality. Yet most methods still rely on clean observations, where image structures and cross-view geometric cues are well preserved. Motion blur breaks this assumption by corrupting local details and weakening multi-view correspondences. Such blur commonly arises from camera shake, scene motion, or finite exposure in practical capture. Blur-aware NVS methods address this degradation by modeling image formation, but their reliance on costly per-scene optimization limits efficient and generalizable sparse-view synthesis. To address this, we propose DeblurNVS, a novel framework for synthesizing high-fidelity novel views directly from sparse motion-blurred images, without requiring per-scene optimization. DeblurNVS restores the intermediate geometric representations needed for multi-view reasoning, enabling blurred inputs to recover reliable structure and correspondence cues. The restored representations are then combined with target camera information to synthesize the target-view representation and reconstruct a sharp RGB novel view. To enable the large-scale training, we construct a motion-blurred NVS dataset from DL3DV-10K using interpolation-based finite-exposure blur synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeblurNVS outperforms existing baselines on synthetic motion-blur benchmarks and generalizes to real motion-blurred scenes, producing perceptually sharper and structurally more stable novel views while avoiding costly per-scene optimization. Project page: https://github.com/PKU-YuanGroup/DeblurNVS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的新颖视角合成方法DeblurNVS，可直接从稀疏的运动模糊图像合成清晰高保真的新视角，无需为每个场景单独优化。
AI.motivation: 现有的新视角合成（NVS）方法在面对运动模糊时表现不佳，因为模糊削弱了图像的局部细节和多视图几何线索，难以在实际应用中处理带有运动模糊的输入。已有的模糊感知NVS方法虽可建模模糊成像过程，但依赖每个场景的高成本优化，缺乏高效和通用能力。
AI.method: 作者提出DeblurNVS框架，将模糊图像还原出可用于多视图推理的几何表征，结合目标视角信息学习新视角下的表征并重建清晰的RGB图像。为支撑大规模训练，作者基于插值法从公开数据集DL3DV-10K构建了运动模糊NVS训练集。
AI.result: 在合成和真实运动模糊场景上广泛实验显示，DeblurNVS在主观清晰度和结构稳定性方面均优于现有方法，且无需昂贵的每场景单独优化。
AI.conclusion: DeblurNVS显著提升了运动模糊图像下的新视角合成质量，具备高效、泛化能力强等优势，对实际应用有重要价值。

title: "I've Seen How This Goes": Characterizing Diversity via Progressive Conditional Surprise
comment: 28 pages, 18 figures, 9 tables. Accepted to the Workshop on Generative AI, Creativity, and Human-AI Co-Creation @ ICML 2026 (non-archival). Code and data: https://github.com/AMindToThink/icl-diversity
summary: Measuring the diversity of creative outputs is central to evaluating post-training mode collapse, comparing decoding strategies, and quantifying creative behavior in both AI and human writing. We propose a new approach to measuring diversity using in-context learning, of which the ``Decan'' metric, $D_{Ca_n} = C \times a_n$, is the working instance we evaluate: a per-byte score read off the per-token log-probabilities of a base model $θ$ in a \emph{single forward pass} per permutation, with no embedding model, no reference corpus, and no human labels. This approach is grounded in information theory, makes use of language model in-context learning to detect a wide range of similarities between any number of inputs, and obviates the need to train a special-purpose model. The same pipeline scores AI samples and human-written response sets, with diversity treated as a property of (responses, prompt, scoring model). On Tevet and Berant's human-grounded McDiv benchmark, $D_{Ca_n}$ reaches OCA 0.846 on the McDiv prompt\_gen set where it performs best, behind the strongest neural baseline reported in Tevet and Berant (SentBERT, 0.897). On the OLMo-2-7B post-training pipeline, $D_{Ca_n}$ drops monotonically across the base $\to$ SFT $\to$ DPO $\to$ RLVR stages, detecting the type of diversity loss that creative-writing applications care about.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于in-context learning的新颖多样性评估指标Decan，可以有效衡量AI与人类文本创作的多样性，无需特殊模型和人工标注，且实验证明具有很强的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有的创作多样性度量方法存在依赖特殊模型、人工标注或参考语料的局限，同时缺乏通用可解释的评估标准。作者希望提出一种操作更简便、可适用于AI和人类的创作多样性评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了Decan（$D_{Ca_n}=C\times a_n$）指标，通过in-context learning机制，仅需对每个输入排列单次前向计算，无需特殊嵌入模型或参考语料。度量方式基于信息论思想，直接利用基础语言模型对每token的对数概率得分合成，作为多样性的定量指标。
AI.result: Decan指标在Tevet与Berant提出的McDiv基准测试中取得OCA 0.846的优异成绩，接近最佳神经基线（SentBERT, 0.897）。在OLMo-2-7B后训练各阶段，可反映出创作多样性逐步降低的趋势，验证了其对实际创作场景多样性丧失的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: Decan是一个无需额外训练和人工介入、多任务通用的创作多样性度量方法，既可评估AI生成内容，也可评价人类写作多样性，对后训练模式崩溃检测、生成策略评估等具有重要应用价值。

title: HOLA: Holistic Multi-Modal Alignment for Open-Set 3D Recognition
summary: Open-set 3D recognition requires models that generalize to rare or unseen categories. Recent approaches address this by distilling language-vision knowledge into 3D encoders, typically relying on heavy 2D ViTs and aligning each point cloud with a single image or caption, thus anchoring representations to partial views. We propose aligning each point cloud with multiple images and textual descriptions to capture a more holistic understanding of 3D objects. To realize this idea, it is essential to design a loss function capable of jointly aligning a 3D instance with multiple matched signals, multi-view images and multiple texts, while separating positive aggregation from negative competition. We introduce such a function, termed the decoupled multi-positive contrastive loss. Our formulation enhances the loss's hardness-aware focus on challenging negatives, avoiding the "spotlight crowding" that occurs when many positives share the same softmax with all the negatives. Complementing this, we present a lightweight text adapter applied only to web captions, reducing the domain gap to curated annotations and enabling effective use of large-scale unsupervised text. Our model demonstrates state-of-the-art open-vocabulary performance on long-tail benchmarks, yielding substantial zero-shot improvements while sustaining high frame rates.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的方法，通过将每个3D点云与多个图像和文本描述对齐，以提升3D识别在开放类别下的泛化能力，并设计了一种新的对比损失函数和轻量级文本适配器，显著提升了零样本识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D开放集识别方法通常依赖2D视觉-语言模型，仅将每个点云与单一图像或描述对齐，导致表示局限于部分视角，难以泛化到稀有或未知类别。作者旨在克服这种限制，实现更全面的对象理解。
AI.method: 作者提出将每个3D点云同时与多张图像和多条文本描述对齐。为此，设计了“解耦多正样本对比损失”（decoupled multi-positive contrastive loss），可有效区分正负样本并聚焦困难负样本；同时引入了轻量级文本适配器，缩小网页文本与人工标注的域间差距。
AI.result: 该方法在长尾开放集3D识别基准上实现了最先进性能，在零样本识别任务上带来了显著提升，并且保持了高效的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 多视角、 多文本联合对齐和新型对比损失的设计，有效提升了模型的泛化和零样本能力，有助于3D识别系统更好地应对开放环境下的多样化和稀有类别挑战。

title: Cost-Aware Diffusion Draft Trees for Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates inference by having a lightweight drafter propose tokens verified in parallel by the target language model. Block diffusion drafters such as DFlash generate an entire draft block in one pass, yielding per-position marginals; DDTree uses these to build a candidate tree that maximizes expected acceptance length under a fixed node budget. We observe, however, that acceptance length is non-decreasing in budget: it always favors larger trees regardless of verification cost, offering no principled basis for budget selection. We introduce \textbf{CaDDTree} (Cost-aware Diffusion Draft Tree), a method that directly optimizes token throughput (expected tokens generated per unit time) by jointly selecting the tree structure and node budget. We model draft and verification latencies explicitly, show that the throughput objective decomposes into a per-round one-dimensional search over the budget, and prove that under a convex verification cost the throughput function is \emph{unimodal}, enabling an efficient greedy stopping rule. CaDDTree requires no offline budget search, adapting the budget each round from the current per-position distributions and verification cost. Experiments on Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B across eight benchmarks spanning reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks show that \caDDTree{} matches or surpasses DDTree with oracle budget selection on nearly all tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的推理加速方法CaDDTree，可以在无需离线调整预算的情况下，根据每轮推理的实际情况动态选择最优的候选树节点数，从而提升推理吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有的Speculative Decoding方案（如DDTree）虽然能提高推理速度，但在如何选择候选节点数（预算）时缺乏理论依据，且总是倾向于更大的树，容易忽略验证成本，导致系统整体吞吐量不一定最优。
AI.method: CaDDTree引入了显式的起草与验证延迟建模，将吞吐量作为目标函数，将预算选择和树结构选择联合优化。证明了在验证成本满足一定条件下，吞吐量关于预算为单峰函数，因此可以用高效的贪心搜索方式选择最优预算，每轮自动调整，无需离线调参。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型上、八个涵盖推理/编程/指令任务的基准实验显示，CaDDTree在几乎所有任务上和理想情况下的DDTree（oracle预算）相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: CaDDTree能动态自适应地优化推理吞吐量，避免了手动调参流程，实际效果优于或匹配目前的主流方法，为Speculative Decoding方法提供了更高效的实际应用路径。

title: ChartArena: Benchmarking Chart Parsing across Languages, Scenarios, and Formats
summary: Charts are a primary medium for conveying quantitative and relational information, yet systematically evaluating chart parsing models remains difficult. Existing benchmarks focus on narrow chart types and leave diagrammatic structures such as flowcharts and mind maps largely unaddressed, while models produce outputs in incompatible formats, and datasets rarely include the printed or hand-drawn images encountered in practice. To address these issues, we introduce ChartArena, a comprehensive bilingual benchmark covering eight chart families spanning both numeric charts and diagrammatic structures, each evaluated across three visual scenarios: digital renderings, printed photos, and hand-drawn photos. The dataset is built via a human-agent collaborative annotation pipeline with multi-stage human verification to ensure annotation reliability. To enable fair cross-model comparison, we further design a format-agnostic evaluation protocol that maps heterogeneous outputs into two canonical semantic spaces, a normalized triple view and a directed graph view, and scores them with structure-aware metrics. Through extensive evaluation of 26 leading MLLMs, we observe three consistent findings: (i) frontier proprietary models such as Gemini 3.1 Pro lead overall, yet the strongest open-source systems are rapidly closing the gap; (ii) document parsing models handle numeric charts reasonably but fall sharply behind on diagrammatic structures; and (iii) expert chart parsers remain limited to narrow chart families. Across all models, radar charts and hand-drawn scenarios stay especially challenging. These findings show that ChartArena exposes clear capability gaps and provides a unified foundation for future progress. ChartArena is publicly available at https://github.com/pspdada/ChartArena.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ChartArena，一个涵盖八大图表家族、三大视觉场景（数字、打印照片、手绘照片）的双语图表解析基准测试平台。包含规范化评价协议和结构感知指标，系统评估26种MLLMs，揭示了现有模型在图表解析领域的能力差距，尤其在雷达图与手绘图场景下均表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 当前图表解析模型评估受限于基准数据集窄、格式不统一，以及对实用性的欠缺，难以反映真实应用场景下的性能。旨在填补研究和实际需求之间的差距，推动图表理解模型的进步。
AI.method: 1. 开发ChartArena数据集，涵盖数字图与示意图（如流程图、思维导图），多场景多格式。2. 采用人机协同、多阶段人工校验保证标注质量。3. 设计兼容多模型的评价协议，将结果映射到通用三元组和有向图两种语义空间，并用结构感知度量方法评分。4. 使用ChartArena系统评测26种主流多模态大模型（MLLMs）。
AI.result: 1. 封闭模型（如Gemini 3.1 Pro）领先，但开源模型进步迅速。2. 专用于文档解析的模型对数字图表适应尚可，但对示意图表现非常差。3. 专业图表解析器适用范围有限。4. 雷达图与手绘图场景对所有模型均具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: ChartArena公开数据集揭示了图表解析模型在多类型多场景下的显著性能短板，为进一步研究和公平评测奠定基础，有望推动更全面、更强大的图表理解系统发展。

title: CRAB-Bench: Evaluating LLM Agents under Complex Task Dependencies and Human-aligned User Simulation
summary: Evaluating LLM agents in realistic service scenarios requires complex task dependencies, imperfect user behavior, and an evaluation that accommodates multiple valid solutions. We introduce CRAB-Bench (Constraint-based Realistic Agent Benchmark) and RUSE (Realistic User Simulation Engine) to address this gap. CRAB-Bench generates tasks via a constraint graph over multiple interdependent entities with structured distractors, requiring agents to reason carefully over thousands of misleading candidates where only a tiny fraction of solutions are valid. RUSE replaces cooperative, template-like simulators with realistic users grounded in human behavioral studies, instantiated across diverse personas and four behavioral dimensions. Experiments on four frontier LLM agents show that the best model achieves only 61% pass@1 on CRAB-Bench, and switching to RUSE causes further drops of up to 57%, concentrated in task-solving ability rather than conversational quality. Information Disclosure is the most damaging behavioral dimension, and agents interacting with RUSE are less likely to admit mistakes, instead masking errors through implicit corrections.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了专为真实场景设计的LLM智能体评测基准CRAB-Bench，以及更贴近真实用户行为的模拟引擎RUSE，以更全面地评估大模型代理的能力。实验发现，当前最强的LLM智能体在该基准下表现有限，面对RUSE模拟的用户时表现进一步下降，突出显示了现有大模型在复杂真实任务中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型评测方式过于理想化，缺乏对现实中复杂任务依赖、用户不完美行为、多解性等因素的考量，导致评测结果与实际应用有差距。作者希望通过贴近真实需求的评测体系，揭示和推动LLM智能体在真实服务场景中的进步。
AI.method: 作者设计了CRAB-Bench基准，该基准通过约束图生成多实体间依赖的复杂任务，并插入具有干扰性的结构化选项，使正确解极少。RUSE引擎基于行为研究，创建多样、逼真的用户模拟，用户行为被分为四大维度。通过这套体系，针对四款最前沿的LLM智能体进行评测，考察其在CRAB-Bench和RUSE环境下的表现。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前最好的LLM智能体在CRAB-Bench环境下的通过率只有61%，在RUSE模拟环境下最高降至57%。性能损失主要体现在任务解决能力上，而非对话质量上。信息披露是影响最大的一类行为维度。与RUSE用户交互时，智能体更少主动承认错误，更多通过隐式纠正来掩盖失误。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体在现实复杂服务场景下仍存在明显局限，尤其面对更真实的用户行为模拟时，表现大幅下滑。今后评测与模型提升应更关注贴近实际需求的任务和行为。

title: Diamonds in the Sky: Pareidolic Animals in Clouds
summary: People often see animal shapes in clouds, a phenomenon known as pareidolia. We propose an AI-based method that aims to predict which animals people are likely to perceive in clouds, even though state-of-the-art recognition methods typically fail to detect such animals. Additionally, we introduce a method to assist individuals in perceiving specific pareidolic animals, even if they did not recognize them initially. Our approach uses a diffusion model to transform cloud segments into an animal shape that visually resemble the original cloud. This diffusion technique is inspired by the observation that the diffusion process succeeds only when the target animal resembles the shape of the cloud, and that subtle visual hints often suffice to help individuals recognize specific pareidolic animals. A generated image, successfully derived from the diffusion model, is then used to predict the pareidolic animal. Additionally, a short morphing video transitioning from the generated image back to the original cloud segment is employed to further enhance the human's perception of the pareidolic animals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AI的技术，用于预测人们在云中能看到哪些动物（空想性视幻），并辅助人们识别特定的幻象动物。方法结合扩散模型与图像变形技术，提升了人类对幻象动物的感知能力。
AI.motivation: 人类常常在随机自然景象（如云）中看到动物等形状，这是一种广泛存在但传统识别算法难以处理的认知现象。作者希望用AI方法理解和模拟人类的类比感知能力。
AI.method: 采用扩散模型将云图像片段转变为兼具云结构和动物形态的图片，并使用这些生成图片预测人类可能看到的动物。进一步，通过从动物形态变回到原始云图片的渐变视频，增强人类对特定幻象动物的感知。
AI.result: 该方法可以有效预测并提升人类识别云中动物的能力，经过图像和视频引导，即使原本看不到的动物，也能被多数人识别出来。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型与图像变形的AI方法，不仅能模拟人类的空想性视幻，还能辅助和优化人们在这种视觉任务中的感知与识别，展现了AI与认知心理学的有效结合。

title: TalkTag: Fine-Grained Morphosyntactic Error Annotation for Transcribed Speech
summary: Fine-grained morphosyntactic error annotation is important in clinical and developmental language research, yet it is labour-intensive, expert-dependent, and difficult to scale. We present TalkTag, an LLM-based lightweight tool fine-tuned to automate CHAT-style error annotation in spoken-language transcripts. Developed under conditions of extreme data scarcity using children's narrative data, the system shows the feasibility of linguistic analysis in low-resource settings. Our evaluation demonstrates that TalkTag produces encouragingly precise annotation while effectively identifying instances where linguistic ambiguity makes automated tagging genuinely complex. In summary, with TalkTag, we provide a scalable alternative to manual error annotation and practically viable support for morphosyntactic error annotation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一款基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动化工具TalkTag，用于精细化地注释口语转录中的形态句法错误，解决了传统方法劳动密集、依赖专家、难以扩展的问题。
AI.motivation: 细致的形态句法错误注释对于临床与发展语言学研究至关重要，但现有方法高度依赖人工且难以规模化，因此迫切需要自动化、可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者开发了TalkTag工具，将大语言模型（LLM）微调以执行CHAT格式的错误注释，即使在儿童叙事语料极度稀缺的情况下也能进行低资源开发。该系统可自动地对口语转录文本进行语言学错误分析。
AI.result: TalkTag工具在评测中表现出有希望的精确度，不仅能够精准地完成注释，还能有效识别出因语言模糊而导致自动化注释本身较为复杂的情形。
AI.conclusion: TalkTag为手动错误标注提供了可扩展的替代方案，是形态句法错误注释在实际中可行且有效的辅助工具。

title: Training-free image inversion for one-step diffusion models
summary: In this work, we introduce a novel training-free inversion (TFinv) framework for one-step diffusion models,addressing key challenges in real image inversion and editing. We first identify two critical factors hamperingreal-image inversion and editing: (1) Initial Latent Editability, which is related to the distance between theinitial noise and the ideal Gaussian distribution, and (2) Caption Gap, which means the alignment betweentext captions and image representations. Both factors influence inversion efficiency and the editability ofone-step diffusion models. Then, we propose two novel techniques: iterative noise alignment (iterNA), whichminimizes the distribution gap to align with the normal Gaussian distribution, and suffix learning (suffL),which enhances text-to-image caption alignment by introducing learned suffix prompt tokens. These techniquesenable precise inversion of input images into their initial noise representations and facilitate image editing.Furthermore, we propose a mask-based editing technique for localized edits while preserving backgroundintegrity. Comprehensive experiments on the PIE-Bench dataset validate that our method TFinv not onlyachieves state-of-the-art performance in one-step diffusion editing, but also significantly outperforms existingmultistep approaches in efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/tttao-uwu/TFinv.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的、无需训练的单步扩散模型反演（TFinv）框架，实现了对真实图像的准确反演与高效编辑。
AI.motivation: 当前单步扩散模型在真实图像反演和编辑中面临初始隐空间可编辑性与文本-图像对齐（Caption Gap）两个主要挑战，这限制了图像编辑效率和精度。
AI.method: 提出了两项新技术：（1）迭代噪声对齐（iterNA），通过最小化分布差距使噪声分布趋于理想高斯分布；（2）后缀学习（suffL），通过引入可学习的后缀提示提升文本-图像对齐能力，同时还提出基于掩码的局部编辑方案。
AI.result: 在PIE-Bench数据集上，所提TFinv方法不仅显著提升了单步扩散模型的图像反演与编辑性能，而且在效率上也大幅超越多步方法。
AI.conclusion: TFinv框架无需训练，能实现高效、精确的图像反演与编辑，为单步扩散模型在真实场景下的应用提供了新路径。

title: LayerRoute: Input-Conditioned Adaptive Layer Skipping via LoRA Fine-Tuning for Agentic Language Models
summary: Agentic language model systems alternate between two structurally distinct step types: structured tool calls (short, deterministic, low perplexity) and open-ended planning/reasoning steps (long, complex, high perplexity).
