Despite this heterogeneity, current inference systems apply identical compute to every step. We introduce LayerRoute, a lightweight adapter that learns to selectively skip transformer blocks on a per-input basis. LayerRoute augments each of the 24 transformer blocks in Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct with: (1) a per-layer router (~897 parameters, Linear(896,1)) that outputs a hard binary gate via the straight-through estimator, and (2) LoRA adapters (rank 8, ~1.08M parameters) on the Q/K/V/O attention projections. The backbone weights remain frozen. A single end-to-end training pass on agentic data (Hermes, Glaive, GSM8K, Turing) with a gate regularisation term forces the system to discover which blocks are skippable per input type. After 3,000 steps (6.4 minutes on an A100 40GB), LayerRoute achieves a 12.91% skip differential: tool calls skip 15.25% of FLOPs while planning steps skip only 2.34%, using only 1.10M trainable parameters (0.22% of the 494M backbone). Quality improves over the base model due to LoRA adaptation, with perplexity delta of -1.29 on tool calls and -1.30 on planning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新方法LayerRoute，使得语言模型能够根据输入类型动态跳过部分Transformer层，从而更高效地处理结构化工具调用和复杂推理任务。
AI.motivation: 传统大语言模型在执行结构高度不同的任务（如工具调用与推理）时，每一步都消耗相同算力，导致部分场景算力利用不充分，因此需要机制让模型根据输入类型自适应调整计算量。
AI.method: 在Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct模型的24层Transformer基础上，每层增加一个Router（约897参数）输出二进制门控，结合LoRA适配器（rank 8，约1.08M参数），训练中用门控正则明确引导模型在不同输入类型上学习跳过部分层，主干权重保持冻结，仅微调上述适配器。
AI.result: 仅需1.10M可训练参数和大约6分钟GPU训练后，对工具调用步骤可节省15.25% FLOPs，对推理步骤仅跳过2.34%；模型在质量上较基线略有提升（困惑度平均降低1.3）。
AI.conclusion: LayerRoute能够低成本实现针对输入类型的计算量自适应分配，提升推理效率且不损失模型性能，适用于多步代理任务中的大模型算力优化。

title: PAI-Studio: Cinematic Video Background Replacement with Camera-Aware Motion
summary: We present PAI-Studio, a new reference-conditioned video synthesis task that addresses a long-standing challenge in cinematic background replacement: generating dynamic backgrounds aligned with foreground motion while preserving foreground identity, matching reference scene appearance, and achieving globally consistent illumination with realistic foreground relighting. Existing open-source systems and commercial APIs cannot simultaneously ensure motion-consistent background generation, high-fidelity foreground relighting and foreground identity preservation, often resulting in static backgrounds, inconsistent boundaries, and noticeable compositing artifacts. To bridge this gap, we build upon a Diffusion Transformer video backbone and reformulate the problem as an in-context conditional generation task. Through bidirectional attention, our model jointly captures foreground dynamics and background reference information within a unified architecture. We further construct a 30K-scale dataset sourced from high-quality films and online videos to support this task. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing open-source and commercial API solutions.

AI.tldr: PAI-Studio是一种新的视频合成方法，能够在电影级背景替换任务中，动态生成与前景动作一致的高保真背景，并实现真实的前景重光照和身份保持，效果优于现有开源或商业方案。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频合成和背景替换工具难以同时兼顾前景与背景的动态匹配、前景身份保真、背景参考场景一致、以及全局光照的真实感，常常出现静态背景、不一致的边界或剪辑痕迹明显等问题。
AI.method: 提出基于Diffusion Transformer的视频骨干架构，把该问题重新表述为上下文条件生成任务，通过双向注意力机制统一建模前景动态和背景参考，在统一的架构下实现效果提升。同时，自建了包含3万组高质量电影与在线视频的数据集以支持该任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，PAI-Studio在运动一致性、前景身份保持和光照真实性等方面，显著优于当前开源系统及商业API。
AI.conclusion: PAI-Studio为电影级别动态背景替换提供了新的技术路径，实现了一体化、真实感强的视频合成体验，可广泛应用于内容制作和影视后期等场景。

title: Unveiling the Limits of Large Language Models in Inferring Pragmatic Meaning from Non-Verbal Responses
summary: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown considerable progress in pragmatic language understanding, prior research has focused mainly on their comprehension of verbal behavior. Nonetheless, non-verbal behavior remains a fundamental component of human communication, especially when deliberately utilized in isolation to convey indirect meanings. In this work, we present the first systematic evaluation of LLMs' ability to infer pragmatic meaning in dialogue consisting solely of non-verbal responses. We explore three research questions: (1) Can LLMs recognize indirect intent conveyed through non-verbal responses? (2) When and how do LLMs fail to capture non-verbal intent? (3) How can we improve LLMs' ability to interpret non-verbal intent?. Through the evaluation, we observe that LLMs struggle to infer underlying meaning from non-verbal responses, with accuracy dropping by up to 60% points compared to verbal ones. Further extensive analysis reveals a behavioral pattern in LLMs' interpretations of non-verbal behavior and demonstrates that in-context learning facilitates pragmatic inference.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了大语言模型（LLM）仅通过非言语回复推断语用意义的能力，并发现其在非言语情境下的准确率大幅下降。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在理解语言方面取得进展，但此前研究聚焦于口头行为，忽略了在人类交流中重要的非言语行为。本文旨在填补这一空白，评估LLM在解读仅有非言语交流时的表现。
AI.method: 作者构建了全由非言语反应组成的对话语料，设置了三个研究问题，通过对比测试LLM识别和解释非言语意图的能力，并分析其失败的情形。同时，探讨了利用in-context learning提升LLM表现的可能性。
AI.result: 实验表明，LLM在推断非言语对话的语用意图时表现较差，其准确率相比口头交流下降高达60个百分点。进一步分析揭示了LLM在解释非言语行为时存在行为模式。利用情境学习可以改善LLM的推断能力。
AI.conclusion: 尽管LLM在言语理解上表现突出，但在理解非言语语用意图方面仍存在显著短板。适当设计任务和上下文可在一定程度上改善其表现，但仍需针对非言语理解能力进行进一步研究和提升。

title: Agent Skills Should Go Beyond Text: The Case for Visual Skills
summary: Reusable skills are a key mechanism for extending agent capabilities, allowing agents to accumulate experience and solve increasingly complex tasks. Yet most existing skill-learning methods store reusable experience as text-only assets, such as instructions, reasoning traces, or summarized trajectories. We argue that this text-only paradigm creates a fundamental bottleneck for visual-centric tasks, where reusable knowledge often depends on spatial layout, visual grounding, fine-grained appearance, and localized state changes. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{\NAME}, a multimodal skill paradigm that combines declarative textual logic with explicit visual support. We distinguish three reusable forms: static priors for stable spatial conventions, dynamic priors for in-situ visual working memory, and interleaved visual skills that bind ordered text steps to the source frames, screenshots, or page regions that justify them. Rather than only describing what to do, visual skills also encode where to look, how to inspect, and how to verify visual outcomes. To scale visual-skill construction, we introduce \textbf{\SYSTEM}, an automatic system that converts agent experience into reusable multimodal skills by preserving textual reasoning, spatial references, visual boundaries, and interaction patterns from task trajectories. Experiments on GUI and other visual-centric tasks show that visual skills consistently outperform text-only skills, particularly when success requires spatial correspondence, visual evidence, and state-aware interaction. These results support our central position: reusable agent skills should go beyond text and become multimodal assets for future multimodal agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了融合文本与视觉信息的多模态技能学习框架，并证明其在视觉任务上优于传统纯文本技能。
AI.motivation: 目前多数技能学习方法仅以文本形式保存可复用经验，但在以视觉为中心的任务中，许多可复用知识依赖空间布局、视觉对齐与细粒度状态，这种仅文本的方法存在明显局限。
AI.method: 提出多模态技能范式，将声明性文本逻辑与明确视觉支持相结合。设计三种可复用形式：静态先验、动态先验和交错视觉技能，将文本步骤与视觉帧（截图、页面区域）相绑定。开发自动化系统（SYSTEM），可从智能体的任务轨迹中提取和构建多模态技能。
AI.result: 在GUI和其他视觉任务上，多模态技能始终优于文本技能，特别是在需要空间对齐、视觉证据和状态感知交互时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 可复用技能仅依赖文本存在瓶颈，未来的智能体技能应以多模态资产（文本+视觉）为主以实现更强的泛化和适应能力。

title: CultureForest: Understanding and Evaluating Cultural Norm Grounded Reasoning in LLMs
summary: Existing research largely reduces cultural intelligence in LLMs to a knowledge-level problem, overlooking whether models can effectively utilize their acquired knowledge in realistic scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce CultureForest, a benchmark for \textit{Cultural Norm Grounded Reasoning}. Each question is grounded in a small set of atomic norms, enabling verifiable and attributable evaluation. CultureForest comprises 5,378 examples across 8 domains and 53 countries/regions, and supports a progressive evaluation from multiple-choice to open-ended generation. Extensive experiments reveal that even top-tier models degrade substantially in open-ended settings, accompanied by pronounced cross-region disparities. Through targeted analysis, we uncover several consistent patterns: (1) test-time reasoning yields limited gains and may exacerbate inequity; (2) models exhibit highly shared regional preference structures; (3) model responses are markedly conservative, especially under stricter cultural constraints; and (4) by disentangling cultural knowledge acquisition from cultural reasoning, we show that while LLMs possess substantial cultural knowledge, their performance is further bottlenecked by its effective use. These findings point to a necessary shift from knowledge-centric evaluation toward measuring knowledge-grounded reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CultureForest，一个用于衡量大模型文化规范推理能力的新基准数据集。实验显示，尽管模型拥有丰富的文化知识，但在实际推理和应用中表现不佳，特别是在开放式任务和跨地区情境下。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要将大模型的文化智能视为知识获取问题，忽视了模型能否在现实场景中有效利用其知识。本文旨在填补此评测缺口，引入基于文化规范推理的新测试。
AI.method: 作者构建了CultureForest基准，涵盖8个领域、53个国家/地区及5378个样本，将问题设计为基于一组可检验文化原子规范，支持从多选到开放式生成的分级评测。通过大规模实验分析模型在不同设定下的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使是最优模型在开放式任务中的表现也显著下降，且存在明显的地区间差异。具体发现：1）推理能力提升有限，甚至导致公平性下降；2）模型的地区偏好高度相似；3）模型对严格文化约束呈保守态度；4）文化知识与推理分离后发现，瓶颈在于知识的有效利用。
AI.conclusion: 大模型在文化智能上的局限不仅是知识本身，更在于知识驱动推理的能力。评价重点需从知识为中心转向知识驱动推理，未来应开发能更好理解和应用文化规范的模型。

title: DENSER: Depth-Guided Ensemble with Staged EFA-GS Reconstruction for Soccer Novel View Synthesis
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet Novel View Synthesis Challenge, Rank 1
summary: We propose DENSER, a Depth-guided ENSemble with Staged EFA-GS Reconstruction for soccer novel view synthesis. DENSER extends EFA-GS with three key contributions: (1) camera-height-based loss weighting that prioritises ground-level broadcast views, (2) monocular depth supervision from Depth-Anything-V2 to regularise geometry in textureless regions, and (3) a three-model pixel-average ensemble whose members diverge from a shared base checkpoint by varying training length and Gaussian scale clamping. On five held-out challenge scenes we achieve a mean PSNR of 29.89 dB, SSIM of 0.791, and LPIPS of 0.366.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DENSER方法，通过深度引导和集成策略提升足球新颖视角生成的质量，其关键改进包括相机高度加权损失、单目深度监督及三模型集成方法，在多个测试场景下取得了优异的合成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的新颖视角合成方法在足球等场景下易受到损失函数设计和不规则场景几何的限制，尤其是在地面广播视角和无纹理区域的表现不佳。因此作者以平衡不同视角表现、提升几何一致性为目标，提出改进方法。
AI.method: 1. 相机高度加权损失：对地面广播视角赋予更高权重，优化生成的关键视角效果。2. 引入Depth-Anything-V2单目深度网络，增强无纹理区域的几何恢复能力。3. 使用三模型集成（像素平均），通过不同训练长度和高斯尺度约束使多个子模型从同一基线分化，在重建时取平均提升稳健性。
AI.result: 在五个挑战测试场景上，DENSER方法实现了平均PSNR 29.89dB、SSIM 0.791和LPIPS 0.366的结果，证明了其在高质量视觉生成和几何一致性上的提升。
AI.conclusion: DENSER通过多项创新显著提升了足球场景的新颖视角合成效果，特别在重点视角和复杂场景中表现优异，为相关领域提供了有效解决方案。

title: KliniskVestBERT: BERT Model Specialised to Norwegian Clinical Texts
summary: The increasing application of Natural Language Processing (NLP) in healthcare demands language models specifically attuned to the complexities of clinical language. This work introduces KliniskVestBERT, a suite of three BERT-based encoder models pre-trained on a substantial corpus of real-world, de-identified Norwegian clinical texts from Helse Vest. We continue pretraining existing language models Nb-BERT-large, NorBERT3-large, and ModernBERT on our specialized clinical dataset. This dataset is based on a representative population of Helse Vest patients. The included document types are carefully curated to encompass a broad clinical spectrum in bokmål and nynorsk including discharge summaries, surgical reports, nursing notes etc. ensuring comprehensive representation of the linguistic landscape within Norwegian healthcare settings. Evaluation on three synthtetic Norwegian clinical benchmark datasets and two real-world problems demonstrates that each of our clinically specialized models consistently outperforms their baseline counterparts, highlighting the significant benefit of domain-specific pre-training for NLP tasks within the clinical domain. The project was a joint effort by all Helse Vest entities (Helse Bergen, Helse Fonna, Helse Førde and Helse Stavanger) with DIPS under the project lead of Helse Vest ICT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了KliniskVestBERT，一套专为挪威临床文本设计的BERT预训练语言模型，在挪威西部健康管理部门收集的大规模去标识化临床文本上进行训练，显著提升了模型在临床NLP任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域对NLP的需求日益增长，但现有的通用语言模型难以充分理解和处理临床专有语言，尤其是在非英语语种如挪威语的真实世界医疗文本中。因此开发更贴合临床场景、能更准确处理本地医学语言的模型具有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者选取三种现有的挪威语大模型（Nb-BERT-large、NorBERT3-large和ModernBERT），并在Helse Vest收集的真实、去标识化的临床文本（涵盖各种医疗文档和两种官方书写标准）上进行进一步预训练，形成针对临床领域的KliniskVestBERT套件。
AI.result: 在三个合成的挪威临床基准数据集与两个实际临床任务上，KliniskVestBERT各模型的表现均优于各自的未专门预训练的基础模型，验证了其在挪威医疗NLP任务上的显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 针对临床领域的专用预训练为NLP模型带来了显著提升，KliniskVestBERT证明了领域自适应预训练对于医疗类任务的价值。该项目还体现了多机构协作开发医疗AI模型的有效经验。

title: SafeGen-Bench: Benchmarking Safety in Image-Conditioned Text-to-Video Generation
summary: With the rapid advancements in text-to-image diffusion models, generative video models (T2V models) like Sora can now produce short synthetic videos from a text prompt or an initial image. However, synthetic video generation -- especially when guided by an initial image -- often poses risks, including the potential creation of illegal, politically sensitive, or unethical content. Existing benchmarks have started to consider the safety of generated videos, but they primarily focus on testing models with malicious text prompts, ignoring the scenario where text prompt and image combination may still lead to harmful video content. In practice, this is a common and challenging issue: videos generated from safe text and image inputs can nonetheless convey harmful information. To bridge this gap, we introduce SafeGen-Bench, a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the safety of conditional T2V models. Our benchmark defines 10 malicious categories, concentrating on risks related to both temporal sequences and depicted behaviors. SafeGen-Bench consists of carefully selected start frames from diverse image and video sources, paired with corresponding text prompts to simulate realistic inputs. We evaluate a variety of conditional T2V models on SafeGen-Bench, and the results indicate that current models struggle to consistently avoid generating malicious content with unsafety scores reaching up to 44.5, especially under conditions requiring high quality. Furthermore, we assess the effectiveness of both text-based and image-based guardrails on our benchmark, finding that unimodal guardrails alone were insufficient to provide a robust defense, with an 80\% failure rate across seven malicious categories. We hope that SafeGen-Bench will foster the development of safer and more controllable conditional T2V models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SafeGen-Bench，一个专门针对条件文本到视频（T2V）生成模型安全性的基准测试，揭示了当前主流模型在合规输入下依然容易输出有害内容的问题，并公开了对主流模型的系统性评测结果。
AI.motivation: 随着T2V模型日益成熟，尽管输入文本和图片合法安全，但生成视频仍可能蕴含违法、敏感或不道德内容。现有安全基准大多只考虑恶意文本提示，忽视了文本与图片组合也可能引发安全风险。实际应用中，这种组合输入带来的隐患更为常见且难以预防，因此需要更全面、针对性的安全评测手段。
AI.method: 作者设计了SafeGen-Bench基准，定义了10类针对序列及行为风险的恶意分类，精选多源图像和视频帧作为起始帧，并与相应文本提示配对，模拟实际输入场景。通过该基准，系统性地评测了主流T2V模型在这些条件下输出有害内容的比例。此外，对比分析了单模态（仅文本或仅图片）安全防护机制的有效性。
AI.result: 主流T2V模型在SafeGen-Bench上的安全分数最高达到44.5，并且在追求高质量输出时更易生成有害内容。评测发现，单纯采用文本或图像的单模态防护措施，针对七大类恶意内容场景的失效率高达80%。
AI.conclusion: 当前T2V生成模型在安全防护方面存在明显短板，单一防护机制难以杜绝安全风险。SafeGen-Bench的发布旨在推动更安全、可控的条件生成视频模型研究与开发。

title: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Spatial Lexical Bias in Multimodal Large Language Model Spatial Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remain unreliable on spatial multiple-choice questions, and their failures are often attributed to poorly attended visual information. In this work, we identify a complementary failure mode, spatial lexical bias: adding a spatial relation word to the answer options can attract the model's decision and make the newly added option likely to be selected. Using nine open-weight MLLMs, we show that this phenomenon is widely observed. In particular, models can answer a binary spatial question correctly, yet consistently select an incorrect third spatial option once it is added to the answer set. We isolate such binary-stable but ternary-fragile cases as diagnostic examples and leverage mechanistic interpretability tools, revealing that a substantial part of the failure instead originates on the language side rather than the visual side: visual attention analyses and residual-stream probes show the correct spatial relation remains internally available on these failures, while irrelevant-option controls, activation patching, and sparse component interventions trace the bias to specific LLM-side channels and neurons. Based on this finding, we show that a lightweight LLM-only DPO update on tiny single-object-pair synthetic data mitigates the bias, lifting four-way robust accuracy by up to 100 points on synthetic data, and by 68.0, 32.6, and 20.1 points on broader evaluation datasets WhatsUp, SpatialMQA-Direct, and VSR.

AI.tldr: MLLMs在空间多项选择题中存在空间词汇偏置，且这一偏置主要来源于语言模型而非视觉模型。通过对模型的分析并采用微调方法，可显著提升模型在空间理解任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 虽然多模态大模型在视觉问答等空间任务中的失败通常归因于视觉信息利用不足，但该文提出另一个重要失败原因——空间词汇偏置，即增加空间关系词会吸引模型做出偏差选择。理解和克服这一偏置对于提升MLLMs空间推理能力至关重要。
AI.method: 作者对9种开源MLLMs进行实验，发现模型在二选空间题可以答对，但在加入第三个空间关系选项后倾向出现错误。通过机制可解释性工具，追踪失败原因——结合视觉注意力、残差流探针、激活修补及稀疏干预技术，将偏置定位到语言侧具体通道和神经元。随后，利用仅含单物对的极小规模合成数据，通过轻量级LLM端DPO微调进行纠偏。
AI.result: 提出的微调方法可在合成数据上的四选准确率提升高达100个百分点，在WhatsUp、SpatialMQA-Direct、VSR等真实空间任务上的准确率分别提升68.0、32.6和20.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 空间词汇偏置是MLLMs在空间选择题领域的重要失败模式，主要源自语言模型端。通过有针对性的LLM微调，能显著改善模型空间理解的稳健性。

title: Perception First: A Frontier Native-Video Model with Self-Consistency for Implicit Video Question Answering
summary: We describe our submission to the VRR Challenge @ CVPR 2026, built on the \emph{ImplicitQA} / \emph{VRR-QA} benchmark~\cite{implicitqa}: multiple-choice video question answering in which answers are deliberately \emph{not} observable in any single frame and must be inferred from spatial layout, motion, depth, viewpoint, causality, and social context across discontinuous frames of creative video. We conduct a systematic, training-free study spanning open-source Video-LMMs (Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{qwen25vl}, Qwen3-VL~\cite{qwen3vl}, InternVL3, Gemma-3, and the RL-tuned video reasoners Video-R1~\cite{videor1} and VideoChat-R1.5~\cite{videochatr15}) and a battery of inference-time strategies (chain-of-thought, question decomposition, describe-then-reason cascades, audio transcripts, spatial state prompting, self-consistency~\cite{selfconsistency}, multi-model ensembling, and category routing). Our central finding is that this benchmark is \emph{perception-bound rather than reasoning-bound}: reasoning-side augmentations are neutral-to-harmful, whereas base-model perceptual capability and lightweight test-time denoising are the only reliable levers. A per-category error analysis localizes the difficulty to low-level perception -- relative depth, viewpoint, and counting are the hardest categories, while causal and social reasoning are nearly solved -- and a prompt that explicitly injects monocular depth cues to attack the weakest category \emph{lowers} test accuracy by $5.8$ points, confirming that the model needs a better \emph{percept}, not a better \emph{procedure}.

AI.tldr: 本文参与了CVPR 2026的VRR Challenge，针对需要跨多帧推理的多选视频问答任务，系统评测了多种开源视频大模型和推理策略，并发现任务的瓶颈在于模型感知能力而非推理能力。
AI.motivation: 视频问答任务逐渐从静帧/短时长推理走向需要跨时空、多模态复杂信息推断，而现有模型在此类抽象推理中的短板和提升空间尚需系统评估。
AI.method: 对Qwen2.5-VL、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3、Gemma-3以及强化学习调优的视频推理模型等主流开源模型，结合十余种推理策略（思维链、问题分解、音频辅助、空间提示、模型集成等），进行无需训练的系统横向对比和类别细化误差分析。
AI.result: 多种推理增强手段对模型表现无益甚至有害，测试表现主要受感知能力限制。任务最难为相对深度、视角和计数等低级感知类题型，而因果与社交推理类表现极佳。特意加强深度感知反而显著降低模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 提升这一任务成绩的关键在于提升模型的底层视频感知能力，而非更复杂的推理策略。当前主流感知模型仍显不足，需要聚焦基本感知的建模与提升。

title: Resonant Context Anchoring: Decoupling Attention Routing and Signal Gain at Inference Time
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently exhibit "contextual disregard" when faced with input evidence that conflicts with their internal parametric memory, leading to persistent factual hallucinations. Existing mitigation strategies primarily rely on suppressing specific neuron activations or employing computationally expensive contrastive decoding mechanisms, which often result in increased perplexity or significantly elevated inference latency. To address these limitations, we propose Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA), a lightweight inference-time intervention method grounded in the perspective of residual stream signal dynamics. RCA aims to resolve the signal attenuation of external evidence during its propagation through deep networks. The core mechanism involves the orthogonal decoupling of routing logic and information magnitude within the self-attention module. By utilizing raw pre-softmax attention scores as an instantaneous metric of semantic alignment, we construct a dynamic gain field via non-linear rectification to selectively amplify the norms of value vectors corresponding to context tokens, without altering the attention probability distribution. This mechanism effectively elevates the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of input evidence within the residual stream mixture, thereby robustly anchoring the generation trajectory to the truthful context during inference. Extensive experiments on the Llama-3 model series demonstrate that RCA significantly improves contextual faithfulness across multiple factual consistency and strong knowledge-conflict tasks, effectively suppressing parametric hallucinations. Furthermore, results confirm that as a training-free and computationally negligible plug-and-play module, RCA achieves a Pareto improvement in faithfulness and fluency while maintaining the model's general language understanding capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA)的新方法，能高效增强大语言模型对输入证据的忠实引用，减少幻觉现象。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理与自身记忆冲突的信息时，容易忽视输入证据，出现事实幻觉。现有解决方法要么增加模型延迟，要么影响输出质量，存在实用性局限。作者希望提出一种无需训练、计算开销极小的解决方案。
AI.method: RCA基于残差流信号动力学，在推理阶段通过对自注意力模块中的value向量范数进行非线性动态放大，增强与证据token相关的信号强度，而不改变注意力概率分布。这种方法实现了内容路由与信息量的正交解耦，仅需插拔式部署即可。
AI.result: 在Llama-3模型上的大量实验显示，RCA能显著提升模型对上下文证据的忠实度，有效抑制模型的参数性幻觉。各类知识冲突和事实一致性任务中，均取得了忠实性与流畅性的帕累托改进。
AI.conclusion: RCA是一种无需额外训练、计算量极低的推理增强方法，能在提升忠实性的同时，保持语言模型自身的流畅性和理解能力，具有广泛的实用前景。

title: Splatshot: 3D Face Avatar Generation from a Single Unconstrained Photo
summary: Reconstructing a photorealistic 3D face avatar from a single unconstrained photograph is challenging: feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) models degrade on out-of-distribution inputs, while pretrained diffusion models produce high-fidelity images but lack multi-view consistency. We observe that these paradigms are fundamentally complementary: explicit 3D representations guarantee geometric consistency, whereas 2D diffusion priors ensure photorealism. Building on this, we propose SplatShot, a training-free framework that couples these representations directly within the denoising process. Given a base 3DGS face model and a single reference image, we jointly denoise all target views using a per-step 3D feedback loop. At each timestep, we predict clean images from the noisy latents, refit the 3DGS to these multi-view predictions, and back-propagate the photometric discrepancy between the 3DGS re-renderings and 2D predictions into the noise estimate. This steers the sampling trajectory toward strictly 3D-coherent, identity-faithful outputs. Experiments on diverse in-the-wild images demonstrate that SplatShot produces 3D avatars with superior identity preservation, photorealism, and multi-view consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的新方法SplatShot，可从单张真实照片重建高质量的3D人脸头像，显著提升了头像的真实感和多视角一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么在真实感、要么在多视角一致性方面存在缺陷。3DGS方法保证了几何一致性，但在分布外输入下表现不佳；而2D扩散模型能生成高保真图像，但缺乏多视角一致性。
AI.method: SplatShot将显式3D表示（3DGS）和2D扩散先验结合。在无须训练的前提下，方法在每个去噪步骤中通过3D反馈回路同时优化多视角结果：用多视角预测的干净图像重新拟合3DGS，并将渲染与2D预测的差异回传到噪声估计，用于调整采样过程，从而实现多视角一致、个体特征保真的输出。
AI.result: 在不同的真实图像测试中，SplatShot生成的人脸3D头像在保持个体身份、真实感和多视角一致性上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 结合显式3D几何和2D视觉先验，可显著提升单张照片3D头像重建的质量，为相关领域提供了更加实际可用的解决方案。

title: Mitigating Bias in Locally Constrained Decoding via Tractable Proposals
summary: Generations from large language models often fail to conform to desired constraints such as JSON schema. Existing locally constrained decoding (LCD) approaches enforce constraints by myopically masking out next tokens, resulting in biased sampling and degradation in performance. Recent work uses sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) methods to mitigate such biases, but designing effective proposal distributions or potential functions remains a key challenge. In this work, we propose a generic approach to construct proposals and potentials for SMC sampling from $p_{\mathrm{lm}}( \cdot \mid \mathrm{constraint})$. First, we show that constraints specified as finite automata can be tensorized for efficient execution on GPUs, which we use to construct globally constrained decoding (GCD) proposals. In addition, leveraging the fact that tensorized finite automata share the same circuit structure as hidden Markov models, we circuit-multiply them to obtain the probabilistic GCD (P-GCD) proposals encoding both logical and probabilistic information about the target distributions. We evaluate (P-)GCD on the tasks of function calling, keyword-based generation, and SQL generation. Experiments show that under the same SMC sampling setup, compared to LCD proposals, (P-)GCD converges faster to the target distribution with significantly fewer particles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效生成满足约束（如JSON schema）的文本的新方法，通过使用基于有限状态自动机的方案提升采样效率与结果质量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型生成内容时常难以符合特定格式或约束，如JSON等。现有通过本地约束解码（LCD）实现的方案因只关注下一个token而导致采样偏差，降低生成性能。部分工作尝试用SMC方法缓解，但如何设计高效的proposal仍是难题。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种通用方法，将约束用有限自动机工具实现张量化，从而高效利用GPU，并据此设计全局约束解码（GCD）proposal。进一步利用有限自动机与隐马尔可夫模型结构的相似性，通过电路相乘得到同时编码逻辑与概率信息（P-GCD）的proposal，并用于SMC采样。
AI.result: 在函数调用、基于关键字生成和SQL生成等任务上，(P-)GCD方案比常规模型在SMC采样下可用更少粒子就更快、更准确地收敛于目标分布，效果优于LCD。
AI.conclusion: 结合自动机的GCD及P-GCD提案可大幅提升受约束生成任务的采样效率和质量，是应对高约束文本生成任务更优的选择。

title: On the Limits of Token Reduction for Efficient Unified Vision Language Training
summary: Unified vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual understanding and visual generation within a single autoregressive backbone, but their joint training is computationally expensive and largely overlooked from an efficiency perspective. In this work, we study the feasibility and limits of token-reduction-based acceleration for unified VLM training. Through a systematic analysis of layerwise attention allocation, we uncover a fundamental asymmetry: visual understanding exhibits substantial late-layer visual redundancy, whereas visual generation maintains persistent dependence on image tokens across depth. Guided by this observation, we design task-specific accelerators that selectively reduce image-token computation for each objective. While these methods achieve significant efficiency gains in isolated settings, we observe a consistent synergy loss under unified training -- task-specific token dropping necessitates divergent parameter pathways and eliminates the mutual performance gains typically observed in joint optimization. Our findings suggest that efficient unified modeling requires preserving shared cross-task structures, highlighting the need for synergy-aware acceleration strategies. Project page: https://chicychen.github.io/TokenReductionUnifiedVLM/.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了统一视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在训练中的效率问题，提出并测试了基于token削减的加速策略，揭示了现有方法在联合任务训练下的协同损失，并建议未来工作需关注协同感知的加速方法。
AI.motivation: 统一视觉-语言模型能实现视觉理解和生成任务，但由于需要在单一自回归框架下处理大量模态token，训练成本极高。本研究动机在于探索是否可通过token削减方式，加速VLMs训练，并分析其效率与性能之间的权衡。
AI.method: 通过系统分析层级注意力分配，作者揭示了视觉理解和生成任务在model深度上的token依赖性差异。基于此，设计了分别针对理解和生成的token削减加速器，并在独立任务和联合训练下进行实验比较。
AI.result: 对于单独任务，token削减策略带来了显著的计算效率提升。然而，在视觉理解与生成的联合训练下，发现任务专用token丢弃导致了参数路径分歧，并损失了联合优化带来的性能协同收益。
AI.conclusion: 高效的统一VLM建模需要保留任务间的共享结构，不能简单采用各自独立的加速方法。未来加速策略应综合考虑任务间协同，开发能够兼顾共享性的高效训练方法。

title: What to Format and How: A Benchmark and Workflow Approach for Document Formatting
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened up new possibilities for automated document formatting. However, real-world formatting often requires identifying targets based on document content. This content-aware setting remains challenging and underexplored, primarily due to the lack of dedicated evaluation datasets.To enable evaluation in realistic content-aware scenarios, we introduce DocFormBench, a benchmark that extends Text-to-Format evaluation to diverse formatting requirements, along with metrics for both accuracy and efficiency.To mitigate redundant document reading in existing methods during formatting, we propose DocFormFlow, a workflow formatting method that decouples target localization from modification execution into what to format and how. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs and multimodal models show that DocFormFlow consistently improves formatting accuracy while reducing token consumption compared to representative baselines. Further analysis reveals that precise target localization is the primary factor influencing formatting performance. We hope DocFormBench and DocFormFlow will facilitate future research toward more intelligent and reliable document formatting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DocFormBench评测基准和DocFormFlow流程方法，有效提升了大模型在内容感知文档格式化任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管大模型在自动文档格式化方面取得进展，但现实应用中的格式化往往需要基于内容定位目标，这一直是一个挑战，原因主要在于缺乏专门的评估数据集。
AI.method: 1) 构建DocFormBench：一个面向内容感知文档格式化的多样化评估基准及度量体系。2) 提出DocFormFlow方法，将目标定位和格式修改解耦，分为“格式化什么”和“如何格式化”两个阶段，从而减少无效阅读过程。
AI.result: 实验覆盖多种大语言模型和多模态模型，结果显示DocFormFlow能在提升格式化准确率的同时显著降低Token消耗；分析表明，精准的目标定位是影响格式化表现的核心因素。
AI.conclusion: DocFormBench和DocFormFlow为内容感知文档格式化任务提供了新的评测标准和方法，有望推动相关智能格式化技术的研究和发展。

title: MotionDreamer: Universal Skeletal Motion Generation for 3D Rigged Shapes
summary: Motion generation for rigged shapes is vital for scalable 4D asset production. However, template-based methods are limited by specific topologies and fail to generalize across diverse morphologies. Conversely, per-case optimization is computationally expensive, susceptible to local optima, and highly sensitive to viewpoint-induced ambiguities. In this paper, we present MotionDreamer, a diffusion-based framework designed for category-agnostic skeletal animation generation from 2D video guidance. To overcome the scarcity of high-quality training data, we have curated a large-scale dynamic dataset comprising approximately 20,000 diverse 3D models, each featuring complete textures, skeletal rigging, and a wide array of comprehensive animation sequences. To bridge the kinematic gap between 2D visual motion cues and heterogeneous 3D skeletal structures, we propose a structural-semantic injection mechanism. Our model integrates texture and semantic attributes directly into skeletal joint representations. This allows it to map perceived visual dynamics to specific joint hierarchies and their functional roles. This enables MotionDreamer to synthesize high-fidelity animations that maintain anatomical consistency across a vast range of unseen categories, from existing biological species to fantastical beings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods, setting a new state-of-the-art benchmark for robust and efficient 4D asset generation. The code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的新框架MotionDreamer，能够在无需模板的前提下，根据2D视频生成适用于各种3D骨骼模型的高质量动画。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于模板的方法只能处理特定结构的形体，难以适应多样的形态。而对每个对象单独优化动画则计算代价高且易陷入局部最优，对视角不适定问题敏感。因此，需要一种兼具普适性和效率的动画生成方法。
AI.method: 1. 构建了大规模动态数据集，包括约2万个拥有完整纹理、骨骼绑定和丰富动画序列的3D模型；2. 设计了结构-语义注入机制，将纹理和语义属性直接编码进骨骼关节表示；3. 利用扩散模型实现从2D视频到骨骼动画的生成，其中模型能够理解并匹配不同骨架结构与功能。
AI.result: MotionDreamer可针对未见过的大量生物和虚构形体，自动生成结构一致、语义精确的动画，且较现有方法有显著性能提升。大量实验结果表明本方法在鲁棒性和效率上设立了新的业界标杆。
AI.conclusion: MotionDreamer实现了无模板、类别无关的2D到3D骨骼动画生成，为4D资产自动化制作提供了高效、可靠的技术路线，未来代码将开源，有望促进相关领域发展。

title: Eyettention II: A Dual-Sequence Architecture for Modeling Fixation Location, Within-Word Landing Position, and Fixation Duration in Reading
summary: The way our eyes move while reading provides valuable insights into both the reader's cognitive processes and the properties of the text. In particular, eye-tracking-while-reading data has shown to be highly beneficial in various technological applications, such as enhancing and interpreting language models and inferring a reader's characteristics. However, these applications often rely on large-scale, data-driven models, which demand extensive eye-tracking datasets that are challenging to obtain due to the resource-intensive nature of data collection. To address the challenge of data scarcity, we develop Eyettention II, an end-to-end trained deep-learning model capable of generating realistic scanpaths consisting of a complete set of fixation attributes in chronological order, including fixation location, within-word landing position, and fixation duration. Our model is lightweight, efficiently trainable on limited GPU resources, and closely aligned with cognitive theories. We demonstrate that Eyettention II surpasses state-of-the-art models in scanpath prediction and mirrors human-like gaze behavior by capturing key psycholinguistic phenomena. With its robust performance, Eyettention II holds the potential to drive advancements in natural language processing, facilitate piloting the materials of psycholinguistic experiments, and uncover new insights beyond what is explicitly encoded in theoretical cognitive models.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文介绍了一种新的深度学习模型Eyettention II，用于生成逼真的阅读眼动数据，以缓解眼动数据难以获取的问题。
AI.motivation: 眼动追踪数据能揭示读者认知过程并支持多种技术应用，但高质量数据收集成本高，数据稀缺成为制约大模型训练的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Eyettention II模型，可端到端生成包含空间与时间属性的眼动轨迹（如注视位置、词内落点、注视时长）；模型设计轻量，易于在有限GPU资源下训练，并与认知理论高度一致。
AI.result: Eyettention II在扫描路径预测上优于现有最先进模型，并能模拟人类注视行为，捕捉心理语言学相关现象。
AI.conclusion: Eyettention II性能强劲，可助力自然语言处理、语言实验材料仿真和理论认知模型之外的新发现。

title: PaCX-MAE: Physiology-Augmented Chest X-Ray Masked Autoencoder
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 3rd Workshop on Multi-modal Foundation Models and Large Language Models for Life Sciences (FM4LS)
summary: Clinical diagnosis often requires combining imaging with physiological measurements, yet deployed models typically operate on unimodal data. We present PaCX-MAE, a cross-modal distillation framework that injects physiological priors into chest X-ray (CXR) encoders while remaining strictly unimodal at inference. PaCX-MAE augments in-domain masked autoencoding with a dual contrastive-predictive objective, aligning CXR representations with paired ECG and laboratory embeddings. Extensive evaluation across nine benchmarks demonstrates consistent improvements over domain-specific MAE, particularly on physiology-dependent tasks (e.g., +2.7 AUROC on MedMod; +6.5 F1 on VinDr). The method proves highly label-efficient in the 1% regime and preserves anatomical fidelity, achieving parity with MAE on segmentation tasks. Zero-shot and attention analyses confirm that PaCX-MAE successfully learns to attend to physiological indicators, such as the cardiac silhouette, absent in standard visual pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了PaCX-MAE，一种在训练时融合生理信号先验、但推理时只需要胸部X光片的交叉模态蒸馏方法，显著提升了依赖生理解剖信息的任务表现。
AI.motivation: 临床诊断往往需要结合影像和生理数据，但现有模型大都仅用单一模态，导致对生理相关任务的表现有限。如何在只用X光片进行推理的前提下，引入生理信息，提升模型泛化和实用性，是关键挑战。
AI.method: PaCX-MAE在训练期间结合胸部X光片的掩码自编码，与心电图（ECG）和实验室结果的嵌入，通过对比预测目标对齐多模态表示，将生理先验注入视觉编码器；推理阶段仅用X光数据，实现严格单模态预测。
AI.result: 在九个数据集上，PaCX-MAE在依赖生理指标的任务上优于单一模态MAE（如MedMod AUROC提高2.7%，VinDr F1提高6.5%）；在训练样本极少（1%）时依然表现优越，解剖结构分割任务与MAE持平。
AI.conclusion: PaCX-MAE能在仅使用影像数据时有选择性地关注生理相关区域，较传统自监督视觉预训练更好地捕捉医学影像中的生理信息，提高了模型性能和数据利用效率。

title: Training Prompt Matters: State-Adaptive Optimization for Robust Fine-Tuning
summary: While prompt engineering is instrumental in maximizing the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) during inference, the role of prompts during training remains critically underexplored. Prevailing fine-tuning paradigms typically treat training prompts as mere surface forms, assuming that semantically equivalent instructions yield identical learning outcomes. However, we reveal that this equivalence is deceptive: while paraphrased prompts often lead to comparable in-task performance, they induce drastically different cross-task impacts regarding catastrophic forgetting and generalization. Crucially, these impacts are positively correlated across tasks, indicating the existence of superior prompts that consistently yield better performance. Furthermore, we discover that these superior prompts can be robustly identified by task loss prior to learning. Leveraging these insights, we introduce State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO), a lightweight yet effective training strategy that shifts task formulation from a static input to a dynamic, state-adaptive variable. Comprehensive experiments on diverse benchmarks confirm its effectiveness, which significantly mitigates forgetting while improving generalization, achieving substantial performance gains over state-of-the-art methods. These results provide insights into how training prompts shape learning dynamics and offer a practical recipe for robust fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/Eric8932/SAPO.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示训练中 prompt 设计对大模型泛化和遗忘的影响，提出动态优化策略 SAPO，大幅提升微调效果。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型微调大多只关注推理时的 prompt 设计，而忽略了训练阶段 prompt 的作用。主流做法认为语义等价的 prompt 在训练层面效果一致，但作者发现实际并非如此，因此亟需深入探索训练 prompt 的影响。
AI.method: 作者系统分析了不同语义等价 prompt 在跨任务泛化与遗忘上的表现差异，发现部分 prompt 在多任务下表现优异且可通过任务损失提前识别。基于此，提出 SAPO（State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization），将 task formulation 由静态输入转为状态自适应变量，实现训练 prompt 的动态优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，SAPO 有效减缓灾难性遗忘且增强泛化能力，性能显著优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明训练 prompt 会显著影响大模型学习效果，并提供了一种易用有效的训练 prompt 优化方法，对大模型微调实践具有重要借鉴意义。

title: PathAR: Structure-First Autoregressive Synthesis of Multimodal Pathology Images
summary: Data scarcity in multimodal pathology motivates unified generative models that synthesize modality-specific appearance while preserving anatomically coherent structure. Although modalities differ in appearance statistics, morphological structures such as cellular topology and tissue boundaries are largely preserved across acquisition protocols. However, existing methods often model these factors within a homogeneous token stream, implicitly coupling structure with appearance and weakening structural controllability under modality shifts. To address this, we propose pathology Autorgressive modeling (PathAR), a structure-first autoregressive synthesis framework that explicitly factorizes structure and appearance for modality-label-conditioned pathology generation.PathAR employs a dual vector quantization (Dual-VQ) tokenizer to decompose samples into mask-grounded structure and appearance tokens, and an interleaved autoregressive (IAR) transformer with asymmetric attention visibility to enforce structure-to-appearance dependence. PathAR stabilizes morphology under heterogeneous modality-specific appearances and enables spatially aligned image--mask pair generation. Extensive experiments show that PathAR improves structural consistency and modality fidelity over baselines, maintains sample diversity, supports downstream segmentation in data-scarce regimes, and demonstrates extensibility to finer-grained intra-modality organ-label variation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的结构-优先自回归合成框架PathAR，用于多模态病理图像的生成，通过显式分离结构和外观，提升结构一致性和模态保真度。
AI.motivation: 多模态病理图像数据稀缺，现有生成方法难以在模态变化时维持结构可控性，因为结构与外观混合建模。希望能生成结构一致且模态特异的图像，缓解下游任务（如分割）的数据稀缺问题。
AI.method: 提出PathAR框架，通过Dual-VQ tokenizer把病理样本分解为结构token（基于掩码）和外观token，并用特殊的IAR Transformer（结构到外观的非对称注意力机制）建模两者关系，实现有标签条件下的图像生成。
AI.result: PathAR在结构一致性、模态保真度、样本多样性上优于主流方法，并且能产生空间对齐的图像-掩码对，且在数据稀缺场景下提升分割性能，对更细粒度的器官标签也有拓展性。
AI.conclusion: PathAR有效提升了跨模态病理生成的结构控制和模态适应能力，为精细分割和数据扩充等下游任务带来显著优势。

title: MMG2Skill: Can Agents Distill In-the-Wild Guides into Self-Evolving Skills?
summary: Abundant procedural knowledge on the Web holds great potential for helping agents solve long-horizon tasks. However, such knowledge is often multimodal, heterogeneous, noisy, and implicitly assumes human executors, making it difficult to use directly as the skills required by agents. To bridge the gap between human-oriented guides and agent-executable skills, we formalize this problem as guide-to-skill learning: converting in-the-wild guides into executable skills and continuously improving them from trajectories observable to the agent. To evaluate the capability of existing agents on this task, we introduce MMG2Skill-Bench, the first benchmark designed for this problem. We further propose MMG2Skill, a closed-loop framework that compiles guides into editable skills, conditions a fixed vision-language model (VLM) agent on these skills during execution, and revises the skills from trajectory-level root-cause feedback without using benchmark scores. Across GUI control, open-ended gameplay, and strategic card play with six VLM backbones, MMG2Skill consistently outperforms vanilla baseline agents in every model-domain setting, achieving macro-average gains of +12.8 to +25.3 percentage points across backbones. Ablation studies show that directly prompting agents with raw guides can degrade performance, while both structured skill construction and trajectory-driven revision are necessary for the observed improvements. On success-inferable tasks, analyzer-based early stopping further prevents late-stage performance regressions and saves 25%-53% of attempts when the success signal is properly calibrated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMG2Skill框架，将网络上的人类操作指南转化为agent可执行技能，并在新基准MMG2Skill-Bench上验证了现有agent的能力。实验证明该方法超越基线，有效提升多领域、多模型表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管网络上存在丰富的操作指南，但这些知识多为非结构化、人类导向、不易直接转化为agent可用的技巧。因此急需方法将通用指南转变为可执行的技能。
AI.method: 提出guide-to-skill学习框架，并设计MMG2Skill流程：1) 从多模态指南构造可编辑技能；2) 在agent执行时输入这些技能；3) 根据agent的操作轨迹反馈持续修正技能，无需标注得分。还开发了首个相关基准MMG2Skill-Bench，横跨多领域、多VLM模型开展实证。
AI.result: 在GUI控制、开放式游戏和策略卡牌等任务中，MMG2Skill用六种主流VLM骨干始终优于普通baseline，平均性能提升12.8~25.3个百分点。消融实验表明，直接用原始指南会降低效果，规范技能构建与基于轨迹的技能修正对优化有显著贡献。早停机制还能节省25%-53%尝试次数。
AI.conclusion: 将网络指南转化为agent技能具备重大实用价值，MMG2Skill框架验证了此思路的有效性，并为今后研究提出了一个新的、可自动评测的基准测试。

title: ForestMamba: Sparse Mamba with Geometry-guided Queries for 3D Forest Point Cloud Segmentation
summary: AI-based semantic and instance segmentation of terrestrial and drone LiDAR point clouds is emerging as a transformative approach for converting the complex 3D structure of forests into actionable information for forest monitoring and biodiversity assessment. However, forest LiDAR scenes remain highly challenging due to their large data volumes, irregular sampling density, overlapping and complex canopy structure, and geographic variability. Existing methods based on sparse convolutions or Transformers achieve promising results, but suffer from two key limitations: Quadratic complexity of attention scales poorly to large forest scenes, and Generic context modeling does not exploit forest structural priors, limiting tree separation in complex regions. To address these challenges, we propose ForestMamba, a structure-aware method that incorporates forest-specific priors into feature encoding, query generation, and query refinement, while replacing quadratic attention with linear-time state-space modeling. First, we introduce a sparse encoder with vertical-priority slab serialization that organizes sparse voxels into vertically coherent sequences for efficient long-range context modeling. Second, we propose a geometry-guided query initialization strategy based on an on-the-fly multi-scale Canopy Height Model (CHM), where canopy maxima provide ecologically meaningful query seeds, supplemented by Farthest Point Sampling (FPS) to cover understory trees. Third, we design a Mamba-based query decoder that combines local kNN voxel aggregation with a spatial dual-path Mamba for query refinement with linear computational complexity. Extensive experiments across seven forest regions demonstrate that ForestMamba consistently outperforms existing baselines in both segmentation tasks, while achieving 3 times faster inference and 2.3 times lower GPU memory than Transformer-based methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为ForestMamba的新方法，用于高效、准确地对森林LiDAR点云数据进行语义与实例分割，显著提升了处理大规模复杂森林场景的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 传统基于稀疏卷积或Transformer的方法在森林大场景点云处理上存在计算复杂度高、泛化能力有限和未能有效利用森林结构先验信息等问题，影响了森林监测与生物多样性评估的准确性和实用性。
AI.method: 作者提出ForestMamba结构感知方法，核心包括：1）采用垂直优先的稀疏编码器，将点云体素组织为便于建模的垂直序列，高效捕捉上下文关联；2）结合多尺度冠层高程模型（CHM）与最远点采样，进行几何引导的查询初始化，确保地上与林下树木特征均被充分覆盖；3）利用基于Mamba的查询解码器以及k近邻局部聚合和空间双路径结构，实现线性复杂度下的高效特征精炼。
AI.result: 在七个不同森林地区进行的大量实验表明，ForestMamba在语义和实例分割两大任务上均显著优于现有基线方法，并且推理速度提升3倍，显存消耗下降至Transformer方法的2.3倍以下。
AI.conclusion: ForestMamba有效整合森林结构先验与高效的时空特征建模，实现了大规模复杂林区LiDAR点云的高精度与高效率分割，为森林生态监测与生物多样性评估提供了有力工具。

title: CARTE: A Benchmark for Mapping Language Model Knowledge Across France
summary: We introduce CARTE 1 (Culturally Anchored Regional-Territorial Evaluation), a multiplechoice benchmark for evaluating the ability of large language models (LLMs) to perform fine-grained reasoning over geographically grounded and regionally differentiated knowledge within France. While prior benchmarks focus on national-level cultural understanding, they largely overlook intra-country variation and the need to distinguish between closely related regional contexts. CARTE addresses this gap by introducing 2,431 questions spanning the 13 metropolitan regions of France and covering 14 thematic domains, including culture, language, demographics, economy, environment, and mobility. We further introduce CARTE-LV, a subset targeting Linguistic Variation across French regions, enabling focused evaluation of language-related differences. We evaluate 27 LLMs ranging from 1B to 12B parameters under few-shot settings. Our experiments reveal performance disparities across regions and model scales, suggesting systematic gaps in pretraining coverage and limited robustness to intra-national variation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了CARTE 1基准，用于评测大语言模型在法国不同地区细粒度地理文化知识推理能力，并发现现有模型在地区层面存在显著性能差异。
AI.motivation: 目前大语言模型的文化知识评测集中在国家层面，忽视了国家内部区域的细微差别。法国各地区文化、语言等方面有重要差异，需要新的评测框架以反映模型对这些细节的把握能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了CARTE 1问答基准，涵盖法国13个大区与14个主题领域，总计2431道选择题，还提出了专注地区语言变异的CARTE-LV子集。使用27个不同规模（1B至12B参数）的LLM在few-shot设置下测试。
AI.result: 实验发现，不同模型和地区的表现差距明显，表明预训练语料覆盖不均及模型对国内区域细微差异的鲁棒性不足。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM在同一国家内部的地区文化知识推理和区分上能力有限，需改进数据和方法以提升模型对区域差异的认知。

title: Attention-guided Fine-tuning of Multimodal Large Language Models Improves Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: The effectiveness of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) remains uncertain: across several visual reasoning benchmarks, CoT prompting often degrades performance compared to direct prompting. In this paper, we provide a systematic analysis of CoT behavior in three modern MLLM families across model scales on datasets requiring step-wise visual evidence. Our analysis identifies two recurring failure modes: premature answer commitment and limited direct visual-token access during rationale generation. We further find that standard CoT-style Supervised Fine-Tuning (CoT-SFT) can mitigate these issues only partially, while often increasing reliance on textual priors and reducing counterfactual visual dependence. Motivated by these findings, we propose Attentive-CoT (Att-CoT), an attention-guided fine-tuning objective that encourages CoT trajectories to delay answer commitment while maintaining sustained visual-token access. Att-CoT can be plugged into any CoT-SFT training run without architectural changes. Experiments on three visual reasoning benchmarks across six MLLMs show that Att-CoT enhances CoT performance over standard fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了在多模态大模型中链式思维（CoT）提示的有效性和局限，提出了Attentive-CoT方法，实验验证其能提升模型的视觉推理能力。
AI.motivation: 在多模态大模型（MLLMs）的视觉推理任务中，链式思维（CoT）提示未必提升性能，甚至常常相较于直接提示有退步。该现象缺乏系统性分析，因此作者希望明确CoT在MLLMs中的表现及其失败原因，并寻找提升方案。
AI.method: 作者通过实验和分析，系统地考察了三大类现代MLLMs在多个视觉推理数据集上的CoT表现，揭示了主要失败模式。针对发现的问题，提出了一种新型的attention引导链式思维微调目标（Attentive-CoT），该方法能够延缓过早作答，并提升模型获取视觉token的能力，无需改变模型结构即可应用。
AI.result: Attentive-CoT方法在6种MLLMs和3个视觉推理基准上的实验结果显示，能明显提升CoT推理性能，相较于标准的CoT微调表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 标准CoT微调无法彻底解决CoT推理中的关键缺陷，Attentive-CoT通过优化推理过程中的注意力与作答时序，有效增强了多模态大模型的视觉推理能力。

title: Scaling Agentic Capabilities via Grounded Interaction Synthesis
summary: General agentic intelligence hinges on the ability to interact with diverse real-world tools to complete complex tasks, a capability fundamentally tied to the quality of interaction data. To bypass the prohibitive costs of human annotation, prevailing paradigms depend entirely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to scale the synthesis of agentic environments and tasks. However, such unconstrained generation often degenerates into biased random sampling of LLMs' internal priors, failing to capture the diversity and difficulty of real-world domains or construct high-fidelity, long-horizon tasks. In this work, we introduce Grounded Agentic Interaction Synthesis (GAIS), a framework that automates the scalable construction of diverse environments and complex tasks via a two-phase grounding mechanism. Specifically, we construct protocol-anchored environments derived from real-world Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to ensure functional diversity and difficulty. Subsequently, we employ structure-guided planning to navigate these environments, actively enforcing logical dependencies and adversarial policies to generate complex tasks. Experiments on BFCL, $τ^2$-Bench, and ACEBench demonstrate that GAIS-synthesized data significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, enabling base models to match or even surpass their official instruction-tuned counterparts. Furthermore, GAIS exhibits superior data efficiency and scalability, achieving exceptional capabilities with significantly less data while maintaining continuous growth where baselines stagnate. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/Eric8932/GAIS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GAIS框架，通过自动化和可扩展的方法生成多样且复杂的代理智能环境和任务，克服了现有基于LLM自动合成环境的局限，并显著提升了基础模型的能力和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 当前依赖LLM自动生成环境与任务来驱动通用代理智能发展，但这种方法缺乏现实环境多样性与复杂性，经常陷入局部偏见，难以合成高质量、长程任务。
AI.method: GAIS框架分为两阶段：首先从真实世界MCP协议服务器中构建协议锚定的多样环境；然后用结构引导的规划方法在这些环境中设计复杂任务，主动施加逻辑依赖与对抗策略，以提升难度与真实性。
AI.result: 在BFCL、$\tau^2$-Bench和ACEBench等平台实验证明，GAIS生成的数据极大优于现有方法，使得基础模型达到甚至超过官方微调模型水准。同时，GAIS具有更高的数据效率和可扩展性，在少数据情况下仍保持性能持续提升。
AI.conclusion: GAIS突破了现有合成范式的局限，实现了高质量、复杂环境和任务的自动生成，并为发展通用代理智能提供了新路径和强大数据支持。

title: $\text{VG}^2$GT: Voxel-Gaussian Splatting Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer
summary: Gaussian splatting has shown strong potential for 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis. However, most existing methods require accurate camera parameters and per-scene optimization, while feed-forward methods with pixel-aligned Gaussian primitives often suffer from artifacts and non-uniform primitives. In this paper, we propose $\text{VG}^2$GT, a Voxel-Gaussian Splatting Visual Geometry-Grounded Transformer. $\text{VG}^2$GT leverages a frozen pretrained visual foundation model (VFM), incorporates a multi-scale differentiable voxel module to enhance geometric understanding, and directly splits and regresses Gaussian primitive parameters from voxel features. During training, depth maps are supervised through stochastic solid volume rendering, enabling geometrically accurate Gaussian scene reconstruction while keeping the visual foundation model fully frozen. This design enables $\text{VG}^2$GT to be seamlessly plugged into any patch-feature-based VFM, while substantially reducing the required training cost. $\text{VG}^2$GT outperforms current state-of-the-art methods on widely used DTU, Replica, TAT, and ScanNet datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VG^2GT方法，利用预训练视觉基础模型和多尺度体素模块提升3D重建与新视角合成表现，免去了复杂优化和训练负担，并在多项主流数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前高斯抛洒法在三维重建和新视角合成中表现出色，但往往依赖准确的相机参数和每个场景的优化流程，端到端的快速方法通常又会出现伪影和不均匀原语问题。降低训练和优化成本、提升效果的同时增强泛用性成为核心动力。
AI.method: 提出VG^2GT，通过冻结的预训练视觉基础模型提供语义感知，结合多尺度可微分体素模块提升几何理解能力。GAUSSIAN参数由体素特征直接回归得到，训练阶段用随机体积渲染的深度图进行监督，保证几何精确，同时模块化设计可灵活接入VFM的patch特征。
AI.result: VG^2GT在DTU、Replica、TAT和ScanNet等主流数据集上对比现有SOTA方法取得了更好的表现，同时大幅降低了训练成本。
AI.conclusion: VG^2GT兼顾了高效、泛用与精确性，实现端到端训练与高质量三维重建，并且便于和视觉基础模型结合，在实际应用中具有更强的灵活性和应用前景。

title: Machine Learning for Coding Retail Product Names to Consumer-Price Categories: A Rule-plus-Bag-of-Words Pipeline with Reliability-Weighted Human-in-the-Loop Labeling
comment: 11 pages, 3 tables. Methodology paper; illustrative experiments only, no proprietary data
summary: Consumer-price measurement increasingly draws on alternative data sources -- scanner, web-scraped, and transaction/receipt data. A recurring obstacle is that product descriptions in such sources are short, noisy, and abbreviated, with no standard product code, so each item must first be mapped to a consumption classification (e.g., the UN COICOP scheme) before prices can be compared. This paper studies that mapping as a general, reproducible method. The pipeline is: (i) text normalization and tokenization of noisy item names; (ii) a prefix-tree (trie) rule-based pre-classifier driven by per-category key-phrases and stop-phrases; and (iii) a per-category binary confirmation model deciding whether an item belongs to a tentatively assigned category. For labels at scale we use a human-in-the-loop protocol in which annotators give a binary valid/reject judgment, aggregated by a dynamically updated reliability weight; the model joins the same rule, enabling continual fine-tuning. Our empirical finding is deflationary: in a controlled, leakage-free study (one category, real positives vs. hard negatives, five seeds), bag-of-words models essentially saturate the task (F1 about 0.99) -- a linear classifier matches a multilayer perceptron, explicit word-order (n-gram) features add nothing, and about 67 labeled examples already suffice. A Monte-Carlo study of the labeling protocol shows the reliability-weighted vote barely beats plain majority (its additive weights saturate) while Dawid-Skene recovers labels markedly better. We also discuss price-level quality control and design lessons for statistical offices considering transaction data. All figures are illustrative; no confidential data, code, or documentation is reproduced.

AI.tldr: 该文提出了一套将商品文本信息自动映射至消费分类体系（如COICOP）的通用、可复现方法，适用于噪声大、无标准编码的扫描、爬虫和交易数据。实验显示，只需少量标注样本，简单的词袋模型即可高效完成任务、性能接近饱和。
AI.motivation: 当前消费价格指标大量依赖于非结构化的实时数据源（如扫描、网页爬取等），但数据中商品描述简短、杂乱且无标准编码，亟需自动分类至统一消费类别，以方便后续价格比对与统计。
AI.method: 提出流水线式方法，包括：(1) 商品名文本的标准化与分词；(2) 基于前缀树和关键词的规则初步分类器；(3) 针对每个类别的二元确认模型。标注依赖人-机协作流程，并用加权机制集成人工判定及模型预测。引入Dawid-Skene方法提升标签质量。
AI.result: 在真实、严格控泄漏实验中，词袋线性模型（F1≈0.99）与多层感知机表现持平，建议无需复杂模型和大样本。可靠性加权投票提升有限，而传统Dawid-Skene更优。
AI.conclusion: 对统计局等机构而言，消费品自动分类任务可依赖简单规则与词袋模型高效完成，仅需极少量标签即可满足精度要求；同时，规范的数据质控与标注协议尤为重要。

title: Deformable Wiener Filter for Future Video Coding
comment: This paper has been published in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
summary: In-loop filters have attracted increasing attention due to the remarkable noise-reduction capability in the hybrid video coding framework. However, the existing in-loop filters in Versatile Video Coding (VVC) mainly take advantage of the image local similarity. Although some non-local based in-loop filters can make up for this shortcoming, the widely-used unsupervised parameter estimation method by non-local filters limits the performance. In view of this, we propose a deformable Wiener Filter (DWF). It combines the local and non-local characteristics and supervisedly trains the filter coefficients based on the Wiener Filter theory. In the filtering process, local adjacent samples and non-local similar samples are first derived for each sample of interest. Then the to-be-filtered samples are classified into specific groups based on the patch level noise and sample-level characteristics. Samples in each group share the same filter coefficients. After that, the local and non-local reference samples are adaptively fused based on the classification results. Finally, the filtering operation with outlier data constraints is conducted for each to-be-filtered sample. Moreover, the performance of the proposed DWF is analyzed with different reference sample derivation schemes in detail. Simulation results show that the proposed approach achieves 1.16%, 1.92%, and 2.67% bit-rate savings on average compared to the VTM-11.0 for All Intra, Random Access, and Low-Delay B configurations, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合局部与非局部特性的可变形Wiener滤波器（DWF），在VVC视频编码中实现更高效的去噪和码率节省。
AI.motivation: 现有VVC中的环路滤波器主要利用图像的局部相似性，部分非局部滤波器虽弥补了不足，但其常见的无监督参数估计方法限制了性能提升，因此需要更有效的滤波器。
AI.method: 作者提出了可变形Wiener滤波器（DWF），其监督性地训练滤波器系数，结合局部和非局部参考样本，并通过将待滤波样本按噪声和特性分组，自适应融合参考样本，并在滤波过程中引入异常值约束。
AI.result: 仿真结果显示，所提DWF在VVC的三种典型配置（All Intra、Random Access、Low-Delay B）下，比标准VTM-11.0分别节省1.16%、1.92%、2.67%的码率。
AI.conclusion: 结合局部与非局部特性的DWF有效提升了VVC中的环路滤波性能，实现了更优的去噪与码率节省，是对现有滤波技术的有益补充。

title: Automated Essay Scoring and Language Certification: Assessing Generalizability, Agreement and Validity for French
summary: In Automated Essay Scoring (AES), benchmarking practices have fostered minimalist evaluation practices, in contrast with the broader-view recommendations of evaluation frameworks, such as the argument-based validation framework (ABV), which argued in favor of a multidimensional assessment of systems, especially in the context of high-stakes language tests. In this paper, we introduce an enhanced and more practical version of the ABV framework, incorporating fairness analysis, correlations with linguistic features, prediction error evaluation, and model agreement compared with human raters. Applying this framework to French AES, we compare 8 model architectures on a corpus of 27k exam essays (2 raters each) and a generalization corpus of 961 essays (at least nine raters each). Our analyses illustrate the benefits of applying the ABV framework to better understand the capabilities and pitfalls of AES models, while also advancing the state-of-the-art for French AES.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自动作文评分（AES）提出了增强版的ABV评估框架，并通过大规模法语作文语料评测了8种模型架构，验证该框架对AES模型多维评估的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统AES评测偏向简化的单一指标，与ABV等广泛评估框架提倡的多维分析不符。尤其是在高风险语言考试场景下，单一指标可能掩盖模型的偏差或不足。本文旨在扩展和实用化ABV框架，促进AES评价的系统性和全面性。
AI.method: 提出了包含公平性分析、语言特征相关性、预测误差和与人工评分一致度的新型ABV评估框架，并用该框架在法语大型考试语料库和泛化语料（总计近2.8万篇作文， 多人评分）上对8种AES模型进行对比分析。
AI.result: 通过实证分析，展示了强化版ABV框架能够更好地揭示AES系统的能力和局限，为模型改进以及法语AES新技术发展提供了评测依据与实证基础。
AI.conclusion: 多维度ABV框架提升了AES模型的科学评估水平，推动了更公平、透明和高效的自动评分系统研究，尤其对法语作文评分起到前沿引领作用。

title: FLAME: Physics-Guided Neural Operators for Onboard Satellite Methane Detection in Hyperspectral Imagery
summary: Methane is a major driver of near-term climate change, and rapidly identifying its emission sources is a critical climate intervention. Spaceborne hyperspectral imagery is the primary tool for this task, but the volume of data produced by each sensor makes ground-based detection impractical and necessitates onboard detection. Classical methods incur prohibitive computational cost on onboard hardware, while deep learning models are fast but fall short on detection quality. We propose FLAME, a physics-guided neural operator that builds the physics of methane absorption directly into its architecture. On the methane detection benchmark, FLAME achieves the highest detection accuracy among all evaluated methods, reduces the pixel-level false positive rate by nearly $3\times$ over the strongest neural baseline, uses the fewest parameters among learned baselines, and runs within the latency budget of onboard satellite hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FLAME的物理引导神经算子，用于卫星甲烷排放检测。相比传统和深度学习方法，FLAME准确率更高、参数更少且满足卫星硬件延迟预算。
AI.motivation: 甲烷是导致短期气候变化的主要因素，快速识别其排放源对气候干预至关重要。现有基于卫星高光谱影像的检测方法数据量大，传统方法计算量过高，而深度学习方法虽快但检测质量不佳，亟需一种兼具高效和高质量的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种将甲烷吸收物理过程直接嵌入神经网络结构的神经算子FLAME，实现了物理与深度学习的结合、高效的排放检测，实现了卫星上的实时检测。
AI.result: 在甲烷检测基准测试中，FLAME相较于所有评估方法具有最高的检测准确率，像素级假阳性率相比最强的神经网络基线降低了近3倍，参数量最少，并能满足卫星硬件的实时延迟要求。
AI.conclusion: FLAME兼顾高准确率与高效率，解决了现有卫星甲烷检测方法在算力与精度上的矛盾，为空间甲烷检测提供了实用方案。

title: PlanarBench: Evaluating LLM Spatial Reasoning via Planar Graph Drawing
summary:
PlanarBench tests whether LLMs can draw planar graphs as ASCII art given only an edge list -- a spatial reasoning task that resists memorization because edge order, edge orientation, and node labels are all permutable.
  We evaluate 91 models on the 199 simplest non-isomorphic connected planar graphs (2 - 7 vertices).
  Edge count is the dominant difficulty predictor ($r = -0.85$) -- a finding not reported in prior LLM graph benchmarks, which use only node count as the difficulty axis.

AI.tldr: PlanarBench测试LLM根据仅有的边列表绘制平面图（ASCII图形）的能力，发现边的数量是任务难度的主要影响因素。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM图任务基准大多只依据节点数量评估难度，缺乏对更复杂空间推理任务的专门测试。作者设计PlanarBench，旨在系统评估LLM在空间推理和绘图方面的能力，特别是在边顺序、方向及节点标记任意变化的背景下。
AI.method: 作者构建了PlanarBench基准，要求模型根据边列表绘制平面图（ASCII艺术）。选择了199个最简单的、非同构且连通的平面图（2到7节点）。测试共评估了91个不同的LLM。分析模型绘图成功与否的影响因素，并统计相关性。
AI.result: 实验表明，边的数量是本任务难度最主要的决定因素（相关系数r = -0.85），而以往只关注节点数量的基准没有发现这一点。
AI.conclusion: PlanarBench揭示了距离空间推理相关的平面图绘图任务中，边的数量对LLM难度有重要影响。建议在未来的LLM基准设计中，纳入更多复杂的结构属性作为难度指标。

title: Effective Multi-sensor Conditioning for Street-view Novel-view Synthesis
summary:
Modern vehicle platforms are equipped with a rich sensor suite, including LiDAR, calibrated multi-camera rigs, and accurate ego-motion, that in principle offers strong signal for re-rendering a driving scene from novel viewpoints. A growing line of recent work leverages video diffusion models for this task, using their generative priors to synthesize plausible novel views from sparse vehicle observations. In practice, however, existing methods exploit only a fragment of this signal, and their quality tends to degrade as the target trajectory departs from the recorded driving path. We argue that this is fundamentally a multi-sensor fusion problem: sparse LiDAR reprojections supply accurate but incomplete metric geometry, surround-view reference imagery supplies dense appearance but no metric depth, and camera poses tie the two together across views. We introduce StreetNVS, a video diffusion framework that jointly conditions on all three signals through a Reference-Enhanced Camera Attention module based on a relative ray-level positional encoding. We develop a two-stage curriculum training strategy that gradually exposes the model to increasingly sparse LiDAR. On the Waymo Open Dataset, StreetNVS substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under sparse LiDAR conditioning, matches methods that rely on 10-100 times denser point clouds. We further show capabilities of synthesizing coherent videos along extreme out-of-trajectory paths such as elevation, lane-shift, pullback, and rotation.
  Our website: https://streetnvs.github.io

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了StreetNVS，一种结合多传感器信息的新型视频扩散模型框架，可根据稀疏车辆观测合成驾驶场景的新视角，实现比现有方法更高质量的视角合成，尤其在激光雷达点云稀疏情况下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有利用视频扩散模型进行新视点合成的方法，只利用了车辆传感器信息的一小部分，而且在生成轨迹偏离实际驾驶路径时，合成质量急剧下降。作者认为该问题的本质是多传感器数据融合，需要同时利用激光雷达、摄像头参考图像以及摄像头姿态三类数据。
AI.method: 作者提出StreetNVS框架，通过融合稀疏激光雷达、全景参考图像和摄像头位姿，通过创新的Reference-Enhanced Camera Attention模块实现相对光线级位置编码。此外，采用两阶段课程训练策略，逐步让模型适应越来越稀疏的激光雷达输入。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset测试中，StreetNVS在稀疏激光雷达场景下显著优于当前主流方法，性能甚至能匹配依赖10-100倍更密集激光点云的模型。同时能在非标准轨迹如爬升、侧移、拉远、旋转等情况下合成连贯场景视频。
AI.conclusion: StreetNVS能够高效整合多源传感器数据，在稀疏观测条件下实现高质量、多样化的新视点视频合成，对自动驾驶和虚拟现实等领域具有重要价值。

title: Unveiling the Entropy Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: This paper investigates the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and uncovers a consistent two-phase structure: an Uncertainty Region of exploration transitioning sharply to a Confidence Region of convergence. We demonstrate that the Confidence Region possesses two critical properties: 1) High Reliability -- answers in the confidence region become highly accurate and stable, and 2) High Redundancy -- models generate unnecessary tokens long after reaching the correct answer. These properties unlock more efficient and reliable inference strategies: 1) Early Exit leverages reliability and redundancy to terminate computation safely when returns diminish, and 2)Test-Time Scaling uses the Confidence Region signal to prioritize converged trajectories. To operationalize these insights, we formulate Confidence Region detection as a sequential change-point detection problem, being the first to apply classical change-point methods to monitor CoT reasoning. Using the Cumulative Sum (CUSUM) algorithm, a statistically optimal change-point detector, we develop a training-free framework for real-time inference control. Experiments show our approach establishes a superior Pareto-frontier for early exit. CUSUM achieves 63.06% accuracy with 11.1% token reduction, outperforming DEER and Dynasor by 3.28% and 4.36% in accuracy respectively. For test-time scaling, CUSUM-weighted voting consistently outperforms self-consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理过程中熵的动态变化，发现存在从不确定区域到置信区域的“两阶段结构”，并提出利用这种结构以提升推理效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 尽管CoT已被广泛使用提升大模型的推理能力，其输出的有效性与效率问题仍未充分探索，尤其是在识别答案可靠性的基础上改进推理机制。
AI.method: 作者通过分析CoT推理序列中的熵变化，发现推理过程可分为探索阶段（不确定区域）与收敛阶段（置信区域）。针对置信区域，利用统计学中的CUSUM算法进行变点检测，无需训练即可实时控推理流程，并提出早停和置信区域加权投票的实用策略。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在推理流程中能有效实现早停，在保持63.06%准确率的同时减少了11.1%的token消耗，在准确率上分别超越DEER和Dynasor方法3.28%与4.36%；在测试阶段的归纳能力（voting）也优于自一致性方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将变点检测方法应用于CoT推理的自适应推理控制，实现了推理效率与准确性的双提升，为实际大模型推理提供了高效实用的技术路径。

title: TLG: Temporal-Logic Grounding for Video Question Answering via Source-Annotation Reconstruction and Category-Targeted Reasoning
summary: The TimeLogic Challenge evaluates formal temporal-logic reasoning over video - 16 operators (before, after, until, since, always, co-occur, ordering, ...) in boolean and 4-way multiple-choice form. End-to-end video-language models (VLMs) hover near chance on this task because they treat video as a bag of frames and cannot localize when actions occur. We present TLG (Temporal-Logic Grounding), a three-tier system that (i) reconstructs each video's action timeline from the public source-dataset annotations the benchmark was generated from, parses every question into a temporal-logic program, and executes it deterministically; (ii) falls back to a strong open VLM where no annotation exists; and (iii) routes only the question categories where the VLM is empirically weakest to a frontier reasoning model. TLG raises test accuracy from a 46.9% VLM baseline to 71.37%, a +24.5 absolute gain, reaching within 3 points of the leaderboard top. We report extensive ablations, including three model-based timeline-reconstruction variants that all underperform a holistic VLM, isolating temporal grounding as the irreducible bottleneck and showing that real annotations - not larger models - drive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TLG系统，通过结合视频注释、程序化时序推理以及多模型路由，大幅提升了视频时序逻辑推理任务的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频-语言模型（VLMs）难以处理涉及时间逻辑推理的问题，因为它们无法准确定位视频中动作发生的时间，仅仅将视频视为静态帧的集合，导致在TimeLogic Challenge上表现接近随机。作者希望突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出了三级TLG系统：首先复原视频的动作时间线，并将问题解析为时序逻辑程序执行；当无注释时，采用强大的开放VLM模型；对于VLM表现较差的问题类型，则转由前沿推理模型处理。并进行了多种消融实验。
AI.result: TLG系统使测试准确率从基线VLM的46.9%提升至71.37%，获得24.5个百分点的绝对提升，几乎接近排行榜前三的成绩。同时，基于模型的时间线恢复方法都不如直接用VLM的整体表现，突显真实注释的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 时序基础的动作定位和真实注释是提升视频时序逻辑推理准确性的关键，而仅仅扩大模型规模不能解决此类推理瓶颈。

title: SentGuard: Sentence-Level Streaming Guardrails for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models increasingly stream long, reasoning-intensive responses in real time, making when to moderate as critical as whether to moderate. Existing guardrails fall into two unsatisfactory extremes: response-level methods delay intervention until the full output is generated, whereas token-level methods act on incomplete semantics, often producing unstable decisions and excessive guard invocations. To address this challenge, we propose SentGuard, a sentence-level streaming guardrail that operates in parallel with generation. A lightweight waiting buffer groups streamed tokens into sentence chunks and releases only verified chunks to the user, introducing a small offset that enables SentGuard to assess the current prefix while the target LLM decodes subsequent content. To support this, we construct StreamSafe, a benchmark with structured per-sentence annotations across 8 harm categories, capturing the evolution of safety risks across both reasoning and response segments. We further train SentGuard with a coarse-to-fine objective to detect unsafe intent as soon as it emerges at sentence boundaries. Experiments on 5 safety benchmarks show that SentGuard outperforms existing baselines, detecting 90.5% of unsafe cases within two sentences while maintaining a low streaming false-positive rate of 7.41%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SentGuard，一种面向大语言模型（LLMs）实时流式输出安全守护的新方法。该方法可更及时地检测和阻止不安全内容，并表现优于现有方案。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全守护方法存在两极化问题：完整响应级方法介入滞后，实时性差；逐token方法语义完整性差，稳定性和准确性不足。因此，需要在保障语义完整性的同时提升检测响应的及时性。
AI.method: SentGuard在LLM生成过程中并行运行，通过轻量级缓冲区将流式输出按句子分组，并仅将已验证的语句发送给用户。引入StreamSafe基准数据集，包含逐句标注的八大伤害类别，辅助训练和评估。采用粗到细的目标训练模型，在新句子边界即检测到不安全意图。
AI.result: 在5个安全性基准测试中，SentGuard检测到90.5%的不安全情况，延迟不超过两句话，同时流式误报率仅为7.41%，优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: SentGuard有效提升了LLM流式输出的安全性，兼顾响应及时性和判别准确性，为未来大模型安全系统提供了新范式。

title: DFlare: Scaling Up Draft Capacity for Block Diffusion Speculative Decoding
summary: Block diffusion speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by predicting all tokens within a block simultaneously for the target model to verify in parallel. Predicting an entire block at once requires a sufficiently capable draft model and effective utilization of the target model's internal knowledge. However, the state-of-the-art method DFlash constrains all draft layers to share a single fused representation derived from only a few target layers, limiting per-layer expressiveness and hindering further scaling of draft capacity. In this paper, we present \modelname, which flares out the narrow conditioning bottleneck of DFlash through a lightweight layer-wise fusion mechanism: each draft layer attends to its own learnable combination of a broad set of target layers at negligible overhead, simultaneously injecting richer target knowledge and providing every draft layer with a distinct input. This enhanced per-layer expressiveness enables scaling the draft model to deeper architectures with consistent gains. We further scale training data from 800K to 2.4M samples to fully exploit the enlarged capacity. On six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and conversation, \modelname attains average wall-clock speedups of 5.52x on Qwen3-4B, 5.46x on Qwen3-8B, and 3.91x on GPT-OSS-20B, improving over DFlash by roughly 11\%, 8\%, and 5\% respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的大模型并行推理方法，通过块扩散推测解码（block diffusion speculative decoding）大幅提升推理速度，在多个基准测试中均优于此前的DFlash方法。
AI.motivation: 主流的块推测解码，如DFlash，将所有草稿层（draft layers）压缩到仅由少数目标层（target layers）生成的单一融合表示，造成表达受限，不利于草稿模型扩容，影响性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的轻量级分层融合机制，让每个草稿层都能根据一组目标层的可学习组合进行自注意力融合，不再共享单一表示，从而增强每层表达力，并将训练样本数从80万扩展至240万，配合更深草稿模型充分利用其能力。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成与对话等六大基准测试上，所提方法在Qwen3-4B上平均推理速度提升5.52倍，Qwen3-8B提升5.46倍，GPT-OSS-20B提升3.91倍，相较DFlash分别多提升约11%、8%和5%。
AI.conclusion: 改进的层级融合与更大的训练集显著增强了草稿模型能力，实现了更快的大模型推理速度，表现优于DFlash，为LLM推理加速提供了更高效的可扩展方案。

title: EIVE: End-to-End Instance-Specific Visual Explanations for Detection Transformers
summary: Visual explainability for object detection remains challenging due to the multi-instance nature of detection. Existing approaches predominantly adopt post-hoc paradigms, such as gradient-based or perturbation-based explanation methods, to interpret pretrained detectors. However, these methods require additional gradient computation or repeated model inference, resulting in limited efficiency. To address this issue, we propose an End-to-end Instance-specific Visual Explanation framework (EIVE) that directly generates instance-level saliency maps following the forward pass of Detection Transformer (DETR)-like models. Specifically, we reformulate the cross-attention mechanism in the decoder as an instance-level feature attribution pathway, so that the cross-attention of each object query corresponds to the visual attribution of its predicted instance. Based on this formulation, we design a cross-layer hybrid consensus fusion (CLHCF) module to aggregate cross-attention signals across decoder layers, producing stable and compact explanations. The explanation process of EIVE requires neither gradient computation nor input perturbation, yielding high computational efficiency, and applies to single- and multi-scale DETR-like object detectors. Finally, we present an attention-aware joint training strategy (AAJTS) as a training-oriented application, which imposes spatial constraints on cross-attention patterns to encourage stable and concentrated attribution representations, thereby improving both interpretability and detection performance. Experiments on MS COCO 2017, ExDark, and Cityscapes demonstrate that EIVE produces high-quality instance-level saliency maps and achieves performance comparable to, or better than, state-of-the-art post-hoc methods across standard metrics, while substantially improving explanation efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/xjlDestiny/EIVE.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个高效、无需梯度或扰动的端到端可解释性框架EIVE，用于DETR类检测器的实例级视觉解释，并通过新型模块与训练策略提升了解释质量与检测表现。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测的可解释方法多为事后型（如基于梯度或扰动），推理效率低且计算量大，难以满足实际应用中对效率和精度兼顾的需求，尤其是在DETR等现代检测器上，缺乏针对实例的高效解释方法。
AI.method: 提出EIVE框架：将DETR解码器中的跨注意力机制重构为实例级特征归因通道，使每个对象查询的跨注意力自然对应其预测实例的视觉归因。为提升解释鲁棒性与紧致性，引入跨层混合共识融合（CLHCF）模块聚合多层注意力信号。此外设计了attention-aware联合训练策略（AAJTS），对注意力空间施加约束，优化特征归因分布。
AI.result: 在MS COCO 2017、ExDark和Cityscapes等数据集上，EIVE生成的实例级显著图质量优异，在标准指标上与最新事后可解释方法持平甚至更优，并且显著提升了解释效率。
AI.conclusion: EIVE为DETR类目标检测器提供了高效、稳定、易用的可解释性方案，既提高了解释结果的质量，也带来检测性能提升，在实际与研究场景中均具潜力。

title: The Role of Ambiguity in Error Prediction via Uncertainty Quantification
comment: 8 pages not including references and appendices, 3 figures
summary: The task of Error Prediction, namely predicting whether a model output is correct, is commonly tackled with Uncertainty Quantification (UQ). However, while uncertainty metrics capture when models lack knowledge or capacity to make a prediction, they also reflect aleatoric uncertainty, which is inherent in the model input and context. This paper presents a method for improving error prediction for Large Language Models (LLMs), by disentangling input ambiguity from UQ signal. We conduct experiments on the task of Question Answering (QA) with six UQ metrics and show that UQ metrics are more predictive of errors on unambiguous instances than on questions with multiple plausible answers. We use Gated Experts and Selective Prediction to incorporate gold and predicted ambiguity labels into the error prediction pipeline. We find that ambiguity information improves error prediction scores across model families, training and evaluation paradigms, datasets (including allegedly unambiguous ones), and sources of aleatoric uncertainty, yielding improvements of over 10 points of PRR for individual UQ metrics on standard datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种改进大语言模型（LLM）错误预测的方法，通过区分输入的歧义性与不确定性交互信号，显著提升了错误预测性能。
AI.motivation: 已有的不确定性度量（UQ）方法虽然可用来预测模型是否出错，但也会受限于输入本身的模糊性（即输入无法消除的随机性），导致在多解或模糊问题上效果不佳。如何有效利用不确定性度量，同时区分输入歧义，是提升错误预测精度的关键。
AI.method: 方法上，作者选取问答任务，结合六种不确定性度量，分析这些度量在歧义性不同的问题上的表现，并通过门控专家模型和选择性预测技术，将“金标”与“预测”歧义标签引入错误预测流程，旨在剥离输入歧义信号对UQ的干扰。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在无歧义问题上，不确定性度量更能有效预测错误；而对于有多重正确答案的模糊问题，效果相对较弱。加入歧义信息后，错误预测性能（如PRR指标）在多种模型、数据集和范式下均有提升，部分UQ度量在标准集上提升超过10个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入并消融输入歧义信息，可以实质性提升LLM在错误预测任务上的表现，对各种数据集和不确定性来源均有效，论证了精细化处理输入属性在提升模型健壮性方面的重要意义。

title: Paving the Way for Point Cloud Video Representation Learning Using A PDE Model
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (T-PAMI) in 2026
summary: Investigating spatial-temporal correlations, specifically how spatial points vary over time, is crucial for understanding point cloud videos. Traditional methods, particularly flow-based techniques, struggle with these correlations due to the unordered spatial arrangement of sequential point cloud data. To address this challenge, we propose a novel approach that regularizes spatial-temporal correlation learning by formulating the problem as a solvable Partial Differential Equation (PDE). While PDEs have long been effective in the physical domain, their application to novel sequential data like point cloud video remains underexplored. Inspired by fluid analysis, we construct a simplified PDE, and the process of solving PDE is guided and refined by a contrastive learning structure between the temporal embeddings and the spatial embeddings. With this extra supervision, our method, named MotionPDE, serves as an effective, plug-and-play enhancement module for existing backbone models, adding minimal computational overhead and parameters. Capitalizing on the contrastive learning process, we delve deeper into the self-supervised capabilities of MotionPDE, yielding promising results that underscore its utility and adaptability in point cloud video data interpretation. The code repo with trained checkpoints will be available at https://github.com/zhh6425/motionpde.git for facilitating future research.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新方法MotionPDE，基于偏微分方程（PDE）和对比学习机制，高效建模点云视频的时空相关性，提升了现有模型对点云时序数据的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 点云视频数据局部空间无序且随时间变化，时空相关性挖掘困难，传统基于流的方法难以有效处理。亟需新的理论与方法提升点云视频时空特征学习能力。
AI.method: 受流体物理分析启发，将时空相关性建模为一个可解的偏微分方程（PDE）问题，并通过对比学习机制对空间与时间嵌入进行监督优化，形成MotionPDE模块，作为现有点云网络的插拔式增强单元。
AI.result: MotionPDE在点云视频数据理解任务中表现优异，兼具自监督学习能力，并且只带来极小的计算和参数开销。
AI.conclusion: MotionPDE有效提升了点云视频时空相关性建模能力，具有良好的扩展性和自监督学习潜力，为点云视频数据的深入理解和分析提供了新的解决方案。

title: PortBERT: Navigating the Depths of Portuguese Language Models
summary: Transformer models dominate modern NLP, but efficient, language-specific models remain scarce. In Portuguese, most focus on scale or accuracy, often neglecting training and deployment efficiency. In the present work, we introduce PortBERT, a family of RoBERTa-based language models for Portuguese, designed to balance performance and efficiency. Trained from scratch on over 450 GB of deduplicated and filtered mC4 and OSCAR23 from CulturaX using fairseq, PortBERT leverages byte-level BPE tokenization and stable pre-training routines across both GPU and TPU processors. We release two variants, PortBERT base and PortBERT large, and evaluate them on ExtraGLUE, a suite of translated GLUE and SuperGLUE tasks. Both models perform competitively, matching or surpassing existing monolingual and multilingual models. Beyond accuracy, we report training and inference times as well as fine-tuning throughput, providing practical insights into model efficiency. PortBERT thus complements prior work by addressing the underexplored dimension of compute-performance tradeoffs in Portuguese NLP. We release all models on Huggingface and provide fairseq checkpoints to support further research and applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PortBERT，一种针对葡萄牙语的高效RoBERTa语言模型家族，兼顾性能与效率，填补现有模型在训练和推理效率上的空白。
AI.motivation: 当前主流NLP采用transformer模型，但针对具体语言的高效模型稀缺。葡萄牙语的现有模型多关注规模或准确率，却忽略了效率。本工作希望在保持性能的同时，提高模型在训练和部署过程中的效率。
AI.method: PortBERT基于RoBERTa架构，从零开始在450GB清洗去重的葡萄牙语语料（mC4和OSCAR23）上使用fairseq训练。采用字节级BPE分词，支持GPU和TPU训练，并提供base和large两个版本。
AI.result: 在ExtraGLUE（包含GLUE和SuperGLUE的葡萄牙语翻译任务）上，两种PortBERT模型均能达到或超越现有单语和多语模型的性能，并首次系统报告训练、推理以及微调的效率指标。
AI.conclusion: PortBERT不仅在准确率上具备竞争力，更系统性地关注了葡萄牙语NLP中模型效能的权衡，弥补了该领域对效率关注的不足，促进今后研究与实际应用。

title: Exploiting Semantic and Pixel Representations for Ultra-Low Bitrate Image Compression
summary: Most existing extreme compression methods fail to achieve an optimal rate-distortion-perception trade-off, as they typically prioritize perceptual fidelity and visual realism over pixel-level accuracy. Consequently, the resulting reconstructions often deviate noticeably from the originals. Ultra-low bitrate image compression is therefore crucial-not only for producing extremely compact representations but also for ensuring that reconstructed images remain semantically coherent and faithful to the source at the pixel level. To this end, we propose SPRDiff, a diffusion-based compression method that fully leverages both semantic and pixel representations, thereby enhancing reconstruction fidelity under ultra-low bitrate constraints.
