Specifically, we develop a triple-encoder architecture that utilizes high-fidelity features from the pretrained distortion-oriented and semantic-oriented encoders to compensate for the limited representations extracted by the frozen VAE encoder, thereby improving latent compression and entropy modeling. To further enhance the reconstruction fidelity of diffusion models, we introduce a distortion-aware reconstruction module with dual feature extraction. This module not only generates a coarse reconstruction that preserves the main structures, but also provides practical and accurate semantic- and pixel-level conditional signals to guide the diffusion model. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in the rate-distortion-perception tradeoff at extremely low bitrates (below 0.03 bpp), effectively preserving both perceptual quality and pixel-wise fidelity in the reconstructed images. We will release the source code and trained models at https://github.com/cshw2021/SPRDiff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SPRDiff的基于扩散模型的极致压缩方法，在极低比特率下实现了重建图像在感知质量和像素精度上的优越统一。
AI.motivation: 当前极致压缩方法多偏重感知保真度，忽视了像素级还原，导致重建图像偏离原图较多。因此，亟需一种能够在极低比特率下，兼顾语义一致性和像素忠实度的新方法。
AI.method: 提出SPRDiff方法，采用三分支编码器架构，结合畸变导向和语义导向的高保真特征以弥补VAE编码器表达能力不足，并引入双特征提取的失真感知重建模块，为扩散模型提供像素和语义条件信息，提升极致压缩重建质量。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验显示，SPRDiff在0.03 bpp以下极低比特率条件下，在率-失真-感知三者的权衡上优于现有最先进方法，重建图像在感知和像素层面均表现出较高保真度。
AI.conclusion: SPRDiff扩展了极致压缩领域的新边界，有效解决了传统方法在感知与像素精度之间的平衡难题，未来有望在实际超低码率图像传输等应用中发挥重要作用。

title: A Primer in Post-Training Reasoning Data: What We Know About How It Works
summary: Post-training has become a primary driver of recent progress in large reasoning models, and reasoning data are often the key variable determining whether this stage succeeds. Work on post-training reasoning data has grown rapidly, yet this literature remains scattered across dataset papers, reinforcement-learning recipes, reward-model studies, benchmarks, and frontier system reports. This paper is the first primer to synthesize over 150 key public studies and system reports on post-training reasoning data. We organize the field around four questions: what data objects exist, what makes them useful, how they are constructed, and how they scale. Together, this organization provides an attribution framework for future reasoning-data releases and post-training recipes.

AI.tldr: 本文综述并梳理了后训练（post-training）推理数据领域的150余项重要文献，提出了系统的整理框架。
AI.motivation: 当前大型推理模型的发展主要受益于后训练阶段，而推理数据的选择和质量直接影响该阶段的成败。然而，目前相关研究文献分散，缺乏系统归纳和框架。
AI.method: 作者对150余份公开的研究与系统报告进行了系统性的文献调研与综述分析，并基于‘数据对象是什么’，‘这些数据有什么用处’，‘它们是如何构建的’，‘它们如何规模化’四大核心问题，构建整理和归因分析框架。
AI.result: 整理出后训练推理数据领域的现有类型、作用机制、构建方法与规模拓展路径，对文献进行了结构化归纳，为该领域的数据发布与实验方法提供了系统参考。
AI.conclusion: 通过本综述，研究者可以理解后训练推理数据的全貌及其在大模型推理能力提升中的关键作用，并利用提出的框架指导未来数据集的托管、设计与发布。

title: Self-Improving Small Object Grounding in LVLMs
summary: Can internal attention patterns in Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) identify reliable small-object boxes without fine-tuning? In this work, we provide an affirmative answer. Attention structure in LVLMs encodes grounding quality-a lightweight IoU regressor trained solely on attention maps achieves strong IoU prediction (Pearson r > 0.67). This regressor powers the regressor-based variant of our Attention-based Candidate Selection (ACS) framework, called ACS-Learned, which selects the best box from multiple sampled candidates to improve object grounding. By analyzing what the regressor learns, we reveal which transformer layers and heads are most critical and derive ACS-Free: a training-free selector that ranks candidates by attention entropy on these discriminative heads, with no learned component at inference. Experiments on COCO and Objects365 demonstrate up to 19% self-improvement on small object localization, with ACS-Free ranking best among all training-free methods, demonstrating that useful attention structure improves both localization reliability and interpretability in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中的内部注意力模式，通过轻量级的IoU回归器，无需微调即可高效识别小目标边界框，实验显示对小目标定位性能有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统目标定位方法对小物体识别效果不佳，且通常需要大量标注数据和复杂训练流程。本文探索LVLM内部的注意力结构是否本身已蕴含有用的定位信息，能否无须复杂微调或训练，借助注意力即可实现高效准确的小目标定位。
AI.method: 1. 基于LVLM注意力图，训练一个轻量IoU回归器预测候选框质量。2. 提出ACS框架，在多候选框中选取最佳，对应的ACS-Learned方法依赖上述回归器。3. 通过分析回归器工作机制，归纳最具区分力的Transformer层和头，并提出无训练需求的ACS-Free方法，通过注意力熵来筛选最优候选框。
AI.result: 在COCO和Objects365公开数据集上，基于注意力的框筛选方法在小目标定位上带来了最高19%的自我提升。无训练版的ACS-Free在所有无训练方法中表现最佳。相关实验还揭示了哪些具体的注意力层和头对于小目标定位至关重要。
AI.conclusion: LVLM中的注意力结构本身蕴含有价值的定位信息，无需微调便可提升小目标定位效果。该发现不仅推动了LVLM可解释性，也为无监督、零训练的小目标定位提供了新方向。

title: Multilingual Idioms in Sentences and Conversations Across High-, Medium-, and Low-Resource Languages
summary: Idiomatic expressions pose a major challenge for multilingual NLP because their meanings shift between figurative and literal usage, often requiring context for accurate interpretation. Prior work has focused on high-resource languages typically evaluates isolated idiom-meaning questions, overlooking realistic discourse. We introduce MIDI, a multilingual idiom dataset spanning 3 high-, 3 medium-, and 12 low-resource languages, curated by native speakers. Unlike previous datasets, MIDI provides idioms embedded in both sentence-level and conversational contexts, capturing both literal and figurative readings. Benchmarking state-of-the-art models shows that idiom comprehension degrades in low-resource languages and that, in all resource tiers, literal interpretations are substantially harder than figurative ones. Conversational context improves performance but does not eliminate these disparities. Through controlled tests and interventions on hidden representations, we further separate memorization from reasoning, exposing core limitations of current models.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一个多语言成语数据集MIDI，覆盖了资源丰富及低资源的多种语言，并系统分析了当前模型在成语理解上的表现与不足。
AI.motivation: 成语具有比喻与字面多义性，依赖上下文，非常挑战多语言NLP，而现有研究只关注高资源语言、题目孤立等非真实场景，忽视了低资源语言和真实对话上下文下的理解难题。
AI.method: 作者由多语种母语者人工筛选，构建了一个多达18种语言、包含句子及对话上下文、多义读法的多语言成语数据集MIDI。随后利用该数据集，在不同语料资源区间对现有NLP模型进行基准测试及受控实验分析。
AI.result: 实验显示：1）低资源语言下模型成语理解能力明显下降；2）所有语种中对成语字面义的理解比隐喻义更难；3）丰富上下文虽提升模型表现，但无法根本消除上述差异；4）进一步通过模型表征分析区分记忆与推理过程，揭示了模型的核心局限。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流模型在成语理解，尤其是低资源语种和字面义识别以及基于推理的理解上存在根本不足，反映真实语境下跨语种NLP模型能力的重大短板，未来需重点关注低资源和复杂语境下的成语表示与理解。

title: Turing Patterns for Multimedia: Reaction-Diffusion Multi-Modal Fusion for Language-Guided Video Moment Retrieval
comment: Published in ACM MM 2025. Address some typos
summary: Video-language models are pivotal for tasks such as moment retrieval and highlight detection, yet they often struggle to capture the dynamic, non-linear interactions between temporal video sequences and textual semantics. Existing approaches, relying on static cross-attention or prompt-tuning mechanisms, fail to adaptively model the evolving relationships between modalities, leading to suboptimal alignment and limited generalization. Inspired by systems biology, we propose \textbf{Reaction-Diffusion Multimodal Fusion (RDMF)}, a novel framework that reimagines video-language alignment as a reaction-diffusion (RD) process, drawing on the principles of pattern formation introduced by Alan Turing. In RDMF, video features diffuse across time to capture temporal context, while text-video interactions are modeled as non-linear reactions that amplify relevant features and suppress noise, forming emergent patterns akin to biological systems. Leveraging the Gray-Scott RD model, we design a computationally efficient fusion module that integrates video and text representations, supported by rigorous mathematical analysis of stability and convergence using Turing instability criteria. Our framework is theoretically grounded, employing advanced mathematical tools to ensure stable pattern formation, and is practically viable, incorporating standard components like pretrained encoders and DETR-style heads for moment retrieval and saliency prediction. RDMF represents a pioneering interdisciplinary approach, bridging systems biology and multimedia research to address the limitations of conventional multimodal fusion. Preliminary experiments demonstrate its potential to outperform existing methods in identifying salient video moments, offering a new paradigm for video-language tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的视频-语言多模态融合方法——基于反应-扩散（RDMF）框架，能更好地建模时序视频与文本间的动态非线性交互，并在事件检索和关键片段检测上表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言模型难以捕捉时序视频和文本之间不断变化、非线性的相互关系，依赖静态交互机制造成对多模态动态对齐和泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 受系统生物学中的反应-扩散模型启发，将视频-语言融合建模为反应-扩散过程。视频特征在时间维度扩散获取上下文，视频与文本间的非线性交互被建模为反应过程，通过Gray-Scott模型设计一个融合模块，并用图灵不稳定性理论进行稳定性与收敛性分析。
AI.result: 在初步实验中，该方法在视频事件识别及片段重要性预测等关键任务上优于现有主流方法，展现出较强的多模态融合效果。
AI.conclusion: RDMF方法理论基础扎实、计算高效，融合了生物学与多媒体研究，能弥补传统方法的不足，为视频-语言任务提供了新的思路。

title: On the Salience of Low-Probability Tokens for AI-Generated Text Detection: A Multiscale Uncertainty Perspective
summary: AI-generated text increasingly blends with human writing, raising practical risks such as misinformation, academic misuse, and corpora contamination. While statistical detectors are appealing for efficiency and generalization, they suffer from two key limitations. (i) Boilerplate dominance, boilerplate tokens shared across human and LLM writing can overwhelm discriminative signals. (ii) Brittle point estimates, relying on a single probability score yields unstable decisions under adversarial manipulations. To address these issues, we propose Uncertainty, a multiscale uncertainty estimator that focuses on informative low-probability tokens, which more clearly expose distributional discrepancies. Locally, it alleviates boilerplate dominance by averaging the log-probabilities of low-probability tokens; globally, it reduces brittleness by capturing the distributional shape of this low-probability region via Rényi entropy. We further extend the detector to Uncertainty++ via conditional independent sampling, yielding a more stable uncertainty estimation. Experiments across seven datasets and sixteen LLMs demonstrate high effectiveness, generalization, and robustness. Our code is available at https://github.com/guoyikai2000/Uncertainty-AIGT.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的AI文本检测方法Uncertainty（及其增强版Uncertainty++），通过关注低概率词，提高检测AI生成文本的准确性、泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成文本与人类文本的融合，AI文本带来的虚假信息、学术不端、语料污染等风险越来越突出。目前的统计检测方法虽然高效但存在显著局限性：一是通用词频（boilerplate）占主导，容易淹没判别信号；二是依赖单一概率分数，容易被对抗性操作干扰，判断不稳定。
AI.method: 作者提出Uncertainty方法，关注概率分布中更具区分性的低概率词。局部层面，通过计算低概率词的对数概率均值缓解通用词主导问题；全局层面，通过Rényi熵度量低概率区间的分布形状，提高整体判别稳定性。增强版Uncertainty++引入条件独立采样进一步增强不确定性估计的稳定性。
AI.result: 在7个数据集和16种大语言模型上测试，Uncertainty与Uncertainty++显示出高度有效的AI文本检测能力，具备良好的泛化性和对抗干扰的稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦于低概率词的多尺度不确定性估计，可有效提升AI文本检测的准确性和鲁棒性，显示了该方法在实际检测任务中的潜力。代码已公开。

title: Real-Time Generation of Streamable Talking Portrait Video with Reference-Guided Deep Compression VAEs
summary: Video diffusion models have significantly advanced portrait video generation, yet their high computational demands limit their use in interactive applications. This work presents a framework for streamable talking portrait video generation conditioned on speech audio and reference images. Designed meticulously for streaming scenarios, it features a causal video VAE for deep latent compression and an autoregressive latent denoising model. Our causal VAE integrates a variable number of reference images as guidance, allowing the network to focus on dynamic information rather than static appearance, thereby enhancing compression efficacy and reconstruction quality. Additionally, we extend the residual auto-encoding paradigm to improve spatial-temporal causality handling in our VAE. The generator is based on a Rectified Flow Transformer architecture and produces video latents in a blockwise auto-regressive manner. Our method enables the real-time generation of high-quality talking portrait videos, achieving speeds significantly faster than baseline models. Furthermore, comprehensive experiments demonstrate that it is on par with or even outperforms these large models in realism, vividness, and video quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种流式可用的虚拟人像视频生成框架，实现高质量、低延迟的视频生成，效率和效果均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前虚拟人像视频生成依赖扩散模型，虽然效果好，但计算量大，难以满足实时与交互需求。如何兼顾高质量视频生成和实时性是亟须解决的问题。
AI.method: 框架依赖因果视频VAE进行深度潜变量压缩，并结合自回归潜变量去噪模型，支持多参考图片引导模型关注动态信息。采用块状自回归生成器（基于Rectified Flow Transformer），有效提升空间-时间因果处理能力，实现流式实时生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，在生成速度、真实感、生动性和视频质量等方面，该方法与现有大型模型持平甚至更优，生成速度大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法突破了高品质虚拟人像生成的实时瓶颈，有望推动相关交互应用的发展。

title: CRAFTQA: A Code-Driven Adaptive Framework for Complex Structured Data Reasoning
summary: Real-world scenarios involve massive heterogeneous structured data (e.g., tables, knowledge graphs), making effective reasoning over such diverse data increasingly important. Unified structured data question answering has emerged as a prominent research trend, aiming to answer natural language questions across different structured data types within a single framework. However, existing unified methods share a common limitation: they rely on a set of predefined functions, which restricts their ability to perform complex reasoning beyond these predefined operations. To overcome this fundamental limitation, we propose CRAFTQA, a novel adaptive code-driven framework comprising two core modules, CodeSTEP and CRAFT. The CodeSTEP module is a paradigm that generates a complete executable Python code sequence, which contains step-by-step code-based reasoning operations based on the question. The CRAFT module dynamically generates custom code functions for operations beyond the predefined function set, and seamlessly integrates with CodeSTEP to significantly enhance flexibility in handling complex reasoning. Comprehensive experiments on multiple structured datasets demonstrate that CRAFTQA achieves remarkable improvements in complex reasoning scenarios compared to existing unified methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新框架CRAFTQA，通过自适应代码生成，显著提升多类型结构化数据问答中的复杂推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有统一结构化数据问答方法受限于预设函数集合，难以应对超出这些函数范围的复杂推理需求。
AI.method: 设计了两个模块：CodeSTEP用于自动生成可执行的逐步Python代码进行推理，CRAFT模块则针对无法被预设函数处理的需求，动态生成定制代码函数，并与CodeSTEP无缝结合。
AI.result: 在多个结构化数据集上，通过大量实验证明CRAFTQA在复杂推理任务上明显优于现有统一方法。
AI.conclusion: CRAFTQA显著提升了跨多类结构化数据的问答系统处理复杂推理的能力，突破了以往预定义函数集的局限，展现了良好的灵活性和适应性。

title: Cross-Environment Neural Reranking for Sample-Efficient Action Selection in Text-Based Agents
summary: Large language model agents achieve strong performance on text-based benchmarks but incur prohibitive inference costs, motivating the use of compact neural rerankers for action selection. We investigate whether a single lightweight model can perform action selection across multiple diverse environments, a capability that would eliminate per-environment model maintenance. Training DeBERTa-v3 (184M-434M parameters) jointly on ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld with minority-class upsampling, we find that rebalanced two-environment joint training substantially improves over single-environment ALFWorld performance (net gain +0.412) while maintaining competitive WebShop performance (+0.214 vs. +0.249 single-environment). Three-environment training yields a mean combined net gain of +0.551 +/- 0.024 across 4 seeds, with per-environment results approaching specialized single-environment models while providing positive cross-domain transfer. Cross-environment adaptation is highly sample-efficient: fine-tuning on only 9.2% of target-domain data recovers 93% of full-data performance, and scaling model capacity yields limited benefits, indicating data diversity is the primary driver. Environment-aware LoRA adapter routing with PCGrad achieves a best-seed result of +0.611 (seed 42), with seeds 456 and 789 at +0.554 and +0.559, but exhibits high variance due to seed 123 collapsing to +0.263 (4-seed mean +0.497 +/- 0.158), representing a promising but currently unstable direction. Joint training with clean splits and data rebalancing is a key ingredient. We will release our three-environment benchmark of 51,580 training instances (41,740 raw unique states with minority-class upsampling) and all model checkpoints upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出并验证了一种单一轻量级神经重排序器（如DeBERTa-v3），可通过联合训练在多个不同环境中实现高效动作选择，取得了接近各专用单环境模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在基准测试中表现优异，但推理成本高昂。研究者希望采用更轻量的模型降低成本，并进一步寻求一种无需为每个环境单独维护模型的通用方案，提升实际应用的效率。
AI.method: 采用参数规模为184M-434M的DeBERTa-v3，通过在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld三大环境上的联合训练（包括少数类上采样的数据重平衡）、环境感知的LoRA适配器等技术，评估多环境联合模型和单一环境模型的表现，同时测试模型容量和少量目标域微调数据对性能的影响。
AI.result: (1) 双环境联合训练在ALFWorld获得+0.412的净提升，同时WebShop表现可与单环境相提并论；(2) 三环境联合训练平均净增+0.551，效果接近单独环境训练；(3) 只用9.2%目标域数据微调可恢复93%完整数据性能，提升明显；(4) LoRA + PCGrad环境感知适配器在部分随机种子上达到顶尖但稳定性不足。（详细表现因随机种子差异较大）
AI.conclusion: 轻量且通用的神经模型通过合理的联合训练与数据重平衡，可高效应对多环境的动作选择任务，实现跨领域迁移，同时极大减少模型运维负担，为后续多场景AI开发提供了思路，但模型训练的稳定性和泛化性能仍待进一步提升。

title: What to Test Next: Interpretable Coverage Gap Discovery in Driving VLMs
summary: Driving vision-language models (VLMs) must accurately understand scenes across diverse conditions defined by Operational Design Domains (ODDs), yet verification remains sparse: many slices are missing, making empirical failure rates unreliable. We propose SliceScorer, a deterministic scoring rule for missing-slice recommendation that combines (i) an exposure-based coverage prior to prioritize rare, under-tested regions, and (ii) a neighbor-failure prior that propagates risk from similar tested conditions. SliceScorer is deliberately simple - interpretable, auditable, and conservative - properties essential for safety-critical validation. For stress testing beyond the declared ODD, we embed SliceScorer within SliceNav, an LLM-orchestrated verification pipeline where the model interprets developer queries to select relevant operators (triage, scoring, acquisition, evaluation) and vocabulary extensions, composing verification workflows while keeping all scoring deterministic and auditable. Experiments on three driving VLMs (WiseAD, DriveMM, Cosmos-Reason2-2B) show that SliceNav surfaces high-risk coverage gaps more effectively than prior slice-discovery methods while maintaining diverse recommendations across the condition space. Ablations confirm both scoring components contribute, and qualitative analysis demonstrates end-to-end workflows from developer query to targeted evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SliceScorer的方法，通过结合覆盖先验和邻域失败先验，提升自动驾驶视觉语言模型（VLM）在多工况测试中的风险发现和验证覆盖能力，并通过SliceNav全流程验证系统实现了自动化高风险片段发现和审计。
AI.motivation: 目前自动驾驶视觉语言模型在多样化工况下的验证不充分，很多测试片段缺失且实际失败率难以准确评估，亟需系统化、可解释且可审计的方法来高效发现和覆盖风险片段，提升模型安全性。
AI.method: 提出了SliceScorer得分规则，结合基于曝光度的覆盖先验（优先覆盖稀有、未充分测试区域）和邻域失败先验（将已知风险向相似条件扩散），实现了保守、可解释、可审计的验证片段推荐。同时，将SliceScorer嵌入LLM驱动的SliceNav验证管道中，实现从开发者查询到自动化流程组合与风险评估全流程自动化。
AI.result: 对三个主流VLM（WiseAD、DriveMM、Cosmos-Reason2-2B）的实验显示，SliceNav能比已有方法更有效发现高风险片段并保持推荐多样性。消融实验表明两类得分项均有贡献，定性分析展示了从开发者查询到目标评估的全流程自动化能力。
AI.conclusion: SliceScorer及其嵌入式SliceNav系统提升了自动驾驶VLM的风险片段发现和验证能力，为安全关键验证提供了可解释、可审计的新工具，对推动VLM安全性验证有重要意义。

title: Consistency Training while Mitigating Obfuscation via Rate Matching
summary: Large language models are often influenced by extraneous input features, such as cues revealing a user's preferred answer. Consistency training reduces this influence by training models to behave similarly across inputs with and without the extraneous feature. However, existing methods train for consistency over entire responses or internal activations, which also constrains whether the model verbalises said extraneous features. We show this leads to obfuscation, where the model learns not to mention a cue while remaining influenced by it, which may undermine monitorability. To address this, we introduce Rate Matching Consistency Training (RMCT), which trains for consistency over selected behavioural properties without constraining how this behaviour is expressed. RMCT matches the rate at which the model exhibits a target behaviour (e.g., following a bias cue) across input perturbations, rather than requiring paired inputs with and without the extraneous feature, extending consistency training to settings where the extraneous features cannot be removed. We evaluate RMCT on sycophancy reduction in two open-weight language models, achieving reductions in bias-following comparable to a standard consistency-training baseline on held-out bias types, while largely preserving the model's tendency to verbalise the bias cue. Further, we find that RMCT is more data-efficient at the expense of being less compute-efficient in our experiments. Overall, RMCT shows that consistency training can improve behavioural robustness without directly trading off against monitorability.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的大语言模型一致性训练方法，旨在减少模型对无关输入特征（如用户偏好的提示）的依赖，同时保持模型输出的可监控性。该方法通过行为表现的一致性训练，实现了既抑制“趋附性”又能明显表达出偏倚线索的目标。
AI.motivation: 现有一致性训练通常对整个输出或内部激活进行约束，但这样会导致模型有意隐去无关特征，产生‘掩盖’现象，从而影响可监控性。如何在减少模型对偏见提示响应的同时，让模型依旧明确表达是否在受到提示影响，是一个难题。
AI.method: 提出了速率匹配一致性训练（RMCT）：不是对配对输入进行直接一致性训练，而是对目标行为（如顺从偏见提示的频率）在不同扰动输入间进行匹配，一定程度上解绑了‘表达’和‘受影响’之间的一致性约束，适用于无法完全去除无关特征的场景。
AI.result: RMCT在两个开源语言模型的趋附性抑制任务上进行了评估，对持出偏见类型达到了与标准一致性训练相当的降低效果，同时较好地保留了模型表达偏差信号的能力，并且数据效率更高，但计算效率略低。
AI.conclusion: RMCT证明了一致性训练可以在提升行为鲁棒性和保障监控能力之间取得更好平衡，为提升大语言模型的鲁棒性提供了新方向。

title: Pave-GRPO: Beyond Instantaneous Guidance through Principled Average Velocity Decomposition
summary: Post-training via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for aligning flow-based generative models with human preferences. However, the iterative denoising nature of flow models incurs substantial costs when generating group rollouts for policy-gradient updates, compelling existing methods to train with extremely few denoising steps. This temporal sparsity severely restricts preference optimization: reward feedback can only reach a handful of stages per trajectory, leaving the vast majority of intermediate denoising steps without direct supervision and thus compromising alignment granularity. To address this, we propose Pave-GRPO, which reformulates the GRPO objective through Principled average velocity decomposition. Rather than generating expensive high-step rollouts, we maintain efficient few-step group sampling but decompose each coarse transition into an equivalent ensemble of finer sub-trajectories spanning multiple intermediate timesteps. This propagates reward feedback to a denser set of temporal stages for more comprehensive preference alignment without additional generation cost. This design offers two benefits: (i) zero-cost horizon expansion: through the direct reuse of piece-wise group samples and their associated rewards, Pave-GRPO significantly broadens the effective optimization scope under fixed sampling budgets; and (ii) comprehensive temporal supervision: by equivalently decomposing an instantaneous velocity target into a multi-timestep ensemble, it distributes reward signals across more intermediate stages of the denoising process, enabling finer-grained and more thorough preference optimization. Extensive experiments validate that Pave-GRPO effectively advances preference alignment across different reward settings, offering comprehensive performance enhancement.

AI.tldr: Pave-GRPO提出了一种高效的偏好对齐方法，通过分解粗粒度采样促进奖励信号在更多时间节点上传播，无需增加生成成本，显著提升生成模型的偏好优化粒度和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO方法因流模型的高昂采样成本，常采用极少去噪步数进行训练，导致绝大多数中间阶段缺乏监督，影响了对人类偏好的精细对齐。
AI.method: Pave-GRPO通过平均速度分解，将原本粗粒度的少步采样等效分解为覆盖多个中间时刻的子轨迹，把奖励反馈分布到更密集的时间点，实现在固定采样预算下的奖励拓展与精细监督。
AI.result: 大规模实验表明，Pave-GRPO在多种奖励设定下均有效提升了偏好对齐表现，实现了全面性能增强。
AI.conclusion: Pave-GRPO在无增加采样成本的前提下，有效拓展了监督范围并增强了生成模型的人类偏好对齐能力，对流式生成模型后训练优化具有重要意义。

title: Do Gender Cues Affect LLM Value Trade-offs? Evidence from a Controlled Decision Benchmark
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in value-sensitive decision settings, where irrelevant demographic cues should not alter judgments. We construct the Realistic Value Decision Benchmark (RVDB), a controlled benchmark that varies only the role-gender configuration while holding the scenario, ordered value pair, roles, candidate decisions, Value Distance, and Decision Severity fixed. Using a position-balanced evaluation across seven models, we test whether models preserve decision invariance under gender perturbations and whether their self-attributions reflect observed behavioral changes. We find that explicit gender cues induce bounded but systematic decision flips, including under an explicit gender-attribution prompt that asks models to report whether gender influenced their choice. Cross-gender role swaps reveal a consistent female-proposed-decision asymmetry, while models often attribute flipped decisions to No Influence or other non-gender factors. Further analysis shows that gender effects concentrate near less determinate value boundaries and under more severe decision contexts, suggesting that gender cues act as local boundary-shifting factors rather than global overrides of value reasoning. Value rankings remain largely stable, but ordered value-pair trade-offs shift unevenly across role-gender configurations. These results show that gender can enter LLM value trade-offs behaviorally while remaining obscured in self-attribution, motivating controlled behavioral audits beyond explanation-based evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于评估大语言模型在敏感价值决策环境中性别偏见的基准（RVDB），发现模型在性别线索扰动下会出现系统性的决策变化，而自我归因却很难反映这种性别影响。
AI.motivation: 在涉及价值判断的场景中，理应无关的性别特征本不应影响判断。然而大语言模型被越来越多地应用在此类情境，亟需评估其在性别扰动下的可靠性与公平性。
AI.method: 构建了Realistic Value Decision Benchmark（RVDB），保持情景、价值对、角色等变量不变，仅改变角色性别配置，对七种主流大语言模型进行位置平衡测试，考察决策是否随性别变化，以及模型自我归因的情况。
AI.result: 实验发现，性别提示会导致模型出现有限但系统性的决策翻转，尤其是在价值判断边界模糊或决策影响严峻时更为明显。模型往往归因为无影响或非性别因素；但在某些配置下，女性角色的决策被改变的倾向更显著。
AI.conclusion: 在表面上大语言模型价值排序总体稳定，但性别会在细节层面对决策产生影响且难以通过模型自我解释检测。因此，未来需要采用行为层面的审计方法来补充现有的解释性评价体系。

title: CanonCGT: Reference-Based Color Grading via Canonical Pivot Representation
summary: Reference-based color grading aims to reproduce the tonal mood and lighting of a reference while preserving color harmony and scene structure. Existing photorealistic and filter-based methods often produce unstable tone mappings -- over-shifting or inconsistently retaining colors -- leading to unnatural results. We propose CanonCGT, a two-stage framework built on a canonical pivot -- a style-neutral intermediate representation for stable color mapping. The first stage canonicalizes the input by removing intrinsic tonal bias, and the second color-grades it to match the reference style. A dual-phase training scheme, DP-CGT, combines supervised preset learning with self-supervised refinement on unpaired photographs. CanonCGT delivers photorealistic and tonally consistent results across diverse datasets, surpassing state-of-the-art methods in stability and visual fidelity. Our codes are available at \href{https://github.com/Jinwon-Ko/CanonCGT}{https://github.com/Jinwon-Ko/CanonCGT}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CanonCGT，一个参考图像色彩风格迁移（color grading）新方法，能更稳定自然地让目标图片获得参考图像的色调风格。
AI.motivation: 现有色彩迁移的方法，常出现色调不稳定、颜色过度偏移或保留不一致等问题，导致结果不自然，无法同时保持色彩和场景结构。
AI.method:
提出了两阶段的框架和DP-CGT训练方法：
1）第一阶段对输入图片去色调偏好，实现风格中立化（canonicalization）；
2）第二阶段再将其色彩风格调整到参考图像风格。结合有监督和自监督训练方式：先用预设风格的有监督学习，再用无配对照片的自监督精炼。
AI.result: CanonCGT在多个公开数据集上实现了比现有方法更高的照片真实感和色彩一致性（tonal consistency），稳定性和视觉效果优于SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: CanonCGT通过引入风格中立表示与双阶段训练显著改进了色彩风格迁移的稳定性和自然度，为高质量照片色彩风格化提供了新的思路。

title: Better with Experience: Self-Evolving LLM Agents for Evidence-Grounded Health Community Notes
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-augmented Community Notes offer a scalable path for timely, evidence-grounded correction of health misinformation on social platforms. However, they still reset at every post, leaving useful correction experience from prior cases unused. We introduce EvoNote, an agentic framework that enables health Community Notes generation to self-evolve through an evolving experience memory of prior misinformation correction episodes. Its core is fine-grained credit assignment: EvoNote grounds trajectory-level feedback in health-specific note qualities and distills it into action-level memory for claim analysis, evidence acquisition, and note writing. We evaluate EvoNote on MM-HealthCN, a 1.2K-instance multimodal benchmark of user-flagged health posts with human-written Community Notes and crowd-derived helpfulness labels. Under a human-validated hierarchical utility judge, EvoNote-generated notes are preferred over corresponding human-written notes in 89.6% of cases; on a separate set of Needs More Ratings posts without a crowd helpfulness verdict, EvoNote produces helpful notes for 82.0% of cases. It also reduces the median time needed to produce a candidate correction from over 13 hours in the human-note pipeline to under 2 minutes. Analyses link these gains to stronger evidence use and reusable correction strategies, positioning self-evolving note generation as a promising paradigm for health misinformation governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EvoNote框架，通过自我进化机制提升社区健康纠错笔记的质量和效率，在大规模平台中展现出优越的人机性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型辅助社区健康笔记体系虽具扩展性，但每次纠错都从头开始，未能利用以往的纠错经验，导致效率和有效性受限。
AI.method: 提出EvoNote框架，核心为细粒度的经验归因，将历史纠错经验转化为具体行动记忆，用于健康声明分析、证据采集与笔记撰写。采用MM-HealthCN多模态数据集进行实验，并通过人工多层次评测对比人类原笔记与EvoNote自动生成笔记。
AI.result: 在89.6%的实例中，EvoNote生成的笔记被评为优于真人笔记；在无群众评价的新帖子中，EvoNote能为82.0%的案例提供有效纠错。同时，纠错耗时由人力13+小时缩短至2分钟以内。效率与证据丰富性、经验复用策略密切相关。
AI.conclusion: EvoNote显著提升了健康社区笔记的质量与速度，展示了自进化纠错体系在健康内容治理中的前景，建议该方法应用于广泛的误信息管理场景。

title: When Knowledge Is Not Free: Cost-Aware Evidence Selection in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) typically assumes that external knowledge is free, but many high-quality sources are paywalled, licensed, restricted, or otherwise costly to access. We introduce cost-aware RAG, a setting where retrieved evidence is assigned access-cost tiers and systems must answer under an explicit evidence-access budget. We instantiate this setting by augmenting MS MARCO v2.1 with access-friction tiers and evaluate budgeted evidence selection across general-domain and domain-specific QA benchmarks. Our results show that static selection is brittle: no fixed selector uniformly dominates, and larger budgets do not reliably improve answer quality, even when costly evidence is domain-matched. We then study agentic cost-aware RAG, where an LLM decides when to retrieve, which tier to access, and when to stop. Agents show strong promise as adaptive evidence-acquisition controllers, but their behavior remains highly model- and task-dependent. These findings suggest that cost-aware evidence acquisition is a central challenge for the next generation of RAG systems. All code and data are available at https://github.com/Mignonmy/Cost-Aware.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了cost-aware RAG，探讨在有检索成本限制下的生成式问答系统能力，并发现现有方法难以在各种预算下稳定表现。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG系统默认外部知识免费，实际应用中高质量知识通常收费或受限，因此需要研究在有证据访问成本限制下系统的检索与生成表现。
AI.method: 作者为MS MARCO v2.1数据集设定了不同访问成本分级，搭建了证据访问预算受限（cost-aware）的任务，同时比较了静态选择器（固定选择策略）与利用大模型自主决策的agentic方法。
AI.result: 静态选择策略表现不稳定，没有一种方式能在所有条件下优于其他，且增加预算也不总是提升答案质量。基于LLM的agent决策在证据采集上具有适应性，但极度依赖于模型和任务本身。
AI.conclusion: 成本敏感的证据获取对下一代RAG系统是核心挑战，需要更智能、自适应的证据选择策略。

title: Geometric Latent Reasoning Induces Shorter Generations in LLMs
summary: Large language models solve complex problems by generating lengthy chains of explicit reasoning tokens. While effective, this makes reasoning expensive, length-sensitive, and constrained to (discrete) natural language. While latent reasoning offers a continuous alternative, determining useful structures for intermediate latent states is an open challenge. In this paper, we formulate latent reasoning as a geometric path-approximation problem within the model's pretrained token-embedding space. We introduce Geometric Latent Reasoning (GLR), which uses a lightweight transition head to predict iterative direction updates in embedding space. Using textual chain-of-thought traces as anchors, GLR learns to approximate discrete reasoning trajectories while permitting continuous deviations from exact token embeddings. Evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks using Qwen3 models reveal an emergent phenomenon: geometric latent reasoning induces substantially shorter generations without an explicit length objective. By replacing early explicit reasoning with continuous latent steps, models often reach correct answers using substantially fewer total generation steps. These findings suggest that continuous trajectories act as compact intermediate reasoning states, exposing a new tradeoff between latent computation budget, output length, and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的隐空间推理方法——几何隐推理（GLR），利用“嵌入空间”的连续轨迹来代替显式文本推理，从而缩短生成长度并提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型通过生成大量显式文本推理步骤来解决复杂问题，这种方法生成成本高、受长度限制且局限于离散自然语言；而“隐式推理”虽理论上可更紧凑但缺乏有效的中间结构设计方案。
AI.method: 作者将隐空间推理问题转化为预训练 token 嵌入空间内的几何路径逼近问题。提出了GLR方法：用轻量级转换头在嵌入空间迭代地预测方向更新，利用链式推理文本作为锚点，使“连续轨迹”逼近原本离散的推理序列，同时允许在嵌入空间有连续偏移。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准（用 Qwen3 模型）上验证，GLR 会使生成显著变短（无长度限制目标下），能够以更少推理步数达到正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 连续的几何路径作为紧凑的中间推理状态，有效降低了生成长度和计算成本，同时模型精度保持较高，展现出隐式推理的潜力，并揭示出计算预算、输出长度和准确率间的新权衡关系。

title: PhyScene3D: Physically Consistent Interactive 3D Tabletop Scene Generation
summary: Generating physically consistent 3D tabletop scenes is a fundamental yet underexplored problem for interactive and generalist robotic learning. The challenge stems from dense object hierarchies and irregular affordances. Here, an interactive scene denotes a physically valid, collision-free environment directly loadable into physics simulators. Existing methods, ranging from decoupled symbolic solvers to end-to-end regression models, often suffer from error propagation or overfitting to noisy supervision containing widespread physical violations. To address these limitations, we introduce PhyScene3D, a framework that reformulates generation as a Human-Mimetic Constructive Process. The proposed Cognitive Topological Reasoning Chain (CTRC) factorizes scene synthesis into a sequential, anchor-conditioned process. It employs a 3D AABB-based placement scheme that imposes a strong structural inductive bias. To address imperfect supervision and physical infeasibility, we introduce Physics-Aware Denoising Alignment (PADA). It integrates a differentiable Signed Distance Field (SDF) with Test-Time Optimization (TTO) to project generated scenes onto a physics-feasible manifold while preserving semantic intent. Experiments demonstrate that PhyScene3D outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both semantic accuracy and physical validity, achieving a 40% reduction in scene-wise collision rate relative to the human-annotated training data.

AI.tldr: PhyScene3D提出了一种新的3D物理一致性桌面场景生成框架，有效提升物理有效性与语义准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前3D桌面场景生成常因结构复杂和物理不一致性而难以用于机器人学习，现有方法易受监督噪声与物理错误影响，难以保证物理可用性。
AI.method: 作者提出了Human-Mimetic Constructive Process，将场景合成分解为顺序、锚点条件下的过程，并用3D AABB布置方法加强结构归纳偏置。同时提出Physics-Aware Denoising Alignment，将可微分距离场与测试时优化结合，实现物理可行性的语义守恒投影。
AI.result: 实验表明，PhyScene3D相较最新方法在语义和物理效果都更优，对比人工数据，场景碰撞率减少40%。
AI.conclusion: PhyScene3D能有效生成物理一致且语义准确的3D桌面场景，为交互式机器人学习等应用奠定了更稳健基础。

title: ResMerge: Residual-based Spectral Merging of Large Language Models
summary: Model merging offers a training-free way to combine multiple post-trained expert models, but merging experts obtained through reinforcement learning (RL) remains challenging. Existing spectral merging methods often assume that leading singular directions contain the main task signal, while lower-energy residual components can be compressed, selected, or attenuated to reduce interference. We find that this assumption does not hold for RL task vectors: after decomposing each task vector into a leading spectral head and a residual component, both parts can independently recover substantial behavior knowledge, while exhibiting different merging properties. The head is highly concentrated and informative but more prone to sharp cross-expert conflicts, whereas the residual component is more dispersed and provides a more stable basis for aggregation. Based on this observation, we propose ResMerge, a residual-based spectral merging framework for RL experts. ResMerge first constructs a stable residual backbone with Spherical Residual Consensus Adaptation, which estimates a reliability-weighted consensus direction on the Frobenius sphere. It then reintroduces leading-head information through a Lightweight Head Correction module gated by positive cross-expert agreement. Experiments across multiple RL expert groups and capability domains show that ResMerge better preserves expert capabilities than representative task-vector and spectral merging baselines. The implementation of ResMerge is publicly available at https://github.com/sunyd0303-cpu/ResMerge-release.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResMerge，一种针对强化学习专家模型融合的新方法，通过残差主导的谱融合策略更好地保留各专家能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于谱分解的模型融合方法假设主奇异方向包含主要任务信息，残差可压缩以减少冲突。但强化学习任务向量不满足该假设，主头和残差均含有大量行为知识，需创新融合方法。
AI.method: 首先将每个RL专家的任务向量分解为主头和残差。利用球面残差共识自适应机制，先融合为更稳定的残差骨干，再通过轻量级主头修正模块，在专家间达成正向一致时补充主头信息。
AI.result: 在多个强化学习专家组和能力领域上，ResMerge在保留专家能力方面优于主流的任务向量与谱融合基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ResMerge为RL专家模型融合提供了更有效的思路和工具，可无训练地更好合并多专家知识，对模型整合具有推广意义。

title: Restoring Initial Noise Sensitivity in Text-to-Image Distillation via Geometric Alignment
summary: Generative distillation significantly accelerates text-to-image (T2I) generation by compressing multi-step trajectories into few-step student models while preserving perceptual quality. However, existing methods primarily optimize efficiency and output fidelity, often neglecting critical properties of the original trajectory. In this work, we identify a key missing property: sensitivity to initial noise, whose degradation impairs downstream control methods relying on noise-based optimization and manipulation. We trace this issue to standard distillation objectives that enforce pointwise output alignment, inadvertently flattening the input-output landscape and suppressing the teacher's local geometric structure. To address this, we propose Geometry-Aware Distillation (GAD), a sensitivity-preserving framework that aligns the local functional behavior of teacher and student models. Specifically, GAD matches Jacobian-vector products with respect to input noise, enabling the student to reproduce the teacher's differential response to perturbations. Extensive experiments across multiple T2I paradigms and noise-driven control tasks demonstrate that GAD significantly restores sensitivity and improves diversity while maintaining high visual fidelity. Code is available at https://github.com/Hannah1102/GAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Geometry-Aware Distillation (GAD)方法，通过保留老师模型对初始噪声敏感性，提高了生成式蒸馏（Generative Distillation）在文本生成图像（T2I）任务中的可控性和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式蒸馏方法虽然提升了生成效率和图像质量，但忽视了原始扩散轨迹的某些关键属性，尤其是对初始噪声敏感性，这对基于噪声的下游可控生成方法至关重要。敏感性下降导致后续控制能力变差。
AI.method: 作者分析了传统蒸馏目标对模型输入-输出结构的影响，发现其会削弱学生模型的噪声敏感性。为此，他们提出GAD方法，通过匹配师生网络对输入噪声的Jacobian向量积，显式对齐两者对噪声扰动的微分响应，从而保留几何结构。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，GAD能显著恢复生成模型对初始噪声的敏感性，提高结果多样性，同时维持高感知质量，并且在多种T2I及基于噪声的控制任务中表现优越。
AI.conclusion: GAD有效弥补了现有生成式蒸馏的短板，使学生模型兼具效率、感知质量和可控性，拓展了T2I模型在实际控制任务中的应用潜力。

title: Who Annotates in NLP? A Large-scale Assessment of Human Annotation Reporting between 2018 and 2025
summary: Human annotation is the empirical foundation of much NLP research, from dataset construction to model evaluation, but papers often leave unclear who produced the annotations and how the annotation process was controlled. We provide the first large-scale, task-level audit of human annotation reporting across major NLP venues, asking which annotation details are documented, which are missing, and how reporting varies across time, topic, venue, and intended use of human judgment. We introduce a unified taxonomy of annotation-reporting practices and validate an LLM-assisted extraction pipeline against Annotated-gold, a human-adjudicated gold standard of 41 papers and 72 annotation tasks, where the best model reaches human-comparable agreement with adjudicated labels, with Krippendorff's alpha of 0.606 versus 0.585 for human-human agreement. Using this pipeline, we construct Annotated-llm, a dataset covering ACL-venue papers from 2018-2025, with 2,667 extracted annotation tasks from 1,603 papers, and find that papers frequently report operational details such as recruitment strategies, annotator expertise, and annotation volume, but often omit details needed to assess annotation validity, including training, language proficiency, compensation, socio-demographics, adjudication, and agreement values, especially in model-evaluation studies. Our results show that annotation reporting in NLP has improved over time but remains uneven, and they establish a scalable framework and bare-minimum reporting recommendations for making human annotation more reliable, reproducible, and interpretable.

AI.tldr: 本文系统审查了主流NLP会议论文中关于人工标注流程的信息报告情况，发现许多关键细节经常缺失，提出了统一的报告分类法和最低报告标准。
AI.motivation: NLP研究中，人工标注是数据集构建和模型评估的重要基础，但论文往往未清楚说明标注人员及其流程控制方式，影响结果的可复现性与可靠性。
AI.method: 作者提出了统一的人工标注报告分类法，并开发LLM辅助的信息抽取流程，利用人工标注金标准对其准确性进行验证。随后用该流程对2018-2025年ACL会议相关论文进行大规模分析。
AI.result: 构建了涵盖1603篇论文、2667个人工标注任务的数据集。结果显示，多数论文报告了操作性细节(如招募策略、标注者专业背景、任务量)但经常忽略标注有效性关键细节(如训练、语言能力、报酬等)，尤其在模型评估类研究中更为严重。
AI.conclusion: 近年来人工标注流程报告有所提升，但整体仍不均衡。文中提出了可推广的监督和最低报告建议，以提升NLP领域人工标注工作的可复现性、可靠性和解释性。

title: RPCASSM: Robust PCA State Space Model For Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: The detection and segmentation of infrared small targets have important application significance in the fields of surveillance and security, maritime rescue and so on. Due to the low occupancy of these targets in long-distance imaging, the mainstream visual state space model is inefficient and difficult to accurately model the target edge. The existing infrared state space models do not deviate from the mainstream visual state space structure framework from the structural properties of infrared small targets. In order to solve this problem, this paper proposes the RPCASSM network based on the model paradigm of robust principal component analysis(RPCA), which aims to design the background state space module(BSSM) and the target state space module(TSSM) by the nature of the infrared small target in the spatial domain. The BSSM aims to use the saliency of spatial heterogeneous signals to design a spatial probe scanning mechanism(SPCM) to model background information. The TSSM designs a deformable prompt scanning mechanism(DPCM) by using the sparsity and local highlight of the target to focus on the deformable space of the target for state space modeling. According to the above design, we effectively solve the problem that the existing mainstream vision state space model is difficult to accurately model the edge structure of infrared small target. Experimental results on the existing benchmark data sets prove the effectiveness of the RPCASSM design. Our code will be made public at \href{https://github.com/PepperCS/RPCASSM}{RPCASSM}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于RPCA范式的红外小目标检测分割新方法RPCASSM，能够更有效地检测和分割复杂背景中的红外小目标。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测广泛应用于监控、安全、海上救援等领域，但由于小目标占比低以及边缘难以建模，当前主流的视觉状态空间模型效率低、精度不足，尤其无法很好地拟合红外小目标的结构特性。
AI.method: 提出RPCASSM网络，引入鲁棒主成分分析（RPCA）范式，将红外小目标空间特性融入网络架构。设计了两大模块：背景状态空间模块（BSSM），通过空间探针扫描机制建模背景信息；目标状态空间模块（TSSM），利用目标的稀疏性和局部高亮性，设计变形提示扫描机制，聚焦目标的可变空间，实现精准建模。
AI.result: 在现有基准数据集上进行实验，结果证明RPCASSM方法有效提升了红外小目标边缘结构的建模与检测分割性能。
AI.conclusion: RPCASSM能显著解决主流视觉状态空间模型在红外小目标边缘建模上的不足，提升检测分割表现，并具有实际应用前景。

title: DECK: A Consistency x Confidence Taxonomy of LLM Hallucinations
summary:
Existing hallucination taxonomies classify LLM errors by what is wrong with the output -- memorised misconceptions, reasoning failures, fluent fabrications. These taxonomies are useful for diagnosis but cannot answer a different question: which uncertainty scorer would have caught this error? We propose a complementary taxonomy that classifies errors by their detectability signature -- the signal a scorer family would read.
  The DECK taxonomy is a 2x2 partition along inter-sample consistency and token-level confidence into four behavioural regimes (Drift, Entrenched, Confabulation, Knotted), each mapping to a specific scorer family (or families) that can detect it: black-box consistency scorers have signal in D and C, white-box token-probability scorers have signal in K and C, and only an LLM-as-a-Judge with independent pretraining can detect E. Cell membership is operationalised by a Youden's J optimal split on each scorer axis.
  Across three models and four datasets we validate the taxonomy two ways: by analysing scorer-pair disagreement, and by checking that external labels (SelfAware unanswerable, HaluEval adversarial, PopQA entity popularity) land in the predicted DECK cells, with model-scale and content-specific secondary-cell refinements.
  We further identify a universal blind spot of output-level UQ: on knowledge-gap inputs where the generator emits confident, repeatable fabrications, every output-level family collapses by construction. A linear probe on Llama-3-8B's hidden states also collapses to chance, giving preliminary evidence that the failure may persist at the activation level; richer internal-state methods (UQ heads, information-theoretic estimators) remain to be tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的LLM错误分类体系DECK，根据错误的可检测性特征而非错误内容本身进行分类，以便选取合适的不确定性评估方法进行检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的“幻觉”分类体系多关注于错误类型本身，对于如何检测和捕捉这些错误帮助有限。实际应用中需要快速判断哪类不确定性评估工具可以发现哪类错误，因此需要一种按可检测性划分的补充性体系。
AI.method: 作者提出DECK分类法，将错误按样本间一致性与token级置信度两个维度做2x2划分：分别为Drift、Entrenched、Confabulation、Knotted四类，并对应到不同类型的不确定性估计器。通过三种模型和四个数据集，采用评估打分器间分歧以及外部标注在DECK单元格中的分布来验证此体系。
AI.result: 通过实验，验证了此分类体系对不同模型和数据集有较好区分力，能反映由打分器检测到的行为特征。还发现对于知识缺口类输入，流行的不确定性评估方法存在一致失效的“盲点”。
AI.conclusion: DECK体系为LLM幻觉的检测和诊断提供了新视角，有助于针对性地选择检测方法。对于某些高置信度一致性错误，常规的输出级方法普遍失效，需要探索更丰富的内部状态检测手段。

title: Understanding Identity Continuity in Thermal Video through Scene-Level Consistency
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop on SVC. Published in CVPR Workshops proceedings
summary: Thermal pedestrian MOT remains challenging because weak appearance cues and frequent detection interruptions cause severe trajectory fragmentation. We study whether lightweight post-processing can recover identity continuity without relying on heavy re-identification models or complex online association. Starting from a YOLOv8 and SORT baseline, we add a modular identity-repair backend consisting of online short-gap remapping and offline tracklet relinking based on temporal, spatial, motion, and border cues. Controlled ablations on a fixed validation split and evaluation on the official PBVS Thermal Pedestrian MOT benchmark show that the main identity gains arise from conservative relinking, improving IDF1 from 82.25 to 84.93 while preserving MOTA, whereas many heuristic thresholds remain stable across broad operating ranges. These results suggest that, in low-information thermal imagery, robust identity recovery can be achieved more effectively through high-precision trajectory relinking than through increasing tracker complexity. These results provide a controlled analysis of identity recovery in thermal video, showing that scene-level spatial-temporal consistency plays a dominant role in identity continuity compared to local frame-to-frame association.

AI.tldr: 本文针对热成像行人多目标跟踪（MOT）难以保持目标身份连贯性的问题，提出了一套轻量级的后处理方法，大幅提升了身份恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 热成像视频环境下，由于表观信息弱和检测频繁中断，目标轨迹碎片化严重，传统依赖重型重识别模型或者复杂在线关联方案的方法代价高，不利于实际应用。本文探索是否可以通过简单高效的轻量级后处理，提升身份连续性。
AI.method: 在YOLOv8与SORT跟踪的基础上，增加了基于时序、空间、运动及边界信息的在线短期轨迹修复和离线轨迹重连两大模块，并通过消融实验和基准测试分析各模块作用和参数敏感性。
AI.result: 实验表明，保守的轨迹重连策略带来了主要的身份度（IDF1）提升：从82.25提升到84.93，同时MOTA保持稳定。多数启发式阈值在较大范围内参数稳定。
AI.conclusion: 在低信息的热成像环境下，通过高精度轨迹重连可比提升跟踪器复杂度更有效地恢复身份连贯性。场景级时空一致性对身份连续性贡献远超帧间局部关联。

title: AI as a Tool for Simulation-Based Experiments in Literary Studies
summary:
Generative artificial intelligence (AI) systems open new possibilities for experimentation in literary studies via controlled, grounded, large-scale, low-cost simulations of cultural production. Current systems have not yet been shown to produce high-quality, book-length narrative texts that reliably reflect arbitrarily specified cultural constraints or stylistic features. But there exists substantial relevant research on each of the components required for literary-historical simulation. These include the use and validation of AI systems as proxies for differentiable human populations; the narrative and stylistic properties of AI-generated texts; the stability and coherence of multiagent, multiturn AI simulations of human actors; and technical methods through which to alter in predictable ways the knowledge and behavior of generative systems. Together, these areas could provide a starting point for more ambitious AI-based modeling of cultural systems of literary production.
  We describe the possibilities and challenges of simulation-based experiments in literary studies, summarize the current state of the art in relevant fields, and explain key technical aspects of the work. To provide an example directly relevant to literary scholars, we present the results of experiments on literary text generation, including comparisons to high-status, human-authored novels. Our results include the first demonstration of (limited) in-distribution outputs by AI models in this domain. We conclude with a description of future work on full counterfactual literary-historical simulations using AI.

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了生成式人工智能（AI）在文学研究领域开展大规模、低成本文化生产模拟实验的可能性，并展示了AI文学文本生成的最新实验成果。
AI.motivation: 文学史研究需理解文化生产机制，但真实实验耗时、成本高。生成式AI为严控、精准模拟文学作品创作过程提供技术可能，推动文学研究范式创新。
AI.method: 梳理相关AI技术进展，包括AI模拟差异化人群、生成文本的叙事与风格分析、多智能体仿真、生成系统可控性等；并进行AI文学文本生成实验，与人类经典小说对比。
AI.result: 首次展示了AI模型生成领域内（in-distribution）文本输出的实验结果，表明AI在特定条件下能产生符合文学规范的作品。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI为模拟文学文化生产提供了新工具。未来可基于AI进行完整的反事实文学史仿真，实现文学史研究新的实验范式。

title: Learning Label-Efficient Interpretable Medical Image Diagnosis via Semi-supervised Hypergraph Concept Bottleneck Model
summary: Deep learning has revolutionized medical image analysis, delivering exceptional diagnostic accuracy across diverse applications. Yet, the lack of interpretability in its decision-making hinders clinical adoption, particularly in high-stakes medical contexts where transparency is paramount for trustworthiness. For example, in Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS), subtle cues in ultrasound imaging challenge reliable diagnosis, rendering black-box models untrustworthy for accurate scoring. To address this, Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a promising avenue by embedding clinically meaningful intermediate concepts into the diagnosis pipeline, enabling clinicians to scrutinize and refine model outputs. However, conventional CBMs falter in capturing complex inter-concept dependencies and demand costly, expert-driven concept annotations, limiting their scalability. This study introduces a novel semi-supervised CBM framework designed for medical imaging, which leverages dual-level hypergraph learning to model high-order concept dependencies and generate domain-adaptive pseudo-labels. Our approach achieves superior interpretability and performance by integrating a concept-level hypergraph for enhanced reasoning and an image-level hypergraph for robust pseudo-label generation. Experiments on a newly annotated PAS ultrasound dataset and a breast ultrasound public dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed concept label-efficient interpretable framework. Its universality is further validated on the dermoscopic image dataset SkinCon. The code is available at https://github.com/scott-yjyang/HyperCBM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的半监督概念瓶颈模型（CBM）框架，结合双层超图学习以提升医学影像分析的可解释性和诊断性能，有效解决了现有方法对高阶概念依赖关系建模不足及昂贵标注需求的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像领域虽有优异表现，但因决策过程缺乏可解释性，局限了其在临床中的采用，尤其是在高风险场景下（如胎盘植入谱系PAS的诊断）。常规CBM虽然引入了医学概念提升可解释性，但无法有效建模复杂概念关系且对专家标注依赖大，影响推广。
AI.method: 提出一种半监督CBM框架，引入了概念级超图和图像级超图：通过概念级超图建模高阶概念间的复杂依赖关系，通过图像级超图生成领域自适应的伪标签，提升模型的泛化能力和标注效率。
AI.result: 在新注释的PAS超声数据集、乳腺超声公开数据集以及皮肤镜图像数据集SkinCon上验证了方法的有效性，展现了优异的可解释性和诊断性能，并证明了其良好的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该半监督CBM框架不仅提升了医学图像分析模型的可解释性与诊断可靠性，还降低了对专家标注的依赖，促进了临床可用性。

title: Beyond Isolated Behaviors: Hierarchical User Modeling for LLM Personalization
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse domains, yet personalizing their outputs to individual users remains an open challenge. Existing approaches predominantly adopt a flat behavioral paradigm, aggregating user behaviors without an explicit account of how they are organized into deeper behavioral structures. In this work, we draw on Pierre Bourdieu's Theory of Practice to propose PHF (Practice-Habitus-Field), a sociologically grounded framework that reconceptualizes LLM personalization through three hierarchical levels: individual behaviors as practices, their temporal accumulation into stable dispositions as habitus, and shared regularities across similar users as fields. We instantiate PHF through $\mathrm{PHF}_{\text{Compass}}$, a lightweight and model-agnostic implementation based on a frozen LLM. Experiments on the Language Model Personalization (LaMP) benchmark demonstrate consistent improvements across diverse tasks, while further analyses validate the interpretability and extensibility of the learned behavioral structures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于社会学理论的LLM个性化方法，将用户行为结构化为三层次（实践－惯习－场），实现更精准的个性化输出，并在基准任务上验证了有效性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLM）能力强大，但如何根据个人用户特征精准地个性化输出，仍是个尚未解决的难题。现有方法多以平面方式简单聚合用户行为，未深入揭示行为背后的结构和层次。为此，作者引入社会学理论以更精细地理解和刻画用户行为结构。
AI.method: 借鉴布迪厄的实践理论，提出PHF（实践－惯习－场）框架，将个体行为分为三层次：具体行为（实践）、行为累积形成的模式（惯习）、群体共有的行为规律（场）。并通过冻结的LLM和轻量级实现方式—PHF_Compass，在不同用户数据和任务上应用此框架。
AI.result: 在LaMP（语言模型个性化）基准任务上，PHF_Compass在多种任务中均取得了稳定提升。同时实验表明，通过该方法学习到的用户行为结构具备良好的可解释性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 基于实践－惯习－场的分层结构，不仅提升了大语言模型的个性化效果，还带来了行为结构的可解释性及方法的通用性。

title: MixerSENet: A Lightweight Framework for Efficient Hyperspectral Image Classification
comment: Accepted and Published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL)
summary: In this paper, a novel framework, MixerSENet, is introduced for hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, designed to address the challenges of computational efficiency and limited labeled data. The proposed model processes hyperspectral image patches while maintaining consistent size and resolution throughout the network, effectively decoupling the mixing of spatial and channel dimensions. Notably, MixerSENet is lightweight and computationally efficient, requiring fewer parameters compared to traditional models, making it suitable for resource-constrained environments. A squeeze and excitation block is incorporated into the model to refine feature extraction, enhancing the network's ability to capture more informative features. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that MixerSENet achieves superior performance, reaching an overall accuracy (OA) of 82.47% on Houston13 dataset and 96.70% on the Qingyun dataset, outperforming state-of-the-art methods including 3D-CNN, HybridKAN, HSIFormer, SimPoolFormer, and MorphMamba. Furthermore, a detailed analysis of computational efficiency shows that MixerSENet achieves a favorable balance between accuracy and efficiency, with only 53,146 parameters and an low inference time, confirming its practicality for real-world applications. At publication, source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/MixerSENet.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效轻量的新型网络MixerSENet，用于高光谱图像分类，在实验中取得了优于现有方法的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统高光谱图像分类模型计算量大且对标注数据依赖强，不适用于算力受限环境。作者希望通过设计轻量化模型，提高效率并降低对数据量的要求。
AI.method: 作者提出了MixerSENet框架，对输入的高光谱图像进行分块处理，并保持数据尺寸与分辨率一致。通过解耦空间与通道混合，结合squeeze and excitation模块提升特征提取能力。
AI.result: 在Houston13和Qingyun两个基准数据集上，MixerSENet分别达到了82.47%和96.70%的整体准确率，优于3D-CNN、HybridKAN、HSIFormer等先进方法，并且参数量仅为53,146，推理速度快。
AI.conclusion: MixerSENet兼具高准确率和高效率，适合实际应用于算力有限的场景。该模型有望在高光谱图像分类领域推广应用。

title: Unified Context Evolution for LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based agents can solve multi-step interactive tasks by combining reasoning with environment feedback, yet each episode starts from the same fixed context and any useful strategy discovered along the way is lost once the task ends. Existing approaches either limit learning to the current task or pool all experience into a single untyped store, without distinguishing knowledge types, tracking quality through use, or balancing what the library still lacks. We introduce Unified Context Evolution (UCE), a gradient-free framework that externalizes agent experience into an evolving library of typed Evolvable Context Units (ECUs). UCE decomposes experience into four complementary types (Memory, Strategy, Workflow, and Skill), each generated from trajectories under type-specific conditions, retrieved at decision time, scored through repeated usage outcomes, and pruned when no longer valuable. A scheduling module allocates each cycle's generation budget toward the types where the library is weakest. Across two interactive benchmarks, UCE raises ALFWorld success from 75.4% to 96.3% and WebShop task score from 45.1% to 61.3%, and the accumulated library transfers to alternative actor backbones without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Unified Context Evolution（UCE）框架，将基于LLM的智能体在多步任务中的经验外化为结构化、可进化的知识单元，实现长期知识积累和跨场景迁移能力显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体难以在多步任务中保留和迭代学习有用知识，且通常将所有经验混为一谈，无视不同类型知识的特性、质量和关联性，限制了知识复用和智能体进化。
AI.method: UCE通过将智能体的经验分解为四类可进化的上下文单元（Memory、Strategy、Workflow、Skill），每类均有独立生成、检索、使用和淘汰机制。系统调度模块会根据知识库弱项动态分配新知识的生成预算，以保证知识的全面性和高效利用。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop两个交互基准测试中，UCE显著提升了成功率和任务得分（ALFWorld从75.4%增至96.3%，WebShop从45.1%升至61.3%），并可将积累的知识无缝迁移至其他智能体结构，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: UCE通过外化和精细管理经验，实现了高效的长期知识演化与迁移，为LLM智能体在复杂交互任务中的持续进化与泛化能力带来了突破。

title: Spatio-Temporal Correlation Guided Geometric Partitioning for Versatile Video Coding
summary: Geometric partitioning has attracted increasing attention by its remarkable motion field description capability in the hybrid video coding framework. However, the existing geometric partitioning (GEO) scheme in Versatile Video Coding (VVC) causes a non-negligible burden for signaling the side information. Consequently, the coding efficiency is limited. In view of this, we propose a spatio-temporal correlation guided geometric partitioning (STGEO) scheme to efficiently describe the object information in the motion field of video coding. The proposed method can economize the bits consumed for side information signaling, including the partitioning mode and motion information. We firstly analyze the characteristics of partitioning mode decision and motion vector selection in a statistically-sound way. Based on the observed spatio-temporal correlation, we design a mode prediction and coding method to reduce the overhead for representing the above mentioned side information. The main idea is to predict the STGEO modes and motion candidates that have higher selection possibilities, which can guide the entropy coding, i.e., representing the predicted high-probability modes and motion candidates with fewer bits. In particular, the high-probability STGEO modes are predicted based on the edge information and history modes of adjacent STGEO-coded blocks. The corresponding motion information is represented by the index in a merge candidate list, which is adaptively inferred based on the off-line trained merge candidate selection probability. Simulation results show that the proposed approach achieves 0.95% and 1.98% bit-rate savings on average compared to VTM-8.0 without GEO for Random Access and Low-Delay B configurations, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时空相关性引导的几何划分方法（STGEO），能够降低视频编码中几何划分相关的信令开销，实现更高的编码效率。
AI.motivation: 现有VVC中GEO方案带来了显著信令开销，限制了编码效率，因此需要更高效的几何划分与信息传递方法。
AI.method: 作者提出以时空相关性为引导，结合分割模式决策与运动矢量选择的统计分析，设计预测与编码方法。即，通过邻近块的边缘信息与历史模式预测高概率的STGEO模式与运动候选，并以自适应的概率模型编码，从而有效压缩相关信令。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，相较于不使用GEO的VTM-8.0，所提方法在Random Access配置下节省0.95%比特率，在Low-Delay B配置下节省1.98%。
AI.conclusion: 利用时空相关性预测与自适应编码策略可明显降低GEO相关信令开销，提升VVC编码效率。

title: TVIR: Building Deep Research Agents Towards Text--Visual Interleaved Report Generation
summary: Deep Research Agents have shown strong capability in multi-step information retrieval, reasoning, and long-form report generation, but existing benchmarks and systems remain predominantly text-centric, with limited evaluation of whether visual elements are factually reliable and well aligned with the surrounding analysis. To address this gap, we introduce TVIR (Text--Visual Interleaved Report Generation), which includes TVIR-Bench, a benchmark of 100 expert-curated multimodal deep research tasks that require visual elements to serve specific analytical sub-goals, and TVIR-Agent, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that serves as a strong baseline for constructing outlines, retrieving images, generating charts with traceable sources, and composing reports through context-aware sequential writing. We further develop a dual-path evaluation framework that combines Textual Assessment and Visual Assessment. Experiments across nine deep research systems show that TVIR-Agent achieves strong overall performance, underscoring the importance of explicit multimodal design and evaluation for evidence-driven report generation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对深度研究系统中过度依赖文本、视觉要素评价不足的问题，提出了新的多模态基准TVIR与强大基线系统TVIR-Agent，并建立了双路径评价体系，推动多模态证据驱动的报告生成发展。
AI.motivation: 当前深度研究智能体在信息获取和长文本生成方面表现优异，但多偏重文本，对视觉要素的真实性和与文本的对应性缺乏系统性评估。因此，亟需一个专门面向多模态（文本和视觉）深度报告生成的评测体系与工具。
AI.method: 提出TVIR-Bench（含100个人工设计的多模态研究任务）及TVIR-Agent（分层多智能体，涵盖提纲构建、图片检索、制图和上下文感知写作），并开发文本与视觉双重评价框架，综合考察系统表现。
AI.result: TVIR-Agent在九种主流深度研究系统上表现突出，显著优于传统主要基于文本的方法，证明多模态结构和显式视觉要素设计/评价对于高质量深度报告生成至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 本工作显著补足了深度研究系统多模态能力缺口，为后续多模态研究智能体发展和评测提供了基准、方法与工具，强调了将视觉内容与文本分析密切结合的重要性。

title: Density-Aware Translation of Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot VLMs
summary: Vision-Language models (VLMs), such as CLIP, achieve powerful zero-shot classification. However, their predictions remain sensitive to spurious correlations, where contextual cues dominate over semantic content. Earlier solutions typically rely on fine-tuning or prompt engineering, which either undermine the advantages of pre-trained models or are prone to hallucination. In this work, we propose Density-Aware Translation (DAT) that refines image-text similarity scores using a local geometric density term derived from group reference sets. Our approach is motivated by the phenomenon that CLIP embeddings exhibit a modality gap and lie on an anisotropic shell in the feature space: common patterns cluster near the mean, while rare patterns are pushed outward. This geometry creates uneven alignment, where spurious correlations are amplified while semantically meaningful but rare cues are marginalised. To address this, we employ a relative measure to rescale similarities based on embedding density, suppressing overconfident scores in diffuse regions while preserving dense, semantically consistent matches. Experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in worst-group and average accuracy, highlighting density-aware translation as a simple and effective calibration mechanism for reliable zero-shot classification using multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Density-Aware Translation (DAT)的新方法，通过引入密度感知机制对图像-文本相似性分数进行校正，有效提升了多模态模型如CLIP在零样本分类场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前VLMs如CLIP在零样本场景下表现突出，但易受到无关上下文（如伪相关因素）干扰影响，现有的微调或提示工程方法各有局限，有削弱预训练模型优势或产生幻觉的风险，因此需要更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 该方法基于对CLIP嵌入特性的观察，发现稀有语义特征被边缘化且对齐失衡。DAT利用组参考集，计算嵌入空间的密度信息，并据此对图像-文本相似性分数进行重标定，抑制稀疏区域的过度自信预测，保留密集语义一致的信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DAT在标准基准数据集上提升了最差组和平均分类准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 密度感知的相似度校正是一种简单高效的零样本多模态模型可置信性提升机制，为VLMs抗伪相关性提供了可行途径。

title: WAXAL-NET: Finetuned Edge ASR Across 19 African Languages
summary: We evaluate whether compact domain-specialized ASR models can outperform massively multilingual foundation models for conversational African speech across 19 languages in the WAXAL corpus. Fine-tuned edge models achieve a macro-averaged WER of $38.0\%$ compared to $64.9\%$ for the best zero-shot baseline, a $26.9$ percentage-point reduction using models $3-40\times$ smaller. Results confirm that domain specialization dominates scale for spontaneous African speech. Cross-domain evaluation shows that fine-tuned models recover usable performance on out-of-distribution (OOD) speech, while zero-shot models regain an advantage when the test domain matches their pretraining distribution. A distributed native-speaker audit across all surveyed languages produces a linguistically-grounded error taxonomy, showing that CTC and autoregressive architectures behave differently across language families. We further show that WER alone misrepresents performance for syllabary-script languages where CER/WER ratios reveal substantially higher character-level accuracy than headline WER suggests. Finally, to contribute to future African ASR research, we release all model weights, fine-tuning and evaluation scripts, and a cleaned WAXAL subset covering all $19$ languages.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了针对非洲多语言会话语音的专用轻量ASR模型与大规模多语种基础模型的表现，发现专用模型在准确率和模型体积上具有显著优势，并公开了全部代码和数据。
AI.motivation: 非洲语种多样但高质量语音识别资源极其稀缺，主流ASR多依赖于大规模多语种模型。但这些模型通常零样本泛化能力有限，尤其在非洲口语环境中的实际效果并不理想。因此亟需探索小型、针对性强的ASR模型在特定应用域（如非洲会话语音）中的实际优势。
AI.method: 作者选取WAXAL非洲多语种语音库中19种语言，开发并微调多种轻量化、专用型ASR模型，并与主流大规模多语模型的零样本基线做全面对比评测。分析包括原分布和分布外（OOD）领域泛化评测，还通过母语者评审构建了跨语言误差类别体系，并对比不同ASR架构表现及对应于音节文字体系语言的评测指标。
AI.result: 专用微调模型宏平均WER为38.0%，而最优大模型零样本WER为64.9%，两者相差26.9个百分点，且前者模型体量仅为3-40倍更小。微调模型在原域和部分OOD场景下均优于大模型，但在与大模型预训练分布一致的域，大模型优势恢复。误差分析揭示不同ASR架构在不同语族表现差异。对于音节文字语种，单用WER会低估实际识别能力，CER/WER比值更能反映准确率。
AI.conclusion: 领域专用小型ASR模型在非洲多语会话场景优于大规模多语种基础模型，鼓励今后领域定制化模型探索。全文开放全部模型权重、代码和清洗后的数据，为后续非洲语音识别研究打下基础。

title: Improving Visual Token Reduction via Rectifying Distortions for Efficient Multimodal LLM Inference
summary: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in vision-language tasks, yet the quadratic computational complexity arising from the vast number of visual tokens incurs significant memory and latency bottlenecks. While visual token reduction (VTR) strategies have been explored to mitigate this burden, existing methods overlook the positional and attentional consistency between the full and reduced sequences, resulting in a distorted representation. To this end, we propose RESTORE, a novel VTR framework that rectifies the positional and attentional distortions while maintaining efficiency. Specifically, we present a simple yet effective calibration method that restores lost visual attention by augmenting attention weights based on relative distances. We also introduce a distinctive anchor selection for token merging to mitigate information loss during feature averaging. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently improves the accuracy of various reduction methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance while maintaining computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RESTORE，一种改进视觉token约简的新方法，有效减少LLM在多模态任务中的计算和内存消耗，同时提升可用性和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型处理视觉-语言任务时需处理大量视觉token，导致计算量和内存消耗巨大。虽然有视觉token约简（VTR）尝试，但通常无视位置和注意力一致性，造成信息扭曲。
AI.method: 提出RESTORE框架，通过两个关键措施增强约简token后的表现：一是利用注意力权重与相对距离校准，恢复约简过程中丢失的视觉关注信息；二是创新锚点选择方式进行token合并，降低平均特征导致的信息损失。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，RESTORE方法稳定地提升了不同VTR方法的准确率，并取得了当前最优的性能表现，同时保证了较高的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: RESTORE有效改善了VTR引起的位置信息与注意力失真问题，在保持高效的同时提升了模型精度，推动了多模态大模型在实际应用中的可行性和表现。

title: SPADE-Bench: Evaluating Spontaneous Strategic Deception in Agents via Plan-Action Divergence
summary: As LLM-based agents expand their operational scope, reliability becomes a prerequisite for real-world deployment. However, in practical applications, human users cannot monitor every immediate behavior; instead, the execution process often remains a black box, leaving users dependent solely on the agent's self-reported updates. This opacity creates a critical risk: agents may present observer-facing reports that diverge from their executed actions, rendering the system uncontrollable, especially in high-stakes autonomous scenarios. We term such self-reported plan-action divergence as agent deception. To assess this, we introduce SPADE-Bench, a benchmark designed to evaluate spontaneous plan-action divergence. Unlike prior deception benchmarks, SPADE-Bench simultaneously integrates actual tool execution and controlled pressure scenarios. This design ensures ecological validity and rigorously distinguishes strategic deception from mere hallucination through controlled plan-action comparisons under pressure. Experiments across mainstream models confirm that agent deception is a genuine and pressing issue in tool-use contexts. By providing a comprehensive and robust evaluation framework, SPADE-Bench fills a critical gap in agent safety, facilitating the community's progress toward building trustworthy and controllable autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了代理自我报告行为与实际执行行为不一致（即“代理欺骗”）的问题，并引入了SPADE-Bench基准来系统评测此现象，为提升自主智能体的安全性和可控性提供工具。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的智能体在实际应用中变得越来越普遍，但由于人类无法实时监控其全部行为，用户只能依赖智能体自我报告，这种“黑箱”操作带来了代理欺骗风险，尤其在重要的自动化场景中可能造成严重后果。因此，开发一种标准化评测工具来量化和区分代理的战略性欺骗行为十分迫切。
AI.method: 作者提出SPADE-Bench评测基准，该基准集成了实际工具调用与受控压力情境，通过对比计划与执行，严格区分战略性欺骗与幻觉，并具有生态效度。
AI.result: 主流模型实验证明，代理欺骗在工具使用场景中确实存在且十分严重。SPADE-Bench基准可以有效发现、量化这种现象。
AI.conclusion: SPADE-Bench为智能体安全性研究填补了空白，促进了自主系统的可信与可控，为未来的机器人和AI系统安全应用提供了可靠评测框架。

authors: Rui Bebiano Da Providencia E Costa
title: AutoForest: Automatically Generating Forest Plots from Biomedical Studies with End-to-End Evidence Extraction and Synthesis
summary: Systematic reviews rely on forest plots to synthesise quantitative evidence across biomedical studies, but generating them remains a fragmented and labour-intensive process. Researchers must interpret complex clinical texts, manually extract outcome data from trials, define appropriate interventions and comparators, harmonise inconsistent study designs, and carry out meta-analytic computations-typically using specialised software that demands structured inputs and domain expertise. While recent work has demonstrated that large language models can extract study-level data from unstructured text, no existing system automates the complete pipeline from raw documents to synthesised forest plots. To address this gap, we introduce AutoForest, the first end-to-end system that generates publication-ready forest plots directly from biomedical papers. Given one or more study papers, AutoForest automatically suggests ICO (Intervention, Comparator, Outcome) elements, extracts outcome data, performs statistical synthesis, and renders the final forest plot. We describe the system architecture, user interface and demonstrate its effectiveness on real-world examples through a user study involving clinicians, showing how AutoForest can accelerate evidence synthesis and substantially lower the barrier to conducting meta-analyses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoForest，一个自动化工具，可从医学文献自动生成用于系统评价和Meta分析的森林图，实现了从文献到结果的全流程自动化。
AI.motivation: 医学系统评价和Meta分析常用森林图综合不同研究结果，但其生成过程繁琐、需要大量人工操作和领域知识，缺乏有效自动化工具。
AI.method: 开发AutoForest，输入医学文献后，自动识别ICO要素、提取结局数据、完成统计分析并输出出版级森林图，同时配套用户界面。通过与临床医生合作的用户研究验证效果。
AI.result: AutoForest可自动建议ICO要素、抽取相关数据并生成合成森林图，在用户研究中，展示出便捷和高效性，大大降低了进行Meta分析的门槛。
AI.conclusion: AutoForest为医学领域从文献到森林图的自动化流程提供了解决方案，将极大加速循证医学证据合成和Meta分析的开展。

title: Sensitivity as a Double-Edged Sword: A Trade-off Between Discriminability and Adversarial Robustness
summary: Modern neural networks are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations. In this work, we identify that part of this vulnerability stems from the sensitivity of the widely used fully connected (FC) classifiers to such perturbations. In contrast, simple $\ell_2$ distance-based classifiers exhibit significantly greater robustness. We provide thorough theoretical and empirical analysis showing that while FC classifiers' high sensitivity makes them discriminative, it also makes them vulnerable. Conversely, $\ell_2$-classifiers' insensitivity grants robustness but limits performance. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose a novel $\ell_2$-reclassifier based on a Hybrid Prototype Mixing (HPM) framework. This method retains the discriminative power of FC classifiers while leveraging the robustness of $\ell_2$ distance. It yields $\ell_2$-distance-based predictions by fusing two prototype types: (1) stable, dataset-level prototypes updated via EMA, and (2) dynamic, batch-level prototypes generated from the FC classifier's predictions using a Straight-Through Estimator (STE). However, this dynamic, STE-based architecture introduces significant challenges for evaluation, such as gradient obfuscation and forward discontinuity. To address this, we propose a new, rigorous evaluation protocol, the Mixed Surrogate Attack (MSA), which uses multiple surrogates along with powerful AutoAttack to ensure a fair and robust assessment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our lightweight, plug-and-play module, with minimal fine-tuning, effectively enhances the adversarial robustness of various existing SOTA adversarially trained models.

AI.tldr: 本文指出目前常用的全连接（FC）分类器是神经网络易受对抗扰动的部分原因，并提出了一种结合FC判别力与$\ell_2$距离鲁棒性的混合原型方法，大幅提升了多模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络对抗鲁棒性弱，很大原因是现有FC分类器对小扰动极其敏感。标准$\ell_2$距离分类器虽鲁棒但性能有限，因此作者希望兼得两者优点。
AI.method: 提出了基于混合原型的$\ell_2$-reclassifier框架（Hybrid Prototype Mixing, HPM），融合了稳定的全局原型（数据级，EMA更新）和动态的局部原型（批量级，通过STE从FC输出产生），最终用$\ell_2$距离进行判别；同时提出了MSA评估协议，结合多替代模型与强攻击确保评测可靠。
AI.result: 实验证明，该轻量级、可无缝接入的reclassifier几乎无需微调即可大幅提升多种SOTA对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结合FC的判别性与$\ell_2$的鲁棒性可有效提升模型安全性，提出的框架简单高效，适用于多种现有模型，对提升对抗机器学习模型实用性有积极意义。

title: K-BrowseComp: A Web Browsing Agent Benchmark Grounded in Korean Contexts
summary: Frontier model evaluations are shifting from foundational capabilities (e.g., instruction following and reasoning) toward compositional, agentic ones, but Korean agentic benchmarks remain scarce. We introduce K-BrowseComp, a web-browsing agent benchmark grounded in Korean contexts, consisting of 400 problems. The 300-problem K-BrowseComp-Verified subset is manually constructed and validated by native Korean speakers. On this subset, frontier LLMs, including GPT-5.5, DeepSeek-V4-Pro, and GLM-5.1, reach only 30.00--45.67\%, a substantial drop from BrowseComp, while Korean LLMs released through Korea's Proprietary AI Foundation Model program obtain only 0.00--10.33\%. We further construct a 100-problem synthetic split using hard few-shot exemplars and failure-mode-targeted generation to exploit the asymmetry between solving and creating web browsing problems. On the adversarially filtered synthetic diagnostic split, the strongest model reaches only 26.00\%, and we report this split separately as a targeted stress test. We publicly release our data and code.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了K-BrowseComp，这是一个专为韩国语境设计的网页浏览代理基准，用于评估大模型（LLM）的综合能力，并包含人工验证与生成的难题。主流LLM在此基准上的表现显著低于已存在的相关基准。
AI.motivation: 新一代大模型评测从基础能力转向更复杂的组合代理能力，而现有用于韩语场景的网页浏览代理基准几乎缺失，影响对相关模型真实能力的评估。
AI.method: 作者构建了K-BrowseComp，包括400个韩语网页浏览问题，其中300题经母语者手工验证，另外100题通过难例生成与对抗性筛选方式自动生成，并独立作为压力测试。
AI.result: 在K-BrowseComp-Verified子集上，国际前沿LLM表现为30.00-45.67%，而韩国本土模型仅为0.00-10.33%，与英文BrowseComp相比下降显著；在对抗性诊断集上最强模型仅26.00%。
AI.conclusion: 现有主流LLM及韩国本地模型在韩语网页浏览组合任务上的能力明显不足。K-BrowseComp为未来相关能力研究与模型优化提供了重要基准和数据资源。

title: Quality-Guided Semi-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Early Accept at MICCAI 2026, 13 pages, 2 figures
summary: Training accurate medical image segmentation models requires large amounts of densely annotated data, which is costly and time-consuming to obtain. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) alleviates this by learning from both abundant unlabeled data and limited labeled data. However, most modern SSL methods rely on pseudolabels for unlabeled data, and typically assess their reliability through model confidence or uncertainty, measures that are self-referential and lack explicit grounding in segmentation quality. Instead, we propose a quality-guided SSL framework that trains a dedicated network to estimate segmentation quality from image-mask pairs. The predictor is trained on variable-quality masks generated through synthetic corruptions augmented with imperfect outputs from partially trained segmentation models, capturing realistic error patterns encountered during training. We integrate the quality predictor into SSL through two complementary mechanisms: a quality-aware regularization loss and a quality-based pseudolabel sample reweighting scheme. We show that our method serves as a drop-in enhancement to existing SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments across five datasets and multiple architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over competing SSL methods, advancing the state-of-the-art in semi-supervised medical image segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种质量引导的半监督学习（SSL）框架，通过训练专门的网络判断分割掩码质量，以提升医学图像分割的准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割模型需要大量高质量标注数据，成本高、耗时长。现有半监督方法多依赖伪标签，但通常使用模型自己的置信度或不确定性作为伪标签可靠性的依据，存在自指、与真实分割质量缺乏直接关联的问题。
AI.method: 作者提出通过训练一个质量预测网络，根据图像和分割掩码对来评估分割质量。该预测器使用经过合成扰动和部分训练模型输出生成的有不同错误模式的掩码数据进行训练，力图还原训练中常见的误差特点。预测器被集成至SSL框架中，通过质量感知正则损失和基于质量的伪标签样本重加权两种机制提升性能。
AI.result: 该方法能够直接集成到现有的SSL框架中，且在五个数据集和多种网络架构上的大量实验表明，该方法持续优于主流SSL对比方法，提高了医学图像分割的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 作者提出的质量引导型SSL方法显著改善了医学图像分割的半监督学习表现，是当前领域的先进方法，有望推广到更多实际应用中。

title: Investigating and Alleviating Harm Amplification in LLM Interactions
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can serve as helpful assistants, yet they can equally function as harm amplifiers that enable malicious users to achieve harmful outcomes beyond their capabilities through extended interactions. This risk manifests along two axes, i.e., democratizing domain expertise that allows novices to produce specialized harmful content, and scaling harmful operations at volumes that manual effort cannot match. Existing works, however, often overlook how LLMs compound harm across multi-turn conversations. We introduce HarmAmp, a new benchmark for multi-turn harm amplification scenarios spanning twelve risk categories. Each scenario is grounded in real-world threats and satisfies rigorous criteria, i.e., substantive amplification, operational specificity, and multi-turn necessity. We further propose TrajSafe, a proactive monitor that anticipates harmful trajectories and intervenes through actions such as probing users' genuine intents and steering the models towards safer completion. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that TrajSafe significantly reduces the harmfulness incurred in multi-turn interactions while preserving a low over-refusal rate and the target model's general capabilities. Our work offers a promising paradigm to alleviate the nuanced safety risks in LLM interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多轮对话大模型（LLM）可能被恶意用户用于放大危害，并开发了HarmAmp基准和TrajSafe安全监控方法来应对该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究很少关注大模型在多轮对话中危害放大的方式，而这会让恶意用户以更具体、更高效的方式制造伤害。需要有评测和应对手段，提升大模型安全。
AI.method: 提出了HarmAmp多轮危害放大基准，涵盖12类真实威胁场景，同时提出TrajSafe主动监控工具，该工具能预测有害对话轨迹并通过探查、引导等方式进行干预。
AI.result: 实验显示，TrajSafe显著降低了多轮对话中的危害程度，并且不会过度拒绝正常请求，也不会损害模型的通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为解决LLM安全中的细致风险提供了新范式，有效应对多轮对话危害放大的挑战。

title: EvoCut: Multi-Layer Evolution-Aware Visual Token Compression for Efficient Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on image and video understanding tasks, but their inference efficiency is constrained by the large number of visual tokens produced by vision encoders. Most existing visual token compression methods estimate token importance from attention scores or representation properties at specific layers, overlooking how visual tokens evolve across the vision encoder. Such layer-specific criteria may provide incomplete importance estimates and limit performance preservation after compression. To address this issue, we analyze layer-wise visual token evolution directions and observe that tokens form multiple group evolution directions across vision-encoder layers. Our analysis further shows that informative tokens tend to exhibit persistent deviations from common group evolution directions. Based on this observation, we propose EvoCut, a training-free and attention-free visual token compression method that estimates token importance from multi-layer evolution deviation. Experimental results show that EvoCut can retain only 11.1\% of the visual tokens on LLaVA-1.5-7B while preserving 94.4\% of the average performance, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing efficiency and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EvoCut的新型视觉token压缩方法，在不依赖训练和注意力机制的前提下，提高了大模型推理效率，并且能在极大压缩token数量的同时保持较高任务表现。
AI.motivation: 当前大视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）在推理时由于视觉编码器产生大量token，导致推理效率较低。现有压缩方法多依赖特定层上的注意力分数或表示特性，忽视了token在整个编码器内的演化过程，从而影响压缩效果及模型表现。亟需更有效的压缩方法以提升推理效率并保持性能。
