AI.method: 通过分析视觉token在编码器各层间演化方向，发现token在不同层中呈现多个群组的演化趋势，有用的token在这些趋势下往往存在持续偏离。基于这一现象，提出EvoCut方法，不依赖训练和注意力机制，通过多层演化偏离度估算token重要性并进行压缩。
AI.result: 实验证实，EvoCut方法在LLaVA-1.5-7B模型上可将视觉token压缩至仅剩11.1%，同时仍能保持94.4%的平均任务性能，验证了该方法在效率与精度之间的优越平衡能力。
AI.conclusion: EvoCut为视觉-语言模型带来了无需训练、无需注意力机制的新型压缩方案，有效提升了模型推理效率，且在大幅压缩token数量后依旧能很好地保留模型性能，具有实际应用价值。

title: PaSBench-Video: A Streaming Video Benchmark for Proactive Safety Warning
summary: Between the first visible sign of danger and the moment an accident occurs, there is often a window where intervention remains possible. Video-capable multimodal large language models (MLLMs) could serve as always-on safety monitors that issue warnings during this window. Yet current benchmarks do not test this ability: they rely on static inputs, ignore timing precision, and omit false-positive measurement on safe scenes. We present PaSBench-Video, a 740-video benchmark with 481 risk and 259 no-risk videos across four domains: driving, healthcare, daily life, and industrial production. Risk videos are annotated with frame-level risk onset and accident boundaries. A model must observe the video causally and produce a warning that is both temporally calibrated and content-correct. Testing 13 MLLMs, we find that no model exceeds 20.0% on our strictest metric, and recall is tightly coupled with false-positive rate, with Pearson correlation 0.64: higher detection comes only at the cost of triggering warnings on the majority of safe clips. Performance splits sharply by domain: models achieve moderate recall at low false-positive rates in daily life, where risks are inherently anomalous, yet fire indiscriminately in driving, where routine and hazardous scenes look alike. These results indicate that current models rely on scene-level activity cues rather than reasoning about emerging harm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PaSBench-Video基准，通过740个涵盖驾驶、医疗、日常和工业四个领域的视频，系统测试了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）对突发风险的预警能力，结果显示现有模型表现有限。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型虽可用于安全监控，但现有基准仅用静态输入，且忽略时序精度与安全场景下的误报率，无法真实反映模型应对突发风险能力。作者为此开发了更贴合实际需求的新基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了包括481个风险视频和259个无风险视频的PaSBench-Video，每个风险视频精准标注了风险出现及事故发生的帧界。模型按时间顺序处理视频，并需在恰当时机对风险做出准确预警。共测试13个MLLMs，并结合召回率、误报率等细致评估。
AI.result: 无一模型在最严苛指标下表现超20%。召回率与误报率高度相关，提升检出能力会导致对大量安全片段误报警告。不同领域表现分化显著：日常生活领域效果尚可，驾驶场景则极易产生误报。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态模型主要依赖场景表层特征，缺乏对风险演化的真正推理，短期难以单靠现有模型实现精准、即时的风险预警功能。

title: PillarDETR: YOLO-Backbone and RT-DETR Head for Real-Time 3D Object Detection
summary: Real-time 3D object detection is a critical component for the safe operation of autonomous driving systems and robotics. While LiDAR point clouds provide accurate spatial information, processing them efficiently remains a significant challenge. Traditional methods rely on complex 3D convolutions or anchor-based paradigms that struggle to balance detection accuracy with inference speed. In this paper, we propose PillarDETR, a novel end-to-end 3D object detection architecture that combines the efficiency of pillar-based LiDAR encoding with the representational power of modern 2D vision models. Specifically, PillarDETR replaces standard convolutional backbones with a Cross Stage Partial (CSP) network derived from YOLOv8, enabling richer feature extraction from pseudoimages. Furthermore, we discard conventional anchor-based or center-based detection heads in favor of a Real-Time Detection Transformer (RT-DETR) decoder. This hybrid design allows the network to capture global context and directly predict 3D bounding boxes without relying on non-maximum suppression (NMS). Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that PillarDETR achieves a compelling trade-off between mean Average Precision (mAP) and inference latency. Our ablation studies confirm that integrating the YOLOv8 backbone and RT-DETR head yields substantial improvements over the PointPillars baseline, establishing PillarDETR as a highly effective solution for real-time 3D perception.

AI.tldr: 提出了PillarDETR，一种结合YOLOv8骨干网络与新型Transformer解码器的端到端实时3D目标检测框架，在精准度和推理速度之间实现了更好平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有3D目标检测方法（如基于体素、锚框或3D卷积）难以兼顾高检测精度和实时推理速度，限制了无人驾驶和机器人等实际应用。需要创新型方法突破这一权衡。
AI.method: 方法上，PillarDETR使用pillar-based（柱体划分）点云编码，将3D点云转换为伪2D影像。取代传统卷积骨干，使用YOLOv8衍生的CSP网络进行特征提取。检测头不再采用锚框或中心预测方式，而是引入实时检测Transformer解码器（RT-DETR），提升全局感知能力，并跳过NMS直接回归3D框。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上的大量实验显示，PillarDETR在平均精度（mAP）和推理延迟（latency）之间取得更优折中。消融实验表明，融合YOLOv8骨干和RT-DETR检测头后，系统性能显著优于PointPillars等经典方法。
AI.conclusion: PillarDETR框架能够高效、准确进行实时3D目标检测，是智能驾驶和机器人领域值得推荐的解决方案。

title: Learning When to Translate for Multilingual Reasoning
summary: Reasoning language models (RLMs) achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks, but still exhibit substantial multilingual reasoning gaps, largely due to language-understanding failures in non-English inputs. English translation can mitigate these failures by expressing non-English inputs in a form that RLMs can more reliably interpret, yet translating every input is unnecessary when the model can reason reliably from the original query. To address this challenge, we propose Luar, a Language Understanding Boundary-aware Reinforcement Learning framework that trains RLMs to selectively invoke translation when direct understanding is unreliable. Luar trains the model to choose between solving the original input directly and reasoning over its English translation, encouraging translation only when translator-augmented reasoning is expected to substantially outperform direct reasoning. Across multilingual reasoning benchmarks, Luar outperforms standard GRPO and other training-based baselines, with particularly large gains on low-resource languages. Further analysis shows that Luar avoids unnecessary translation in cases where direct reasoning is sufficient, while extending its translator-call behavior to unseen low-resource languages. Together, our work suggests a selective approach to multilingual reasoning: RLMs can learn to invoke translation only when their direct understanding is unreliable. The project will be made publicly available at https://github.com/deokhk/LUAR

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种增强多语言推理模型（RLM）能力的新方法Luar，通过智能选择是否将非英语输入翻译为英语，有效提升了多语言推理性能，尤其在低资源语言上表现突出。
AI.motivation: 目前多语言推理模型虽然整体性能强大，但在非英语输入上存在显著的理解和推理差距，主要原因在于模型对非英语内容的理解力有限。单纯依赖全部翻译为英语虽然能缓解这一问题，但并非所有情况下都需要翻译。因此需要一种更为智能的选择机制。
AI.method: Luar是一种利用强化学习训练的框架，能够判断每一道多语言推理题目是直接用原语言推理还是先翻译成英语再进行推理。其核心思想是仅在翻译辅助推理明显优于直接推理时才调用翻译，从而高效利用翻译资源。
AI.result: 在多个多语言推理基准测试集上，Luar均优于标准的GRPO和其他基于训练的方法。尤其在低资源语言上效果更为显著。分析表明，Luar可有效避免不必要的翻译，并泛化到未见过的低资源语言。
AI.conclusion: Luar实现了一种智能、选择性的多语言推理路径，在模型直接理解力不足时才调用翻译手段，显著提升了多语言推理的性能和效率。

title: PlatonicNav: Unveiling Semantic Correspondence in Navigation with Platonic Topological Maps
summary: Embodied visual navigation, where an agent perceives a complex environment and acts to reach a goal from raw sensory input, underpins a wide range of applications such as household service robotics, assistive robotics, and large-scale autonomous exploration. However, recent attempts to unify vision-and-language navigation (VLN) and object goal navigation (ObjNav) remain at the level of architectural fusion, mixed-task training, and large vision-language pretraining, without examining whether independently trained vision and language encoders may already share a common semantic structure. Moreover, even object-centric topological maps still ground language goals through explicit cross-modal supervision such as CLIP or large vision-language models, leaving open whether such grounding is possible from a purely vision-built map. To address these challenges, we extend the Platonic Representation Hypothesis to embodied navigation and recast vision-only ObjNav, cross-modal ObjNav, and VLN as three different interfaces to the same object-centric semantic manifold. We further introduce PlatonicNav, a training-free framework whose Platonic Topological Map fuses geometric and semantic node distances from a self-supervised visual encoder, and grounds language goals via blind matching without any paired vision-language data. Extensive experiments on simulation benchmarks including HM3D-IIN, OVON, and R2R-CE on MP3D, together with deployment on Unitree Go2, demonstrate that PlatonicNav generalizes across tasks, modalities, and embodiments without explicit cross-modal training. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/PlatonicNav. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/PlatonicNav.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PlatonicNav，无需配对的视觉-语言数据即可实现多任务泛化的导航系统。该方法通过自监督视觉编码器构建物体中心的语义拓扑地图，实现了纯视觉、跨模态和视觉-语言导航三种接口的统一。实验证明其在多任务、多模态和多平台下均具有良好泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言导航(VLN)和基于目标的导航(ObjNav)主要依赖于建筑融合、混合任务训练或大规模视觉-语言预训练，忽视了视觉和语言编码器间是否本已共享语义空间。此外，目前导航多通过显式的跨模态监督进行语言定位，尚未探索仅凭视觉构建地图即可实现的可能性。
AI.method: 作者把Platonic Representation Hypothesis延伸到具身导航领域，将视觉ObjNav、跨模态ObjNav和VLN看作是对同一语义流形的三种接口。提出PlatonicNav：完全无需配对的视觉-语言训练，通过自监督视觉编码器生成物体中心的拓扑地图，结合几何和语义距离，并通过“盲目匹配”完成语言目标定位。
AI.result: 在HM3D-IIN, OVON, R2R-CE (MP3D)等仿真基准和实际机器人(Unitree Go2)部署上，PlatonicNav展现出无需显式跨模态训练即可在多任务、多模态、多物理平台间泛化的能力。
AI.conclusion: PlatonicNav证明了通过纯视觉自监督学习可获得具备泛化能力的语义-拓扑地图，从而无需依赖配对的视觉-语言数据便可实现多种复杂导航任务，降低了多模态导航系统的开发门槛。

title: Towards Multidisciplinary Summarization of Hospital Stays: Efficient Sentence-Level Clinical Provenance Categorization
comment: 5 pages. Submitted preprint version of a paper accepted to AIME 2026. This version may differ from the camera-ready manuscript and the final Version of Record. The Version of Record will be available from Springer Nature once published
summary: Effective "all-team" summarization in high-complexity settings like the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) requires aggregating insights from diverse disciplines (physicians, nurses, therapists) spread across hundreds of clinical free-text notes. Simply pooling heterogeneous text often leads to incoherent outputs. Structured summarization therefore first requires accurate categorization of sentence-level provenance across multi-source notes. This pilot study introduces a clinical provenance categorization pipeline using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of large language models (LLMs). We adapted two Llama-3 models (8B and 70B) to MedSecId, a corpus of 2,002 MIMIC-III (Adult ICU) notes annotated with clinical provenance headers, achieving in-domain Macro F1 scores above 92% for both models. To evaluate cross-domain generalization, we assessed model capacity (8B vs. 70B) and quantization on a gold-standard dataset of 227 sentence-level spans derived from three multi-disciplinary NICU summaries. Experimental results demonstrate a scale-dependent transfer effect: while SFT produced only marginal changes for the 8B model, it substantially improved the 70B model, increasing Macro F1 by 7%. Notably, the quantized fine-tuned 70B model outperformed its full-precision baseline while substantially reducing computational requirements. These findings suggest that sufficient model capacity is critical for preserving semantic flexibility during cross-domain clinical transfer and that efficient quantized adaptation can enable structured provenance modeling for downstream summarization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套基于大型语言模型（LLM）的临床文本来源分类管道，用于高复杂性环境下的多学科团队总结任务（如新生儿重症监护室NICU），显著提升了结构化摘要的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 在像NICU这样高度复杂的医疗环境中，需要整合来自多个专业的自由文本笔记来实现有效的‘全团队’临床总结。但直接拼接异构文本往往导致输出混乱，要求首先对单句级别的文本来源进行高准确的分类。
AI.method: 该研究采用有监督微调（SFT）的方法，将两个Llama-3模型（8B和70B）适配于带有临床来源注释的MIMIC-III语料库（MedSecId），并评估其在同域及跨域（NICU）数据集上的效果。此外，研究还考察了模型容量及量化对性能的影响。
AI.result: 两种Llama-3模型在MIMIC-III的同域测试中Macro F1均超过92%；跨NICU领域时，8B模型SFT提升有限，但70B模型通过SFT宏F1提升7%；量化后的70B模型在减少计算资源消耗的同时，性能优于基线全精度模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，充足的模型容量对于保持跨领域语义灵活性至关重要，且高效的量化微调有望推动结构化文本来源建模在下游团队摘要中的广泛应用。

title: STaR-KV: Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting for KV Cache Compression in GUI Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language-model-based graphical user interface (GUI) agents have shown broad automation capabilities, yet deployment is bottlenecked by a key-value (KV) cache that grows linearly with interaction steps. For instance, UI-TARS-1.5-7B consumes 76 GB of GPU memory on merely five screenshots, approaching the capacity of mainstream 80 GB accelerators. Existing KV compression methods share two structural assumptions: aggregating visual-token importance into a single shared saliency map, and applying a fixed top-B cutoff to the fused score distribution. Pilot measurements refute both: spatial specialization lives at the attention-subspace level and migrates across layers, while the score distribution drifts in shape along a trajectory. We propose STaR-KV (Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting), a training-free KV cache compression framework that calibrates token importance along three axes: (i) subspace-aware scoring driven by online spatial mutual information; (ii) a temporal stability discount that suppresses redundant cache entries from persistently attended subspaces; and (iii) an entropy-derived temperature that adaptively reshapes the score distribution. Across four GUI benchmarks, STaR-KV achieves the strongest average accuracy among state-of-the-art KV compression methods (e.g., GUIKV, SnapKV) at matched budgets, with no compression-stage FLOPs overhead (-0.07%) and cutting peak GPU memory by nearly 40% at a 20% KV-cache budget. Code is available at https://github.com/kawhiiiileo/STaR-KV.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新颖的KV缓存压缩框架STaR-KV，显著降低了视觉语言模型自动化GUI代理的GPU内存消耗，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在GUI自动化中的应用受限于KV缓存随交互步数线性增长而产生的巨大内存瓶颈，已有的缓存压缩方法结构性假设有限，无法适应注意力子空间的动态性。
AI.method: 提出STaR-KV框架，通过三维自适应调整token重要性：(1) 基于空间互信息的子空间敏感评分；(2) 根据时间稳定性减少冗余缓存；(3) 基于熵自动调整评分分布形状。该方法完全免训练，无新增计算开销。
AI.result: 在四项GUI基准上，STaR-KV在相同预算下平均准确率优于当前最优方法（如GUIKV、SnapKV），没有显著增加运算资源，同时在20%缓存预算下削减了近40%的峰值GPU内存。
AI.conclusion: STaR-KV在不影响计算效率的情况下，实现了高效KV压缩，为大规模部署视觉-语言GUI代理提供了实践路径。

title: Not What, But How: A Communicative Audit of LLM Response Framing
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are being increasingly used to answer subjective, information-seeking questions, where users are sensitive to how responses are communicated, not just whether the answers are correct. Existing LLM evaluations for subjective cultural queries largely focus on factual correctness, ignoring how the response is framed. To this end, we introduce FRANZ, an automated FRAmework for respoNse characteriZation to conduct communicative audit of LLM responses along four dimensions: cultural positioning, use of generalizing language, anthropomorphic cues, and adherence to conversational maxims. To enable this evaluation, we contribute SQUARE - a corpus of 376k subjective questions sourced from 57 subreddits, and mapped to 7 countries and 19 question categories. We demonstrate FRANZ's applicability by scoring responses from three open-weight LLMs. We observe that LLMs show statistically significant differences in the frequency with which they employ each response characteristic. Unlike single-dimensional audits, FRANZ reveals that insider positioning and anthropomorphism are positively coupled, with the degree of coupling varying by country, providing a diagnostic lens for identifying framing divergences.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的自动化框架FRANZ，用于从多维度对大型语言模型（LLMs）回答主观性文化问题的沟通方式进行评估，并贡献了一个大型主观性问题语料库SQUARE。通过实验证明了不同LLMs在回答风格上的显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型主观性文化问题的评估只注重事实正确性，忽略了回答的表达方式和沟通风格，而用户对沟通方式敏感，因此需要多维度审查机制。
AI.method: 设计了FRANZ框架，围绕“四大维度”（文化定位、泛化语言使用、人类化表现、会话准则遵守）评估LLMs的主观性回答，并建立了覆盖多个国家、类别的SQUARE主观问题大语料库。
AI.result: 实验证明，不同LLMs在各评估维度的表达频率存在统计显著差异。多维度审计揭示了内部视角定位和拟人化表现的正相关性，并且各国间该项表现有差异。
AI.conclusion: FRANZ框架为检测LLMs主观问答在表达方式上的分歧提供了有效工具，弥补了仅以事实正确性评价的不足，对模型公平和文化适应性研究具有重要意义。

title: Personalized 3D Myocardial Infarct Geometry Reconstruction from Cine MRI for Cardiac Digital Twins
summary: Accurate 3D geometric characterization of myocardial infarction (MI) is essential for building cardiac digital twins (CDTs) to precisely simulate infarct-related electrophysiology. Late gadolinium enhancement magnetic resonance imaging (LGE MRI) is the clinical reference for locating MI, yet its reliance on contrast agents restricts use in renally impaired patients and limits longitudinal follow-ups. As an alternative, contrast-free cine MRI visualizes abnormal ventricular wall motion, which is highly indicative of the infarcted area. In this study, we propose a novel explicit geometry-motion embedded model to fully automatically reconstruct personalized, simulation-ready 3D MI geometries directly from multi-view cine MRIs. Specifically, we construct a 4D (3D + t) biventricular mesh to explicitly extract and decouple geometry-aware and motion-aware features. We further design a dual-branch module for adaptive geometry-motion fusion to capture spatiotemporal dependencies for mapping infarcted region. Furthermore, we introduce multi-scale supervision utilizing an AHA-17 segment-guided cross-attention mechanism to steer the prediction, ensuring biophysically consistent reconstruction. Experimental results on 225 cine MRIs demonstrated that the proposed 3D MI reconstruction achieved high performance with an average Dice score of 0.678 $\pm$ 0.011. In the downstream in-silico electrophysiological simulation evaluations, the results were highly consistent with the LGE-derived ground truth, highlighting the great potential of the proposed model for contrast-free scar characterization and seamless integration into CDT modeling. The code will be released publicly upon acceptance of the manuscript for publication.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种全自动的3D心肌梗死（MI）几何结构重建模型，可直接从多视角cine MRI中无对比剂地重建MI区域，为心脏数字孪生提供支持。实验结果表现优异，展示了替代LGE MRI的潜力。
AI.motivation: LGE MRI作为MI定位的临床金标准，依赖于对比剂，限制了肾功能受损患者和长期随访应用。需要无需对比剂的成像方式，对MI区域进行精准重建，为构建数字孪生心脏奠定基础。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种显式几何-运动特征嵌入模型，从多视角cine MRI自动重建个性化、可仿真的3D心肌梗死结构。方法包括：1）构建四维双心室网格，提取并解耦几何和运动特征；2）设计双分支结构自适应融合几何-运动信息，捕捉时空依赖映射坏死区；3）引入AHA-17分割引导的交叉注意力多尺度监督，保证生理一致的重建。
AI.result: 该方法在225例cine MRI测试下，MI区Dice系数达0.678±0.011，在下游心脏电生理仿真中，与LGE MRI地面实况高度一致，验证模型重建精度和模拟能力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型实现了无需对比剂的高精度3D MI结构自动重建，可无缝对接数字孪生心脏建模，有助于临床无创随访与精准医学。代码将在论文接收后开源。

title: CRAM: Centroid-Routing and Adaptive MoE for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) unify heterogeneous vision-language tasks under a shared generative framework via instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment demands continuous capability expansion, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. Existing methods either update all tasks with a shared parameter set or allocate dedicated modules for each new task. Shared updates force heterogeneous tasks to compete, causing forgetting of learned capabilities. Conversely, isolated expansion prevents interference but severely limits parameter efficiency over long task streams. To address this dilemma, we propose CRAM. Specifically, by isolating task-specific patterns into independent modules, CRAM mitigates catastrophic forgetting across tasks. To further boost parameter efficiency, we utilize adaptive-rank instantiation to identify the capability gap between existing expert capability and new task demands, and dynamically allocate only the necessary parameters. To ensure stable reuse among tasks, centroid-guided routing recognizes and activates existing experts' capabilities, while an orthogonality penalty confines new updates to task-specific directions, preventing re-learning general capability. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks consistently demonstrate its superiority over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CRAM方法，用于提升多模态持续指令调优（MCIT）效率，有效缓解遗忘和参数膨胀问题，实验显示CRAM优于现有方案。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLMs）需要在不断扩展能力时保持效率和抗遗忘，目前的方法要么共享参数导致遗忘，要么单独扩展缺乏高效性，实际部署中需要解决这些矛盾。
AI.method: CRAM将任务特有模式隔离在独立模块中，避免灾难性遗忘。通过自适应秩实例化，仅动态分配新任务所需的必要参数提升参数效率。同时，利用中心引导路由激活已有专家模块，正交性惩罚保证新任务更新仅影响任务相关方向，防止重复学习已有能力。
AI.result: 在不同基准测试上的大量实验结果表明，CRAM在抗遗忘和参数高效性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CRAM 能有效解决多模态任务中参数效率与遗忘的矛盾，为 MLLMs 持续能力扩展提供了更优方案。

title: Unsupervised Collaborative Domain Adaptation for Driving Scene Parsing
summary: Reliable driving scene parsing is a fundamental capability for autonomous vehicles operating in open and dynamic driving environments. However, adapting perception models to new deployment domains remains challenging because pixel-level annotations are expensive to obtain, while source-domain data are often inaccessible due to privacy, security, or ownership constraints. Existing source-free unsupervised domain adaptation methods typically rely on a single pre-trained source model, which makes the adapted perception system vulnerable to source-specific biases and limits its robustness under diverse road layouts, illumination conditions, weather patterns, and traffic conditions. This article presents an unsupervised collaborative domain adaptation (UCDA) framework for driving scene parsing in a source-free setting, which transfers complementary knowledge from multiple pre-trained source models to a unified target model without accessing any original source samples. To compare predictions from independently trained models, UCDA constructs a class-level prototype memory bank and estimates cross-model prediction reliability through prototype similarity, reducing the effect of inconsistent confidence scales across source models. Based on the resulting complementary supervision, UCDA adopts a two-stage transfer strategy: multiple source models are first refined on unlabeled target-domain driving data through collaborative optimization with positive and negative consistency constraints, and their validated expertise is then distilled into a single deployable target model. Comprehensive evaluations on public driving-scene datasets and real-world data collected from an autonomous vehicle platform demonstrate that UCDA effectively consolidates complementary multi-source knowledge, improving target-domain scene parsing reliability and generalization across diverse driving environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督协作域适应（UCDA）框架，用于在无人访问源数据的情况下，集成多个预训练源模型的知识以提升自动驾驶场景解析的泛化能力和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要在多变路况下进行准确的场景解析，但不同域之间数据分布差异大，且新的目标域难以获取带注释数据，同时受隐私和数据所有权等因素限制，常无法访问源域原始样本。
AI.method: UCDA框架利用多个预训练源模型，将其知识迁移到目标域，无须访问任何源数据。通过建立类别级原型记忆库，计算跨模型预测的原型相似度来衡量模型预测可靠性，从而实现多模型协作优化。整个方法分为两阶段：首先，多个模型在目标域上通过一致性约束协作优化；其次，将验证过的各模型专长知识蒸馏到一个可部署的目标模型中。
AI.result: 在多个公开自动驾驶场景数据集和实际自动驾驶平台采集的数据上进行评测，UCDA较以往方法能更好地融合多源知识，在目标域上提升场景解析的可靠性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: UCDA有效协调、整合了多源模型的互补知识，在无需源数据的条件下，显著提升了自动驾驶场景解析在不同环境下的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: When Rating Scales Fall Short: LLM-Assisted Discovery of ADHD Signals in Turkish Teacher Narratives
comment: 15 pages. Accepted to CLPsych 2026. Camera-ready author version. The final version will appear in the ACL Anthology
summary: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is one of the most common neurodevelopmental disorders in childhood, and its diagnosis relies on assessments combining clinician judgment with standardized rating scales and reports from parents and teachers. While structured instruments such as the Conners' Teacher Rating Scale-Revised Short Form (CTRS-R:S) quantify ADHD-related behaviors, teachers also provide open-ended narratives that may contain complementary signals not captured by structured assessments. However, it remains unclear to what extent teacher narratives encode signals overlooked by rating scales. In this study, we analyze de-identified Turkish teacher evaluation forms collected during clinical ADHD assessments, including both CTRS-R:S scores and open-ended teacher narratives. We compare predictive signals from structured scores and narrative text and identify cases where structured assessments fail to clearly distinguish ADHD from non-ADHD students while narrative-based models capture distinct behavioral patterns. Notably, these cases show minimal overlap with those missed by the narrative model, suggesting that structured and narrative information encode complementary signals. To interpret these differences, we apply a large language model (LLM)-assisted theme discovery pipeline that reveals distinct attention, behavioral, and family-related patterns, highlighting the potential of natural language processing (NLP) to uncover clinically relevant signals from teacher narratives and to complement traditional ADHD screening tools.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了土耳其教师在ADHD临床评估时填写的结构化量表（CTRS-R:S）和开放式叙述，通过自然语言处理技术比较两者对ADHD预测的作用，发现两种方式所捕捉的信号互补，揭示教师叙述中有传统量表遗漏的重要信息。
AI.motivation: ADHD诊断通常结合结构化量表和教师、家长的主观报告，然而开放式教师叙述中潜藏的信息是否能补充量表的不足尚不明确，因此探究两者信号的差异与互补性具临床意义。
AI.method: 收集并分析在ADHD临床评估中获得的土耳其教师评价表，包括CTRS-R:S分数和开放式叙述。利用自然语言处理和大语言模型（LLM）对叙述文本主题进行提取，比较结构化分数与文本模型在ADHD区分能力上的异同。
AI.result: 发现结构化量表和开放式叙述所捕捉到的ADHD行为信号互补：有些结构化量表难以区分ADHD与非ADHD的案例，被叙述文本模型准确识别，且两者错漏的样本重叠很小；主题分析还揭示了叙述中关注注意力、行为及家庭因素的新线索。
AI.conclusion: 教师的自由叙述能补充结构化评估未能捕捉的ADHD行为表现，自然语言处理技术有助于挖掘临床有意义的信息，提升ADHD筛查和诊断的准确性。

title: Hist2Style: Histogram-Guided Stylization with Bilateral Grids
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. Extended results are at https://www.dekelgalor.com/hist2style
summary: Photorealistic style transfer aims to match the color and tone of an input image to that of a style target while preserving the content and details of the original scene. Although existing large image models can facilitate these kinds of appearance edits, their high computational demands, potential for hallucinations, and limited user control make them unsuitable for high-resolution, real-time workflows. We introduce Hist2Style, a bilateral-grid formulation for fast, edge-aware stylization that preserves visual fidelity by constraining operations to locally affine transforms in bilateral space. Our model distills a large image editing model into a lightweight network by training on a large supervised corpus generated with language and vision-language models, targeting spatially varying color edits. The network conditions on a histogram-based embedding of the style target to provide an interpretable interface for adjusting the output style by modifying the target color distribution. Overall, Hist2Style maintains content structure by construction, avoids hallucinations, and supports real-time, high-resolution photorealistic stylization with interactive user-controllable color and tone adjustments.

AI.tldr: Hist2Style是一种快速、保真、用户可控的照片级风格迁移方法，适用于高分辨率和实时编辑。
AI.motivation: 当前的大型图像模型虽可实现风格迁移，但运算量大、容易幻觉、控制性差，不适合高分辨率和实时场景，亟需高效且稳定的方案。
AI.method: 提出Hist2Style，将双边网格（bilateral-grid）与本地仿射变换结合，实现边缘感知的快速风格迁移。同时通过大模型生成带语言注释的大型监督语料进行蒸馏训练，最终得到轻量网络，并采用基于直方图的风格条件嵌入，实现可解释的用户交互。
AI.result: Hist2Style保持内容结构，避免幻觉，并在高分辨率、实时需求下实现了保真、可交互的风格迁移，允许用户实时调整风格输出的颜色分布。
AI.conclusion: Hist2Style为照片级风格迁移提供了高效、保真、可用户控制的新方法，适合实际高分辨率及实时编辑应用。

title: FigSIM: A Dataset for Fine-grained Suicide Severity and Figurative Language in Suicide Memes
comment: Content warning: contains suicide-related content. Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Suicide memes are memes used to express suicide-related thoughts or comment on suicide-related issues. Suicide memes are increasingly common on social media, yet remain poorly understood and potentially harmful. There is an urgent need to better understand their characteristics and to develop appropriate content moderation strategies that limits users' exposure to potentially harmful content. Currently, the absence of annotated datasets of suicide memes remains a key barrier to developing and evaluating automated moderation approaches. In this paper, we introduce FigSIM, the first dataset designed for fine-grained analysis of suicide memes. The dataset consists of 1049 memes, each annotated for (1) fine-grained suicide severity levels, (2) figurative phenomena (e.g., metaphors), and (3) suicide-related content (e.g., suicide method depiction). We benchmark 16 unimodal and multimodal models across three tasks: figurative language, suicide severity, and suicide-related content detection. Overall, FigSIM demonstrates that suicide memes pose unique challenges for both modeling and content moderation. Analysis revealed biases, such as underprediction of higher suicide severity levels, especially for figurative memes. The dataset (including splits used for analyses) is publicly available. Content Warning: This paper contains suicide-related content that may be triggering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FigSIM，这是首个专用于自杀梗图细粒度分析的数据集，并对多种模型在相关任务中的表现进行了基准测试。
AI.motivation: 自杀梗图在社交媒体上日益增多，可能带来伤害，但相关内容的自动识别与审核受限于缺乏高质量、带注释的数据集。急需通过数据集构建促进合理内容审核机制发展。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含1049条自杀梗图的FigSIM数据集，并为每条梗图标注了自杀严重程度、修辞手法与自杀相关内容。随后，针对修辞识别、自杀严重性分级及内容检测三项任务，对16种单模态和多模态模型进行了基准测试分析。
AI.result: 实验发现多模态模型在自杀梗图自动审核上面临独特挑战：如对较高自杀严重级别预测不足，尤其在修辞性较强的梗图上更为明显。同时也揭示了模型预测中的偏差。
AI.conclusion: FigSIM为研究和理解自杀梗图及自动审核提供了重要数据基础，同时数据集和分析结果证明现有模型在该领域仍有显著提升空间。该数据集现已公开，为后续改进相关自动化内容审核方法奠定基础。

title: Hierarchically Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts for Robust Traffic Sign Recognition in Complex Driving Scenarios
summary: Traffic sign detection is a fundamental component of environmental perception in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems. However, most existing detectors rely on static inference with globally shared parameters, limiting their ability to adapt to diverse and unstructured traffic scenarios. As a result, a single static model often struggles to simultaneously handle both clear near-range samples and challenging conditions such as distant small targets or adverse weather environments. To address this limitation, we propose CBDES MoE TSR, a hierarchically decoupled heterogeneous mixture-of-experts(MoE) framework for traffic sign recognition. The proposed framework departs from the conventional globally shared parameter paradigm by introducing a heterogeneous You Only Look Once (YOLO) expert pool together with a lightweight gating network, enabling an image-level dynamic routing mechanism. Based on the semantic characteristics of the input image, the gating module selectively activates the most suitable expert model from the expert pool, enabling a shift from fixed parameter fitting to on-demand dynamic representation. This design enhances feature extraction capability for specific scenarios while maintaining controlled inference overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a remarkable balance between detection accuracy and efficiency on the composite traffic sign dataset. Specifically, our method attains an mAP50-95 of 76.8%, yielding a 2.3% improvement over the baseline method (74.5%) while simultaneously reducing computational overhead by approximately 39.4%. These findings robustly validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于异构专家混合（MoE）结构的交通标志检测新方法，通过动态选择合适的YOLO专家以适应不同场景，有效提升了检测准确率并降低了计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有的交通标志检测方法参数固定且全局共享，难以适应远距离、小目标或恶劣天气等复杂环境。因此，作者希望设计能够根据不同图像自适应调整的检测方法，提升对多样化交通场景的适应能力。
AI.method: 本文提出CBDES MoE TSR框架，采用分层异构MoE架构构建多个YOLO专家，并用轻量化门控网络根据图像语义特征动态选择最适合的专家模型进行推理，实现按需动态特征提取，从而取代传统的静态参数方案。
AI.result: 在复合交通标志数据集上的实验表明，该方法mAP50-95提升到76.8%，比基线提升2.3%，同时计算开销降低约39.4%。
AI.conclusion: CBDES MoE TSR为交通标志检测领域提供了更高效且自适应的解决方案，在确保高检测精度的同时显著减少了计算资源消耗，验证了方法的有效性。

title: SkillHarm: Lifecycle-Aware Skill-Based Attacks via Automated Construction
summary: Agent skills occupy a privileged position in the agent workflow, as agents are expected to implicitly follow and execute them, rendering third-party skills a vulnerable attack surface. Existing studies have revealed unsafe agent behaviors induced by skill-based attacks, but they primarily evaluate poisoned skills within a single task execution and enumerate harms through ad-hoc risk lists. To bridge these gaps, we introduce SkillHarm, a benchmark of skill-based attacks across the skill-use lifecycle, paired with a systematic taxonomy of skill-relevant risks. SkillHarm evaluates two attack scenarios: Fixed-Payload Poisoning (FPP), where a fixed poisoned skill package directly compromises any task session that invokes it, and Self-Mutating Poisoning (SMP), where an initially benign execution silently mutates persistent skill content, deferring harm until a subsequent reuse. It further defines 12 risk types based on the agent workflow component targeted by the harm: data pipelines, system environments, and agent autonomy. To instantiate these attacks at scale, we build AutoSkillHarm, an automated construction pipeline with coding agents driven by natural-language harnesses. The resulting benchmark contains 879 attack samples across 71 skills. Experiments show that current agents remain vulnerable with attack success rates up to 86.3% in FPP and 69.3% in SMP. Our analysis further reveals a latent risk: many apparent attack failures stem from the agent failing to engage with the poisoned file rather than genuine resistance, and current defenses still fail to reliably mitigate the threat.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SkillHarm基准，系统性分析并评估了代理(agent)技能生命周期中基于技能的攻击方式及其风险。结果显示，现有智能体在多种技能攻击场景下暴露出较高的安全隐患。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体系统广泛集成第三方技能，这些技能成为了潜在的攻击面。目前相关研究仅零散测试部分技能攻击，缺乏全流程的、系统性的风险评估。因此需要建立全面的基准和结构化风险分类方法。
AI.method: 作者提出SkillHarm基准，覆盖技能生命周期多个环节，设定了两种攻击场景：定值载荷投毒（FPP）和自变异投毒（SMP）。并依据智能体工作流将风险细分为12类。通过AutoSkillHarm自动化工具大规模生成攻击样本，用自然语言驱动agent自动执行攻击流程。最终构建了覆盖71项技能、879个攻击样本的数据集，并对主流agent进行测试。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前主流智能体对FPP攻击成功率高达86.3%，对SMP攻击成功率为69.3%。很多表面防御成功仅因智能体未正确调用投毒文件，而非真正具备抗攻击能力。
AI.conclusion: 现有智能体在技能层面仍存在大量安全隐患，当前防御措施无法有效缓解相关威胁，并呼吁未来需构建更强健的防御机制和更精细的风险评估标准。

title: ROGLE: Robust Global-Local Alignment with Automated Region Supervision for Text-Based Person Search
summary: Text-Based Person Search (TBPS) aims to retrieve pedestrian images using natural language queries. However, existing TBPS models, especially those based on CLIP, struggle with fine-grained understanding due to global representational bias and semantic sparsity inherited from training on short captions. This results in weak fine-grained alignment, exacerbated by the scarcity of region-level annotations. To address this, we propose ROGLE (Robust Global-Local Embedding), a unified framework that overcomes reliance on costly manual annotations through an automated Region-to-Sentence Matching (RSM) strategy. RSM automatically mines pseudo region-sentence pairs for scalable fine-grained supervision. Furthermore, ROGLE employs a multi-granular learning strategy that fuses global contrastive learning with region-level local alignment. We also introduce the P-VLG Benchmark, a large-scale dataset constructed by curating and enriching images from established public benchmarks. It features over 100,000 annotated regions and rich long-form captions, making it the first TBPS benchmark to support both global and local assessment protocols. Extensive experiments show that ROGLE significantly outperforms existing approaches, particularly on challenging long-form queries. Code and the P-VLG benchmark will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的方法ROGLE及新数据集P-VLG，大幅提升了文本-行人检索任务中的细粒度对齐和检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-行人检索（TBPS）模型，尤其是基于CLIP的模型，存在全局语义偏置和细粒度对齐能力弱的问题，主要原因包括训练数据语义稀疏、仅有短文本描述，以及缺乏高质量的区域级注释。为此，作者希望设计一种方法减少依赖人工注释，实现更强的细粒度语义对齐。
AI.method: 提出ROGLE（Robust Global-Local Embedding）框架，核心是自动化的区域-句子匹配（RSM）策略，通过自动挖掘伪区域-句子对，为模型提供可扩展的细粒度监督。此外，方法中融合了全局对比学习与局部区域级别的语义对齐。作者还构建了大规模P-VLG数据集，包含超过10万区域标注和丰富长文本描述，支持全球与局部评测。
AI.result: 多项实验表明，ROGLE在多种评测指标上均显著优于主流方法，尤其在应对长文本描述等难题时优势明显。
AI.conclusion: ROGLE通过自动化细粒度配对和多粒度训练策略，有效提升了文本-行人检索的精度和泛化性。P-VLG数据集促进了领域发展。相关代码与数据集将公开，有望加速研究社区进步。

title: SimSD: Simple Speculative Decoding in Diffusion Language Models
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, code available at https://github.com/airevo2/SimSD-release
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive (AR) LLMs, offering faster inference through parallel or blockwise decoding. However, their masked language modeling formulation remains incompatible with standard token-level speculative decoding, one of the most effective acceleration techniques for AR models. In AR decoding, the causal mask preserves temporally valid token-level contexts, enabling a target model to verify multiple drafted tokens in a single forward pass. In contrast, dLLMs rely on mask tokens and bidirectional attention, causing the effective context to change across denoising steps and preventing direct token-level speculative verification. To bridge this gap, we propose a simple but effective speculative decoding algorithm for diffusion language models, named SimSD, which mainly adopts a plug-and-play masking strategy that equips dLLMs with temporally valid token-level contexts for speculative decoding. Our method explicitly introduces reference tokens from draft-model predictions and designs an attention mask that regulates their interaction with current-step tokens, allowing dLLMs to compute valid logits for drafted tokens in a single forward pass. This restores the key verification ability provided by causal masking in AR models while preserving the parallel decoding advantages of dLLMs. The proposed method is training-free and can be flexibly integrated with other acceleration techniques such as KV cache and blockwise decoding. Experiments on SDAR-family dLLMs across four benchmarks show that our method achieves up to 7.46x higher decoding throughput while maintaining and even improving average generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的加速扩散型大语言模型(dLLMs)推理的技术SimSD，实现了高达7.46倍的解码吞吐提升，并可与现有加速技术灵活结合。
AI.motivation: 扩散型大语言模型(dLLMs)虽可并行解码，推理更快，但现有的掩码语言建模方式与主流自回归(AR)模型中的token级推测解码技术不兼容，限制了进一步加速。
AI.method: 提出SimSD：一种即插即用的掩码策略，将dLLMs的token级上下文调整为“临时有效”，支持推测解码。具体做法包括引入参考token（由草稿模型预测获得），并设计特殊注意力掩码，控制参考token与当前token的交互，使dLLMs能在一次前向传播中验证多个token。该方法无需重新训练，可结合如KV缓存、分块解码等其他加速方法。
AI.result: 在SDAR系列dLLMs、四项基准测试中，SimSD实现了高达7.46倍的推理吞吐提升，同时生成质量保持甚至略有提升。
AI.conclusion: SimSD有效弥合了dLLMs与AR LLMs在token级推测解码上的差距，在广泛兼容现有加速技术的同时，实现了快速推理和高质量生成，为推广dLLMs应用提供了新的思路。

title: Physics-Guided Attention in a Lightweight TCN for Efficient WiFi CSI-Based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Human Action Recognition (HAR) using WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) has gained increasing attention due to its non-contact, low-cost, and privacy-preserving nature. However, existing learning-based approaches largely rely on deep, computationally intensive architectures to implicitly capture motion dynamics from CSI measurements, thereby increasing model complexity and reducing efficiency. Instead, we argue that incorporating appropriate inductive biases tailored to the physical characteristics of CSI signals enables more efficient and effective learning. In this work, we propose a compact temporal convolutional network (TCN)-based framework that explicitly incorporates motion-aware inductive biases into feature learning. Specifically, we introduce a Doppler-energy-guided temporal attention mechanism in feature space to emphasize motion-salient time segments, and a variance-driven channel attention module to weight informative subcarriers based on temporal motion statistics adaptively. By integrating these domain-specific priors, the proposed model effectively captures motion dynamics without increasing architectural depth. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance compared to deeper baselines, while significantly reducing parameter count and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新型的WiFi CSI人体动作识别模型，通过引入物理先验，有效提升了模型的效率和表现。
AI.motivation: 当前WiFi CSI的人体动作识别方法大多依赖复杂的深度网络，导致模型复杂度和计算量大，效率低；作者希望通过引入适合CSI信号物理特性的归纳偏置，提升学习效率和效果。
AI.method: 提出基于TCN的紧凑模型，在特征空间显式嵌入运动感知归纳偏置。主要包括两点：一是Doppler能量引导的时序注意机制，用以突出动作显著的时间片段；二是基于方差信息的信道注意机制，自适应选择有用的子载波。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行大量实验，结果显示，新模型在减少参数量和计算量的前提下，性能明显优于更深的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入与领域知识相关的先验，显著提升了WiFi CSI动作识别方法的效率和效果，降低了复杂度；对后续高效模型设计具有借鉴意义。

title: Transferable Self-Harm Surveillance from Emergency Department Triage Notes Using an Evidence-Augmented Machine Learning Approach
summary: Self-harm is a major public health concern, but current surveillance relying on hospital presentations is inadequate due to the low sensitivity of diagnostic codes. Emergency Department (ED) triage notes, recorded at the initial point of contact, provide a succinct summary of presentations and an opportunity to identify self-harm. We developed a three-stage approach, augmenting traditional machine learning with large language model-based screening and evidence extraction to detect self-harm in ED triage notes. We assessed model transferability across three Australian hospitals. Our approach showed AUPRCs of 0.887 +/- 0.016 and 0.884 +/- 0.012 during internal and external validation. Prospectively, it achieved AUPRC of 0.881 +/- 0.008 at the development site, and 0.879 +/- 0.012 and 0.816 +/- 0.015 at two external sites without site-specific retraining. A key advantage of the approach is that it enables identification of the primary self-harm method with an accuracy of 95%, supporting more granular surveillance beyond binary classification.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合传统机器学习和大语言模型的新方法，从急诊分诊记录中检测自伤行为，并在澳大利亚三家医院验证了其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自伤监测主要依赖医院诊断编码，灵敏度低，难以准确识别所有自伤案例，因此需要更敏感有效的检测方法。急诊分诊记录为初步识别自伤行为提供了新的数据来源。
AI.method: 该方法分三阶段：首先使用传统机器学习筛查分诊记录，再用大语言模型进一步筛查和证据提取，以判定是否存在自伤行为。方法的可迁移性在三家不同医院进行了内部与外部验证。
AI.result: 在内部和外部验证中，AUPRC分别达到0.887 ±0.016和0.884 ±0.012。前瞻性测试中，开发医院AUPRC为0.881 ±0.008，两个外部医院分别为0.879 ±0.012和0.816 ±0.015，均无需针对医院进行再训练。该方法还能以95%的准确率识别自伤的具体方式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多院之间能稳定高效地识别自伤行为，并支持更细致的自伤行为监测，为公共健康领域自伤事件的早期识别和干预提供了新的技术工具。

title: Suppressing Forgery-Specific Shortcuts for Generalizable Deepfake Detection
summary: Deepfake detection suffers from poor generalization across forgery methods, as existing models tend to rely on spurious method-specific shortcuts that fail to transfer to unseen manipulations. While recent approaches attempt to improve generalization, they lack an explicit mechanism to identify and suppress such shortcuts in learned representations. In this work, we propose Shortcut Subspace Suppression (S^3) framework that explicitly characterizes and suppresses method-specific shortcuts via subspace modeling. Our key insight is that variations distinguishing different forgery methods capture method-specific artifacts and thus serve as an effective proxy for method-specific shortcuts. To this end, we train a lightweight linear probe for forgery method classification and perform Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to extract the dominant shortcut subspace. Building on this formulation, we develop two complementary strategies to reduce shortcut reliance. During training, we softly suppress the shortcut subspace in feature representations, encouraging the model to rely on more generalizable cues for real/fake discrimination. At inference time, we introduce a training-free counterpart that attenuates neurons aligned with the identified shortcut directions, enabling plug-and-play generalization enhancement with improved interpretability. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly improves cross-method generalization while maintaining strong in-domain performance. The code will be released upon acceptance of the submission.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Shortcut Subspace Suppression (S^3)的方法，用于显式识别和抑制深度伪造检测中的方法特定“捷径”特征，从而提升模型在未见伪造手法上的泛化能力。该方法通过子空间建模和特征抑制，有效提升跨方法泛化性并保持原有领域性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型过度依赖于特定伪造方法的特征（即“捷径”），导致遇到新型伪造技术时泛化能力差。现有提升泛化的方法缺乏显式识别和抑制这些捷径的机制，因此需要新的应对方法。
AI.method: 作者提出S^3框架，核心思路是：用线性探针对伪造方法进行分类，用奇异值分解（SVD）提取主导的“捷径”子空间；训练过程中，对该子空间进行软性抑制，使模型关注更广泛的、可泛化的特征；推理时，提供免训练的对齐神经元抑制方法，即插拔式提升泛化和可解释性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集基准实验中，该方法显著提升了深度伪造检测模型在新型伪造方法上的泛化能力，同时保持了原生域内的检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: S^3框架通过建模和抑制伪造方法特定的特征子空间，有效缓解了深度伪造检测中的过拟合问题，为模型泛化能力的提升提供了简单、高效的新思路。

title: SN-WER: Script-Normalized WER for Multi-Script Indic ASR Evaluation
summary: Word Error Rate (WER) is the dominant metric for automatic speech recognition (ASR), but it can overestimate errors when references and hypotheses encode the same words in different scripts. This issue is common in multilingual settings where ASR models may emit romanized text. We propose Script-Normalized WER (SN-WER), a training-free, evaluation-only scoring method that transliterates both reference and hypothesis text into a language-specific canonical script before computing WER. We evaluate SN-WER on 5 Indic languages, 2 datasets, and 3 ASR models. On curated FLEURS data, SN-WER reduces inflated model gaps by up to 12%, while on noisier Common Voice data the reductions are smaller or inconsistent, indicating genuine recognition weaknesses rather than only script mismatch. Controlled stress tests show a 67% attenuation of artificial romanization-induced WER inflation, while lexical-substitution controls show near-identical sensitivity to semantic errors, with Delta SN-WER / Delta WER approximately 1.09. SN-WER is robust to transliterator choice, normalization changes, and shows low token-collision rates below 0.1% in the evaluated Indic setting. We argue that SN-WER should be reported alongside WER and CER as a companion metric for script-insensitive ASR evaluation, especially when transcripts feed downstream search, indexing, or multilingual LLM pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的评估ASR模型的指标Script-Normalized WER（SN-WER），能有效减少由转写脚本不同导致的错误评估。
AI.motivation: 当前ASR的主流指标WER在多语种或异体字脚本情况下会高估模型错误，尤其是在参考和结果文本使用不同书写体系（如罗马化文字）时，这会不合理拉大模型之间的差距。
AI.method: SN-WER无需改动模型或训练流程，只在评估时将参考与假设文本都转写为该语言的标准脚本，再计算WER，从而规避不同脚本带来的误差偏差。
AI.result: 在5种印度语言、2个数据集和3个ASR模型的实验中，SN-WER显著降低了脚本不一致导致的误差，如在FLEURS数据集上模型间差距最多减少12%；对脚本化造假测试能减少67%的WER虚高；对语义错误的检测几乎不变。此外，该方法对转写器和规范化方式鲁棒，碰撞率极低。
AI.conclusion: SN-WER有效修正了脚本差异导致的误判，应作为WER和CER的补充，用于更公平、脚本无关的ASR评估，尤其适用于下游多语种应用场景。

title: RescueBench: Can Embodied Agents Save Lives in the Wild ?
summary: Search-and-rescue (SAR) requires embodied agents to explore unfamiliar environments under multimodal uncertainty, perform multi-stage interactions, and retrieve spatial memory over long horizons. Existing benchmarks typically evaluate these capabilities in isolation, leaving unclear how failures compound when they must be composed in realistic workflows. We introduce RescueBench, a photo-realistic diagnostic benchmark that instantiates SAR as a four-stage pipeline: multimodal exploration, target rescue, memory-guided return, and final handoff. By combining sequential task composition with stage-level evaluation, RescueBench enables analysis of how exploration and memory failures propagate through embodied rescue workflows. It contains five progressive difficulty levels that vary in environmental complexity, clue ambiguity, and spatial hierarchy, along with an automatic episode generation and annotation pipeline for scalable evaluation and training. We evaluate seven baselines, an oracle reference, and human players, showing that no baselines complete the full task at the greatest difficulty. Stage-level diagnosis identifies autonomous exploration as the dominant failure mode and spatial memory as a second, independent bottleneck, suggesting that these limitations are not resolved by current topological visual-language navigation or map-based methods. Code is available in https://github.com/wukui-muc/RescueBench

AI.tldr: RescueBench是一个专为搜救任务设计的高真实感基准测试，通过分阶段考察体现在探索、救援、记忆返回与交付等多方面能力，是目前评价多模态自主体多环节决策能力的新工具。
AI.motivation: 目前主流基准测试通常将探索、不确定性、空间记忆等能力分开考察，未能揭示这些能力在现实任务流程中串联后错误累加的真实影响。该研究针对搜救场景，提出更复杂和贴近实际需求的连续考查框架。
AI.method: RescueBench将搜救流程分为四个环节（多模态探索、目标救援、基于记忆的返回、最终交付），提供五种难度级别和自动生成、标注episode的工具，并对七种主流基线方法、Oracle和人类进行了系统评测，分环节诊断失败原因。
AI.result: 结果显示，在最高难度下无现有基线方法能够完整完成任务。分阶段诊断发现，自主探索能力是主要失败源，空间记忆能力为第二大独立瓶颈，且这两种问题现有方法均未能有效解决。
AI.conclusion: RescueBench揭示了当前视觉-语言导航与基于地图方法在多环节复杂搜救任务中的局限，推动未来需要攻克自动探索与空间记忆等关键挑战，提升具身智能体的实用性。

title: HERO'S JOURNEY: Testing Complex Rule Induction with Text Games
summary: We introduce HERO'S JOURNEY, a benchmark for rule induction in goal-directed episodic tasks, where agents must infer hidden rules from demonstrations and act on them through multi-step execution. HERO'S JOURNEY covers eight tasks across attribute and procedural induction families, each with four structural rule forms, controllable lexical grounding, and identifiability conditions. Evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs, we find that models show evidence of rule induction, but the ability is limited and uneven across tasks. Meanwhile, process execution adds an execution bottleneck for models, whereas surface semantics has minimal effect. Induction-specific steering methods improve performance on attribute tasks but show no reliable gains on procedural tasks, suggesting the gap in procedural induction remains an open challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新基准HERO'S JOURNEY，用于评估智能体在目标导向任务中的规则归纳能力，测试现有大模型发现其表现有限且任务间不均衡。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在推理和归纳任务方面面临挑战，尤其在需要从示例中推断隐藏规则并执行复杂操作的场景。缺乏专门衡量这些能力的数据集和任务，驱动作者设计一个新的基准。
AI.method: 作者设计了HERO'S JOURNEY基准，涵盖8类任务，涉及属性归纳和过程归纳两大类，每类任务下设不同规则结构与可控词汇条件。通过多步执行，智能体需根据演示推理隐藏规则并应用。使用当前最先进的大模型进行评测，并比较不同归纳引导方法对表现的提升。
AI.result: 大模型在规则归纳任务中表现出一定能力，但表现有限且在不同任务间差异明显。在任务执行过程中模型遇到瓶颈，而表层语义对表现影响较小。特定归纳策略对属性任务有效，但对过程归纳无显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 现有大模型在规则归纳特别是过程归纳方面仍有明显短板，对应能力的提升和方法改进是未来需要攻克的重要难题。

title: Polaris: Scaling Up Instruction-Guided Image Generation Towards Millions of Personalized Style Needs
summary: Users increasingly expect image generation models to quickly adapt to highly diverse and personalized requirements, such as producing images with distinctive styles or characteristics. Traditional approaches rely on fine-tuning, which is costly and difficult to scale. To cope with these limitations, the community has accumulated a growing library of fine-tuned modules and adapters, where each component targets specific generation needs and collectively serves as a foundation for handling new demands. This naturally raises a question: instead of repeatedly training new models, can we systematically exploit this expanding ecosystem to better fulfill user instructions? To this end, we present Polaris, an intelligent retrieval framework that automatically selects and integrates suitable models from the model library based on a user's instructions. The key insight is that harnessing such a massive and heterogeneous pool requires not only finding the most relevant modules among thousands of candidates, but also aligning them effectively for instruction-driven generation and editing. Polaris addresses this challenge by indexing over 6,500 checkpoints and 75,000 adapters, and retrieving the most relevant components given a user's input and instruction. In doing so, it delivers scalable, controllable, and well-aligned generation -- without any additional training.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Polaris框架，无需再次对模型训练，可通过智能检索和组合已有的大量模型与适配器，实现用户指令驱动的图像生成和编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成需求多样、个性化，传统微调方式代价高且难以扩展。社区已积累大量微调模块，但如何高效利用这些资源，以满足新颖多变的用户需求，是待解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出Polaris框架，智能检索并整合模型库中的模型和适配器。通过索引6500+模型和75000+适配器，根据用户指令自动选择并组合最合适的模块，实现无须重新训练的新指令适应。
AI.result: Polaris能够高效地选取相关模块，支持大规模、可控、与用户指令高度对齐的图像生成和编辑，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: Polaris利用庞大的模型生态系统，有效提升了生成模型在多样化指令下的扩展性和灵活性，是图像生成领域的重要进展。

title: From Layers to Submodules: Rethinking Granularity in Replacement-Based LLM Compression
summary: Post-training compression of Large Language Models (LLMs) removes entire architectural components, either deleting them or replacing them with fitted modules. Existing replacement-based methods share two design constraints: full-layer granularity and contiguous selection. We argue that this is overly restrictive: in fact, redundancy in pretrained transformers is not confined to contiguous regions, nor does it evenly distribute between Attention and FeedForward outputs, implying that different strategies best approximate different submodule types and that removable components need not cluster within contiguous depth ranges. Based on this intuition, we introduce SubFit (Submodule-level Fitted residual replacement), which compresses LLMs at the submodule level: Attention and FeedForward submodules are selected non-contiguously, and each receives its own lightweight fitted residual bypass. SubFit operates post-training and requires only calibration data. Across ten LLMs (five base, five instruction-tuned), five sparsity levels from 12.5% to 37.5%, and four replacement-based baselines, SubFit achieves the best aggregate perplexity-accuracy trade-off across the evaluated sparsity levels, with larger gains under aggressive compression. At 25% sparsity, it retains 84.6% of dense downstream accuracy and incurs 2.42x perplexity degradation, against 81.6% and 4.34x for the strongest baselines, while delivering measurable inference speedup and KV-cache savings. Code is available at https://github.com/eliacunegatti/SubFit.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SubFit的全新后训练压缩方法，在LLM架构中以子模块级别选择性地替换注意力和前馈子模块，显著提升压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM压缩方法多依赖于全层或连续区域的组件替换，受限过多，无法充分利用Transformer冗余的非均匀性和非连续分布。作者希望通过更细粒度、更灵活的方式进行压缩，从而提升压缩后的模型性能。
AI.method: 提出SubFit——一种子模块级拟合残差替换方法，对注意力和前馈子模块分别进行选择，允许非连续地挑选可替换子模块，并对每个被替换子模块设计轻量级拟合残差bypass。方法仅需少量校准数据，完全在训练后进行。
AI.result: 在10个LLM（含基础和微调版）、5个稀疏率（12.5%-37.5%）和4个主流替换基线下实验，SubFit在各稀疏水平下获得最佳困惑度-准确率平衡：以25%稀疏率保留84.6%下游任务准确率，困惑度增长2.42倍，优于最强基线（81.6%、4.34倍）；此外还加快了推理速度，并节省KV-cache。
AI.conclusion: SubFit突破了传统层级与连续替换的限制，通过子模块级灵活选择和定制残差替换，实现了更高效的LLM压缩，兼顾模型性能与计算速度。

title: Deep Learning for Generating Computational PIN-4 Immunohistochemistry Staining from Prostate Biopsy H&E Images
summary: Immunohistochemistry (IHC)is frequently used to resolve diagnostically ambiguous prostate cancer biopsy findings on hematoxylin and eosin (H&E)-stained tissue. However, PIN-4 IHC staining is typically performed on adjacent tissue sections, limiting direct spatial comparison between the H&E morphology and the corresponding immunophenotypic signal. A paired, registered H&E/PIN-4 dataset was constructed from routine clinical prostate biopsy whole-slide images (WSIs), and a conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) was trained to synthesize PIN-4 staining patterns directly from native H&E image patches. The final dataset comprised 172 paired WSIs from 93 patients and 27,298 registered 1024x1024 patch pairs, spanning adenocarcinoma-positive and benign cases with representation across age, race, and ethnicity groups. The model was evaluated on a held-out test set of 1,814 patch pairs from 17 WSIs, achieving a mean peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 21.88 dB, structural similarity index measure (SSIM) of 0.667, Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) of 0.684, and learned perceptual image patch similarity (LPIPS) of 0.417. Qualitative review by a board-certified pathologist showed that generated images captured diagnostically relevant PIN-4 staining patterns, including AMACR/racemase expression and basal-cell-associated staining, while preserving spatial correspondence with the source H&E morphology. Accuracy of synthesis varied across morphologically complex regions, including high-grade carcinoma and intraductal carcinoma. These results support the feasibility of supervised PIN-4 synthesis from routinely acquired brightfield H&E prostate biopsy images. The approach enables direct interpretation of predicted PIN-4 marker patterns in the context of the source prostate H&E architecture, addressing a current spatial limitation of conventional adjacent-section IHC.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）直接从前列腺H&E切片图像合成PIN-4免疫组化染色结果，解决传统IHC依赖邻近切片比对的空间局限。实验显示合成效果具有较高图像与结构相似性，并被病理专家认可。
AI.motivation: 当前前列腺活检疑难病例需要IHC辅助诊断，但IHC通常在邻近切片上完成，难以直接与H&E形态学对应，存在空间不匹配问题。研究动机是实现PIN-4免疫组化信号直接由同一张H&E图像预测，提升空间比对能力和实际应用价值。
AI.method: 作者构建了由常规临床前列腺活检全切片数字影像注册配对的H&E/PIN-4数据集（93名患者共172张切片，27298对图像块），并训练条件GAN模型通过原始H&E图像块生成PIN-4染色图像。模型在独立测试集上评估并由病理专家进行定性验证。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上取得了PSNR为21.88 dB，SSIM为0.667，PCC为0.684，LPIPS为0.417的性能。主观评价显示合成的PIN-4图像能够真实反映关键的免疫表型特征、与原H&E结构高度对应，但在某些复杂病变区域表现略有不足。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了利用深度学习方法可从常规H&E切片高精度合成PIN-4染色，为后续在数字病理领域无创IHC评估乃至辅助诊断提供可行技术路径，有望解决临床IHC空间匹配难题并提升诊断效率。

title: Divide and Conquer: Reliable Multi-View Evidential Learning for Deepfake Detection
summary: With the evolution of generative models, deepfakes have achieved near-perfect semantic realism, leaving forensic traces only in subtle structural anomalies. However, existing single-view paradigms often fail to generalize, as dominant semantic features overwhelm subtle artifact cues within entangled representations. This imbalance leads to overconfident yet brittle predictions -- a phenomenon we term the Semantic Masking Effect. To address this challenge, we propose a reliable framework called Divide-and-Conquer Multi-View Evidential Learning (DiCoME) for Deepfake Detection. In the "Divide" phase, we employ Geometric View Purification to decompose the entangled representation space through principled geometric projection. This process suppresses semantic interference within artifact-sensitive representations, forming the foundation for decorrelated yet complementary semantic and artifact views. In the "Conquer" phase, we leverage Uncertainty-Aware Evidential Learning to synthesize these distinct views. By explicitly modeling the "epistemic conflict" between semantic and artifact cues, this mechanism provides calibrated uncertainty estimates instead of forcing rigid deterministic decisions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing approaches in generalization performance, while providing reliable uncertainty estimation for trustworthy deepfake detection. Code is available at https://github.com/kxl0825/DiCoME.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的深度伪造检测框架DiCoME，通过划分表征空间和不确定性建模，大幅提升了检测可靠性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 随着生成模型发展，深度伪造已难以仅凭传统痕迹识别。因此，如何分离真实语义与伪造微弱特征、抑制语义掩盖伪造线索成为挑战。
AI.method: 作者提出Divide-and-Conquer Multi-View Evidential Learning (DiCoME)方法。在“Divide”阶段，利用几何投影对特征表征空间去纠缠，提升对伪造痕迹的敏感性；“Conquer”阶段采用不确定性感知方法，将分离的多视角信息综合，显式建模不同特征间的冲突，输出更可靠的检测结果。
AI.result: 大量实验显示该方法在多个检测基准上均超越现有主流方法，尤其在泛化能力和结果不确定性估计方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DiCoME方法有效缓解了语义掩盖伪造特征的问题，实现了更稳健、可信的深度伪造检测。

title: Adversarial Attacks on Robot Localization Systems via Deep Feature Perturbation
summary: Robot localization systems are critical for autonomous navigation and safety. Adversarial perturbations can mislead these systems, resulting in mislocalization, navigation errors, or unsafe interactions, especially in mission-critical scenarios. This paper investigates the vulnerability of deep learning based localization pipelines to adversarial attacks. We propose a novel framework for generating adversarial queries that specifically target Product Quantization (PQ) in visual localization systems. Our method employs a Lightweight Product Quantization Network (LPQN) to perturb query feature encodings, misleading the retrieval process by returning semantically irrelevant database entries. Adversarial queries are generated via a two-phase procedure: a forward pass that perturbs feature distributions and a backward pass that refines the perturbation through optimization. The lightweight design of LPQN allows the creation of subtle yet highly effective perturbations with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments in both controlled and real-world robotic environments demonstrate that our approach substantially degrades PQN performance, exposing critical vulnerabilities in practical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了基于深度学习的视觉定位系统在产品量化方法（PQ）下易受对抗扰动攻击，提出了一种能有效干扰检索结果的新型对抗查询生成框架。
AI.motivation: 在自主导航等关键任务中，机器人依赖定位系统，然而现有定位系统容易被对抗攻击误导，严重时会导致导航失效及安全风险。因此，分析并提升定位系统的鲁棒性具有重要现实意义。
AI.method: 作者提出基于轻量级产品量化网络（LPQN）的对抗查询生成方法，分为正向扰动特征分布和反向优化精细扰动两阶段，通过最小计算开销生成能误导视觉检索的扰动查询。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在仿真和真实机器人场景下都能显著降低PQN定位准确性，表明普遍存在脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的产品量化视觉定位系统存在未被充分认知的安全隐患，需要针对这些对抗攻击开展进一步的防御和稳健性提升研究。

title: Collaborative Space Object Detection with Multi-Satellite Viewpoints in LEO Constellations
summary: With the growing number of satellites in low Earth orbit (LEO) constellations, the near-Earth space environment has become increasingly congested, making space object detection (SOD) a pressing challenge for space safety and sustainability. To mitigate collision risks and ensure the continuity of space operations, SOD systems must deliver fast and accurate detection under stringent onboard constraints. In this paper, we investigate the potential of multi-viewpoint observation fusion within a deep learning (DL) framework to enhance SOD performance. We design a practical multi-view pipeline and several input representations for feeding multi-view data into YOLO-based detectors. Our experiments show that using multi-view inputs is feasible in most cases and typically produces better results for mAP50 and mAP50-95. For example, in model YOLOv9-m, single-view compared to a three-view fused RGB setting, mAP50 increases from 0.638 to 0.732, while mAP50-95 improves from 0.227 to 0.276. Compared with the single-view setting, the best three-view grayscale configuration improves mAP50 by 36.3% and mAP50-95 by 46.5%. These findings establish multi-view fusion as a viable and effective strategy for SOD, with broad implications for space situational awareness in LEO constellation deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过多视角融合的方法，提升低轨卫星轨道空间目标检测（SOD）的准确性和鲁棒性。实验显示，基于YOLO的多视角输入模型在mAP指标上显著优于单视角，验证了多视角融合在太空目标检测中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着低轨卫星数量激增，近地空间环境日益拥挤，碰撞风险和空间安全问题突出。因此，高效、精准的空间目标检测（SOD）方法亟需发展，以支持空间可持续和卫星安全运行。
AI.method: 设计了基于YOLO的多视角输入方法，通过多种数据融合方式，将不同视角观测数据输入YOLO深度学习模型，比较单视角与多视角检测效果。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，多视角输入在大多数情况下可行，并能显著提升检测准确率。例如，YOLOv9-m模型下，三视角RGB融合比单视角mAP50提升约14.7%，mAP50-95提升约21.6%；三视角灰度融合效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: 多视角融合是一种有效提升空间目标检测性能的策略，对于支持低轨卫星星座的空间态势感知具有重要推动作用。

title: Train, Test, Re-evaluate: Schedule-Sensitive Evaluation of Generative Data for Hand Detection
summary: Generated (or synthetic) image data is increasingly used to augment or replace real training datasets when target imagery is scarce, expensive, or biased. For hand detection, particularly in occupational safety settings, public datasets mostly contain bare hands. This under-represents the variation in hand appearance introduced by gloves, tattoos, jewelry, and other personal protective equipment, creating a distribution shift that safety-critical applications encounter at deployment. We test whether generative inpainting, editing only the hand region of a real photograph to introduce accessories, can close this shift gap. On a paired dataset of real images and their synthetic counterparts, we train YOLOv8n hand detectors under six training-and-scheduling regimes (Experiments A-F, three random seeds each), evaluate every detector on a real test set and on a real-gloves-only test split, and report the mean average precision (mAP) at two overlap thresholds (mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95) along with paired statistical tests. A two-stage experiment: train on real U synthetic data, then fine-tune the resulting weights on real-only at a lower learning rate, increases mAP@0.5 compared to the real-only baseline model on the standard real test set, and improves the real-gloves out-of-distribution gap. Another three-stage experiment preserves box-tightness best, reaching the highest mAP@0.5:0.95 of any other experiment in the study. The synthetic-data utility for safety-critical hand detection is determined by the training procedure, and simple multi-stage experiments extract substantial real-deployment benefit from inpainted accessory data.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过生成式图像（在真实照片的手部区域添加配饰）提升手部检测模型，弥补真实数据集中手部多样性（如手套、饰品等）不足对安全关键应用的影响，并通过多阶段训练方案提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公开手部检测数据集多以裸手为主，缺乏适用于实际场景（如安全防护手套、饰品等丰富手部外观）的多样性，导致部署时模型表现下降。为解决手部外观分布偏移，需采用生成式数据补足训练集。
AI.method: 采用生成式修补，仅在真实图片手部区域添加手套、饰品等配饰，得到配对的真实/合成数据。分别在六种训练-调度方案下，基于YOLOv8n手部检测器训练测试，评估每个模型在真实测试集和仅含手套真实测试集上的性能（mAP@0.5和mAP@0.5:0.95），并进行配对统计检验。
AI.result: 双阶段实验（先用真实+合成数据训练，再用真实数据低学习率微调）在标准测试集上mAP@0.5高于仅用真实数据，且改善了现实“仅手套场景”的分布偏移问题。三阶段实验在边框精度（mAP@0.5:0.95）上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 生成式手部加配饰数据能有效提升安全关键场景下的手部检测表现，而具体训练流程对性能收益影响很大，多阶段训练能充分发挥合成数据效用。

title: Auteur: Language-Driven Cinematographic Framing for Human-Centric Video Generation
summary: Generative video models have achieved remarkable visual fidelity and temporal coherence, yet intentional camera control remains elusive. Existing frameworks treat camera motion as a byproduct of pixel synthesis, producing trajectories that are stochastic, spatially inconsistent, and indifferent to the human subject driving the scene. In this work, we present Auteur, a method for language-driven, human-centric camera framing in generative video. Our core insight is that professional filmmakers conceive shots not as world-space trajectories but as framings defined relative to the actor, encoding shot size, angle, and composition as functions of human pose and motion. We formalize this intuition as a human-centric camera parameterization and introduce a Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that is convertible to standard 6-DoF camera parameters. A fine-tuned multimodal large language model then acts as a virtual director, mapping natural language descriptions and coarse human motion to sparse DSL keyframes that are deterministically interpolated into continuous camera trajectories, which are then provided as input to video generators. We train and evaluate Auteur on a new dataset of 34K aligned text, human motion, and DSL-annotated camera trajectories drawn from procedural synthesis and real-world movie footage from the CondensedMovies dataset. Auteur enables cinematographic framing of human-centered scenes, a capability largely absent in prior generative models. To assess this behavior, we propose new framing-focused metrics, and our experiments show that Auteur consistently outperforms existing methods

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种名为Auteur的新方法，实现了在生成视频中基于语言的人体中心化摄像机取景控制，有效提升了摄像机运动的意图性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成视频模型尽管在视觉质量和时序一致性上表现出色，但对摄像机运动的控制力不足，摄像头轨迹往往随机且缺乏与场景主体（如人）的关联，无法满足专业影视制作需求。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种以人为中心的摄像机参数化方式，并设计了一个可以转化为标准6自由度摄像机参数的领域专用语言（DSL）。通过微调多模态大型语言模型，使其根据自然语言描述和人体动作生成关键性摄像机DSL帧，进一步插值得到连续的摄像机轨迹，最后输入至视频生成模型。训练和评估主要基于新构建的包含3.4万组文本、人体动作与摄像机标注数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明Auteur在以人为中心的场景中能实现更为专业的摄像取景效果，显著优于现有方法。作者还提出了新颖的以取景为核心的评测指标，验证了方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Auteur方法显著提升了生成视频中摄像机对人类主体的取景能力，为生成模型带来了电影级的视觉体验，弥补了之前模型在摄像机控制上的不足。

title: The Image Reconstruction Game: Drawing Common Ground Through Iterative Multimodal Dialogue
summary: We introduce the Image Reconstruction Game, a fully automated benchmark in which a vision-language model issues corrective instructions to an image generator across multiple turns, making accumulated common ground directly observable as a rendered image. Benchmarking two Describer models crossed with two Generator models across seven image categories, we find that the describer is the dominant factor in reconstruction quality, while the generator determines whether iterative refinement helps or hurts. Mathematical and geometric images pose the greatest challenge. The describer's token budget strongly affects convergence: shorter budgets yield sparser first renderings with more room for visible improvement, while longer budgets raise absolute quality but leave less to fix. Stronger describers use a richer correction vocabulary spanning spatial, numeric, and structural categories, while weaker describers concentrate on surface properties and tend to stop after a few turns. Human validation shows that the best automated judge reaches only slight-to-fair agreement with human preferences, and automated scores require human recalibration to be used reliably.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Image Reconstruction Game，一种由视觉-语言模型引导图像生成器逐步修图的自动化评测基准，并分析了描述器与生成器在多轮交互中的影响及挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言系统缺乏直观且自动化的方法来观察和分析模型间多轮交互过程中共同认知的积累。研究旨在填补此空白，通过可视化生成过程量化和研究描述器、生成器间的协作。
AI.method: 构建自动化评测平台Image Reconstruction Game，让“Describer”模型提出纠正性指令，由“Generator”模型依指令多轮修正图像，涵盖7类图片（包括数学、几何类等），并进行不同描述器/生成器组合同台对比。分析描述器的token预算、修正表达能力及对生成质量的影响，并用人工验证自动评分体系。
AI.result: 描述器模型对最终图像重构质量起主导作用，生成器影响多轮修正的有效性。数学和几何图像最难重构。描述器的token预算影响初始、迭代效果。强描述器能更丰富地提出空间、结构等多方面改进，弱描述器更多聚焦表面属性。自动评价与人工偏好仅部分吻合，需人工调优自动分数以增强可靠性。
AI.conclusion: Image Reconstruction Game为理解和评测视觉-语言模型间多轮交互提供了新工具。提升描述器能力、优化自动评测对齐人类偏好是未来关键方向。

title: Residual Decoder Adapter: ID-Preserving Tokenizer Adaption for Autoregressive Text Rendering
summary: Visual Autoregressive (AR) models generate images by predicting discrete tokens that are decoded by a visual tokenizer. Despite demonstrating strong overall image generation ability, they still underperform on text rendering with blur strokes and disrupt letter shapes. In this work, we trace this limitation to the visual tokenizer, which struggles to reconstruct fine-grained detail. Improving the tokenizer is straightforward but expensive, as it necessitates retraining both the tokenizer and the AR model. Can we improve text rendering performance of AR models without retraining the existing tokenizer and AR model? To achieve this, we propose the Residual Decoder Adapter(RDA) that upgrades an existing tokenizer post-hoc without changing its token space. Specifically, it refines the decoder output of the visual tokenizer by introducing two novel components: (i) a paired codebook that shares the token distribution with the original one; (ii) a parallel branch to learn the tiny differences (residual) between the reconstructed image and the ground-truth images in the pixel space. This residual design allows us to enhance the tokenizer non-invasively while preserving compatibility with prior AR models. RDA substantially improves text rendering significantly by a large margin. For instance, we boost finetuned Janus-Pro OCR accuracy rises from 24.52% to 58.26% (TextVisionBlend), from 12.75% to 36.81% (StyledTextSynth) on competitive TextAtlas benchmark. The code is available at https://github.com/CSU-JPG/RDA

AI.tldr: 该论文指出当前视觉自回归模型在文本渲染上表现不佳，原因在于视觉分词器难以还原细节。提出了无需重训练原有模型即可提升文本渲染的RDA方法，显著提升了OCR等任务表现。
AI.motivation: 视觉自回归模型虽然总体生成能力强，但在文本渲染中存在字符模糊、结构变形问题。问题根源在于视觉分词器重构细粒度细节能力有限。现有解决方法需高成本重训练，亟需一种低成本优化方案。
AI.method: 提出了Residual Decoder Adapter（RDA），作为视觉分词器解码阶段的插件。其包含：1）共享原有分词器分布的配对码本；2）并行分支学习像素空间的残差，以补偿分词器重构与真实图像间细微差异。整个过程无需更换token空间和重新训练已有AR模型。
AI.result: RDA在多个文本渲染任务中提升显著。例如在TextAtlas基准上，将Janus-Pro OCR在TextVisionBlend任务上的准确率从24.52%提升至58.26%，在StyledTextSynth任务上从12.75%提升至36.81%。
AI.conclusion: RDA方法能以低成本方式非侵入性地升级现有视觉分词器，有效提升文本渲染表现，并兼容所有基于旧分词器的AR模型。

title: Pool-Select-Refine: Allocation-Aware Generative Dataset Distillation with Soft-Label-Guided Latent Refinement
summary: Diffusion-based dataset distillation has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for condensing large-scale datasets into compact synthetic sets. By leveraging pretrained generative priors, these methods can produce realistic class-conditional samples more efficiently than traditional matching-based approaches. However, most existing diffusion-based methods still adopt a rigid ``Generate-and-Use'' strategy, where the generated samples are directly treated as the final distilled set under a fixed images-per-class budget. Such a design tightly couples candidate generation with final budget allocation, which may result in redundant waste of the limited budget or insufficiently informative samples. In this paper, we propose ``Pool-Select-Refine'', a two-stage framework for allocation-aware generative dataset distillation. First, instead of directly using a fixed number of generated samples, we construct an over-complete candidate pool and select a compact subset under the target budget. Second, we refine the selected samples in latent space using soft-label supervision derived from the teacher model, improving semantic alignment while preserving the generative prior. This design explicitly decouples generation, selection, and refinement, enabling more effective use of the distillation budget. Experiments on large-scale and fine-grained image classification benchmarks show that the proposed framework delivers consistent gains over diffusion-based baselines. The results suggest that introducing a curation stage before refinement is a simple yet effective way to improve diffusion-based dataset distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于扩散模型的数据集蒸馏框架“Pool-Select-Refine”，有效提升了生成数据集的质量和利用率。
AI.motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的数据集蒸馏方法通常采用“生成-使用”的刚性策略：直接生成数量固定的样本作为最终数据集。这种方式无法灵活分配有限的样本预算，容易出现冗余浪费或信息量不足的问题。
AI.method: 作者提出了“Pool-Select-Refine”两阶段框架。第一阶段，生成一个超额的候选样本池，然后根据目标预算从中挑选最优子集。第二阶段，对选中的样本在潜空间中进行软标签微调，以提升语义对齐，同时保持生成先验。该流程将生成、选择和精炼步骤解耦。
AI.result: 在大规模和细粒度图像分类基准上，所提方法相较于现有扩散模型蒸馏方法取得了持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 在生成与筛选之间增加“筛选-精炼”流程，显著提升了基于扩散模型的数据集蒸馏效果，是一种简单但有效的改进方式。

title: Jailbreaking Multimodal Large Language Models using Multi-Clip Video
comment: 27 pages, 20 figures, Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026
summary: As multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced to process video inputs, concerns have emerged about their potential for malicious misuse. Prior jailbreak studies have shown that safety alignment in MLLMs can be bypassed through visual inputs, yet it remains unclear which properties of video inputs induce this vulnerability. To address this gap, we introduce Multi-Clip Video (MCV) SafetyBench, a dataset of 2,920 videos designed to evaluate how the diversity of video inputs affects the vulnerability of MLLMs. Each video consists of multiple short clips depicting diverse contexts related to a harmful query. Experiments on eight representative video MLLMs show that attack success consistently increases with the number of clips. Our results further indicate that the video modality is (1) more vulnerable than the image modality, (2) more vulnerable to dynamic videos than to static videos, and (3) more vulnerable when videos contain more diverse contexts. Building on these findings, we propose a defense strategy that leverages the relative robustness of the image modality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为MCV SafetyBench的视频基准数据集，用于系统研究多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在输入视频多样性下的安全性漏洞，并发现视频输入格式比图像更易被攻破。
AI.motivation: 随着MLLMs能够处理视频输入，其被恶意利用的安全问题增加，但目前尚不清楚导致这些漏洞的视频输入特性，因此有必要系统研究视频输入的安全隐患。
AI.method: 作者构建了MCV SafetyBench数据集（包含2920个多短片多样化场景视频），并设计实验，考察增加视频片段数和多样性对8个主流视频MLLM模型安全能力的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，当视频片段数量增多或场景更丰富时，模型被攻击成功率显著升高。同时，视频模态整体上比图像更脆弱，动态图像比静态视频更易被利用。
AI.conclusion: 多样化和动态的视频输入会明显削弱MLLM的安全性，文章提出可通过加强图像模态的防护来提升整体抗攻击能力。

title: 3rd Place at CVPR 2026 CASTLE Challenge: Agentic Multi-View Long-Context Video Understanding via Hierarchical Knowledge Graph Retrieval
summary: This paper presents our winning methodology for the CASTLE 2026 Challenge at the CVPR 2026 EgoVis Workshop, where our team secured third place globally. The challenge tasks participants with answering highly complex visual, spatiotemporal, and verbal questions, including visual counting, action localization, multi-view tracking and speaker temporal reasoning, within massive, multimodal video streams. The underlying dataset consists of over 600 hours synchronized footage captured by 15 ego and exo camera sources. To tackle the extreme scale and long-context demands of this environment, we introduce a training-free agentic framework optimized for long-form video understanding. Our framework introduces two core architectural components: i) a Video Knowledge Graph that maps static and dynamic entities, their temporal relationships, and intersecting events to enable multi-hop relational reasoning, and ii) an adaptive agentic workflow that resolves complex queries through a hierarchical retrieval and indexing. Empirical results demonstrate that our framework achieves high zero-shot reasoning accuracy on long-context multi-view streams. Our code will be released at https://github.com/RaghadKhaled/CASTLE-Challenge-Framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的agentic框架，用于理解大规模、长时上下文多模态视频流，并在CASTLE 2026挑战赛中全球排名第三。
AI.motivation: CASTLE 2026挑战要求在极具挑战性的多镜头视频流中处理和理解视觉、时空和语言等复杂问题，现有方法在长时上下文处理及多模态推理上存在显著局限。
AI.method: 提出了两大架构组件：1）视频知识图谱，映射实体及其时序互动关系，实现多跳关系推理；2）自适应agentic工作流，采用分层检索和索引机制高效解决复杂查询。整个方法为训练自由、面向长期视频理解设计。
AI.result: 实验证明该框架在多视角长时视频上的零样本推理准确率较高，在全球挑战赛中取得第三名的成绩。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效解决长时上下文下的多视图视频理解和复杂问题推理难题，并展现出对未来多模态视频推理方向的推动潜力。

title: InfoMerge: Information-aware Token Compression for Efficient Video Large Language Models
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) achieve strong performance in video understanding, but their excessive visual tokens bring substantial computational overhead. Existing training-free compression methods improve inference efficiency by reducing visual tokens, yet they often rely on local adjacent-frame similarity for temporal redundancy estimation or allocate token budgets mainly according to segment length. Such designs are sensitive to frame-level noise and fail to capture the non-uniform information distribution of real-world videos. To address these challenges, we propose InfoMerge, a training-free visual token compression method that improves token utilization through robust redundancy estimation and content-aware budget allocation. Specifically, we propose the Temporal Fingerprint Difference: a segment-level second-order temporal redundancy estimation strategy, which models the temporal similarity structure of tokens at the same spatial positions within each segment. We further introduce Content-Aware Budget Allocation (CABA), which dynamically allocates segment-level token budgets based on segment uniqueness and spectral-entropy-based representational richness. By reducing repeated preservation of redundant static regions and allocating more tokens to informative segments, InfoMerge makes better use of the limited token budget while maintaining strong performance. Extensive experiments show that InfoMerge achieves strong efficiency--accuracy trade-offs across multiple benchmarks and backbones, with more pronounced advantages under aggressive compression. On LLaVA-OneVision-7B, InfoMerge retains 98.8\% of the original average performance while reducing 85\% of visual tokens and achieving a 4.24-fold speedup in the prefill stage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视频大模型（Video-LLMs）的零训练视觉token压缩方法InfoMerge，大幅降低计算量同时维持高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频大模型因视觉token数过多导致推理计算开销巨大。虽然已有方法通过减少token数量提升效率，但主要基于临近帧相似性或按片段长度分配token，易受噪声影响且难以适应视频中非均匀的信息分布。
AI.method: InfoMerge为一种零训练token压缩方法，其核心包括：1）提出时序指纹差异（Temporal Fingerprint Difference），在片段层面进行二阶时序冗余估计，建模同一空间位置token的时序相似性结构；2）提出内容感知预算分配（CABA），基于片段独特性和谱熵的表示丰富度动态分配token预算。这样可以减少冗余静态区域的重复token，并为信息丰富片段分配更多token。
AI.result: 在多个基准和主干网络上，InfoMerge在大幅减少视觉token（85%）的情况下，能保留近原始精度（98.8%），预填阶段速度提升4.24倍。优势在高压缩比下更明显。
AI.conclusion: InfoMerge无需训练、高效且稳健，能够极大改善视频大模型推理的速度与资源消耗，同时保持优秀的理解能力。

title: Unified Driving Tokens: Representation- and Geometry-Guided Discrete Tokenizer for Driving World Models and Planning
summary: Discrete visual tokens should provide a compact representation for both token-based world modeling and planning in autonomous driving. However, most tokenizers are inherited from image generation and are optimized mainly for pixel reconstruction, which may leave a gap between what is easy to generate and what is useful to decode for driving decisions. We present a representation-guided and geometry-enhanced tokenizer that learns discrete tokens under joint supervision. The tokenizer aligns its discrete bottleneck with a frozen DINO feature space through feature decoding, while preserving appearance via RGB reconstruction with perceptual and adversarial losses. To inject geometric state-related cues, we add adjacent-frame depth and relative-pose supervision during training and stabilize joint objectives with multi-codebook quantization. We evaluate the same learned tokens with a lightweight planning readout and a GPT-style next-token world model. Experiments on NAVSIM show improved reconstruction fidelity and representation consistency, competitive planning performance under a fixed decoder, and better generative quality under matched settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种专为自动驾驶优化的离散视觉Tokenizer，兼顾重建质量与对驾驶决策有用的表示能力，并在NAVSIM上实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 主流的视觉Tokenizer多为图像生成设计，主要优化像素重建，未充分考虑自动驾驶场景下对表征和推理的需求，存在生成容易但实用性不强的缺陷。
AI.method: 设计了‘表示引导、几何增强’的Tokenizer。方法包括：1）离散瓶颈对齐预训练DINO特征空间；2）结合RGB感知和对抗损失优化外观重建；3）加入邻帧深度和相对姿态监督以注入几何信息；4）多码簿量化以稳定多重目标优化。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM数据集上，所提Tokenizer表现出更高的重建保真度、表征一致性，并在固定解码和生成质量评测下分别达到有竞争力的规划表现和更好的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于表示和几何增强的Token学习能够更好为自动驾驶世界建模与决策服务，相较现有像素重建导向方法，在表达质量和下游任务均有优势。

title: Multimodal Approaches for Visually-Rich Document Type Classification: A Comparative Analysis
summary: Document type classification in visually rich documents remains challenging, as relevant information is distributed across textual, visual, and layout modalities. To capture this complexity, current approaches rely on diverse multimodal modeling strategies, resulting in heterogeneous architectures that complicate systematic comparison.
